backend/src/modules/chatbot/chatbot.controller.js

Source file 14 of 111

import mongoose from "mongoose";
import ChatQA from "../../shared/models/ChatQA.js";
import LiveChatThread from "../../shared/models/LiveChatThread.js";
import LiveChatMessage from "../../shared/models/LiveChatMessage.js";
import User from "../../shared/models/User.js";
import { notifyLiveChatMessage } from "../../shared/utils/notificationEmail.js";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../shared/utils/roles.js";
import { getPublicBaseUrl } from "../../shared/utils/publicBaseUrl.js";
import { buildAllHelpArticles } from "../../../../frontend/src/features/user/helpContent.js";
import { buildAdminHelpArticles } from "../../../../frontend/src/features/admin/adminHelpContent.js";

const MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 1000;
const MAX_AI_INPUT_LENGTH = 500;
const DEFAULT_AI_MODELS = [
  "gemini-2.5-flash",
  "gemini-2.5-flash-lite",
  "gemini-flash-latest",
  "gemini-2.0-flash",
  "gemini-2.0-flash-lite",
  "gemini-1.5-flash",
  "gemini-1.5-flash-8b"
];

const GEMINI_API_BASES = [
  "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta",
  "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1"
];

const HELP_CENTER_ARTICLES = buildAllHelpArticles().map((article) => ({
  ...article,
  audience: "user",
  linkPath: "/help-center"
}));

const ADMIN_HELP_CENTER_ARTICLES = buildAdminHelpArticles().map((article) => ({
  ...article,
  audience: "admin",
  linkPath: "/admin-help-center"
}));

const CHATBOT_HELP_ARTICLES = [...HELP_CENTER_ARTICLES, ...ADMIN_HELP_CENTER_ARTICLES];

const postJson = async (urlString, body, apiKey) => {
  const response = await fetch(urlString, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "x-goog-api-key": apiKey
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
    signal: AbortSignal.timeout(12000)
  });

  let parsed = {};
  try {
    parsed = await response.json();
  } catch (_error) {
    parsed = {};
  }

  if (!response.ok) {
    const reason = parsed?.error?.message || `AI request failed (${response.status})`;
    throw new Error(reason);
  }

  return parsed;
};

const extractAiAnswer = (payload) => {
  const candidateParts = payload?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts;
  if (Array.isArray(candidateParts)) {
    const text = candidateParts.map((part) => String(part?.text || "")).join("").trim();
    if (text) return text;
  }
  return "";
};

const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase();

const tokenize = (value) =>
  normalizeText(value)
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, " ")
    .split(/\s+/)
    .map((item) => item.trim())
    .filter((item) => item.length >= 3);

const escapeRegExp = (value) => String(value || "").replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");

const questionImpliesSteps = (question) => /(^|\b)(how|steps|step|guide|process|procedure|where do i|how do i|what do i do)\b/i.test(String(question || ""));

const articlePath = (article) => {
  const title = String(article?.title || "").trim();
  if (String(article?.audience || "").trim().toLowerCase() === "admin") {
    return "/help-center";
  }
  return `/help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(title)}`;
};

const articleUrl = (article) => {
  const baseUrl = getPublicBaseUrl("http://localhost:5173");
  return `${baseUrl}${articlePath(article)}`;
};

const scoreHelpArticle = (question, article) => {
  const query = normalizeText(question);
  const queryTokens = tokenize(question);
  const haystack = [
    article?.title,
    article?.description,
    article?.topLevel,
    article?.section,
    article?.category,
    ...(Array.isArray(article?.steps) ? article.steps : []),
    article?.tip,
    article?.audience
  ]
    .map((item) => String(item || ""))
    .join(" ")
    .toLowerCase();

  let score = 0;
  for (const token of queryTokens) {
    if (!token) continue;
    const matches = haystack.match(new RegExp(`\\b${escapeRegExp(token)}\\b`, "g"));
    if (matches?.length) {
      score += matches.length;
      if (normalizeText(article?.title).includes(token)) score += 3;
      if (normalizeText(article?.category).includes(token) || normalizeText(article?.section).includes(token)) score += 1;
    }
  }

  if (query && normalizeText(article?.title) === query) score += 10;
  if (query && normalizeText(article?.title).includes(query)) score += 6;
  if (/admin|dashboard|reservation|payment|refund|download|support|chat/.test(query) && haystack.includes(query)) score += 2;
  return score;
};

const findRelevantHelpArticles = (question, limit = 4) =>
  CHATBOT_HELP_ARTICLES
    .map((article) => ({ article, score: scoreHelpArticle(question, article) }))
    .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
    .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score || String(left.article?.title || "").localeCompare(String(right.article?.title || "")))
    .slice(0, limit)
    .map((item) => item.article);

const formatHelpLinks = (articles) => {
  if (!articles.length) return "";
  const uniqueLines = [];
  const seen = new Set();
  for (const article of articles) {
    const href = articlePath(article);
    const label = String(article?.audience || "").trim().toLowerCase() === "admin"
      ? "Help Center"
      : String(article?.title || "Help Center").trim() || "Help Center";
    const key = `${label}|${href}`;
    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
    seen.add(key);
    uniqueLines.push(`- ${label}: ${href}`);
  }
  return [
    "Helpful links:",
    ...uniqueLines
  ].join("\n");
};

const formatHowToReply = (question, articles, qaAnswer = "") => {
  const primary = articles[0] || null;
  const intro = qaAnswer || primary?.description || "Here's the easiest way to do that in SnapQueue.";
  const steps = Array.isArray(primary?.steps) ? primary.steps.filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3) : [];
  const parts = [intro];
  if (steps.length) {
    parts.push("", "Steps:");
    steps.forEach((step, index) => {
      parts.push(`${index + 1}. ${step}`);
    });
  }
  if (primary?.tip) {
    parts.push("", `Tip: ${primary.tip}`);
  }
  const linksBlock = formatHelpLinks(articles);
  if (linksBlock) {
    parts.push("", linksBlock);
  }
  return parts.join("\n").trim();
};

const formatArticleSummaryReply = (articles, qaAnswer = "") => {
  const primary = articles[0] || null;
  const parts = [
    qaAnswer || primary?.description || "Here's the most relevant SnapQueue help guidance for that."
  ];
  if (primary) {
    parts.push("", `Best match: ${primary.title}.`);
    if (primary?.tip) {
      parts.push(`Tip: ${primary.tip}`);
    }
  }
  const linksBlock = formatHelpLinks(articles);
  if (linksBlock) {
    parts.push("", linksBlock);
  }
  return parts.join("\n").trim();
};

const formatQuickLinks = (items = []) => {
  const lines = (Array.isArray(items) ? items : [])
    .map((item) => {
      const label = String(item?.label || "").trim();
      const href = String(item?.href || "").trim();
      if (!label || !href) return "";
      return `- ${label}: ${href}`;
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  return lines.length ? ["Helpful links:", ...lines].join("\n") : "";
};

const inferQuickLinksFromQuestion = (question) => {
  const input = String(question || "").toLowerCase();

  if (/book|reservation|reserve|schedule/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Reservation", href: "/reservation" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/payment|gcash|maya|pay|reference/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/refund|payout|refund status/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/delivery|download|release|ready|archive|media|photo|video|file/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
      { label: "Media Archive", href: "/dashboard?tab=photos" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/status|progress|workflow|editing/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
      { label: "Booking History", href: "/dashboard?tab=history" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/profile|account|phone|email|change password|settings/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Settings", href: "/dashboard?tab=settings" },
      { label: "Profile", href: "/dashboard?tab=profile" }
    ]);
  }
  if (/chat admin|live chat|support|message admin/.test(input)) {
    return formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Chat Admin", href: "/dashboard?tab=messages" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
  }

  return "";
};

const ensureSentenceEnding = (value) => {
  const text = String(value || "").trim();
  if (!text) return "";
  return /[.!?]$/.test(text) ? text : `${text}.`;
};

const cleanHelpfulLinkLabel = (label, fallbackHref = "") => {
  const normalized = String(label || "")
    .replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\/dashboard\?tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\bdashboard\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\badmin-help-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/\bhelp-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/">/g, "")
    .replace(/[?]+/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s*folders?\b/gi, "")
    .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s*:\s*$/g, "")
    .trim();

  if (/media archive/i.test(normalized)) return "Media Archive";
  if (/booking history/i.test(normalized)) return "Booking History";
  if (/project status/i.test(normalized)) return "Project Status";
  if (/receipt preview/i.test(normalized)) return "Receipt Preview";
  if (/phone number is already registered/i.test(normalized)) return "Phone Number Already Registered";
  if (/help center/i.test(normalized)) return "Help Center";
  if (/payments?/i.test(normalized)) return "Payments";
  if (/dashboard/i.test(normalized)) return "Dashboard";
  if (/reservation/i.test(normalized)) return "Reservation";

  if (normalized) return normalized;
  if (fallbackHref.includes("/admin-help-center")) return "Admin Help";
  if (fallbackHref.includes("/help-center")) return "Help Center";
  return "Open link";
};

const normalizeHelpfulLinkLine = (line) => {
  const match = String(line || "").trim().match(/^-\s*(.+?):\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)$/i);
  if (!match) return line;

  let href = match[2].trim();
  try {
    if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(href)) {
      const parsed = new URL(href);
      href = `${parsed.pathname}${parsed.search}`;
    }
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep original href when URL parsing fails.
  }

  const label = cleanHelpfulLinkLabel(match[1], href);
  return `- ${label}: ${href}`;
};

const cleanAnswerArtifacts = (text) =>
  String(text || "")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=payments"[^>]*>\s*Payments\s*<\/a>/gi, "Payments")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=photos"[^>]*>\s*Media Archive\s*<\/a>/gi, "Media Archive")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=history"[^>]*>\s*Booking History\s*<\/a>/gi, "Booking History")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=progress"[^>]*>\s*Project Status\s*<\/a>/gi, "Project Status")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=messages"[^>]*>\s*Chat Admin\s*<\/a>/gi, "Chat Admin")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=settings"[^>]*>\s*Settings\s*<\/a>/gi, "Settings")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>\s*([^<]+?)\s*<\/a>/gi, (_match, _href, label) => String(label || "").trim())
    .replace(
      /(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=([a-z-]+)(?:"|&quot;)?>([A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s-]+)/gi,
      (_match, tabName, label) => {
        const normalizedTab = String(tabName || "").toLowerCase();
        const cleanedLabel = String(label || "").trim();
        if (cleanedLabel) return cleanedLabel;
        if (normalizedTab === "payments") return "Payments";
        if (normalizedTab === "photos") return "Media Archive";
        if (normalizedTab === "history") return "Booking History";
        if (normalizedTab === "progress") return "Project Status";
        if (normalizedTab === "messages") return "Chat Admin";
        if (normalizedTab === "settings") return "Settings";
        return "Dashboard";
      }
    )
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=payments\b/gi, "Payments")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=photos\b/gi, "Media Archive")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=history\b/gi, "Booking History")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=progress\b/gi, "Project Status")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=messages\b/gi, "Chat Admin")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\?tab=settings\b/gi, "Settings")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?dashboard\b/gi, "Dashboard")
    .replace(/&quot;|">/g, "")
    .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ")
    .trim();

const removeNonLinkHelpfulLinks = (text) => {
  const lines = String(text || "").split("\n");
  const nextLines = [];

  for (let index = 0; index < lines.length; index += 1) {
    const current = String(lines[index] || "");
    if (!/^Helpful links:\s*$/i.test(current.trim())) {
      nextLines.push(current);
      continue;
    }

    const collected = [];
    let offset = index + 1;
    while (offset < lines.length) {
      const candidate = String(lines[offset] || "");
      if (!candidate.trim()) break;
      if (!/^\s*[-*]\s+/.test(candidate)) break;
      collected.push(candidate);
      offset += 1;
    }

    const validItems = collected.filter((line) => /:\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)\s*$/i.test(line.trim()));
    if (validItems.length) {
      nextLines.push("Helpful links:");
      nextLines.push(...validItems);
    }

    index = offset - 1;
  }

  return nextLines.join("\n").replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n").trim();
};

const splitHelpfulLinksBlock = (text) => {
  const source = String(text || "").trim();
  if (!source) return { body: "", links: [] };

  const lines = source.split("\n");
  const helpfulIndex = lines.findIndex((line) => /^Helpful links:\s*$/i.test(String(line || "").trim()));
  if (helpfulIndex === -1) {
    return { body: source, links: [] };
  }

  const body = lines.slice(0, helpfulIndex).join("\n").trim();
  const links = [];
  for (let index = helpfulIndex + 1; index < lines.length; index += 1) {
    const match = String(lines[index] || "").trim().match(/^-\s*(.+?):\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)$/i);
    if (!match) continue;
    links.push({
      label: cleanHelpfulLinkLabel(match[1], match[2]),
      href: match[2].trim()
    });
  }

  return { body, links };
};

const mergeHelpfulLinks = (text, additionalLinksBlock) => {
  const { body, links } = splitHelpfulLinksBlock(text);
  const extra = splitHelpfulLinksBlock(additionalLinksBlock).links;
  const merged = [];
  const seen = new Set();

  for (const item of [...links, ...extra]) {
    const label = String(item?.label || "").trim();
    const href = String(item?.href || "").trim();
    if (!label || !href) continue;
    const key = `${label}|${href}`;
    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
    seen.add(key);
    merged.push(`- ${label}: ${href}`);
  }

  if (!merged.length) return body;
  return [body, "Helpful links:", ...merged].filter(Boolean).join("\n\n").replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n").trim();
};

const finalizeAiReply = (answer, question, articles = []) => {
  const trimmed = String(answer || "").trim();
  if (!trimmed) return "";

  const lines = trimmed
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => line.trimEnd())
    .filter((line, index, arr) => line || (index > 0 && arr[index - 1]));

  let nextAnswer = lines.join("\n").trim();
  const wantsSteps = questionImpliesSteps(question);
  const hasSteps = /\n\d+\.\s/.test(nextAnswer);
  const hasLinks = /https?:\/\//i.test(nextAnswer);
  const hasHelpfulLinksLabel = /\bHelpful links:\b/i.test(nextAnswer);
  const isGreetingOnly = /^(hi|hello|hey|good (morning|afternoon|evening))( there)?[!. ]*$/i.test(String(question || "").trim());

  nextAnswer = nextAnswer
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => normalizeHelpfulLinkLine(line))
    .join("\n")
    .replace(/Hello there!\s*Welcome to SnapQueue\.[\s\S]*?How can I assist you today\?/i, "Hi! I'm here to help with bookings, payments, account steps, and delivery updates.");

  nextAnswer = nextAnswer
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => cleanAnswerArtifacts(line))
    .join("\n");

  nextAnswer = removeNonLinkHelpfulLinks(nextAnswer);

  if (isGreetingOnly) {
    nextAnswer = "Hi! I'm here to help with bookings, payments, account steps, and delivery updates.";
  }

  const splitBeforeConcise = splitHelpfulLinksBlock(nextAnswer);
  const conciseLines = splitBeforeConcise.body
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (!wantsSteps && conciseLines.length > 4) {
    const shortenedBody = conciseLines.slice(0, 3).join(" ");
    nextAnswer = mergeHelpfulLinks(shortenedBody, nextAnswer);
  }

  if (!hasSteps && wantsSteps && articles.length) {
    const primary = articles[0];
    const steps = Array.isArray(primary?.steps) ? primary.steps.filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3) : [];
    if (steps.length) {
      nextAnswer = [
        ensureSentenceEnding(nextAnswer),
        "",
        "Steps:",
        ...steps.map((step, index) => `${index + 1}. ${ensureSentenceEnding(step)}`)
      ].join("\n");
    }
  } else {
    nextAnswer = ensureSentenceEnding(nextAnswer);
  }

  if (!hasLinks && !hasHelpfulLinksLabel && articles.length) {
    const linksBlock = formatHelpLinks(articles.slice(0, wantsSteps ? 2 : 1));
    if (linksBlock) {
      nextAnswer = `${nextAnswer}\n\n${linksBlock}`;
    }
  }

  const quickLinks = inferQuickLinksFromQuestion(question);
  if (quickLinks) {
    nextAnswer = mergeHelpfulLinks(nextAnswer, quickLinks);
  }

  return nextAnswer.trim();
};

const canAccessThread = (thread, user) => {
  if (!thread || !user) return false;
  if (hasAdminAccess(user.role)) return true;
  return String(thread.clientId) === String(user.sub);
};

const serializeThread = (thread, user) => {
  if (!thread) return null;
  const raw = typeof thread.toObject === "function" ? thread.toObject() : { ...thread };
  const unreadCount = hasAdminAccess(user?.role)
    ? Number(raw?.unreadForAdmin || 0)
    : Number(raw?.unreadForClient || 0);
  return {
    ...raw,
    unreadCount
  };
};

export const listQAs = async (_req, res) => {
  if (mongoose.connection.readyState !== 1) {
    return res.json({ success: true, items: [] });
  }
  const items = await ChatQA.find().sort({ question: 1 });
  res.json({ success: true, items });
};

export const createQA = async (req, res) => {
  const { question, answer } = req.body;
  if (!question || !answer) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Question and answer are required" });
  }

  const item = await ChatQA.create({ question: question.toLowerCase().trim(), answer });
  res.status(201).json({ success: true, item });
};

export const updateQA = async (req, res) => {
  const { question, answer } = req.body;
  const updates = {};
  if (question) {
    updates.question = question.toLowerCase().trim();
  }
  if (answer) {
    updates.answer = answer;
  }

  const item = await ChatQA.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, updates, { new: true });
  if (!item) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Q&A not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, item });
};

export const deleteQA = async (req, res) => {
  const item = await ChatQA.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
  if (!item) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Q&A not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, message: "Q&A deleted" });
};

export const getOrCreateMyLiveThread = async (req, res) => {
  if (hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Admins should use thread list endpoint" });
  }

  let thread = await LiveChatThread.findOne({ clientId: req.user.sub, status: "open" }).sort({ updatedAt: -1 });
  if (!thread) {
    const profile = await User.findById(req.user.sub).select("fullName email").lean();
    thread = await LiveChatThread.create({
      clientId: req.user.sub,
      clientName: profile?.fullName || "Client",
      clientEmail: profile?.email || req.user?.email || ""
    });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, thread });
};

export const listMyLiveThreads = async (req, res) => {
  if (hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Admins should use admin thread list endpoint" });
  }
  const threads = await LiveChatThread.find({ clientId: req.user.sub }).sort({ lastMessageAt: -1 });
  res.json({ success: true, threads: threads.map((thread) => serializeThread(thread, req.user)) });
};

export const listLiveThreads = async (req, res) => {
  const status = String(req.query.status || "").trim();
  const filter = {};
  if (status) {
    if (!["open", "closed"].includes(status)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid status filter" });
    }
    filter.status = status;
  }

  const threads = await LiveChatThread.find(filter).sort({ lastMessageAt: -1 }).limit(200);
  res.json({ success: true, threads: threads.map((thread) => serializeThread(thread, req.user)) });
};

export const getOrCreateLiveThreadForAdmin = async (req, res) => {
  const userId = String(req.body?.userId || "").trim();
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid userId" });
  }

  const profile = await User.findById(userId).select("fullName email role").lean();
  if (!profile) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }
  if (hasAdminAccess(profile.role)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Live chat can only be started for client accounts." });
  }

  let thread = await LiveChatThread.findOne({ clientId: userId }).sort({ updatedAt: -1 });
  if (!thread) {
    thread = await LiveChatThread.create({
      clientId: userId,
      clientName: profile?.fullName || "Client",
      clientEmail: profile?.email || ""
    });
  } else {
    const nextName = profile?.fullName || thread.clientName || "Client";
    const nextEmail = profile?.email || thread.clientEmail || "";
    let changed = false;
    if (thread.clientName !== nextName) {
      thread.clientName = nextName;
      changed = true;
    }
    if (thread.clientEmail !== nextEmail) {
      thread.clientEmail = nextEmail;
      changed = true;
    }
    if (thread.status === "closed") {
      thread.status = "open";
      changed = true;
    }
    if (changed) {
      await thread.save();
    }
  }

  res.status(200).json({ success: true, thread });
};

export const listLiveThreadMessages = async (req, res) => {
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(req.params.threadId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid threadId" });
  }

  const thread = await LiveChatThread.findById(req.params.threadId);
  if (!thread) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Thread not found" });
  }
  if (!canAccessThread(thread, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }

  const filter = { threadId: thread._id };
  const afterRaw = String(req.query.after || "").trim();
  if (afterRaw) {
    const afterDate = new Date(afterRaw);
    if (!Number.isNaN(afterDate.getTime())) {
      filter.createdAt = { $gt: afterDate };
    }
  }

  const viewerIsAdmin = hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role);
  const unreadField = viewerIsAdmin ? "unreadForAdmin" : "unreadForClient";
  if (Number(thread?.[unreadField] || 0) > 0) {
    thread[unreadField] = 0;
    await thread.save();
  }

  const messages = await LiveChatMessage.find(filter).sort({ createdAt: 1 }).limit(300);
  res.json({ success: true, thread: serializeThread(thread, req.user), messages });
};

export const sendLiveThreadMessage = async (req, res) => {
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(req.params.threadId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid threadId" });
  }

  const text = String(req.body?.text || "").trim();
  if (!text) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Message text is required" });
  }
  if (text.length > MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: `Message must be ${MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH} characters or less` });
  }

  const thread = await LiveChatThread.findById(req.params.threadId);
  if (!thread) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Thread not found" });
  }
  if (!canAccessThread(thread, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }

  if (thread.status === "closed") {
    if (hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
      thread.status = "open";
    } else {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "This chat is closed by admin" });
    }
  }

  const profile = await User.findById(req.user.sub).select("fullName email").lean();
  const senderRole = hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) ? "admin" : "user";
  const senderName = profile?.fullName || profile?.email || req.user?.email || senderRole;

  const message = await LiveChatMessage.create({
    threadId: thread._id,
    senderId: req.user.sub,
    senderRole,
    senderName,
    text
  });

  thread.lastMessage = text;
  thread.lastMessageAt = message.createdAt;
  if (senderRole === "admin") {
    thread.unreadForClient = Number(thread.unreadForClient || 0) + 1;
    thread.unreadForAdmin = 0;
  } else {
    thread.unreadForAdmin = Number(thread.unreadForAdmin || 0) + 1;
    thread.unreadForClient = 0;
  }
  await thread.save();

  notifyLiveChatMessage(thread, message).catch((error) => {
    console.error("Live chat email notification failed", {
      threadId: String(thread?._id || ""),
      messageId: String(message?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: message });
};

export const updateLiveThreadStatus = async (req, res) => {
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(req.params.threadId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid threadId" });
  }
  const status = String(req.body?.status || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["open", "closed"].includes(status)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid status" });
  }

  const thread = await LiveChatThread.findByIdAndUpdate(
    req.params.threadId,
    { status },
    { new: true }
  );
  if (!thread) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Thread not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, thread });
};

export const deleteLiveThread = async (req, res) => {
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(req.params.threadId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid threadId" });
  }

  const thread = await LiveChatThread.findById(req.params.threadId);
  if (!thread) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Thread not found" });
  }

  await Promise.all([
    LiveChatMessage.deleteMany({ threadId: thread._id }),
    LiveChatThread.deleteOne({ _id: thread._id })
  ]);

  res.json({ success: true, message: "Chat thread deleted" });
};

const fallbackAiReply = (text, qaItems = []) => {
  const input = String(text || "").toLowerCase();
  const relevantArticles = findRelevantHelpArticles(text, 3);
  const matchedFaq = qaItems.find((item) =>
    input.includes(String(item.question || "").toLowerCase()) ||
    String(item.question || "").toLowerCase().includes(input)
  );
  if (questionImpliesSteps(text) && relevantArticles.length) {
    return formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, matchedFaq?.answer || "");
  }
  if (matchedFaq?.answer && relevantArticles.length) {
    return formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, matchedFaq.answer);
  }
  if (matchedFaq?.answer) return matchedFaq.answer;
  if (/price|cost|package|rate|budget/.test(input)) {
    return "SnapQueue offers Basic at PHP 2,700, Standard at PHP 3,500, and Premium at PHP 4,500. There's also a custom package if you need something more flexible.";
  }
  if (/book|reservation|reserve|schedule/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Reservation", href: "/reservation" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, "You can book through the Reservation page, then wait for admin review.")
      : [
        "You can book through the Reservation page by submitting your event details, package, and schedule. After that, wait for admin approval before payment.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/quote|custom package|pricing|price approval/.test(input)) {
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "Custom package pricing is usually reviewed by admin before payment can continue.")
      : "If you choose a custom package, admin usually reviews the request first and sends the quote before payment can continue.";
  }
  if (/payment|gcash|maya|pay/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, "Once your reservation is approved, open the payment flow and submit your proof with the correct reference number.")
      : [
        "Once your reservation is approved, open the Payment page and upload your proof with the correct reference number. The admin team will review it and update your status.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/reject|rejected payment|payment proof rejected|failed payment/.test(input)) {
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "If a payment proof is rejected, check the note, correct the details, and submit a clearer proof.")
      : "If your payment proof is rejected, check the payment note, correct the screenshot or reference number, and submit again.";
  }
  if (/refund|payout|refund status/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, "Refunds are handled from the payment record when the reservation and payment are eligible.")
      : [
        "Refunds are handled from the payment record. If the system allows it, submit the refund reason and any payout details, then wait for admin review.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/delivery|download|release|ready/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
      { label: "Media Archive", href: "/dashboard?tab=photos" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "Delivery updates usually appear in your dashboard status and the related help article below.")
      : [
        "Delivery updates usually appear in your dashboard status, project workflow, and media archive. Once the files are ready, you can download them from the archive.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/archive|media|photo|video|file/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Media Archive", href: "/dashboard?tab=photos" },
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "Delivered files usually appear in the Media Archive once admin uploads them.")
      : [
        "Delivered files usually appear in the Media Archive after admin uploads them. You can download them from your dashboard once they are ready.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/status|progress|workflow|editing|ready for download/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
      { label: "Booking History", href: "/dashboard?tab=history" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "You can track project progress from the dashboard or Progress tab.")
      : [
        "You can track your booking progress from the dashboard, including approval, production, editing, and ready-for-download updates.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/profile|account|phone|email|change password|settings/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Settings", href: "/dashboard?tab=settings" },
      { label: "Profile", href: "/dashboard?tab=profile" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "You can manage profile details and password settings from your dashboard profile settings.")
      : [
        "You can update your profile details, phone number, and password from your dashboard settings.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/otp|verification code|verify signup|code/.test(input)) {
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, "Signup verification uses the code sent to your email.")
      : "Signup verification uses the code sent to your email. If it does not arrive, check the correct inbox and try the resend option.";
  }
  if (/chat admin|live chat|support|message admin/.test(input)) {
    const linksBlock = formatQuickLinks([
      { label: "Chat Admin", href: "/dashboard?tab=messages" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" }
    ]);
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "You can use Chat Admin for account, booking, and payment concerns after signing in.")
      : [
        "You can use Chat Admin for booking, payment, and account concerns after signing in.",
        "",
        linksBlock
      ].join("\n").trim();
  }
  if (/login|sign in|password|forgot password|reset password/.test(input)) {
    return relevantArticles.length
      ? formatHowToReply(text, relevantArticles, "You can sign in from the login page, and password reset is available if needed.")
      : "You can sign in from the login page, and password reset is available if you cannot access your account.";
  }
  if (relevantArticles.length) {
    return formatArticleSummaryReply(relevantArticles, "I found a help article that should answer that.");
  }
  return "I can help with reservations, quotes, payments, refunds, account steps, support chat, project status, and delivery updates. If you want, ask a how-to question and I'll keep the answer short and clear.";
};

export const askAI = async (req, res) => {
  const question = String(req.body?.question || "").trim();
  if (!question) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Question is required" });
  }
  if (question.length > MAX_AI_INPUT_LENGTH) {
    return res.status(400).json({
      success: false,
      message: `Question must be ${MAX_AI_INPUT_LENGTH} characters or less`
    });
  }

  const qaItems = mongoose.connection.readyState === 1
    ? await ChatQA.find().sort({ question: 1 }).lean()
    : [];
  const relevantHelpArticles = findRelevantHelpArticles(question, 5);
  const faqContext = qaItems
    .slice(0, 15)
    .map((item) => `Q: ${item.question}\nA: ${item.answer}`)
    .join("\n\n");
  const helpCenterContext = relevantHelpArticles
    .map((article) => [
      `Audience: ${article.audience}`,
      `Title: ${article.title}`,
      `Description: ${article.description}`,
      `Section: ${article.section}`,
      `Category: ${article.category}`,
      `Steps: ${(article.steps || []).join(" | ")}`,
      `Tip: ${article.tip || ""}`,
      `Link: ${articlePath(article)}`
    ].join("\n"))
    .join("\n\n");
  const appContext = [
    "Business: SnapQueue / BCP photo-video booking system.",
    "Packages: Basic PHP 2,700, Standard PHP 3,500, Premium PHP 4,500, plus custom package.",
    "Reservation flow: submit reservation -> admin review/approve -> payment -> production -> done.",
    "Navigation links: Reservation = /reservation, Payments = /dashboard?tab=payments, Project Status = /dashboard?tab=progress, Media Archive = /dashboard?tab=photos, Booking History = /dashboard?tab=history, Chat Admin = /dashboard?tab=messages, Settings = /dashboard?tab=settings, Profile = /dashboard?tab=profile, Help Center = /help-center.",
    "Payment: manual proof upload with reference number; refund request is available in payment records.",
    "Custom package flow: custom reservations may need admin quote review before payment can continue.",
    "Payment review: rejected payment proofs usually need a clearer screenshot or correct reference number before resubmission.",
    "Refund flow: some refunds require the client to submit payout details before admin can process them.",
    "Project tracking: clients can follow approval, production, editing, and ready-for-download stages from the dashboard.",
    "Media delivery: finished files appear in the Media Archive after admin uploads them.",
    "Profile management: users can update account details, phone number, password, and notification settings in profile settings.",
    "Authentication: signup may require OTP email verification, and password reset is available from the login flow.",
    "Support: Chat Admin is for signed-in users who need help with bookings, payments, or account concerns.",
    "Admin tools: admins can review booking requests, verify payments, manage refunds, update workflow stages, send newsletters, and manage advertisements.",
    "Guest users can use AI chat; live admin chat requires sign-in.",
    "User help center path: /help-center?article=<title>",
    "Admin help center path: /admin-help-center?article=<title>"
  ].join("\n");

  const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || "";
  if (!apiKey) {
    return res.json({
      success: true,
      answer: fallbackAiReply(question, qaItems),
      provider: "fallback",
      reason: "Gemini API key is not configured"
    });
  }

  const configuredModel = String(process.env.GEMINI_MODEL || "").trim();
  const modelsToTry = configuredModel ? [configuredModel, ...DEFAULT_AI_MODELS.filter((model) => model !== configuredModel)] : DEFAULT_AI_MODELS;
  const instructionPrompt = [
    "You are the website assistant for SnapQueue.",
    "Answer in a natural, friendly way using short sentence-form replies.",
    "Keep most answers to 2 or 3 short paragraphs or fewer.",
    "Do not sound robotic, scripted, or overly formal.",
    "If the user says hello or asks generally what you can help with, reply briefly like a helpful admin, not with a long welcome script.",
    "Do not answer as a single short fragment unless the user asks for a very short reply.",
    "Use only the provided website context, FAQ context, and help center context.",
    "When the user asks how, where, steps, process, guide, or what to do, organize the reply with a short summary, up to 3 numbered steps, and only 1 or 2 helpful links if needed.",
    "When the user asks where something is, how to find a page, or what to do next in the website, include a final Helpful links section with the most relevant relative path.",
    "When you include links, put them only in a final Helpful links section using short labels and relative paths.",
    "Do not output HTML, raw anchor tags, or long absolute URLs in the middle of sentences.",
    "If there is a best matching article, mention its title naturally in the answer.",
    "If unsure, say what the user can do in the website to confirm.",
    "Do not invent policies, prices, article titles, or URLs."
  ].join(" ");

  const requestBody = {
    contents: [
      {
        role: "user",
        parts: [
          {
            text: `${instructionPrompt}\n\nWebsite context:\n${appContext}\n\nFAQ context:\n${faqContext}\n\nHelp center context:\n${helpCenterContext}\n\nUser question:\n${question}`
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    generationConfig: {
      temperature: 0.3,
      maxOutputTokens: 420
    }
  };

  let lastError = null;
  const modelErrors = [];
  for (const model of modelsToTry) {
    for (const apiBase of GEMINI_API_BASES) {
      const endpoint = `${apiBase}/models/${encodeURIComponent(model)}:generateContent?key=${encodeURIComponent(apiKey)}`;
      try {
        const payload = await postJson(endpoint, requestBody, apiKey);
        const answer = finalizeAiReply(extractAiAnswer(payload), question, relevantHelpArticles);
        if (!answer) {
          throw new Error("Empty AI response");
        }
        return res.json({ success: true, answer, provider: "gemini", model });
      } catch (error) {
        lastError = error;
        modelErrors.push({ model, apiBase, reason: error?.message || "Unknown Gemini error" });
      }
    }
  }

  const diagnosticReason = modelErrors.length
    ? modelErrors.map((item) => `${item.model} @ ${item.apiBase}: ${item.reason}`).join(" | ")
    : lastError?.message || "Gemini request failed";

  res.json({
    success: true,
    answer: fallbackAiReply(question, qaItems),
    provider: "fallback",
    reason: diagnosticReason
  });
};
15 Backend Module

backend/src/modules/chatbot/chatbot.routes.js

Source file 15 of 111

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  askAI,
  createQA,
  deleteQA,
  getOrCreateMyLiveThread,
  getOrCreateLiveThreadForAdmin,
  listLiveThreadMessages,
  listLiveThreads,
  listMyLiveThreads,
  deleteLiveThread,
  listQAs,
  sendLiveThreadMessage,
  updateLiveThreadStatus,
  updateQA
} from "./chatbot.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.get("/qa", asyncHandler(listQAs));
router.post("/ai", asyncHandler(askAI));
router.post("/qa", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(createQA));
router.patch("/qa/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateQA));
router.delete("/qa/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteQA));
router.get("/live/thread", requireAuth, asyncHandler(getOrCreateMyLiveThread));
router.get("/live/threads/me", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listMyLiveThreads));
router.get("/live/threads", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(listLiveThreads));
router.post("/live/threads/admin/open", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(getOrCreateLiveThreadForAdmin));
router.get("/live/threads/:threadId/messages", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listLiveThreadMessages));
router.post("/live/threads/:threadId/messages", requireAuth, asyncHandler(sendLiveThreadMessage));
router.patch("/live/threads/:threadId/status", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateLiveThreadStatus));
router.delete("/live/threads/:threadId", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteLiveThread));
router.post("/live/threads/:threadId/delete", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteLiveThread));

// Backward-compatible aliases (non-/live paths)
router.get("/thread", requireAuth, asyncHandler(getOrCreateMyLiveThread));
router.get("/threads/me", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listMyLiveThreads));
router.get("/threads", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(listLiveThreads));
router.post("/threads/admin/open", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(getOrCreateLiveThreadForAdmin));
router.get("/threads/:threadId/messages", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listLiveThreadMessages));
router.post("/threads/:threadId/messages", requireAuth, asyncHandler(sendLiveThreadMessage));
router.patch("/threads/:threadId/status", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateLiveThreadStatus));
router.delete("/threads/:threadId", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteLiveThread));
router.post("/threads/:threadId/delete", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteLiveThread));

export default router;

import ContactMessage from "../../shared/models/ContactMessage.js";
import LiveChatMessage from "../../shared/models/LiveChatMessage.js";
import LiveChatThread from "../../shared/models/LiveChatThread.js";
import User from "../../shared/models/User.js";
import { isSystemMailConfigured, sendSystemEmail } from "../../shared/utils/mailer.js";

const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const CONTACT_RECIPIENT = String(process.env.CONTACT_RECEIVER_EMAIL || "otpaauthetication@gmail.com").trim();

const sanitize = (value) => String(value || "").trim();
const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value || "").replace(/[<>&"]/g, (ch) => ({ "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", "&": "&amp;", '"': "&quot;" })[ch]);
const isDeliverableEmail = (value) => {
  const normalized = sanitize(value).toLowerCase();
  if (!emailRegex.test(normalized)) return false;
  const [, domain = ""] = normalized.split("@");
  if (!domain || !domain.includes(".")) return false;
  if (domain.endsWith(".local") || domain === "localhost") return false;
  return true;
};

const syncLiveMessageFromContact = async ({ userId, fallbackName, fallbackEmail, subject, message }) => {
  if (!userId) return null;

  const profile = await User.findById(userId).select("fullName email role").lean();
  if (!profile) {
    return { skipped: "user_not_found" };
  }

  let thread = await LiveChatThread.findOne({ clientId: userId }).sort({ updatedAt: -1 });
  if (!thread) {
    thread = await LiveChatThread.create({
      clientId: userId,
      clientName: sanitize(profile?.fullName) || fallbackName || "Client",
      clientEmail: sanitize(profile?.email).toLowerCase() || fallbackEmail || ""
    });
  } else {
    const nextName = sanitize(profile?.fullName) || fallbackName || thread.clientName || "Client";
    const nextEmail = sanitize(profile?.email).toLowerCase() || fallbackEmail || thread.clientEmail || "";
    let changed = false;
    if (thread.clientName !== nextName) {
      thread.clientName = nextName;
      changed = true;
    }
    if (thread.clientEmail !== nextEmail) {
      thread.clientEmail = nextEmail;
      changed = true;
    }
    if (thread.status === "closed") {
      thread.status = "open";
      changed = true;
    }
    if (changed) await thread.save();
  }

  const liveMessageText = [`[Contact Form] ${subject}`, message].filter(Boolean).join("\n\n").trim();
  const liveMessage = await LiveChatMessage.create({
    threadId: thread._id,
    senderId: userId,
    senderRole: "user",
    senderName: sanitize(profile?.fullName) || sanitize(profile?.email) || fallbackName || fallbackEmail || "Client",
    text: liveMessageText
  });

  thread.lastMessage = liveMessageText;
  thread.lastMessageAt = liveMessage.createdAt;
  await thread.save();

  return { thread, liveMessage };
};

export const createContactMessage = async (req, res) => {
  const name = sanitize(req.body?.name);
  const email = sanitize(req.body?.email).toLowerCase();
  const subject = sanitize(req.body?.subject);
  const message = sanitize(req.body?.message);

  if (!name || !email || !subject || !message) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Name, email, subject, and message are required" });
  }
  if (!emailRegex.test(email)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid email format" });
  }

  const item = await ContactMessage.create({ name, email, subject, message });
  const warnings = [];
  let liveMessageSynced = false;
  try {
    const liveResult = await syncLiveMessageFromContact({
      userId: req.user?.sub,
      fallbackName: name,
      fallbackEmail: email,
      subject,
      message
    });
    liveMessageSynced = Boolean(liveResult?.liveMessage);
    if (liveResult?.skipped === "user_not_found") {
      warnings.push("Live chat copy was skipped because the signed-in user record was not found.");
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Contact live chat sync failed", {
      userId: String(req.user?.sub || ""),
      error: error?.message || String(error)
    });
    warnings.push("Message was saved, but live chat sync failed.");
  }
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured()) {
    return res.status(201).json({
      success: true,
      item,
      liveMessageSynced,
      deliveredPrimary: false,
      ...(warnings.length ? { warnings } : {}),
      warning: "Message saved, but contact email service is not configured yet."
    });
  }

  const adminUsers = await User.find({
    role: "admin",
    isBlocked: { $ne: true }
  }).select("email").lean();
  const recipients = new Set([CONTACT_RECIPIENT]);
  adminUsers.forEach((admin) => {
    const adminEmail = sanitize(admin?.email).toLowerCase();
    if (isDeliverableEmail(adminEmail)) recipients.add(adminEmail);
  });

  const textBody = [
    "New Contact Form Submission",
    "",
    `Name: ${name}`,
    `Email: ${email}`,
    `Subject: ${subject}`,
    "",
    "Message:",
    message
  ].join("\n");
  const htmlBody = `
    <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;color:#0f172a;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;">New Contact Form Submission</h2>
      <p><strong>Name:</strong> ${escapeHtml(name)}</p>
      <p><strong>Email:</strong> ${escapeHtml(email)}</p>
      <p><strong>Subject:</strong> ${escapeHtml(subject)}</p>
      <p><strong>Message:</strong></p>
      <p style="white-space:pre-wrap;">${escapeHtml(message)}</p>
    </div>
  `;

  let deliveredPrimary = false;
  let warning = "";

  try {
    await sendSystemEmail({
      to: CONTACT_RECIPIENT,
      subject: `Contact Form: ${subject}`,
      text: textBody,
      html: htmlBody
    });
    deliveredPrimary = true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Contact email failed for primary receiver", {
      to: CONTACT_RECIPIENT,
      error: error?.message || String(error)
    });
    warning = `Message saved, but email delivery to ${CONTACT_RECIPIENT} failed.`;
  }

  // Admin copies are best-effort only.
  const secondaryRecipients = Array.from(recipients).filter((to) => to !== CONTACT_RECIPIENT);
  if (secondaryRecipients.length) {
    const secondaryResults = await Promise.allSettled(
      secondaryRecipients.map((to) =>
        sendSystemEmail({
          to,
          subject: `Contact Form: ${subject}`,
          text: textBody,
          html: htmlBody
        })
      )
    );
    const failed = secondaryResults
      .map((result, index) => ({ result, to: secondaryRecipients[index] }))
      .filter((entry) => entry.result.status === "rejected")
      .map((entry) => entry.to);
    if (failed.length) {
      console.error("Contact email secondary recipients failed", {
        total: secondaryRecipients.length,
        failed
      });
    }
  }

  res.status(201).json({
    success: true,
    item,
    liveMessageSynced,
    deliveredPrimary,
    deliveredPrimaryTo: deliveredPrimary ? CONTACT_RECIPIENT : "",
    ...(warnings.length ? { warnings } : {}),
    ...(warning ? { warning } : {})
  });
};

export const listContactMessages = async (_req, res) => {
  const items = await ContactMessage.find().sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  res.json({ success: true, items });
};

export const updateContactMessageStatus = async (req, res) => {
  const { status } = req.body;
  const item = await ContactMessage.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, { status }, { new: true });
  if (!item) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Message not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, item });
};

import { Router } from "express";
import { createContactMessage, listContactMessages, updateContactMessageStatus } from "./contact.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.post("/", requireAuth, asyncHandler(createContactMessage));
router.get("/", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(listContactMessages));
router.patch("/:id/status", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateContactMessageStatus));

export default router;

import GalleryItem from "../../shared/models/GalleryItem.js";

export const listGalleryItems = async (req, res) => {
  const { category } = req.query;
  const filter = { isPublished: true };
  if (category && category !== "all") {
    filter.category = category;
  }

  const items = await GalleryItem.find(filter).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  res.json({ success: true, items });
};

export const createGalleryItem = async (req, res) => {
  const { title, category, imageUrl, isPublished } = req.body;
  const item = await GalleryItem.create({ title, category, imageUrl, isPublished });
  res.status(201).json({ success: true, item });
};

export const updateGalleryItem = async (req, res) => {
  const item = await GalleryItem.findByIdAndUpdate(req.params.id, req.body, { new: true });
  if (!item) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Gallery item not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, item });
};

export const deleteGalleryItem = async (req, res) => {
  const item = await GalleryItem.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
  if (!item) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Gallery item not found" });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, message: "Gallery item deleted" });
};

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  createGalleryItem,
  deleteGalleryItem,
  listGalleryItems,
  updateGalleryItem
} from "./gallery.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.get("/", asyncHandler(listGalleryItems));
router.post("/", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(createGalleryItem));
router.patch("/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateGalleryItem));
router.delete("/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteGalleryItem));

export default router;
