import crypto from "crypto";
import mongoose from "mongoose";
import Payment from "../../shared/models/Payment.js";
import Reservation from "../../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import {
  notifyPaymentDecision,
  notifyReservationPaymentSubmitted,
  notifyRefundRequested,
  notifyRefundDecision
} from "../../shared/utils/notificationEmail.js";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../shared/utils/roles.js";
import { createReservationFromPayload, findReservationByIdentifier, PREDEFINED_PACKAGES } from "../reservation/reservation.shared.js";

const ALLOWED_METHODS = ["gcash", "maya"];
const ALLOWED_PAYMENT_STATUSES = ["verified", "rejected", "pending", "processing", "needs_review", "cancelled", "expired", "refunded"];
const REFERENCE_PATTERN = /^\d{12}$/;
const DATA_IMAGE_PREFIX = "data:image/";
const DATA_IMAGE_REGEX = /^data:image\/[a-zA-Z0-9.+-]+;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=\s]+$/;
const ACTIVE_PAYMENT_STATUSES = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified"];
const PACKAGE_CATALOG_PRICE = {
  basic: 2700,
  standard: 3500,
  premium: 4500
};

const normalizeReservationIdInput = (value) => {
  const normalized = String(value ?? "").trim();
  const lowered = normalized.toLowerCase();
  if (!normalized || lowered === "undefined" || lowered === "null") {
    return "";
  }
  return normalized;
};

const looksLikeReservationIdentifier = (value) => {
  const normalized = normalizeReservationIdInput(value);
  if (!normalized) return false;
  if (mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(normalized)) return true;
  return /^SQ-[A-Z0-9-]+$/i.test(normalized);
};

const isReservationOwner = (reservation, user) => {
  const byUserId = reservation.userId?.toString() === user?.sub;
  const byEmail = reservation.email && reservation.email === user?.email;
  return Boolean(byUserId || byEmail);
};

const isCustomReservation = (reservation) =>
  String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase() === "custom";

const applyStatusToReservation = async (reservationId, paymentStatus) => {
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(String(reservationId || "").trim())) return;
  await Reservation.updateOne(
    { _id: reservationId },
    { $set: { paymentStatus } }
  );
};

const resolveExpectedAmount = (reservation) => {
  const finalPrice = Number(reservation?.finalPrice);
  if (Number.isFinite(finalPrice) && finalPrice > 0) return finalPrice;
  const packagePrice = Number(reservation?.packagePrice);
  if (Number.isFinite(packagePrice) && packagePrice > 0) return packagePrice;
  const normalizedPackage = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  const mapped =
    Number(PACKAGE_CATALOG_PRICE[normalizedPackage] || 0) ||
    (normalizedPackage.includes("basic") ? PACKAGE_CATALOG_PRICE.basic : 0) ||
    (normalizedPackage.includes("standard") ? PACKAGE_CATALOG_PRICE.standard : 0) ||
    (normalizedPackage.includes("premium") ? PACKAGE_CATALOG_PRICE.premium : 0);
  return Number.isFinite(mapped) && mapped > 0 ? mapped : 0;
};

const buildProofFingerprint = (proofUrl = "") =>
  proofUrl ? crypto.createHash("sha256").update(String(proofUrl)).digest("hex") : "";

const serializePaymentForMutationResponse = (payment) => {
  if (!payment) return payment;
  const serialized = typeof payment.toObject === "function" ? payment.toObject() : { ...payment };
  return {
    ...serialized,
    proofUrl: "",
    refundProofUrl: "",
    hasProofUrl: Boolean(payment?.proofUrl),
    hasRefundProofUrl: Boolean(payment?.refundProofUrl)
  };
};

const dedupeFindings = (findings) => [...new Set(findings.filter(Boolean))];

const buildAutoReview = async ({ paymentId = null, referenceNumber = "", proofFingerprint = "", amount = 0 }) => {
  const findings = [];
  const filters = [];
  if (referenceNumber) filters.push({ referenceNumber });
  if (proofFingerprint) filters.push({ proofFingerprint });
  if (Number.isFinite(amount) && amount > 0) filters.push({ amount });
  if (!filters.length) {
    return { autoReviewStatus: "needs_review", findings: ["Payment submission is incomplete and requires manual review."] };
  }

  const relatedPayments = await Payment.find({
    ...(paymentId ? { _id: { $ne: paymentId } } : {}),
    $or: filters
  })
    .select("reservationId referenceNumber proofFingerprint amount status")
    .lean();

  const activePayments = relatedPayments.filter((item) => ACTIVE_PAYMENT_STATUSES.includes(String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase()));
  if (referenceNumber && activePayments.some((item) => String(item?.referenceNumber || "") === referenceNumber)) {
    findings.push("Duplicate reference number detected on another payment.");
  }
  if (proofFingerprint && activePayments.some((item) => String(item?.proofFingerprint || "") === proofFingerprint)) {
    findings.push("Proof image appears to be reused from another payment.");
  }
  if (referenceNumber && !REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(referenceNumber)) {
    findings.push("Reference number is missing or invalid.");
  }
  if (!proofFingerprint) {
    findings.push("Payment proof is missing.");
  }
  if (!Number.isFinite(amount) || amount <= 0) {
    findings.push("Submitted amount is missing or invalid.");
  }

  const reusedPattern = activePayments.some((item) => {
    let score = 0;
    if (referenceNumber && String(item?.referenceNumber || "") === referenceNumber) score += 1;
    if (proofFingerprint && String(item?.proofFingerprint || "") === proofFingerprint) score += 1;
    if (Number.isFinite(amount) && Number(item?.amount || 0) === amount) score += 1;
    return score >= 2;
  });
  if (reusedPattern) {
    findings.push("Reused proof/reference/amount pattern detected.");
  }

  const uniqueFindings = dedupeFindings(findings);
  return {
    autoReviewStatus: "needs_review",
    findings: uniqueFindings.length ? uniqueFindings : ["Awaiting manual payment review."]
  };
};

const assertPayableReservation = async (reservationId, user) => {
  if (!String(reservationId || "").trim()) {
    const err = new Error("Invalid reservationId");
    err.code = 400;
    throw err;
  }
  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(reservationId);
  if (!reservation) {
    const err = new Error("Reservation not found");
    err.code = 404;
    throw err;
  }
  if (!hasAdminAccess(user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, user)) {
    const err = new Error("Forbidden");
    err.code = 403;
    throw err;
  }
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (["rejected", "completed"].includes(reservationStatus)) {
    const err = new Error("Payment is not allowed for this reservation status.");
    err.code = 409;
    throw err;
  }
  const expectedAmount = resolveExpectedAmount(reservation);
  if (!Number.isFinite(expectedAmount) || expectedAmount <= 0) {
    const err = new Error("Reservation has no valid final price quote.");
    err.code = 409;
    throw err;
  }

  // Backward compatibility for legacy reservations:
  // if we can resolve a valid package amount, ensure pricing fields are consistent.
  const pricingStatus = String(reservation.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
  if (!["quoted", "accepted"].includes(pricingStatus) && expectedAmount > 0) {
    reservation.pricingStatus = isCustomReservation(reservation) ? "quoted" : "accepted";
    if (!Number.isFinite(Number(reservation.finalPrice)) || Number(reservation.finalPrice) <= 0) {
      reservation.finalPrice = expectedAmount;
    }
    if (!Number.isFinite(Number(reservation.basePrice)) || Number(reservation.basePrice) <= 0) {
      reservation.basePrice = expectedAmount;
    }
    if (!Number.isFinite(Number(reservation.quoteVersion)) || Number(reservation.quoteVersion) <= 0) {
      reservation.quoteVersion = 1;
    }
    if (!reservation.quotedAt) {
      reservation.quotedAt = new Date();
    }
    if (!isCustomReservation(reservation) && !reservation.pricingAcceptedAt) {
      reservation.pricingAcceptedAt = new Date();
    }
    await reservation.save();
  }
  return reservation;
};

export const createPayment = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const reservationId = normalizeReservationIdInput(req.body?.reservationId);
    const reservationDraft = req.body?.reservationDraft && typeof req.body.reservationDraft === "object"
      ? req.body.reservationDraft
      : null;
    const method = String(req.body?.method || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const referenceNumber = String(req.body?.referenceNumber || "").trim();
    const proofUrl = String(req.body?.proofUrl || "").trim();
    const submittedAmount = Number(req.body?.amount);

    if (!ALLOWED_METHODS.includes(method)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment method" });
    }
    if (!REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(referenceNumber)) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Reference number must be exactly 12 digits."
      });
    }
    if (!proofUrl) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Payment proof is required" });
    }
    if (!proofUrl.startsWith(DATA_IMAGE_PREFIX)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid proof format. Upload an image file." });
    }
    if (!DATA_IMAGE_REGEX.test(proofUrl)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid proof payload." });
    }
    if (proofUrl.length > 8_000_000) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Uploaded proof is too large. Max 5MB image." });
    }

    let reservation = null;
    let createdReservation = null;
    if (reservationDraft) {
      const normalizedPackage = String(
        reservationDraft?.packageName || reservationDraft?.package || reservationDraft?.service || ""
      ).trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!PREDEFINED_PACKAGES.has(normalizedPackage)) {
        return res.status(409).json({
          success: false,
          message: "Only standard packages can complete payment before the reservation is stored."
        });
      }
      const created = await createReservationFromPayload({
        payload: reservationDraft,
        userId: req.user?.sub
      });
      reservation = created.reservation;
      createdReservation = created.reservation;
    } else if (reservationId) {
      reservation = await assertPayableReservation(reservationId, req.user);
    } else {
      return res.status(400).json({
        success: false,
        message: "reservationId or reservationDraft is required"
      });
    }
    if (reservation.paymentDeletedAt) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Payment was deleted for this reservation and cannot be submitted again."
      });
    }
    const expectedAmount = resolveExpectedAmount(reservation);
    if (!Number.isFinite(submittedAmount) || submittedAmount <= 0) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment amount" });
    }
    if (Math.abs(submittedAmount - expectedAmount) > 0.009) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        success: false,
        message: `Payment amount must match quoted final price (${expectedAmount.toFixed(2)})`
      });
    }
    const proofFingerprint = buildProofFingerprint(proofUrl);

    const existing = await Payment.findOne({ reservationId: reservation._id });
    if (existing?.status === "verified" && !["awaiting_payout_details", "requested", "approved", "processed"].includes(existing?.refundStatus || "none")) {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Payment already verified for this reservation." });
    }
    if (existing?.referenceNumber && existing.referenceNumber === referenceNumber && ACTIVE_PAYMENT_STATUSES.includes(String(existing?.status || "").toLowerCase())) {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "This reference number was already submitted for this reservation." });
    }
    const autoReview = await buildAutoReview({
      paymentId: existing?._id || null,
      referenceNumber,
      proofFingerprint,
      amount: expectedAmount
    });

    let payment;
    try {
      payment = await Payment.findOneAndUpdate(
        { reservationId: reservation._id },
        {
          reservationId: reservation._id,
          method,
          provider: "manual",
          providerCheckoutId: "",
          providerPaymentIntentId: "",
          providerReference: "",
          checkoutUrl: "",
          quoteVersion: Number(reservation.quoteVersion || 0),
          currencySnapshot: reservation.currency || "PHP",
          amount: expectedAmount,
          referenceNumber,
          proofUrl,
          proofFingerprint,
          status: "needs_review",
          autoReviewStatus: autoReview.autoReviewStatus,
          autoReviewFindings: autoReview.findings,
          autoReviewCheckedAt: new Date(),
          paidAt: null,
          failedAt: null,
          failureReason: autoReview.findings.join(" "),
          refundStatus: "none",
          refundReason: "",
          refundPayoutMethod: "",
          refundPayoutNumber: "",
          refundRequestedAt: null,
          refundRequestedBy: null,
          refundResolvedAt: null,
          refundResolvedBy: null,
          refundProcessedAt: null,
          refundReferenceNumber: "",
          refundProofUrl: "",
          refundAdminNote: ""
        },
        { upsert: true, new: true, setDefaultsOnInsert: true, runValidators: true }
      );
    } catch (error) {
      if (createdReservation?._id) {
        await Reservation.deleteOne({ _id: createdReservation._id });
      }
      throw error;
    }

    try {
      await applyStatusToReservation(reservation._id, "processing");
    } catch (error) {
      if (payment?._id) {
        await Payment.deleteOne({ _id: payment._id });
      }
      if (createdReservation?._id) {
        await Reservation.deleteOne({ _id: createdReservation._id });
      }
      throw error;
    }
    notifyReservationPaymentSubmitted(payment, reservation).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Payment submission email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
        paymentId: String(payment?._id || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
    return res.status(200).json({ success: true, payment, reservation });
  } catch (error) {
    const code = Number(error?.code || 500);
    const body = { success: false, message: error?.message || "Failed to submit payment." };
    if (Array.isArray(error?.missingFields) && error.missingFields.length) {
      body.missingFields = error.missingFields;
    }
    if (error?.responseCode) {
      body.code = error.responseCode;
    }
    return res.status(code).json(body);
  }
};

export const getPaymentByReservation = async (req, res) => {
  const reservationId = String(req.params.reservationId || "").trim();
  if (!reservationId) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid reservationId" });
  }
  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(reservationId);
  if (!reservation) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }
  const payment = await Payment.findOne({ reservationId: reservation._id }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  return res.json({ success: true, payment, reservation });
};

export const listPayments = async (_req, res) => {
  const payments = await Payment.find()
    .select("-proofUrl -refundProofUrl")
    .populate("reservationId")
    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
    .lean();
  const orphanedPayments = payments.filter((payment) => !payment?.reservationId).map((payment) => payment._id);
  if (orphanedPayments.length > 0) {
    await Payment.deleteMany({ _id: { $in: orphanedPayments } });
  }
  return res.json({
    success: true,
    payments: payments
      .filter((payment) => Boolean(payment?.reservationId))
      .map((payment) => ({
        ...payment,
        hasProofUrl: Boolean(payment?.proofFingerprint),
        hasRefundProofUrl: Boolean(payment?.refundReferenceNumber)
      }))
  });
};

export const getPaymentProof = async (req, res) => {
  const paymentId = String(req.params.id || "").trim();
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(paymentId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment id" });
  }
  const payment = await Payment.findById(paymentId);
  if (!payment) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Payment not found" });
  }
  const reservation = await Reservation.findById(payment.reservationId);
  if (reservation && !hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }
  return res.json({
    success: true,
    proofUrl: payment.proofUrl || "",
    refundProofUrl: payment.refundProofUrl || ""
  });
};

export const verifyPayment = async (req, res) => {
  const { status } = req.body;
  if (!ALLOWED_PAYMENT_STATUSES.includes(status)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment status" });
  }

  const payment = await Payment.findById(req.params.id);
  if (!payment) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Payment not found" });
  }
  const reservation = await Reservation.findById(payment.reservationId);

  payment.status = status;
  if (status === "verified") {
    payment.autoReviewStatus = payment.autoReviewFindings?.length ? "needs_review" : "clear";
    payment.paidAt = new Date();
    payment.failedAt = null;
    payment.failureReason = "";
    await payment.save();
    await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "paid");
    if (reservation) {
      await Reservation.updateOne(
        { _id: reservation._id },
        {
          $set: {
            status: "approved",
            workflowStage: "awaiting_approval",
            workflowStageUpdatedAt: null,
            paymentStatus: "paid",
            cancelledByRole: "",
            cancelledAt: null
          }
        }
      );
    }
  } else {
    payment.failedAt = new Date();
    if (["rejected", "expired", "cancelled"].includes(status)) {
      payment.failureReason = payment.failureReason || `Marked as ${status}`;
    }
    await payment.save();
    if (status === "cancelled") await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "cancelled");
    else if (["processing", "pending", "needs_review"].includes(status)) await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "processing");
    else if (status === "refunded") await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "refunded");
    else await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "failed");

    if (status === "rejected" && reservation) {
      reservation.status = "rejected";
      reservation.cancelledByRole = "admin";
      reservation.cancelledAt = new Date();
      await reservation.save();
    }
  }
  if (["verified", "rejected"].includes(String(status || "").toLowerCase())) {
    notifyPaymentDecision(payment, reservation).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Payment decision email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || payment?.reservationId || ""),
        paymentId: String(payment?._id || ""),
        status: String(status || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  return res.json({ success: true, payment: serializePaymentForMutationResponse(payment) });
};

export const deletePayment = async (req, res) => {
  const paymentId = String(req.params.id || "").trim();
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(paymentId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment id" });
  }

  const payment = await Payment.findById(paymentId);
  if (!payment) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Payment not found" });
  }
  const reservation = await Reservation.findById(payment.reservationId);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found for payment" });
  }
  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }

  const reservationStatus = String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase();
  const paymentStatus = String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase();
  const reservationPaymentStatus = String(reservation.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase();
  const isDonePayment = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) || ["paid", "refunded"].includes(reservationPaymentStatus);
  const isHistoryReservation = ["completed", "rejected"].includes(reservationStatus);
  if (!isDonePayment || !isHistoryReservation) {
    return res.status(409).json({
      success: false,
      message: "Payment can only be deleted for completed or rejected history reservations."
    });
  }

  await Payment.findByIdAndDelete(paymentId);
  reservation.paymentStatus = "unpaid";
  reservation.paymentDeletedAt = new Date();
  await reservation.save();
  return res.json({ success: true, message: "Payment deleted.", paymentId });
};

export const requestRefund = async (req, res) => {
  const paymentId = String(req.params.id || "").trim();
  const reason = String(req.body?.reason || "").trim();
  const payoutMethod = String(req.body?.payoutMethod || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const payoutNumber = String(req.body?.payoutNumber || "").trim();
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(paymentId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment id" });
  }
  if (!reason) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund reason is required" });
  }
  if (reason.length < 8 || reason.length > 500) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund reason must be 8-500 characters." });
  }
  if (!["gcash", "maya"].includes(payoutMethod)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund payout method must be GCash or Maya." });
  }
  const normalizedPayoutNumber = payoutNumber.replace(/\s+/g, "");
  if (!/^\d{10,13}$/.test(normalizedPayoutNumber)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund payout number must be 10-13 digits." });
  }

  const payment = await Payment.findById(paymentId).populate("reservationId");
  if (!payment) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Payment not found" });
  const reservation = payment.reservationId;
  if (!reservation) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found for payment" });

  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }
  if (String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase() === "completed") {
    return res.status(409).json({
      success: false,
      message: "Refund is not available after the reservation is marked as done."
    });
  }
  if (!["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified"].includes(String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase())) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refunds are only available for submitted payments." });
  }
  if (["requested", "approved", "processed"].includes(payment.refundStatus)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refund is already in progress." });
  }
  if (payment.refundStatus === "awaiting_payout_details") {
    payment.refundStatus = "requested";
  }
  if (payment.refundStatus === "rejected") {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refund was already rejected for this payment." });
  }

  payment.refundStatus = "requested";
  payment.refundReason = reason;
  payment.refundPayoutMethod = payoutMethod;
  payment.refundPayoutNumber = normalizedPayoutNumber;
  payment.refundRequestedAt = new Date();
  payment.refundRequestedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
  await payment.save();
  notifyRefundRequested(payment, reservation).catch((error) => {
    console.error("Refund request email notification failed", {
      reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
      paymentId: String(payment?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });
  return res.json({ success: true, payment: serializePaymentForMutationResponse(payment) });
};

export const resolveRefund = async (req, res) => {
  const paymentId = String(req.params.id || "").trim();
  const action = String(req.body?.action || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const refundReferenceNumber = String(req.body?.refundReferenceNumber || "").trim();
  const refundProofUrl = String(req.body?.refundProofUrl || "").trim();
  const refundAdminNote = String(req.body?.refundAdminNote || "").trim();
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(paymentId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid payment id" });
  }
  if (!["approve", "reject", "process"].includes(action)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid refund action" });
  }

  const payment = await Payment.findById(paymentId);
  if (!payment) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Payment not found" });
  const reservation = await Reservation.findById(payment.reservationId);
  const currentRefundStatus = String(payment.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
  const paymentStatus = String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (!["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "paid", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refund action is not available for this payment state." });
  }
  if (paymentStatus === "refunded" && action === "process") {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refund already processed for this payment." });
  }

  if (action === "approve") {
    if (currentRefundStatus !== "requested") {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Only requested refunds can be approved." });
    }
    if (refundAdminNote && refundAdminNote.length < 8) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Admin note must be at least 8 characters when provided." });
    }
    payment.refundStatus = "approved";
    payment.refundResolvedAt = new Date();
    payment.refundResolvedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
    payment.refundAdminNote = refundAdminNote || payment.refundAdminNote || "";
  } else if (action === "reject") {
    if (!["requested", "approved"].includes(currentRefundStatus)) {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Only requested or approved refunds can be rejected." });
    }
    if (!refundAdminNote || refundAdminNote.length < 8) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Admin note is required when rejecting a refund (min 8 characters)." });
    }
    payment.refundStatus = "rejected";
    payment.refundResolvedAt = new Date();
    payment.refundResolvedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
    payment.refundAdminNote = refundAdminNote;
  } else if (action === "process") {
    if (["none", "rejected", "processed"].includes(currentRefundStatus)) {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: `Refund cannot be processed from status: ${String(currentRefundStatus || "none").toUpperCase()}.` });
    }
    if (!REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(refundReferenceNumber)) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Refund reference number must be exactly 12 digits."
      });
    }
    if (!refundProofUrl) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund proof is required for processing." });
    }
    if (!refundProofUrl.startsWith(DATA_IMAGE_PREFIX)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid refund proof format. Upload an image file." });
    }
    if (!DATA_IMAGE_REGEX.test(refundProofUrl)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid refund proof payload." });
    }
    if (refundProofUrl.length > 7_000_000) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund proof image is too large. Max 5MB image." });
    }
    payment.refundStatus = "processed";
    payment.status = "refunded";
    payment.refundResolvedAt = new Date();
    payment.refundResolvedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
    payment.refundProcessedAt = new Date();
    payment.refundReferenceNumber = refundReferenceNumber;
    payment.refundProofUrl = refundProofUrl;
    payment.refundAdminNote = refundAdminNote || payment.refundAdminNote || "";
    payment.failureReason = "Refund processed by admin.";
    await applyStatusToReservation(payment.reservationId, "refunded");
  }

  await payment.save();
  if (["approve", "reject", "process"].includes(action)) {
    notifyRefundDecision(payment, reservation, action).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Refund decision email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || payment?.reservationId || ""),
        paymentId: String(payment?._id || ""),
        action: String(action || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }
  return res.json({ success: true, payment: serializePaymentForMutationResponse(payment) });
};

backend/src/modules/payment/payment.routes.js

Source file 21 of 111

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  createPayment,
  deletePayment,
  getPaymentProof,
  getPaymentByReservation,
  listPayments,
  requestRefund,
  resolveRefund,
  verifyPayment
} from "./payment.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.post("/", requireAuth, asyncHandler(createPayment));
router.get("/reservation/:reservationId", requireAuth, asyncHandler(getPaymentByReservation));
router.get("/:id/proof", requireAuth, asyncHandler(getPaymentProof));
router.get("/", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(listPayments));
router.patch("/:id/status", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(verifyPayment));
router.delete("/:id", requireAuth, asyncHandler(deletePayment));
router.post("/:id/delete", requireAuth, asyncHandler(deletePayment));
router.post("/:id/refund/request", requireAuth, asyncHandler(requestRefund));
router.post("/:id/refund/resolve", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(resolveRefund));

export default router;

import Reservation from "../../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import Payment from "../../shared/models/Payment.js";
import User from "../../shared/models/User.js";
import UserArchiveFolder from "../../shared/models/UserArchiveFolder.js";
import mongoose from "mongoose";
import {
  notifyCustomPackageSelected,
  notifyCustomQuoteApproved,
  notifyCustomQuoteProvided,
  notifyProjectStatusUpdated,
  notifyRefundDecision,
  notifyRefundPayoutDetailsRequired,
  notifyReservationEditable,
  notifyReservationCompleted
} from "../../shared/utils/notificationEmail.js";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../../shared/utils/phone.js";
import { generateReservationCode } from "../../shared/utils/reservationCode.js";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../shared/utils/roles.js";
import {
  buildSameDateFilter as buildSharedSameDateFilter,
  createReservationFromPayload,
  findReservationByIdentifier,
  normalizeReservationPayload
} from "./reservation.shared.js";

const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const PREDEFINED_PACKAGES = new Set(["basic", "standard", "premium"]);
const VISIBLE_AFTER_PAYMENT_SUBMIT = new Set(["pending", "processing", "paid"]);
const MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS = 3;
const EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE = `Event date must be at least ${MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS} days from today.`;
const REFERENCE_PATTERN = /^\d{12}$/;
const DATA_IMAGE_PREFIX = "data:image/";
const DATA_IMAGE_REGEX = /^data:image\/[a-zA-Z0-9.+-]+;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=\s]+$/;
const PACKAGE_CATALOG = {
  basic: { name: "Basic", inclusions: "Softcopy only", price: 2700 },
  standard: { name: "Standard", inclusions: "Softcopy + Hardcopy", price: 3500 },
  premium: { name: "Premium", inclusions: "Softcopy + Hardcopy + Video", price: 4500 }
};

const compareByCreatedAtThenId = (a, b) => {
  const createdAtDiff = new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(b.createdAt).getTime();
  if (createdAtDiff !== 0) return createdAtDiff;
  return String(a._id).localeCompare(String(b._id));
};

const MANILA_TIMEZONE = "Asia/Manila";

const getDateKey = (value) => {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(raw)) {
    return raw.slice(0, 10);
  }

  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    return "";
  }

  const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
    timeZone: MANILA_TIMEZONE,
    year: "numeric",
    month: "2-digit",
    day: "2-digit"
  }).formatToParts(date);
  const year = parts.find((part) => part.type === "year")?.value || "";
  const month = parts.find((part) => part.type === "month")?.value || "";
  const day = parts.find((part) => part.type === "day")?.value || "";
  return year && month && day ? `${year}-${month}-${day}` : "";
};

const buildSameDateFilter = (value, statuses, excludeId) => {
  const eventDateKey = getDateKey(value);
  const filter = {
    status: Array.isArray(statuses) ? { $in: statuses } : statuses,
    $or: [
      { eventDateKey },
      { eventDate: eventDateKey },
      { eventDate: { $regex: `^${eventDateKey}` } },
      {
        $expr: {
          $eq: [
            {
              $dateToString: {
                format: "%Y-%m-%d",
                date: "$eventDateTime",
                timezone: MANILA_TIMEZONE
              }
            },
            eventDateKey
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  };

  if (excludeId) {
    filter._id = { $ne: excludeId };
  }

  return filter;
};

const parseNumberField = (value) => {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
};

const getMinimumReservationDateTime = () => {
  const next = new Date();
  next.setSeconds(0, 0);
  next.setDate(next.getDate() + MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS);
  return next;
};

const isReservationDateValid = (value) => {
  const selected = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(selected.getTime())) {
    return false;
  }
  return selected.getTime() >= getMinimumReservationDateTime().getTime();
};

const createUniqueReservationCode = async () => {
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 12; attempt += 1) {
    const reservationCode = generateReservationCode();
    const existing = await Reservation.exists({ reservationCode });
    if (!existing) return reservationCode;
  }
  throw new Error("Unable to generate unique reservation code");
};

const ensureReservationCodes = async (reservations) => {
  const list = Array.isArray(reservations) ? reservations : [reservations];
  for (const reservation of list) {
    if (!reservation || String(reservation?.reservationCode || "").trim()) continue;
    const reservationCode = await createUniqueReservationCode();
    await Reservation.updateOne(
      { _id: reservation._id, $or: [{ reservationCode: { $exists: false } }, { reservationCode: "" }, { reservationCode: null }] },
      { $set: { reservationCode } }
    );
    if (typeof reservation.set === "function") reservation.set("reservationCode", reservationCode);
    else reservation.reservationCode = reservationCode;
  }
  return list;
};

const attachReservationProfileData = async (reservations, options = {}) => {
  const { ensureCodes = true, includeMedia = true } = options || {};
  const list = Array.isArray(reservations) ? reservations : [reservations];
  if (ensureCodes) {
    await ensureReservationCodes(list);
  }
  const userIds = [...new Set(
    list
      .map((item) => String(item?.userId || "").trim())
      .filter(Boolean)
  )];
  const objectUserIds = userIds
    .filter((id) => mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(id))
    .map((id) => new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(id));
  const emails = [...new Set(
    list
      .map((item) => String(item?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase())
      .filter(Boolean)
  )];
  const userFilters = [];
  if (objectUserIds.length) userFilters.push({ _id: { $in: objectUserIds } });
  if (emails.length) userFilters.push({ email: { $in: emails } });
  const users = userFilters.length
    ? await User.find({ $or: userFilters }).select("fullName email phone avatarUrl googleAvatarUrl").maxTimeMS(10000).lean()
    : [];
  const userById = new Map(users.map((user) => [String(user._id), user]));
  const userByEmail = new Map(users.map((user) => [String(user.email || "").trim().toLowerCase(), user]));
  const ownerUserIds = [...new Set([
    ...userIds,
    ...users.map((user) => String(user._id)).filter(Boolean)
  ])];
  const userHasMedia = new Map();
  if (includeMedia && ownerUserIds.length) {
    const usersWithMedia = await UserArchiveFolder.distinct("userId", {
      userId: { $in: ownerUserIds },
      "photos.0": { $exists: true }
    }).maxTimeMS(10000);
    usersWithMedia.forEach((userId) => {
      if (userId) userHasMedia.set(String(userId), true);
    });
  }

  return list.map((item) => {
    const plain = item?.toObject ? item.toObject() : { ...(item || {}) };
    const normalizedEmail = String(plain?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const user = userById.get(String(plain?.userId || "")) || userByEmail.get(normalizedEmail) || null;
    const ownerUserId = String(plain?.userId || user?._id || "").trim();
    return {
      ...plain,
      fullName: plain.fullName || user?.fullName || "",
      email: plain.email || user?.email || "",
      phone: plain.phone || user?.phone || "",
      avatarUrl: plain.avatarUrl || user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl || "",
      hasUploadedMedia: includeMedia && ownerUserId ? Boolean(userHasMedia.get(ownerUserId)) : false
    };
  });
};

const resolveReservationOwnerUserId = async (reservation) => {
  if (reservation?.userId) {
    return String(reservation.userId);
  }
  const normalizedEmail = String(reservation?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!normalizedEmail) return "";
  const user = await User.findOne({ email: normalizedEmail }).select("_id").lean();
  return String(user?._id || "");
};

const DATE_PENDING_APPROVAL_MESSAGE = "This date is currently reserved but not yet approved. Reservations follow a first-approved, first-served basis. Do you want to proceed?";
const DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE = "This date is already occupied and approved. Please choose another date.";

const normalizeAdjustments = (items) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(items)) return [];
  return items.map((item) => {
    const label = String(item?.label || "").trim();
    const amount = parseNumberField(item?.amount);
    return { label, amount };
  });
};

const sumAmounts = (items) => items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.amount, 0);

const isReservationOwner = (reservation, user) => {
  const ownById = reservation.userId && reservation.userId.toString() === user?.sub;
  const ownByEmail = reservation.email === user?.email;
  return Boolean(ownById || ownByEmail);
};

const isPredefinedReservation = (reservation) => {
  const normalizedPackage = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return PREDEFINED_PACKAGES.has(normalizedPackage);
};

const isCustomReservation = (reservation) => {
  const normalizedPackage = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return normalizedPackage === "custom";
};

const isApprovalQueueEligible = (reservation) => {
  const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (status === "approved") return true;
  if (status !== "pending") return false;
  if (!isPredefinedReservation(reservation)) return true;
  const paymentStatus = String(reservation?.paymentStatus || "unpaid").toLowerCase();
  return VISIBLE_AFTER_PAYMENT_SUBMIT.has(paymentStatus);
};

const canUserEditReservation = (reservation, payment = null) => {
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || reservation?.paymentStatus || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (reservationStatus !== "pending") return false;
  return !["paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus);
};

const USER_RESERVATION_EDIT_LOCK_MESSAGE =
  "You can only edit reservations while they are still pending. Editing is locked after payment is verified or the reservation is no longer pending.";

export const createReservation = async (req, res) => {
  const normalizedPackage = String(req.body?.packageName || req.body?.package || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (PREDEFINED_PACKAGES.has(normalizedPackage)) {
    return res.status(409).json({
      success: false,
      message: "Standard package reservations are only stored after the client successfully submits payment."
    });
  }

  try {
    const { reservation } = await createReservationFromPayload({
      payload: req.body,
      userId: req.user?.sub
    });

    notifyCustomPackageSelected(reservation).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Custom package selection email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });

    res.status(201).json({ success: true, reservation });
  } catch (error) {
    const code = Number(error?.code || 500);
    const body = { success: false, message: error?.message || "Failed to create reservation." };
    if (Array.isArray(error?.missingFields) && error.missingFields.length) {
      body.missingFields = error.missingFields;
    }
    if (error?.responseCode) {
      body.code = error.responseCode;
    }
    return res.status(code).json(body);
  }
};

export const checkDateAvailability = async (req, res) => {
  const rawDate = String(req.query.date || "").trim();
  if (!rawDate) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Missing date query parameter" });
  }

  const selected = new Date(rawDate);
  if (Number.isNaN(selected.getTime())) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid date format" });
  }

  const approvedConflict = await Reservation.exists({
    ...buildSameDateFilter(rawDate, "approved")
  });
  if (approvedConflict) {
    return res.json({
      success: true,
      available: false,
      canProceed: false,
      conflictType: "approved",
      message: DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE
    });
  }

  const pendingConflict = await Reservation.exists({
    ...buildSameDateFilter(rawDate, "pending")
  });
  res.json({
    success: true,
    available: !pendingConflict,
    canProceed: true,
    conflictType: pendingConflict ? "pending" : "none",
    message: pendingConflict ? DATE_PENDING_APPROVAL_MESSAGE : ""
  });
};

export const checkMonthAvailability = async (req, res) => {
  const rawMonth = String(req.query.month || "").trim();
  if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}$/.test(rawMonth)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid month format. Use YYYY-MM." });
  }

  const reservations = await Reservation.find({
    status: { $in: ["pending", "approved"] },
    $or: [
      { eventDateKey: { $regex: `^${rawMonth}` } },
      { eventDate: { $regex: `^${rawMonth}` } },
      {
        $expr: {
          $eq: [
            {
              $dateToString: {
                format: "%Y-%m",
                date: "$eventDateTime",
                timezone: MANILA_TIMEZONE
              }
            },
            rawMonth
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }).select("status eventDateTime eventDate eventDateKey");

  const days = {};
  reservations.forEach((reservation) => {
    const dateKey = getDateKey(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDateKey || reservation?.eventDate);
    if (!dateKey || !dateKey.startsWith(rawMonth)) return;
    const nextStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "approved" ? "approved" : "pending";
    if (days[dateKey] === "approved") return;
    days[dateKey] = nextStatus;
  });

  res.json({ success: true, month: rawMonth, days });
};

export const getPopularPackage = async (_req, res) => {
  const results = await Reservation.aggregate([
    {
      $project: {
        normalizedPackage: {
          $toLower: {
            $trim: {
              input: { $ifNull: ["$service", "$packageName"] }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      $match: {
        normalizedPackage: { $in: ["basic", "standard", "premium"] }
      }
    },
    {
      $group: {
        _id: "$normalizedPackage",
        count: { $sum: 1 }
      }
    },
    {
      $sort: { count: -1, _id: 1 }
    },
    {
      $limit: 1
    }
  ]);

  const top = results[0] || null;
  res.json({
    success: true,
    package: top?._id || "",
    count: top?.count || 0
  });
};

export const listReservations = async (req, res) => {
  const traceId = `${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 6)}`;
  const totalLabel = `listReservations total ${traceId}`;
  const queryLabel = `listReservations query ${traceId}`;
  const attachLabel = `attachReservationProfileData ${traceId}`;
  console.time(totalLabel);
  try {
    const { status } = req.query;
    const filter = {};
    if (status) {
      filter.status = status;
    }

    const limitParam = Number(req.query?.limit || 50);
    const pageParam = Number(req.query?.page || 1);
    const limit = Number.isFinite(limitParam) ? Math.min(Math.max(limitParam, 1), 200) : 50;
    const page = Number.isFinite(pageParam) ? Math.max(pageParam, 1) : 1;
    const skip = (page - 1) * limit;

    if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
      filter.$or = [{ userId: req.user?.sub }, { email: req.user?.email }];
    }

    console.log("reservation filter:", filter);
    console.log("listReservations connection", {
      readyState: mongoose.connection.readyState,
      host: mongoose.connection.host,
      name: mongoose.connection.name
    });

    console.time(queryLabel);
    const reservations = await Reservation.find(filter)
      .sort({ _id: -1 })
      .skip(skip)
      .limit(limit)
      .maxTimeMS(10000)
      .lean();
    console.timeEnd(queryLabel);
    const total = await Reservation.countDocuments(filter).maxTimeMS(10000);

    console.time(attachLabel);
    const normalizedReservations = await attachReservationProfileData(reservations, { ensureCodes: false, includeMedia: true });
    console.timeEnd(attachLabel);

    res.json({ success: true, reservations: normalizedReservations, page, limit, total });
  } finally {
    console.timeEnd(totalLabel);
  }
};

export const listDashboardReservations = async (req, res) => {
  const filter = {};

  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
    filter.$or = [{ userId: req.user?.sub }, { email: req.user?.email }];
  }

  const reservations = await Reservation.find(filter).sort({ updatedAt: -1 }).lean();
  const normalizedReservations = (await attachReservationProfileData(reservations, { ensureCodes: false, includeMedia: true })).map((plain) => {
    return {
      ...plain,
      reservationStatus: plain.status || "pending"
    };
  });
  res.json({ success: true, reservations: normalizedReservations });
};

export const getReservationById = async (req, res) => {
  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }
  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role)) {
    if (!isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
    }
  }
  const [normalizedReservation] = await attachReservationProfileData(reservation ? [reservation] : []);
  res.json({ success: true, reservation: normalizedReservation });
};

export const updateReservationByUser = async (req, res) => {
  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }

  if (!isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }

  const latestPayment = await Payment.findOne({ reservationId: reservation._id }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
  if (!canUserEditReservation(reservation, latestPayment)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: USER_RESERVATION_EDIT_LOCK_MESSAGE });
  }

  try {
    const normalized = await normalizeReservationPayload(req.body);
    const approvedConflict = await Reservation.findOne(
      buildSharedSameDateFilter(normalized.eventDateValue, "approved", reservation._id)
    ).lean();

    if (approvedConflict) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE,
        code: "DATE_ALREADY_APPROVED"
      });
    }

    const nextDocument = normalized.document;
    reservation.fullName = nextDocument.fullName;
    reservation.email = nextDocument.email;
    reservation.phone = nextDocument.phone;
    reservation.service = nextDocument.service;
    reservation.serviceOtherDetails = nextDocument.serviceOtherDetails;
    reservation.packageName = nextDocument.packageName;
    reservation.packageInclusions = nextDocument.packageInclusions;
    reservation.packagePrice = nextDocument.packagePrice;
    reservation.packageCustomDescription = nextDocument.packageCustomDescription;
    reservation.durationHours = nextDocument.durationHours;
    reservation.eventType = nextDocument.eventType;
    reservation.eventTypeOtherDetails = nextDocument.eventTypeOtherDetails;
    reservation.eventDateTime = nextDocument.eventDateTime;
    reservation.eventDateKey = nextDocument.eventDateKey;
    reservation.province = nextDocument.province;
    reservation.city = nextDocument.city;
    reservation.barangay = nextDocument.barangay;
    reservation.street = nextDocument.street;
    reservation.notes = nextDocument.notes;
    reservation.status = "pending";
    reservation.workflowStage = "awaiting_approval";
    reservation.workflowStageUpdatedAt = null;
    reservation.estimatedDelivery = null;
    reservation.userCancellationReason = "";
    reservation.cancelledByRole = "";
    reservation.cancelledAt = null;

    if (normalized.packageMeta) {
      reservation.basePrice = nextDocument.basePrice;
      reservation.finalPrice = nextDocument.finalPrice;
      reservation.currency = "PHP";
      reservation.pricingStatus = "accepted";
      reservation.quotedAt = new Date();
      reservation.quotedBy = null;
      reservation.pricingAcceptedAt = new Date();
      reservation.quoteVersion = Math.max(1, Number(reservation.quoteVersion || 0));
    } else {
      reservation.basePrice = null;
      reservation.customAdjustments = [];
      reservation.discount = 0;
      reservation.finalPrice = null;
      reservation.currency = "PHP";
      reservation.pricingStatus = "unquoted";
      reservation.quotedAt = null;
      reservation.quotedBy = null;
      reservation.pricingAcceptedAt = null;
      reservation.quoteVersion = 0;
    }

    if (["failed", "cancelled", "unpaid", ""].includes(String(reservation.paymentStatus || "").trim().toLowerCase())) {
      reservation.paymentStatus = "unpaid";
    }

    await reservation.save();
    const [normalizedReservation] = await attachReservationProfileData([reservation], {
      ensureCodes: false,
      includeMedia: true
    });
    return res.json({ success: true, reservation: normalizedReservation });
  } catch (error) {
    const code = Number(error?.code || 500);
    const body = { success: false, message: error?.message || "Failed to update reservation." };
    if (Array.isArray(error?.missingFields) && error.missingFields.length) {
      body.missingFields = error.missingFields;
    }
    if (error?.responseCode) {
      body.code = error.responseCode;
    }
    return res.status(code).json(body);
  }
};

export const updateReservationPricing = async (req, res) => {
  const { basePrice, customAdjustments, discount = 0, currency = "PHP" } = req.body;

  const normalizedBasePrice = parseNumberField(basePrice);
  const normalizedDiscount = parseNumberField(discount);
  if (normalizedBasePrice === null || normalizedBasePrice < 0) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid basePrice" });
  }
  if (normalizedDiscount === null || normalizedDiscount < 0) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid discount" });
  }

  const normalizedCurrency = String(currency || "PHP").trim().toUpperCase();
  if (!normalizedCurrency) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid currency" });
  }

  const adjustments = normalizeAdjustments(customAdjustments);
  const invalidAdjustment = adjustments.find((item) => !item.label || item.amount === null);
  if (invalidAdjustment) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Each custom adjustment requires a label and numeric amount" });
  }

  const finalPrice = normalizedBasePrice + sumAmounts(adjustments) - normalizedDiscount;
  if (finalPrice <= 0) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Final price must be greater than 0" });
  }

  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }
  if (!isCustomReservation(reservation)) {
    return res.status(409).json({
      success: false,
      message: "Quotes can only be updated for custom package reservations."
    });
  }

  const verifiedPayment = await Payment.exists({ reservationId: reservation._id, status: "verified" });
  if (verifiedPayment) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Cannot update pricing after payment is verified" });
  }

  await Payment.updateMany(
    {
      reservationId: reservation._id,
      status: { $in: ["pending", "processing"] }
    },
    {
      $set: {
        status: "cancelled",
        failedAt: new Date(),
        failureReason: "Payment was cancelled because the reservation quote was updated."
      }
    }
  );

  reservation.basePrice = normalizedBasePrice;
  reservation.customAdjustments = adjustments;
  reservation.discount = normalizedDiscount;
  reservation.finalPrice = finalPrice;
  reservation.currency = normalizedCurrency;
  reservation.pricingStatus = "quoted";
  reservation.quotedAt = new Date();
  reservation.quotedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
  reservation.pricingAcceptedAt = null;
  reservation.quoteVersion = Number(reservation.quoteVersion || 0) + 1;
  reservation.paymentStatus = "unpaid";
  reservation.pricingHistory.push({
    basePrice: normalizedBasePrice,
    customAdjustments: adjustments,
    discount: normalizedDiscount,
    finalPrice,
    currency: normalizedCurrency,
    quotedBy: req.user?.sub || null,
    quotedAt: reservation.quotedAt
  });

  await reservation.save();

  notifyCustomQuoteProvided(reservation).catch((error) => {
    console.error("Custom quote email notification failed", {
      reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  notifyReservationEditable(reservation).catch((error) => {
    console.error("Reservation editable email notification failed", {
      reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  res.json({ success: true, reservation });
};

const updatePricingResponse = async (req, res, nextStatus) => {
  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }

  if (!hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role) && !isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }
  if (!isCustomReservation(reservation)) {
    return res.status(409).json({
      success: false,
      message: "Quote response is only available for custom package reservations."
    });
  }
  if (reservation.pricingStatus !== "quoted") {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation does not have an active quote to respond to" });
  }
  reservation.pricingStatus = nextStatus;
  reservation.pricingAcceptedAt = nextStatus === "accepted" ? new Date() : null;
  await reservation.save();

  if (nextStatus === "accepted") {
    notifyCustomQuoteApproved(reservation).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Custom quote approval email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  return res.json({ success: true, reservation });
};

export const acceptReservationPricing = async (req, res) => updatePricingResponse(req, res, "accepted");
export const rejectReservationPricing = async (req, res) => updatePricingResponse(req, res, "rejected");

export const cancelReservationByUser = async (req, res) => {
  const normalizedCancellationReason = String(req.body?.cancellationReason || "").trim();
  if (normalizedCancellationReason.length < 8 || normalizedCancellationReason.length > 500) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Cancellation reason must be 8-500 characters." });
  }

  const reservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!reservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }

  if (!isReservationOwner(reservation, req.user)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Forbidden" });
  }

  const currentStatus = String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (["rejected", "completed"].includes(currentStatus)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation cannot be cancelled in its current status" });
  }

  const payment = await Payment.findOne({ reservationId: reservation._id });
  let refundRequested = false;
  if (payment?.status === "verified") {
    const currentRefundStatus = String(payment.refundStatus || "none");
    if (currentRefundStatus === "rejected") {
      return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Refund for this payment was already rejected. Please contact admin support." });
    }
    if (currentRefundStatus === "none") {
      payment.refundStatus = "requested";
      payment.refundReason = `User cancelled reservation: ${normalizedCancellationReason}`;
      payment.refundRequestedAt = new Date();
      payment.refundRequestedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
      payment.refundResolvedAt = null;
      payment.refundResolvedBy = null;
      await payment.save();
      refundRequested = true;
    }
  }

  reservation.status = "rejected";
  reservation.userCancellationReason = normalizedCancellationReason;
  reservation.cancelledByRole = "user";
  reservation.cancelledAt = new Date();

  if (!payment || ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase())) {
    const cancelResult = await Payment.updateMany(
      { reservationId: reservation._id, status: { $in: ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"] } },
      {
        $set: {
          status: "cancelled",
          failureReason: "Reservation was cancelled by user.",
          failedAt: new Date()
        }
      }
    );
    if (cancelResult.modifiedCount > 0) {
      reservation.paymentStatus = "cancelled";
    }
  } else if (String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase() === "verified") {
    reservation.paymentStatus = "paid";
  } else if (String(payment.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded") {
    reservation.paymentStatus = "refunded";
  }

  await reservation.save();
  return res.json({ success: true, reservation, refundRequested });
};

export const updateReservationStatus = async (req, res) => {
  const {
    status,
    workflowStage,
    estimatedDelivery,
    refundAction,
    refundAdminNote,
    refundReferenceNumber,
    refundProofUrl
  } = req.body;
  const validStatuses = ["pending", "approved", "rejected", "completed"];
  const validStages = ["awaiting_approval", "approved", "shoot_completed", "editing", "ready_for_download"];
  const isAdmin = hasAdminAccess(req.user?.role);

  if (!status && !workflowStage && !estimatedDelivery) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Status, workflowStage, or estimatedDelivery is required" });
  }
  if (status && !validStatuses.includes(status)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid status" });
  }
  if (workflowStage && !validStages.includes(workflowStage)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid workflowStage" });
  }
  if (estimatedDelivery && Number.isNaN(new Date(estimatedDelivery).getTime())) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid estimatedDelivery" });
  }

  const targetReservation = await findReservationByIdentifier(req.params.id);
  if (!targetReservation) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Reservation not found" });
  }

  const updateData = {};
  if (status) updateData.status = status;
  if (workflowStage) updateData.workflowStage = workflowStage;
  if (estimatedDelivery) updateData.estimatedDelivery = new Date(estimatedDelivery);

  // Keep workflow stage and status coherent even when only one is sent.
  if (status && !workflowStage) {
    if (status === "pending") updateData.workflowStage = "awaiting_approval";
    if (status === "approved") updateData.workflowStage = "awaiting_approval";
    if (status === "completed") updateData.workflowStage = "ready_for_download";
  }
  if (workflowStage && !status) {
    const currentStatus = String(targetReservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
    if (workflowStage === "awaiting_approval") updateData.status = "pending";
    if (["approved", "shoot_completed", "editing", "ready_for_download"].includes(workflowStage) && currentStatus === "approved") {
      updateData.status = "approved";
    }
  }
  if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(updateData, "workflowStage")) {
    const nextWorkflowStage = String(updateData.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase();
    updateData.workflowStageUpdatedAt = nextWorkflowStage && nextWorkflowStage !== "awaiting_approval"
      ? new Date()
      : null;
  }

  const previousStatus = String(targetReservation.status || "");
  const previousWorkflowStage = String(targetReservation.workflowStage || "");

  if (!isAdmin) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Admin access required" });
  }

  const nextStatus = updateData.status || targetReservation.status;
  if (nextStatus === "completed") {
    const verifiedPayment = await Payment.exists({ reservationId: targetReservation._id, status: "verified" });
    if (!verifiedPayment) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Cannot mark reservation completed without verified payment."
      });
    }
    const nextWorkflowStage = String(updateData.workflowStage || targetReservation.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase();
    if (nextWorkflowStage !== "ready_for_download") {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Set the progress to Ready for Download before marking this reservation as done."
      });
    }
    const ownerUserId = await resolveReservationOwnerUserId(targetReservation);
    if (!ownerUserId) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Reservation owner could not be resolved for archive validation."
      });
    }
    const hasUploadedMedia = await UserArchiveFolder.exists({
      userId: ownerUserId,
      "photos.0": { $exists: true }
    });
    if (!hasUploadedMedia) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Upload delivery media before marking this reservation as done."
      });
    }
  }
  const isMovingToApproved = targetReservation.status !== "approved" && nextStatus === "approved";
  if (isMovingToApproved) {
    const verifiedPayment = await Payment.exists({ reservationId: targetReservation._id, status: "verified" });
    if (!verifiedPayment) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Cannot approve this booking until payment is verified."
      });
    }
    const approvedConflict = await Reservation.exists({
      ...buildSameDateFilter(targetReservation.eventDateTime, "approved", targetReservation._id)
    });
    if (approvedConflict) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        message: "Cannot approve this reservation because this date is already approved for another client."
      });
    }

    const sameDayReservable = await Reservation.find({
      ...buildSameDateFilter(targetReservation.eventDateTime, ["pending", "approved"])
    })
      .select("_id createdAt status packageName package service paymentStatus")
      .lean();
    const eligibleReservable = sameDayReservable.filter(isApprovalQueueEligible);
    eligibleReservable.sort(compareByCreatedAtThenId);
    const firstInQueue = eligibleReservable[0];
    if (firstInQueue && String(firstInQueue._id) !== String(targetReservation._id)) {
      return res.status(409).json({
        success: false,
        code: "FIRST_COME_APPROVAL_REQUIRED",
        message:
          "Cannot approve this reservation before the earliest reservation for this date. Approve the first reservation in queue first."
      });
    }
  }

  const reservation = await Reservation.findByIdAndUpdate(targetReservation._id, updateData, { new: true });

  if (isMovingToApproved) {
    const pendingReservationsToReject = await Reservation.find({
      ...buildSameDateFilter(reservation.eventDateTime, "pending", reservation._id)
    })
      .select("_id email fullName eventDateTime")
      .lean();
    const pendingReservationIds = pendingReservationsToReject.map((item) => item._id);
    if (pendingReservationIds.length > 0) {
      await Reservation.updateMany(
        {
          _id: { $in: pendingReservationIds }
        },
        {
          $set: {
            status: "rejected",
            cancelledByRole: "admin",
            cancelledAt: new Date()
          }
        }
      );
      const paymentCancelFilter = { reservationId: { $in: pendingReservationIds }, status: { $in: ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"] } };
      const reservationsWithCancelledPayments = await Payment.distinct("reservationId", paymentCancelFilter);
      await Payment.updateMany(
        paymentCancelFilter,
        {
          $set: {
            status: "cancelled",
            failureReason: "Reservation date became unavailable after another reservation was approved first.",
            failedAt: new Date()
          }
        }
      );
      if (reservationsWithCancelledPayments.length > 0) {
        await Reservation.updateMany(
          { _id: { $in: reservationsWithCancelledPayments } },
          { $set: { paymentStatus: "cancelled" } }
        );
      }
    }
  }

  if (nextStatus === "rejected") {
    const linkedPayment = await Payment.findOne({ reservationId: reservation._id }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    const linkedPaymentStatus = String(linkedPayment?.status || "").toLowerCase();
    const refundMode = String(refundAction || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const normalizedRefundAdminNote = String(refundAdminNote || "").trim();
    const normalizedRefundReferenceNumber = String(refundReferenceNumber || "").trim();
    const normalizedRefundProofUrl = String(refundProofUrl || "").trim();

    if (["verified", "paid"].includes(linkedPaymentStatus)) {
      if (!["pending", "process"].includes(refundMode)) {
        return res.status(409).json({
          success: false,
          code: "REFUND_DECISION_REQUIRED",
          message: "A refund decision is required before rejecting a paid reservation."
        });
      }
      if (!normalizedRefundAdminNote || normalizedRefundAdminNote.length < 8) {
        return res.status(400).json({
          success: false,
          message: "Refund note is required when rejecting a paid reservation (min 8 characters)."
        });
      }

      if (refundMode === "pending") {
        linkedPayment.refundStatus = "awaiting_payout_details";
        linkedPayment.refundResolvedAt = null;
        linkedPayment.refundResolvedBy = null;
        linkedPayment.refundAdminNote = normalizedRefundAdminNote;
        linkedPayment.refundPayoutMethod = "";
        linkedPayment.refundPayoutNumber = "";
        linkedPayment.refundRequestedAt = null;
        linkedPayment.refundRequestedBy = null;
        linkedPayment.failureReason = "Reservation was rejected by admin. Refund is pending processing.";
        await linkedPayment.save();
        notifyRefundPayoutDetailsRequired(linkedPayment, reservation).catch((error) => {
          console.error("Refund payout-details email notification failed", {
            reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
            paymentId: String(linkedPayment?._id || ""),
            message: error?.message
          });
        });
      } else {
        if (!["gcash", "maya"].includes(String(linkedPayment.refundPayoutMethod || "").toLowerCase()) || !/^\d{10,13}$/.test(String(linkedPayment.refundPayoutNumber || "").trim())) {
          return res.status(409).json({
            success: false,
            message: "The client must submit valid GCash or Maya payout details before you can process the refund."
          });
        }
        if (!REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(normalizedRefundReferenceNumber)) {
          return res.status(400).json({
            success: false,
            message: "Refund reference number must be exactly 12 digits."
          });
        }
        if (!normalizedRefundProofUrl) {
          return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund proof is required when processing a refund." });
        }
        if (!normalizedRefundProofUrl.startsWith(DATA_IMAGE_PREFIX)) {
          return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid refund proof format. Upload an image file." });
        }
        if (!DATA_IMAGE_REGEX.test(normalizedRefundProofUrl)) {
          return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid refund proof payload." });
        }
        if (normalizedRefundProofUrl.length > 7_000_000) {
          return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Refund proof image is too large. Max 5MB image." });
        }
        linkedPayment.refundStatus = "processed";
        linkedPayment.status = "refunded";
        linkedPayment.refundResolvedAt = new Date();
        linkedPayment.refundResolvedBy = req.user?.sub || null;
        linkedPayment.refundProcessedAt = new Date();
        linkedPayment.refundReferenceNumber = normalizedRefundReferenceNumber;
        linkedPayment.refundProofUrl = normalizedRefundProofUrl;
        linkedPayment.refundAdminNote = normalizedRefundAdminNote;
        linkedPayment.failureReason = "Reservation was rejected by admin and refund was processed.";
        await linkedPayment.save();
        reservation.paymentStatus = "refunded";
        notifyRefundDecision(linkedPayment, reservation, "process").catch((error) => {
          console.error("Refund processed email notification failed", {
            reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
            paymentId: String(linkedPayment?._id || ""),
            message: error?.message
          });
        });
      }
    }

    const cancelReason = "Reservation was rejected by admin.";
    reservation.cancelledByRole = "admin";
    reservation.cancelledAt = new Date();
    const cancelResult = await Payment.updateMany(
      { reservationId: reservation._id, status: { $in: ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"] } },
      {
        $set: {
          status: "cancelled",
          failureReason: cancelReason,
          failedAt: new Date()
        }
      }
    );
    if (cancelResult.modifiedCount > 0) {
      reservation.paymentStatus = "cancelled";
    }
    await reservation.save();
  }
  const hasStatusChange = String(reservation.status || "") !== previousStatus;
  const hasWorkflowStageChange = String(reservation.workflowStage || "") !== previousWorkflowStage;
  if (String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase() === "completed" && previousStatus.toLowerCase() !== "completed") {
    notifyReservationCompleted(reservation).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Reservation completion email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  } else if (hasWorkflowStageChange || (hasStatusChange && String(reservation.status || "").toLowerCase() === "approved")) {
    notifyProjectStatusUpdated(reservation, {
      workflowStage: reservation.workflowStage
    }).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Project status email notification failed", {
        reservationId: String(reservation?._id || ""),
        workflowStage: String(reservation?.workflowStage || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, reservation });
};

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  acceptReservationPricing,
  cancelReservationByUser,
  checkDateAvailability,
  checkMonthAvailability,
  createReservation,
  getPopularPackage,
  listDashboardReservations,
  getReservationById,
  rejectReservationPricing,
  listReservations,
  updateReservationByUser,
  updateReservationPricing,
  updateReservationStatus
} from "./reservation.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.post("/", requireAuth, asyncHandler(createReservation));
router.get("/availability", requireAuth, asyncHandler(checkDateAvailability));
router.get("/availability/month", requireAuth, asyncHandler(checkMonthAvailability));
router.get("/popular-package", asyncHandler(getPopularPackage));
router.get("/dashboard", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listDashboardReservations));
router.get("/", requireAuth, asyncHandler(listReservations));
router.get("/:id", requireAuth, asyncHandler(getReservationById));
router.patch("/:id", requireAuth, asyncHandler(updateReservationByUser));
router.patch("/:id/pricing", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateReservationPricing));
router.post("/:id/pricing/accept", requireAuth, asyncHandler(acceptReservationPricing));
router.post("/:id/pricing/reject", requireAuth, asyncHandler(rejectReservationPricing));
router.post("/:id/cancel", requireAuth, asyncHandler(cancelReservationByUser));
router.patch("/:id/status", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateReservationStatus));

export default router;
