import Reservation from "../../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import mongoose from "mongoose";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../../shared/utils/phone.js";
import { generateReservationCode } from "../../shared/utils/reservationCode.js";

export const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
export const PREDEFINED_PACKAGES = new Set(["basic", "standard", "premium"]);
export const MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS = 3;
export const EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE = `Event date must be at least ${MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS} days from today.`;
export const DATE_PENDING_APPROVAL_MESSAGE =
  "This date is currently reserved but not yet approved. Reservations follow a first-approved, first-served basis. Do you want to proceed?";
export const DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE = "This date is already occupied and approved. Please choose another date.";
export const MANILA_TIMEZONE = "Asia/Manila";
export const PACKAGE_CATALOG = {
  basic: { name: "Basic", inclusions: "Softcopy only", price: 2700 },
  standard: { name: "Standard", inclusions: "Softcopy + Hardcopy", price: 3500 },
  premium: { name: "Premium", inclusions: "Softcopy + Hardcopy + Video", price: 4500 }
};

const requiredReservationFields = [
  "fullName",
  "email",
  "phone",
  "eventType",
  "province",
  "city",
  "barangay",
  "street"
];

const createHttpError = (code, message, extra = {}) => Object.assign(new Error(message), { code, ...extra });

export const getDateKey = (value) => {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(raw)) {
    return raw.slice(0, 10);
  }

  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    return "";
  }

  const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
    timeZone: MANILA_TIMEZONE,
    year: "numeric",
    month: "2-digit",
    day: "2-digit"
  }).formatToParts(date);
  const year = parts.find((part) => part.type === "year")?.value || "";
  const month = parts.find((part) => part.type === "month")?.value || "";
  const day = parts.find((part) => part.type === "day")?.value || "";
  return year && month && day ? `${year}-${month}-${day}` : "";
};

export const buildSameDateFilter = (value, statuses, excludeId) => {
  const eventDateKey = getDateKey(value);
  const filter = {
    status: Array.isArray(statuses) ? { $in: statuses } : statuses,
    $or: [
      { eventDateKey },
      { eventDate: eventDateKey },
      { eventDate: { $regex: `^${eventDateKey}` } },
      {
        $expr: {
          $eq: [
            {
              $dateToString: {
                format: "%Y-%m-%d",
                date: "$eventDateTime",
                timezone: MANILA_TIMEZONE
              }
            },
            eventDateKey
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  };

  if (excludeId) {
    filter._id = { $ne: excludeId };
  }

  return filter;
};

const getMinimumReservationDateTime = () => {
  const next = new Date();
  next.setSeconds(0, 0);
  next.setDate(next.getDate() + MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS);
  return next;
};

export const isReservationDateValid = (value) => {
  const selected = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(selected.getTime())) {
    return false;
  }
  return selected.getTime() >= getMinimumReservationDateTime().getTime();
};

export const createUniqueReservationCode = async () => {
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 12; attempt += 1) {
    const reservationCode = generateReservationCode();
    const existing = await Reservation.exists({ reservationCode });
    if (!existing) return reservationCode;
  }
  throw new Error("Unable to generate unique reservation code");
};

export const isPredefinedReservation = (reservation) => {
  const normalizedPackage = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return PREDEFINED_PACKAGES.has(normalizedPackage);
};

export const isCustomReservation = (reservation) => {
  const normalizedPackage = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
  return normalizedPackage === "custom";
};

export const normalizeReservationPayload = async (payload) => {
  const source = payload || {};
  const value = (field) => String(source?.[field] ?? "").trim();

  const missingFields = requiredReservationFields.filter((field) => !value(field));
  if (!(source.eventDateTime || source.eventDate)) {
    missingFields.push("eventDateTime");
  }
  if (!(source.packageName || source.package)) {
    missingFields.push("packageName");
  }
  if (missingFields.length) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Missing required reservation fields", { missingFields });
  }

  const normalizedEmail = value("email").toLowerCase();
  const normalizedPhone = normalizePhoneNumber(source?.phone);
  if (!emailRegex.test(normalizedEmail)) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Invalid email format");
  }
  if (!isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(normalizedPhone)) {
    throw createHttpError(400, PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE);
  }

  const normalizedPackage = String(source.packageName || source.package || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const packageCustomDescription = value("packageCustomDescription");
  const packageMeta = PACKAGE_CATALOG[normalizedPackage] || null;
  if (normalizedPackage === "custom" && !packageCustomDescription) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Please provide custom package description");
  }

  const normalizedEventType = value("eventType").toLowerCase();
  const eventTypeOtherDetails = value("eventTypeOtherDetails");
  if (normalizedEventType === "other" && !eventTypeOtherDetails) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Please provide event details when selecting Other event type");
  }

  const eventDateValue = source.eventDateTime || source.eventDate;
  const eventDate = new Date(eventDateValue);
  if (Number.isNaN(eventDate.getTime())) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Invalid eventDateTime");
  }
  if (!isReservationDateValid(eventDateValue)) {
    throw createHttpError(400, EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE);
  }
  const eventDateKey = getDateKey(eventDateValue);
  if (!eventDateKey) {
    throw createHttpError(400, "Invalid eventDateTime");
  }

  return {
    normalizedPackage,
    packageMeta,
    packageCustomDescription,
    eventDateValue,
    eventDateKey,
    document: {
      fullName: value("fullName"),
      email: normalizedEmail,
      phone: normalizedPhone,
      service: normalizedPackage || "package",
      serviceOtherDetails: value("serviceOtherDetails"),
      packageName: packageMeta?.name || source.packageName || source.package,
      packageInclusions: packageMeta?.inclusions || "",
      packagePrice: packageMeta?.price ?? null,
      packageCustomDescription,
      durationHours: source.durationHours || Number(source.duration || 1),
      eventType: value("eventType"),
      eventTypeOtherDetails,
      eventDateTime: eventDateValue,
      eventDateKey,
      province: value("province"),
      city: value("city"),
      barangay: value("barangay"),
      street: value("street"),
      notes: source.notes || source.additionalNotes || "",
      workflowStage: "awaiting_approval",
      basePrice: packageMeta?.price ?? null,
      finalPrice: packageMeta?.price ?? null,
      pricingStatus: packageMeta ? "accepted" : "unquoted",
      quoteVersion: packageMeta ? 1 : 0,
      quotedAt: packageMeta ? new Date() : null,
      pricingAcceptedAt: packageMeta ? new Date() : null
    }
  };
};

export const createReservationFromPayload = async ({ payload, userId = null }) => {
  const normalized = await normalizeReservationPayload(payload);
  const approvedConflict = await Reservation.findOne({
    ...buildSameDateFilter(normalized.eventDateValue, "approved")
  }).lean();

  if (approvedConflict) {
    throw createHttpError(409, DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE, { responseCode: "DATE_ALREADY_APPROVED" });
  }

  const reservation = await Reservation.create({
    reservationCode: await createUniqueReservationCode(),
    userId,
    ...normalized.document
  });

  return { reservation, normalized };
};

export const buildReservationIdentifierFilter = (identifier) => {
  const normalized = String(identifier || "").trim();
  if (!normalized) return null;

  const filter = {
    $or: [{ reservationCode: normalized.toUpperCase() }]
  };

  if (mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(normalized)) {
    filter.$or.push({ _id: normalized });
  }

  return filter;
};

export const findReservationByIdentifier = async (identifier) => {
  const filter = buildReservationIdentifierFilter(identifier);
  if (!filter) return null;
  return Reservation.findOne(filter);
};

backend/src/modules/system/system.controller.js

Source file 25 of 111

import SystemSetting from "../../shared/models/SystemSetting.js";
import NewsletterSubscriber from "../../shared/models/NewsletterSubscriber.js";
import User from "../../shared/models/User.js";
import Reservation from "../../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import UserArchiveFolder from "../../shared/models/UserArchiveFolder.js";
import crypto from "node:crypto";
import { notifyWebsiteModeChanged } from "../../shared/utils/notificationEmail.js";
import { getBackendBaseUrl, getFrontendBaseUrl } from "../../shared/utils/publicBaseUrl.js";
import { isSystemMailConfigured, sendSystemEmail } from "../../shared/utils/mailer.js";

const DEFAULT_KEY = "global";

const ensureSetting = async () => {
  const setting = await SystemSetting.findOneAndUpdate(
    { key: DEFAULT_KEY },
    { $setOnInsert: { key: DEFAULT_KEY } },
    { new: true, upsert: true }
  );
  return setting;
};

const normalizeMessage = (value, fallback) => {
  const text = String(value || "").trim();
  return text || fallback;
};

const normalizeIntegerSetting = (value, fallback, min, max) => {
  const next = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(next)) return fallback;
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, Math.round(next)));
};

const normalizeShortText = (value, fallback, maxLength = 120) => {
  const text = String(value || "").trim();
  return (text || fallback).slice(0, maxLength);
};

const normalizeEmail = (value) => String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
const EMAIL_PATTERN = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const NEWSLETTER_SUBJECT_MAX = 140;
const NEWSLETTER_MESSAGE_MAX = 4000;

const createNewsletterToken = () => crypto.randomBytes(24).toString("hex");

const getServerBaseUrl = () => {
  return getBackendBaseUrl();
};

const escapeHtml = (value) =>
  String(value || "").replace(/[<>&"]/g, (ch) => ({ "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", "&": "&amp;", '"': "&quot;" })[ch]);

const getStatusPayload = (setting) => {
  const activeMode = setting.maintenanceMode
    ? "maintenance"
    : setting.vacationMode
      ? "vacation"
      : null;
  const activeMessage = activeMode === "maintenance"
    ? setting.maintenanceMessage
    : activeMode === "vacation"
      ? setting.vacationMessage
      : "";

  return {
    maintenanceMode: Boolean(setting.maintenanceMode),
    maintenanceMessage: setting.maintenanceMessage,
    vacationMode: Boolean(setting.vacationMode),
    vacationMessage: setting.vacationMessage,
    bookingLeadHours: Number(setting.bookingLeadHours || 24),
    maxAdvanceBookingDays: Number(setting.maxAdvanceBookingDays || 90),
    paymentDeadlineHours: Number(setting.paymentDeadlineHours || 12),
    defaultDeliveryDays: Number(setting.defaultDeliveryDays || 7),
    newsletterEnabled: setting.newsletterEnabled !== false,
    newsletterHeading: setting.newsletterHeading || "Stay Updated",
    newsletterDescription: setting.newsletterDescription || "Get the latest updates in your inbox.",
    newsletterPlaceholder: setting.newsletterPlaceholder || "Enter your email",
    newsletterButtonLabel: setting.newsletterButtonLabel || "Subscribe",
    activeMode,
    activeMessage
  };
};

export const getPublicSystemStatus = async (_req, res) => {
  const setting = await ensureSetting();
  res.json({ success: true, system: getStatusPayload(setting) });
};

export const getPublicSystemStats = async (_req, res) => {
  const [happyClients, sessionsCompleted, deliveredPhotos, packagePopularity] = await Promise.all([
    User.countDocuments({ role: "user" }),
    Reservation.countDocuments({ status: "completed" }),
    UserArchiveFolder.aggregate([
      {
        $project: {
          photoCount: {
            $size: { $ifNull: ["$photos", []] }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        $group: {
          _id: null,
          total: { $sum: "$photoCount" }
        }
      }
    ]),
    Reservation.aggregate([
      {
        $project: {
          normalizedPackage: {
            $toLower: {
              $trim: {
                input: {
                  $ifNull: ["$service", "$packageName"]
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        $project: {
          packageKey: {
            $switch: {
              branches: [
                { case: { $regexMatch: { input: "$normalizedPackage", regex: "^basic" } }, then: "basic" },
                { case: { $regexMatch: { input: "$normalizedPackage", regex: "^standard" } }, then: "standard" },
                { case: { $regexMatch: { input: "$normalizedPackage", regex: "^premium" } }, then: "premium" },
                { case: { $regexMatch: { input: "$normalizedPackage", regex: "^custom" } }, then: "custom" }
              ],
              default: ""
            }
          }
        }
      },
      {
        $match: {
          packageKey: { $in: ["basic", "standard", "premium", "custom"] }
        }
      },
      {
        $group: {
          _id: "$packageKey",
          total: { $sum: 1 }
        }
      },
      { $sort: { total: -1, _id: 1 } }
    ])
  ]);

  const picturesDelivered = Number(deliveredPhotos?.[0]?.total || 0);
  const mostPopularPackage = String(packagePopularity?.[0]?._id || "");

  res.json({
    success: true,
    stats: {
      happyClients: Number(happyClients || 0),
      sessionsCompleted: Number(sessionsCompleted || 0),
      picturesDelivered,
      mostPopularPackage,
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  });
};

export const getAdminSystemStatus = async (_req, res) => {
  const setting = await ensureSetting();
  res.json({ success: true, system: getStatusPayload(setting) });
};

export const updateSystemStatus = async (req, res) => {
  const payload = req.body || {};
  const current = await ensureSetting();
  const previousStatus = getStatusPayload(current);

  const maintenanceMode = typeof payload.maintenanceMode === "boolean"
    ? payload.maintenanceMode
    : current.maintenanceMode;
  const vacationMode = typeof payload.vacationMode === "boolean"
    ? payload.vacationMode
    : current.vacationMode;

  const maintenanceMessage = normalizeMessage(
    payload.maintenanceMessage,
    current.maintenanceMessage || "SnapQueue is under maintenance right now. The website cannot be accessed by users at this time. Please check back in a little while."
  );
  const vacationMessage = normalizeMessage(
    payload.vacationMessage,
    current.vacationMessage || "SnapQueue is currently on vacation mode. The website cannot be accessed by users at this time. Services will resume soon."
  );
  const bookingLeadHours = normalizeIntegerSetting(payload.bookingLeadHours, current.bookingLeadHours || 24, 0, 168);
  const maxAdvanceBookingDays = normalizeIntegerSetting(payload.maxAdvanceBookingDays, current.maxAdvanceBookingDays || 90, 1, 365);
  const paymentDeadlineHours = normalizeIntegerSetting(payload.paymentDeadlineHours, current.paymentDeadlineHours || 12, 1, 168);
  const defaultDeliveryDays = normalizeIntegerSetting(payload.defaultDeliveryDays, current.defaultDeliveryDays || 7, 1, 60);
  const newsletterEnabled = typeof payload.newsletterEnabled === "boolean" ? payload.newsletterEnabled : current.newsletterEnabled !== false;
  const newsletterHeading = normalizeShortText(payload.newsletterHeading, current.newsletterHeading || "Stay Updated", 60);
  const newsletterDescription = normalizeShortText(payload.newsletterDescription, current.newsletterDescription || "Get the latest updates in your inbox.", 180);
  const newsletterPlaceholder = normalizeShortText(payload.newsletterPlaceholder, current.newsletterPlaceholder || "Enter your email", 60);
  const newsletterButtonLabel = normalizeShortText(payload.newsletterButtonLabel, current.newsletterButtonLabel || "Subscribe", 30);

  const setting = await SystemSetting.findOneAndUpdate(
    { key: DEFAULT_KEY },
    {
      $set: {
        maintenanceMode,
        vacationMode,
        maintenanceMessage,
        vacationMessage,
        bookingLeadHours,
        maxAdvanceBookingDays,
        paymentDeadlineHours,
        defaultDeliveryDays,
        newsletterEnabled,
        newsletterHeading,
        newsletterDescription,
        newsletterPlaceholder,
        newsletterButtonLabel,
        updatedBy: req.user?.sub || null
      }
    },
    { new: true, upsert: true }
  );

  const nextStatus = getStatusPayload(setting);
  if (nextStatus.activeMode && nextStatus.activeMode !== previousStatus.activeMode) {
    notifyWebsiteModeChanged({
      activeMode: nextStatus.activeMode,
      activeMessage: nextStatus.activeMessage
    }).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Website mode email notification failed", {
        activeMode: nextStatus.activeMode,
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  res.json({ success: true, system: nextStatus });
};

export const subscribeToNewsletter = async (req, res) => {
  const setting = await ensureSetting();
  if (setting.newsletterEnabled === false) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Newsletter signup is currently disabled." });
  }

  const email = normalizeEmail(req.body?.email);
  const source = normalizeShortText(req.body?.source, "footer", 40);

  if (!EMAIL_PATTERN.test(email)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Please enter a valid email address." });
  }

  const existing = await NewsletterSubscriber.findOne({ email });
  if (existing?.subscribed) {
    return res.json({ success: true, message: "This email is already subscribed." });
  }

  await NewsletterSubscriber.findOneAndUpdate(
    { email },
    {
      $set: {
        email,
        unsubscribeToken: existing?.unsubscribeToken || createNewsletterToken(),
        source,
        subscribed: true,
        subscribedAt: new Date(),
        unsubscribedAt: null,
        updatedBy: null
      }
    },
    { new: true, upsert: true }
  );

  return res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: "Subscribed successfully." });
};

export const getAdminNewsletterSubscribers = async (_req, res) => {
  const subscribers = await NewsletterSubscriber.find({})
    .sort({ subscribed: -1, updatedAt: -1 })
    .select("email subscribed source subscribedAt unsubscribedAt createdAt updatedAt")
    .lean();

  res.json({
    success: true,
    subscribers,
    totals: {
      all: subscribers.length,
      active: subscribers.filter((item) => item.subscribed !== false).length,
      inactive: subscribers.filter((item) => item.subscribed === false).length
    }
  });
};

export const removeNewsletterSubscriber = async (req, res) => {
  const id = String(req.params?.id || "").trim();
  if (!id) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Subscriber id is required." });
  }

  const subscriber = await NewsletterSubscriber.findByIdAndUpdate(
    id,
    {
      $set: {
        subscribed: false,
        unsubscribedAt: new Date(),
        updatedBy: req.user?.sub || null
      }
    },
    { new: true }
  );

  if (!subscriber) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Subscriber not found." });
  }

  return res.json({ success: true, message: "Subscriber removed.", subscriber });
};

const buildNewsletterText = ({ subject, message }) => {
  const safeSubject = String(subject || "").trim();
  const safeMessage = String(message || "").trim();
  return [
    "SnapQueue Update",
    "",
    safeSubject,
    "",
    safeMessage,
    "",
    "You are receiving this email because you subscribed to SnapQueue updates."
  ].join("\n");
};

const getNewsletterLogoUrl = () => {
  const explicit = String(process.env.MAIL_LOGO_URL || "").trim();
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(explicit)) return explicit;
  const base = getFrontendBaseUrl();
  return `${base}/images/SQLogo.ico`;
};

const buildNewsletterHtml = ({ subject, message, unsubscribeUrl }) => {
  const safeSubject = String(subject || "").trim();
  const safeMessage = String(message || "")
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((line) => `<p style="margin:0 0 12px;">${escapeHtml(line)}</p>`)
    .join("");

  return `
    <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.6;color:#0f172a;background:#f8fafc;padding:24px;">
      <div style="max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="padding:24px 24px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1d4ed8);color:#ffffff;">
          <div style="margin:0 0 12px;text-align:left;">
            <img src="${escapeHtml(getNewsletterLogoUrl())}" alt="SnapQueue Logo" style="height:40px;max-width:160px;display:inline-block;" />
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.72;">SnapQueue Newsletter</div>
          <h1 style="margin:12px 0 0;font-size:24px;line-height:1.25;">${safeSubject}</h1>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:24px;">
          ${safeMessage}
          <p style="margin:24px 0 0;text-align:center;">
            <a href="${escapeHtml(unsubscribeUrl)}" style="display:inline-block;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;color:#334155;text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#ffffff;">
              Unsubscribe from newsletter
            </a>
          </p>
          <p style="margin:24px 0 0;font-size:12px;color:#64748b;">You are receiving this email because you subscribed to SnapQueue updates.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
};

export const sendNewsletterUpdate = async (req, res) => {
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured()) {
    return res.status(503).json({ success: false, message: "Email delivery is not configured." });
  }

  const subject = String(req.body?.subject || "").trim().slice(0, NEWSLETTER_SUBJECT_MAX);
  const message = String(req.body?.message || "").trim().slice(0, NEWSLETTER_MESSAGE_MAX);

  if (!subject) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Newsletter subject is required." });
  }

  if (!message) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Newsletter message is required." });
  }

  const subscribers = await NewsletterSubscriber.find({ subscribed: { $ne: false } })
    .select("email unsubscribeToken")
    .lean();

  const recipients = [];
  for (const subscriber of subscribers) {
    const email = normalizeEmail(subscriber.email);
    if (!EMAIL_PATTERN.test(email)) continue;

    let unsubscribeToken = String(subscriber.unsubscribeToken || "").trim();
    if (!unsubscribeToken) {
      unsubscribeToken = createNewsletterToken();
      await NewsletterSubscriber.updateOne(
        { _id: subscriber._id },
        { $set: { unsubscribeToken } }
      );
    }

    if (!recipients.some((item) => item.email === email)) {
      recipients.push({ email, unsubscribeToken });
    }
  }

  if (!recipients.length) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "No active newsletter subscribers found." });
  }

  await Promise.all(
    recipients.map(({ email, unsubscribeToken }) => {
      const unsubscribeUrl = `${getServerBaseUrl()}/api/system/newsletter/unsubscribe?token=${encodeURIComponent(unsubscribeToken)}`;
      const text = buildNewsletterText({ subject, message });
      const html = buildNewsletterHtml({ subject, message, unsubscribeUrl });
      return sendSystemEmail({ to: email, subject, text, html });
    })
  );

  return res.json({
    success: true,
    message: `Newsletter update sent to ${recipients.length} subscriber${recipients.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}.`,
    sent: recipients.length
  });
};

export const unsubscribeFromNewsletter = async (req, res) => {
  const renderNewsletterPage = ({ statusCode = 200, eyebrow, title, description }) =>
    res.status(statusCode).send(`
      <html>
        <head>
          <meta charset="utf-8" />
          <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
          <title>SnapQueue</title>
        </head>
        <body style="margin:0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#dbeafe 0%,#f8fafc 32%,#e2e8f0 100%);color:#0f172a;">
          <div style="min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:32px 20px;">
            <div style="width:100%;max-width:720px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.96);box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(15,23,42,0.14);">
              <div style="padding:18px 24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#2563eb);color:#ffffff;">
                <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.22em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.92;">SnapQueue</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:40px 40px 44px;">
                <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.16em;text-transform:uppercase;">${escapeHtml(eyebrow)}</div>
                <h1 style="margin:18px 0 12px;font-size:48px;line-height:1.02;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.04em;">${escapeHtml(title)}</h1>
                <p style="margin:0;max-width:540px;font-size:22px;line-height:1.5;color:#475569;">${escapeHtml(description)}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </body>
      </html>
    `);

  const token = String(req.query?.token || "").trim();
  if (!token) {
    return renderNewsletterPage({
      statusCode: 400,
      eyebrow: "Invalid link",
      title: "Invalid unsubscribe link",
      description: "The newsletter unsubscribe link is missing or invalid."
    });
  }

  const subscriber = await NewsletterSubscriber.findOneAndUpdate(
    { unsubscribeToken: token },
    {
      $set: {
        subscribed: false,
        unsubscribedAt: new Date()
      }
    },
    { new: true }
  );

  if (!subscriber) {
    return renderNewsletterPage({
      statusCode: 404,
      eyebrow: "Unavailable",
      title: "Subscriber not found",
      description: "This unsubscribe link is no longer valid."
    });
  }

  return renderNewsletterPage({
    statusCode: 200,
    eyebrow: "Newsletter updated",
    title: "You have been unsubscribed",
    description: `${subscriber.email} will no longer receive newsletter updates.`
  });
};

backend/src/modules/system/system.routes.js

Source file 26 of 111

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  getAdminNewsletterSubscribers,
  getAdminSystemStatus,
  getPublicSystemStats,
  getPublicSystemStatus,
  removeNewsletterSubscriber,
  sendNewsletterUpdate,
  subscribeToNewsletter,
  unsubscribeFromNewsletter,
  updateSystemStatus
} from "./system.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.get("/status", asyncHandler(getPublicSystemStatus));
router.get("/stats", asyncHandler(getPublicSystemStats));
router.post("/newsletter/subscribe", asyncHandler(subscribeToNewsletter));
router.get("/newsletter/unsubscribe", asyncHandler(unsubscribeFromNewsletter));
router.get("/admin", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(getAdminSystemStatus));
router.patch("/admin", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateSystemStatus));
router.get("/newsletter/admin", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(getAdminNewsletterSubscribers));
router.post("/newsletter/admin/send", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(sendNewsletterUpdate));
router.delete("/newsletter/admin/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(removeNewsletterSubscriber));

export default router;

backend/src/modules/user/user.controller.js

Source file 27 of 111

import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import crypto from "node:crypto";
import mongoose from "mongoose";
import LiveChatMessage from "../../shared/models/LiveChatMessage.js";
import LiveChatThread from "../../shared/models/LiveChatThread.js";
import Payment from "../../shared/models/Payment.js";
import Reservation from "../../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import User from "../../shared/models/User.js";
import UserArchiveFolder from "../../shared/models/UserArchiveFolder.js";
import cloudinary, { hasCloudinaryConfig } from "../../core/config/cloudinary.js";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../../shared/utils/phone.js";
import { isAllowlistedAdminEmail } from "../../shared/utils/adminAllowlist.js";
import { isSystemMailConfigured, sendPasswordChangeOtpEmail } from "../../shared/utils/mailer.js";
import { notifyAccountDeletedEmail, notifyUserAccountChanged } from "../../shared/utils/notificationEmail.js";
import { validatePasswordPolicy } from "../../shared/utils/passwordPolicy.js";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../shared/utils/roles.js";
import { signToken } from "../../shared/utils/jwt.js";

const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const gmailRegex = /^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@gmail\.com$/i;
const avatarDataUrlRegex = /^data:image\/[a-zA-Z0-9.+-]+;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=\s]+$/;
const sanitizePathPart = (value) => String(value || "").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9-_]/g, "_");
const PASSWORD_CHANGE_CODE_TTL_MS = 1000 * 60 * 10;
const isProduction = () => String(process.env.NODE_ENV || "").toLowerCase() === "production";
const isDevPasswordChangeFallbackEnabled = () =>
  !isProduction() && String(process.env.DEV_CONSOLE_PASSWORD_CHANGE_CODE || "true").toLowerCase() !== "false";
const SESSION_COOKIE_NAME = "auth_token";
const SESSION_COOKIE_MAX_AGE_MS = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;

const sessionCookieOptions = () => ({
  httpOnly: true,
  sameSite: isProduction() ? "none" : "lax",
  secure: isProduction(),
  maxAge: SESSION_COOKIE_MAX_AGE_MS,
  path: "/"
});

const setSessionCookie = (res, token) => {
  res.cookie(SESSION_COOKIE_NAME, token, sessionCookieOptions());
};

const generatePasswordChangeCode = () => String(Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000));

const maskEmailAddress = (email) => {
  const normalized = String(email || "").trim();
  const [localPart = "", domain = ""] = normalized.split("@");
  if (!localPart || !domain) return normalized;
  const head = localPart.slice(0, 2);
  return `${head}${"*".repeat(Math.max(2, localPart.length - head.length))}@${domain}`;
};

const clearPasswordChangeChallenge = (user) => {
  user.passwordChangeChallengeId = null;
  user.passwordChangeCodeHash = null;
  user.passwordChangeExpiresAt = null;
  user.passwordChangeNextPasswordHash = null;
};

const createPasswordChangeChallenge = async (user, nextPassword) => {
  const code = generatePasswordChangeCode();
  user.passwordChangeChallengeId = new mongoose.Types.ObjectId().toString();
  user.passwordChangeCodeHash = crypto.createHash("sha256").update(code).digest("hex");
  user.passwordChangeExpiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + PASSWORD_CHANGE_CODE_TTL_MS);
  user.passwordChangeNextPasswordHash = await bcrypt.hash(String(nextPassword), 10);

  const expiresMinutes = Math.max(1, Math.round(PASSWORD_CHANGE_CODE_TTL_MS / 60000));
  let delivery = "email";
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured() && isDevPasswordChangeFallbackEnabled()) {
    delivery = "dev";
  } else if (!isSystemMailConfigured()) {
    throw new Error("Email delivery is not configured for password change verification.");
  }

  await user.save({ validateBeforeSave: false });

  if (delivery === "email") {
    void sendPasswordChangeOtpEmail({
      to: user.email,
      fullName: user.fullName,
      code,
      expiresMinutes
    }).catch((error) => {
      console.error("Password change OTP delivery failed", {
        userId: String(user?._id || ""),
        email: user.email,
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  return {
    challengeId: user.passwordChangeChallengeId,
    expiresInSeconds: Math.floor(PASSWORD_CHANGE_CODE_TTL_MS / 1000),
    delivery,
    email: maskEmailAddress(user.email),
    devCode: delivery === "dev" ? code : undefined
  };
};

const uploadAvatarToCloudinary = async ({ userId, avatarUrl }) => {
  if (!hasCloudinaryConfig()) {
    throw new Error("Cloudinary is not configured on the server.");
  }
  const uploaded = await cloudinary.uploader.upload(String(avatarUrl), {
    folder: `snapqueue/avatars/${sanitizePathPart(userId)}`,
    public_id: "profile",
    overwrite: true,
    invalidate: true,
    resource_type: "image"
  });
  return {
    avatarUrl: uploaded.secure_url || "",
    avatarPublicId: uploaded.public_id || ""
  };
};

const removeCloudinaryAvatar = async (publicId) => {
  if (!publicId || !hasCloudinaryConfig()) return;
  try {
    await cloudinary.uploader.destroy(String(publicId), { resource_type: "image" });
  } catch (_error) {
    // ignore remote cleanup failures so profile mutations can still succeed
  }
};

const removeArchiveAssetsForUser = async (userId) => {
  const folders = await UserArchiveFolder.find({ userId }).select("photos");
  if (hasCloudinaryConfig()) {
    const publicIds = folders.flatMap((folder) =>
      (Array.isArray(folder?.photos) ? folder.photos : [])
        .map((photo) => String(photo?.publicId || "").trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
    );
    if (publicIds.length > 0) {
      await Promise.all(
        publicIds.map((publicId) =>
          cloudinary.uploader.destroy(publicId, { resource_type: "image" }).catch(() => {})
        )
      );
    }
  }
  await UserArchiveFolder.deleteMany({ userId });
};

const normalizeUserAvatarPayload = (user) => {
  if (!user) return user;
  const plain = user.toObject ? user.toObject() : { ...user };
  return {
    ...plain,
    avatarUrl: plain.avatarUrl || plain.googleAvatarUrl || "",
    emailNotificationsEnabled: plain.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false,
    twoFactorEnabled: plain.twoFactorEnabled === true,
    hasPasswordSet: plain.passwordSetByUser === true || !String(plain.googleId || "").trim()
  };
};

const requiresCurrentPasswordForUser = (user) => !(
  String(user?.googleId || "").trim() &&
  user?.passwordSetByUser !== true
);

const buildTokenPayload = (user) => ({
  sub: user._id.toString(),
  role: user.role,
  email: user.email,
  tv: Number(user.tokenVersion || 0)
});

const deleteUserRelatedData = async (userId) => {
  const reservations = await Reservation.find({ $or: [{ userId }, { quotedBy: userId }] }).select("_id userId quotedBy");
  const ownedReservationIds = reservations
    .filter((reservation) => String(reservation?.userId || "") === String(userId))
    .map((reservation) => reservation._id);

  if (ownedReservationIds.length > 0) {
    await Payment.deleteMany({ reservationId: { $in: ownedReservationIds } });
    await Reservation.deleteMany({ _id: { $in: ownedReservationIds } });
  }

  await Reservation.updateMany({ quotedBy: userId }, { $set: { quotedBy: null } });

  const threadIds = await LiveChatThread.find({ clientId: userId }).distinct("_id");
  if (threadIds.length > 0) {
    await LiveChatMessage.deleteMany({ threadId: { $in: threadIds } });
  }
  await LiveChatMessage.deleteMany({ senderId: userId });
  await LiveChatThread.deleteMany({ clientId: userId });

  await removeArchiveAssetsForUser(userId);
};

export const me = async (req, res) => {
  const user = await User.findById(req.user.sub).select("-passwordHash");
  if (!user) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }
  res.json({ success: true, user: normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user) });
};

export const updateMe = async (req, res) => {
  const { fullName, email, phone, bio, avatarUrl, emailNotificationsEnabled, twoFactorEnabled } = req.body;
  const userId = String(req.user?.sub || "");
  const currentUser = await User.findById(userId);
  if (!currentUser) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  const update = {};

  if (typeof fullName === "string") {
    const normalizedName = fullName.trim();
    if (normalizedName && normalizedName.length < 2) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Full name must be at least 2 characters" });
    }
    if (normalizedName) update.fullName = normalizedName;
  }

  if (typeof email === "string") {
    const normalizedEmail = email.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!normalizedEmail || !emailRegex.test(normalizedEmail)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid email format" });
    }
    if (normalizedEmail !== String(currentUser.email || "").toLowerCase()) {
      const existing = await User.findOne({
        email: normalizedEmail,
        _id: { $ne: currentUser._id }
      }).select("_id");
      if (existing) {
        return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "Email already in use" });
      }
      update.email = normalizedEmail;
    }
  }

  if (typeof phone === "string") {
    const normalizedPhone = normalizePhoneNumber(phone);
    if (!isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(normalizedPhone)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE });
    }
    update.phone = normalizedPhone;
  }
  if (typeof bio === "string") update.bio = bio.trim();
  if (typeof emailNotificationsEnabled === "boolean") {
    update.emailNotificationsEnabled = emailNotificationsEnabled;
  }
  if (typeof twoFactorEnabled === "boolean") {
    if (twoFactorEnabled && !isSystemMailConfigured() && String(process.env.NODE_ENV || "").toLowerCase() === "production") {
      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Two-factor authentication requires email delivery to be configured." });
    }
    update.twoFactorEnabled = twoFactorEnabled;
    if (!twoFactorEnabled) {
      update.twoFactorChallengeId = null;
      update.twoFactorCodeHash = null;
      update.twoFactorExpiresAt = null;
    }
  }

  if (typeof avatarUrl === "string") {
    const normalizedAvatarUrl = avatarUrl.trim();
    if (!normalizedAvatarUrl) {
      await removeCloudinaryAvatar(currentUser.avatarPublicId);
      update.avatarUrl = "";
      update.avatarPublicId = "";
    } else if (avatarDataUrlRegex.test(normalizedAvatarUrl)) {
      const uploadedAvatar = await uploadAvatarToCloudinary({ userId, avatarUrl: normalizedAvatarUrl });
      update.avatarUrl = uploadedAvatar.avatarUrl;
      update.avatarPublicId = uploadedAvatar.avatarPublicId;
    } else {
      if (currentUser.avatarPublicId && normalizedAvatarUrl !== String(currentUser.avatarUrl || "").trim()) {
        await removeCloudinaryAvatar(currentUser.avatarPublicId);
        update.avatarPublicId = "";
      }
      update.avatarUrl = normalizedAvatarUrl;
    }
  }

  const user = await User.findByIdAndUpdate(userId, update, { new: true }).select("-passwordHash");
  res.json({ success: true, user: normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user) });
};

export const changePassword = async (req, res) => {
  const { currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword } = req.body || {};

  if (!newPassword || !confirmPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password and confirmation are required" });
  }

  if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password and confirmation do not match" });
  }

  const user = await User.findById(req.user.sub);
  if (!user) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  const passwordPolicyErrors = validatePasswordPolicy(String(newPassword), {
    fullName: user.fullName,
    email: user.email
  });
  if (passwordPolicyErrors.length > 0) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: passwordPolicyErrors[0], passwordPolicyErrors });
  }

  const requiresCurrentPassword = requiresCurrentPasswordForUser(user);
  if (requiresCurrentPassword && !currentPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is required" });
  }

  if (requiresCurrentPassword) {
    const isCurrentPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(String(currentPassword), user.passwordHash);
    if (!isCurrentPasswordValid) {
      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is incorrect" });
    }
  }

  if (requiresCurrentPassword && String(currentPassword) === String(newPassword)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password must be different from current password" });
  }

  user.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(String(newPassword), 10);
  user.passwordSetByUser = true;
  user.tokenVersion = Number(user.tokenVersion || 0) + 1;
  await user.save();

  res.json({ success: true, message: "Password updated successfully" });
};

export const verifyCurrentPassword = async (req, res) => {
  const currentPassword = String(req.body?.currentPassword || "");
  const user = await User.findById(req.user.sub);
  if (!user) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  const requiresCurrentPassword = requiresCurrentPasswordForUser(user);
  if (!requiresCurrentPassword) {
    return res.json({ success: true, valid: true, requiresCurrentPassword: false });
  }

  if (!currentPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is required" });
  }

  const isCurrentPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(currentPassword, user.passwordHash);
  if (!isCurrentPasswordValid) {
    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is incorrect", valid: false });
  }

  return res.json({ success: true, valid: true, requiresCurrentPassword: true });
};

export const requestPasswordChangeOtp = async (req, res) => {
  const { currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword } = req.body || {};

  if (!newPassword || !confirmPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password and confirmation are required" });
  }

  if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password and confirmation do not match" });
  }

  const user = await User.findById(req.user.sub);
  if (!user) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  const passwordPolicyErrors = validatePasswordPolicy(String(newPassword), {
    fullName: user.fullName,
    email: user.email
  });
  if (passwordPolicyErrors.length > 0) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: passwordPolicyErrors[0], passwordPolicyErrors });
  }

  const requiresCurrentPassword = requiresCurrentPasswordForUser(user);
  if (requiresCurrentPassword && !currentPassword) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is required" });
  }

  if (requiresCurrentPassword) {
    const isCurrentPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(String(currentPassword), user.passwordHash);
    if (!isCurrentPasswordValid) {
      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: "Current password is incorrect" });
    }
  }

  if (requiresCurrentPassword && String(currentPassword) === String(newPassword)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "New password must be different from current password" });
  }

  const challenge = await createPasswordChangeChallenge(user, newPassword);

  return res.json({
    success: true,
    requiresOtp: true,
    message: "Verification code sent.",
    challengeId: challenge.challengeId,
    delivery: challenge.delivery,
    expiresInSeconds: challenge.expiresInSeconds,
    email: challenge.email,
    ...(challenge.devCode ? { devCode: challenge.devCode } : {})
  });
};

export const verifyPasswordChangeOtp = async (req, res) => {
  const challengeId = String(req.body?.challengeId || "").trim();
  const code = String(req.body?.code || "").trim();

  if (!challengeId || !code) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Challenge id and verification code are required" });
  }

  const user = await User.findById(req.user.sub);
  if (!user) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  if (String(user.passwordChangeChallengeId || "") !== challengeId || !user.passwordChangeCodeHash || !user.passwordChangeNextPasswordHash) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "Password change verification session was not found" });
  }

  if (!user.passwordChangeExpiresAt || user.passwordChangeExpiresAt.getTime() < Date.now()) {
    clearPasswordChangeChallenge(user);
    await user.save({ validateBeforeSave: false });
    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: "Verification code expired. Request a new code." });
  }

  const submittedHash = crypto.createHash("sha256").update(code).digest("hex");
  if (submittedHash !== String(user.passwordChangeCodeHash || "")) {
    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid verification code" });
  }

  user.passwordHash = user.passwordChangeNextPasswordHash;
  user.passwordSetByUser = true;
  user.tokenVersion = Number(user.tokenVersion || 0) + 1;
  clearPasswordChangeChallenge(user);
  await user.save({ validateBeforeSave: false });

  const token = signToken(buildTokenPayload(user));
  setSessionCookie(res, token);

  return res.json({
    success: true,
    message: "Password updated successfully",
    token,
    user: normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user)
  });
};

export const listUsers = async (_req, res) => {
  const traceId = `${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 6)}`;
  const totalLabel = `listUsers total ${traceId}`;
  const queryLabel = `listUsers query ${traceId}`;
  const normalizeLabel = `listUsers normalize ${traceId}`;
  console.time(totalLabel);
  try {
    const limitParam = Number(_req.query?.limit || 50);
    const pageParam = Number(_req.query?.page || 1);
    const limit = Number.isFinite(limitParam) ? Math.min(Math.max(limitParam, 1), 200) : 50;
    const page = Number.isFinite(pageParam) ? Math.max(pageParam, 1) : 1;
    const skip = (page - 1) * limit;

    console.log("listUsers connection", {
      readyState: mongoose.connection.readyState,
      host: mongoose.connection.host,
      name: mongoose.connection.name
    });

    console.time(queryLabel);
    const users = await User.find()
      .select([
        "fullName",
        "email",
        "phone",
        "bio",
        "avatarUrl",
        "googleAvatarUrl",
        "role",
        "emailNotificationsEnabled",
        "twoFactorEnabled",
        "isBlocked",
        "blockedAt",
        "createdAt",
        "updatedAt"
      ])
      .sort({ _id: -1 })
      .skip(skip)
      .limit(limit)
      .maxTimeMS(10000)
      .lean();
    console.timeEnd(queryLabel);
    const total = await User.countDocuments().maxTimeMS(10000);

    console.time(normalizeLabel);
    const normalized = users.map((user) => normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user));
    console.timeEnd(normalizeLabel);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      users: normalized,
      page,
      limit,
      total
    });
  } finally {
    console.timeEnd(totalLabel);
  }
};

export const updateUserBlockStatus = async (req, res) => {
  const userId = String(req.params.id || "");
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid user id" });
  }

  const { blocked } = req.body || {};
  if (typeof blocked !== "boolean") {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "blocked flag is required" });
  }

  const target = await User.findById(userId);
  if (!target) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }
  if (hasAdminAccess(target.role)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Admin accounts cannot be blocked" });
  }
  if (String(target._id) === String(req.user?.sub)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "You cannot block your own account" });
  }

  target.isBlocked = blocked;
  target.blockedAt = blocked ? new Date() : null;
  await target.save();

  if (blocked) {
    notifyUserAccountChanged(target, "banned").catch((error) => {
      console.error("User banned email notification failed", {
        userId: String(target?._id || ""),
        message: error?.message
      });
    });
  }

  const user = await User.findById(target._id).select("-passwordHash");
  res.json({ success: true, user: normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user) });
};

export const deleteUserByAdmin = async (req, res) => {
  const userId = String(req.params.id || "");
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid user id" });
  }

  const target = await User.findById(userId).select("_id role avatarPublicId email fullName");
  if (!target) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }
  if (hasAdminAccess(target.role)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Admin accounts cannot be deleted" });
  }
  if (String(target._id) === String(req.user?.sub)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "You cannot delete your own account" });
  }

  notifyAccountDeletedEmail(target, { deletedBy: "admin" }).catch((error) => {
    console.error("User deletion email notification failed", {
      userId: String(target?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  await removeCloudinaryAvatar(target.avatarPublicId);
  await deleteUserRelatedData(target._id);
  await User.deleteOne({ _id: target._id });
  res.json({ success: true, message: "User deleted successfully" });
};

export const promoteUserToAdmin = async (req, res) => {
  const userId = String(req.params.id || "");
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid user id" });
  }

  const target = await User.findById(userId);
  if (!target) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }
  if (hasAdminAccess(target.role)) {
    return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: "User is already an admin" });
  }

  const normalizedEmail = String(target.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!gmailRegex.test(normalizedEmail)) {
    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: "Only @gmail.com accounts can be promoted to admin" });
  }
  if (!isAllowlistedAdminEmail(normalizedEmail)) {
    return res.status(403).json({
      success: false,
      message: "This email is not in the admin allowlist. Add it to ADMIN_ALLOWLIST before promoting."
    });
  }

  target.role = "admin";
  target.isBlocked = false;
  target.blockedAt = null;
  await target.save();

  notifyUserAccountChanged(target, "promoted").catch((error) => {
    console.error("User promotion email notification failed", {
      userId: String(target?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  console.log("Admin promotion granted", {
    promotedUserId: String(target._id),
    promotedEmail: normalizedEmail,
    grantedByUserId: String(req.user?.sub || ""),
    grantedByEmail: String(req.user?.email || "")
  });

  const user = await User.findById(target._id).select("-passwordHash");
  res.json({ success: true, user: normalizeUserAvatarPayload(user), message: "User promoted to admin successfully" });
};

export const deleteMe = async (req, res) => {
  const userId = String(req.user?.sub || "");
  if (!mongoose.Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: "Invalid user id" });
  }

  const target = await User.findById(userId).select("_id role avatarPublicId email fullName");
  if (!target) {
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: "User not found" });
  }

  notifyAccountDeletedEmail(target, { deletedBy: "self" }).catch((error) => {
    console.error("Self account deletion email notification failed", {
      userId: String(target?._id || ""),
      message: error?.message
    });
  });

  await removeCloudinaryAvatar(target.avatarPublicId);
  await deleteUserRelatedData(target._id);
  await User.deleteOne({ _id: target._id });
  res.json({ success: true, message: "Deleted successfully" });
};

backend/src/modules/user/user.routes.js

Source file 28 of 111

import { Router } from "express";
import {
  changePassword,
  deleteMe,
  deleteUserByAdmin,
  listUsers,
  me,
  promoteUserToAdmin,
  requestPasswordChangeOtp,
  updateMe,
  updateUserBlockStatus,
  verifyCurrentPassword,
  verifyPasswordChangeOtp
} from "./user.controller.js";
import { requireAdmin, requireAuth } from "../../core/middleware/auth.middleware.js";
import { asyncHandler } from "../../shared/utils/asyncHandler.js";

const router = Router();

router.get("/me", requireAuth, asyncHandler(me));
router.patch("/me", requireAuth, asyncHandler(updateMe));
router.delete("/me", requireAuth, asyncHandler(deleteMe));
router.patch("/me/password", requireAuth, asyncHandler(changePassword));
router.post("/me/password", requireAuth, asyncHandler(changePassword));
router.post("/me/password/verify-current", requireAuth, asyncHandler(verifyCurrentPassword));
router.post("/me/password/request-otp", requireAuth, asyncHandler(requestPasswordChangeOtp));
router.post("/me/password/verify-otp", requireAuth, asyncHandler(verifyPasswordChangeOtp));
router.patch("/change-password", requireAuth, asyncHandler(changePassword));
router.post("/change-password", requireAuth, asyncHandler(changePassword));
router.get("/", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(listUsers));
router.patch("/:id/promote-admin", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(promoteUserToAdmin));
router.post("/:id/promote-admin", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(promoteUserToAdmin));
router.patch("/promote/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(promoteUserToAdmin));
router.post("/promote/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(promoteUserToAdmin));
router.patch("/:id/block", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateUserBlockStatus));
router.delete("/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteUserByAdmin));
router.patch("/block/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateUserBlockStatus));
router.patch("/:id/ban", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(updateUserBlockStatus));
router.delete("/delete/:id", requireAuth, requireAdmin, asyncHandler(deleteUserByAdmin));

export default router;

backend/src/scripts/backfillReservationCodes.js

Source file 29 of 111

import path from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import dotenv from "dotenv";
import mongoose from "mongoose";
import Reservation from "../shared/models/Reservation.js";
import { generateReservationCode } from "../shared/utils/reservationCode.js";
import { connectDB } from "../core/config/db.js";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const envPath = path.resolve(__dirname, "../../.env");

if (!process.env.MONGO_URI) {
  dotenv.config({ path: envPath });
}

const createUniqueReservationCode = async () => {
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 12; attempt += 1) {
    const reservationCode = generateReservationCode();
    const existing = await Reservation.exists({ reservationCode });
    if (!existing) return reservationCode;
  }
  throw new Error("Unable to generate unique reservation code");
};

const backfillCodes = async () => {
  await connectDB();
  const missing = await Reservation.find({
    $or: [{ reservationCode: { $exists: false } }, { reservationCode: "" }, { reservationCode: null }]
  }).select("_id").lean();

  if (!missing.length) {
    console.log("No reservations missing reservationCode.");
    return;
  }

  console.log(`Backfilling ${missing.length} reservation(s)...`);
  const ops = [];
  for (const item of missing) {
    const reservationCode = await createUniqueReservationCode();
    ops.push({
      updateOne: {
        filter: { _id: item._id, $or: [{ reservationCode: { $exists: false } }, { reservationCode: "" }, { reservationCode: null }] },
        update: { $set: { reservationCode } }
      }
    });
  }
  if (ops.length) {
    const result = await Reservation.bulkWrite(ops, { ordered: false });
    console.log("Backfill complete.", {
      matched: result.matchedCount,
      modified: result.modifiedCount
    });
  }
};

backfillCodes()
  .then(() => mongoose.disconnect())
  .catch((error) => {
    console.error("Backfill failed", { message: error?.message });
    mongoose.disconnect().finally(() => process.exit(1));
  });

backend/src/scripts/makeAdmin.js

Source file 30 of 111

import "dotenv/config";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import { connectDB } from "../core/config/db.js";
import User from "../shared/models/User.js";

const gmailRegex = /^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@gmail\.com$/i;
const strongPasswordRegex = /^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[^A-Za-z\d]).{12,}$/;

const email = String(process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL || "").toLowerCase().trim();
const password = String(process.env.ADMIN_PASSWORD || "");
const fullName = String(process.env.ADMIN_NAME || "").trim();
const phone = String(process.env.ADMIN_PHONE || "").trim();
const confirmBootstrap = String(process.env.CONFIRM_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP || "").trim().toLowerCase();

const fail = (message) => {
  throw new Error(message);
};

const run = async () => {
  if (confirmBootstrap !== "yes") {
    fail("Set CONFIRM_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP=yes to confirm admin creation or promotion.");
  }
  if (!email) {
    fail("ADMIN_EMAIL is required.");
  }
  if (!gmailRegex.test(email)) {
    fail("ADMIN_EMAIL must use an @gmail.com address.");
  }
  if (!fullName || fullName.length < 2) {
    fail("ADMIN_NAME is required.");
  }
  if (!password) {
    fail("ADMIN_PASSWORD is required.");
  }
  if (!strongPasswordRegex.test(password)) {
    fail("ADMIN_PASSWORD must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.");
  }

  await connectDB();

  const existing = await User.findOne({ email });
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);

  if (!existing) {
    const created = await User.create({
      fullName,
      email,
      ...(phone ? { phone } : {}),
      passwordHash,
      role: "admin"
    });
    console.log(`Admin created: ${created.email}`);
    process.exit(0);
  }

  existing.fullName = fullName;
  if (phone) existing.phone = phone;
  existing.passwordHash = passwordHash;
  existing.role = "admin";
  await existing.save();
  console.log(`Admin updated: ${existing.email}`);
  process.exit(0);
};

run().catch((error) => {
  console.error(error);
  process.exit(1);
});
31 Backend Script

backend/src/scripts/migrateLocalMongoToAtlas.js

Source file 31 of 111

import mongoose from "mongoose";

const SOURCE_URI = String(process.env.LOCAL_MONGO_URI || "mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/bcp").trim();
const TARGET_URI = String(process.env.ATLAS_MONGO_URI || "").trim();

if (!TARGET_URI) {
  console.error("ATLAS_MONGO_URI is required.");
  process.exit(1);
}

const EXCLUDED_COLLECTION_PREFIXES = ["system."];

const shouldSkipCollection = (name) =>
  EXCLUDED_COLLECTION_PREFIXES.some((prefix) => String(name || "").startsWith(prefix));

async function main() {
  const source = await mongoose.createConnection(SOURCE_URI).asPromise();
  const target = await mongoose.createConnection(TARGET_URI).asPromise();

  try {
    const collections = await source.db.listCollections().toArray();
    const summary = [];

    for (const entry of collections) {
      const name = String(entry?.name || "").trim();
      if (!name || shouldSkipCollection(name)) continue;

      const documents = await source.db.collection(name).find({}).toArray();
      await target.db.collection(name).deleteMany({});

      if (documents.length) {
        await target.db.collection(name).insertMany(documents, { ordered: false });
      }

      summary.push({ collection: name, count: documents.length });
    }

    console.log("Migration complete.");
    console.table(summary);
  } finally {
    await source.close();
    await target.close();
  }
}

main().catch((error) => {
  console.error("Migration failed:", error);
  process.exit(1);
});

backend/src/scripts/seed.js

Source file 32 of 111

import dotenv from "dotenv";
import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
import { connectDB } from "../core/config/db.js";
import User from "../shared/models/User.js";
import ChatQA from "../shared/models/ChatQA.js";
import GalleryItem from "../shared/models/GalleryItem.js";

dotenv.config();

const gmailRegex = /^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@gmail\.com$/i;

const run = async () => {
  await connectDB();

  const adminEmail = String(process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL || "admin.snapqueue@gmail.com").toLowerCase().trim();
  if (!gmailRegex.test(adminEmail)) {
    throw new Error("ADMIN_EMAIL must use an @gmail.com address.");
  }
  const adminExists = await User.findOne({ email: adminEmail });
  if (!adminExists) {
    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash("Admin123!", 10);
    await User.create({
      fullName: "BCP Admin",
      email: adminEmail,
      phone: "0000000000",
      passwordHash,
      role: "admin"
    });
  }

  const qaSeed = [
    { question: "wedding", answer: "Our wedding packages range from $1500 to $3000." },
    { question: "price", answer: "Standard portrait sessions start at $500." },
    { question: "location", answer: "We are based in Nueva Ecija, Philippines and available for travel." },
    { question: "hello", answer: "Hi. BCP Robot is ready to help." }
  ];

  for (const item of qaSeed) {
    await ChatQA.updateOne({ question: item.question }, { $set: item }, { upsert: true });
  }

  const gallerySeed = [
    { title: "Elegant Union", category: "weddings", imageUrl: "/images/Pageant.jpg", isPublished: true },
    { title: "Joyful Moments", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday.jpg", isPublished: true },
    { title: "Grand Gala", category: "events", imageUrl: "/images/Event1.jpg", isPublished: true },
    { title: "Studio Portrait", category: "portraits", imageUrl: "/images/Photoshoot.jpg", isPublished: true }
  ];

  for (const item of gallerySeed) {
    await GalleryItem.updateOne(
      { title: item.title, category: item.category },
      { $set: item },
      { upsert: true }
    );
  }

  console.log("Seed complete");
  process.exit(0);
};

run().catch((error) => {
  console.error(error);
  process.exit(1);
});

backend/src/server.js

Source file 33 of 111

import path from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import dotenv from "dotenv";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const envPath = path.resolve(__dirname, "../.env");

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
  if (!process.env.MONGO_URI) {
    dotenv.config({ path: envPath });
  }
}

const start = async () => {
  try {
    const [{ default: app }, { connectDB }] = await Promise.all([
      import("./app.js"),
      import("./core/config/db.js")
    ]);
    const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
    const geminiKey = String(process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || "");
    const geminiTail = geminiKey.length >= 6 ? geminiKey.slice(-6) : geminiKey;
    console.log(`[env] GEMINI_API_KEY loaded (length=${geminiKey.length}, last6=${geminiTail || "n/a"}) from ${envPath}`);
    const server = app.listen(PORT, () => {
      console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
    });
    server.on("error", (error) => {
      console.error("HTTP server failed to start", error);
      process.exit(1);
    });

    const connectWithRetry = async (attempt = 1) => {
      try {
        await connectDB();
      } catch (error) {
        const delay = Math.min(30000, 2000 * attempt);
        console.error("MongoDB connection failed", {
          attempt,
          message: error?.message,
          nextRetryMs: delay
        });
        setTimeout(() => connectWithRetry(attempt + 1), delay);
      }
    };

    connectWithRetry();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Failed to start server", error);
    process.exit(1);
  }
};

start();

import mongoose from "mongoose";

const advertisementSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    title: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    description: { type: String, default: "", trim: true },
    imageUrl: { type: String, default: "", trim: true },
    linkUrl: { type: String, default: "", trim: true },
    isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    startDate: { type: Date, default: null },
    endDate: { type: Date, default: null },
    createdBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null },
    updatedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

advertisementSchema.index({ isActive: 1, startDate: 1, endDate: 1, createdAt: -1 });

export default mongoose.model("Advertisement", advertisementSchema);

    unreadForClient: { type: Number, default: 0 }

  { timestamps: true }
);

Source file 41 of 111

import mongoose from "mongoose";

const paymentMethods = ["gcash", "maya"];
const paymentStatuses = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "rejected", "expired", "cancelled", "refunded"];

const paymentSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    reservationId: {
      type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId,
      ref: "Reservation",
      required: true
    },
    method: { type: String, enum: paymentMethods, required: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
    provider: { type: String, enum: ["manual", "paymongo"], default: "manual" },
    providerCheckoutId: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    providerPaymentIntentId: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    providerReference: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    checkoutUrl: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    quoteVersion: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    currencySnapshot: { type: String, trim: true, default: "PHP" },
    amount: { type: Number, required: true, min: 1 },
    referenceNumber: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    proofUrl: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    proofFingerprint: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    status: { type: String, enum: paymentStatuses, default: "pending" },
    autoReviewStatus: { type: String, enum: ["clear", "needs_review"], default: "clear" },
    autoReviewFindings: { type: [String], default: [] },
    autoReviewCheckedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    paidAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    failedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    failureReason: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    refundStatus: {
      type: String,
      enum: ["none", "awaiting_payout_details", "requested", "approved", "rejected", "processed"],
      default: "none"
    },
    refundReason: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    refundPayoutMethod: { type: String, enum: ["", "gcash", "maya"], default: "" },
    refundPayoutNumber: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    refundRequestedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    refundRequestedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null },
    refundResolvedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    refundResolvedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null },
    refundProcessedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    refundReferenceNumber: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    refundProofUrl: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" },
    refundAdminNote: { type: String, trim: true, default: "" }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

paymentSchema.index({ reservationId: 1 }, { unique: true });
paymentSchema.index({ providerCheckoutId: 1 });
paymentSchema.index({ providerPaymentIntentId: 1 });
paymentSchema.index({ providerReference: 1 });
paymentSchema.index({ proofFingerprint: 1 });

export default mongoose.model("Payment", paymentSchema);

backend/src/shared/models/PendingSignup.js

Source file 42 of 111

import mongoose from "mongoose";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../utils/phone.js";

const pendingSignupSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    fullName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    email: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
    phone: {
      type: String,
      trim: true,
      set: normalizePhoneNumber,
      validate: {
        validator: (value) => !value || isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(value),
        message: PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
      }
    },
    passwordHash: { type: String, required: true },
    challengeId: { type: String, default: null, index: true },
    codeHash: { type: String, default: null },
    expiresAt: { type: Date, default: null }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

export default mongoose.model("PendingSignup", pendingSignupSchema);
43 Backend Model

backend/src/shared/models/Reservation.js

Source file 43 of 111

import mongoose from "mongoose";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../utils/phone.js";
import { generateReservationCode } from "../utils/reservationCode.js";

const MANILA_TIMEZONE = "Asia/Manila";
const MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS = 3;
const EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE = `Event date must be at least ${MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS} days from today.`;

const getDateKey = (value) => {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(raw)) {
    return raw.slice(0, 10);
  }

  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    return "";
  }

  const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
    timeZone: MANILA_TIMEZONE,
    year: "numeric",
    month: "2-digit",
    day: "2-digit"
  }).formatToParts(date);
  const year = parts.find((part) => part.type === "year")?.value || "";
  const month = parts.find((part) => part.type === "month")?.value || "";
  const day = parts.find((part) => part.type === "day")?.value || "";
  return year && month && day ? `${year}-${month}-${day}` : "";
};

const getMinimumReservationDateTime = () => {
  const next = new Date();
  next.setSeconds(0, 0);
  next.setDate(next.getDate() + MIN_RESERVATION_LEAD_DAYS);
  return next;
};

const isReservationDateValid = (value) => {
  const selected = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(selected.getTime())) {
    return false;
  }
  return selected.getTime() >= getMinimumReservationDateTime().getTime();
};

const pricingAdjustmentSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    label: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    amount: { type: Number, required: true }
  },
  { _id: false }
);

const pricingHistorySchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    basePrice: { type: Number, required: true },
    customAdjustments: { type: [pricingAdjustmentSchema], default: [] },
    discount: { type: Number, required: true, default: 0 },
    finalPrice: { type: Number, required: true },
    currency: { type: String, required: true, default: "PHP" },
    quotedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null },
    quotedAt: { type: Date, required: true, default: Date.now }
  },
  { _id: false }
);

const reservationSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    userId: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User" },
    reservationCode: {
      type: String,
      unique: true,
      trim: true,
      uppercase: true,
      default: generateReservationCode
    },
    fullName: { type: String, required: true },
    email: { type: String, required: true, lowercase: true },
    phone: {
      type: String,
      required: true,
      set: normalizePhoneNumber,
      validate: {
        validator: isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
        message: PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
      }
    },
    service: { type: String, required: true },
    serviceOtherDetails: { type: String, default: "" },
    packageName: { type: String, required: true },
    packageInclusions: { type: String, default: "" },
    packagePrice: { type: Number, default: null },
    packageCustomDescription: { type: String, default: "" },
    durationHours: { type: Number, default: 1 },
    eventType: { type: String, required: true },
    eventTypeOtherDetails: { type: String, default: "" },
    eventDateTime: {
      type: Date,
      required: true,
      validate: {
        validator: isReservationDateValid,
        message: EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
      }
    },
    eventDateKey: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    province: { type: String, required: true },
    city: { type: String, required: true },
    barangay: { type: String, required: true },
    street: { type: String, required: true },
    notes: { type: String, default: "" },
    userCancellationReason: { type: String, default: "" },
    cancelledByRole: { type: String, enum: ["user", "admin", ""], default: "" },
    cancelledAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    status: {
      type: String,
      enum: ["pending", "approved", "rejected", "completed"],
      default: "pending"
    },
    workflowStage: {
      type: String,
      enum: ["awaiting_approval", "approved", "shoot_completed", "editing", "ready_for_download"],
      default: "awaiting_approval"
    },
    workflowStageUpdatedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    estimatedDelivery: { type: Date, default: null },
    pricingStatus: {
      type: String,
      enum: ["unquoted", "quoted", "accepted", "rejected"],
      default: "unquoted"
    },
    basePrice: { type: Number, default: null },
    customAdjustments: { type: [pricingAdjustmentSchema], default: [] },
    discount: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    finalPrice: { type: Number, default: null },
    currency: { type: String, default: "PHP" },
    quotedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    quotedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null },
    pricingAcceptedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    quoteVersion: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    paymentStatus: {
      type: String,
      enum: ["unpaid", "processing", "paid", "failed", "cancelled", "refunded"],
      default: "unpaid"
    },
    paymentDeletedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    pricingHistory: { type: [pricingHistorySchema], default: [] }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

reservationSchema.pre("validate", function syncEventDateKey(next) {
  if (!this.eventDateKey && this.eventDateTime) {
    this.eventDateKey = getDateKey(this.eventDateTime);
  }
  next();
});

export default mongoose.model("Reservation", reservationSchema);
44 Backend Model

import mongoose from "mongoose";

const systemSettingSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    key: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, default: "global" },
    maintenanceMode: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    maintenanceMessage: {
      type: String,
      default: "SnapQueue is under maintenance right now. The website cannot be accessed by users at this time. Please check back in a little while."
    },
    vacationMode: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    vacationMessage: {
      type: String,
      default: "SnapQueue is currently on vacation mode. The website cannot be accessed by users at this time. Services will resume soon."
    },
    bookingLeadHours: { type: Number, default: 24 },
    maxAdvanceBookingDays: { type: Number, default: 90 },
    paymentDeadlineHours: { type: Number, default: 12 },
    defaultDeliveryDays: { type: Number, default: 7 },
    newsletterEnabled: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    newsletterHeading: { type: String, default: "Stay Updated" },
    newsletterDescription: { type: String, default: "Get the latest updates in your inbox." },
    newsletterPlaceholder: { type: String, default: "Enter your email" },
    newsletterButtonLabel: { type: String, default: "Subscribe" },
    updatedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", default: null }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

export default mongoose.model("SystemSetting", systemSettingSchema);

backend/src/shared/models/User.js

import mongoose from "mongoose";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  normalizePhoneNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
} from "../utils/phone.js";

const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    fullName: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    email: { type: String, required: true, unique: true, lowercase: true, trim: true },
    googleId: { type: String, default: "", index: true },
    facebookId: { type: String, default: "", index: true },
    phone: {
      type: String,
      trim: true,
      set: normalizePhoneNumber,
      validate: {
        validator: (value) => !value || isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(value),
        message: PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE
      }
    },
    bio: { type: String, default: "" },
    avatarUrl: { type: String, default: "" },
    googleAvatarUrl: { type: String, default: "" },
    avatarPublicId: { type: String, default: "" },
    emailNotificationsEnabled: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    twoFactorEnabled: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    twoFactorCodeHash: { type: String, default: null },
    twoFactorChallengeId: { type: String, default: null },
    twoFactorExpiresAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    isBlocked: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    blockedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    passwordHash: { type: String, required: true },
    passwordSetByUser: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    tokenVersion: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    passwordResetTokenHash: { type: String, default: null },
    passwordResetExpiresAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    passwordChangeChallengeId: { type: String, default: null },
    passwordChangeCodeHash: { type: String, default: null },
    passwordChangeExpiresAt: { type: Date, default: null },
    passwordChangeNextPasswordHash: { type: String, default: null },
    role: { type: String, enum: ["user", "admin"], default: "user" }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

export default mongoose.model("User", userSchema);

import mongoose from "mongoose";

const archivePhotoSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    name: { type: String, default: "" },
    url: { type: String, required: true },
    storageProvider: { type: String, default: "cloudinary" },
    publicId: { type: String, default: "" },
    assetId: { type: String, default: "" },
    resourceType: { type: String, default: "image" },
    bytes: { type: Number, default: 0 },
    format: { type: String, default: "" },
    folderPath: { type: String, default: "" },
    uploadedBy: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User" },
    uploadedAt: { type: Date, default: Date.now },
    expiresAt: { type: Date, default: null }
  },
  { _id: false }
);

const userArchiveFolderSchema = new mongoose.Schema(
  {
    userId: { type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: "User", required: true, index: true },
    name: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
    photos: { type: [archivePhotoSchema], default: [] }
  },
  { timestamps: true }
);

userArchiveFolderSchema.index({ userId: 1, name: 1 }, { unique: true });

export default mongoose.model("UserArchiveFolder", userArchiveFolderSchema);
