backend/src/shared/utils/adminAllowlist.js

Source file 47 of 111

const gmailRegex = /^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@gmail\.com$/i;
const DEFAULT_ADMIN_ALLOWLIST = [
  "petersoriaga4@gmail.com",
  "christianperalta478@gmail.com",
  "chescamheyreyes@gmail.com",
  "padillabien666@gmail.com"
];

const normalizeAdminEmail = (email) => {
  const normalizedEmail = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const match = normalizedEmail.match(/^([^@]+)@gmail\.com$/i);
  if (!match) return normalizedEmail;
  const localPart = match[1].split("+")[0].replace(/\./g, "");
  return `${localPart}@gmail.com`;
};

const adminAllowlist = new Set(
  [
    ...DEFAULT_ADMIN_ALLOWLIST,
    ...String(process.env.ADMIN_ALLOWLIST || "").split(/[\r\n,]+/)
  ].map((item) => normalizeAdminEmail(item))
    .filter(Boolean)
);

export const isAllowlistedAdminEmail = (email) => {
  const normalizedEmail = normalizeAdminEmail(email);
  return gmailRegex.test(normalizedEmail) && adminAllowlist.has(normalizedEmail);
};

export const syncAllowlistedAdminRole = async (user) => {
  if (!user || !isAllowlistedAdminEmail(user.email) || user.role === "admin") return user;
  user.role = "admin";
  await user.save();
  return user;
};

export const signToken = (payload) => {

};

backend/src/shared/utils/mailer.js

Source file 50 of 111

import { getFrontendBaseUrl } from "./publicBaseUrl.js";

const trimTrailingSlash = (value) => String(value || "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
const trimLeadingSlash = (value) => String(value || "").trim().replace(/^\/+/, "");

const getMailConfig = () => {
  const from = String(process.env.MAIL_FROM || "").trim();
  return {
    apiKey: String(process.env.BREVO_API_KEY || "").trim(),
    from
  };
};

const parseSender = (value) => {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  const match = raw.match(/^(.*?)<([^<>]+)>$/);
  if (match) {
    return {
      name: String(match[1] || "").trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, "") || "SnapQueue",
      email: String(match[2] || "").trim()
    };
  }
  return { name: "SnapQueue", email: raw };
};

const getMailLogoUrl = () => {
  const explicit = String(process.env.MAIL_LOGO_URL || "").trim();
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(explicit)) return explicit;
  if (explicit.startsWith("/")) {
    return `${trimTrailingSlash(getFrontendBaseUrl())}/${trimLeadingSlash(explicit)}`;
  }
  const base = getFrontendBaseUrl();
  return `${trimTrailingSlash(base)}/images/snapqueuelogoo.png`;
};

const toAbsoluteMailUrl = (value) => {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return "";
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(raw)) return raw;
  if (raw.startsWith("/")) return `${trimTrailingSlash(getFrontendBaseUrl())}/${trimLeadingSlash(raw)}`;
  return "";
};

const renderMailLogo = () => `
  <div style="margin:0 0 14px;text-align:center;">
    <img src="${getMailLogoUrl()}" alt="SnapQueue Logo" style="height:40px;max-width:160px;display:inline-block;" />
  </div>
`;

export const isSystemMailConfigured = () => {
  const cfg = getMailConfig();
  return Boolean(cfg.apiKey && cfg.from);
};

export const isPasswordResetMailConfigured = () => isSystemMailConfigured();

export const sendSystemEmail = async ({ to, subject, text, html }) => {
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured()) {
    throw new Error("Brevo API is not configured");
  }
  const cfg = getMailConfig();
  const sender = parseSender(cfg.from);
  const recipients = Array.isArray(to)
    ? to
    : String(to || "")
        .split(",")
        .map((value) => value.trim())
        .filter(Boolean);
  const response = await fetch("https://api.brevo.com/v3/smtp/email", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "api-key": cfg.apiKey,
      accept: "application/json",
      "Content-Type": "application/json"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      sender: {
        email: sender.email,
        name: sender.name
      },
      to: recipients.map((email) => ({ email })),
      subject: String(subject || ""),
      textContent: String(text || ""),
      htmlContent: String(html || "")
    })
  });
  if (!response.ok) {
    const details = await response.text();
    throw new Error(`Brevo send failed (${response.status}): ${details}`);
  }
};

export const sendPasswordResetEmail = async ({ to, resetUrl, expiresMinutes }) => {
  const absoluteResetUrl = toAbsoluteMailUrl(resetUrl);
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to,
    subject: "SnapQueue password reset",
    text: [
      "You requested to reset your SnapQueue password.",
      `Use this link within ${expiresMinutes} minutes:`,
      absoluteResetUrl,
      "",
      "If you did not request this, you can ignore this email."
    ].join("\n"),
    html: `
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;color:#0f172a;">
        ${renderMailLogo()}
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;">SnapQueue Password Reset</h2>
        <p>You requested to reset your password.</p>
        <p>This link expires in <strong>${expiresMinutes} minutes</strong>.</p>
        <p>
          <a href="${absoluteResetUrl}" style="display:inline-block;padding:10px 16px;background:#2563eb;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;border-radius:8px;">
            Reset Password
          </a>
        </p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:#475569;">If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.</p>
      </div>
    `
  });
};

export const sendTwoFactorCodeEmail = async ({ to, fullName, code, expiresMinutes }) => {
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to,
    subject: "SnapQueue verification code",
    text: [
      `Hi ${fullName || "SnapQueue user"},`,
      "",
      "Use this verification code to finish signing in:",
      code,
      "",
      `This code expires in ${expiresMinutes} minutes.`,
      "If you did not attempt to sign in, you can ignore this email."
    ].join("\n"),
    html: `
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;color:#0f172a;">
        ${renderMailLogo()}
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;">SnapQueue Sign-in Verification</h2>
        <p>Hi ${String(fullName || "SnapQueue user")},</p>
        <p>Use this verification code to finish signing in:</p>
        <div style="display:inline-block;margin:8px 0 16px;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.24em;">
          ${String(code || "")}
        </div>
        <p>This code expires in <strong>${expiresMinutes} minutes</strong>.</p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:#475569;">If you did not attempt to sign in, you can ignore this email.</p>
      </div>
    `
  });
};

export const sendSignupVerificationEmail = async ({ to, fullName, code, expiresMinutes }) => {
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to,
    subject: "SnapQueue account verification code",
    text: [
      `Hi ${fullName || "SnapQueue user"},`,
      "",
      "Use this verification code to finish creating your SnapQueue account:",
      code,
      "",
      `This code expires in ${expiresMinutes} minutes.`,
      "If you did not try to create an account, you can ignore this email."
    ].join("\n"),
    html: `
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;color:#0f172a;">
        ${renderMailLogo()}
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;">SnapQueue Account Verification</h2>
        <p>Hi ${String(fullName || "SnapQueue user")},</p>
        <p>Use this verification code to finish creating your account:</p>
        <div style="display:inline-block;margin:8px 0 16px;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.24em;">
          ${String(code || "")}
        </div>
        <p>This code expires in <strong>${expiresMinutes} minutes</strong>.</p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:#475569;">If you did not try to create an account, you can ignore this email.</p>
      </div>
    `
  });
};

export const sendPasswordChangeOtpEmail = async ({ to, fullName, code, expiresMinutes }) => {
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to,
    subject: "SnapQueue password change verification code",
    text: [
      `Hi ${fullName || "SnapQueue user"},`,
      "",
      "Use this verification code to confirm your password change:",
      code,
      "",
      `This code expires in ${expiresMinutes} minutes.`,
      "If you did not request a password change, please secure your account immediately."
    ].join("\n"),
    html: `
      <div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;color:#0f172a;">
        ${renderMailLogo()}
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;">SnapQueue Password Change Verification</h2>
        <p>Hi ${String(fullName || "SnapQueue user")},</p>
        <p>Use this verification code to confirm your password change:</p>
        <div style="display:inline-block;margin:8px 0 16px;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.24em;">
          ${String(code || "")}
        </div>
        <p>This code expires in <strong>${expiresMinutes} minutes</strong>.</p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:#475569;">If you did not request a password change, please secure your account immediately.</p>
      </div>
    `
  });
};

backend/src/shared/utils/notificationEmail.js

Source file 51 of 111

import User from "../models/User.js";
import { getDisplayReservationId } from "./reservationCode.js";
import { isSystemMailConfigured, sendSystemEmail, toAbsoluteMailUrl } from "./mailer.js";
import { getFrontendBaseUrl } from "./publicBaseUrl.js";

const appName = "SnapQueue";
const brandColor = "#2563eb";
const brandDark = "#0f172a";

const getWebBaseUrl = () => {
  return getFrontendBaseUrl();
};

const dashboardUrl = () => `${getWebBaseUrl()}/dashboard`;
const adminDashboardUrl = () => `${getWebBaseUrl()}/admin`;

const normalizeUrl = (value) => {
  return toAbsoluteMailUrl(value);
};

const logoUrl = () => normalizeUrl(process.env.MAIL_LOGO_URL) || `${getWebBaseUrl()}/images/snapqueuelogoo.png`;

const prettyDateTime = (value) => {
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "-";
  return date.toLocaleString("en-PH", {
    year: "numeric",
    month: "short",
    day: "2-digit",
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit"
  });
};

const formatCurrency = (amount, currency = "PHP") =>
  `${String(currency || "PHP").toUpperCase()} ${Number(amount || 0).toLocaleString("en-PH", {
    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
    maximumFractionDigits: 2
  })}`;

const safe = (value) =>
  String(value || "").replace(/[<>&"]/g, (ch) => ({ "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", "&": "&amp;", '"': "&quot;" })[ch]);

const renderHeaderLogo = () => {
  const url = logoUrl();
  if (url) {
    return `
      <img src="${safe(url)}" alt="${safe(appName)} Logo" style="height:36px;max-width:180px;display:block;margin:0 auto 10px;" />
    `;
  }
  return `
    <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:${brandColor};color:#ffffff;display:inline-grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:16px;margin:0 auto 10px;">SQ</div>
  `;
};

const buildEmailHtml = ({ title, intro, rows = [], ctaLabel = "", ctaUrl = "", note = "" }) => {
  const rowHtml = rows
    .filter((row) => row?.label && row?.value !== undefined)
    .map(
      (row) => `
        <tr>
          <td style="padding:7px 0;color:#64748b;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.04em;">${safe(row.label)}</td>
          <td style="padding:7px 0;color:${brandDark};font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-align:right;">${safe(row.value)}</td>
        </tr>
      `
    )
    .join("");
  const hasCta = Boolean(ctaLabel && ctaUrl && normalizeUrl(ctaUrl));

  return `
    <div style="margin:0;padding:24px 10px;background:#f1f5f9;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:${brandDark};">
      <div style="max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="padding:18px 20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg, ${brandDark}, ${brandColor});color:#ffffff;text-align:center;">
          ${renderHeaderLogo()}
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.95;">${safe(appName)}</div>
          <h2 style="margin:10px 0 0;font-size:22px;line-height:1.2;">${safe(title)}</h2>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:18px 20px;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#1e293b;">${safe(intro)}</p>
          ${rowHtml ? `<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" style="border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;margin:0 0 14px;">${rowHtml}</table>` : ""}
          ${hasCta ? `<p style="margin:0 0 14px;text-align:center;"><a href="${safe(ctaUrl)}" style="display:inline-block;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:${brandColor};color:#ffffff;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;">${safe(ctaLabel)}</a></p>` : ""}
          ${note ? `<p style="margin:0;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:#64748b;">${safe(note)}</p>` : ""}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
};

const buildEmailText = ({ title, intro, rows = [], ctaLabel = "", ctaUrl = "", note = "" }) => {
  const lines = [appName, title, "", intro];
  if (rows.length) {
    lines.push("");
    rows.forEach((row) => lines.push(`${row.label}: ${row.value}`));
  }
  if (ctaLabel && ctaUrl) {
    lines.push("", `${ctaLabel}: ${ctaUrl}`);
  }
  if (note) {
    lines.push("", note);
  }
  return lines.join("\n");
};

const canSendToUser = async ({ userId = null, email = "", respectPreference = true }) => {
  if (!respectPreference) return true;
  const normalizedEmail = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (userId) {
    const user = await User.findById(userId).select("emailNotificationsEnabled").lean();
    if (!user) return true;
    return user.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false;
  }
  if (!normalizedEmail) return true;
  const user = await User.findOne({ email: normalizedEmail }).select("emailNotificationsEnabled").lean();
  if (!user) return true;
  return user.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false;
};

const sendUserEmail = async ({
  to,
  userId = null,
  subject,
  title,
  intro,
  rows = [],
  ctaLabel = "",
  ctaUrl = "",
  note = "",
  respectPreference = true
}) => {
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured() || !to) return false;
  const normalizedTo = String(to || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const allowed = await canSendToUser({ userId, email: normalizedTo, respectPreference });
  if (!allowed) return false;
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to: normalizedTo,
    subject,
    text: buildEmailText({ title, intro, rows, ctaLabel, ctaUrl, note }),
    html: buildEmailHtml({ title, intro, rows, ctaLabel, ctaUrl, note })
  });
  return true;
};

const sendBulkUserEmail = async ({
  users = [],
  subject,
  title,
  intro,
  rows = [],
  ctaLabel = "",
  ctaUrl = "",
  note = "",
  respectPreference = true
}) => {
  if (!isSystemMailConfigured()) return false;
  const emails = [];
  for (const user of users) {
    const email = String(user?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!email) continue;
    const allowed = await canSendToUser({
      userId: user?._id || null,
      email,
      respectPreference
    });
    if (allowed) emails.push(email);
  }
  if (!emails.length) return false;
  await sendSystemEmail({
    to: emails.join(","),
    subject,
    text: buildEmailText({ title, intro, rows, ctaLabel, ctaUrl, note }),
    html: buildEmailHtml({ title, intro, rows, ctaLabel, ctaUrl, note })
  });
  return true;
};

const sendAdminAlert = async ({
  subject,
  title,
  intro,
  rows = [],
  ctaLabel = "",
  ctaUrl = "",
  note = "",
  respectPreference = true
}) => {
  const admins = await User.find({
    role: "admin",
    isBlocked: { $ne: true }
  }).select("_id email emailNotificationsEnabled").lean();
  return sendBulkUserEmail({
    users: admins,
    subject,
    title,
    intro,
    rows,
    ctaLabel,
    ctaUrl,
    note,
    respectPreference
  });
};

const resolveReservationRecipient = async (reservation) => {
  const directEmail = String(reservation?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (directEmail) {
    return { to: directEmail, userId: reservation?.userId || null };
  }
  const userId = reservation?.userId || null;
  if (!userId) return { to: "", userId: null };
  const user = await User.findById(userId).select("email").lean();
  return { to: String(user?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase(), userId };
};

const WORKFLOW_STAGE_LABELS = {
  awaiting_approval: "Awaiting Approval",
  approved: "Approved",
  shoot_completed: "In Progress",
  editing: "Editing",
  ready_for_download: "Ready for Download"
};

const getWorkflowStageLabel = (value) => WORKFLOW_STAGE_LABELS[String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase()] || String(value || "Updated");

export const notifyWelcomeEmail = async (user) =>
  sendUserEmail({
    to: user?.email,
    userId: user?._id || null,
    subject: "Welcome to SnapQueue",
    title: "Welcome to SnapQueue",
    intro: `Hi ${String(user?.fullName || "there").trim()}, your account has been created successfully.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Name", value: user?.fullName || "-" },
      { label: "Email", value: user?.email || "-" }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl(),
    note: "You can now manage reservations, payments, and project updates from your dashboard."
  });

export const notifyAccountDeletedEmail = async (user, { deletedBy = "self" } = {}) => {
  const normalizedDeletedBy = String(deletedBy || "self").trim().toLowerCase();
  const deletedByAdmin = normalizedDeletedBy === "admin";
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: user?.email,
    userId: null,
    subject: "Your SnapQueue Account Has Been Deleted",
    title: "Account Deleted",
    intro: deletedByAdmin
      ? "Your SnapQueue account has been deleted by an administrator."
      : "Your SnapQueue account has been deleted successfully.",
    rows: [
      { label: "Name", value: user?.fullName || "-" },
      { label: "Email", value: user?.email || "-" },
      { label: "Deleted By", value: deletedByAdmin ? "SnapQueue Admin" : "You" }
    ],
    note: "If this was not expected, contact SnapQueue support for assistance.",
    respectPreference: false
  });
};

export const notifyReservationPaymentSubmitted = async (payment, reservation) => {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation) || String(payment?.reservationId || "").trim();
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  await Promise.all([
    sendUserEmail({
      to: recipient.to,
      userId: recipient.userId,
      subject: `Payment Successful - Pending Verification (#${reservationId})`,
      title: "Payment Successful",
      intro: `Your payment for reservation #${reservationId} was received successfully and is now pending admin verification.`,
      rows: [
        { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
        { label: "Amount", value: formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP") },
        { label: "Reference", value: payment?.referenceNumber || "-" },
        { label: "Status", value: "Pending Admin Verification" }
      ],
      ctaLabel: "View Reservation",
      ctaUrl: dashboardUrl()
    }),
    sendAdminAlert({
      subject: `Reservation Payment Needs Verification (#${reservationId})`,
      title: "Reservation Payment Needs Verification",
      intro: "A client submitted payment for a reservation. Admin verification is required.",
      rows: [
        { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
        { label: "Client", value: `${reservation?.fullName || "-"} (${recipient.to || "-"})` },
        { label: "Amount", value: formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP") },
        { label: "Reference", value: payment?.referenceNumber || "-" }
      ],
      ctaLabel: "Open Admin Dashboard",
      ctaUrl: adminDashboardUrl()
    })
  ]);
};

export const notifyPaymentDecision = async (payment, reservation) => {
  const status = String(payment?.status || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["verified", "rejected"].includes(status)) return false;
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation) || String(payment?.reservationId || "").trim();
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  const decisionLabel = status === "verified" ? "Verified" : "Rejected";
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Payment ${decisionLabel} (#${reservationId})`,
    title: `Payment ${decisionLabel}`,
    intro:
      status === "verified"
        ? `Your payment for reservation #${reservationId} has been verified by the admin.`
        : `Your payment for reservation #${reservationId} has been rejected by the admin.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Amount", value: formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP") },
      { label: "Reference", value: payment?.referenceNumber || "-" },
      { label: "Decision", value: decisionLabel }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl(),
    note: status === "verified" ? "Your reservation can now proceed to the next stage." : "Please review your dashboard for the next required action."
  });
};

export const notifyProjectStatusUpdated = async (reservation, options = {}) => {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  const workflowStage = String(options?.workflowStage || reservation?.workflowStage || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const stageLabel = getWorkflowStageLabel(workflowStage);
  const estimatedDelivery = reservation?.estimatedDelivery ? prettyDateTime(reservation.estimatedDelivery) : "-";
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Project Status Updated (#${reservationId})`,
    title: "Project Status Updated",
    intro: `Your reservation #${reservationId} is now marked as ${stageLabel}.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Project Status", value: stageLabel },
      { label: "Estimated Delivery", value: estimatedDelivery }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyReservationCompleted = async (reservation) => {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Reservation Completed (#${reservationId})`,
    title: "Reservation Completed",
    intro: `Your reservation #${reservationId} has been marked as completed.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Project Status", value: "Completed" },
      { label: "Event Date", value: prettyDateTime(reservation?.eventDateTime) }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl(),
    note: "Your files and final delivery details should now be available in your account."
  });
};

export const notifyRefundRequested = async (payment, reservation) => {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation) || String(payment?.reservationId || "").trim();
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendAdminAlert({
    subject: `Refund Request Submitted (#${reservationId})`,
    title: "Refund Request Submitted",
    intro: "A client requested a refund and the request needs admin review.",
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Client", value: `${reservation?.fullName || "-"} (${recipient.to || "-"})` },
      { label: "Payment Reference", value: payment?.referenceNumber || "-" },
      { label: "Refund Status", value: "Requested" }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Review Refund Request",
    ctaUrl: adminDashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyRefundDecision = async (payment, reservation, action) => {
  const normalized = String(action || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["approve", "reject", "process"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation) || String(payment?.reservationId || "").trim();
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  const decisionLabel = normalized === "approve" ? "Approved" : normalized === "process" ? "Processed" : "Rejected";
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Refund ${decisionLabel} (#${reservationId})`,
    title: `Refund ${decisionLabel}`,
    intro:
      normalized === "approve"
        ? `Your refund request for reservation #${reservationId} has been approved by the admin. Refunds are processed within 3-7 business days.`
        : normalized === "process"
          ? `Your refund for reservation #${reservationId} has been processed by the admin.`
          : `Your refund request for reservation #${reservationId} has been rejected by the admin.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Payment Reference", value: payment?.referenceNumber || "-" },
      { label: "Refund Decision", value: decisionLabel },
      ...(normalized === "process"
        ? [
            { label: "Refund Reference", value: payment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-" },
            { label: "Refund Status", value: String(payment?.refundStatus || "processed").toUpperCase() }
          ]
        : [])
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl(),
    note:
      normalized === "approve"
        ? [payment?.refundAdminNote, "Refund processing SLA: 3-7 business days."].filter(Boolean).join(" ")
        : payment?.refundAdminNote || ""
  });
};

export const notifyRefundPayoutDetailsRequired = async (payment, reservation) => {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation) || String(payment?.reservationId || "").trim();
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Refund Details Required (#${reservationId})`,
    title: "Refund Details Required",
    intro: `Your paid reservation #${reservationId} was rejected by the admin. Submit your GCash or Maya payout details so we can return your payment.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${reservationId}` },
      { label: "Refund Status", value: "Awaiting Payout Details" },
      { label: "Processing SLA", value: "3-7 business days after payout details are submitted" }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl(),
    note: payment?.refundAdminNote || ""
  });
};

export const notifyUserAccountChanged = async (user, action) => {
  const normalized = String(action || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["promoted", "banned", "deleted"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  const titleMap = {
    promoted: "Account Promoted",
    banned: "Account Banned",
    deleted: "Account Deleted"
  };
  const introMap = {
    promoted: "Your account has been promoted to admin by SnapQueue.",
    banned: "Your account has been banned by SnapQueue.",
    deleted: "Your SnapQueue account has been deleted by an admin."
  };
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: user?.email,
    userId: user?._id || null,
    subject: `${titleMap[normalized]} - SnapQueue`,
    title: titleMap[normalized],
    intro: introMap[normalized],
    rows: [
      { label: "Name", value: user?.fullName || "-" },
      { label: "Email", value: user?.email || "-" },
      { label: "Action", value: titleMap[normalized] }
    ],
    ctaLabel: normalized === "deleted" ? "" : "Open SnapQueue",
    ctaUrl: normalized === "deleted" ? "" : dashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyLiveChatMessage = async (thread, message) => {
  const senderRole = String(message?.senderRole || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["user", "admin"].includes(senderRole)) return false;
  const text = String(message?.text || "").trim();
  if (!text) return false;
  if (senderRole === "user") {
    return sendAdminAlert({
      subject: `New Message from ${thread?.clientName || "Client"}`,
      title: "New Client Message",
      intro: `${thread?.clientName || "A client"} sent a new message to admin.`,
      rows: [
        { label: "Client", value: `${thread?.clientName || "-"} (${thread?.clientEmail || "-"})` },
        { label: "Message", value: text.slice(0, 120) }
      ],
      ctaLabel: "Open Admin Inbox",
      ctaUrl: adminDashboardUrl()
    });
  }
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: thread?.clientEmail,
    userId: thread?.clientId || null,
    subject: "New Message from SnapQueue Admin",
    title: "New Admin Message",
    intro: "An admin sent you a new message in SnapQueue.",
    rows: [
      { label: "From", value: message?.senderName || "Admin" },
      { label: "Message", value: text.slice(0, 120) }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyCustomPackageSelected = async (reservation) => {
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Custom Package Request Received (#${reservation?._id})`,
    title: "Custom Package Request Received",
    intro: `Your custom package request for reservation #${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)} was received. Please wait for the admin's quoted price.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)}` },
      { label: "Event Type", value: reservation?.eventType || "-" },
      { label: "Event Date", value: prettyDateTime(reservation?.eventDateTime) }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyCustomQuoteProvided = async (reservation) => {
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Custom Package Quote Ready (#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)})`,
    title: "Custom Package Quote Ready",
    intro: `Admin has provided a quoted price for your custom package reservation #${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)}. Please review and verify the quoted amount.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)}` },
      { label: "Quoted Amount", value: formatCurrency(reservation?.finalPrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP") },
      { label: "Quote Version", value: Number(reservation?.quoteVersion || 0) }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Review Quote",
    ctaUrl: dashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyReservationEditable = async (reservation) => {
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendUserEmail({
    to: recipient.to,
    userId: recipient.userId,
    subject: `Reservation Still Editable (#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)})`,
    title: "Your Reservation Is Still Editable",
    intro: `Your reservation #${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)} is still pending, so you can edit the details before payment is finalized.`,
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)}` },
      { label: "Status", value: String(reservation?.status || "pending").toUpperCase() },
      { label: "Payment Status", value: String(reservation?.paymentStatus || "unpaid").toUpperCase() }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Edit Reservation",
    ctaUrl: `${dashboardUrl()}?tab=reservations`,
    note: "Editing will be locked once payment is verified or the reservation is no longer pending."
  });
};

export const notifyCustomQuoteApproved = async (reservation) => {
  const recipient = await resolveReservationRecipient(reservation);
  return sendAdminAlert({
    subject: `Custom Quote Approved by Client (#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)})`,
    title: "Custom Quote Approved by Client",
    intro: "A client approved the quoted amount for a custom package reservation.",
    rows: [
      { label: "Reservation ID", value: `#${getDisplayReservationId(reservation)}` },
      { label: "Client", value: `${reservation?.fullName || "-"} (${recipient.to || "-"})` },
      { label: "Approved Amount", value: formatCurrency(reservation?.finalPrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP") }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Open Admin Dashboard",
    ctaUrl: adminDashboardUrl()
  });
};

export const notifyWebsiteModeChanged = async ({ activeMode, activeMessage }) => {
  const normalizedMode = String(activeMode || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!["maintenance", "vacation"].includes(normalizedMode)) return false;
  const clients = await User.find({
    role: "user",
    isBlocked: { $ne: true }
  }).select("_id email emailNotificationsEnabled").lean();
  return sendBulkUserEmail({
    users: clients,
    subject: `SnapQueue ${normalizedMode === "maintenance" ? "Maintenance Mode" : "Vacation Mode"} Update`,
    title: normalizedMode === "maintenance" ? "Maintenance Mode Enabled" : "Vacation Mode Enabled",
    intro:
      normalizedMode === "maintenance"
        ? "SnapQueue is now in Maintenance Mode."
        : "SnapQueue is now in Vacation Mode.",
    rows: [
      { label: "Status", value: normalizedMode === "maintenance" ? "Maintenance Mode" : "Vacation Mode" },
      { label: "Message", value: activeMessage || "-" }
    ],
    ctaLabel: "Visit SnapQueue",
    ctaUrl: getWebBaseUrl()
  });
};
52 Backend Utility

backend/src/shared/utils/passwordPolicy.js

Source file 52 of 111

const MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH = 8;

const normalizeComparable = (value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");

const getPersonalFragments = ({ fullName, email } = {}) => {
  const fragments = new Set();
  const add = (value) => {
    const normalized = normalizeComparable(value);
    if (normalized.length >= 3) fragments.add(normalized);
  };

  const normalizedName = String(fullName || "").trim();
  if (normalizedName) {
    normalizedName
      .split(/\s+/)
      .map((part) => normalizeComparable(part))
      .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
      .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));
    add(normalizedName);
  }

  const normalizedEmail = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (normalizedEmail) {
    const [localPart = ""] = normalizedEmail.split("@");
    localPart
      .split(/[._%+-]+/)
      .map((part) => normalizeComparable(part))
      .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
      .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));
    add(localPart);
  }

  return Array.from(fragments);
};

export const getPasswordPolicyChecks = (password, context = {}) => {
  const value = String(password || "");
  const comparable = normalizeComparable(value);
  const personalFragments = getPersonalFragments(context);

  return [
    {
      key: "length",
      label: `At least ${MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH} characters`,
      valid: value.length >= MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH
    },
    {
      key: "lowercase",
      label: "At least one lowercase letter",
      valid: /[a-z]/.test(value)
    },
    {
      key: "number",
      label: "At least one number",
      valid: /\d/.test(value)
    },
    {
      key: "special",
      label: "At least one special character",
      valid: /[^A-Za-z\d]/.test(value)
    },
    {
      key: "spaces",
      label: "No spaces",
      valid: !/\s/.test(value)
    }
  ];
};

export const validatePasswordPolicy = (password, context = {}) => {
  const failedChecks = getPasswordPolicyChecks(password, context).filter((item) => !item.valid);
  if (failedChecks.length === 0) return [];

  const errors = [];
  if (failedChecks.some((item) => item.key === "length")) {
    errors.push(`Password must be at least ${MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH} characters long.`);
  }
  if (failedChecks.some((item) => ["lowercase", "number", "special"].includes(item.key))) {
    errors.push("Password must include lowercase letter, number, and special character.");
  }
  if (failedChecks.some((item) => item.key === "spaces")) {
    errors.push("Password must not contain spaces.");
  }
  return errors;
};

export const PHILIPPINE_MOBILE_REGEX = /^09\d{9}$/;

export const normalizePhoneNumber = (value) => String(value || "").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 11);

export const isValidPhilippineMobileNumber = (value) => PHILIPPINE_MOBILE_REGEX.test(String(value || "").trim());

export const PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE = "Phone number must be a valid Philippine mobile number in 09XXXXXXXXX format.";
54 Backend Utility

backend/src/shared/utils/publicBaseUrl.js

Source file 54 of 111

const DEFAULT_LOCAL_ORIGINS = [
  "http://localhost:5173",
  "http://127.0.0.1:5173",
  "http://localhost:5000",
  "http://127.0.0.1:5000"
];

const trimTrailingSlash = (value) => String(value || "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");

const normalizeAbsoluteUrl = (value) => {
  const raw = trimTrailingSlash(value);
  if (!raw) return "";
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(raw)) return raw;
  return "";
};

const splitConfiguredUrls = (value) =>
  String(value || "")
    .split(",")
    .map((value) => normalizeAbsoluteUrl(value))
    .filter(Boolean);

export const getConfiguredClientUrls = () =>
  [
    ...splitConfiguredUrls(process.env.CLIENT_URL),
    ...splitConfiguredUrls(process.env.FRONTEND_URL)
  ].filter(Boolean);

export const getPlatformFrontendUrl = () =>
  [
    normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.PUBLIC_URL),
    normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.APP_URL)
  ].filter(Boolean)[0] || "";

export const getConfiguredServerUrls = () =>
  [
    normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL),
    normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.API_PUBLIC_URL),
    normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.BACKEND_URL)
  ].filter(Boolean);

export const getFrontendBaseUrl = (fallback = "http://localhost:5173") => {
  const configuredClientUrls = getConfiguredClientUrls();
  const resetBaseUrl = normalizeAbsoluteUrl(process.env.PASSWORD_RESET_BASE_URL);
  const platformFrontendUrl = getPlatformFrontendUrl();
  return configuredClientUrls[0] || resetBaseUrl || platformFrontendUrl || trimTrailingSlash(fallback);
};

export const getBackendBaseUrl = (fallback = "http://localhost:5000") => {
  const configuredServerUrls = getConfiguredServerUrls();
  return configuredServerUrls[0] || trimTrailingSlash(fallback);
};

export const getPublicBaseUrl = (fallback = "http://localhost:5173") => {
  return getFrontendBaseUrl(fallback);
};

export const getAllowedOrigins = () => {
  const origins = [
    ...getConfiguredClientUrls(),
    getFrontendBaseUrl(""),
    getPlatformFrontendUrl(),
    ...DEFAULT_LOCAL_ORIGINS
  ].filter(Boolean);
  return Array.from(new Set(origins));
};

export const isAllowedOrigin = (origin) => {
  const normalizedOrigin = normalizeAbsoluteUrl(origin);
  if (!normalizedOrigin) return false;
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(normalizedOrigin);
    if (parsed.hostname === "localhost" || parsed.hostname === "127.0.0.1") {
      return true;
    }
  } catch (_error) {
    return false;
  }
  return getAllowedOrigins().includes(normalizedOrigin);
};
55 Backend Utility

backend/src/shared/utils/reservationCode.js

Source file 55 of 111

const RESERVATION_CODE_PREFIX = "SQ-";
const RESERVATION_CODE_BODY_LENGTH = 9;
const RESERVATION_CODE_ALPHABET = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";

export function generateReservationCode() {
  let body = "";
  for (let index = 0; index < RESERVATION_CODE_BODY_LENGTH; index += 1) {
    const position = Math.floor(Math.random() * RESERVATION_CODE_ALPHABET.length);
    body += RESERVATION_CODE_ALPHABET[position];
  }
  return `${RESERVATION_CODE_PREFIX}${body}`;
}

export function getDisplayReservationId(reservationLike) {
  return String(reservationLike?.reservationCode || reservationLike?._id || reservationLike?.id || "").trim() || "-";
}

export const hasAdminAccess = (role) => {
  const normalized = String(role || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[\s-]+/g, "_");
  return normalized === "admin" || normalized === "super_admin" || normalized === "superadmin";
};

    <title>SnapQueue</title>
    <script src="/env.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://mcp.figma.com/mcp/html-to-design/capture.js" async></script>
    <script>
      (function () {
        const isPrototype = /(?:\?|&)prototype=1(?:&|$)/.test(window.location.search || "");
        if (!isPrototype) return;
        const isAdminRoute = /^\/admin(?:\/|$|-help-center)/.test(window.location.pathname || "");
        const profile = isAdminRoute
          ? {
              _id: "admin_proto_001",
              role: "admin",
              fullName: "Peter Soriaga",
              email: "admin@snapqueue.local",
              phone: "09179876543",
              bio: "SnapQueue studio administrator."
            }
          : {
              _id: "user_proto_001",
              role: "user",
              fullName: "Patricia Soriaga",
              email: "patricia@example.com",
              phone: "09171234567",
              bio: "Event organizer and frequent SnapQueue client."
            };
        window.localStorage.setItem("token", "prototype-token");
        window.localStorage.setItem("userLoggedIn", "true");
        window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify(profile));
      })();
    </script>
    <style>
      html {
        background: #020617;
        min-height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        overflow-y: auto;
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }

      body {
        margin: 0;
        min-height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        background: #020617;
        overflow-y: hidden;
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }

      #root {
        min-height: 100vh;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 100%;
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }
    </style>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css" />
  </head>
  <body class="font-poppins">
    <div id="root"></div>
    <script type="module" src="/src/main.jsx"></script>
  </body>
</html>

61 Frontend Source

frontend/src/App.jsx

Source file 61 of 111

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { Navigate, Route, Routes, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import GalleryPage from "./features/public/pages/GalleryPage";
import ContactFaqPage from "./features/public/pages/ContactFaqPage";
import AdminDashboardPage from "./features/admin/pages/AdminDashboardPage";
import AdminHelpCenterPage from "./features/admin/pages/AdminHelpCenterPage";
import DashboardPage from "./features/user/pages/DashboardPage";
import HelpCenterPage from "./features/user/pages/HelpCenterPage";
import IndexPage from "./features/public/pages/IndexPage";
import LoginPage from "./features/public/pages/LoginPage";
import MaintenancePage from "./features/public/pages/MaintenancePage";
import Payment from "./features/user/pages/Payment";
import ReservationPage from "./features/user/pages/ReservationPage";
import NotFoundPage from "./features/public/pages/NotFoundPage";
import TermsPage from "./features/public/pages/TermsPage";
import PrivacyPolicyPage from "./features/public/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage";
import DataDeletionPage from "./features/public/pages/DataDeletionPage";
import api from "./shared/services/api";

const TERMS_RETURN_KEY = "snapqueue_terms_return";
const MAINTENANCE_EXEMPT_PATHS = new Set(["/maintenance", "/admin"]);

function hasAdminAccess(role) {
  const normalized = String(role || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[\s-]+/g, "_");
  return normalized === "admin" || normalized === "super_admin" || normalized === "superadmin";
}

function ScrollToTop() {
  const { pathname, search } = useLocation();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (pathname === "/reservation") {
      const raw = window.sessionStorage.getItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY);
      if (raw) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
          if (parsed?.returnTo === `${pathname}${search}` && typeof parsed?.returnScrollY === "number") {
            return;
          }
        } catch {
          window.sessionStorage.removeItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY);
        }
      }
    }
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
  }, [pathname, search]);

  return null;
}

function WebsiteAvailabilityGate() {
  const { pathname } = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [lastMode, setLastMode] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    const enforceAvailability = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/system/status");
        const activeMode = String(response?.data?.system?.activeMode || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        if (!activeMode) {
          if (!cancelled) {
            setLastMode("");
            if (pathname === "/maintenance") {
              navigate("/", { replace: true });
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        if (pathname === "/maintenance") {
          if (!cancelled) {
            setLastMode(activeMode);
          }
          return;
        }

        if (MAINTENANCE_EXEMPT_PATHS.has(pathname)) return;

        const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
        let isAdmin = false;
        if (token) {
          try {
            const me = await api.get("/auth/me");
            isAdmin = hasAdminAccess(me?.data?.user?.role);
          } catch (_error) {
            isAdmin = false;
          }
        }

        if (!cancelled) {
          setLastMode(activeMode);
          if (!isAdmin) {
            navigate(`/maintenance?mode=${encodeURIComponent(activeMode)}`, { replace: true });
          }
        }
      } catch (_error) {
        if (!cancelled) setLastMode("");
      }
    };

    enforceAvailability();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [navigate, pathname]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (pathname !== "/maintenance" || !lastMode) return;
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    if (params.get("mode") === lastMode) return;
    navigate(`/maintenance?mode=${encodeURIComponent(lastMode)}`, { replace: true });
  }, [lastMode, navigate, pathname]);

  return null;
}

export default function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <ScrollToTop />
      <WebsiteAvailabilityGate />
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<IndexPage />} />
        <Route path="/gallery" element={<GalleryPage />} />
        <Route path="/contact" element={<ContactFaqPage />} />
        <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
        <Route path="/dashboard" element={<DashboardPage />} />
        <Route path="/dashboard-native-preview" element={<DashboardPage />} />
        <Route path="/help-center" element={<HelpCenterPage />} />
        <Route path="/admin-help-center" element={<AdminHelpCenterPage />} />
        <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminDashboardPage />} />
        <Route path="/reservation" element={<ReservationPage />} />
        <Route path="/payment" element={<Payment />} />
        <Route path="/terms" element={<TermsPage />} />
        <Route path="/privacy-policy" element={<PrivacyPolicyPage />} />
        <Route path="/data-deletion" element={<DataDeletionPage />} />
        <Route path="/maintenance" element={<MaintenancePage />} />
        <Route path="/home" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
        <Route path="*" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
      </Routes>
    </>
  );
}

export const ADMIN_HELP_ARTICLES = [

    title: "Review booking requests",
    description: "Check reservation details, schedule, and package information before approving or rejecting a request.",
    topLevel: "Bookings",
    section: "Reservation review",
    category: "Bookings",
    readTime: "3 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open Booking Requests from the admin dashboard.",
      "Use Full Details to review the submitted event, package, address, and notes.",
      "Confirm whether the requested date, time, and scope can be accepted.",
      "Approve the reservation only when the submission is complete and schedulable."
    ],
    tip: "Use rejection only after reviewing the payment and refund impact for paid reservations."
  },
  {
    title: "Reject a paid reservation safely",
    description: "Handle rejections with the refund workflow so the client receives the correct follow-up steps.",
    topLevel: "Bookings",
    section: "Reservation review",
    category: "Refunds",
    readTime: "4 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open the paid reservation from Booking Requests.",
      "Choose the reject action and review the refund prompt before confirming.",
      "If the client has not yet submitted payout details, move the payment into awaiting payout details.",
      "Once payout details are available, complete the refund through the Payments area."
    ],
    tip: "Refund processing should follow the stated SLA of 3 to 7 business days after payout details are submitted."
  },
  {
    title: "Verify payment proof",
    description: "Review reference number, proof image clarity, and payment destination before marking a payment verified.",
    topLevel: "Payments",
    section: "Payment review",
    category: "Payments",
    readTime: "3 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open Payments and locate the payment that needs review.",
      "Use View Proof to inspect the uploaded screenshot clearly.",
      "Confirm the amount, method, receiver, and 12-digit reference number.",
      "Mark the payment verified only when all payment details match the reservation."
    ],
    tip: "Reject the payment if the screenshot is unclear, incomplete, or does not match the submitted reference."
  },
  {
    title: "Process a refund",

    category: "Refunds",

    tip: "Do not process a refund until the client payout details are present and correct."

      "Approve the request if the refund should proceed, or reject it if the request is invalid or incomplete.",
      "Add a clear admin note so the client can understand the decision."
    ],
    tip: "Use approval when the refund is allowed but not yet processed. Use process only after the actual payout is completed."
  },
  {

    description: "Rejected payments should be clearly reviewed so the client knows whether to resubmit proof or stop the transaction.",

    section: "Payment review",
    category: "Payments",
    readTime: "3 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open the payment record that needs action.",
      "Inspect the proof image, reference number, amount, and method details.",
      "Reject the payment if the submission is incorrect, invalid, or unreadable.",
      "Make sure the reservation moves out of active booking requests when the rejection should end the request."
    ],
    tip: "Use a clear admin note so the client understands whether resubmission is possible."
  },
  {

    description: "Advance the workflow only when payment is verified and delivery files are already uploaded.",
    topLevel: "Operations",
    section: "Production workflow",
    category: "Workflow",

    steps: [

      "Upload the delivery media if the project is complete.",
      "Set the workflow stage to Ready for Download once files are prepared for release."

    description: "Folder naming and structure help both admin and client locate delivered files faster.",
    topLevel: "Operations",
    section: "Production workflow",
    category: "Delivery",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Create a folder before uploading a large delivery batch.",
      "Use names that clearly describe the delivery set or project stage.",
      "Keep similar media grouped together instead of mixing unrelated files.",
      "Review the archive after upload to confirm the folder layout is clean."
    ],
    tip: "Good archive structure reduces confusion when the client downloads files later."
  },
  {
    title: "Mark a project as done",
    description: "Close the workflow only after delivery has actually been completed and the required checks are satisfied.",
    topLevel: "Operations",
    section: "Production workflow",
    category: "Workflow",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open Project Status for the client reservation.",
      "Confirm the payment is verified and the workflow stage is already Ready for Download.",
      "Verify that delivery media has been uploaded successfully.",
      "Use the done action only after those conditions are complete."
    ],
    tip: "If the done button is disabled, check payment verification, workflow stage, and uploaded media first."
  },
  {
    title: "Open a client chat from notifications",
    description: "Notifications can take you directly into the correct live chat or admin action when a new client issue appears.",
    topLevel: "Support",
    section: "Client communication",
    category: "Notifications",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open the admin notifications panel.",
      "Select the message or support-related notification.",
      "Jump directly into the related live chat thread or admin tab.",
      "Respond to the client and then mark or remove the notification."
    ],
    tip: "This is faster than manually searching for the correct client thread."
  },
  {
    title: "Remove newsletter subscribers",
    description: "Subscribers can be reviewed and removed from the newsletter list when needed for cleanup or compliance.",
    topLevel: "Support",
    section: "Announcements",
    category: "Newsletter",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open Admin Settings and review the subscriber list.",
      "Check whether the subscriber is active or already removed.",
      "Use Remove only when the subscriber should no longer receive newsletter messages.",
      "Refresh the subscriber list after the action if you need to confirm the updated totals."
    ],
    tip: "Removed subscribers are automatically skipped by newsletter sends."
  },
  {
    title: "Schedule advertisement campaigns",
    description: "Scheduled advertisements let you control when a promo starts and ends without manual republishing.",
    topLevel: "Support",
    section: "Announcements",
    category: "Advertisements",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open the advertisement composer.",
      "Set the start and end dates for the campaign.",
      "Confirm the campaign image, title, and target link are correct.",
      "Save the advertisement and review it in the advertisement list."
    ],
    tip: "Check the dates carefully so the campaign does not run earlier or longer than intended."
  },
  {
    title: "Use the receipt preview modal",
    description: "The receipt preview modal helps confirm the document before printing the final payment or refund copy.",
    topLevel: "Operations",
    section: "Documents",
    category: "Receipts",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open the print action from a payment or refund record.",
      "Review the receipt inside the preview modal.",
      "Confirm the status, amount, reference number, and client details.",
      "Use Print only after the preview content matches the payment state."
    ],
    tip: "The preview modal is the safest place to verify whether the document is a payment receipt or refund receipt."
  },
  {
    title: "Update admin profile settings",
    description: "Admin profile settings control your identity, account contact details, and some internal account preferences.",
    topLevel: "Accounts",
    section: "Client administration",
    category: "Account Settings",
    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [
      "Open Admin Settings.",
      "Review your email, phone, profile image, and other account details.",
      "Save changes only after the validation states show the fields are correct.",
      "Use Change Password or two-factor settings when security updates are needed."
    ],
    tip: "Keep your admin email valid because it is used for system and authentication flows."
  }
];

export function buildAdminHelpArticles() {
  return ADMIN_HELP_ARTICLES;
}
63 Frontend Admin

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/ChatComposer.jsx

Source file 63 of 111

export default function ChatComposer({
  value,
  onChange,
  onSend,
  disabled,
  sending = false
}) {
  const canSend = !disabled && !sending && Boolean(String(value || "").trim());

  return (
    <div className="mt-auto border-t border-slate-300 bg-transparent px-5 pb-3 pt-4 sm:px-8 sm:pb-4 sm:pt-5">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="rounded-[30px] border border-slate-300 bg-slate-100 p-2.5 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-end gap-2">
            <textarea
              value={value}
              onChange={(event) => onChange(event.target.value)}
              rows={1}
              disabled={disabled || sending}
              placeholder={disabled ? "Select a chat first" : "Type your reply..."}
              onKeyDown={(event) => {
                if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
                  event.preventDefault();
                  if (canSend) onSend();
                }
              }}
              className="max-h-28 min-h-[48px] flex-1 resize-none bg-transparent px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-slate-950 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-600 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-500"
            />
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={onSend}
              disabled={!canSend}
              className="flex h-11 w-11 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#3797f0] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#2287e6] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-slate-300"
              aria-label="Send message"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-paper-plane text-sm" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
64 Frontend Admin

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/ChatDetailsPanel.jsx

Source file 64 of 111

import { getAvatarFallback, getDisplayName, getProfileHandle } from "./utils";

function InfoCard({ icon, label, value, subtle = false }) {
  return (
    <div className={`rounded-[22px] border px-4 py-3.5 ${subtle ? "border-slate-200 bg-white" : "border-slate-200 bg-slate-50"}`}>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-slate-500 ring-1 ring-slate-200">
          <i className={icon} />
        </span>
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-500">{label}</p>
          <p className="mt-1 break-words text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900">{value}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function ChatDetailsPanel({
  thread,
  profile,
  online,
  stats = [],
  attachments = [],
  members = []
}) {
  if (!thread) return null;

  const profileName = profile?.fullName || getDisplayName(thread);
  const profileHandle = getProfileHandle(profile, thread);

  return (
    <aside className="hidden min-h-0 flex-col bg-white xl:flex">
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-5 py-6">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center border-b border-slate-200 pb-6 text-center">
          <div className="flex h-24 w-24 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-300 via-amber-200 to-orange-100 text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-slate-200">
            {profile?.avatarUrl ? (
              <img src={profile.avatarUrl} alt={profileName} className="h-full w-full object-cover" />
            ) : (
              getAvatarFallback(profileName)
            )}
          </div>
          <p className="mt-4 text-xl font-black text-slate-900">{profileName}</p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-500">@{profileHandle}</p>
          <div className={`mt-4 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] ${online ? "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700" : "bg-slate-100 text-slate-500"}`}>
            {online ? "Online" : "Offline"}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 space-y-6">
          <section>
            <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
              <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">Media</p>
              {attachments.length ? <button type="button" className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-300 transition-colors hover:text-blue-200">View all</button> : null}
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {attachments.length ? attachments.map((item) => (
                <div key={item.id} className="rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <span className={`mt-0.5 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl text-sm ${item.iconTone || "bg-white/8 text-slate-200"}`}>
                      <i className={item.icon} />
                    </span>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">{item.title}</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-400">{item.meta}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )) : <InfoCard icon="fa-regular fa-folder-open" label="No linked records" value="This conversation has no related booking or payment records yet." subtle />}
            </div>
          </section>

          <section>
            <p className="mb-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">Conversation Stats</p>
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {stats.map((item) => <InfoCard key={item.label} icon={item.icon} label={item.label} value={item.value} subtle />)}
            </div>
          </section>

          <section>
            <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
              <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">Members</p>
              <button type="button" className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-600/15 text-blue-300 transition-colors hover:bg-blue-600/25">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-plus" />
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {members.map((member) => (
                <div key={member.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3">
                  <div className={`flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full ${member.avatarTone || "bg-white text-slate-700"} text-sm font-black`}>
                    {member.avatarUrl ? <img src={member.avatarUrl} alt={member.name} className="h-full w-full object-cover" /> : member.initials}
                  </div>
                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">{member.name}</p>
                    <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-slate-400">{member.role}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>
      </div>
    </aside>
  );
}
65 Frontend Admin

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/ChatHeader.jsx

Source file 65 of 111

import { getAvatarFallback, getDisplayName } from "./utils";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";

export default function ChatHeader({
  thread,
  profile,
  online,
  onDelete,
  onHide,
  onBack,
  onProfileClick,
  deleting = false,
  showBackButton = false
}) {
  return (
    <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-slate-300 bg-transparent px-4 py-3 sm:px-5">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
        <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3">
          {showBackButton ? (
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={onBack}
              className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 lg:hidden"
              aria-label="Back to conversations"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-sm" />
            </button>
          ) : null}
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={onProfileClick}
            disabled={!profile}
            className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 text-left disabled:cursor-default"
            title={profile ? "View client profile" : undefined}
          >
            <div className="flex h-11 w-11 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-300 via-amber-200 to-orange-100 text-sm font-black text-slate-900 ring-1 ring-slate-200 transition-transform duration-200 enabled:hover:scale-[1.03]">
              {profile?.avatarUrl ? (
                <SafeAvatar
                  src={profile.avatarUrl}
                  fallbackSrc={profile?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                  alt={profile.fullName || getDisplayName(thread)}
                  className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                  fallback={getAvatarFallback(getDisplayName(thread))}
                />
              ) : (
                getAvatarFallback(getDisplayName(thread))
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold leading-none text-white">
                {thread ? getDisplayName(thread) : "Select a chat"}
              </p>
              <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs text-white/90">
                {thread ? (online ? "Active now" : (thread?.clientEmail || "Offline")) : "No active conversation selected"}
              </p>
            </div>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button
            type="button"
            disabled={!thread}
            onClick={onHide}
            className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-300"
            aria-label="Hide message panel"
            title="Hide message panel"
          >
            <i className="fa-solid fa-eye-slash text-sm" />
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            disabled={!thread || deleting}
            onClick={onDelete}
            className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 transition-colors hover:border-rose-300 hover:bg-rose-500 hover:text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-300"
            aria-label={deleting ? "Deleting chat" : "Delete chat"}
            title={deleting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete chat"}
          >
            <i className={`fa-solid ${deleting ? "fa-spinner fa-spin" : "fa-trash"} text-sm`} />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
66 Frontend Admin

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/ChatSidebar.jsx

Source file 66 of 111

import { formatThreadTimestamp, getAvatarFallback, getDisplayName } from "./utils";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
function SidebarState({ icon, title, description, action }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex h-full min-h-[180px] items-center justify-center px-5 py-6">
      <div className="max-w-xs text-center">
        <div className="mx-auto flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-200 text-slate-600">
          <i className={icon} />
        </div>
        <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-black text-white">{title}</p>
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-white/85">{description}</p>
        {action ? <div className="mt-4">{action}</div> : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function ChatSidebar({
  threads,
  clientResults = [],
  selectedThreadId,
  onSelectThread,
  onStartThread,
  threadProfile,
  searchValue,
  onSearchChange,
  loading,
  error,
  onRetry,
  panelHidden = false,
  onShowPanel,
  onBack
}) {
  return (
    <aside className="flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col overflow-hidden bg-transparent sm:border-r sm:border-slate-200">
      <div className="border-b border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-5 py-5">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {onBack ? (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={onBack}
                className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 sm:hidden"
                aria-label="Back"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-sm" />
              </button>
            ) : null}
            <div>
            <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white">Inbox</p>
            <p className="mt-1 text-[1.75rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">Messages</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-4">
          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-300 bg-slate-100 px-3 py-3 text-slate-600">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass text-xs" />
            <input
              value={searchValue}
              onChange={(event) => onSearchChange(event.target.value)}
              placeholder="Search..."
              className="w-full bg-transparent text-xs font-semibold text-slate-950 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500"
            />
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-transparent p-3">
        {loading ? null : null}

        {searchValue.trim() && clientResults.length ? (
          <div className="mb-3">
            <p className="mb-2 px-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/70">Clients</p>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {clientResults.map((client) => (
                <div
                  key={client?._id || client?.id || client?.email}
                  className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/15 bg-white/5 px-3.5 py-3.5"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
                    <div className="flex h-11 w-11 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 via-cyan-200 to-sky-100 text-sm font-black text-slate-900 ring-1 ring-slate-200">
                      {client?.avatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={client.avatarUrl}
                          fallbackSrc={client?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                          alt={client.fullName || "Client"}
                          className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                          fallback={getAvatarFallback(client.fullName || client.email || "C")}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        getAvatarFallback(client.fullName || client.email || "C")
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-extrabold text-white">{client?.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 truncate text-[11px] text-white/80">{client?.email || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => onStartThread?.(client)}
                      className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-emerald-300/40 bg-emerald-400/15 px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-emerald-200 transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-400/25"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-paper-plane text-[10px]" />
                      Start
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {!loading && error ? (
          <SidebarState
            icon="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation text-xl"
            title="Chats failed to load"
            description={error}
            action={(
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={onRetry}
                className="rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200"
              >
                Retry
              </button>
            )}
          />
        ) : null}

        {!loading && !error && !threads.length ? (
          <SidebarState
            icon="fa-regular fa-comments text-xl"
            title="No chats available"
            description="Use the header search to find chats or client profiles."
          />
        ) : null}

        {!loading && !error && threads.length ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {threads.map((thread) => {
              const threadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
              const active = threadId === selectedThreadId;
              const profile = threadProfile(thread);
              return (
                <button
                  key={threadId}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => onSelectThread(threadId)}
                  className={`w-full rounded-[24px] border px-3.5 py-3.5 text-left transition-all duration-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-300 ${active ? "border-white/20 bg-white/10 shadow-sm" : "border-transparent bg-transparent hover:border-white/15 hover:bg-white/5"}`}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2.5">
                    <div className="flex h-11 w-11 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 via-orange-200 to-amber-100 text-sm font-black text-slate-900 ring-1 ring-slate-200">
                      {profile?.avatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={profile.avatarUrl}
                          fallbackSrc={profile?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                          alt={profile.fullName || getDisplayName(thread)}
                          className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                          fallback={getAvatarFallback(getDisplayName(thread))}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        getAvatarFallback(getDisplayName(thread))
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                          <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-extrabold text-white">{getDisplayName(thread)}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 truncate text-[11px] text-white/85">
                            {thread?.lastMessage || "No messages yet"}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <span className="whitespace-nowrap text-[10px] font-bold text-white/85">
                          {formatThreadTimestamp(thread?.lastMessageAt || thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                        <p className="truncate text-[11px] text-white/80">
                          {thread?.clientEmail || threadId}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                          {thread?.unreadCount ? <span className="flex h-4 min-w-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500 px-1 text-[9px] font-black text-white">{thread.unreadCount}</span> : null}
                          {active ? <span className="h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#3797f0]" /> : null}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </aside>
  );
}
67 Frontend Admin

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/ConfirmDeleteModal.jsx

Source file 67 of 111

export default function ConfirmDeleteModal({
  open,
  thread,
  onCancel,
  onConfirm,
  deleting = false
}) {
  if (!open) return null;

  return (
    <div
      className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm"
      onClick={deleting ? undefined : onCancel}
    >
      <div
        className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-5 text-center shadow-2xl sm:p-6"
        onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
      >
        <div className="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500/15 text-red-300">
          <i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-2xl" />
        </div>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Delete chat?</h3>
        <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-300">
          This removes the entire conversation with {thread?.clientName || thread?.clientEmail || "this client"}.
        </p>
        <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-500">
          This action cannot be undone
        </p>
        <div className="mt-6 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={onCancel}
            disabled={deleting}
            className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
          >
            Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={onConfirm}
            disabled={deleting}
            className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-red-300"
          >
            {deleting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
