import { formatMessageTimestamp, getAvatarFallback } from "./utils";
import AiAssistantReplyContent from "../../../../shared/components/AiAssistantReplyContent";

export default function MessageBubble({ message, profile, thread, viewerRole = "admin" }) {
  const senderRole = String(message?.senderRole || "").toLowerCase();
  const isOwnMessage = senderRole === String(viewerRole || "").toLowerCase();
  const threadType = String(thread?.threadType || "").toLowerCase();
  const useAiReplyLayout = !isOwnMessage && threadType === "ai";
  const senderName = isOwnMessage
    ? (message?.senderName || profile?.fullName || thread?.clientName || "User")
    : (message?.senderName || "SnapQueue Team");

  return (
    <div className={`flex ${isOwnMessage ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"}`}>
      <div className={`flex max-w-[68%] items-end gap-1.5 sm:max-w-[70%] ${isOwnMessage ? "flex-row-reverse" : ""}`}>
        {!isOwnMessage ? (
          <div className="flex h-8 w-8 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-100 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-slate-200">
            {profile?.avatarUrl ? (
              <img
                src={profile.avatarUrl}
                alt={profile.fullName || thread?.clientName || "Client"}
                className="h-full w-full object-cover"
              />
            ) : (
              getAvatarFallback(message?.senderName || thread?.clientName || thread?.clientEmail || "C")
            )}
          </div>
        ) : null}
        <div className={`min-w-0 ${isOwnMessage ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
          <div className={`mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 px-1 ${isOwnMessage ? "flex-row-reverse" : ""}`}>
            <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/95">{senderName}</p>
            <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-white/70">{formatMessageTimestamp(message?.createdAt)}</p>
          </div>
          <div
            className={`inline-block max-w-full rounded-[22px] px-3.5 py-2.5 shadow-sm ${
              isOwnMessage
                ? "rounded-br-md bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#3797f0,#4f5bd5)] text-white"
                : "rounded-bl-md border border-slate-300 bg-slate-100 text-slate-900"
            }`}
          >
            {useAiReplyLayout ? (
              <AiAssistantReplyContent text={message?.text || ""} provider={message?.provider || ""} />
            ) : (
              <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-[13px] leading-relaxed">
                {message?.text || ""}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import MessageBubble from "./MessageBubble";
import { formatMessageDay } from "./utils";

function EmptyState({ icon, title, description, action, className = "" }) {
  return (
    <div className={`flex h-full min-h-[220px] items-center justify-center px-5 py-8 ${className}`}>
      <div className="max-w-sm text-center sm:max-w-md">
        <div className="mx-auto flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white/85 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-white/20 sm:h-20 sm:w-20">
          <i className={icon} />
        </div>
        <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-black text-white sm:mt-5 sm:text-3xl">{title}</p>
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-white/85 sm:mt-3 sm:text-lg sm:leading-8">{description}</p>
        {action ? <div className="mt-4">{action}</div> : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function buildGroups(messages) {
  const groups = [];
  let previousLabel = "";

  messages.forEach((message) => {
    const label = formatMessageDay(message?.createdAt);
    if (label && label !== previousLabel) {
      groups.push({ type: "separator", id: `sep-${label}`, label });
      previousLabel = label;
    }
    groups.push({ type: "message", id: String(message?._id || `${message?.createdAt}-${groups.length}`), message });
  });

  return groups;
}

export default function MessageList({
  thread,
  messages,
  loading,
  error,
  profile,
  onRetry,
  viewerRole = "admin"
}) {
  const scrollRef = useRef(null);
  const previousThreadIdRef = useRef("");
  const previousMessageCountRef = useRef(0);
  const shouldStickToBottomRef = useRef(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const node = scrollRef.current;
    if (!node) return undefined;

    const handleScroll = () => {
      const distanceFromBottom = node.scrollHeight - node.scrollTop - node.clientHeight;
      shouldStickToBottomRef.current = distanceFromBottom < 120;
    };

    handleScroll();
    node.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll);
    return () => node.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const node = scrollRef.current;
    if (!node) return;

    const currentThreadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
    const threadChanged = currentThreadId !== previousThreadIdRef.current;
    const messageCountChanged = messages.length !== previousMessageCountRef.current;
    const shouldScroll = threadChanged || (messageCountChanged && shouldStickToBottomRef.current);

    if (shouldScroll) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        node.scrollTop = node.scrollHeight;
      });
    }

    previousThreadIdRef.current = currentThreadId;
    previousMessageCountRef.current = messages.length;
  }, [messages, thread]);

  if (!thread) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-transparent">
        <EmptyState
          icon="fa-regular fa-comments text-2xl sm:text-4xl"
          title="Choose a conversation"
          description="Select a client from the chat list to view messages and reply."
          className="items-start pt-24 sm:pt-28"
        />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-transparent">
        <div className="mx-auto flex h-full w-full max-w-4xl items-center justify-center px-3 py-4" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-transparent">
        <EmptyState
          icon="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation text-2xl"
          title="Messages failed to load"
          description={error}
          action={(
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={onRetry}
              className="rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200"
            >
              Retry
            </button>
          )}
        />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!messages.length) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-transparent">
        <EmptyState
          icon="fa-regular fa-pen-to-square text-2xl"
          title="Start conversation"
          description="This chat has no messages yet. Send the first reply when you're ready."
        />
      </div>
    );
  }

  const items = buildGroups(messages);

  return (
    <div
      ref={scrollRef}
      className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-transparent px-4 py-5 sm:px-6"
    >
      <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-3">
        {items.map((item) => {
          if (item.type === "separator") {
            return (
              <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 py-1">
                <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-white/25" />
                <span className="rounded-full bg-white/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/90 ring-1 ring-white/20">
                  {item.label}
                </span>
                <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-white/25" />
              </div>
            );
          }
          return (
            <MessageBubble
              key={item.id}
              message={item.message}
              profile={profile}
              thread={thread}
              viewerRole={viewerRole}
            />
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/admin/components/chat/utils.js

Source file 70 of 111

export function getDisplayName(thread) {
  return thread?.clientName || thread?.clientEmail || "Client";
}

export function getProfileHandle(profile, thread) {
  const explicit = String(profile?.username || "").trim();
  if (explicit) return explicit.replace(/^@/, "");

  const email = String(profile?.email || thread?.clientEmail || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (email.includes("@")) return email.split("@")[0];

  return getDisplayName(thread).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "") || "client";
}

export function getAvatarFallback(value) {
  return String(value || "?").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "?";
}

export function isThreadOnline(thread) {
  const lastActivity = new Date(thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt || 0).getTime();
  if (Number.isNaN(lastActivity) || !lastActivity) return false;
  return Date.now() - lastActivity <= 5 * 60 * 1000;
}

export function formatThreadTimestamp(value) {
  if (!value) return "";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
  const now = new Date();
  if (date.toDateString() === now.toDateString()) {
    return date.toLocaleTimeString("en-US", {
      hour: "numeric",
      minute: "2-digit"
    });
  }
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric"
  });
}

export function formatMessageTimestamp(value) {
  if (!value) return "";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
  return date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    hour: "numeric",
    minute: "2-digit"
  });
}

export function formatMessageDay(value) {
  if (!value) return "";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    weekday: "short",
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric"
  });
}

import { useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import ChatComposer from "../components/chat/ChatComposer";
import ChatHeader from "../components/chat/ChatHeader";
import ChatSidebar from "../components/chat/ChatSidebar";
import ConfirmDeleteModal from "../components/chat/ConfirmDeleteModal";
import MessageList from "../components/chat/MessageList";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import { Loader, PageLoadingScreen } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { getAvatarFallback, getDisplayName, isThreadOnline } from "../components/chat/utils";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import { buildAdminHelpArticles } from "../adminHelpContent";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";
import { sanitizePhoneInput, isValidPhilippineMobileNumber, PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE } from "../../../shared/utils/phone";
import { downloadReceiptPdfFromHtml, isMobileReceiptViewport } from "../../../shared/utils/receiptPdf";

const EMPTY_AD_FORM = {
  id: "",
  title: "",
  description: "",
  imageUrl: "",
  linkUrl: "/",
  isActive: true,
  startDate: "",
  endDate: ""
};

const ADMIN_TABS = [
  { id: "analytics", label: "Dashboard", icon: "fa-solid fa-chart-line" },
  { id: "live-messages", label: "Live Messages", icon: "fa-solid fa-comments" },
  { id: "users", label: "Client Database", icon: "fa-solid fa-users" },
  { id: "manage-reservations", label: "Bookings", icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-check" },
  { id: "payments", label: "Payments", icon: "fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar" },
  { id: "order-status", label: "Project Status", icon: "fa-solid fa-diagram-project" },
  { id: "booking-history", label: "Booking History", icon: "fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left" },
  { id: "advertisements", label: "Advertisements", icon: "fa-solid fa-bullhorn" },
  { id: "admin-help", label: "Admin Help", icon: "fa-solid fa-circle-info" },
  { id: "profile-settings", label: "Profile Settings", icon: "fa-solid fa-user-gear" },
  { id: "system-settings", label: "System Settings", icon: "fa-solid fa-sliders" }
];
const ADMIN_TAB_IDS = new Set(ADMIN_TABS.map((tab) => tab.id));
const ADMIN_TAB_STORAGE_KEY = "snapqueue_admin_active_tab";

function getInitialAdminTab(search) {
  const rawSearch = search || (typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.search : "");
  const params = new URLSearchParams(rawSearch || "");
  const requestedTab = params.get("tab");
  if (requestedTab && ADMIN_TAB_IDS.has(requestedTab)) return requestedTab;
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    const storedTab = window.sessionStorage.getItem(ADMIN_TAB_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (storedTab && ADMIN_TAB_IDS.has(storedTab)) return storedTab;
  }
  return "analytics";
}

const SIDEBAR_ADMIN_TABS = ADMIN_TABS.filter((tab) => !["live-messages", "profile-settings", "system-settings", "admin-help"].includes(tab.id));
const DESKTOP_PRIMARY_TABS = SIDEBAR_ADMIN_TABS;

const WORKFLOW_STAGES = [
  { value: "approved", label: "Photographer On The Way" },
  { value: "shoot_completed", label: "Photoshoot Completed" },
  { value: "editing", label: "Editing" },
  { value: "ready_for_download", label: "Ready for Download" }
];

const SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS = {
  analytics: "Search clients...",
  users: "Search clients...",
  "manage-reservations": "Search bookings...",
  "order-status": "Search project status...",
  payments: "Search payments...",
  "booking-history": "Search booking history...",
  "live-messages": "Search threads...",
  advertisements: "Search advertisements...",
  "admin-help": "Search admin help...",
  "profile-settings": "Search profile settings...",
  "system-settings": "Search system settings..."
};

function normalizeComparablePasswordPart(value) {
  return String(value || "").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");
}

function getPasswordPersonalFragments({ fullName, email } = {}) {
  const fragments = new Set();
  const add = (value) => {
    const normalized = normalizeComparablePasswordPart(value);
    if (normalized.length >= 3) fragments.add(normalized);
  };

  String(fullName || "")
    .trim()
    .split(/\s+/)
    .map((part) => normalizeComparablePasswordPart(part))
    .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
    .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));

  const [localPart = ""] = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase().split("@");
  localPart
    .split(/[._%+-]+/)
    .map((part) => normalizeComparablePasswordPart(part))
    .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
    .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));

  add(fullName);
  add(localPart);
  return Array.from(fragments);
}

function passwordChecks(value, context = {}) {
  const password = String(value || "");
  return [
    { label: "At least 8 characters", valid: password.length >= 8 },
    { label: "At least one lowercase letter", valid: /[a-z]/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one number", valid: /\d/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one special character", valid: /[^A-Za-z\d]/.test(password) },
    { label: "No spaces", valid: !/\s/.test(password) }
  ];
}

function isStrongPassword(value, context = {}) {
  return passwordChecks(value, context).every((item) => item.valid);
}

const EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE = {
  step: "credentials",
  challengeId: "",
  code: "",
  delivery: "",
  email: "",
  expiresInSeconds: 0,
  devCode: "",
  error: "",
  sending: false,
  verifying: false
};

const LIVE_CHAT_HIDDEN_STORAGE_KEY = "admin_live_chat_hidden";
const ADMIN_MESSAGE_SEEN_STORAGE_PREFIX = "sq_admin_seen_threads_";
const CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"];
const ADMIN_HELP_CATEGORY_NAV = [
  { key: "Bookings", label: "Bookings", icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-check" },
  { key: "Payments", label: "Payments", icon: "fa-solid fa-wallet" },
  { key: "Operations", label: "Operations", icon: "fa-solid fa-diagram-project" },
  { key: "Support", label: "Support", icon: "fa-solid fa-comments" },
  { key: "Accounts", label: "Accounts", icon: "fa-solid fa-users" }
];
const ADMIN_HELP_CATEGORY_CARDS = [
  {
    key: "Bookings",
    title: "Bookings",
    description: "Review booking requests, approvals, and reservation changes with confidence.",
    icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-check"
  },
  {
    key: "Payments",
    title: "Payments",
    description: "Verify proofs, process refunds, and confirm payment statuses quickly.",
    icon: "fa-solid fa-wallet"
  },
  {
    key: "Operations",
    title: "Operations",
    description: "Track production workflow stages, delivery steps, and status updates.",
    icon: "fa-solid fa-diagram-project"
  },
  {
    key: "Support",
    title: "Support",
    description: "Handle client chat, notifications, and broadcast updates from one place.",
    icon: "fa-solid fa-comments"
  },
  {
    key: "Accounts",
    title: "Accounts",
    description: "Manage client profiles, booking history, and admin account settings.",
    icon: "fa-solid fa-users"
  }
];

function getAdminStorageIdentity(admin) {
  return String(
    admin?._id ||
    admin?.id ||
    admin?.sub ||
    (typeof admin?.email === "string" ? admin.email.trim().toLowerCase() : "") ||
    "default"
  ).trim() || "default";
}

function getAdminSeenNotifStorageKey(admin) {
  return `sq_admin_seen_notifications_${getAdminStorageIdentity(admin)}`;
}

function getAdminDismissedNotifStorageKey(admin) {
  return `sq_admin_dismissed_notifications_${getAdminStorageIdentity(admin)}`;
}

function loadAdminSeenNotifIds(admin) {
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(getAdminSeenNotifStorageKey(admin));
    const items = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    return Array.isArray(items) ? items.map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean) : [];
  } catch (_error) {
    return [];
  }
}

function saveAdminSeenNotifIds(admin, ids) {
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(getAdminSeenNotifStorageKey(admin), JSON.stringify((ids || []).map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 160)));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep dashboard usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

function loadAdminDismissedNotifIds(admin) {
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(getAdminDismissedNotifStorageKey(admin));
    const items = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    return Array.isArray(items) ? items.map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean) : [];
  } catch (_error) {
    return [];
  }
}

function saveAdminDismissedNotifIds(admin, ids) {
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(getAdminDismissedNotifStorageKey(admin), JSON.stringify((ids || []).map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 160)));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep dashboard usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

function getAdminMessageSeenStorageKey(admin) {
  return `${ADMIN_MESSAGE_SEEN_STORAGE_PREFIX}${String(admin?._id || admin?.id || admin?.sub || admin?.email || "default").trim().toLowerCase()}`;
}

function loadStoredAdminThreadSeenMap(storageKey) {
  if (!storageKey || typeof window === "undefined") return {};
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
    const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
    return parsed && typeof parsed === "object" && !Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : {};
  } catch (_error) {
    return {};
  }
}

function saveStoredAdminThreadSeenMap(storageKey, value) {
  if (!storageKey || typeof window === "undefined") return;
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(value && typeof value === "object" ? value : {}));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep dashboard usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

function validAdminThreadTimestamp(value) {
  const time = new Date(value || "").getTime();
  return Number.isFinite(time) ? time : 0;
}

function adminThreadUnreadFallback(thread, seenMap) {
  if (!thread) return 0;
  const backendUnread = Number(thread?.unreadCount || 0);
  const threadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
  if (!threadId) return 0;
  const latestActivity = validAdminThreadTimestamp(thread?.lastMessageAt || thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt);
  const seenAt = validAdminThreadTimestamp(seenMap?.[threadId]);
  if (backendUnread > 0) {
    return latestActivity > seenAt ? backendUnread : 0;
  }
  return latestActivity > seenAt ? 1 : 0;
}

function formatCurrency(amount, currency = "PHP") {
  const value = Number(amount || 0);
  return `${currency} ${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
}

function formatDateTime(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "Pending";
  return date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric",
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit"
  });
}

function formatDate(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "Pending";
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric"
  });
}

function formatDateLabel(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "Pending";
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "long",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric"
  });
}

function formatDateOnlyInput(value) {
  if (!value) return "";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
  const local = new Date(date.getTime() - date.getTimezoneOffset() * 60000);
  return local.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function getMonthKey(value) {
  return String(value || "").slice(0, 7);
}

function addMonths(monthKey, amount) {
  const [yearText, monthText] = String(monthKey || "").split("-");
  const date = new Date(Number(yearText), Number(monthText) - 1 + amount, 1);
  return `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`;
}

function formatMonthLabel(monthKey) {
  const [yearText, monthText] = String(monthKey || "").split("-");
  const date = new Date(Number(yearText), Number(monthText) - 1, 1);
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "long", year: "numeric" });
}

function buildCalendarDays(monthKey) {
  const [yearText, monthText] = String(monthKey || "").split("-");
  const year = Number(yearText);
  const monthIndex = Number(monthText) - 1;
  const firstDay = new Date(year, monthIndex, 1);
  const offset = (firstDay.getDay() + 6) % 7;
  const startDate = new Date(year, monthIndex, 1 - offset);
  return Array.from({ length: 42 }, (_, index) => {
    const current = new Date(startDate);
    current.setDate(startDate.getDate() + index);
    return {
      dateKey: `${current.getFullYear()}-${String(current.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}-${String(current.getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}`,
      day: current.getDate(),
      inMonth: current.getMonth() === monthIndex
    };
  });
}

function getValidDate(value) {
  if (!value) return null;
  const date = new Date(value);
  return Number.isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date;
}

function formatNotificationAge(value) {
  const date = getValidDate(value);
  if (!date) return "Recent";
  const now = Date.now();
  const diffMs = Math.max(0, now - date.getTime());
  const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));

  if (diffHours < 1) return "Just now";
  if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours}h`;
  if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays}d`;

  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric"
  });
}

function getTodayDateKey() {
  return formatDateOnlyInput(new Date());
}

function getReservationBookedDateKey(reservation) {
  return formatDateOnlyInput(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
}

function getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation) {
  const todayDateKey = getTodayDateKey();
  const bookedDateKey = getReservationBookedDateKey(reservation);
  if (!bookedDateKey) return todayDateKey;
  return bookedDateKey > todayDateKey ? bookedDateKey : todayDateKey;
}

function productionCalendarDayClass(day, selectedDate, bookedDate, minDate) {
  if (!day.inMonth) return "border-slate-100 bg-slate-50 text-slate-300";
  if (day.dateKey < minDate) return "cursor-not-allowed border-slate-100 bg-slate-50 text-slate-300";
  if (selectedDate === day.dateKey && bookedDate === day.dateKey) {
    return "border-amber-300 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff8e6,#fef3c7)] text-amber-900 ring-2 ring-amber-400";
  }
  if (selectedDate === day.dateKey) return "border-slate-900 bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-slate-500";
  if (bookedDate === day.dateKey) {
    return "border-blue-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe)] text-blue-900 ring-1 ring-blue-300";
  }
  return "border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-900 hover:border-slate-400";
}

function dateKeyRangeOverlaps(startA, endA, startB, endB) {
  if (!startA || !endA || !startB || !endB) return false;
  return startA <= endB && startB <= endA;
}

function dateKeyInRange(dateKey, startDate, endDate) {
  if (!dateKey || !startDate || !endDate) return false;
  return startDate <= dateKey && dateKey <= endDate;
}

function packageLabel(item) {
  const raw = String(item?.packageName || item?.package || item?.service || "Package").trim();
  const normalized = raw.toLowerCase();
  if (!raw) return "Package";
  if (normalized === "basic") return "Basic Package";
  if (normalized === "standard") return "Standard Package";
  if (normalized === "premium") return "Premium Package";
  if (normalized === "custom") return "Custom Package";
  return raw.replace(/\b\w+/g, (segment) => segment.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + segment.slice(1).toLowerCase());
}

function reservationAddress(reservation) {
  return [
    reservation?.street,
    reservation?.barangay,
    reservation?.city,
    reservation?.province
  ].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "Address not provided";
}

function getDisplayReservationId(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "-").trim() || "-";
}

function getDisplayClientId(user) {
  const raw = String(user?.clientId || user?._id || user?.id || "").trim();
  const normalized = raw.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, "").toUpperCase();
  if (!normalized) return "SQUser-CLIENT";
  return `SQUser-${normalized.slice(-10)}`;
}

function getInitial(value) {
  return String(value || "?").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "?";
}

function DefaultDatabaseAvatar({ containerClassName = "", iconClassName = "", badgeClassName = "" }) {
  return (
    <div className={`relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-[#2D60FF] text-white shadow-inner ${containerClassName}`}>
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(255,255,255,0.16),transparent_42%)]" />
      <div className={`relative z-[1] flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center ${iconClassName}`}>
        <i className="fa-regular fa-user" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function errorMessage(error, fallback) {
  return error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || fallback;
}

function readFileAsDataUrl(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ""));
    reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to read uploaded image."));
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

function printHtmlDocument(html, onError) {
  if (!html) {
    onError?.();
    return;
  }
  const frame = document.createElement("iframe");
  frame.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  frame.style.position = "fixed";
  frame.style.right = "0";
  frame.style.bottom = "0";
  frame.style.width = "0";
  frame.style.height = "0";
  frame.style.border = "0";
  frame.style.opacity = "0";
  frame.style.pointerEvents = "none";
  document.body.appendChild(frame);
  const cleanup = () => window.setTimeout(() => frame.remove(), 1000);
  try {
    frame.onload = () => {
      try {
        frame.contentWindow?.focus();
        frame.contentWindow?.print();
      } catch (_error) {
        onError?.();
      } finally {
        cleanup();
      }
    };
    frame.srcdoc = html;
  } catch (_error) {
    cleanup();
    onError?.();
  }
}

function loadImageFromDataUrl(dataUrl) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const image = new Image();
    image.onload = () => resolve(image);
    image.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to load uploaded image."));
    image.src = dataUrl;
  });
}

async function readCompressedImageDataUrl(file, options = {}) {
  const {
    maxWidth = 1280,
    maxHeight = 1280,
    quality = 0.76,
    maxOutputLength = 1_200_000
  } = options;

  const sourceDataUrl = await readFileAsDataUrl(file);
  if (!sourceDataUrl.startsWith("data:image/")) {
    throw new Error("Invalid image file.");
  }

  const image = await loadImageFromDataUrl(sourceDataUrl);
  const widthRatio = maxWidth / Math.max(1, image.width);
  const heightRatio = maxHeight / Math.max(1, image.height);
  const ratio = Math.min(1, widthRatio, heightRatio);
  const targetWidth = Math.max(1, Math.round(image.width * ratio));
  const targetHeight = Math.max(1, Math.round(image.height * ratio));

  const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
  canvas.width = targetWidth;
  canvas.height = targetHeight;

  const context = canvas.getContext("2d");
  if (!context) throw new Error("Image compression is not supported in this browser.");

  context.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
  context.fillRect(0, 0, targetWidth, targetHeight);
  context.drawImage(image, 0, 0, targetWidth, targetHeight);

  let currentQuality = quality;
  let result = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", currentQuality);

  while (result.length > maxOutputLength && currentQuality > 0.35) {
    currentQuality = Number((currentQuality - 0.08).toFixed(2));
    result = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", currentQuality);
  }

  if (result.length > maxOutputLength) {
    throw new Error("Refund proof image is too large. Use a smaller screenshot or crop the image first.");
  }

  return result;
}

function parseAdjustments(text) {
  return String(text || "")
    .split(/\n|,/)
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((line) => {
      const [label, amount] = line.split(":");
      return { label: String(label || "").trim(), amount: Number(String(amount || "").trim()) };
    })
    .filter((item) => item.label && Number.isFinite(item.amount));
}

function paymentReservation(payment, reservationMap) {
  const raw = payment?.reservationId;
  if (raw && typeof raw === "object") return raw;
  return reservationMap.get(String(raw || "")) || null;
}

function getEventLabel(reservation) {
  const eventType = String(reservation?.eventType || "").trim();
  if (eventType.toLowerCase() === "other" && String(reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "").trim()) {
    return `Other - ${reservation.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim()}`;
  }
  return eventType || "Event";
}

function detailValue(value, fallback = "-") {
  const text = String(value ?? "").trim();
  return text || fallback;
}

function getStatusClasses(status) {
  const normalized = String(status || "pending").toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === "approved") return "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200";
  if (normalized === "rejected") return "bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";
  if (normalized === "completed") return "bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200";
  return "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200";
}

function getWorkflowStageLabel(reservation) {
  const stage = String(reservation?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase();
  if (stage === "approved") return "Photographer On The Way";
  if (stage === "shoot_completed") return "Photoshoot Completed";
  if (stage === "editing") return "Editing";
  if (stage === "ready_for_download") return "Ready for Download";
  return "Awaiting Approval";
}

function cx(...parts) {
  return parts.filter(Boolean).join(" ");
}

const ADMIN_EMAIL_PATTERN = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const ADMIN_PHONE_PATTERN = /^(09|\+639)\d{9}$/;

function validationLabelClass(hasError, hasValue) {
  if (hasError) return "mb-2 block text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-rose-300";
  if (hasValue) return "mb-2 block text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-emerald-300";
  return "mb-2 block text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55";
}

function validationInputClass(hasError, hasValue) {
  const base = "w-full rounded-[1.5rem] border bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all";
  if (hasError) return `${base} field-shake border-rose-400 bg-rose-50 focus:border-rose-500`;
  if (hasValue) return `${base} border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-50 focus:border-emerald-500`;
  return `${base} border-white/15 focus:border-blue-600`;
}

  function validationHelperClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-2 text-xs font-semibold ${hasError ? "text-rose-300" : "text-emerald-300"}`;
}

function validateAdminProfileForm(values = {}) {
  const fullName = String(values.fullName || "").trim();
  const email = String(values.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const phone = sanitizePhoneInput(values.phone);
  return {
    fullName: fullName ? (fullName.length >= 2 ? "" : "Please enter a valid full name.") : "",
    email: email ? (ADMIN_EMAIL_PATTERN.test(email) ? "" : "Please enter a valid email address.") : "Please enter a valid email address.",
    phone: phone ? (isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(phone) ? "" : PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE) : "Phone number is required.",
    bio: ""
  };
}

function shouldShowAdminProfileValidation(fieldName, touchedState, attempted) {
  return Boolean(touchedState?.[fieldName] || attempted);
}

function BellIcon({ className = "w-4 h-4 sm:w-5 sm:h-5" }) {
  return (
    <svg className={className} fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 17h5l-1.4-1.4A2 2 0 0118 14.2V11a6 6 0 10-12 0v3.2a2 2 0 01-.6 1.4L4 17h5" />
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.5 17a2.5 2.5 0 005 0" />
    </svg>
  );
}

function Icon({ name, className = "w-5 h-5" }) {
  const props = { className, fill: "none", stroke: "currentColor", strokeWidth: "2", viewBox: "0 0 24 24" };
  switch (name) {
    case "menu":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" /></svg>;
    case "search":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35" /></svg>;
    case "camera":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 8.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 5.5 6h2.1a1 1 0 0 0 .8-.4l.8-1.1A1 1 0 0 1 10 4h4a1 1 0 0 1 .8.5l.8 1.1a1 1 0 0 0 .8.4h2.1A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 22 8.5v8A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 19.5 19h-14A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 3 16.5z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12.5" r="3.5" /></svg>;
    case "comments":
      return <i className={`fa-solid fa-comments ${className}`} aria-hidden="true" />;
    case "bell":
      return <BellIcon className={className} />;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

function MessageIcon({ className = "w-4 h-4 sm:w-5 sm:h-5" }) {
  return (
    <svg className={className} fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.5 7.5h11a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H11l-4.5 3v-3H6.5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2Z" />
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8.5 11h7M8.5 14h5" />
    </svg>
  );
}

function AdminNavIcon({ icon, active = false }) {
  return (
    <span className={cx("flex h-7 w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[1.1rem] transition-transform duration-200", active ? "scale-105" : "group-hover/nav:scale-105")}>
      <i className={icon} />
    </span>
  );
}

function getTimeGreeting() {
  const hour = new Date().getHours();
  if (hour < 12) return "Good morning";
  if (hour < 18) return "Good afternoon";
  return "Good evening";
}

function paymentStatusState(payment, reservation) {
  const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if (paymentStatus === "verified") return "verified";
  if (paymentStatus === "refunded") return "refunded";
  if (paymentStatus === "needs_review") return "needs_review";
  if (["pending", "processing"].includes(paymentStatus)) return "submitted";
  if (["rejected", "cancelled", "expired"].includes(paymentStatus)) return "failed";
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase();
  if (reservationStatus === "paid") return "verified";
  if (reservationStatus === "refunded") return "refunded";
  if (reservationStatus === "processing") return "submitted";
  if (["failed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus)) return "failed";
  return "none";
}

function paymentStatusLabel(state) {
  if (state === "verified") return "Verified";
  if (state === "needs_review") return "Needs Review";
  if (state === "submitted") return "Awaiting Verification";
  if (state === "failed") return "Failed / Rejected";
  if (state === "refunded") return "Refunded";
  return "No Payment";
}

function paymentStatusClasses(state) {
  if (state === "verified") return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200";
  if (state === "needs_review") return "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border-orange-200";
  if (state === "submitted") return "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200";
  if (state === "failed") return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200";
  if (state === "refunded") return "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200";
  return "bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border-slate-200";
}

function getRefundReceiptStatus(payment) {
  const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "").toLowerCase();
  if (refundStatus === "processed") return "REFUNDED";
  if (refundStatus && refundStatus !== "none") return refundStatus.toUpperCase();
  return String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded" ? "REFUNDED" : "PENDING";
}

function buildPaymentReceiptHtml(reservation, payment) {
  const amount = formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice || reservation?.packagePrice || 0, reservation?.currency || "PHP");
  const issuedAt = formatDateTime(payment?.paidAt || payment?.updatedAt || payment?.createdAt);
  const refundProcessedAt = formatDateTime(payment?.refundProcessedAt || payment?.refundResolvedAt || "");
  const payoutInfo = `${String(payment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase()} ${String(payment?.refundPayoutNumber || "")}`.trim();
  const clientName = reservation?.fullName || "-";
  const reservationId = reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "-";
  const packageLabel = reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "-";
  const eventLabel = getEventLabel(reservation);
  const eventDate = formatDateTime(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
  const paymentMethod = String(payment?.method || "-").toUpperCase();
  const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || "pending").toUpperCase();
  const refundStatus = getRefundReceiptStatus(payment);
  const hasRefundRecord = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase() !== "none" || String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded";
  const isRefundReceipt = hasRefundRecord && refundStatus !== "PENDING";
  const receiptNumber = isRefundReceipt ? payment?.refundReferenceNumber || payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "N/A" : payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "N/A";
  const issuedLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Date" : "Issued";
  const statusLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Status" : "Status";
  const title = isRefundReceipt ? "SnapQueue Refund Receipt" : "SnapQueue Payment Receipt";
  const subtitle = isRefundReceipt ? "Client copy of refund transaction record" : "Admin copy of payment submission record";
  const summaryTitle = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Summary" : "Receipt Summary";
  const totalsTitle = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Totals" : "Payment Totals";
  const paymentOrRefundMethodLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Method" : "Payment Method";
  const paymentOrRefundStatusLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Status" : "Receipt Status";
  const importantNote = isRefundReceipt
    ? "Verify all reservation and refund details before printing. This receipt is generated from SnapQueue and serves as the client's refund transaction record. <strong>This receipt cannot be used for tax claims.</strong>"
    : "Verify all reservation, payment, and refund details before printing. This admin receipt is generated from the SnapQueue dashboard and serves as the official internal payment document. <strong>This receipt cannot be used for tax claims.</strong>";
  const receiptAmountRowLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Refund Amount" : "Total Paid";
  const baseAmountRowLabel = isRefundReceipt ? "Original Payment" : "Base Amount";
  const secondRowDescription = isRefundReceipt
    ? `Refund transaction for reservation ${reservationId}<br />Payout account: ${payoutInfo || "-"}<br />Original payment ref: ${payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "N/A"}`
    : `Refund status: ${refundStatus}<br />Payout account: ${payoutInfo || "-"}<br />Reference: ${payment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-"}`;
  const firstRowDescription = isRefundReceipt
    ? `Original payment for ${packageLabel}<br />Event: ${eventLabel}<br />Customer: ${clientName}`
    : `${packageLabel}<br />Event: ${eventLabel}<br />Customer: ${clientName}`;
  const secondRowMethod = isRefundReceipt ? String(payment?.refundPayoutMethod || payment?.method || "-").toUpperCase() : paymentMethod;
  const secondRowDate = isRefundReceipt ? refundProcessedAt || issuedAt : refundProcessedAt || issuedAt;

  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
  <html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>SnapQueue</title>
    <style>
      @page{size:A4 portrait;margin:0}
      html,body{margin:0;padding:0;background:#fff;color:#111827;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif}
      body{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start}
      .paper{width:210mm;min-height:297mm;box-sizing:border-box;background:#fff}
      .receipt{box-sizing:border-box;width:100%;min-height:297mm;padding:10mm 10mm 12mm}
      .top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 0.8fr;gap:20mm;font-size:7.2px;line-height:1.2}
      .meta{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
      .meta td{padding:1.2px 0;vertical-align:top}
      .meta .label{width:24mm;font-weight:700}
      .meta .colon{width:4mm;text-align:center}
      .title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin:0}
      .subtitle{margin:1px 0 7px;font-size:7px;color:#475569}
      .grid{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:10mm;table-layout:fixed;font-size:6.8px;line-height:1.15}
      .grid th,.grid td{border:0.6px solid #000;padding:3px 4px;min-height:8.8mm;height:8.8mm;vertical-align:top;word-break:break-word;overflow-wrap:anywhere}
      .grid th{text-align:center;font-weight:700;background:#f3f4f6}
      .grid .nowrap{white-space:nowrap;word-break:normal;overflow-wrap:normal}
      .center{text-align:center}
      .summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12mm;margin-top:12mm;font-size:6.9px;line-height:1.25}
      .summary-title{margin:0 0 4mm;font-size:8.4px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}
      .summary table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
      .summary td{padding:1.2px 0;vertical-align:top}
      .summary td:last-child{text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;padding-left:8mm}
      .notes{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.45fr 0.55fr;gap:14mm;margin-top:18mm;font-size:6.2px;line-height:1.28}
      .notes table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
      .notes td{padding:1.2px 0}
      .notes td:last-child{text-align:right;padding-left:8mm;white-space:nowrap}
      @media print{body{display:block}}
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="paper">
      <div class="receipt">
        <div class="top">
          <div>
            <div class="title">${title}</div>
            <p class="subtitle">${subtitle}</p>
            <table class="meta">
              <tr><td class="label">Receipt No.</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${receiptNumber}</td></tr>
              <tr><td class="label">Ref ID</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${reservationId}</td></tr>
              <tr><td class="label">${issuedLabel}</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${isRefundReceipt ? refundProcessedAt || issuedAt : issuedAt}</td></tr>
              <tr><td class="label">${statusLabel}</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${isRefundReceipt ? refundStatus : paymentStatus}</td></tr>
            </table>
          </div>
          <table class="meta">
            <tr><td class="label">Client Name</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${clientName}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Package</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${packageLabel}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Event Type</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${eventLabel}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Contact</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${reservation?.email || reservation?.phone || "-"}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>

        <table class="grid">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style="width:6%">Item</th>
              <th style="width:18%">Reference</th>
              <th style="width:24%">Description</th>
              <th style="width:8%">Method</th>
              <th style="width:14%">Status</th>
              <th style="width:18%">Date / Time</th>
              <th style="width:12%">Amount</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <td class="center">01</td>
              <td>${reservationId}</td>
              <td>${firstRowDescription}</td>
              <td class="center nowrap">${paymentMethod}</td>
              <td class="center">${isRefundReceipt ? "VERIFIED" : paymentStatus}</td>
              <td class="nowrap">${eventDate}</td>
              <td class="center nowrap">${amount}</td>
            </tr>
              ${hasRefundRecord ? `<tr>
              <td class="center">02</td>
              <td>${receiptNumber}</td>
              <td>${secondRowDescription}</td>
              <td class="center nowrap">${secondRowMethod}</td>
              <td class="center">${refundStatus}</td>
              <td class="nowrap">${secondRowDate}</td>
              <td class="center nowrap">${amount}</td>
            </tr>` : ""}
          </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="summary">
          <div>
            <p class="summary-title">${summaryTitle}</p>
            <table class="summary-table">
              <tr><td>Package / Service</td><td>${packageLabel}</td></tr>
              <tr><td>Event Type</td><td>${eventLabel}</td></tr>
              <tr><td>Event Schedule</td><td>${eventDate}</td></tr>
              <tr><td>${paymentOrRefundMethodLabel}</td><td>${isRefundReceipt ? secondRowMethod : paymentMethod}</td></tr>
              ${hasRefundRecord && isRefundReceipt ? `<tr><td>Refund Reference</td><td>${receiptNumber}</td></tr>` : ""}
              ${hasRefundRecord ? `<tr><td>Refund Status</td><td>${refundStatus}</td></tr>` : ""}
              ${hasRefundRecord ? `<tr><td>Admin Note</td><td>${payment?.refundAdminNote || "-"}</td></tr>` : ""}
            </table>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p class="summary-title">${totalsTitle}</p>
            <table class="summary-table">
              <tr><td>${baseAmountRowLabel}</td><td>${amount}</td></tr>
              ${isRefundReceipt ? `<tr><td>Refund Amount</td><td>${amount}</td></tr>` : ""}
              <tr><td>Processing Fee</td><td>PHP 0.00</td></tr>
              <tr class="strong"><td>${receiptAmountRowLabel}</td><td>${amount}</td></tr>
              <tr><td>${paymentOrRefundStatusLabel}</td><td>${isRefundReceipt ? refundStatus : paymentStatus}</td></tr>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="notes">
          <div>
            <span style="font-weight:700">IMPORTANT:</span>
            ${importantNote}
          </div>
          <div>
            <table>
              <tr><td>Date Printed</td><td>${isRefundReceipt ? refundProcessedAt || issuedAt : issuedAt}</td></tr>
              <tr><td>Prepared By</td><td>SnapQueue Admin</td></tr>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
  </html>`;
}

function MiniRevenueChart({ points }) {
  const [hoveredPoint, setHoveredPoint] = useState(null);
  const svgRef = useRef(null);
  const peak = Math.max(...points.map((point) => point.value), 1);
  const width = 760;
  const height = 260;
  const paddingLeft = 78;
  const paddingRight = 18;
  const paddingTop = 12;
  const paddingBottom = 32;
  const steps = 4;
  const yMax = peak <= 0 ? 1 : peak;
  const innerHeight = height - paddingTop - paddingBottom;
  const innerWidth = width - paddingLeft - paddingRight;
  const chartPoints = points.map((point, index) => {
    const x = paddingLeft + (points.length === 1 ? innerWidth / 2 : (innerWidth * index) / Math.max(points.length - 1, 1));
    const y = paddingTop + innerHeight - ((point.value || 0) / yMax) * innerHeight;
    return { ...point, x, y };
  });
  const smoothPath = chartPoints.reduce((path, point, index, array) => {
    if (index === 0) return `M ${point.x} ${point.y}`;
    const previous = array[index - 1];
    const controlX = (previous.x + point.x) / 2;
    return `${path} C ${controlX} ${previous.y}, ${controlX} ${point.y}, ${point.x} ${point.y}`;
  }, "");
  const linePath = smoothPath;
  const areaPath = chartPoints.length
    ? `${linePath} L ${chartPoints[chartPoints.length - 1].x} ${height - paddingBottom} L ${chartPoints[0].x} ${height - paddingBottom} Z`
    : "";
  const gridLines = Array.from({ length: steps + 1 }, (_, index) => {
    const value = (yMax / steps) * (steps - index);
    const y = paddingTop + (innerHeight / steps) * index;
    return {
      key: `grid-${index}`,
      y,
      label: formatCurrency(Math.round(value))
    };
  });
  const animationKey = points.map((point) => `${point.label}:${point.value}`).join("|");
  function syncHoveredPointFromClientX(clientX) {
    if (!svgRef.current || !chartPoints.length) return;
    const rect = svgRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (!rect.width) return;
    const relativeX = ((clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * width;
    const nearest = chartPoints.reduce((closest, point) => (
      Math.abs(point.x - relativeX) < Math.abs(closest.x - relativeX) ? point : closest
    ), chartPoints[0]);
    setHoveredPoint(nearest);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    setHoveredPoint(null);
  }, [points]);

  return (
    <div className="h-full rounded-2xl bg-transparent">
      <div className="relative h-full w-full">
        {hoveredPoint ? (
          <div
            className="pointer-events-none absolute z-10 min-w-[7.5rem] rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-center shadow-[0_14px_28px_rgba(15,23,42,0.22)] transition-all duration-200 ease-out"
            style={{
              left: `${(hoveredPoint.x / width) * 100}%`,
              top: `${(hoveredPoint.y / height) * 100}%`,
              transform: "translate(-50%, calc(-100% - 12px)) scale(1)"
            }}
          >
            <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-900">{hoveredPoint.label}</p>
            <p className="mt-0.5 text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-600">{formatCurrency(Math.round(hoveredPoint.value || 0))}</p>
          </div>
        ) : null}
        <svg ref={svgRef} viewBox={`0 0 ${width} ${height}`} preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" className="h-full w-full">
          <defs>
            <linearGradient id="revenueAreaGradient" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
              <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#38bdf8" stopOpacity="0.22" />
              <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#2563eb" stopOpacity="0.02" />
            </linearGradient>
            <filter id="revenueLineGlow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
              <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3.5" result="blur" />
              <feMerge>
                <feMergeNode in="blur" />
                <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
              </feMerge>
            </filter>
          </defs>

          {gridLines.map((line) => (
            <g key={line.key}>
              <line x1={paddingLeft} y1={line.y} x2={width - paddingRight} y2={line.y} stroke="rgba(148,163,184,0.20)" strokeWidth="1" />
              <text x={paddingLeft - 8} y={line.y + 3} textAnchor="end" fontSize="10" fontWeight="700" fill="rgba(148,163,184,0.82)">
                {line.label}
              </text>
            </g>
          ))}

          <line x1={paddingLeft} y1={height - paddingBottom} x2={width - paddingRight} y2={height - paddingBottom} stroke="rgba(148,163,184,0.30)" strokeWidth="1" />
          {areaPath ? <path d={areaPath} fill="url(#revenueAreaGradient)" className="transition-opacity duration-200 ease-out" /> : null}
          {linePath ? (
            <>
              <path
                key={`glow-${animationKey}`}
                d={linePath}
                fill="none"
                stroke="rgba(56,189,248,0.34)"
                strokeWidth={hoveredPoint ? "7.5" : "6"}
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                filter="url(#revenueLineGlow)"
                className="admin-chart-line"
                pathLength="100"
                style={{ transition: "opacity 180ms ease-out, stroke-width 180ms ease-out" }}
              />
              <path
                key={`line-${animationKey}`}
                d={linePath}
                fill="none"
                stroke="#3b82f6"
                strokeWidth={hoveredPoint ? "4.5" : "3.5"}
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                className="admin-chart-line"
                pathLength="100"
                style={{
                  transition: "stroke-width 180ms ease-out, filter 180ms ease-out",
                  filter: hoveredPoint ? "drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(59,130,246,0.38))" : "none"
                }}
              />
              <path
                d={linePath}
                fill="none"
                stroke="transparent"
                strokeWidth="22"
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                onMouseMove={(event) => syncHoveredPointFromClientX(event.clientX)}
                onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredPoint(null)}
              />
            </>
          ) : null}
          {chartPoints.map((point) => (
            <g key={`${animationKey}-${point.label}`}>
              <circle cx={point.x} cy={point.y} r={hoveredPoint?.label === point.label ? "10" : "6.5"} fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.18)" className="transition-all duration-200 ease-out" style={{ animation: "admin-analytics-rise 0.72s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)" }} />
              <circle cx={point.x} cy={point.y} r={hoveredPoint?.label === point.label ? "6" : "3.5"} fill="#3b82f6" className="transition-all duration-200 ease-out" style={{ animation: "admin-analytics-rise 0.72s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)" }} />
              <circle
                cx={point.x}
                cy={point.y}
                r="12"
                fill="transparent"
                className="cursor-pointer"
                onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredPoint(point)}
                onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredPoint(null)}
                onFocus={() => setHoveredPoint(point)}
                onBlur={() => setHoveredPoint(null)}
                tabIndex={0}
              />
            </g>
          ))}

          {chartPoints.map((point) => (
            <text key={`label-${point.label}`} x={point.x} y={height - 10} textAnchor="middle" fontSize="10" fontWeight="700" fill="rgba(148,163,184,0.82)">
              {point.label}
            </text>
          ))}
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const PACKAGE_BREAKDOWN_PLACEHOLDER = [
  { label: "Premium Package", count: 0 },
  { label: "Standard Package", count: 0 },
  { label: "Custom Package", count: 0 },
  { label: "Basic Package", count: 0 }
];

function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
  const angleInRadians = ((angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI) / 180;
  return {
    x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
    y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
  };
}

function describeDonutArc(centerX, centerY, outerRadius, innerRadius, startAngle, endAngle) {
  const outerStart = polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, outerRadius, endAngle);
  const outerEnd = polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, outerRadius, startAngle);
  const innerStart = polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, innerRadius, endAngle);
  const innerEnd = polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, innerRadius, startAngle);
  const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";

  return [
    `M ${outerStart.x} ${outerStart.y}`,
    `A ${outerRadius} ${outerRadius} 0 ${largeArcFlag} 0 ${outerEnd.x} ${outerEnd.y}`,
    `L ${innerEnd.x} ${innerEnd.y}`,
    `A ${innerRadius} ${innerRadius} 0 ${largeArcFlag} 1 ${innerStart.x} ${innerStart.y}`,
    "Z"
  ].join(" ");
}

function PackageBreakdownChart({ items, isLoading = false }) {
  const total = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.count, 0);
  const colors = ["#2563eb", "#0ea5e9", "#14b8a6", "#6366f1", "#f59e0b"];
  const [hoveredSlice, setHoveredSlice] = useState(null);
  let currentAngle = 0;
  const segments = items.map((item, index) => {
    const segmentAngle = total ? (item.count / total) * 360 : 0;
    const startAngle = currentAngle;
    const endAngle = currentAngle + segmentAngle;
    currentAngle = endAngle;
    return {
      ...item,
      color: colors[index % colors.length],
      startAngle,
      endAngle,
      midAngle: startAngle + (segmentAngle / 2),
      percentage: total ? Math.round((item.count / total) * 100) : 0
    };
  });
  const tooltipAnchor = hoveredSlice ? polarToCartesian(50, 50, 42, hoveredSlice.midAngle) : null;
  const tooltipSide = tooltipAnchor && tooltipAnchor.x >= 50 ? "right" : "left";
  return (
    <div className="-mt-6 flex h-full flex-col gap-2 sm:-mt-7">
      <div className={cx("relative mx-auto flex h-44 w-44 items-center justify-center sm:h-52 sm:w-52", isLoading && "animate-pulse")}>
        {hoveredSlice ? (
          <div
            className="pointer-events-none absolute z-10 min-w-[8.5rem] rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-center shadow-[0_14px_28px_rgba(15,23,42,0.22)]"
            style={{
              left: `${tooltipAnchor.x}%`,
              top: `${tooltipAnchor.y}%`,
              transform: tooltipSide === "right" ? "translate(2px, -50%)" : "translate(calc(-100% - 2px), -50%)"
            }}
          >
            <p className="text-[10px] font-black leading-tight text-slate-900">{hoveredSlice.label}</p>
            <p className="mt-0.5 text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-600">{hoveredSlice.count} bookings - {hoveredSlice.percentage}%</p>
          </div>
        ) : null}
        <div className="admin-package-donut relative flex h-40 w-40 items-center justify-center sm:h-48 sm:w-48">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="h-full w-full -rotate-90 overflow-visible">
            <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(15,23,42,0.2)" strokeWidth="18" />
            {total ? segments.map((segment) => (
              <path
                key={segment.label}
                d={describeDonutArc(50, 50, 40, 18, segment.startAngle, segment.endAngle)}
                fill={segment.color}
                className="cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 hover:brightness-110"
                style={{
                  filter: hoveredSlice?.label === segment.label ? "drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(96,165,250,0.45))" : "none",
                  opacity: hoveredSlice && hoveredSlice.label !== segment.label ? 0.28 : 1
                }}
                onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredSlice(segment)}
                onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredSlice(null)}
                onFocus={() => setHoveredSlice(segment)}
                onBlur={() => setHoveredSlice(null)}
                tabIndex={0}
                role="img"
                aria-label={`${segment.label}: ${segment.count}`}
              />
            )) : null}
          </svg>
          <div className="pointer-events-none absolute flex h-16 w-16 flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.96),rgba(15,23,42,0.88))] px-1 text-center shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(2,8,23,0.2)] sm:h-20 sm:w-20">
            <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400">Total</span>
            <span className="mt-1 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-2xl">{isLoading ? "..." : total}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="mx-auto grid w-full max-w-[20rem] grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:max-w-none sm:gap-2.5">
        {items.length ? items.map((item, index) => (
          <div key={item.label} className={cx("relative flex min-w-0 w-full items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(30,41,59,0.74),rgba(15,23,42,0.94))] pl-2.5 pr-8 py-2 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.04)] transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] sm:gap-2.5 sm:pr-9 sm:py-2.5", isLoading && "opacity-85")}>
            <span className="h-2.5 w-2.5 shrink-0 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)] sm:h-3 sm:w-3" style={{ backgroundColor: colors[index % colors.length] }} />
            <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
              <span className="block text-[9px] font-black leading-[1.08] text-white sm:text-[11px]">{item.label}</span>
            </div>
            <span className="absolute right-1.5 top-1/2 inline-flex h-4 min-w-[1.45rem] -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-1 text-[8px] font-black text-slate-200 sm:min-w-[1.55rem] sm:px-1.5 sm:text-[9px]">
              {isLoading ? "..." : item.count}
            </span>
          </div>
        )) : <p className="text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-400">No package data yet.</p>}
      </div>
      {isLoading ? <p className="text-center text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">Loading package data...</p> : null}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function AdminDashboardPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const searchParams = useMemo(() => new URLSearchParams(location.search || ""), [location.search]);
  const loginRedirectPath = `/login?redirect=${encodeURIComponent(`${location.pathname}${location.search}`)}`;
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const profileAvatarInputRef = useRef(null);
  const avatarMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const mobileAvatarMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const mobileAvatarDropdownRef = useRef(null);
  const notificationDropdownRef = useRef(null);

  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [dbDown, setDbDown] = useState(() => typeof window !== "undefined" && Boolean(window.__SNAPQUEUE_DB_DOWN__));
  const [me, setMe] = useState(null);
  const [reservations, setReservations] = useState([]);
  const [payments, setPayments] = useState([]);
  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
  const [ads, setAds] = useState([]);
  const [threads, setThreads] = useState([]);
  const [threadSeenMap, setThreadSeenMap] = useState({});
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [threadsLoading, setThreadsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [threadsError, setThreadsError] = useState("");
  const [messagesLoading, setMessagesLoading] = useState(false);
  const [messagesError, setMessagesError] = useState("");
  const [archiveFolders, setArchiveFolders] = useState([]);
  const [systemForm, setSystemForm] = useState({
    maintenanceMode: false,
    maintenanceMessage: "",
    vacationMode: false,
    vacationMessage: "",
    bookingLeadHours: 24,
    maxAdvanceBookingDays: 90,
    paymentDeadlineHours: 12,
    defaultDeliveryDays: 7,
    newsletterEnabled: true,
    newsletterHeading: "Stay Updated",
    newsletterDescription: "Get the latest updates in your inbox.",
    newsletterPlaceholder: "Enter your email",
    newsletterButtonLabel: "Subscribe"
  });
  const [newsletterSubscribers, setNewsletterSubscribers] = useState([]);
  const [newsletterTotals, setNewsletterTotals] = useState({ all: 0, active: 0, inactive: 0 });
  const [newsletterLoading, setNewsletterLoading] = useState(false);
  const [newsletterActionId, setNewsletterActionId] = useState("");
  const [newsletterPage, setNewsletterPage] = useState(1);
  const [newsletterCampaign, setNewsletterCampaign] = useState({ subject: "", message: "" });
  const [newsletterSending, setNewsletterSending] = useState(false);
  const [newsletterSendError, setNewsletterSendError] = useState("");
  const [newsletterSendSuccess, setNewsletterSendSuccess] = useState("");
  const [newsletterValidationAttempted, setNewsletterValidationAttempted] = useState(false);
  const [selectedReservationId, setSelectedReservationId] = useState("");
  const [selectedPaymentId, setSelectedPaymentId] = useState("");
  const [selectedThreadId, setSelectedThreadId] = useState("");
  const [quoteForm, setQuoteForm] = useState({ basePrice: "", discount: "", currency: "PHP", adjustmentsText: "" });
  const [archiveForm, setArchiveForm] = useState({ folderName: "Admin Delivery", files: [] });
  const [refundForm, setRefundForm] = useState({ action: "approve", refundAdminNote: "", refundReferenceNumber: "", refundProofUrl: "" });
  const [refundModalError, setRefundModalError] = useState("");
  const [refundSubmitting, setRefundSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [refundDebugInfo, setRefundDebugInfo] = useState("Idle");
  const [adForm, setAdForm] = useState(EMPTY_AD_FORM);
  const [selectedAdvertisementId, setSelectedAdvertisementId] = useState("");
  const [campaignComposerOpen, setCampaignComposerOpen] = useState(false);
  const [profileForm, setProfileForm] = useState({ fullName: "", email: "", phone: "", bio: "", avatarUrl: "", emailNotificationsEnabled: true, twoFactorEnabled: false });
  const [passwordForm, setPasswordForm] = useState({ currentPassword: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
  const [passwordErrors, setPasswordErrors] = useState({});
  const [passwordOtpState, setPasswordOtpState] = useState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE);
  const [passwordVisibility, setPasswordVisibility] = useState({ currentPassword: false, newPassword: false, confirmPassword: false });
  const [passwordShakeField, setPasswordShakeField] = useState("");
  const [adminHelpSearchValue, setAdminHelpSearchValue] = useState("");
  const [adminHelpCategory, setAdminHelpCategory] = useState("Bookings");
  const [adminHelpFaqExpanded, setAdminHelpFaqExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [openAdminHelpFaq, setOpenAdminHelpFaq] = useState(-1);
  const [chatText, setChatText] = useState("");
  const [chatSending, setChatSending] = useState(false);
  const [deleteThreadPending, setDeleteThreadPending] = useState(false);
  const [profileErrors, setProfileErrors] = useState({});
  const [profileTouched, setProfileTouched] = useState({ fullName: false, email: false, phone: false, bio: false });
  const [profileValidationAttempted, setProfileValidationAttempted] = useState(false);
  const [profileSaving, setProfileSaving] = useState(false);
  const [passwordSaving, setPasswordSaving] = useState(false);
  const [systemValidationAttempted, setSystemValidationAttempted] = useState(false);
  const [systemSaving, setSystemSaving] = useState(false);
  const [systemSettingsView, setSystemSettingsView] = useState("access");
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(() => getInitialAdminTab(location.search));
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [clientSearchQuery, setClientSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [clientFilter, setClientFilter] = useState("all");
  const [clientFilterMenuOpen, setClientFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [bookingRequestSearchQuery, setBookingRequestSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [bookingRequestFilter, setBookingRequestFilter] = useState("all");
  const [bookingRequestFilterMenuOpen, setBookingRequestFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [productionSearchQuery, setProductionSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [productionFilter, setProductionFilter] = useState("all");
  const [productionFilterMenuOpen, setProductionFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [paymentSearchQuery, setPaymentSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [paymentFilter, setPaymentFilter] = useState("all");
  const [paymentFilterMenuOpen, setPaymentFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [historySearchQuery, setHistorySearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [historyFilter, setHistoryFilter] = useState("all");
  const [historyFilterMenuOpen, setHistoryFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [clientPage, setClientPage] = useState(1);
  const [reservationPage, setReservationPage] = useState(1);
  const [productionPage, setProductionPage] = useState(1);
  const [paymentPage, setPaymentPage] = useState(1);
  const [historyPage, setHistoryPage] = useState(1);
  const [advertisementPage, setAdvertisementPage] = useState(1);
  const [advertisementStatusFilter, setAdvertisementStatusFilter] = useState("all");
  const [advertisementScheduleFilter, setAdvertisementScheduleFilter] = useState("all");
  const [advertisementFilterMenuOpen, setAdvertisementFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileClientSelectionMode, setMobileClientSelectionMode] = useState(false);
  const [selectedMobileClientIds, setSelectedMobileClientIds] = useState([]);
  const didInitAdminTabRef = useRef(false);
  const hasShownAdminSetPasswordPromptRef = useRef(false);
  const adminRequiresPasswordSetup = me?.hasPasswordSet === false || (me?.hasPasswordSet == null && Boolean(me?.googleAvatarUrl));
  useEffect(() => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const requestedTab = params.get("tab");
    if (requestedTab && ADMIN_TAB_IDS.has(requestedTab)) {
      setActiveTab((current) => (current === requestedTab ? current : requestedTab));
      didInitAdminTabRef.current = true;
      return;
    }
    if (!didInitAdminTabRef.current && typeof window !== "undefined") {
      const storedTab = window.sessionStorage.getItem(ADMIN_TAB_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (storedTab && ADMIN_TAB_IDS.has(storedTab)) {
        setActiveTab((current) => (current === storedTab ? current : storedTab));
      }
      didInitAdminTabRef.current = true;
    }
  }, [location.search]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleDbDown = () => setDbDown(true);
    const handleDbUp = () => setDbDown(false);
    window.addEventListener("snapqueue:db-down", handleDbDown);
    window.addEventListener("snapqueue:db-up", handleDbUp);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("snapqueue:db-down", handleDbDown);
      window.removeEventListener("snapqueue:db-up", handleDbUp);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(ADMIN_TAB_STORAGE_KEY, activeTab);
  }, [activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const currentTab = params.get("tab");
    if (activeTab === "analytics") {
      if (currentTab) {
        params.delete("tab");
        const nextSearch = params.toString();
        navigate({ pathname: location.pathname, search: nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "" }, { replace: true });
      }
      return;
    }
    if (currentTab === activeTab) return;
    params.set("tab", activeTab);
    navigate({ pathname: location.pathname, search: `?${params.toString()}` }, { replace: true });
  }, [activeTab, location.pathname, location.search, navigate]);
  const [revenueRange, setRevenueRange] = useState("monthly");
  const [revenueRangeMenuOpen, setRevenueRangeMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileSidebarOpen, setMobileSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
  const [desktopSidebarCollapseLock, setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock] = useState(false);
  const [desktopSidebarExpanded, setDesktopSidebarExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [avatarMenuOpen, setAvatarMenuOpen] = useState(
    () => ["1", "true", "open"].includes(String(searchParams.get("avatarMenu") || "").trim().toLowerCase())
  );
  const [liveChatPanelOpen, setLiveChatPanelOpen] = useState(false);
  const [liveChatBoxHidden, setLiveChatBoxHidden] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return false;
    return window.localStorage.getItem(LIVE_CHAT_HIDDEN_STORAGE_KEY) === "true";
  });
  const [adminNotificationsOpen, setAdminNotificationsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [seenNotificationIds, setSeenNotificationIds] = useState([]);
  const [dismissedNotificationIds, setDismissedNotificationIds] = useState([]);
  const [logoutModalOpen, setLogoutModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutPending, setLogoutPending] = useState(false);
  const [detailModalReservation, setDetailModalReservation] = useState(null);
  const [quoteModalOpen, setQuoteModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [receiptModal, setReceiptModal] = useState({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment", loading: false });
  const [receiptPreviewModal, setReceiptPreviewModal] = useState({ open: false, html: "" });
  const [proofFullscreen, setProofFullscreen] = useState(false);
  const [refundModalOpen, setRefundModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [paymentActionModal, setPaymentActionModal] = useState({
    open: false,
    paymentId: "",
    status: "",
    clientName: "",
    referenceNumber: ""
  });
  const [productionDoneModal, setProductionDoneModal] = useState({
    open: false,
    reservationId: "",
    clientName: "",
    workflowStage: "",
    estimatedDelivery: ""
  });
  useEffect(() => {
    const requestedAvatarMenu = ["1", "true", "open"].includes(
      String(searchParams.get("avatarMenu") || "").trim().toLowerCase()
    );
    setAvatarMenuOpen(requestedAvatarMenu);
  }, [searchParams]);
  const [rejectPaidReservationModal, setRejectPaidReservationModal] = useState({
    open: false,
    reservation: null,
    payment: null,
    action: "pending",
    refundAdminNote: "",
    refundReferenceNumber: "",
    refundProofUrl: ""
  });
  const [uploadModalOpen, setUploadModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
  const [uploadingFiles, setUploadingFiles] = useState(false);
  const [uploadCompleteModal, setUploadCompleteModal] = useState({ open: false, fileCount: 0, clientName: "" });
  const [changePasswordModalOpen, setChangePasswordModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [profilePreviewUser, setProfilePreviewUser] = useState(null);
  const [clientActionModal, setClientActionModal] = useState({ open: false, type: "block", user: null });
  const [bulkClientActionModal, setBulkClientActionModal] = useState({ open: false, action: "block", count: 0 });
  const [deletePaymentModalOpen, setDeletePaymentModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [deleteThreadModalOpen, setDeleteThreadModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [deleteAdvertisementModalOpen, setDeleteAdvertisementModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [deleteAdvertisementPending, setDeleteAdvertisementPending] = useState(false);
  const [rejectPaidReservationSaving, setRejectPaidReservationSaving] = useState(false);
  const [editingProfile, setEditingProfile] = useState(false);
  const [reservationDrafts, setReservationDrafts] = useState({});
  const [productionMediaByReservationId, setProductionMediaByReservationId] = useState({});
  const [productionCalendarOpenId, setProductionCalendarOpenId] = useState("");
  const [productionStageMenuOpenId, setProductionStageMenuOpenId] = useState("");
  const [productionCalendarMonth, setProductionCalendarMonth] = useState(() => getMonthKey(formatDateOnlyInput(new Date())));
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(
    mobileSidebarOpen ||
    adminNotificationsOpen ||
    avatarMenuOpen ||
    logoutModalOpen ||
    logoutPending ||
    Boolean(detailModalReservation) ||
    quoteModalOpen ||
    receiptModal.open ||
    receiptPreviewModal.open ||
    proofFullscreen ||
    refundModalOpen ||
    paymentActionModal.open ||
    productionDoneModal.open ||
    rejectPaidReservationModal.open ||
    uploadModalOpen ||
    uploadCompleteModal.open ||
    changePasswordModalOpen ||
    Boolean(profilePreviewUser) ||
    clientActionModal.open ||
    bulkClientActionModal.open ||
    deletePaymentModalOpen ||
    deleteThreadModalOpen ||
    deleteAdvertisementModalOpen ||
    deleteAdvertisementPending
  ));
  const [advertisementCalendarOpenField, setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField] = useState("");
  const [advertisementCalendarMonth, setAdvertisementCalendarMonth] = useState(() => getMonthKey(formatDateOnlyInput(new Date())));
  const productionCalendarPopupRef = useRef(null);
  const productionCalendarContainerRef = useRef(null);
  const productionStageMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const advertisementCalendarContainerRef = useRef(null);
  const adminHelpArticles = useMemo(() => buildAdminHelpArticles(), []);
  const adminHelpNeedle = adminHelpSearchValue.trim().toLowerCase();
  const filteredAdminHelpArticles = useMemo(
    () => (adminHelpNeedle
      ? adminHelpArticles.filter((item) => `${item.title} ${item.description} ${(item.steps || []).join(" ")} ${item.category || ""}`.toLowerCase().includes(adminHelpNeedle))
      : adminHelpArticles),
    [adminHelpArticles, adminHelpNeedle]
  );
  const adminHelpCategoryItems = useMemo(
    () => adminHelpArticles.filter((item) => String(item.topLevel || "") === adminHelpCategory),
    [adminHelpArticles, adminHelpCategory]
  );
  const adminHelpQuickItems = useMemo(
    () => (adminHelpNeedle ? filteredAdminHelpArticles : adminHelpCategoryItems),
    [adminHelpCategoryItems, adminHelpNeedle, filteredAdminHelpArticles]
  );
  const adminHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => adminHelpQuickItems.map((item) => item.title),
    [adminHelpQuickItems]
  );
  const visibleAdminHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (adminHelpNeedle ? adminHelpFaqLinks : adminHelpFaqLinks.slice(0, 6)),
    [adminHelpFaqLinks, adminHelpNeedle]
  );
  const extraAdminHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (adminHelpNeedle ? [] : adminHelpFaqLinks.slice(6)),
    [adminHelpFaqLinks, adminHelpNeedle]
  );
  const adminHelpSearchResults = useMemo(() => {
    if (!adminHelpNeedle) return [];
    return filteredAdminHelpArticles.map((item) => ({
      title: item.title,
      description: item.description,
      category: item.topLevel || item.category || "Admin Help",
      readTime: item.readTime || "Quick read"
    }));
  }, [adminHelpNeedle, filteredAdminHelpArticles]);
  const reservationMap = useMemo(() => new Map(reservations.map((item) => [String(item?._id || item?.id || ""), item])), [reservations]);
  const selectedReservation = useMemo(() => reservations.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === selectedReservationId) || null, [reservations, selectedReservationId]);
  const selectedPayment = useMemo(() => payments.find((item) => String(item?._id || "") === selectedPaymentId) || null, [payments, selectedPaymentId]);
  const selectedAdvertisement = useMemo(() => ads.find((item) => String(item?._id || "") === String(selectedAdvertisementId || "")) || null, [ads, selectedAdvertisementId]);
