  const selectedThread = useMemo(() => threads.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === selectedThreadId) || null, [threads, selectedThreadId]);
  const advertisementScheduleRanges = useMemo(() => (
    ads
      .filter((item) => String(item?._id || "") !== String(adForm.id || ""))
      .map((item) => ({
        id: String(item?._id || ""),
        title: item?.title || "Untitled Ad",
        startDate: formatDateOnlyInput(item?.startDate),
        endDate: formatDateOnlyInput(item?.endDate)
      }))
      .filter((item) => item.startDate && item.endDate)
  ), [ads, adForm.id]);
  const clientUsers = useMemo(() => users.filter((item) => String(item?.role || "").toLowerCase() !== "admin"), [users]);
  const clientUsersByEmail = useMemo(() => new Map(clientUsers.map((item) => [String(item?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase(), item])), [clientUsers]);
  const clientUsersByName = useMemo(() => new Map(clientUsers.map((item) => [String(item?.fullName || "").trim().toLowerCase(), item])), [clientUsers]);
  const paymentByReservationId = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map();
    payments.forEach((payment) => {
      const reservation = paymentReservation(payment, reservationMap);
      const id = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
      if (id && !map.has(id)) map.set(id, payment);
    });
    return map;
  }, [payments, reservationMap]);

  const pendingReservations = useMemo(
    () => reservations.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
      const reservationStatus = String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase();
      const paymentState = paymentStatusState(payment, item);
      return reservationStatus === "pending" && paymentState !== "verified";
    }),
    [reservations, paymentByReservationId]
  );
  const filteredPendingReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = bookingRequestSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return pendingReservations.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
      const searchText = [
        item?.fullName,
        item?.email,
        item?.phone,
        item?.packageName,
        item?.package,
        item?.service,
        item?.eventType,
        item?.eventDateTime,
        item?.eventDate,
        item?.finalPrice,
        item?.basePrice,
        item?.paymentStatus,
        payment?.status,
        payment?.referenceNumber
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;
      const paymentState = paymentStatusState(payment, item);
      if (bookingRequestFilter === "verified_payment") return paymentState === "verified";
      if (bookingRequestFilter === "awaiting_payment") return paymentState !== "verified";
      if (bookingRequestFilter === "custom") return String(packageLabel(item)).toLowerCase() === "custom";
      return true;
    });
  }, [pendingReservations, bookingRequestSearchQuery, bookingRequestFilter, paymentByReservationId]);
  const reservationPageSize = 7;
  const reservationTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredPendingReservations.length / reservationPageSize));
  const paginatedPendingReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const startIndex = (reservationPage - 1) * reservationPageSize;
    return filteredPendingReservations.slice(startIndex, startIndex + reservationPageSize);
  }, [filteredPendingReservations, reservationPage]);
  const productionReservations = useMemo(
    () => reservations.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
      const reservationStatus = String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase();
      const paymentState = paymentStatusState(payment, item);
      return reservationStatus === "approved" || (reservationStatus === "pending" && paymentState === "verified");
    }),
    [reservations, paymentByReservationId]
  );
  const filteredProductionReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = productionSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return productionReservations.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
      const searchText = [
        item?.fullName,
        item?.email,
        item?.phone,
        item?.packageName,
        item?.package,
        item?.service,
        item?.workflowStage,
        item?.eventDateTime,
        item?.eventDate,
        item?.estimatedDelivery,
        payment?.status,
        payment?.referenceNumber
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;
      const workflowStage = String(item?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase();
      const paymentState = paymentStatusState(payment, item);
      if (productionFilter === "verified_payment") return paymentState === "verified";
      if (productionFilter === "editing") return workflowStage === "editing";
      if (productionFilter === "ready_for_download") return workflowStage === "ready_for_download";
      if (productionFilter === "shoot_completed") return workflowStage === "shoot_completed";
      return true;
    });
  }, [productionReservations, productionSearchQuery, productionFilter, paymentByReservationId]);
  const productionPageSize = 4;
  const productionTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredProductionReservations.length / productionPageSize));
  const paginatedProductionReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const startIndex = (productionPage - 1) * productionPageSize;
    return filteredProductionReservations.slice(startIndex, startIndex + productionPageSize);
  }, [filteredProductionReservations, productionPage]);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "order-status") return undefined;
    const targets = paginatedProductionReservations
      .map((reservation) => String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || ""))
      .filter((reservationId, index) => {
        const reservation = paginatedProductionReservations[index];
        if (!reservationId) return false;
        if (reservation?.hasUploadedMedia) return false;
        return productionMediaByReservationId[reservationId] === undefined;
      });
    if (!targets.length) return undefined;

    let cancelled = false;

    Promise.allSettled(
      targets.map(async (reservationId) => {
        const response = await api.get(`/archive/admin/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`);
        const folders = Array.isArray(response?.data?.folders) ? response.data.folders : [];
        const hasMedia = folders.some((folder) => Array.isArray(folder?.photos) && folder.photos.length > 0);
        return { reservationId, hasMedia };
      })
    ).then((results) => {
      if (cancelled) return;
      setProductionMediaByReservationId((current) => {
        const next = { ...current };
        results.forEach((result) => {
          if (result.status !== "fulfilled") return;
          next[result.value.reservationId] = Boolean(result.value.hasMedia);
        });
        return next;
      });
    });

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [activeTab, paginatedProductionReservations, productionMediaByReservationId]);
  const historyReservations = useMemo(() => reservations.filter((item) => ["rejected", "completed", "cancelled"].includes(String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase())), [reservations]);
  const filteredHistoryReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = historySearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return historyReservations.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
      const searchText = [
        item?.fullName,
        item?.email,
        item?.phone,
        item?.packageName,
        item?.package,
        item?.service,
        item?.status,
        item?.eventDateTime,
        item?.eventDate,
        payment?.status,
        payment?.referenceNumber
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;
      const status = String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase();
      if (historyFilter === "completed") return status === "completed";
      if (historyFilter === "cancelled") return status === "cancelled";
      if (historyFilter === "rejected") return status === "rejected";
      return true;
    });
  }, [historyReservations, historySearchQuery, historyFilter]);
  const filteredUsers = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = clientSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    const now = new Date();

    return clientUsers.filter((item) => {
      const searchText = [
        item?.fullName,
        item?.email,
        item?.phone,
        item?.role,
        item?.bio,
        item?.createdAt
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;

      if (clientFilter === "blocked") return Boolean(item?.isBlocked);
      if (clientFilter === "active") return !item?.isBlocked;
      if (clientFilter === "recent") {
        const createdAt = new Date(item?.createdAt || "");
        return !Number.isNaN(createdAt.getTime()) &&
          createdAt.getMonth() === now.getMonth() &&
          createdAt.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear();
      }

      return true;
    });
  }, [clientUsers, clientSearchQuery, clientFilter]);
  const clientPageSize = 7;
  const clientTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredUsers.length / clientPageSize));
  const paginatedUsers = useMemo(() => {
    const startIndex = (clientPage - 1) * clientPageSize;
    return filteredUsers.slice(startIndex, startIndex + clientPageSize);
  }, [filteredUsers, clientPage]);
  const filteredAds = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return ads.filter((item) => {
      const searchText = [
        item?.title,
        item?.message,
        item?.targetUrl,
        item?.startDate,
        item?.endDate,
        item?.createdAt,
        item?.updatedAt,
        item?.isActive ? "active" : "inactive",
        item?.startDate || item?.endDate ? "scheduled" : "all day"
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;

      if (advertisementStatusFilter === "active" && item?.isActive === false) return false;
      if (advertisementStatusFilter === "inactive" && item?.isActive !== false) return false;

      const hasSchedule = Boolean(item?.startDate || item?.endDate);
      if (advertisementScheduleFilter === "scheduled" && !hasSchedule) return false;
      if (advertisementScheduleFilter === "all-day" && hasSchedule) return false;

      return true;
    });
  }, [ads, searchQuery, advertisementStatusFilter, advertisementScheduleFilter]);
  const advertisementPageSize = 6;
  const advertisementTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredAds.length / advertisementPageSize));
  const paginatedAds = useMemo(() => {
    const startIndex = (advertisementPage - 1) * advertisementPageSize;
    return filteredAds.slice(startIndex, startIndex + advertisementPageSize);
  }, [filteredAds, advertisementPage]);
  const paymentRows = payments
    .map((payment) => {
      const reservation = paymentReservation(payment, reservationMap);
      return reservation ? { payment, reservation } : null;
    })
    .filter(Boolean)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.payment?.updatedAt || b.payment?.createdAt || 0) - new Date(a.payment?.updatedAt || a.payment?.createdAt || 0));
  const filteredPaymentRows = paymentRows.filter(({ payment, reservation }) => {
    const needle = paymentSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    const searchText = [
      reservation?.fullName,
      reservation?.email,
      reservation?.phone,
      reservation?.packageName,
      reservation?.package,
      reservation?.service,
      reservation?.eventDateTime,
      reservation?.eventDate,
      payment?.status,
      payment?.refundStatus,
      payment?.referenceNumber,
      payment?.amount
    ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
    const matchesSearch = !needle || searchText.includes(needle);
    if (!matchesSearch) return false;
    const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase();
    const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
    if (paymentFilter === "needs_review") return paymentStatus === "needs_review";
    if (paymentFilter === "verified") return paymentStatus === "verified";
    if (paymentFilter === "refund_requests") return ["requested", "approved"].includes(refundStatus);
    return true;
  });
  const paymentPageSize = 5;
  const paymentTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredPaymentRows.length / paymentPageSize));
  const paginatedPaymentRows = filteredPaymentRows.slice((paymentPage - 1) * paymentPageSize, (paymentPage - 1) * paymentPageSize + paymentPageSize);
  const historyPageSize = 9;
  const historyTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredHistoryReservations.length / historyPageSize));
  const paginatedHistoryReservations = filteredHistoryReservations.slice((historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize, (historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize + historyPageSize);
  const filteredThreads = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!needle) return threads;
    return threads.filter((item) => {
      const searchText = [
        item?.clientName,
        item?.clientEmail,
        item?.clientPhone,
        item?.subject,
        item?.status,
        item?.lastMessage,
        item?.createdAt
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ").toLowerCase();
      return searchText.includes(needle);
    });
  }, [threads, searchQuery]);
  const liveMessageClientResults = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!needle) return [];

    const threadedClientIds = new Set(
      threads
        .map((item) => String(item?.clientId || ""))
        .filter(Boolean)
    );

    return clientUsers
      .filter((item) => !threadedClientIds.has(String(item?._id || item?.id || "")))
      .filter((item) => {
        const haystack = JSON.stringify({
          fullName: item?.fullName,
          email: item?.email,
          phone: item?.phone
        }).toLowerCase();
        return haystack.includes(needle);
      })
      .slice(0, 8);
  }, [clientUsers, threads, searchQuery]);

  function threadClientProfile(thread) {
    const emailKey = String(thread?.clientEmail || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const nameKey = String(thread?.clientName || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    return clientUsersByEmail.get(emailKey) || clientUsersByName.get(nameKey) || null;
  }

  function paymentClientProfile(reservation) {
    const emailKey = String(reservation?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const nameKey = String(reservation?.fullName || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    return clientUsersByEmail.get(emailKey) || clientUsersByName.get(nameKey) || reservation || null;
  }

  async function loadReservations() {
    const limit = 200;
    let page = 1;
    let all = [];
    let total = 0;
    while (true) {
      const response = await api.get(`/reservations?limit=${limit}&page=${page}`);
      const batch = Array.isArray(response?.data?.reservations) ? response.data.reservations : [];
      if (page === 1) {
        total = Number(response?.data?.total || 0);
      }
      all = all.concat(batch);
      const resolvedTotal = total > 0 ? total : all.length;
      const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(resolvedTotal / limit));
      if (page >= totalPages || batch.length === 0) break;
      page += 1;
    }
    setReservations(all);
  }

  async function loadPayments() {
    const response = await api.get("/payments");
    setPayments(Array.isArray(response?.data?.payments) ? response.data.payments : []);
  }

  async function loadUsers() {
    const limit = 200;
    let page = 1;
    let all = [];
    let total = 0;
    while (true) {
      const response = await api.get(`/users?limit=${limit}&page=${page}`);
      const batch = Array.isArray(response?.data?.users) ? response.data.users : [];
      if (page === 1) {
        total = Number(response?.data?.total || 0);
      }
      all = all.concat(batch);
      const resolvedTotal = total > 0 ? total : all.length;
      const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(resolvedTotal / limit));
      if (page >= totalPages || batch.length === 0) break;
      page += 1;
    }
    setUsers(all);
  }

  async function loadAds() {
    const response = await api.get("/ads/admin");
    setAds(Array.isArray(response?.data?.ads) ? response.data.ads : []);
  }

  async function loadThreads(options = {}) {
    const { silent = false } = options;
    if (!silent) setThreadsLoading(true);
    setThreadsError("");
    try {
      const response = await api.get("/chatbot/live/threads");
      setThreads(Array.isArray(response?.data?.threads) ? response.data.threads : []);
    } catch (error) {
      setThreadsError(errorMessage(error, "Failed to load chat threads."));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      if (!silent) setThreadsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function loadMessages(threadId, options = {}) {
    const { silent = false } = options;
    if (!threadId) {
      setMessages([]);
      setMessagesError("");
      return;
    }
    if (!silent) setMessagesLoading(true);
    setMessagesError("");
    try {
      const response = await api.get(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(threadId)}/messages`);
      const nextMessages = Array.isArray(response?.data?.messages) ? response.data.messages : [];
      setMessages(nextMessages);
      setThreads((current) => current.map((thread) => {
        const currentId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
        if (currentId !== String(threadId || "")) return thread;
        return {
          ...thread,
          unreadCount: Number(response?.data?.thread?.unreadCount || 0)
        };
      }));
      markAdminThreadSeen(
        threadId,
        response?.data?.thread?.lastMessageAt || nextMessages[nextMessages.length - 1]?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString()
      );
    } catch (error) {
      setMessagesError(errorMessage(error, "Failed to load messages."));
      throw error;
    } finally {
      if (!silent) setMessagesLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function loadArchiveFolders(reservationId) {
    if (!reservationId) {
      setArchiveFolders([]);
      return;
    }
    const response = await api.get(`/archive/admin/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`);
    setArchiveFolders(Array.isArray(response?.data?.folders) ? response.data.folders : []);
  }

  async function loadSystem() {
    const response = await api.get("/system/admin");
    const system = response?.data?.system || {};
    setSystemForm({
      maintenanceMode: Boolean(system.maintenanceMode),
      maintenanceMessage: String(system.maintenanceMessage || ""),
      vacationMode: Boolean(system.vacationMode),
      vacationMessage: String(system.vacationMessage || ""),
      bookingLeadHours: Number(system.bookingLeadHours || 24),
      maxAdvanceBookingDays: Number(system.maxAdvanceBookingDays || 90),
      paymentDeadlineHours: Number(system.paymentDeadlineHours || 12),
      defaultDeliveryDays: Number(system.defaultDeliveryDays || 7),
      newsletterEnabled: system.newsletterEnabled !== false,
      newsletterHeading: String(system.newsletterHeading || "Stay Updated"),
      newsletterDescription: String(system.newsletterDescription || "Get the latest updates in your inbox."),
      newsletterPlaceholder: String(system.newsletterPlaceholder || "Enter your email"),
      newsletterButtonLabel: String(system.newsletterButtonLabel || "Subscribe")
    });
  }

  async function loadNewsletterSubscribers() {
    setNewsletterLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.get("/system/newsletter/admin");
      setNewsletterSubscribers(Array.isArray(response?.data?.subscribers) ? response.data.subscribers : []);
      setNewsletterTotals(response?.data?.totals || { all: 0, active: 0, inactive: 0 });
    } finally {
      setNewsletterLoading(false);
    }
  }

  function ignoreFeedback() {}

  function syncProfileForm(user) {
    setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
    setProfileErrors({});
    setProfileTouched({ fullName: false, email: false, phone: false, bio: false });
    setProfileForm({
      fullName: user?.fullName || "",
      email: user?.email || "",
      phone: user?.phone || "",
      bio: user?.bio || "",
      avatarUrl: user?.avatarUrl || "",
      emailNotificationsEnabled: user?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false,
      twoFactorEnabled: user?.twoFactorEnabled === true
    });
  }

  function markProfileFieldTouched(name) {
    setProfileTouched((current) => (current[name] ? current : { ...current, [name]: true }));
  }

  async function handleProfileAvatarUpload(file) {
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      const avatarUrl = await readCompressedImageDataUrl(file, {
        maxWidth: 960,
        maxHeight: 960,
        quality: 0.82,
        maxOutputLength: 900_000
      });
      setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl }));
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to load profile picture."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function loadDashboard() {
    const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
    if (!token) {
      navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
      return;
    }
    try {
      const meResponse = await api.get("/auth/me");
      const user = meResponse?.data?.user || null;
      if (!hasAdminAccess(user?.role)) {
        navigate("/dashboard", { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      setMe(user);
      syncProfileForm(user);
      await loadReservations();
      await loadUsers();
      await Promise.allSettled([loadPayments(), loadAds(), loadThreads(), loadSystem(), loadNewsletterSubscribers()]);
    } catch (_error) {
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
      return;
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  const trimmedProfileEmail = String(profileForm.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const trimmedProfilePhone = String(profileForm.phone || "").trim();
  const trimmedProfileBio = String(profileForm.bio || "").trim();
  const profileEmailError = !trimmedProfileEmail
    ? "Email address is required."
    : !ADMIN_EMAIL_PATTERN.test(trimmedProfileEmail)
      ? "Enter a valid email address."
      : "";
  const profilePhoneError = trimmedProfilePhone && !ADMIN_PHONE_PATTERN.test(trimmedProfilePhone)
    ? "Use 09xxxxxxxxx or +639xxxxxxxxx."
    : "";
  const profileBioError = trimmedProfileBio.length > 320
    ? "Bio must be 320 characters or less."
    : "";
  const trimmedNewsletterSubject = String(newsletterCampaign.subject || "").trim();
  const trimmedNewsletterMessage = String(newsletterCampaign.message || "").trim();
  const newsletterSubjectError = !trimmedNewsletterSubject
    ? "Newsletter subject is required."
    : trimmedNewsletterSubject.length < 4
      ? "Subject is too short."
      : "";
  const newsletterMessageError = !trimmedNewsletterMessage
    ? "Newsletter message is required."
    : trimmedNewsletterMessage.length < 12
      ? "Message is too short."
      : "";
  const vacationMessageError = systemForm.vacationMode && !String(systemForm.vacationMessage || "").trim()
    ? "Vacation message is required while vacation mode is active."
    : "";
  const maintenanceMessageError = systemForm.maintenanceMode && !String(systemForm.maintenanceMessage || "").trim()
    ? "Maintenance message is required while maintenance mode is active."
    : "";

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-900";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, [bodyClassRef]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!avatarMenuOpen) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      const target = event.target;
      const insideDesktopMenu = target?.closest?.('[data-admin-avatar-menu="true"]');
      const insideMobileTrigger = target?.closest?.('[data-user-avatar-menu="true"]');
      const insideMobileDropdown = target?.closest?.('[data-admin-avatar-mobile-dropdown="true"]');
      const insideToolbarTrigger = event.target?.closest?.('[data-admin-avatar-button="true"]');
      if (!insideDesktopMenu && !insideMobileTrigger && !insideMobileDropdown && !insideToolbarTrigger) {
        setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [avatarMenuOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!adminNotificationsOpen) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      const target = event.target;
      if (target?.closest?.('[data-admin-notif-panel="true"]')) return;
      if (target?.closest?.('[data-admin-notif-button="true"]')) return;
      setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
    };
    const handleEscape = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
    };
    window.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    window.addEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
      window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleEscape);
    };
  }, [adminNotificationsOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    window.localStorage.setItem(LIVE_CHAT_HIDDEN_STORAGE_KEY, String(liveChatBoxHidden));
  }, [liveChatBoxHidden]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setOpenAdminHelpFaq(-1);
    setAdminHelpFaqExpanded(false);
  }, [adminHelpCategory, adminHelpNeedle]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadDashboard();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!me || hasShownAdminSetPasswordPromptRef.current) return;
    if (adminRequiresPasswordSetup) {
      hasShownAdminSetPasswordPromptRef.current = true;
      setChangePasswordModalOpen(true);
    }
  }, [me, adminRequiresPasswordSetup]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedReservationId && reservations[0]) setSelectedReservationId(String(reservations[0]?._id || reservations[0]?.id || ""));
  }, [reservations, selectedReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedReservationId) return;
    const exists = reservations.some((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === selectedReservationId);
    if (!exists) {
      setSelectedReservationId(String(reservations[0]?._id || reservations[0]?.id || ""));
    }
  }, [reservations, selectedReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedPaymentId && payments[0]) setSelectedPaymentId(String(payments[0]?._id || ""));
  }, [payments, selectedPaymentId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedPaymentId) return;
    const exists = payments.some((item) => String(item?._id || "") === selectedPaymentId);
    if (!exists) {
      setSelectedPaymentId(String(payments[0]?._id || ""));
    }
  }, [payments, selectedPaymentId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedThreadId) return;
    const exists = threads.some((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === selectedThreadId);
    if (!exists) {
      setSelectedThreadId("");
      setMessages([]);
      setMessagesError("");
      setLiveChatPanelOpen(false);
      setLiveChatBoxHidden(false);
    }
  }, [threads, selectedThreadId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!selectedReservation) return;
    setQuoteForm({
      basePrice: String(Number(selectedReservation.basePrice || selectedReservation.packagePrice || selectedReservation.finalPrice || 0) || ""),
      discount: String(Number(selectedReservation.discount || 0) || ""),
      currency: String(selectedReservation.currency || "PHP"),
      adjustmentsText: Array.isArray(selectedReservation.customAdjustments)
        ? selectedReservation.customAdjustments.map((item) => `${item.label}: ${item.amount}`).join("\n")
        : ""
    });
    loadArchiveFolders(selectedReservationId).catch(() => setArchiveFolders([]));
  }, [selectedReservation, selectedReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setReservationDrafts((current) => {
      const next = {};
      reservations.forEach((reservation) => {
        const id = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
        if (!id) return;
        next[id] = {
          workflowStage: current[id]?.workflowStage ?? String(reservation?.workflowStage || "awaiting_approval"),
          estimatedDelivery: current[id]?.estimatedDelivery ?? formatDateOnlyInput(reservation?.estimatedDelivery)
        };
      });
      return next;
    });
  }, [reservations]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadMessages(selectedThreadId).catch(() => setMessages([]));
  }, [selectedThreadId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "live-messages") return undefined;
    const intervalId = window.setInterval(() => {
      loadThreads({ silent: true }).catch(() => {});
      if (selectedThreadId) loadMessages(selectedThreadId, { silent: true }).catch(() => {});
    }, 15000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(intervalId);
  }, [activeTab, selectedThreadId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!me) return;
    setSeenNotificationIds(loadAdminSeenNotifIds(me));
    setDismissedNotificationIds(loadAdminDismissedNotifIds(me));
  }, [me?._id, me?.id, me?.sub, me?.email]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!me) return;
    saveAdminSeenNotifIds(me, seenNotificationIds);
  }, [me, seenNotificationIds]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!me) return;
    saveAdminDismissedNotifIds(me, dismissedNotificationIds);
  }, [dismissedNotificationIds, me]);

  const adminMessageSeenStorageKey = useMemo(() => getAdminMessageSeenStorageKey(me), [me]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setThreadSeenMap(loadStoredAdminThreadSeenMap(adminMessageSeenStorageKey));
  }, [adminMessageSeenStorageKey]);

  useEffect(() => {
    saveStoredAdminThreadSeenMap(adminMessageSeenStorageKey, threadSeenMap);
  }, [adminMessageSeenStorageKey, threadSeenMap]);

  function markAdminThreadSeen(threadId, seenAt) {
    const id = String(threadId || "").trim();
    if (!id) return;
    const nextSeenAt = String(seenAt || new Date().toISOString());
    setThreadSeenMap((current) => {
      if (current?.[id] === nextSeenAt) return current;
      return {
        ...(current || {}),
        [id]: nextSeenAt
      };
    });
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    const anyModalOpen = logoutModalOpen || Boolean(detailModalReservation) || quoteModalOpen || receiptModal.open || receiptPreviewModal.open || proofFullscreen || refundModalOpen || paymentActionModal.open || productionDoneModal.open || rejectPaidReservationModal.open || uploadModalOpen || changePasswordModalOpen || Boolean(profilePreviewUser) || clientActionModal.open || deletePaymentModalOpen || deleteThreadModalOpen || deleteAdvertisementModalOpen;
    document.body.classList.toggle("admin-modal-active", anyModalOpen);
    return () => {
      document.body.classList.remove("admin-modal-active");
    };
  }, [logoutModalOpen, detailModalReservation, quoteModalOpen, receiptModal.open, receiptPreviewModal.open, proofFullscreen, refundModalOpen, paymentActionModal.open, productionDoneModal.open, rejectPaidReservationModal.open, uploadModalOpen, changePasswordModalOpen, profilePreviewUser, clientActionModal.open, deletePaymentModalOpen, deleteThreadModalOpen, deleteAdvertisementModalOpen]);

  async function updateReservationById(reservationId, payload, successMessage, options = {}) {
    if (!reservationId) return;
    try {
      await api.patch(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}/status`, payload);
      await loadReservations();
      if (!options.silent && successMessage) ignoreFeedback(successMessage);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update reservation."), "error");
    }
  }

  function openReservationDetails(reservation) {
    setDetailModalReservation(reservation || null);
  }

  function openQuoteModal(reservation) {
    const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
    if (!reservationId) return;
    setSelectedReservationId(reservationId);
    setQuoteModalOpen(true);
  }

  function openUploadModal(reservation) {
    const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
    if (!reservationId) return;
    setSelectedReservationId(reservationId);
    setUploadModalOpen(true);
  }

  function handleReservationReject(reservation, payment) {
    const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
    if (!reservationId) return;
    const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || reservation?.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase();
    if (["verified", "paid"].includes(paymentStatus)) {
      setRejectPaidReservationModal({
        open: true,
        reservation,
        payment,
        action: "pending",
        refundAdminNote: "",
        refundReferenceNumber: "",
        refundProofUrl: ""
      });
      return;
    }
    updateReservationById(reservationId, { status: "rejected" }, "Booking rejected.");
  }

  async function submitPaidReservationRejection() {
    const reservationId = String(rejectPaidReservationModal.reservation?._id || rejectPaidReservationModal.reservation?.id || "");
    if (!reservationId) return;
    const refundAdminNote = String(rejectPaidReservationModal.refundAdminNote || "").trim();
    const refundAction = String(rejectPaidReservationModal.action || "pending").toLowerCase();
    const refundReferenceNumber = String(rejectPaidReservationModal.refundReferenceNumber || "").trim();
    const refundProofUrl = String(rejectPaidReservationModal.refundProofUrl || "").trim();

    if (refundAdminNote.length < 8) {
      ignoreFeedback("Refund note is required and must be at least 8 characters.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (refundAction === "process") {
      if (!/^\d{12}$/.test(refundReferenceNumber)) {
        ignoreFeedback("Refund reference number must be exactly 12 digits.", "error");
        return;
      }
      if (!refundProofUrl) {
        ignoreFeedback("Refund proof is required when processing the refund.", "error");
        return;
      }
    }

    setRejectPaidReservationSaving(true);
    try {
      await api.patch(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}/status`, {
        status: "rejected",
        refundAction,
        refundAdminNote,
        refundReferenceNumber,
        refundProofUrl
      });
      await Promise.allSettled([loadReservations(), loadPayments()]);
      setRejectPaidReservationModal({
        open: false,
        reservation: null,
        payment: null,
        action: "pending",
        refundAdminNote: "",
        refundReferenceNumber: "",
        refundProofUrl: ""
      });
      ignoreFeedback(refundAction === "process" ? "Reservation rejected and refund processed." : "Reservation rejected. The client must submit payout details before the refund can be processed.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to reject paid reservation."), "error");
    } finally {
      setRejectPaidReservationSaving(false);
    }
  }

  function handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, estimatedDelivery) {
    const minDateKey = getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation);
    if (estimatedDelivery && estimatedDelivery < minDateKey) return;
    setReservationDrafts((current) => ({
      ...current,
      [reservationId]: {
        ...(current[reservationId] || {}),
        workflowStage: current[reservationId]?.workflowStage ?? String(reservation.workflowStage || "awaiting_approval"),
        estimatedDelivery
      }
    }));
    updateReservationById(
      reservationId,
      {
        workflowStage: draft.workflowStage || String(reservation.workflowStage || "awaiting_approval"),
        estimatedDelivery: estimatedDelivery || null
      },
      "",
      { silent: true }
    );
  }

  function openProductionCalendar(reservationId, estimatedDelivery) {
    const nextValue = formatDateOnlyInput(estimatedDelivery || new Date());
    setProductionCalendarMonth(getMonthKey(nextValue));
    setProductionStageMenuOpenId("");
    setProductionCalendarOpenId((current) => (current === reservationId ? "" : reservationId));
  }

  function openAdvertisementCalendar(field) {
    const nextValue = formatDateOnlyInput(adForm[field] || new Date());
    setAdvertisementCalendarMonth(getMonthKey(nextValue));
    setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField((current) => (current === field ? "" : field));
  }

  function setAdvertisementCalendarDate(field, dateKey) {
    setAdForm((current) => {
      if (field === "startDate") {
        const nextEndDate = current.endDate && current.endDate < dateKey ? "" : current.endDate;
        return { ...current, startDate: dateKey, endDate: nextEndDate };
      }
      return { ...current, endDate: dateKey };
    });
  }

  async function setProductionWorkflowStage(reservationId, reservation, workflowStage) {
    setReservationDrafts((current) => ({
      ...current,
      [reservationId]: {
        ...(current[reservationId] || {}),
        workflowStage,
        estimatedDelivery: current[reservationId]?.estimatedDelivery ?? formatDateOnlyInput(reservation?.estimatedDelivery)
      }
    }));
    await updateReservationById(
      reservationId,
      { workflowStage },
      "Project status updated.",
      { silent: true }
    );
  }

  async function fetchPaymentProof(paymentId) {
    if (!paymentId) return { proofUrl: "", refundProofUrl: "" };
    try {
      const response = await api.get(`/payments/${encodeURIComponent(paymentId)}/proof`);
      return {
        proofUrl: String(response?.data?.proofUrl || ""),
        refundProofUrl: String(response?.data?.refundProofUrl || "")
      };
    } catch (_error) {
      ignoreFeedback("Unable to load payment proof. Please try again.", "error");
      return { proofUrl: "", refundProofUrl: "" };
    }
  }

  async function openReceiptModal(payment, reservation) {
    if (payment?._id) setSelectedPaymentId(String(payment._id));
    if (reservation?._id || reservation?.id) setSelectedReservationId(String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id));
    if (payment?.proofUrl) {
      setReceiptModal({ open: true, src: payment.proofUrl, title: "Proof of Payment", loading: false });
      return;
    }
    if (!payment?.hasProofUrl) {
      ignoreFeedback("No payment proof uploaded yet.", "error");
      return;
    }
    setReceiptModal({ open: true, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment", loading: true });
    const proof = await fetchPaymentProof(payment?._id);
    if (!proof.proofUrl) {
      setReceiptModal({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment", loading: false });
      return;
    }
    setPayments((current) =>
      current.map((item) =>
        String(item?._id || "") === String(payment?._id || "")
          ? { ...item, proofUrl: proof.proofUrl, hasProofUrl: true }
          : item
      )
    );
    setReceiptModal({ open: true, src: proof.proofUrl, title: "Proof of Payment", loading: false });
  }

  async function printPaymentReceipt(payment, reservation) {
    if (!payment || !reservation) {
      ignoreFeedback("Reservation details are still syncing. Please refresh and try again.", "error");
      return;
    }
    const receiptHtml = buildPaymentReceiptHtml(reservation, payment);
    try {
      if (isMobileReceiptViewport()) {
        const reservationId = String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "record");
        const isRefundReceipt =
          String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase() !== "none" ||
          String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded";
        await downloadReceiptPdfFromHtml(
          receiptHtml,
          `snapqueue-admin-${isRefundReceipt ? "refund-receipt" : "receipt"}-${reservationId}.pdf`
        );
        return;
      }
      printHtmlDocument(
        receiptHtml,
        () => ignoreFeedback("Unable to prepare receipt print.", "error")
      );
    } catch (_error) {
      ignoreFeedback(isMobileReceiptViewport() ? "Unable to download receipt." : "Unable to prepare receipt print.", "error");
    }
  }

  function handleReceiptPreviewPrint() {
    const frame = document.getElementById("admin-receipt-preview-frame");
    const targetWindow = frame?.contentWindow;
    if (!targetWindow) {
      ignoreFeedback("Unable to prepare receipt print.", "error");
      return;
    }
    try {
      targetWindow.focus();
      targetWindow.print();
    } catch (_error) {
      ignoreFeedback("Unable to print receipt.", "error");
    }
  }

  function openRefundModal(payment) {
    const paymentId = String(payment?._id || "");
    if (!paymentId) {
      ignoreFeedback("No payment record found.", "error");
      return;
    }
    const status = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
    if (status === "awaiting_payout_details") {
      ignoreFeedback("The client still needs to submit payout details before refund processing can continue.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (!["requested", "approved"].includes(status)) {
      ignoreFeedback(`Refund action is not available for status: ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}.`, "error");
      return;
    }
    const reservation = paymentReservation(payment, reservationMap);
    setSelectedPaymentId(paymentId);
    if (reservation?._id || reservation?.id) setSelectedReservationId(String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id));
    setRefundForm({
      action: "process",
      refundAdminNote: "",
      refundReferenceNumber: "",
      refundProofUrl: ""
    });
    setRefundModalError("");
    setRefundDebugInfo("Idle");
    setRefundSubmitting(false);
    setRefundModalOpen(true);
  }

  function openClientAction(type, user) {
    setClientActionModal({ open: true, type, user: user || null });
  }

  async function confirmClientAction() {
    const userId = String(clientActionModal.user?._id || "");
    if (!userId) return;
    try {
      if (clientActionModal.type === "delete") {
        await api.delete(`/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}`);
        ignoreFeedback("User deleted.");
      } else {
        await api.patch(`/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}/block`, { blocked: clientActionModal.type !== "unblock" });
        ignoreFeedback(clientActionModal.type === "unblock" ? "User unblocked." : "User blocked.");
      }
      await loadUsers();
      setClientActionModal({ open: false, type: "block", user: null });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update user."), "error");
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    setClientPage(1);
  }, [clientSearchQuery, clientFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (clientPage > clientTotalPages) {
      setClientPage(clientTotalPages);
    }
  }, [clientPage, clientTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setReservationPage(1);
  }, [bookingRequestSearchQuery, bookingRequestFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (reservationPage > reservationTotalPages) {
      setReservationPage(reservationTotalPages);
    }
  }, [reservationPage, reservationTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setProductionPage(1);
  }, [productionSearchQuery, productionFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (productionPage > productionTotalPages) {
      setProductionPage(productionTotalPages);
    }
  }, [productionPage, productionTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setPaymentPage(1);
  }, [paymentSearchQuery, paymentFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (paymentPage > paymentTotalPages) {
      setPaymentPage(paymentTotalPages);
    }
  }, [paymentPage, paymentTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setHistoryPage(1);
  }, [historySearchQuery, historyFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (historyPage > historyTotalPages) {
      setHistoryPage(historyTotalPages);
    }
  }, [historyPage, historyTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setAdvertisementPage(1);
  }, [searchQuery, advertisementStatusFilter, advertisementScheduleFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (advertisementPage > advertisementTotalPages) {
      setAdvertisementPage(advertisementTotalPages);
    }
  }, [advertisementPage, advertisementTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "system-settings" || systemSettingsView !== "newsletter") return;
    setNewsletterPage(1);
  }, [activeTab, systemSettingsView]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "system-settings") return;
    scrollSystemSettingsToTop();
  }, [activeTab, systemSettingsView]);

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    if (!["profile-settings", "system-settings", "analytics"].includes(activeTab)) return;
    const sectionId = activeTab === "profile-settings"
      ? "profile-settings"
      : activeTab === "system-settings"
        ? "system-settings"
        : "analytics";
    scrollAdminViewportToTop(sectionId);
  }, [activeTab, systemSettingsView]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const activeSubscriberCount = newsletterSubscribers.filter((subscriber) => subscriber.subscribed !== false).length;
    const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(activeSubscriberCount / 5));
    if (newsletterPage > totalPages) {
      setNewsletterPage(totalPages);
    }
  }, [newsletterSubscribers, newsletterPage]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!productionCalendarOpenId) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!productionCalendarContainerRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setProductionCalendarOpenId("");
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [productionCalendarOpenId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!advertisementCalendarOpenField) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!advertisementCalendarContainerRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField("");
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [advertisementCalendarOpenField]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!productionStageMenuOpenId) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!productionStageMenuRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setProductionStageMenuOpenId("");
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [productionStageMenuOpenId]);

  async function saveQuote() {
    if (!selectedReservationId) return;
    try {
      await api.patch(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(selectedReservationId)}/pricing`, {
        basePrice: Number(quoteForm.basePrice || 0),
        discount: Number(quoteForm.discount || 0),
        currency: quoteForm.currency || "PHP",
        customAdjustments: parseAdjustments(quoteForm.adjustmentsText)
      });
      await loadReservations();
      setQuoteModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback("Quote updated.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update quote."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function createFolder() {
    if (!selectedReservationId) return;
    try {
      await api.post("/archive/admin/folders", { reservationId: selectedReservationId, folderName: archiveForm.folderName || "Admin Delivery" });
      await loadArchiveFolders(selectedReservationId);
      ignoreFeedback("Archive folder ready.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to create folder."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function uploadFiles() {
    if (!selectedReservationId || !archiveForm.files.length) return;
    const folderName = archiveForm.folderName || "Admin Delivery";
    try {
      setUploadingFiles(true);
      setUploadProgress(0);
      const uploadedFileCount = archiveForm.files.length;
      const uploadedClientName = selectedReservation?.fullName || "Client";
      for (const [index, file] of archiveForm.files.entries()) {
        await api.post("/archive/admin/upload-file", file, {
          timeout: 120000,
          headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/octet-stream",
            "x-reservation-id": selectedReservationId,
            "x-folder-name": encodeURIComponent(folderName),
            "x-file-name": encodeURIComponent(file.name || "media"),
            "x-file-type": file.type || "application/octet-stream"
          }
        });
        setUploadProgress(Math.round(((index + 1) / archiveForm.files.length) * 100));
      }
      await loadArchiveFolders(selectedReservationId);
      setReservations((current) =>
        current.map((item) =>
          String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedReservationId || "")
            ? { ...item, hasUploadedMedia: true }
            : item
        )
      );
      setProductionMediaByReservationId((current) => ({
        ...current,
        [String(selectedReservationId || "")]: true
      }));
      setArchiveForm((current) => ({ ...current, files: [] }));
      setUploadModalOpen(false);
      setUploadProgress(0);
      ignoreFeedback("Media uploaded.");
      setUploadCompleteModal({
        open: true,
        fileCount: uploadedFileCount,
        clientName: uploadedClientName
      });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to upload files."), "error");
    } finally {
      setUploadingFiles(false);
    }
  }

  async function updatePaymentStatusById(paymentId, status) {
    if (!paymentId) return;
    try {
      const response = await api.patch(`/payments/${encodeURIComponent(paymentId)}/status`, { status });
      const updatedPayment = response?.data?.payment || null;
      const targetPaymentId = String(updatedPayment?._id || paymentId || "");
      const reservationId =
        typeof updatedPayment?.reservationId === "object"
          ? String(updatedPayment?.reservationId?._id || updatedPayment?.reservationId?.id || "")
          : String(updatedPayment?.reservationId || "");

      setPayments((current) =>
        current.map((item) =>
          String(item?._id || "") === targetPaymentId
            ? { ...item, ...updatedPayment, status }
            : item
        )
      );

      if (reservationId) {
        setReservations((current) =>
          current.map((item) => {
            if (String(item?._id || item?.id || "") !== reservationId) return item;
            if (status === "verified") {
              return {
                ...item,
                status: "approved",
                workflowStage: "awaiting_approval",
                paymentStatus: "paid",
                cancelledByRole: "",
                cancelledAt: null
              };
            }
            if (status === "rejected") {
              return {
                ...item,
                status: "rejected",
                paymentStatus: "failed",
                cancelledByRole: "admin",
                cancelledAt: new Date().toISOString()
              };
            }
            return {
              ...item,
              paymentStatus:
                status === "cancelled"
                  ? "cancelled"
                  : status === "refunded"
                    ? "refunded"
                    : ["processing", "pending", "needs_review"].includes(String(status))
                      ? "processing"
                      : item.paymentStatus
            };
          })
        );
      }
      await Promise.allSettled([loadPayments(), loadReservations()]);
      ignoreFeedback("Payment status updated.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update payment."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function resolveRefund() {
    if (!selectedPaymentId) return;
    if (refundForm.action === "reject" && String(refundForm.refundAdminNote || "").trim().length < 8) {
      setRefundModalError("Admin note is required when rejecting a refund and must be at least 8 characters.");
      ignoreFeedback("Admin note is required when rejecting a refund and must be at least 8 characters.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (refundForm.action === "process") {
      if (!/^\d{12}$/.test(String(refundForm.refundReferenceNumber || "").trim())) {
        setRefundModalError("Refund reference number must be exactly 12 digits.");
        ignoreFeedback("Refund reference number must be exactly 12 digits.", "error");
        return;
      }
      if (!String(refundForm.refundProofUrl || "").trim()) {
        setRefundModalError("Upload the refund proof image before processing the refund.");
        ignoreFeedback("Upload the refund proof image before processing the refund.", "error");
        return;
      }
    }
    try {
      setRefundModalError("");
      setRefundSubmitting(true);
      setRefundDebugInfo(`Sending refund request...\nPayment ID: ${selectedPaymentId}\nAction: ${String(refundForm.action || "").toUpperCase()}`);
      const response = await api.post(`/payments/${encodeURIComponent(selectedPaymentId)}/refund/resolve`, refundForm, { timeout: 60000 });
      setRefundDebugInfo(
        `Success\nHTTP: ${response?.status || 200}\nPayment ID: ${selectedPaymentId}\nAction: ${String(refundForm.action || "").toUpperCase()}\nMessage: ${response?.data?.message || "Refund action submitted."}`
      );
      const updatedPayment = response?.data?.payment || null;
      if (updatedPayment?._id) {
        const updatedReservationId =
          typeof updatedPayment?.reservationId === "object"
            ? String(updatedPayment?.reservationId?._id || updatedPayment?.reservationId?.id || "")
            : String(updatedPayment?.reservationId || "");
        setPayments((current) =>
          current.map((item) => (String(item?._id || "") === String(updatedPayment._id || "") ? { ...item, ...updatedPayment } : item))
        );
        if (updatedReservationId.trim()) {
          setReservations((current) =>
            current.map((item) =>
              String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === updatedReservationId
                ? {
                    ...item,
                    paymentStatus: String(updatedPayment.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded" ? "refunded" : item.paymentStatus
                  }
                : item
            )
          );
        }
      }
      setRefundModalOpen(false);
      setRefundSubmitting(false);
      ignoreFeedback("Refund action submitted.");
      Promise.allSettled([loadPayments(), loadReservations()]);
    } catch (error) {
      setRefundSubmitting(false);
      const message = errorMessage(error, "Failed to resolve refund.");
      setRefundModalError(message);
      setRefundDebugInfo(
        `Failed\nHTTP: ${error?.response?.status || "NO_RESPONSE"}\nPayment ID: ${selectedPaymentId}\nAction: ${String(refundForm.action || "").toUpperCase()}\nCode: ${error?.code || "-"}\nMessage: ${message}`
      );
      ignoreFeedback(message, "error");
    }
  }

  async function saveAd() {
    if (adForm.startDate && adForm.endDate) {
      const conflictingRange = advertisementScheduleRanges.find((item) => dateKeyRangeOverlaps(adForm.startDate, adForm.endDate, item.startDate, item.endDate));
      if (conflictingRange) {
        ignoreFeedback(`Selected dates overlap with "${conflictingRange.title}". Choose an available range.`, "error");
        return;
      }
    }
    try {
      const payload = { ...adForm, linkUrl: "/", startDate: adForm.startDate || null, endDate: adForm.endDate || null };
      if (adForm.id) await api.patch(`/ads/${encodeURIComponent(adForm.id)}`, payload);
      else await api.post("/ads", payload);
      await loadAds();
      setSelectedAdvertisementId("");
      setCampaignComposerOpen(false);
      setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM);
      ignoreFeedback("Advertisement saved.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to save advertisement."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function duplicateAd(item) {
    if (!item) return;
    try {
      const duplicateForm = adToForm(item, true);
      const payload = {
        ...duplicateForm,
        linkUrl: "/",
        startDate: duplicateForm.startDate || null,
        endDate: duplicateForm.endDate || null
      };
      await api.post("/ads", payload);
      await loadAds();
      ignoreFeedback("Advertisement duplicated.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to duplicate advertisement."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function toggleAdActive(item, nextActive) {
    if (!item?._id) return;
    try {
      await api.patch(`/ads/${encodeURIComponent(item._id)}`, {
        title: item.title || "",
        description: item.description || "",
        imageUrl: item.imageUrl || "",
        linkUrl: "/",
        isActive: nextActive,
        startDate: item.startDate ? String(item.startDate).slice(0, 10) : null,
        endDate: item.endDate ? String(item.endDate).slice(0, 10) : null
      });
      await loadAds();
      ignoreFeedback(`Advertisement ${nextActive ? "resumed" : "paused"}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, `Failed to ${nextActive ? "resume" : "pause"} advertisement.`), "error");
    }
  }

  async function removeAd(id) {
    if (!id) return;
    setDeleteAdvertisementPending(true);
    try {
      await api.delete(`/ads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`);
      await loadAds();
      if (selectedAdvertisementId === id) setSelectedAdvertisementId("");
      if (adForm.id === id) setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM);
      if (campaignComposerOpen && adForm.id === id) setCampaignComposerOpen(false);
      setDeleteAdvertisementModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback("Advertisement deleted.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to delete advertisement."), "error");
    } finally {
      setDeleteAdvertisementPending(false);
    }
  }

  function adToForm(item, duplicate = false) {
    if (!item) return EMPTY_AD_FORM;
    return {
      id: duplicate ? "" : item._id || "",
      title: duplicate ? `${item.title || "Untitled Ad"} Copy` : item.title || "",
      description: item.description || "",
      imageUrl: item.imageUrl || "",
      linkUrl: "/",
      isActive: item.isActive !== false,
      startDate: item.startDate ? String(item.startDate).slice(0, 10) : "",
      endDate: item.endDate ? String(item.endDate).slice(0, 10) : ""
    };
  }

  async function saveSystemSettings() {
    setSystemValidationAttempted(true);
    if (vacationMessageError || maintenanceMessageError) {
      ignoreFeedback(vacationMessageError || maintenanceMessageError, "error");
      return;
    }
    setSystemSaving(true);
    try {
      await api.patch("/system/admin", systemForm);
      await loadSystem();
      setSystemValidationAttempted(false);
      ignoreFeedback("System settings updated.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update system settings."), "error");
    } finally {
      setSystemSaving(false);
    }
  }

  async function removeNewsletterSubscriber(subscriberId) {
    if (!subscriberId) return;
    setNewsletterActionId(subscriberId);
    try {
      await api.delete(`/system/newsletter/admin/${encodeURIComponent(subscriberId)}`);
      await loadNewsletterSubscribers();
      ignoreFeedback("Subscriber removed from newsletter.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update subscriber."), "error");
    } finally {
      setNewsletterActionId("");
    }
  }

  function handleNewsletterCampaignChange(event) {
    const { name, value } = event.target;
    setNewsletterCampaign((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: value }));
    setNewsletterValidationAttempted(false);
    setNewsletterSendError("");
    setNewsletterSendSuccess("");
  }

  async function sendNewsletterCampaign() {
    setNewsletterValidationAttempted(true);
    const subject = trimmedNewsletterSubject;
    const message = trimmedNewsletterMessage;

    if (newsletterSubjectError || newsletterMessageError) {
      setNewsletterSendError(newsletterSubjectError || newsletterMessageError);
      setNewsletterSendSuccess("");
      return;
    }

    setNewsletterSending(true);
    setNewsletterSendError("");
    setNewsletterSendSuccess("");
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/system/newsletter/admin/send", { subject, message });
      setNewsletterSendSuccess(String(response?.data?.message || "Newsletter update sent."));
      setNewsletterCampaign((current) => ({ ...current, message: "" }));
      setNewsletterValidationAttempted(false);
      await loadNewsletterSubscribers();
    } catch (error) {
      setNewsletterSendError(errorMessage(error, "Failed to send newsletter update."));
    } finally {
      setNewsletterSending(false);
    }
  }

  async function sendChatMessage() {
    if (!selectedThreadId || !chatText.trim()) return;
    setChatSending(true);
    try {
      await api.post(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(selectedThreadId)}/messages`, { text: chatText.trim() });
      setChatText("");
      await Promise.allSettled([loadMessages(selectedThreadId, { silent: true }), loadThreads({ silent: true })]);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to send message."), "error");
    } finally {
      setChatSending(false);
    }
  }

  async function updateThreadStatus(status) {
    if (!selectedThreadId) return;
    try {
      await api.patch(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(selectedThreadId)}/status`, { status });
      await loadThreads();
      ignoreFeedback(`Thread marked ${status}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update thread."), "error");
    }
  }

  async function deleteThreadById(threadId) {
    const id = String(threadId || selectedThreadId || "");
    if (!id) return;
    setDeleteThreadPending(true);
    try {
      try {
        await api.delete(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`);
      } catch (error) {
        const status = Number(error?.response?.status || 0);
        if (status !== 404) throw error;
        try {
          await api.delete(`/chatbot/threads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`);
        } catch (legacyError) {
          const legacyStatus = Number(legacyError?.response?.status || 0);
          if (legacyStatus !== 404) throw legacyError;
          try {
            await api.post(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}/delete`);
          } catch (postError) {
            const postStatus = Number(postError?.response?.status || 0);
            if (postStatus !== 404) throw postError;
            await api.post(`/chatbot/threads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}/delete`);
          }
        }
      }
      const remainingThreads = threads.filter((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") !== id);
      const nextThreadId = String(remainingThreads[0]?._id || remainingThreads[0]?.id || "");
      setSelectedThreadId(nextThreadId);
      setDeleteThreadModalOpen(false);
      if (!nextThreadId) {
        setMessages([]);
        setMessagesError("");
        setLiveChatPanelOpen(false);
        setLiveChatBoxHidden(false);
      }
      await loadThreads({ silent: true });
      if (nextThreadId) await loadMessages(nextThreadId, { silent: true });
      ignoreFeedback("Chat deleted.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to delete chat."), "error");
    } finally {
      setDeleteThreadPending(false);
    }
  }

  async function saveProfile() {
    const fullName = String(profileForm.fullName || "").trim();
    const email = String(profileForm.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const phone = sanitizePhoneInput(profileForm.phone);
    const bio = String(profileForm.bio || "").trim();
    const nextErrors = validateAdminProfileForm({ ...profileForm, fullName, email, phone, bio });
    setProfileErrors(nextErrors);
    setProfileValidationAttempted(true);
    if (nextErrors.fullName || nextErrors.email || nextErrors.phone || nextErrors.bio) {
      ignoreFeedback(nextErrors.fullName || nextErrors.email || nextErrors.phone || nextErrors.bio, "error");
      return;
    }
    setProfileSaving(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", { ...profileForm, fullName, email, phone, bio });
      const user = response?.data?.user || me;
      setMe(user);
      syncProfileForm(user);
      setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
      setEditingProfile(false);
      ignoreFeedback("Profile updated.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to save profile."), "error");
    } finally {
      setProfileSaving(false);
    }
  }

  async function updateAdminProfilePreference(patch, successMessage) {
    setProfileSaving(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", patch);
      const user = response?.data?.user || me;
      setMe(user);
      syncProfileForm(user);
      ignoreFeedback(successMessage);
    } catch (error) {
      syncProfileForm(me);
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update profile preference."), "error");
    } finally {
      setProfileSaving(false);
    }
  }

  async function savePassword() {
    setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, error: "" }));
    const passwordContext = {
      fullName: me?.fullName || profileForm.fullName || "",
      email: me?.email || profileForm.email || ""
    };
    const requiresCurrentPassword = !adminRequiresPasswordSetup;
    const nextErrors = {
      currentPassword: requiresCurrentPassword ? (passwordForm.currentPassword ? "" : "Current password is required.") : "",
      newPassword: passwordForm.newPassword
        ? !isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, passwordContext)
          ? "Use at least 8 characters with lowercase, number, special character, and no spaces."
          : requiresCurrentPassword && passwordForm.currentPassword && String(passwordForm.newPassword) === String(passwordForm.currentPassword)
            ? "New password must be different from current password."
            : ""
        : "New password is required.",
      confirmPassword: passwordForm.confirmPassword
        ? (String(passwordForm.newPassword) === String(passwordForm.confirmPassword) ? "" : "New password and confirmation do not match.")
        : "Please confirm your new password."
    };
    setPasswordErrors(nextErrors);
    const firstErrorField = nextErrors.currentPassword ? "currentPassword" : nextErrors.newPassword ? "newPassword" : nextErrors.confirmPassword ? "confirmPassword" : "";
    if (firstErrorField) {
      setPasswordShakeField(firstErrorField);
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === firstErrorField ? "" : current)), 420);
    }
    if ((requiresCurrentPassword && !passwordForm.currentPassword) || !passwordForm.newPassword || !passwordForm.confirmPassword) {
      ignoreFeedback(requiresCurrentPassword ? "All password fields are required." : "New password and confirmation are required.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (requiresCurrentPassword) {
      try {
        await api.post("/users/me/password/verify-current", { currentPassword: passwordForm.currentPassword }, { timeout: 30000 });
      } catch (error) {
        const message = errorMessage(error, "Current password is incorrect.");
        setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: message }));
        setPasswordShakeField("currentPassword");
        window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "currentPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
        ignoreFeedback(message, "error");
        return;
      }
    }
    if (!isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, passwordContext)) {
      setPasswordShakeField("newPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "newPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback("Use at least 8 characters with lowercase, number, special character, and no spaces.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (requiresCurrentPassword && String(passwordForm.newPassword) === String(passwordForm.currentPassword)) {
      setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: "New password must be different from current password." }));
      setPasswordShakeField("newPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "newPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback("New password must be different from current password.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (String(passwordForm.newPassword) !== String(passwordForm.confirmPassword)) {
      setPasswordShakeField("confirmPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "confirmPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback("New password and confirmation do not match.", "error");
      return;
    }
    setPasswordSaving(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/users/me/password/request-otp", passwordForm, { timeout: 30000 });
      setPasswordOtpState({
        step: "otp",
        challengeId: String(response?.data?.challengeId || ""),
        code: "",
        delivery: String(response?.data?.delivery || ""),
        email: String(response?.data?.email || ""),
        expiresInSeconds: Number(response?.data?.expiresInSeconds || 0),
        devCode: String(response?.data?.devCode || ""),
        error: "",
        sending: false,
        verifying: false
      });
      ignoreFeedback(String(response?.data?.message || "Verification code sent."));
    } catch (error) {
      const message = errorMessage(error, "Failed to update password.");
      if (error?.response?.status === 401) {
        setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: "Current password is incorrect." }));
        setPasswordShakeField("currentPassword");
        window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "currentPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      }
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, error: message }));
      ignoreFeedback(message, "error");
    } finally {
      setPasswordSaving(false);
    }
  }

  function openPaymentActionModal(payment, reservation, status) {
    const paymentId = String(payment?._id || "");
    if (!paymentId || !status) return;
    setPaymentActionModal({
      open: true,
      paymentId,
      status: String(status).toLowerCase(),
      clientName: String(reservation?.fullName || paymentClientProfile(reservation)?.fullName || "Client"),
      referenceNumber: String(payment?.referenceNumber || paymentId)
    });
  }

  async function confirmPaymentAction() {
    if (!paymentActionModal.paymentId || !paymentActionModal.status) return;
    const nextPaymentId = paymentActionModal.paymentId;
    const nextStatus = paymentActionModal.status;
    setPaymentActionModal({ open: false, paymentId: "", status: "", clientName: "", referenceNumber: "" });
    await updatePaymentStatusById(nextPaymentId, nextStatus);
  }

  function openProductionDoneModal(reservationId, reservation, draft) {
    const nextReservationId = String(reservationId || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
    if (!nextReservationId) return;
    setProductionDoneModal({
      open: true,
      reservationId: nextReservationId,
      clientName: String(reservation?.fullName || "Client"),
      workflowStage: String(draft?.workflowStage || reservation?.workflowStage || "ready_for_download"),
      estimatedDelivery: String(draft?.estimatedDelivery || "")
    });
  }

  async function confirmProductionDoneAction() {
    if (!productionDoneModal.reservationId) return;
    const nextReservationId = productionDoneModal.reservationId;
    const nextWorkflowStage = productionDoneModal.workflowStage || "ready_for_download";
    const nextEstimatedDelivery = productionDoneModal.estimatedDelivery || null;
    setProductionDoneModal({
      open: false,
      reservationId: "",
      clientName: "",
      workflowStage: "",
      estimatedDelivery: ""
    });
    await updateReservationById(nextReservationId, { status: "completed", workflowStage: nextWorkflowStage, estimatedDelivery: nextEstimatedDelivery }, "Project marked as done.");
  }

  function resetAdminPasswordFlow({ keepOpen = false } = {}) {
    if (!keepOpen) setChangePasswordModalOpen(false);
    setPasswordForm({ currentPassword: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
    setPasswordErrors({});
    setPasswordOtpState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE);
    setPasswordSaving(false);
    setPasswordVisibility({ currentPassword: false, newPassword: false, confirmPassword: false });
    setPasswordShakeField("");
  }

  async function verifyAdminPasswordOtp() {
    const code = String(passwordOtpState.code || "").trim();
    if (!passwordOtpState.challengeId || !code) {
      ignoreFeedback("Enter the verification code sent to your email.", "error");
      return;
    }
    setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, verifying: true, error: "" }));
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/users/me/password/verify-otp", {
        challengeId: passwordOtpState.challengeId,
        code
      }, { timeout: 30000 });
      const nextToken = String(response?.data?.token || "").trim();
      if (nextToken) {
        window.localStorage.setItem("token", nextToken);
      }
      const nextUser = response?.data?.user || null;
      if (nextUser) {
        setMe(nextUser);
        setProfileForm((current) => ({
          ...current,
          fullName: String(nextUser?.fullName || current.fullName || ""),
          email: String(nextUser?.email || current.email || ""),
          phone: String(nextUser?.phone || current.phone || ""),
          bio: String(nextUser?.bio || current.bio || ""),
          avatarUrl: String(nextUser?.avatarUrl || current.avatarUrl || ""),
          emailNotificationsEnabled: nextUser?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false,
          twoFactorEnabled: nextUser?.twoFactorEnabled === true
        }));
      }
      resetAdminPasswordFlow();
      ignoreFeedback(String(response?.data?.message || "Password updated."));
    } catch (error) {
      const message = errorMessage(error, "Failed to verify password change code.");
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, verifying: false, error: message }));
      ignoreFeedback(message, "error");
    }
  }

  async function deletePayment() {
    if (!selectedPaymentId) return;
    try {
      await api.delete(`/payments/${encodeURIComponent(selectedPaymentId)}`);
      await Promise.allSettled([loadPayments(), loadReservations()]);
      setDeletePaymentModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback("Payment deleted.");
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to delete payment."), "error");
    }
  }

  function handleTabClick(tabId) {
    setActiveTab(tabId);
    setMobileSidebarOpen(false);
    setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
    setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
    setDesktopSidebarExpanded(false);
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    if (tabId === "analytics") {
      params.delete("tab");
    } else {
      params.set("tab", tabId);
    }
    const nextSearch = params.toString();
    navigate({ pathname: location.pathname, search: nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "" }, { replace: true });
    if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.innerWidth >= 1024) {
      setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock(true);
    }
    if (tabId !== "live-messages") {
      setLiveChatPanelOpen(false);
    }
    if (["profile-settings", "system-settings", "analytics"].includes(tabId)) {
      scrollAdminViewportToTop(tabId);
    }
  }

  function handleAvatarMenuSelect(target) {
    setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
    setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
    setMobileSidebarOpen(false);
    switch (target) {
      case "profile-settings":
        handleTabClick("profile-settings");
        return;
      case "system-settings":
        setSystemSettingsView("access");
        handleTabClick("system-settings");
        return;
      case "admin-help":
        handleTabClick("admin-help");
        return;
      case "sign-out":
        setLogoutModalOpen(true);
        return;
      default:
        handleTabClick("profile-settings");
    }
  }

  function openThread(threadId) {
    const id = String(threadId || "");
    const selectedThread = threads.find((thread) => String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "") === id) || null;
    if (selectedThread) {
      markAdminThreadSeen(id, selectedThread?.lastMessageAt || selectedThread?.updatedAt || selectedThread?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString());
      setThreads((current) => current.map((thread) => {
        const currentId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
        if (currentId !== id) return thread;
        return {
          ...thread,
          unreadCount: 0
        };
      }));
    }
    setSelectedThreadId(id);
    setLiveChatPanelOpen(true);
    setLiveChatBoxHidden(false);
  }

  async function openOrCreateThreadForClient(user) {
    const userId = String(user?._id || user?.id || "");
    if (!userId) return;
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/chatbot/live/threads/admin/open", { userId });
      const thread = response?.data?.thread || null;
      await loadThreads({ silent: true });
      openThread(String(thread?._id || thread?.id || ""));
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to open live chat thread."), "error");
    }
  }

  function toggleMobileClientSelection(userId) {
    const id = String(userId || "");
    if (!id) return;
    setSelectedMobileClientIds((current) => (
      current.includes(id) ? current.filter((item) => item !== id) : [...current, id]
    ));
  }

  async function applyBulkMobileClientAction(action) {
    const selectedIds = selectedMobileClientIds.filter(Boolean);
    if (!selectedIds.length) return;

    const selectedUsers = clientUsers.filter((item) => selectedIds.includes(String(item?._id || item?.id || "")));
    if (!selectedUsers.length) return;

    setBulkClientActionModal({ open: true, action, count: selectedUsers.length });
  }

  async function confirmBulkMobileClientAction() {
    const selectedIds = selectedMobileClientIds.filter(Boolean);
    if (!selectedIds.length) {
      setBulkClientActionModal({ open: false, action: "block", count: 0 });
      return;
    }

    const selectedUsers = clientUsers.filter((item) => selectedIds.includes(String(item?._id || item?.id || "")));
    if (!selectedUsers.length) {
      setBulkClientActionModal({ open: false, action: "block", count: 0 });
      return;
    }

    const isDelete = bulkClientActionModal.action === "delete";
    const shouldBlock = bulkClientActionModal.action === "block";

    try {
      await Promise.all(selectedUsers.map((user) => {
        const userId = String(user?._id || user?.id || "");
        if (isDelete) return api.delete(`/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}`);
        return api.patch(`/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}/block`, { blocked: shouldBlock });
      }));

      await loadUsers();
      setSelectedMobileClientIds([]);
      setMobileClientSelectionMode(false);
      setBulkClientActionModal({ open: false, action: "block", count: 0 });
      ignoreFeedback(isDelete
        ? `${selectedUsers.length} client${selectedUsers.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} deleted.`
