        : `${selectedUsers.length} client${selectedUsers.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} ${shouldBlock ? "blocked" : "unblocked"}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update selected clients."), "error");
    }
  }

  function confirmLogout() {
    setLogoutPending(true);
    setLogoutModalOpen(false);
    setMobileSidebarOpen(false);
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
    }, 250);
  }

function scrollSystemSettingsToTop() {
  if (typeof document === "undefined") return;
  const settingsSection = document.getElementById("system-settings");
  let node = settingsSection;
    while (node) {
      if (typeof node.scrollTo === "function") {
        node.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "auto" });
      }
      node = node.parentElement;
    }
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "auto" });
  }
}

function scrollAdminViewportToTop(sectionId) {
  if (typeof document === "undefined") return;
  const scrollNow = () => {
    const section = sectionId ? document.getElementById(sectionId) : null;
    let node = section;
    while (node) {
      if (typeof node.scrollTo === "function") {
        node.scrollTo({ top: 0, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
      }
      node = node.parentElement;
    }
    document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0;
    document.body.scrollTop = 0;
    document.querySelector("main")?.scrollTo?.({ top: 0, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
    }
  };

  scrollNow();
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      scrollNow();
      window.setTimeout(scrollNow, 0);
    });
  }
}

  if (loading) {
    return <PageLoadingScreen />;
  }

  const now = new Date();
  const selectedPaymentReservation = paymentReservation(selectedPayment, reservationMap);
  const verifiedPayments = payments.filter((item) => String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "verified");
  const totalRevenue = verifiedPayments.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item?.amount || 0), 0);
  const completedReservations = historyReservations.filter((item) => String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "completed");
  const averageDeliveryDays = historyReservations.length ? Math.max(0, Math.round(historyReservations.reduce((sum, item) => {
    const start = new Date(item?.createdAt || item?.eventDateTime || 0).getTime();
    const end = new Date(item?.estimatedDelivery || item?.updatedAt || item?.createdAt || 0).getTime();
    if (!start || !end || Number.isNaN(start) || Number.isNaN(end)) return sum;
    return sum + Math.max(0, (end - start) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  }, 0) / Math.max(historyReservations.length, 1))) : 0;
  const startCurrentMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
  const startPreviousMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - 1, 1);
  const previousMonthRevenue = verifiedPayments
    .filter((item) => {
      const createdAt = new Date(item?.createdAt || item?.updatedAt || 0);
      return !Number.isNaN(createdAt.getTime()) && createdAt >= startPreviousMonth && createdAt < startCurrentMonth;
    })
    .reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item?.amount || 0), 0);
  const revenueChange = previousMonthRevenue > 0 ? (((totalRevenue - previousMonthRevenue) / previousMonthRevenue) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0.0";
  const handledReservations = reservations.filter((item) => String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase() !== "pending");
  const satisfaction = handledReservations.length ? Math.min(100, Math.max(0, Math.round(((productionReservations.length + completedReservations.length) / handledReservations.length) * 100))) : 0;
  const shootsToday = productionReservations.filter((item) => {
    const eventDate = new Date(item?.eventDateTime || item?.eventDate || 0);
    return !Number.isNaN(eventDate.getTime()) && eventDate.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear() && eventDate.getMonth() === now.getMonth() && eventDate.getDate() === now.getDate();
  }).length;
  const packageSummary = Object.entries(reservations.reduce((acc, item) => {
    const key = packageLabel(item);
    acc[key] = Number(acc[key] || 0) + 1;
    return acc;
  }, {})).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  const activeSearchValue = activeTab === "users" ? clientSearchQuery : searchQuery;
  const activeSearchPlaceholder = activeTab === "analytics"
    ? "Search clients..."
    : (SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS[activeTab] || "Search records...");

  const topPackages = packageSummary.slice(0, 5).map(([label, count]) => ({ label, count }));
  const paymentsNeedingReview = paymentRows.filter(({ payment }) => String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "needs_review");
  const revenuePoints = (() => {
    const normalized = verifiedPayments
      .map((item) => ({ date: new Date(item?.createdAt || item?.updatedAt || 0), amount: Number(item?.amount || 0) }))
      .filter((item) => !Number.isNaN(item.date.getTime()));
    if (revenueRange === "daily") {
      return Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, index) => {
        const startHour = index * 4;
        const value = normalized
          .filter((item) => item.date.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear() && item.date.getMonth() === now.getMonth() && item.date.getDate() === now.getDate() && item.date.getHours() >= startHour && item.date.getHours() < startHour + 4)
          .reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);
        return { label: `${String(startHour).padStart(2, "0")}:00`, value };
      });
    }
    if (revenueRange === "weekly") {
      return Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, offset) => {
        const bucketDate = new Date(now);
        bucketDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
        bucketDate.setDate(now.getDate() - (6 - offset));
        const value = normalized
          .filter((item) => item.date.getFullYear() === bucketDate.getFullYear() && item.date.getMonth() === bucketDate.getMonth() && item.date.getDate() === bucketDate.getDate())
          .reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);
        return { label: bucketDate.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short" }), value };
      });
    }
    if (revenueRange === "annually") {
      return Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, offset) => {
        const bucketYear = now.getFullYear() - (5 - offset);
        const value = normalized
          .filter((item) => item.date.getFullYear() === bucketYear)
          .reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);
        return { label: String(bucketYear), value };
      });
    }
    return Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, offset) => {
      const bucketDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - (5 - offset), 1);
      const value = normalized
        .filter((item) => item.date.getFullYear() === bucketDate.getFullYear() && item.date.getMonth() === bucketDate.getMonth())
        .reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);
      return { label: bucketDate.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short" }), value };
    });
  })();
  const refundRequests = paymentRows.filter(({ payment }) => ["requested", "approved"].includes(String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase()));
  const openThreads = threads.filter((item) => String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "open");
  const markAdminNotificationSeen = (notificationId) => {
    const normalizedId = String(notificationId || "");
    if (!normalizedId) return;
    setSeenNotificationIds((current) => current.includes(normalizedId) ? current : [...current, normalizedId]);
  };
  const dismissAdminNotification = (notificationId) => {
    const normalizedId = String(notificationId || "");
    if (!normalizedId) return;
    setSeenNotificationIds((current) => current.includes(normalizedId) ? current : [...current, normalizedId]);
    setDismissedNotificationIds((current) => current.includes(normalizedId) ? current : [...current, normalizedId]);
  };
  const markAllAdminNotificationsRead = () => {
    setSeenNotificationIds((current) => Array.from(new Set([...current, ...visibleNotificationItems.map((item) => String(item.id || "")).filter(Boolean)])));
  };
  const notificationItems = [
    ...pendingReservations.slice(0, 4).map((reservation) => {
      const notificationId = `booking-${reservation?._id || reservation?.id || Math.random()}`;
      return {
        id: notificationId,
        title: "New booking request",
        detail: `${reservation.fullName || "Client"} - ${packageLabel(reservation)}`,
        tone: "blue",
        icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-check",
        createdAt: reservation?.createdAt || reservation?.updatedAt || "",
        onClick: () => {
          setSelectedReservationId(String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || ""));
          markAdminNotificationSeen(notificationId);
          setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
          handleTabClick("manage-reservations");
        }
      };
    }),
    ...refundRequests.slice(0, 3).map(({ payment, reservation }) => {
      const notificationId = `refund-${payment?._id || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || Math.random()}`;
      return {
        id: notificationId,
        title: "Refund needs review",
        detail: `${reservation.fullName || "Client"} - ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "requested").toUpperCase()}`,
        tone: "amber",
        icon: "fa-solid fa-wallet",
        createdAt: payment?.updatedAt || payment?.createdAt || reservation?.updatedAt || reservation?.createdAt || "",
        onClick: () => {
          setSelectedPaymentId(String(payment?._id || ""));
          markAdminNotificationSeen(notificationId);
          setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
          handleTabClick("payments");
        }
      };
    }),
    ...openThreads.slice(0, 3).map((thread) => {
      const notificationId = `thread-${thread?._id || thread?.id || Math.random()}`;
      return {
        id: notificationId,
        title: "Open live thread",
        detail: `${thread.clientName || thread.clientEmail || "Client"} - ${String(thread.status || "open").toUpperCase()}`,
        tone: "green",
        icon: "fa-solid fa-comments",
        createdAt: thread?.lastMessageAt || thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt || "",
        onClick: () => {
          openThread(String(thread?._id || thread?.id || ""));
          markAdminNotificationSeen(notificationId);
          setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
          handleTabClick("live-messages");
        }
      };
    })
  ];
  const visibleNotificationItems = notificationItems.filter((item) => !dismissedNotificationIds.includes(item.id));
  const sortedNotificationItems = [...visibleNotificationItems].sort((a, b) => {
    const aTime = getValidDate(a.createdAt)?.getTime() || 0;
    const bTime = getValidDate(b.createdAt)?.getTime() || 0;
    return bTime - aTime;
  });
  const notificationNow = new Date();
  const startOfWeek = new Date(notificationNow);
  startOfWeek.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  startOfWeek.setDate(notificationNow.getDate() - ((notificationNow.getDay() + 6) % 7));
  const startOfMonth = new Date(notificationNow.getFullYear(), notificationNow.getMonth(), 1);
  const notificationSections = [
    {
      id: "week",
      label: "This week",
      items: sortedNotificationItems.filter((item) => {
        const createdAt = getValidDate(item.createdAt);
        return createdAt && createdAt >= startOfWeek;
      })
    },
    {
      id: "month",
      label: "This month",
      items: sortedNotificationItems.filter((item) => {
        const createdAt = getValidDate(item.createdAt);
        return createdAt && createdAt < startOfWeek && createdAt >= startOfMonth;
      })
    },
    {
      id: "earlier",
      label: "Earlier",
      items: sortedNotificationItems.filter((item) => {
        const createdAt = getValidDate(item.createdAt);
        return !createdAt || createdAt < startOfMonth;
      })
    }
  ].filter((section) => section.items.length);

  const renderDesktopNotificationDropdown = () => (
    <div data-admin-notif-panel="true" className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.9rem)] z-[180] hidden w-[25rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.6rem] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.96))] shadow-[0_28px_70px_rgba(2,8,23,0.42)] backdrop-blur-xl lg:block">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 px-4 py-4">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">Notifications</h3>
          <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white/45">{sortedNotificationItems.length} item{sortedNotificationItems.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</p>
        </div>
        <button type="button" onClick={markAllAdminNotificationsRead} className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:text-white">Mark all read</button>
      </div>
      <div className="max-h-[26rem] space-y-5 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-3">
        {notificationSections.length ? notificationSections.map((section) => (
          <section key={section.id}>
            <h4 className="mb-3 px-1 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/48">{section.label}</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {section.items.map((item) => (
                <div key={item.id} className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-3 transition-all hover:border-white/14 hover:bg-white/[0.06]">
                  <button type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-start gap-2.5 text-left">
                    <span className={cx(
                      "mt-0.5 flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border text-sm",
                      item.tone === "amber" && "border-amber-400/40 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-200",
                      item.tone === "green" && "border-emerald-400/40 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-200",
                      item.tone === "blue" && "border-sky-400/40 bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-200"
                    )}>
                      <i className={item.icon} />
                    </span>
                    <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <span className="block text-sm font-bold leading-snug text-white">{item.title}</span>
                      <span className="mt-0.5 block text-xs leading-snug text-white/75">{item.detail}</span>
                    </span>
                  </button>
                  <span className="mt-0.5 flex shrink-0 items-start gap-2">
                    <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-white/45">{formatNotificationAge(item.createdAt)}</span>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => dismissAdminNotification(item.id)}
                      className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white/45 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                      aria-label={`Delete ${item.title} notification`}
                      title="Delete notification"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[10px]" />
                    </button>
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </section>
        )) : <p className="py-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300">No new notifications.</p>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
  const renderDesktopAvatarDropdown = () => (
    <div data-admin-avatar-menu="true" className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[170] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl">
      <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("profile-settings")}
        className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all duration-200 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
      >
        <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
          {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
            <SafeAvatar
              src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
              fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
              alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
              className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
              fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
            />
          ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
        </div>
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{me?.fullName || "Admin"}</p>
          <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Admin Access</p>
        </div>
      </button>
      <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
        <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("system-settings")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-sliders text-[13px]" />
          </span>
          <span>System Settings</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("admin-help")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px]" />
          </span>
          <span>Help</span>
        </button>
        <div className="my-1 border-t border-white/10" />
        <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("sign-out")}>
          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
          </span>
          <span>Sign Out</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
  const unreadLiveChatCount = threads.reduce((sum, thread) => {
    const threadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
    const isOpenThread =
      activeTab === "live-messages" &&
      !liveChatBoxHidden &&
      threadId &&
      threadId === String(selectedThreadId || "");
    if (isOpenThread) return sum;
    return sum + adminThreadUnreadFallback(thread, threadSeenMap);
  }, 0);
  const unreadNotificationCount = Math.min(
    visibleNotificationItems.filter((item) => !seenNotificationIds.includes(String(item.id || ""))).length,
    9
  );
  const actionRequiredItems = [
    {
      id: "pending-approvals",
      label: "Pending approvals",
      value: pendingReservations.length,
      helper: "Reservations waiting for admin action",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-check",
      tone: "text-blue-500",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("manage-reservations")
    },
    {
      id: "payments-review",
      label: "Payments needing review",
      value: paymentsNeedingReview.length,
      helper: "Uploads waiting for verification",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-wallet",
      tone: "text-amber-500",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("payments")
    },
    {
      id: "refund-requests",
      label: "Refund requests",
      value: refundRequests.length,
      helper: "Refunds that need follow-up",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-rotate-left",
      tone: "text-orange-500",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("payments")
    },
    {
      id: "unread-messages",
      label: "Unread live messages",
      value: unreadLiveChatCount,
      helper: "Client chats awaiting reply",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-comments",
      tone: "text-emerald-500",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("live-messages")
    }
  ];
  const projectStatusItems = [
    { id: "pending", label: "Pending", value: pendingReservations.length, tone: "bg-slate-300" },
    { id: "approved", label: "Approved", value: productionReservations.filter((item) => String(item?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "approved").length, tone: "bg-blue-500" },
    { id: "shoot_completed", label: "Shoot Completed", value: productionReservations.filter((item) => String(item?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "shoot_completed").length, tone: "bg-cyan-500" },
    { id: "editing", label: "Editing", value: productionReservations.filter((item) => String(item?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "editing").length, tone: "bg-violet-500" },
    { id: "ready_for_download", label: "Ready for Download", value: productionReservations.filter((item) => String(item?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "ready_for_download").length, tone: "bg-emerald-500" },
    { id: "completed", label: "Completed", value: completedReservations.length, tone: "bg-orange-500" }
  ];
  const recentActivityItems = [
    ...reservations.slice(0, 6).map((reservation) => ({
      id: `activity-reservation-${reservation?._id || reservation?.id || Math.random()}`,
      title: "Booking submitted",
      detail: `${reservation?.fullName || "Client"} • ${packageLabel(reservation)}`,
      createdAt: reservation?.createdAt || reservation?.updatedAt || "",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-plus",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("manage-reservations")
    })),
    ...payments.slice(0, 6).map((payment) => ({
      id: `activity-payment-${payment?._id || payment?.id || Math.random()}`,
      title: `Payment ${String(payment?.status || "submitted").replaceAll("_", " ")}`,
      detail: `${formatCurrency(payment?.amount || 0)} • ${paymentReservation(payment, reservationMap)?.fullName || "Client"}`,
      createdAt: payment?.updatedAt || payment?.createdAt || "",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-receipt",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("payments")
    })),
    ...threads.slice(0, 6).map((thread) => ({
      id: `activity-thread-${thread?._id || thread?.id || Math.random()}`,
      title: "Live chat activity",
      detail: `${thread?.clientName || thread?.clientEmail || "Client"} • ${String(thread?.status || "open").toUpperCase()}`,
      createdAt: thread?.lastMessageAt || thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt || "",
      icon: "fa-solid fa-comments",
      onClick: () => handleTabClick("live-messages")
    }))
  ]
    .sort((a, b) => (getValidDate(b.createdAt)?.getTime() || 0) - (getValidDate(a.createdAt)?.getTime() || 0))
    .slice(0, 6);
  const analyticsSearchNeedle = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
  const desktopSidebarHoverClasses = desktopSidebarCollapseLock ? {
    aside: "",
    brandCard: "",
    brandText: "",
    nav: "",
    navButton: "",
    navActive: "",
    navHover: "",
    navLabel: "",
    footer: "",
    footerButton: "",
    footerLabel: ""
  } : {
    aside: "lg:hover:w-72",
    brandCard: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-h-24 lg:group-hover/sidebar:border-white/10 lg:group-hover/sidebar:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-3 lg:group-hover/sidebar:py-3 lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100 lg:group-hover/sidebar:shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)]",
    brandText: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[160px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100",
    nav: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start",
    navButton: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:h-14 lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:self-auto lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-4",
    navActive: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:bg-white/12",
    navHover: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:hover:bg-white/10",
    navLabel: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[180px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100",
    footer: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:block",
    footerButton: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:h-14 lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-4 lg:group-hover/sidebar:hover:bg-red-500/10",
    footerLabel: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[140px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100"
  };

  function renderModals() {
    const clientActionVerb = clientActionModal.type === "delete" ? "Delete" : clientActionModal.type === "unblock" ? "Unblock" : "Block";
    const clientActionMessage = clientActionModal.type === "delete"
      ? "This client account will be permanently removed."
      : clientActionModal.type === "unblock"
        ? "This client will regain access to the platform."
        : "This client will no longer be able to sign in.";
    const receiptSrc = receiptModal.src || "";
    const proofIsImage = /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp|bmp|svg)(\?|#|$)/i.test(receiptSrc) || receiptSrc.startsWith("data:image/");
    const detailClientProfile = detailModalReservation ? paymentClientProfile(detailModalReservation) : null;

    return (
      <>
        {detailModalReservation ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] flex items-center justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-slate-950/70 p-3 backdrop-blur-md sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[22rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-white/30 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(255,255,255,0.92),rgba(239,246,255,0.98)_42%,rgba(226,232,240,0.96)_100%)] shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] ring-1 ring-white/60 sm:max-w-4xl sm:rounded-[30px]">
              <div className="relative border-b border-white/20 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a_48%,#38bdf8)] px-3 py-2.5 text-white sm:px-5 sm:py-5">
                <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.18),transparent_30%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.16),transparent_32%)]" />
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                  <div className="min-w-0">
                    <h3 className="truncate text-xl font-black tracking-tight sm:text-3xl">Reservation Details</h3>
                    <p className="mt-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold leading-5 text-blue-100 sm:mt-2 sm:text-sm">Review your complete reservation submission and current booking status.</p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setDetailModalReservation(null)} className="flex h-10 w-10 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.2)] transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-white/20 sm:h-11 sm:w-11">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-sm text-white sm:text-base" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="max-h-[56vh] overflow-y-auto px-3 py-2.5 sm:max-h-[68vh] sm:px-5 sm:py-5">
                <div className="mb-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:mb-4 sm:gap-3">
                  <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-3 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.16)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Reservation ID</p>
                    <p className="mt-1.5 break-all text-sm font-black text-slate-900">#{getDisplayReservationId(detailModalReservation)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="mb-2.5 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:mb-4 sm:gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
                  <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(16,185,129,0.14)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Booking Status</p>
                    <div className="mt-2">
                      <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${getStatusClasses(detailModalReservation?.status)} sm:px-3 sm:text-[11px]`}>
                        {detailModalReservation?.status || "Pending"}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.16)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Payment Status</p>
                    <div className="mt-2">
                      <span className="inline-flex rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-emerald-700 shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.12)] sm:px-3 sm:text-[11px] sm:tracking-[0.08em]">
                        {detailValue(detailModalReservation?.paymentStatus, "Unpaid")}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="col-span-2 rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(56,189,248,0.16)] md:col-span-1 sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Workflow Stage</p>
                    <div className="mt-2">
                      <span className="inline-flex whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border border-sky-200 bg-sky-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-sky-700 shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(56,189,248,0.12)] sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.06em]">
                        {getWorkflowStageLabel(detailModalReservation)}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[1.15fr_0.85fr]">
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-4 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)]">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-user text-[11px]" />
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Client Information</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-[56px_minmax(0,1fr)] items-start gap-3 sm:mt-4 sm:flex sm:flex-wrap sm:items-center sm:gap-4">
                        <div className="flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[18px] border border-slate-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafc,#e2e8f0)] text-lg font-black text-blue-700 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] sm:h-16 sm:w-16 sm:rounded-[20px] sm:text-xl">
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={detailClientProfile?.avatarUrl || detailModalReservation?.avatarUrl || ""}
                            fallbackSrc={detailClientProfile?.googleAvatarUrl || detailModalReservation?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={detailClientProfile?.fullName || detailModalReservation?.fullName || "Client"}
                            className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<span>{getInitial(detailClientProfile?.fullName || detailModalReservation?.fullName || "?")}</span>}
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="grid min-w-0 grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:flex-1 sm:grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-4">
                          <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Full Name</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-black leading-5 text-slate-900">{detailValue(detailClientProfile?.fullName || detailModalReservation?.fullName)}</p></div>
                          <div className="min-w-0"><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Email Address</p><p className="mt-0.5 break-words text-[13px] font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700" title={detailValue(detailClientProfile?.email || detailModalReservation?.email)}>{detailValue(detailClientProfile?.email || detailModalReservation?.email)}</p></div>
                          <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Phone Number</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailClientProfile?.phone || detailModalReservation?.phone)}</p></div>
                          <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Submitted</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700">{formatDateLabel(detailModalReservation?.createdAt)}</p></div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-4 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)]">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-file-lines text-[11px]" />
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Reservation Submission</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Service</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.service)}</p></div>
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Package / Service</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.packageName || detailModalReservation?.package || detailModalReservation?.service)}</p></div>
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Event Type</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{getEventLabel(detailModalReservation)}</p></div>
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Event Date and Time</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{formatDate(detailModalReservation?.eventDateTime || detailModalReservation?.eventDate)}</p></div>
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Estimated Delivery</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{formatDateLabel(detailModalReservation?.estimatedDelivery)}</p></div>
                        <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Package Inclusions</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.packageInclusions)}</p></div>
                        <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Other Service Details</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailModalReservation.serviceOtherDetails)}</p></div>
                        <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Custom Package Description</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.packageCustomDescription)}</p></div>
                        <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Other Event Details</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails)}</p></div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-4 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)]">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-location-dot text-[11px]" />
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Location Details</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
                        <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Full Address</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{reservationAddress(detailModalReservation)}</p></div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-4 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)]">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-note-sticky text-[11px]" />
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Notes</p>
                      </div>
                      <p className="mt-4 min-h-[120px] whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-4 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailModalReservation?.notes || detailModalReservation?.additionalNotes, "No additional notes.")}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {logoutPending ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing out" /> : null}

        {logoutModalOpen ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[18rem] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-sm sm:p-6">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500/15 text-red-300 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16"><i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-2xl" /></div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Sign Out?</h3>
              <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">Are you sure you want to end your session?</p>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setLogoutModalOpen(false)} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={confirmLogout} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{logoutPending ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing out</span></> : "Sign Out"}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {deletePaymentModalOpen ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[20rem] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[22rem] sm:p-6">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500/15 text-red-300 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16"><i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-2xl" /></div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Delete Payment?</h3>
              <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:text-sm">This action cannot be undone.</p>
              <p className="mb-4 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 sm:mb-6 sm:text-xs">Reservation: #{selectedPaymentReservation?._id || selectedPaymentReservation?.id || "-"}</p>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setDeletePaymentModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={deletePayment} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Delete</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {paymentActionModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[18rem] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[28rem] sm:p-6">
              <div className={cx(
                "mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16",
                paymentActionModal.status === "verified" ? "bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-300" : "bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-300"
              )}>
                <i className={`fa-solid ${paymentActionModal.status === "verified" ? "fa-check" : "fa-xmark"} text-2xl`} />
              </div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">
                {paymentActionModal.status === "verified" ? "Verify Payment?" : "Reject Payment?"}
              </h3>
              <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:text-sm">
                {paymentActionModal.status === "verified"
                  ? "This will mark the payment as verified and approve the booking."
                  : "This will reject the payment and mark the booking as rejected."}
              </p>
              <p className="mb-4 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 sm:mb-6 sm:text-xs">
                {paymentActionModal.clientName} • Ref {paymentActionModal.referenceNumber || "-"}
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentActionModal({ open: false, paymentId: "", status: "", clientName: "", referenceNumber: "" })} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={confirmPaymentAction}
                  className={cx(
                    "flex-1 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors sm:py-3 sm:text-sm",
                    paymentActionModal.status === "verified" ? "bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-400" : "bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-400"
                  )}
                >
                  {paymentActionModal.status === "verified" ? "Yes, Verify" : "Yes, Reject"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {productionDoneModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[18rem] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[28rem] sm:p-6">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-300 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-check-double text-2xl" />
              </div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">
                Mark Project As Done?
              </h3>
              <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:text-sm">
                This will move the project to completed and finish the production pipeline for this booking.
              </p>
              <p className="mb-4 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 sm:mb-6 sm:text-xs">
                {productionDoneModal.clientName || "Client"}
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setProductionDoneModal({ open: false, reservationId: "", clientName: "", workflowStage: "", estimatedDelivery: "" })}
                  className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm"
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={confirmProductionDoneAction}
                  className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-emerald-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-400 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm"
                >
                  Yes, Mark Done
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {deleteAdvertisementModalOpen ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:p-6">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-100 text-red-500 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16"><i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-2xl" /></div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-slate-900 sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Delete Advertisement?</h3>
              <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">This action cannot be undone.</p>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button type="button" disabled={deleteAdvertisementPending} onClick={() => setDeleteAdvertisementModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
                <button type="button" disabled={deleteAdvertisementPending || !selectedAdvertisement?._id} onClick={() => removeAd(selectedAdvertisement?._id)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-red-300 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{deleteAdvertisementPending ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {quoteModalOpen && selectedReservation ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 shadow-2xl sm:p-6">
              <div className="mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div><h3 className="text-base font-black text-white sm:text-lg">Set / Update Quote</h3><p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">Enter pricing details for this booking.</p></div>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setQuoteModalOpen(false)} className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15" title="Close"><i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" /></button>
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div><label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-400">Base Price (PHP)</label><input type="text" inputMode="decimal" value={quoteForm.basePrice} onChange={(event) => setQuoteForm((current) => ({ ...current, basePrice: event.target.value }))} placeholder="e.g. 2700 or 2,700" className="w-full rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/12 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-950 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:bg-white/14 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-400/20" /></div>
                <div><label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-400">Custom Adjustments</label><textarea rows="3" value={quoteForm.adjustmentsText} onChange={(event) => setQuoteForm((current) => ({ ...current, adjustmentsText: event.target.value }))} placeholder="Optional format: Label:Amount, Label:Amount" className="w-full resize-none rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/12 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-950 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:bg-white/14 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-400/20" /></div>
              </div>
              <div className="mt-5 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setQuoteModalOpen(false)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(51,65,85,0.88),rgba(30,41,59,0.92))] px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-100 shadow-[0_14px_28px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(239,68,68,0.22)] sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={saveQuote} className="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-blue-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#2563eb)] px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-blue-200/40 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(37,99,235,0.34)] sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Save Quote</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {receiptModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[20rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/15 bg-white p-3 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.26)] sm:max-w-2xl sm:rounded-[1.75rem] sm:p-4">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-200 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#f1f5f9)] px-1 pb-3 sm:px-2 sm:pb-4">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400">Proof Preview</p>
                  <h3 className="mt-2 truncate text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-2xl">{receiptModal.title || "Proof of Payment"}</h3>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-500 sm:mt-2 sm:text-sm">Double-click the preview to open a larger fullscreen view.</p>
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setReceiptModal({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment", loading: false })}
                  className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100 sm:h-11 sm:w-11"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-slate-600" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="mt-4 flex max-h-[56vh] items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] bg-slate-100 p-2 sm:max-h-[62vh] sm:rounded-[1.25rem] sm:p-3">
                <div className="w-full">
                  <p className="mb-3 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400">Payment Upload</p>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white">
                    {receiptModal.loading ? (
                      <div className="w-full animate-pulse">
                        <div className="rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4">
                          <div className="mx-auto h-[40vh] w-full max-w-[32rem] rounded-[0.9rem] bg-slate-200/80 sm:h-[48vh]" />
                          <div className="mx-auto mt-4 h-3 w-28 rounded-full bg-slate-200/80" />
                          <div className="mx-auto mt-2 h-3 w-48 rounded-full bg-slate-200/70" />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ) : proofIsImage ? (
                      <img src={receiptSrc} alt="Payment proof" onDoubleClick={() => setProofFullscreen(true)} className="max-h-[46vh] w-full cursor-zoom-in rounded-[1rem] object-contain sm:max-h-[54vh]" />
                    ) : (
                      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 px-6 py-10 text-center">
                        <div className="flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-600">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-file-lines text-2xl" />
                        </div>
                        <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">Proof file ready</h4>
                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-500">This proof cannot be previewed inline in the modal.</p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {receiptPreviewModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[221] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div className="w-full max-w-5xl overflow-hidden rounded-[30px] border border-white/30 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(255,255,255,0.92),rgba(239,246,255,0.98)_42%,rgba(226,232,240,0.96)_100%)] shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] ring-1 ring-white/60">
              <div className="relative border-b border-white/20 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a_48%,#38bdf8)] px-5 py-4 text-white">
                <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.18),transparent_30%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.16),transparent_32%)]" />
                <div className="relative flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-sky-200">Receipt Preview</p>
                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black tracking-tight">View / Print Receipt</h3>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <button type="button" onClick={handleReceiptPreviewPrint} className="rounded-2xl bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[#1e3a8a] shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(255,255,255,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5">
                      Print
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setReceiptPreviewModal({ open: false, html: "" })}
                      className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-white/20"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-white" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white/55 p-3 sm:p-4">
                <iframe id="admin-receipt-preview-frame" title="Receipt preview" srcDoc={receiptPreviewModal.html} className="h-[70vh] w-full rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-white shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {proofFullscreen && receiptModal.src ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[230] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90 p-3 sm:p-4" onClick={() => setProofFullscreen(false)}>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setProofFullscreen(false)}
              className="absolute right-4 top-4 flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20"
              title="Close fullscreen"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg" />
            </button>
            <img
              src={receiptModal.src}
              alt="Payment proof fullscreen"
              className="max-h-[92vh] max-w-full object-contain"
              onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
            />
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {rejectPaidReservationModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[225] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/65 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-xl overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl">
              <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-5 py-4 text-white">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-300">Paid Reservation Rejection</p>
                    <h3 className="mt-1 text-lg font-black">Reject With Refund Handling</h3>
                    <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">Paid reservations must include a refund decision before they can be rejected.</p>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setRejectPaidReservationModal({ open: false, reservation: null, payment: null, action: "pending", refundAdminNote: "", refundReferenceNumber: "", refundProofUrl: "" })}
                    className="flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-4 px-5 py-5">
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-500/10 px-4 py-3">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200">Refund SLA</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-amber-50">Refunds are processed within 3-7 business days after the client submits payout details.</p>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Action</label>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setRejectPaidReservationModal((current) => ({ ...current, action: "pending" }))}
                      className={cx("rounded-2xl border px-4 py-3 text-left transition-colors", rejectPaidReservationModal.action === "pending" ? "border-amber-300 bg-amber-500/10 text-white" : "border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10")}
                    >
                      <p className="text-sm font-black">Await Payout Details</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">Reject now, then wait for the client to submit GCash or Maya payout details.</p>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setRejectPaidReservationModal((current) => ({ ...current, action: "process" }))}
                      className={cx("rounded-2xl border px-4 py-3 text-left transition-colors", rejectPaidReservationModal.action === "process" ? "border-emerald-300 bg-emerald-500/10 text-white" : "border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10")}
                    >
                      <p className="text-sm font-black">Process Refund Now</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">Use this only if the client payout account is already on file.</p>
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Admin Refund Note</label>
                  <textarea
                    rows="3"
                    value={rejectPaidReservationModal.refundAdminNote}
                    onChange={(event) => setRejectPaidReservationModal((current) => ({ ...current, refundAdminNote: event.target.value }))}
                    className="w-full resize-none rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
                    placeholder="Explain why the reservation is being rejected and tell the client to submit payout details if needed."
                  />
                </div>

                {rejectPaidReservationModal.action === "process" ? (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    <div className="hidden sm:block">
                      <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Reference Number</label>
                      <input
                        type="text"
                        inputMode="numeric"
                        maxLength="12"
                        value={rejectPaidReservationModal.refundReferenceNumber}
                        onChange={(event) => setRejectPaidReservationModal((current) => ({ ...current, refundReferenceNumber: event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 12) }))}
                        className="w-full rounded-[0.95rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
                        placeholder="12-digit refund reference"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="hidden sm:block">
                      <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Proof</label>
                      <label className="flex min-h-[120px] cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 text-center">
                        <i className="fa-regular fa-image text-xl text-slate-300" />
                        <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-300">{rejectPaidReservationModal.refundProofUrl ? "Refund proof ready" : "Upload refund screenshot"}</p>
                        <input
                          type="file"
                          accept="image/*"
                          className="hidden"
                          onChange={async (event) => {
                            const file = event.target.files?.[0];
                            if (!file) return;
                            try {
                              const result = await readFileAsDataUrl(file);
                              setRejectPaidReservationModal((current) => ({ ...current, refundProofUrl: result }));
                            } catch (error) {
                              ignoreFeedback(error?.message || "Failed to read refund proof.", "error");
                            }
                          }}
                        />
                      </label>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 border-t border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-5 py-4 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setRejectPaidReservationModal({ open: false, reservation: null, payment: null, action: "pending", refundAdminNote: "", refundReferenceNumber: "", refundProofUrl: "" })}
                  className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15"
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  disabled={rejectPaidReservationSaving}
                  onClick={submitPaidReservationRejection}
                  className="rounded-xl bg-rose-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-rose-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                >
                  {rejectPaidReservationSaving ? "Submitting..." : rejectPaidReservationModal.action === "process" ? "Reject and Refund" : "Reject and Await Details"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {refundModalOpen && selectedPayment ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[225] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/65 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[460px] overflow-hidden rounded-[20px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl">
              <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-3.5 py-3 text-white">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-300">Refund Action</p>
                    <h3 className="mt-1 text-[15px] font-black">Manage Refund</h3>
                    <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-300">
                      {selectedPaymentReservation?.fullName || "Client"} {selectedPaymentReservation ? `• #${getDisplayReservationId(selectedPaymentReservation)}` : ""}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setRefundModalOpen(false)}
                    className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="max-h-[70vh] space-y-3 overflow-y-auto px-3.5 py-3">
                <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-sky-300/25 bg-slate-950/35 px-3 py-2.5">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200">Refund Debug</p>
                  <pre className="mt-1.5 whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-[10px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-200">
                    {refundDebugInfo}
                  </pre>
                </div>

                <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-500/10 px-3 py-2.5">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200">Current Status</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-amber-50">
                    Refund {String(selectedPayment?.refundStatus || "none").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}
                  </p>
                  {!editingProfile ? <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/70">{trimmedProfileBio || "Add a short admin bio so this profile has more context."}</p> : null}
                </div>

                <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-3">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200">Refund Details</p>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-x-3 gap-y-2 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    <div className="hidden sm:block">
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Requested By Client</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white break-words">{selectedPaymentReservation?.fullName || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="hidden sm:block">
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Requested At</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{selectedPayment?.refundRequestedAt ? formatDateTime(selectedPayment.refundRequestedAt) : "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Payout Method</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{String(selectedPayment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase()}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Payout Number</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white break-words">{selectedPayment?.refundPayoutNumber || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="sm:col-span-2">
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Client Refund Reason</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-white/90 break-words">{selectedPayment?.refundReason || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Refund Reference</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white break-words">{selectedPayment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Admin Note</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white/90 break-words">{selectedPayment?.refundAdminNote || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {selectedPayment?.refundProofUrl || selectedPayment?.hasRefundProofUrl ? (
                    <div className="mt-2.5">
                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Refund Proof</p>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={async () => {
                          if (selectedPayment?.refundProofUrl) {
                            setReceiptModal({ open: true, src: selectedPayment.refundProofUrl, title: "Proof of Refund", loading: false });
                            return;
                          }
                          const proof = await fetchPaymentProof(selectedPayment?._id);
                          if (!proof.refundProofUrl) {
                            ignoreFeedback("No refund proof uploaded yet.", "error");
                            return;
                          }
                          setReceiptModal({ open: true, src: proof.refundProofUrl, title: "Proof of Refund", loading: false });
                        }}
                        className="mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-white/12 bg-white/10 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 hover:text-white"
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-image text-[11px]" />
                        View Refund Proof
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Action</label>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-3">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setRefundModalError("");
                        setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, action: "approve" }));
                      }}
                      className={cx("rounded-[0.95rem] border px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors", refundForm.action === "approve" ? "border-emerald-300 bg-emerald-500/10 text-white" : "border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10")}
                    >
                      <p className="text-[13px] font-black">Approve</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-300">Approve the request.</p>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setRefundModalError("");
                        setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, action: "reject" }));
                      }}
                      className={cx("rounded-[0.95rem] border px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors", refundForm.action === "reject" ? "border-rose-300 bg-rose-500/10 text-white" : "border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10")}
                    >
                      <p className="text-[13px] font-black">Reject</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-300">Decline the request.</p>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setRefundModalError("");
                        setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, action: "process" }));
                      }}
                      className={cx("rounded-[0.95rem] border px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors", refundForm.action === "process" ? "border-sky-300 bg-sky-500/10 text-white" : "border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10")}
                    >
                      <p className="text-[13px] font-black">Process</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-300">Send proof and complete.</p>
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Admin Note</label>
                  <textarea
                    rows="2"
                    value={refundForm.refundAdminNote}
                    onChange={(event) => {
                      setRefundModalError("");
                      setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, refundAdminNote: event.target.value }));
                    }}
                    className="w-full resize-none rounded-[0.95rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
                    placeholder="Add a note for this refund action."
                  />
                </div>

                {refundForm.action === "process" ? (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Reference Number</label>
                      <input
                        type="text"
                        inputMode="numeric"
                        maxLength="12"
                        value={refundForm.refundReferenceNumber}
                        onChange={(event) => {
                          setRefundModalError("");
                          setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, refundReferenceNumber: event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 12) }));
                        }}
                        className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
