                        placeholder="12-digit refund reference"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400">Refund Proof</label>
                      <label className="flex min-h-[86px] cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[0.95rem] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/5 px-3 py-2.5 text-center">
                        <i className="fa-regular fa-image text-lg text-slate-300" />
                        <p className="mt-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-300">{refundForm.refundProofUrl ? "Refund proof ready" : "Upload refund screenshot"}</p>
                        <input
                          type="file"
                          accept="image/*"
                          className="hidden"
                          onChange={async (event) => {
                            const file = event.target.files?.[0];
                            if (!file) return;
                            try {
                              const result = await readCompressedImageDataUrl(file);
                              setRefundModalError("");
                              setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, refundProofUrl: result }));
                            } catch (error) {
                              setRefundModalError(error?.message || "Failed to read refund proof.");
                              ignoreFeedback(error?.message || "Failed to read refund proof.", "error");
                            } finally {
                              event.target.value = "";
                            }
                          }}
                        />
                      </label>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {refundModalError ? (
                  <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-rose-300/35 bg-rose-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-rose-100">
                    {refundModalError}
                  </div>
                ) : null}

              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 border-t border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3.5 py-3 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setRefundSubmitting(false);
                    setRefundModalError("");
                    setRefundDebugInfo("Idle");
                    setRefundModalOpen(false);
                  }}
                  className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-3.5 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15"
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={resolveRefund}
                  disabled={refundSubmitting}
                  className="rounded-xl bg-amber-500 px-3.5 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-950 transition-colors hover:bg-amber-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                >
                  {refundSubmitting ? "Submitting..." : "Submit Refund Action"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {uploadModalOpen && selectedReservation ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-[520px] overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 border-b border-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-white">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up flex-shrink-0 text-blue-300" />
                    <h3 className="truncate text-sm font-bold">
                      Send Media to <span className="text-blue-300">{selectedReservation.fullName || "Client"}</span>
                    </h3>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setUploadModalOpen(false)}
                  className="rounded-full p-1 text-sm transition-colors hover:bg-white/10"
                  title="Close upload modal"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4">
                <p className="mb-3 text-xs text-slate-300">
                  Target Reservation: <span className="font-mono font-bold text-white">#{selectedReservationId}</span>
                </p>

                <div className="mb-3 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-3">
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={archiveForm.folderName}
                    onChange={(event) => setArchiveForm((current) => ({ ...current, folderName: event.target.value }))}
                    className="rounded-lg border border-white/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 sm:col-span-2"
                    placeholder="Folder name"
                  />
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={createFolder}
                    className="rounded-xl border border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f0fdf4,#dcfce7)] px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-black text-emerald-800 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#ecfdf5,#bbf7d0)] hover:shadow-[0_14px_30px_rgba(34,197,94,0.16)]"
                  >
                    Add Folder
                  </button>
                </div>

                {archiveFolders.length ? (
                  <div className="mb-3 rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white p-3">
                    <p className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500">Existing Folders</p>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {archiveFolders.map((folder) => {
                        const folderName = String(folder?.folderName || folder?.name || "");
                        return (
                          <button
                            key={folderName}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setArchiveForm((current) => ({ ...current, folderName }))}
                            className={`rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase transition-colors ${
                              archiveForm.folderName === folderName
                                ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
                                : "border border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-200"
                            }`}
                          >
                            {folderName}
                          </button>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                <label className={`flex min-h-[110px] cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed bg-white p-4 transition-colors ${archiveForm.files.length ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50/40" : "border-slate-300 hover:border-blue-400 hover:bg-slate-50"}`}>
                  <i className="fa-regular fa-images mb-2 text-[1.5rem] text-slate-400" />
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">Click to select photos or videos</p>
                  <input
                    type="file"
                    multiple
                    accept="image/*,video/*"
                    className="hidden"
                    onChange={(event) => setArchiveForm((current) => ({ ...current, files: Array.from(event.target.files || []) }))}
                    aria-label="Select photos or videos to upload"
                  />
                </label>

                {archiveForm.files.length ? (
                  <div className="mt-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 p-3 text-xs font-bold text-blue-300">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-file-circle-check flex-shrink-0" />
                      <span>{archiveForm.files.length} file{archiveForm.files.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} selected</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-2 space-y-1">
                      {archiveForm.files.slice(0, 3).map((file) => (
                        <p key={`${file.name}-${file.size}`} className="truncate text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-200">{file.name}</p>
                      ))}
                      {archiveForm.files.length > 3 ? <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-400">+{archiveForm.files.length - 3} more</p> : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {uploadingFiles ? (
                  <div className="mt-3 rounded-xl border border-blue-300/20 bg-blue-500/10 p-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-blue-200">
                      <span>Uploading Media</span>
                      <span>{uploadProgress}%</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-2.5 h-2 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-white/10">
                      <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-[linear-gradient(90deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)] transition-all duration-300" style={{ width: `${uploadProgress}%` }} />
                    </div>
                    <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-300">Please wait while your files are being uploaded.</p>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-col justify-end gap-2 border-t border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 sm:flex-row sm:gap-2">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  disabled={uploadingFiles}
                  onClick={() => setUploadModalOpen(false)}
                  className="order-2 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(51,65,85,0.88),rgba(30,41,59,0.92))] px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-100 shadow-[0_14px_28px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(239,68,68,0.22)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:order-1"
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  disabled={uploadingFiles || !archiveForm.files.length}
                  onClick={uploadFiles}
                  className="order-1 rounded-xl border border-blue-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#2563eb)] px-4 py-2 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-blue-200/40 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(37,99,235,0.34)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-blue-300 disabled:shadow-none sm:order-2"
                >
                  {uploadingFiles ? "Uploading..." : "Send to Client Profile"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {uploadCompleteModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[230] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-5 text-center shadow-2xl sm:p-6">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-300">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-xl" />
              </div>
              <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Upload Complete</h3>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-300">
                {uploadCompleteModal.fileCount} file{uploadCompleteModal.fileCount === 1 ? "" : "s"} uploaded successfully to {uploadCompleteModal.clientName}.
              </p>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setUploadCompleteModal({ open: false, fileCount: 0, clientName: "" })}
                className="mt-5 inline-flex rounded-xl bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#2563eb)] px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)]"
              >
                Okay
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {clientActionModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-6 text-center shadow-2xl">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/10">
                {clientActionModal.user?.avatarUrl ? (
                  <SafeAvatar
                    src={clientActionModal.user.avatarUrl}
                    fallbackSrc={clientActionModal.user?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                    alt={clientActionModal.user?.fullName || "Client"}
                    className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                    fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-full w-full rounded-full" iconClassName="text-[1.55rem]" badgeClassName="h-6 w-6" />}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-full w-full rounded-full" iconClassName="text-[1.55rem]" badgeClassName="h-6 w-6" />
                )}
              </div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-lg font-black text-white">{clientActionVerb} Client?</h3>
              <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-blue-300">{clientActionModal.user?.fullName || "Client"}</p>
              <p className="mb-5 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">{clientActionMessage}</p>
              <div className="flex flex-row gap-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setClientActionModal({ open: false, type: "block", user: null })} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15">Cancel</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={confirmClientAction} className={`flex-1 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors ${clientActionModal.type === "unblock" ? "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700" : "bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600"}`}>Confirm</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {bulkClientActionModal.open ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-6 text-center shadow-2xl">
              <div className="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/10">
                {clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.avatarUrl ? (
                  <SafeAvatar
                    src={clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.avatarUrl || ""}
                    fallbackSrc={clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                    alt={clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.fullName || "Client"}
                    className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                    fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-full w-full rounded-full" iconClassName="text-[1.55rem]" badgeClassName="h-6 w-6" />}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-full w-full rounded-full" iconClassName="text-[1.55rem]" badgeClassName="h-6 w-6" />
                )}
              </div>
              <h3 className="mb-1 text-lg font-black text-white">
                {bulkClientActionModal.action === "delete"
                  ? "Delete Selected?"
                  : bulkClientActionModal.action === "block"
                    ? "Block Selected?"
                    : "Unblock Selected?"}
              </h3>
              <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-blue-300">
                {clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.fullName || "Client"}
              </p>
              <p className="mb-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/80">
                {clientUsers.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMobileClientIds[0] || ""))?.email || "client@snapqueue.com"}
              </p>
              <p className="mb-5 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                {bulkClientActionModal.action === "delete"
                  ? "These client accounts will be permanently removed."
                  : bulkClientActionModal.action === "block"
                    ? "These clients will no longer be able to sign in."
                    : "These clients will regain access to sign in."}
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-row gap-3">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setBulkClientActionModal({ open: false, action: "block", count: 0 })}
                  className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15"
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={confirmBulkMobileClientAction}
                  className={`flex-1 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors ${bulkClientActionModal.action === "unblock" ? "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700" : "bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600"}`}
                >
                  Confirm
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {changePasswordModalOpen ? (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 shadow-2xl sm:p-6">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-base font-black text-white sm:text-lg">{adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}</h3>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">
                    {passwordOtpState.step === "otp"
                      ? "Enter the OTP to confirm your password change."
                      : adminRequiresPasswordSetup
                        ? "Create a secure password for this Google account."
                        : "Update your admin password securely."}
                  </p>
                </div>
                {adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => resetAdminPasswordFlow()}
                    className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15"
                    title="Close change password modal"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
              {passwordOtpState.step === "otp" ? (
                <div className="mt-5 space-y-4">
                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-blue-400/20 bg-blue-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-200">
                    <p className="font-semibold">We sent a verification code to {passwordOtpState.email || "your email"}.</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-300">This code expires in about {Math.max(1, Math.round((passwordOtpState.expiresInSeconds || 0) / 60))} minutes.</p>
                    {passwordOtpState.devCode ? <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-300">Dev code: {passwordOtpState.devCode}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  {passwordOtpState.error ? (
                    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-rose-300/25 bg-rose-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-200">
                      {passwordOtpState.error}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  <div>
                    <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">OTP Code</label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      inputMode="numeric"
                      maxLength={6}
                      value={passwordOtpState.code}
                      onChange={(event) => setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, code: event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 6) }))}
                      onKeyDown={(event) => {
                        if (event.key === "Enter" && !passwordOtpState.verifying) verifyAdminPasswordOtp();
                      }}
                      className="w-full rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.25em] text-white focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
                      placeholder="000000"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-5 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                    {adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordOtpState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Back</button>}
                    <button type="button" onClick={savePassword} disabled={passwordSaving} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{passwordSaving ? "Resending..." : "Resend Code"}</button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={verifyAdminPasswordOtp} disabled={passwordOtpState.verifying || !String(passwordOtpState.code || "").trim()} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-blue-300 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{passwordOtpState.verifying ? "Verifying..." : "Verify & Update"}</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
                    {passwordOtpState.error ? (
                      <div className="rounded-2xl border border-rose-300/25 bg-rose-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-200">
                        {passwordOtpState.error}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                    {!adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? (
                      <div>
                        <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Current Password</label>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <input
                            type={passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                            value={passwordForm.currentPassword}
                            onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setPasswordForm((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: value })); setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: "" })); }}
                            className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.currentPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "currentPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`}
                          />
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: !current.currentPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                            <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                          </button>
                        </div>
                        {passwordErrors.currentPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.currentPassword}</p> : null}
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="rounded-2xl border border-emerald-300/20 bg-emerald-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-200">
                        This account was created with Google. We&apos;ll verify the email with OTP so you can set a password for the first time.
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">New Password</label>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <input
                          type={passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                          value={passwordForm.newPassword}
                          onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setPasswordForm((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: value })); setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: "" })); }}
                          className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.newPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "newPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`}
                        />
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: !current.newPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                          <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {passwordErrors.newPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.newPassword}</p> : null}
                      <div className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-out ${
                        passwordForm.newPassword && !isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, {
                          fullName: me?.fullName || profileForm.fullName || "",
                          email: me?.email || profileForm.email || ""
                        })
                          ? "mt-2 max-h-56 opacity-100 translate-y-0"
                          : "mt-0 max-h-0 opacity-0 -translate-y-1"
                      }`}>
                        <div className="grid gap-1">
                          {passwordChecks(passwordForm.newPassword, {
                            fullName: me?.fullName || profileForm.fullName || "",
                            email: me?.email || profileForm.email || ""
                          }).map((item) => (
                            <p key={item.label} className={`text-[11px] font-medium ${item.valid ? "text-emerald-300" : "text-slate-400"}`}>
                              <i className={`fa-solid ${item.valid ? "fa-circle-check" : "fa-circle"} mr-2 text-[10px]`} />
                              {item.label}
                            </p>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Confirm Password</label>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <input
                          type={passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                          value={passwordForm.confirmPassword}
                          onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setPasswordForm((current) => ({ ...current, confirmPassword: value })); setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, confirmPassword: "" })); }}
                          onKeyDown={(event) => {
                            if (event.key === "Enter" && !passwordSaving) savePassword();
                          }}
                          className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.confirmPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "confirmPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`}
                        />
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, confirmPassword: !current.confirmPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                          <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {passwordErrors.confirmPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.confirmPassword}</p> : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-5 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                    {adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : (
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => resetAdminPasswordFlow()}
                        className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm"
                      >
                        Cancel
                      </button>
                    )}
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={savePassword}
                      disabled={passwordSaving || (!adminRequiresPasswordSetup && !passwordForm.currentPassword) || !passwordForm.newPassword || !passwordForm.confirmPassword}
                      className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-blue-300 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm"
                    >
                      {passwordSaving ? "Sending OTP..." : "Send OTP"}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {profilePreviewUser ? (
          <div
            className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4"
            onClick={() => setProfilePreviewUser(null)}
          >
            <div
              className="w-full max-w-[320px] overflow-hidden rounded-[22px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl sm:max-w-2xl sm:rounded-[28px]"
              onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
            >
              <div className="h-24 rounded-b-[1.25rem] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.55),transparent_32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#0f172a_62%,#020617)] sm:h-44 sm:rounded-b-[1.75rem]" />
              <div className="relative px-3.5 pb-3.5 sm:px-6 sm:pb-5">
                <div className="-mt-9 mb-0 pb-3.5 sm:-mt-14 sm:pb-6">
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-start gap-4 text-left sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:gap-5">
                    <div className="relative flex-shrink-0">
                      <div className="flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)] sm:h-28 sm:w-28">
                        {profilePreviewUser.avatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={profilePreviewUser.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={profilePreviewUser?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={profilePreviewUser.fullName || "Client"}
                            className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{getInitial(profilePreviewUser.fullName || "C")}</span>}
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{getInitial(profilePreviewUser.fullName || "C")}</span>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="w-full flex-1 text-left">
                      <div className="w-full border-b-2 border-transparent text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-[1.75rem]">{profilePreviewUser.fullName || "Client"}</div>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/80 sm:mt-2 sm:text-sm">{profilePreviewUser.email || "client@snapqueue.com"}{profilePreviewUser.phone ? ` • ${profilePreviewUser.phone}` : ""}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="w-full border-t border-white/12 px-3.5 py-3.5 sm:px-6 sm:py-5">
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-5">
                  <div className="space-y-2 sm:space-y-3">
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-xs">Email Address</label>
                      <div className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-700 sm:p-3 sm:text-sm">{profilePreviewUser.email || "-"}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-xs">Phone Number</label>
                      <div className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-700 sm:p-3 sm:text-sm">{profilePreviewUser.phone || "-"}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2 sm:space-y-3">
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-xs">Joined</label>
                      <div className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-700 sm:p-3 sm:text-sm">{formatDate(profilePreviewUser.createdAt)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-xs">Client ID</label>
                      <div className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-700 sm:p-3 sm:text-sm">{getDisplayClientId(profilePreviewUser)}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2.5 border-t border-white/12 px-3.5 py-3.5 sm:flex-row sm:px-8 sm:py-6">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setProfilePreviewUser(null)}
                  className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-3 py-2 text-xs font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(96,165,250,0.26)] sm:px-5 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm"
                >
                  Close Preview
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </>
    );
  }
  function renderAnalytics() {
    const statCards = [
      { label: "Total Sales", value: formatCurrency(totalRevenue), helper: `${Number(revenueChange) >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${revenueChange}%`, helperClass: "text-green-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-up" },
      { label: "Total Bookings", value: String(reservations.length), helper: `${completedReservations.length} completed`, helperClass: "text-sky-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-calendar-days" },
      { label: "Pending Approvals", value: String(pendingReservations.length), helper: "Needs admin action", helperClass: "text-amber-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-hourglass-half" },
      { label: "Active Shoots", value: String(productionReservations.length), helper: `${shootsToday} today`, helperClass: "text-blue-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-camera" },
      { label: "Unread Messages", value: String(unreadLiveChatCount), helper: `${openThreads.length} open threads`, helperClass: "text-emerald-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-comments" },
      { label: "Avg. Delivery", value: `${averageDeliveryDays} Days`, helper: "Top 5%", helperClass: "text-purple-500", icon: "fa-solid fa-clock" }
    ];
    const filteredStatCards = analyticsSearchNeedle
      ? statCards.filter((card) => `${card.label} ${card.value} ${card.helper}`.toLowerCase().includes(analyticsSearchNeedle))
      : statCards;
    const filteredTopPackages = analyticsSearchNeedle
      ? topPackages.filter((item) => `${item.label} ${item.count}`.toLowerCase().includes(analyticsSearchNeedle))
      : topPackages;
    const showTopPackagesLoadingState = !analyticsSearchNeedle && !topPackages.length;
    const visibleTopPackages = filteredTopPackages.length
      ? filteredTopPackages
      : (showTopPackagesLoadingState ? PACKAGE_BREAKDOWN_PLACEHOLDER : []);
    const filteredActionRequiredItems = analyticsSearchNeedle
      ? actionRequiredItems.filter((item) => `${item.label} ${item.helper} ${item.value}`.toLowerCase().includes(analyticsSearchNeedle))
      : actionRequiredItems;
    const filteredProjectStatusItems = analyticsSearchNeedle
      ? projectStatusItems.filter((item) => `${item.label} ${item.value}`.toLowerCase().includes(analyticsSearchNeedle))
      : projectStatusItems;
    const filteredRecentActivityItems = analyticsSearchNeedle
      ? recentActivityItems.filter((item) => `${item.title} ${item.detail}`.toLowerCase().includes(analyticsSearchNeedle))
      : recentActivityItems;
    const analyticsHasMatches = !analyticsSearchNeedle || filteredStatCards.length || filteredTopPackages.length || filteredActionRequiredItems.length || filteredProjectStatusItems.length || filteredRecentActivityItems.length;
    const revenueRangeOptions = [
      { id: "annually", label: "Annually" },
      { id: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
      { id: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
      { id: "daily", label: "Daily" }
    ];
    const activeRevenueRangeLabel = revenueRangeOptions.find((option) => option.id === revenueRange)?.label || "Monthly";

    return (
      <section id="analytics" className={cx("space-y-6 px-3 pb-3 pt-0 -mt-14 sm:space-y-8 sm:px-4 sm:pb-4 sm:pt-0 sm:-mt-10 md:px-6 md:pb-6 md:pt-0 md:-mt-12 lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-6xl lg:px-8 lg:pb-8 lg:pt-0 lg:-mt-16", activeTab !== "analytics" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="relative z-0 px-0 pt-6 pb-0 sm:border-0 sm:bg-transparent sm:px-0 sm:pt-0 sm:pb-0 sm:backdrop-blur-0">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white sm:text-3xl">Data Analytics</h2>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/80 sm:text-base">Performance overview and live dashboard insights</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {!analyticsHasMatches ? (
          <div className="admin-analytics-panel rounded-[30px] p-6 text-center sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-8">
            <p className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400">No dashboard matches</p>
            <p className="mt-2 text-base font-semibold text-white">No analytics results found for "{searchQuery.trim()}".</p>
          </div>
        ) : null}
        <div className={cx("grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 sm:gap-4", !filteredStatCards.length && "hidden")}>
          {filteredStatCards.map((card, index) => (
            <div key={card.label} className="admin-analytics-kpi rounded-[26px] p-4 sm:p-5" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 60}ms` }}>
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div>
                  <p className="mb-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">{card.label}</p>
                  <h3 className="text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-[1.7rem]">{card.value}</h3>
                </div>
                <span className="mt-1 text-lg text-white/35"><i className={card.icon} /></span>
              </div>
              <div className="my-3 h-px bg-white/10" />
              <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold sm:text-[11px] ${card.helperClass}`}><i className={cx(card.icon, "w-3 text-center")} /><span>{card.helper}</span></div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className={cx("admin-analytics-separator", !(filteredStatCards.length && (visibleTopPackages.length || filteredActionRequiredItems.length || filteredProjectStatusItems.length || filteredRecentActivityItems.length)) && "hidden")} />
        <div className={cx("grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,2.15fr)_minmax(300px,0.85fr)]", !visibleTopPackages.length && "xl:grid-cols-1")}>
          <div className="admin-analytics-panel overflow-visible rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6">
            <div className="mb-4 border-b border-white/10 pb-4 sm:mb-6 sm:flex sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
              <h4 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-sm"><i className="fa-solid fa-chart-column text-blue-400" />Sales Trend</h4>
              <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 self-start sm:mt-0 sm:self-auto">
                <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Range</label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setRevenueRangeMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex min-w-[132px] items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-left text-xs font-black text-slate-700 shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)] transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Sales range (${activeRevenueRangeLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Sales range (${activeRevenueRangeLabel})`}
                  >
                    <span>{activeRevenueRangeLabel}</span>
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${revenueRangeMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                  </button>
                  {revenueRangeMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                      {revenueRangeOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setRevenueRange(option.id);
                            setRevenueRangeMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${revenueRange === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {revenueRange === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="h-[240px] sm:h-64"><MiniRevenueChart points={revenuePoints} /></div>
          </div>
          <div className={cx("admin-analytics-panel overflow-visible rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6", !visibleTopPackages.length && "hidden")}>
            <div className="mb-4 border-b border-white/10 pb-4 sm:mb-6">
              <h4 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-sm"><i className="fa-solid fa-chart-pie text-blue-400" />Top Packages</h4>
            </div>
            <div className="h-[240px] sm:h-64">
              <PackageBreakdownChart items={visibleTopPackages} isLoading={showTopPackagesLoadingState} />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:gap-6">
          <div className="admin-analytics-panel rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6">
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">
              <div>
                <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-white">Newsletter Subscribers</h4>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/65">Manage footer signups collected from the public site.</p>
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  handleTabClick("system-settings");
                  setSystemSettingsView("newsletter");
                }}
                className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-blue-300 transition-colors hover:text-blue-200"
              >
                Open
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="mb-4 grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Total</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-white">{newsletterTotals.all}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Active</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-emerald-300">{newsletterTotals.active}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Removed</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-rose-300">{newsletterTotals.inactive}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="hidden space-y-3 overflow-y-auto pr-1 max-h-[30.5rem]">
              {newsletterLoading ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">Loading subscribers...</p> : null}
              {!newsletterLoading && !newsletterSubscribers.filter((subscriber) => subscriber.subscribed !== false).length ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No active newsletter subscribers.</p> : null}
              {!newsletterLoading ? newsletterSubscribers.filter((subscriber) => subscriber.subscribed !== false).map((subscriber) => (
                <div key={subscriber._id} className="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] p-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm font-black text-white">{subscriber.email}</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/55">
                      {subscriber.subscribed !== false ? "Active subscriber" : "Removed"} · Source: {subscriber.source || "footer"} · {subscriber.subscribedAt ? formatDateTime(subscriber.subscribedAt) : "Pending"}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={newsletterActionId === subscriber._id}
                    onClick={() => removeNewsletterSubscriber(subscriber._id)}
                    className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-rose-300/25 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-rose-200 transition-colors hover:bg-rose-400/10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
                  >
                    {newsletterActionId === subscriber._id ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
                  </button>
                </div>
              )) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className={cx("admin-analytics-separator", !(filteredActionRequiredItems.length || filteredProjectStatusItems.length || filteredRecentActivityItems.length) && "hidden")} />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:gap-6 xl:grid-cols-3">
          <div className={cx("admin-analytics-panel rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6", !filteredActionRequiredItems.length && "hidden")}>
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">
              <h4 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-sm"><i className="fa-solid fa-bolt text-amber-400" />Action Required</h4>
              <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">{actionRequiredItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.value, 0)} items</span>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {filteredActionRequiredItems.map((item, index) => (
                <button key={item.id} type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="group flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-left transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/18 hover:bg-white/[0.07]" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 70}ms` }}>
                  <span className="min-w-0">
                    <span className={cx("flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-black", item.tone)}><i className={item.icon} /><span className="truncate text-white">{item.label}</span></span>
                    <span className="mt-1 block text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-400">{item.helper}</span>
                  </span>
                  <span className="ml-3 shrink-0 text-2xl font-black text-white">{item.value}</span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={cx("admin-analytics-panel rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6", !filteredProjectStatusItems.length && "hidden")}>
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">
              <h4 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-sm"><i className="fa-solid fa-diagram-project text-violet-400" />Project Status</h4>
              <button type="button" onClick={() => handleTabClick("order-status")} className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-blue-300 transition-colors hover:text-blue-200">Open</button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {filteredProjectStatusItems.map((item, index) => (
                <div key={item.id} className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 50}ms` }}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className={cx("h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full", item.tone)} />
                      <span className="text-sm font-black text-white">{item.label}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-black text-white">{item.value}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={cx("admin-analytics-panel rounded-[30px] p-4 sm:rounded-[34px] sm:p-6", !filteredRecentActivityItems.length && "hidden")}>
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">
              <h4 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-sm"><i className="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left text-sky-400" />Recent Activity</h4>
              <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Latest updates</span>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {filteredRecentActivityItems.length ? filteredRecentActivityItems.map((item, index) => (
                <button key={item.id} type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="group flex w-full items-start gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-left transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/18 hover:bg-white/[0.07]" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 60}ms` }}>
                  <span className="mt-0.5 flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-slate-200">
                    <i className={item.icon} />
                  </span>
                  <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <span className="block truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{item.title}</span>
                    <span className="mt-1 block truncate text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-400">{item.detail}</span>
                  </span>
                  <span className="shrink-0 text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-500">{formatNotificationAge(item.createdAt)}</span>
                </button>
              )) : <p className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-400">No recent activity yet.</p>}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  async function toggleAdminTwoFactor() {
    const nextValue = !profileForm.twoFactorEnabled;
    setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: nextValue }));
    try {
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", { twoFactorEnabled: nextValue });
      const persisted = response?.data?.user?.twoFactorEnabled === true;
      const nextUser = response?.data?.user || me;
      setMe(nextUser);
      setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: persisted }));
      ignoreFeedback(`Two-factor authentication ${persisted ? "enabled" : "disabled"}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: !nextValue }));
      ignoreFeedback(errorMessage(error, "Failed to update two-factor authentication."), "error");
    }
  }

  function renderUsers() {
    const filterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All" },
      { id: "active", label: "Active" },
      { id: "blocked", label: "Blocked" },
      { id: "recent", label: "Recent" }
    ];
    const activeFilterLabel = filterOptions.find((option) => option.id === clientFilter)?.label || "All";
    const selectedMobileUsers = clientUsers.filter((item) => selectedMobileClientIds.includes(String(item?._id || item?.id || "")));
    const selectedMobileCount = selectedMobileUsers.length;
    const allSelectedBlocked = selectedMobileCount > 0 && selectedMobileUsers.every((item) => Boolean(item?.isBlocked));
    const paginationStart = filteredUsers.length ? ((clientPage - 1) * clientPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const paginationEnd = Math.min(clientPage * clientPageSize, filteredUsers.length);

    return (
      <section id="users" className={cx("flex min-h-screen w-full flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-0", activeTab !== "users" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex w-full flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="mb-3 hidden items-center justify-between sm:hidden">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setMobileSidebarOpen(true)}
                className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                aria-label="Open menu"
                title="Open menu"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-bars text-sm" />
              </button>
              <div />
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Client List</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredUsers.length ? `${paginationStart}-${paginationEnd} of ${filteredUsers.length}` : "0"} result{filteredUsers.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} shown</p>
                </div>
              <div className="flex w-auto flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={clientSearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setClientSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search clients..."
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative hidden w-auto shrink-0 sm:block">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setClientFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter clients (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter clients (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${clientFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                    </button>
                    {clientFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute left-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-44">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setClientFilter(option.id);
                              setClientFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${clientFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {clientFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden shrink-0 items-center gap-2 sm:flex">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      handleTabClick("live-messages");
                      setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                    title="Live messages"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button
                      data-admin-notif-button="true"
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                      title="Notifications"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                    <button
                      data-admin-avatar-button="true"
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                      title="Admin menu"
                    >
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                            fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                          />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                      </span>
                    </button>
                    {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-3 space-y-2 sm:hidden">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setMobileClientSelectionMode((current) => !current);
                    setSelectedMobileClientIds([]);
                  }}
                  className={`inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] ${mobileClientSelectionMode ? "bg-white/15 text-white" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/85"}`}
                >
                  <i className={`fa-solid ${mobileClientSelectionMode ? "fa-xmark" : "fa-check-double"} text-[11px]`} />
                  {mobileClientSelectionMode ? "Cancel" : "Select"}
                </button>
                <div className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-2">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={!selectedMobileCount}
                    onClick={() => applyBulkMobileClientAction(allSelectedBlocked ? "unblock" : "block")}
                    className={`flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border shadow-sm transition-all ${selectedMobileCount ? (allSelectedBlocked ? "border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700" : "border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffaf0,#fef3c7)] text-amber-700") : "border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-300"}`}
                    title={allSelectedBlocked ? "Unblock selected clients" : "Block selected clients"}
                    aria-label={allSelectedBlocked ? "Unblock selected clients" : "Block selected clients"}
                  >
                    <i className={`fa-solid ${allSelectedBlocked ? "fa-user-check" : "fa-user-slash"} text-[15px]`} />
                  </button>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={!selectedMobileCount}
                    onClick={() => applyBulkMobileClientAction("delete")}
                    className={`flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 shadow-sm transition-all ${selectedMobileCount ? "bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] text-rose-700" : "bg-slate-100 text-slate-300 border-slate-200"}`}
                    title="Delete selected clients"
                    aria-label="Delete selected clients"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-[15px]" />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setClientFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter clients (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter clients (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${clientFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                    </button>
                    {clientFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-44 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setClientFilter(option.id);
                              setClientFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${clientFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {clientFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              {mobileClientSelectionMode ? (
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-3 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/80">
                  {selectedMobileCount} selected
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid min-h-[calc(100dvh-10.5rem)] flex-1 content-start grid-cols-1 gap-3 p-2 sm:hidden">
            {paginatedUsers.length ? paginatedUsers.map((user) => (
              <div
                key={user._id || user.email}
                className="group rounded-[20px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-blue-200/60 hover:bg-white/[0.12] hover:shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(148,163,184,0.16)] active:scale-[0.99]"
              >
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  {mobileClientSelectionMode ? (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => toggleMobileClientSelection(user._id || user.id)}
                      className={`mt-1 flex h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-md border ${selectedMobileClientIds.includes(String(user._id || user.id || "")) ? "border-white bg-white text-slate-900" : "border-white/30 bg-white/10 text-transparent"}`}
                      aria-label={selectedMobileClientIds.includes(String(user._id || user.id || "")) ? "Deselect client" : "Select client"}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" />
                    </button>
                  ) : null}
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setProfilePreviewUser(user)}
                    className="block min-w-0 flex-1 text-left"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      {user.avatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={user.avatarUrl}
                          fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                          alt={user.fullName || "Client"}
                          className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 object-cover"
                          fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                      )}
                      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                          <p className="truncate pr-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-blue-200">{user.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                          {user.isBlocked ? <span className="rounded-full bg-red-100 px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-red-600">Blocked</span> : null}
                        </div>
                        <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/80 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white/90">{user.email || "-"}</p>
                        <div className="mt-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-white/65 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white/80">
                          <span className="truncate">{user.phone || "No phone number"}</span>
                          <span className="h-1 w-1 rounded-full bg-slate-300" />
                          <span className="truncate">Joined {formatDate(user.createdAt)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                </div>
                {!mobileClientSelectionMode ? (
                  <div className="mt-3 border-t border-slate-100 pt-2 text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-400">
                    Tap card to preview
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            )) : (
              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No clients matched your search.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="relative z-0 hidden flex-1 overflow-x-auto sm:block">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Email Address</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Phone Number</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Date Joined</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
            {paginatedUsers.length ? paginatedUsers.map((user) => (
                  <tr
                    key={user._id || user.email}
                    className="group cursor-pointer bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)]"
                    onClick={() => setProfilePreviewUser(user)}
                  >
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        {user.avatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={user.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={user.fullName || "Client"}
                            className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 object-cover"
                            fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                        )}
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                          <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">
                            <span className="transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-blue-200">
                            {user.fullName || "Client"}
                            </span>
                            {user.isBlocked ? <span className="ml-2 rounded-full bg-red-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-red-600">Blocked</span> : null}
                          </p>
                          <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white/90">Open profile preview</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white">{user.email || "-"}</td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white">{user.phone || "-"}</td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/75 transition-colors duration-200 group-hover:text-white/90">{formatDate(user.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={(event) => {
                            event.stopPropagation();
                            openClientAction(user.isBlocked ? "unblock" : "block", user);
                          }}
                          className={`flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md ${user.isBlocked ?
