"border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)]" : "border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffaf0,#fef3c7)] text-amber-700 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)]"}`}
                          title={user.isBlocked ? "Unblock client" : "Block client"}
                          aria-label={user.isBlocked ? "Unblock client" : "Block client"}
                        >
                          <i className={`fa-solid ${user.isBlocked ? "fa-user-check" : "fa-user-slash"} text-[15px]`} />
                        </button>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={(event) => {
                            event.stopPropagation();
                            openClientAction("delete", user);
                          }}
                          className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] text-rose-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-rose-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#fecdd3)] hover:shadow-md"
                          title="Delete client"
                          aria-label="Delete client"
                        >
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-[15px]" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No clients matched your search.</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div
            className={cx(
              "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-2 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:fixed sm:bottom-0 sm:h-auto sm:px-4 sm:py-3.5 sm:pb-3.5",
              "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
              desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
            )}
          >
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">
                Page {clientPage} of {clientTotalPages}
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setClientPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))}
                  disabled={clientPage === 1}
                  className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                >
                  Prev
                </button>
                <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                  {Array.from({ length: clientTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                    .slice(Math.max(0, clientPage - 3), Math.max(0, clientPage - 3) + 5)
                    .map((pageNumber) => (
                      <button
                        key={pageNumber}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setClientPage(pageNumber)}
                        className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${clientPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}
                      >
                        {pageNumber}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setClientPage((current) => Math.min(clientTotalPages, current + 1))}
                  disabled={clientPage === clientTotalPages}
                  className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                >
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderManageReservations() {
    const filterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All" },
      { id: "verified_payment", label: "Verified Payment" },
      { id: "awaiting_payment", label: "Awaiting Payment" },
      { id: "custom", label: "Custom Package" }
    ];
    const activeFilterLabel = filterOptions.find((option) => option.id === bookingRequestFilter)?.label || "All";
    const paginationStart = filteredPendingReservations.length ? ((reservationPage - 1) * reservationPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const paginationEnd = Math.min(reservationPage * reservationPageSize, filteredPendingReservations.length);

    return (
      <section id="manage-reservations" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-28", activeTab !== "manage-reservations" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Booking Requests</h2>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredPendingReservations.length ? `${paginationStart}-${paginationEnd} of ${filteredPendingReservations.length}` : "0"} pending request{filteredPendingReservations.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setBookingRequestFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter booking requests (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter booking requests (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${bookingRequestFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                  </button>
                  {bookingRequestFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-56 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                      {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setBookingRequestFilter(option.id);
                            setBookingRequestFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${bookingRequestFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {bookingRequestFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={bookingRequestSearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setBookingRequestSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search booking requests..."
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-auto">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setBookingRequestFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter booking requests (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter booking requests (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${bookingRequestFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                    </button>
                    {bookingRequestFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-56">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setBookingRequestFilter(option.id);
                              setBookingRequestFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${bookingRequestFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {bookingRequestFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden shrink-0 items-center gap-2 sm:flex">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      handleTabClick("live-messages");
                      setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                    title="Live messages"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button
                      data-admin-notif-button="true"
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                      title="Notifications"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                    <button
                      data-admin-avatar-button="true"
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                      title="Admin menu"
                    >
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar src={me?.avatarUrl || ""} fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""} alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"} className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover" fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />} />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                      </span>
                    </button>
                    {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="grid min-h-[calc(100dvh-10.5rem)] flex-1 content-start grid-cols-1 gap-[10px] p-2 sm:hidden">
            {paginatedPendingReservations.length ? paginatedPendingReservations.map((reservation, index) => {
              const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
              const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
              const canApproveBooking = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation) === "verified";
              const isCustomPackage = String(packageLabel(reservation)).toLowerCase() === "custom";
              const quoteAccepted = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase() === "accepted";
              const quoteValue = Number(reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || reservation.basePrice || 0) > 0
                ? formatCurrency(reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || reservation.basePrice || 0, reservation.currency || "PHP")
                : "Awaiting quote";
              const isFirst = index === 0;
              const isLast = index === paginatedPendingReservations.length - 1;

              return (
                <div
                  key={reservationId}
                  className="relative self-start rounded-[18px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur-xl"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                      <SafeAvatar
                        src={reservation.avatarUrl}
                        fallbackSrc={reservation?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                        alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"}
                        className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                        fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                    )}
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                        <p className="truncate pr-2 text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                        <span className="rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-white/80">
                          Pending
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/80">{reservation.email || "-"}</p>
                      <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-[0.85fr_0.85fr_1.3fr] gap-1.5 border-b border-white/10 pb-2">
                        <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                          <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Package</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{packageLabel(reservation)}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                          <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Quote</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{quoteValue}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                          <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Date And Time</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-2.5 py-2 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      Full Details
                    </button>
                    <div className={`grid gap-2 ${isCustomPackage && !quoteAccepted ? "grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.35fr)_minmax(0,1.1fr)]" : "hidden"}`}>
                      {isCustomPackage && !quoteAccepted ? (
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => openQuoteModal(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-8 w-full items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] px-3 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-amber-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)]">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-tags text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                          Quote
                        </button>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            }) : (
              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No pending booking requests.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="relative z-0 hidden flex-1 overflow-x-auto sm:block">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Package</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Date And Time</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Custom Quote</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                {paginatedPendingReservations.length ? paginatedPendingReservations.map((reservation) => {
                  const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
                  const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
                  const canApproveBooking = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation) === "verified";
                  const isCustomPackage = String(packageLabel(reservation)).toLowerCase() === "custom";
                  const quoteAccepted = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase() === "accepted";
                  const quoteValue = Number(reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || reservation.basePrice || 0) > 0
                    ? formatCurrency(reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || reservation.basePrice || 0, reservation.currency || "PHP")
                    : "Awaiting quote";

                  return (
                    <tr key={reservationId} className="group bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)]">
                      <td className="px-6 py-5">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={reservation.avatarUrl}
                              fallbackSrc={reservation?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                              alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"}
                              className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                              fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                            />
                          ) : (
                            <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                          )}
                          <div className="min-w-0">
                            <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{packageLabel(reservation)}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{quoteValue}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4">
                        <div className={`ml-auto grid gap-1.5 ${isCustomPackage && !quoteAccepted ? "max-w-[18rem] grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.45fr)_minmax(0,1.05fr)]" : "max-w-[9.5rem] grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)]"}`}>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 py-2 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                            Full Details
                          </button>
                          {isCustomPackage && !quoteAccepted ? (
                            <button type="button" onClick={() => openQuoteModal(reservation)} className="group inline-flex min-h-[36px] items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] px-3 py-2 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-amber-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)]">
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-tags text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                              Quote
                            </button>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                }) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No pending booking requests.</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          <div
            className={cx(
              "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-2 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:fixed sm:bottom-0 sm:h-auto sm:px-4 sm:py-3.5 sm:pb-3.5",
              "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
              desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
            )}
          >
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">
                Page {reservationPage} of {reservationTotalPages}
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setReservationPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))}
                  disabled={reservationPage === 1}
                  className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                >
                  Prev
                </button>
                <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                  {Array.from({ length: reservationTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                    .slice(Math.max(0, reservationPage - 3), Math.max(0, reservationPage - 3) + 5)
                    .map((pageNumber) => (
                      <button
                        key={pageNumber}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setReservationPage(pageNumber)}
                        className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${reservationPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}
                      >
                        {pageNumber}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setReservationPage((current) => Math.min(reservationTotalPages, current + 1))}
                  disabled={reservationPage === reservationTotalPages}
                  className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                >
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderOrderStatus() {
    const filterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All" },
      { id: "verified_payment", label: "Verified Payment" },
      { id: "editing", label: "Editing" },
      { id: "shoot_completed", label: "Shoot Completed" },
      { id: "ready_for_download", label: "Ready For Download" }
    ];
    const activeFilterLabel = filterOptions.find((option) => option.id === productionFilter)?.label || "All";
    const paginationStart = filteredProductionReservations.length ? ((productionPage - 1) * productionPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const paginationEnd = Math.min(productionPage * productionPageSize, filteredProductionReservations.length);

    return (
      <section id="order-status" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-0", activeTab !== "order-status" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Production Pipeline</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredProductionReservations.length ? `${paginationStart}-${paginationEnd} of ${filteredProductionReservations.length}` : "0"} active project{filteredProductionReservations.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setProductionFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter active projects (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter active projects (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${productionFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                  </button>
                  {productionFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-60 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                      {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setProductionFilter(option.id);
                            setProductionFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${productionFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {productionFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={productionSearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setProductionSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search active projects..."
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-auto">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setProductionFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter active projects (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter active projects (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${productionFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                    </button>
                    {productionFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-60">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setProductionFilter(option.id);
                              setProductionFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${productionFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {productionFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden shrink-0 items-center gap-2 sm:flex">
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { handleTabClick("live-messages"); setAdminNotificationsOpen(false); }} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Live messages">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button data-admin-notif-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                    <button data-admin-avatar-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Admin menu">
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar src={me?.avatarUrl || ""} fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""} alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"} className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover" fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />} />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]"><i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} /></span>
                    </button>
                    {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid min-h-[calc(100dvh-10.5rem)] flex-1 content-start grid-cols-1 gap-2 p-2 sm:hidden">
            {paginatedProductionReservations.length ? paginatedProductionReservations.map((reservation) => {
              const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
              const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
              const draft = reservationDrafts[reservationId] || { workflowStage: String(reservation?.workflowStage || "awaiting_approval"), estimatedDelivery: formatDateOnlyInput(reservation?.estimatedDelivery) };
              const paymentVerified = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation) === "verified";
              const workflowReady = String(draft.workflowStage || reservation?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "ready_for_download";
              const hasUploadedMedia = Boolean(reservation?.hasUploadedMedia || productionMediaByReservationId[reservationId]);
              const canMarkDone = paymentVerified && workflowReady && hasUploadedMedia;
              const productionStageOpen = productionStageMenuOpenId === reservationId;
              const productionCalendarOpen = productionCalendarOpenId === reservationId;
              const markDoneTitle = !paymentVerified
                ? "Payment must be verified first"
                : !workflowReady
                  ? "Set the progress to Ready for Download first"
                  : !hasUploadedMedia
                    ? "Upload delivery media before marking this as done"
                    : "Mark as done";
              const showRefund = payment && ["requested", "approved"].includes(String(payment.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase());
              return (
                <div
                  key={reservationId}
                  className={cx(
                    "relative self-start rounded-[18px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_14px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl",
                    productionStageOpen || productionCalendarOpen ? "z-[160] overflow-visible" : "z-0"
                  )}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                      <img src={reservation.avatarUrl} alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"} className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" />
                    ) : (
                      <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">
                        {getInitial(reservation.fullName || "C")}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                        <div className="min-w-0 pr-2">
                          <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[11px] font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                        </div>
                        <span className="shrink-0 rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white/80">
                          {payment ? String(payment.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ") : "No Payment"}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-[0.85fr_0.85fr_1.3fr] gap-1.5 border-b border-white/10 pb-2">
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Package</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{packageLabel(reservation)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Stage</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{WORKFLOW_STAGES.find((option) => option.value === draft.workflowStage)?.label || "In Progress"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Date And Time</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <div
                      ref={productionStageOpen ? productionStageMenuRef : null}
                      className="relative"
                    >
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setProductionCalendarOpenId("");
                              setProductionStageMenuOpenId((current) => (current === reservationId ? "" : reservationId));
                            }}
                            className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 py-2.5 text-left text-[10px] font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                          >
                            <span>{WORKFLOW_STAGES.find((option) => option.value === draft.workflowStage)?.label || "In Progress"}</span>
                            <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${productionStageOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[11px] text-slate-500`} />
                          </button>
                          {productionStageOpen ? (
                            <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                              {WORKFLOW_STAGES.map((option) => (
                                <button
                                  key={option.value}
                                  type="button"
                                  onClick={() => {
                                    setProductionWorkflowStage(reservationId, reservation, option.value);
                                    setProductionStageMenuOpenId("");
                                  }}
                                  className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${draft.workflowStage === option.value ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                                >
                                  <span>{option.label}</span>
                                  {draft.workflowStage === option.value ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                                </button>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                    </div>
                    <div
                      ref={productionCalendarOpen ? productionCalendarContainerRef : null}
                      className="relative"
                    >
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => openProductionCalendar(reservationId, draft.estimatedDelivery)}
                        className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 py-2.5 text-left text-[10px] font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                      >
                        <span>{draft.estimatedDelivery ? formatDate(draft.estimatedDelivery) : "Estimated Delivery"}</span>
                        <i className="fa-regular fa-calendar text-[12px] text-slate-500" />
                      </button>
                      {productionCalendarOpen ? (
                        <div ref={productionCalendarPopupRef} className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.4rem)] z-[100] w-[min(228px,calc(100vw-2rem))] overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-slate-300/30">
                          <div className="p-2">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, -1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Previous month">
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                                </svg>
                              </button>
                              <div className="text-center">
                                <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-900">{formatMonthLabel(productionCalendarMonth)}</p>
                                <p className="text-[8px] font-medium text-slate-500">Select date</p>
                              </div>
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, 1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Next month">
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                </svg>
                              </button>
                            </div>
                            <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-7 gap-0.5">
                              {CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS.map((day) => <p key={day} className="text-center text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">{day}</p>)}
                              {buildCalendarDays(productionCalendarMonth).map((day) => {
                                const bookedDate = getReservationBookedDateKey(reservation);
                                const minDate = getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation);
                                const isPastDate = day.dateKey < minDate;
                                const isDisabled = !day.inMonth || isPastDate;
                                const isBookedDate = bookedDate === day.dateKey;
                                return (
                                  <button
                                    key={day.dateKey}
                                    type="button"
                                    disabled={isDisabled}
                                    onClick={() => {
                                      if (isDisabled) return;
                                      handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, day.dateKey);
                                      setProductionCalendarOpenId("");
                                    }}
                                    className={`aspect-square rounded-md border text-[10px] font-bold transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none ${productionCalendarDayClass(day, draft.estimatedDelivery || "", bookedDate, minDate)}`}
                                    title={isBookedDate ? "Client booked date" : undefined}
                                    aria-label={isBookedDate ? `${day.dateKey} client booked date` : day.dateKey}
                                  >
                                    {day.day}
                                  </button>
                                );
                              })}
                            </div>
                            <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-[8px] font-semibold">
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => { handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, ""); setProductionCalendarOpenId(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">Clear</button>
                              <button type="button" disabled={getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation) > getTodayDateKey()} onClick={() => { const today = formatDateOnlyInput(new Date()); handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, today); setProductionCalendarOpenId(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-300">Today</button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-2.5 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      Full Details
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => payment ? openReceiptModal(payment, reservation) : ignoreFeedback("No payment proof uploaded.", "error")} className="inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-eye text-[11px]" />
                      Proof
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => openUploadModal(reservation)} className="inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-slate-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up text-[11px]" />
                      Upload
                    </button>
                    {showRefund ? (
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => openRefundModal(payment)} className="group inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] text-amber-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)] hover:shadow-md" title={`Refund: ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "requested").toUpperCase()}`} aria-label={`Refund: ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "requested").toUpperCase()}`}>
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[12px]" />
                      </button>
                    ) : null}
                    <button type="button" disabled={!canMarkDone} onClick={() => openProductionDoneModal(reservationId, reservation, draft)} className={`group inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 ${canMarkDone ? "border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)] hover:shadow-md" : "cursor-not-allowed border-white/10 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/35"}`} title={markDoneTitle} aria-label={markDoneTitle}>
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-check-double text-[14px]" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            }) : (
              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No approved projects in production.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="relative z-0 hidden flex-1 overflow-x-auto sm:block">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Package</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Date And Time</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Project Status</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                {paginatedProductionReservations.length ? paginatedProductionReservations.map((reservation) => {
                  const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
                  const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
                  const draft = reservationDrafts[reservationId] || { workflowStage: String(reservation?.workflowStage || "awaiting_approval"), estimatedDelivery: formatDateOnlyInput(reservation?.estimatedDelivery) };
                  const paymentVerified = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation) === "verified";
                  const workflowReady = String(draft.workflowStage || reservation?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase() === "ready_for_download";
                  const hasUploadedMedia = Boolean(reservation?.hasUploadedMedia || productionMediaByReservationId[reservationId]);
                  const canMarkDone = paymentVerified && workflowReady && hasUploadedMedia;
                  const productionStageOpen = productionStageMenuOpenId === reservationId;
                  const productionCalendarOpen = productionCalendarOpenId === reservationId;
                  const markDoneTitle = !paymentVerified
                    ? "Payment must be verified first"
                    : !workflowReady
                      ? "Set the progress to Ready for Download first"
                      : !hasUploadedMedia
                        ? "Upload delivery media before marking this as done"
                        : "Mark as done";
                  const showRefund = payment && ["requested", "approved"].includes(String(payment.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase());
                  return (
                    <tr
                      key={reservationId}
                      className={cx(
                        "group relative bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)]",
                        productionStageOpen || productionCalendarOpen ? "z-[160]" : "z-0"
                      )}
                    >
                      <td className="px-6 py-4">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                            <img src={reservation.avatarUrl} alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"} className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" />
                          ) : (
                            <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">
                              {getInitial(reservation.fullName || "C")}
                            </div>
                          )}
                          <div className="min-w-0">
                            <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{packageLabel(reservation)}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                      <td className={cx("px-6 py-4", productionStageOpen || productionCalendarOpen ? "relative z-[170] overflow-visible" : "")}>
                        <div className="max-w-[13.5rem] space-y-2">
                          <div
                            ref={productionStageOpen ? productionStageMenuRef : null}
                            className="relative"
                          >
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => {
                                setProductionCalendarOpenId("");
                                setProductionStageMenuOpenId((current) => (current === reservationId ? "" : reservationId));
                              }}
                              className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 py-2.5 text-left text-[10px] font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                            >
                              <span>{WORKFLOW_STAGES.find((option) => option.value === draft.workflowStage)?.label || "In Progress"}</span>
                              <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${productionStageOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[11px] text-slate-500`} />
                            </button>
                            {productionStageOpen ? (
                              <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[220] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                                {WORKFLOW_STAGES.map((option) => (
                                  <button
                                    key={option.value}
                                    type="button"
                                    onClick={() => {
                                      setProductionWorkflowStage(reservationId, reservation, option.value);
                                      setProductionStageMenuOpenId("");
                                    }}
                                    className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${draft.workflowStage === option.value ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                                  >
                                    <span>{option.label}</span>
                                    {draft.workflowStage === option.value ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                                  </button>
                                ))}
                              </div>
                            ) : null}
                          </div>
                          <div
                            ref={productionCalendarOpen ? productionCalendarContainerRef : null}
                            className="relative"
                          >
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => openProductionCalendar(reservationId, draft.estimatedDelivery)}
                              className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 py-2.5 text-left text-[10px] font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                            >
                              <span>{draft.estimatedDelivery ? formatDate(draft.estimatedDelivery) : "Estimated Delivery"}</span>
                              <i className="fa-regular fa-calendar text-[12px] text-slate-500" />
                            </button>
                            {productionCalendarOpen ? (
                              <div ref={productionCalendarPopupRef} className="absolute left-0 top-[calc(100%+0.4rem)] z-[220] w-[228px] overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-slate-300/30">
                                <div className="p-2">
                                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, -1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Previous month">
                                      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                                      </svg>
                                    </button>
                                    <div className="text-center">
                                      <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-900">{formatMonthLabel(productionCalendarMonth)}</p>
                                      <p className="text-[8px] font-medium text-slate-500">Select date</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, 1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Next month">
                                      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                      </svg>
                                    </button>
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-7 gap-0.5">
                                    {CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS.map((day) => <p key={day} className="text-center text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">{day}</p>)}
                                    {buildCalendarDays(productionCalendarMonth).map((day) => {
                                      const bookedDate = getReservationBookedDateKey(reservation);
                                      const minDate = getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation);
                                      const isPastDate = day.dateKey < minDate;
                                      const isDisabled = !day.inMonth || isPastDate;
                                      const isBookedDate = bookedDate === day.dateKey;
                                      return (
                                        <button
                                          key={day.dateKey}
                                          type="button"
                                          disabled={isDisabled}
                                          onClick={() => {
                                            if (isDisabled) return;
                                            handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, day.dateKey);
                                            setProductionCalendarOpenId("");
                                          }}
                                          className={`aspect-square rounded-md border text-[10px] font-bold transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none ${productionCalendarDayClass(day, draft.estimatedDelivery || "", bookedDate, minDate)}`}
                                          title={isBookedDate ? "Client booked date" : undefined}
                                          aria-label={isBookedDate ? `${day.dateKey} client booked date` : day.dateKey}
                                        >
                                          {day.day}
                                        </button>
                                      );
                                    })}
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-[8px] font-semibold">
                                    <button type="button" onClick={() => { handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, ""); setProductionCalendarOpenId(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">Clear</button>
                                    <button type="button" disabled={getProductionEstimatedDeliveryMinDate(reservation) > getTodayDateKey()} onClick={() => { const today = formatDateOnlyInput(new Date()); handleProductionEstimatedDeliveryChange(reservationId, reservation, draft, today); setProductionCalendarOpenId(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-300">Today</button>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            ) : null}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-4">
                        <div className={`ml-auto grid gap-1.5 ${showRefund ? "max-w-[27rem] grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.4fr)_minmax(0,1.15fr)_40px_minmax(84px,0.9fr)_40px]" : "max-w-[20rem] grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.4fr)_minmax(0,1.15fr)_40px_40px]"}`}>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex min-h-[36px] min-w-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 py-2 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                            Full Details
                          </button>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => payment ? openReceiptModal(payment, reservation) : ignoreFeedback("No payment proof uploaded.", "error")} className="group inline-flex min-h-[36px] min-w-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 py-2 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-eye text-[11px]" />
                            Proof
                          </button>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => openUploadModal(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] text-slate-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Upload media" aria-label="Upload media">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up text-[15px]" />
                          </button>
                          <button type="button" disabled={!canMarkDone} onClick={() => openProductionDoneModal(reservationId, reservation, draft)} className={`group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 ${canMarkDone ? "border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)] hover:shadow-md" : "cursor-not-allowed border-white/10 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/35"}`} title={markDoneTitle} aria-label={markDoneTitle}>
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-check-double text-[15px]" />
                          </button>
                          {showRefund ? (
                            <button type="button" onClick={() => openRefundModal(payment)} className="group inline-flex h-10 min-w-[84px] items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-amber-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)] hover:shadow-md" title={`Refund: ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "requested").toUpperCase()}`} aria-label={`Refund: ${String(payment?.refundStatus || "requested").toUpperCase()}`}>
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[12px]" />
                              Refund
                            </button>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                }) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No approved projects in production.</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          <div
            className={cx(
              "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-2 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:h-[102px] sm:px-4 sm:py-2.5",
              "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
              desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
            )}
          >
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2 sm:h-full">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">Page {productionPage} of {productionTotalPages}</p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))} disabled={productionPage === 1} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Prev
                </button>
                <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                  {Array.from({ length: productionTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                    .slice(Math.max(0, productionPage - 3), Math.max(0, productionPage - 3) + 5)
                    .map((pageNumber) => (
                      <button key={pageNumber} type="button" onClick={() => setProductionPage(pageNumber)} className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${productionPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}>
                        {pageNumber}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setProductionPage((current) => Math.min(productionTotalPages, current + 1))} disabled={productionPage === productionTotalPages} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }
  function renderPayments() {
    const filterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All" },
      { id: "needs_review", label: "Needs Review" },
      { id: "verified", label: "Verified" },
      { id: "refund_requests", label: "Refund Requests" }
    ];
    const activeFilterLabel = filterOptions.find((option) => option.id === paymentFilter)?.label || "All";
    const paginationStart = filteredPaymentRows.length ? ((paymentPage - 1) * paymentPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const paginationEnd = Math.min(paymentPage * paymentPageSize, filteredPaymentRows.length);

    return (
      <section id="payments" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-0", activeTab !== "payments" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Payment Management</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredPaymentRows.length ? `${paginationStart}-${paginationEnd} of ${filteredPaymentRows.length}` : "0"} payment record{filteredPaymentRows.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} ready for review</p>
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setPaymentFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter payments (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter payments (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${paymentFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                  </button>
                  {paymentFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-56 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
