                      {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setPaymentFilter(option.id);
                            setPaymentFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${paymentFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {paymentFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={paymentSearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setPaymentSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search payments..."
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-auto">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setPaymentFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter payments (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter payments (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${paymentFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                    </button>
                    {paymentFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-56">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setPaymentFilter(option.id);
                              setPaymentFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${paymentFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {paymentFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden shrink-0 items-center gap-2 sm:flex">
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { handleTabClick("live-messages"); setAdminNotificationsOpen(false); }} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Live messages">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button data-admin-notif-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                    <button data-admin-avatar-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Admin menu">
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar src={me?.avatarUrl || ""} fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""} alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"} className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover" fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />} />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]"><i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} /></span>
                    </button>
                    {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid content-start grid-cols-1 gap-2 p-2 sm:hidden">
            {paginatedPaymentRows.length ? paginatedPaymentRows.map(({ payment, reservation }) => {
              const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
              const paymentClient = paymentClientProfile(reservation);
              const state = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation);
              const findings = Array.isArray(payment?.autoReviewFindings) ? payment.autoReviewFindings : [];
              const canVerify = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase());
              const canReject = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase());
              const showRefund = ["requested", "approved"].includes(String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase());
              return (
                <div key={payment._id || reservationId} className={`self-start rounded-[18px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_14px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl ${["verified", "failed", "refunded"].includes(state) ? "opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    {paymentClient?.avatarUrl ? (
                      <SafeAvatar
                        src={paymentClient.avatarUrl}
                        fallbackSrc={paymentClient?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                        alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"}
                        className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                        fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-sm" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                    )}
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                        <div className="min-w-0 pr-2">
                          <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[11px] font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                        </div>
                        <span className={`inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${paymentStatusClasses(state)}`}>
                          {paymentStatusLabel(state)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-[0.95fr_0.95fr_1.1fr] gap-1.5 border-b border-white/10 pb-2">
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Reference</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{payment.referenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Amount</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatCurrency(payment.amount || reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || 0, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Date And Time</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {findings.length ? (
                    <div className="mt-2 rounded-2xl border border-orange-300/45 bg-orange-400/10 px-3 py-2">
                      <p className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-orange-100">Auto Review Warnings</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-semibold leading-snug text-orange-50">{findings.join(" ")}</p>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-2.5 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white" title="Full Details" aria-label="Full Details">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      Full Details
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => openReceiptModal(payment, reservation)} className="inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white" title="Proof" aria-label="Proof">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar text-[11px]" />
                      Proof
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => printPaymentReceipt(payment, reservation)} className="inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-slate-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white" title="Print receipt" aria-label="Print receipt">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-print text-[11px]" />
                      Print
                    </button>
                    {showRefund ? (
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => openRefundModal(payment)} className="group inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] text-amber-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)] hover:shadow-md" title="Refund" aria-label="Refund">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[12px]" />
                      </button>
                    ) : null}
                    {canVerify ? (
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => openPaymentActionModal(payment, reservation, "verified")} className="group inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)] hover:shadow-md" title="Verify" aria-label="Verify">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[13px]" />
                      </button>
                    ) : null}
                    {canReject ? (
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => openPaymentActionModal(payment, reservation, "rejected")} className="group inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] text-rose-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-rose-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#fecdd3)] hover:shadow-md" title="Reject" aria-label="Reject">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[13px]" />
                      </button>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            }) : (
              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No payments submitted yet.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="relative z-0 hidden overflow-x-auto sm:block">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Payment Info</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Date And Time</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                {paginatedPaymentRows.length ? paginatedPaymentRows.map(({ payment, reservation }) => {
                  const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
                  const paymentClient = paymentClientProfile(reservation);
                  const state = paymentStatusState(payment, reservation);
                  const findings = Array.isArray(payment?.autoReviewFindings) ? payment.autoReviewFindings : [];
                  const canVerify = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase());
                  const canReject = ["pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase());
                  const showRefund = ["requested", "approved"].includes(String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase());
                  return (
                    <tr key={payment._id || reservationId} className={`group h-[92px] bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)] ${["verified", "failed", "refunded"].includes(state) ? "opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                      <td className="px-6 py-5 align-middle">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          {paymentClient?.avatarUrl ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={paymentClient.avatarUrl}
                              fallbackSrc={paymentClient?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                              alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"}
                              className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                              fallback={<DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />}
                            />
                          ) : (
                            <DefaultDatabaseAvatar containerClassName="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20" iconClassName="text-[11px]" badgeClassName="h-4 w-4 rounded-tl-lg" />
                          )}
                          <div className="min-w-0">
                            <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-5 align-middle text-sm font-medium text-white/85">
                        <p className="font-black text-white">{formatCurrency(payment.amount || reservation.finalPrice || reservation.packagePrice || 0, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/70">Ref: {payment.referenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                        {findings.length ? (
                          <p className="mt-1 line-clamp-1 text-xs font-semibold text-orange-200">{findings[0]}</p>
                        ) : (
                          <p className="mt-1 text-xs opacity-0" aria-hidden="true">placeholder</p>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-5 align-middle text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-5 align-middle">
                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${paymentStatusClasses(state)}`}>
                          {paymentStatusLabel(state)}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-5 align-middle">
                        <div className="ml-auto flex flex-nowrap items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] text-[#2447B8] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Full Details" aria-label="Full Details">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[15px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                          </button>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => openReceiptModal(payment, reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] text-[#2447B8] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Proof" aria-label="Proof">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar text-[15px]" />
                          </button>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => printPaymentReceipt(payment, reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] text-slate-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Print receipt" aria-label="Print receipt">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-print text-[15px]" />
                          </button>
                          {showRefund ? (
                            <button type="button" onClick={() => openRefundModal(payment)} className="group inline-flex h-10 min-w-[84px] items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf5,#fef3c7)] px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-amber-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)] hover:shadow-md" title="Refund" aria-label="Refund">
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[12px]" />
                              Refund
                            </button>
                          ) : null}
                          {canVerify ? (
                            <button type="button" onClick={() => openPaymentActionModal(payment, reservation, "verified")} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)] hover:shadow-md" title="Verify" aria-label="Verify">
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[15px]" />
                            </button>
                          ) : null}
                          {canReject ? (
                            <button type="button" onClick={() => openPaymentActionModal(payment, reservation, "rejected")} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] text-rose-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-rose-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#fecdd3)] hover:shadow-md" title="Reject" aria-label="Reject">
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[15px]" />
                            </button>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                }) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No payments matched your search.</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div
            className={cx(
              "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-4 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:static sm:left-auto sm:right-auto sm:mt-auto sm:h-[112px] sm:w-full sm:px-4 sm:py-5"
            )}
          >
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2 sm:h-full sm:-translate-y-3 sm:pl-1">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">Page {paymentPage} of {paymentTotalPages}</p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))} disabled={paymentPage === 1} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Prev
                </button>
                <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                  {Array.from({ length: paymentTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                    .slice(Math.max(0, paymentPage - 3), Math.max(0, paymentPage - 3) + 5)
                    .map((pageNumber) => (
                      <button key={pageNumber} type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage(pageNumber)} className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${paymentPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}>
                        {pageNumber}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage((current) => Math.min(paymentTotalPages, current + 1))} disabled={paymentPage === paymentTotalPages} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderBookingHistory() {
    const filterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All" },
      { id: "completed", label: "Completed" },
      { id: "cancelled", label: "Cancelled" },
      { id: "rejected", label: "Rejected" }
    ];
    const activeFilterLabel = filterOptions.find((option) => option.id === historyFilter)?.label || "All";
    const paginationStart = filteredHistoryReservations.length ? ((historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const paginationEnd = Math.min(historyPage * historyPageSize, filteredHistoryReservations.length);

    return (
      <section id="booking-history" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-28", activeTab !== "booking-history" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Booking History</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredHistoryReservations.length ? `${paginationStart}-${paginationEnd} of ${filteredHistoryReservations.length}` : "0"} archived booking record{filteredHistoryReservations.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setHistoryFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter booking history (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter booking history (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${historyFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                  </button>
                  {historyFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-48 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                      {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setHistoryFilter(option.id);
                            setHistoryFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${historyFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {historyFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={historySearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setHistorySearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search booking history..."
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-auto">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setHistoryFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                      title={`Filter booking history (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                      aria-label={`Filter booking history (${activeFilterLabel})`}
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${historyFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                    </button>
                    {historyFilterMenuOpen ? (
                      <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-48">
                        {filterOptions.map((option) => (
                          <button
                            key={option.id}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              setHistoryFilter(option.id);
                              setHistoryFilterMenuOpen(false);
                            }}
                            className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${historyFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                          >
                            <span>{option.label}</span>
                            {historyFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden shrink-0 items-center gap-2 sm:flex">
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { handleTabClick("live-messages"); setAdminNotificationsOpen(false); }} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Live messages">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <button data-admin-notif-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                    <button data-admin-avatar-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Admin menu">
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar src={me?.avatarUrl || ""} fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""} alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"} className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover" fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />} />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]"><i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} /></span>
                    </button>
                    {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-2 sm:hidden">
            {paginatedHistoryReservations.length ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                {paginatedHistoryReservations.map((reservation) => {
              const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
              const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
              const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
              const statusLabel = status === "completed" ? "Completed" : status === "cancelled" ? "Cancelled" : "Rejected";
              const statusClasses = status === "completed"
                ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200"
                : status === "cancelled"
                  ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200"
                  : "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";

              return (
                <div key={reservationId} className="w-full rounded-[18px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_14px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl opacity-90">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                      <img src={reservation.avatarUrl} alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"} className="h-10 w-10 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" />
                    ) : (
                      <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">
                        {getInitial(reservation.fullName || "C")}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                        <div className="min-w-0 pr-2">
                          <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[11px] font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                        </div>
                        <span className={`inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${statusClasses}`}>
                          {statusLabel}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-[0.9fr_0.9fr_1.2fr] gap-1.5 border-b border-white/10 pb-2">
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Package</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{packageLabel(reservation)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Payment</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{payment ? String(payment.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase() : "NO PAYMENT"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                      <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Booking Date</p>
                      <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)}
                      className="group inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-2.5 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white"
                      title="Full Details"
                      aria-label="Full Details"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      Full Details
                    </button>
                    {payment ? (
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => openReceiptModal(payment, reservation)}
                        className="inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white"
                        title="Proof"
                        aria-label="Proof"
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar text-[11px]" />
                        Proof
                      </button>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
                })}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="w-full rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-6 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No completed or archived bookings yet.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="relative z-0 hidden min-h-[calc(100dvh-12rem)] flex-1 overflow-x-auto sm:block">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3">Booking Info</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3">Date And Time</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3">Payment</th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3">Status</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                {paginatedHistoryReservations.length ? paginatedHistoryReservations.map((reservation) => {
                  const reservationId = String(reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "");
                  const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                  const payment = paymentByReservationId.get(reservationId) || null;
                  const statusLabel = status === "completed" ? "Completed" : status === "cancelled" ? "Cancelled" : "Rejected";
                  const statusClasses = status === "completed"
                    ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200"
                    : status === "cancelled"
                      ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200"
                      : "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";

                  return (
                    <tr key={reservationId} className="group bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)] opacity-90">
                      <td className="px-6 py-3.5">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          {reservation.avatarUrl ? (
                            <img src={reservation.avatarUrl} alt={reservation.fullName || "Client"} className="h-10 w-10 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" />
                          ) : (
                            <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">
                              {getInitial(reservation.fullName || "C")}
                            </div>
                          )}
                          <div className="min-w-0">
                            <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{reservation.email || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-3.5 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">
                        <p className="font-black text-white">{packageLabel(reservation)}</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/70">{getEventLabel(reservation)}</p>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-3.5 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-3.5 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{payment ? String(payment.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase() : "NO PAYMENT"}</td>
                      <td className="px-6 py-3.5">
                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${statusClasses}`}>
                          {statusLabel}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                }) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No archived bookings matched your search.</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div
            className={cx(
              "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-4 backdrop-blur-xl sm:px-4 sm:py-5",
              "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
              desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
            )}
          >
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">Page {historyPage} of {historyTotalPages}</p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))} disabled={historyPage === 1} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Prev
                </button>
                <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                  {Array.from({ length: historyTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                    .slice(Math.max(0, historyPage - 3), Math.max(0, historyPage - 3) + 5)
                    .map((pageNumber) => (
                      <button key={pageNumber} type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage(pageNumber)} className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${historyPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}>
                        {pageNumber}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage((current) => Math.min(historyTotalPages, current + 1))} disabled={historyPage === historyTotalPages} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderLiveMessages() {
    const selectedThreadProfile = threadClientProfile(selectedThread);
    const selectedThreadPreviewProfile = selectedThread
      ? ({
        _id: selectedThreadProfile?._id || selectedThread?._id || selectedThread?.id || "",
        id: selectedThreadProfile?.id || selectedThread?.id || selectedThread?._id || "",
        fullName: selectedThreadProfile?.fullName || selectedThread?.clientName || "Client",
        email: selectedThreadProfile?.email || selectedThread?.clientEmail || "",
        phone: selectedThreadProfile?.phone || selectedThread?.clientPhone || "",
        avatarUrl: selectedThreadProfile?.avatarUrl || selectedThread?.avatarUrl || "",
        googleAvatarUrl: selectedThreadProfile?.googleAvatarUrl || selectedThread?.googleAvatarUrl || "",
        createdAt: selectedThreadProfile?.createdAt || selectedThread?.createdAt || ""
      })
      : null;
    const selectedThreadOnline = isThreadOnline(selectedThread);
    const showSidebar = liveChatBoxHidden || !selectedThread;
    const showPanel = Boolean(selectedThread) && !liveChatBoxHidden;
    const messageCount = messages.length;
    const adminReplyCount = messages.filter((item) => String(item?.senderRole || "").toLowerCase() === "admin").length;
    const clientReplyCount = Math.max(messageCount - adminReplyCount, 0);
    const lastActivity = selectedThread?.lastMessageAt || selectedThread?.updatedAt || selectedThread?.createdAt || "";
    const profileName = selectedThreadProfile?.fullName || getDisplayName(selectedThread);
    const relatedReservations = selectedThread
      ? reservations.filter((item) => String(item?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase() === String(selectedThread?.clientEmail || "").trim().toLowerCase()).slice(0, 2)
      : [];
    const relatedPayments = selectedThread
      ? payments.filter((item) => {
        const reservation = paymentReservation(item, reservationMap);
        return String(reservation?.email || "").trim().toLowerCase() === String(selectedThread?.clientEmail || "").trim().toLowerCase();
      }).slice(0, 2)
      : [];
    const detailItems = [
      { label: "Messages", value: String(messageCount || 0), icon: "fa-regular fa-message" },
      { label: "Client Replies", value: String(clientReplyCount || 0), icon: "fa-regular fa-user" },
      { label: "Admin Replies", value: String(adminReplyCount || 0), icon: "fa-solid fa-shield-halved" },
      { label: "Last Active", value: formatDateTime(lastActivity), icon: "fa-regular fa-clock" },
      { label: "Member Since", value: formatDate(selectedThreadProfile?.createdAt || selectedThread?.createdAt), icon: "fa-regular fa-calendar" },
      { label: "Status", value: selectedThread?.status || "open", icon: "fa-solid fa-signal" }
    ];
    const detailAttachments = [
      ...relatedReservations.map((item) => ({
        id: `reservation-${item?._id || item?.id || item?.eventDate}`,
        title: packageLabel(item),
        meta: `${getEventLabel(item)} · ${formatDate(item?.eventDateTime || item?.eventDate)}`,
        icon: "fa-regular fa-calendar-check",
        iconTone: "bg-fuchsia-500/15 text-fuchsia-300"
      })),
      ...relatedPayments.map((item) => ({
        id: `payment-${item?._id || item?.id || item?.createdAt}`,
        title: `${String(item?.method || "payment").toUpperCase()} payment`,
        meta: `${formatCurrency(item?.amount || 0, paymentReservation(item, reservationMap)?.currency || "PHP")} · ${String(item?.status || "pending").toUpperCase()}`,
        icon: "fa-solid fa-receipt",
        iconTone: "bg-amber-500/15 text-amber-300"
      }))
    ].slice(0, 4);
    const conversationMembers = [
      {
        id: `client-${selectedThreadId || "unknown"}`,
        name: profileName,
        role: selectedThread?.clientEmail || "Client",
        avatarUrl: selectedThreadProfile?.avatarUrl || "",
        initials: getAvatarFallback(profileName),
        avatarTone: "bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 via-orange-200 to-amber-100 text-slate-900"
      },
      {
        id: "admin-team",
        name: me?.fullName || "SnapQueue Team",
        role: "Admin support",
        avatarUrl: me?.avatarUrl || "",
        initials: getAvatarFallback(me?.fullName || "A"),
        avatarTone: "bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#5b5ef7,#4f46e5)] text-white"
      }
    ];

    return (
      <section id="live-messages" className={cx("m-0 h-screen w-full overflow-hidden p-0 lg:h-[100dvh]", activeTab !== "live-messages" && "hidden")}>
        <ConfirmDeleteModal
          open={deleteThreadModalOpen}
          thread={selectedThread}
          deleting={deleteThreadPending}
          onCancel={() => setDeleteThreadModalOpen(false)}
          onConfirm={() => deleteThreadById(selectedThreadId)}
        />
        <div className="grid h-full min-h-0 w-full grid-cols-1 gap-0 xl:grid-cols-[360px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
          <div className={cx("min-h-0", showSidebar && "message-mobile-inbox-enter xl:animate-none", !showSidebar && "hidden lg:block")}>
            <ChatSidebar
              threads={filteredThreads}
              clientResults={liveMessageClientResults}
              selectedThreadId={selectedThreadId}
              onSelectThread={openThread}
              onStartThread={openOrCreateThreadForClient}
              threadProfile={threadClientProfile}
              searchValue={searchQuery}
              onSearchChange={setSearchQuery}
              loading={threadsLoading}
              error={threadsError}
              onRetry={() => loadThreads().catch(() => {})}
              panelHidden={liveChatBoxHidden}
              onShowPanel={() => setLiveChatBoxHidden(false)}
              onBack={() => handleTabClick("analytics")}
            />
          </div>
          <div className={cx("min-h-0 overflow-hidden sm:border-y sm:border-slate-200 xl:border-l xl:border-y-0", showPanel && "message-mobile-panel-enter xl:animate-none", !showPanel && "hidden")}>
            <div className="flex h-full min-h-0 w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
              <ChatHeader
                thread={selectedThread}
                profile={selectedThreadProfile}
                online={selectedThreadOnline}
                deleting={deleteThreadPending}
                onDelete={() => setDeleteThreadModalOpen(true)}
                onHide={() => setLiveChatBoxHidden(true)}
                onBack={() => setLiveChatBoxHidden(true)}
                onProfileClick={() => {
                  if (selectedThreadPreviewProfile) setProfilePreviewUser(selectedThreadPreviewProfile);
                }}
                showBackButton
              />
              <MessageList
                thread={selectedThread}
                messages={messages}
                loading={messagesLoading}
                error={messagesError}
                profile={selectedThreadProfile}
                onRetry={() => loadMessages(selectedThreadId).catch(() => {})}
              />
              <ChatComposer
                value={chatText}
                onChange={setChatText}
                onSend={sendChatMessage}
                disabled={!selectedThread}
                sending={chatSending}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          {!showPanel ? (
            <div className="hidden h-full min-h-0 items-center justify-center border-y border-slate-200 sm:flex xl:border-l xl:border-y-0">
              <div className="max-w-md px-6 text-center">
                <div className="mx-auto flex h-20 w-20 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)]">
                  <i className="fa-regular fa-comments text-3xl" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="mt-6 text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-white">Open a Conversation</h3>
                <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed text-white/80">
                  Choose a client conversation from the inbox to review messages and reply directly.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderAdvertisementsPanel() {
    const previewTitle = adForm.title || "Campaign name";
    const previewDescription = adForm.description || "Build a homepage promotion with a clean message, clear timing, and one direct call to action.";
    const previewLink = adForm.linkUrl || "https://snapqueue.example/campaign";
    const previewImage = adForm.imageUrl || "";
    const draftMode = Boolean(adForm.id);
    const scheduleMode = adForm.startDate || adForm.endDate ? "specific" : "continuous";

    return (
      <section id="advertisements" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-28", activeTab !== "advertisements" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(37,99,235,0.12),transparent_22%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_right,rgba(99,102,241,0.1),transparent_20%),linear-gradient(180deg,#050816,#02040c)]">
          <div className="px-0 py-0 sm:px-6 sm:py-5">
            <div className="rounded-none border-0 bg-transparent p-4 shadow-none sm:rounded-[28px] sm:border sm:border-white/10 sm:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(10,14,26,0.96),rgba(4,8,18,0.98))] sm:shadow-[0_24px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.42)] sm:p-6 lg:p-8">
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM)} className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:text-white">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-[11px]" />
                Back
              </button>

              <div className="mt-6 grid gap-8 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.1fr)_minmax(300px,0.9fr)] xl:gap-10">
                <div className="relative">
                  <div className="max-w-[34rem] space-y-5">
                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        *Campaign name <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <input value={adForm.title} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, title: event.target.value }))} type="text" placeholder="Please input campaign name" className="mt-2 h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        *Destination URL <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <input value={adForm.linkUrl} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, linkUrl: event.target.value }))} type="url" placeholder="Paste campaign destination link" className="mt-2 h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        *Banner image <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <input value={adForm.imageUrl} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, imageUrl: event.target.value }))} type="url" placeholder="Paste banner image URL" className="mt-2 h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        *Campaign message <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <textarea value={adForm.description} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, description: event.target.value }))} rows="4" placeholder="Describe the campaign shown on the homepage banner" className="mt-2 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                    </div>

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        Date: <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, startDate: "", endDate: "" }))} className={cx("rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black transition-all", scheduleMode === "continuous" ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "bg-white/[0.12] text-white/75 hover:bg-white/[0.18]")}>Continuously</button>
                        <button type="button" className={cx("rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black transition-all", scheduleMode === "specific" ? "bg-indigo-500 text-white" : "bg-white/[0.12] text-white/75 hover:bg-white/[0.18]")}>Choose start & end date</button>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-3 grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2">
                        <input value={adForm.startDate} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, startDate: event.target.value }))} type="date" className="h-12 rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                        <input value={adForm.endDate} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, endDate: event.target.value }))} type="date" className="h-12 rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-all focus:border-indigo-400/50 focus:bg-white/[0.1]" />
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                      <label className="text-sm font-black text-white">
                        Schedule: <span className="text-white/50">i</span>
                      </label>
                      <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        <button type="button" className="rounded-lg bg-white/[0.12] px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black text-white/75 hover:bg-white/[0.18]">All Day</button>
                        <button type="button" className="rounded-lg bg-indigo-500 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black text-white">Specific Schedule</button>
                        <button type="button" className="rounded-lg bg-white/[0.12] px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black text-white/75 hover:bg-white/[0.18]">Advanced Schedule</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <label className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold text-white/75">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={adForm.isActive} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, isActive: event.target.checked }))} className="h-4 w-4 accent-indigo-500" />
                      Publish campaign immediately
                    </label>

                    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-2">
                      <button type="button" onClick={saveAd} className="rounded-lg bg-indigo-500 px-5 py-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-indigo-400">
                        {draftMode ? "Update Campaign" : "Save & Create Ad Group"}
                      </button>
                      {draftMode ? <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM)} className="rounded-lg bg-white/[0.12] px-5 py-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white/80 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.18] hover:text-white">Cancel</button> : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-6 rounded-[26px] border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 lg:mt-8 xl:absolute xl:left-[52%] xl:top-[8.4rem] xl:mt-0 xl:w-[17rem] xl:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(38,38,44,0.96),rgba(31,31,36,0.96))] xl:shadow-[0_28px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45)]">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="h-5 w-2 rounded-full bg-indigo-500" />
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Time</h3>
                      </div>
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-sm text-white/70" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-4 border-t border-white/8 pt-4">
                      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-white/45">Choose a start and end time</p>
                      <div className="mt-4 space-y-2.5">
                        <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                          <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/40">Start</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-white">{adForm.startDate ? "12:30 PM" : "Not set"}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                          <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/40">End</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-white">{adForm.endDate ? "03:30 PM" : "Not set"}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end gap-2">
                        <button type="button" className="rounded-lg bg-white/[0.12] px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black text-white/80">Cancel</button>
                        <button type="button" className="rounded-lg bg-indigo-500 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black text-white">Apply</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="relative flex min-h-[24rem] items-center justify-center rounded-[24px] border border-white/6 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,rgba(15,23,42,0.4),transparent_52%)] px-6 py-8">
                  <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 hidden h-full xl:block">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 420 320" className="h-full w-full text-indigo-400/80">
                      <path d="M75 110 C 150 70, 235 90, 290 145" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" />
                      <path d="M276 135 L 290 145 L 279 160" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" />
                    </svg>
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative max-w-[20rem] text-center xl:ml-20 xl:text-left">
                    <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-[26px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,17,29,0.95),rgba(7,10,20,0.98))] p-5 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.38)]">
                      <div className="rounded-[20px] border border-white/8 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(99,102,241,0.26),transparent_36%),linear-gradient(135deg,#050816,#0b1120_55%,#111827)] p-5">
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-cyan-200/80">Preview</p>
                        {previewImage ? <div className="mt-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05]"><img src={previewImage} alt={previewTitle} className="h-36 w-full object-cover" /></div> : null}
                        <h3 className="mt-4 text-2xl font-black leading-tight text-white">{previewTitle}</h3>
                        <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed text-white/72">{previewDescription}</p>
                        <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                          <span className="rounded-full border border-white/12 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/75">{adForm.startDate ? formatDate(adForm.startDate) : "Start not set"}</span>
                          <span className="rounded-full border border-white/12 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/75">{adForm.endDate ? formatDate(adForm.endDate) : "End not set"}</span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="mt-4 truncate text-xs font-semibold text-cyan-100/65">{previewLink}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <p className="mx-auto mt-8 max-w-[18rem] text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed text-white/72 xl:mx-0">
                      The core value of ad scheduling is timing. Use a clean campaign title, a clear banner message, and a defined date window so the homepage promotes the right offer at the right time.
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid min-h-[100dvh] flex-1 grid-cols-1 gap-2 p-0 sm:hidden">
            {filteredAds.length ? filteredAds.map((item) => (
              <div key={item._id} className="overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.74),rgba(30,41,59,0.42))] shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl">
                <div className="border-b border-white/10 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(56,189,248,0.22),transparent_35%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(2,6,23,0.96),rgba(15,23,42,0.82))] p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p className="truncate text-lg font-black text-white">{item.title || "Untitled Ad"}</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 line-clamp-2 text-sm font-medium text-white/70">{item.description || "No description provided."}</p>
                    </div>
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase ${item.isActive !== false ? "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700" : "border-slate-300 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700"}`}>
                      {item.isActive !== false ? "Active" : "Inactive"}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] p-2.5">
                      <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Start</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{formatDate(item.startDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] p-2.5">
                      <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">End</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{formatDate(item.endDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] p-2.5">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Destination</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 truncate text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{item.linkUrl || "-"}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 flex justify-end gap-2">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdForm({ id: item._id || "", title: item.title || "", description: item.description || "", imageUrl: item.imageUrl || "", linkUrl: item.linkUrl || "", isActive: item.isActive !== false, startDate: item.startDate ? String(item.startDate).slice(0, 10) : "", endDate: item.endDate ? String(item.endDate).slice(0, 10) : "" })} className="rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-800">Edit</button>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => removeAd(item._id)} className="rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-rose-700">Delete</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )) : (
              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No advertisements yet.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="hidden min-h-[calc(100dvh-18rem)] flex-1 p-4 sm:block sm:p-6">
            {filteredAds.length ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 xl:grid-cols-2 2xl:grid-cols-3">
                {filteredAds.map((item) => (
                  <article key={item._id} className="group overflow-hidden rounded-[30px] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.78),rgba(30,41,59,0.42))] shadow-[0_24px_50px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-cyan-200/30 hover:shadow-[0_28px_60px_rgba(8,47,73,0.28)]">
                    <div className="relative overflow-hidden border-b border-white/10 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.24),transparent_32%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_right,rgba(14,165,233,0.2),transparent_30%),linear-gradient(135deg,#020617,#0f172a_55%,#111827)] p-6">
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-30" style={{ backgroundImage: "linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 1px, transparent 1px)", backgroundSize: "22px 22px" }} />
                      <div className="relative">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                          <span className="rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/75">Homepage Banner</span>
                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${item.isActive !== false ? "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700" : "border-slate-300 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700"}`}>
                            {item.isActive !== false ? "Active" : "Inactive"}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <h3 className="mt-5 text-2xl font-black leading-tight text-white">{item.title || "Untitled Ad"}</h3>
                        <p className="mt-3 line-clamp-3 text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed text-slate-200/85">{item.description || "No description provided."}</p>
                        <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                          <span className="rounded-full border border-cyan-300/20 bg-cyan-400/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-cyan-100">{formatDate(item.startDate)}</span>
                          <span className="rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/75">{formatDate(item.endDate)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-3 p-5">
                      <div className="rounded-[22px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-3">
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/45">Campaign Link</p>
                        <p className="mt-2 truncate text-sm font-semibold text-white/85">{item.linkUrl || "-"}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdForm({ id: item._id || "", title: item.title || "", description: item.description || "", imageUrl: item.imageUrl || "", linkUrl: item.linkUrl || "", isActive: item.isActive !== false, startDate: item.startDate ? String(item.startDate).slice(0, 10) : "", endDate: item.endDate ? String(item.endDate).slice(0, 10) : "" })} className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.92] px-4 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-white">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-pen text-[12px]" />
                          Edit
                        </button>
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => removeAd(item._id)} className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff5f5,#ffe4e6)] px-4 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-rose-700 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#fecdd3)]">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-trash text-[12px]" />
                          Delete
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </article>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="rounded-[28px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                No advertisements yet.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderAdvertisements() {
    const selectedId = String(selectedAdvertisementId || "");
    const selectedAd = filteredAds.find((item) => String(item?._id || "") === selectedId) || null;
