    const advertisementPaginationStart = filteredAds.length ? ((advertisementPage - 1) * advertisementPageSize) + 1 : 0;
    const advertisementPaginationEnd = Math.min(advertisementPage * advertisementPageSize, filteredAds.length);
    const activeAdvertisementFilterLabel = [
      advertisementStatusFilter !== "all"
        ? advertisementStatusFilter === "active"
          ? "Active"
          : "Inactive"
        : null,
      advertisementScheduleFilter !== "all"
        ? advertisementScheduleFilter === "scheduled"
          ? "Advanced Schedule"
          : "All Day"
        : null
    ].filter(Boolean).join(" · ") || "All";

    const advertisementFilterOptions = [
      { id: "all", label: "All", apply: () => { setAdvertisementStatusFilter("all"); setAdvertisementScheduleFilter("all"); } },
      { id: "active", label: "Active", apply: () => { setAdvertisementStatusFilter("active"); setAdvertisementScheduleFilter("all"); } },
      { id: "inactive", label: "Inactive", apply: () => { setAdvertisementStatusFilter("inactive"); setAdvertisementScheduleFilter("all"); } },
      { id: "scheduled", label: "Advanced", apply: () => { setAdvertisementStatusFilter("all"); setAdvertisementScheduleFilter("scheduled"); } },
      { id: "all-day", label: "All Day", apply: () => { setAdvertisementStatusFilter("all"); setAdvertisementScheduleFilter("all-day"); } }
    ];
    const activeAdvertisementFilterOptionId = advertisementScheduleFilter !== "all" ? advertisementScheduleFilter : advertisementStatusFilter;

    if (campaignComposerOpen) {
      const isEditingCampaign = Boolean(adForm.id);
      return (
        <section id="advertisements" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-28", activeTab !== "advertisements" && "hidden")}>
          <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible text-white">
            <div className="relative z-20 hidden border-b border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 backdrop-blur-xl sm:block sm:px-6 sm:py-4">
              <div className="hidden flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between sm:flex">
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Advertisement Management</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{isEditingCampaign ? "Update the selected campaign" : "Create a new campaign"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 self-start rounded-2xl border border-white/15 bg-white/10 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white backdrop-blur-xl">
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-bullhorn text-[11px]" />
                  Campaign editor
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible px-4 py-4 sm:px-6">
            <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-1 py-4 sm:px-0">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setCampaignComposerOpen(false);
                    setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM);
                  }}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-black text-white/70 transition-colors hover:text-white"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
                  Back
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="grid flex-1 items-stretch gap-8 py-6 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.2fr)_1px_minmax(300px,0.8fr)]">
                <div className="flex h-full flex-col">
                  <div>
                    <h2 className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white">{isEditingCampaign ? "Edit campaign" : "Create a new campaign"}</h2>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-5 flex flex-1 flex-col">
                    <div className="space-y-5">
                      <div className="relative">
                        <input
                          value={adForm.title}
                          onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, title: event.target.value }))}
                          type="text"
                          placeholder=" "
                          className="peer h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white px-4 pb-2 pt-5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none placeholder:text-transparent focus:border-indigo-400/50"
                        />
                        <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-500 transition-all duration-200 peer-focus:top-2.5 peer-focus:-translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:text-slate-400 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-2.5 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:-translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-slate-400">
                          Campaign Name
                        </label>
                      </div>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <input
                          value={adForm.imageUrl}
                          onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, imageUrl: event.target.value }))}
                          type="url"
                          placeholder=" "
                          className="peer h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white px-4 pb-2 pt-5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none placeholder:text-transparent focus:border-indigo-400/50"
                        />
                        <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-500 transition-all duration-200 peer-focus:top-2.5 peer-focus:-translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:text-slate-400 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-2.5 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:-translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-slate-400">
                          Banner Image
                        </label>
                      </div>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <textarea
                          value={adForm.description}
                          onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, description: event.target.value }))}
                          rows="5"
                          placeholder=" "
                          className="peer w-full rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white px-4 pb-3 pt-6 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none placeholder:text-transparent focus:border-indigo-400/50"
                        />
                        <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-3 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-500 transition-all duration-200 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:text-slate-400 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-slate-400">
                          Message
                        </label>
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
                        <div
                          ref={advertisementCalendarOpenField === "startDate" ? advertisementCalendarContainerRef : null}
                          className="relative"
                        >
                          <label className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Start Date</label>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => openAdvertisementCalendar("startDate")}
                            className="mt-2 flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 text-left text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                          >
                            <span>{adForm.startDate ? formatDate(adForm.startDate) : "Start Date"}</span>
                            <i className="fa-regular fa-calendar text-[12px] text-slate-500" />
                          </button>
                          {advertisementCalendarOpenField === "startDate" ? (
                            <div className="absolute bottom-[calc(100%+0.4rem)] left-0 z-[100] w-[min(228px,calc(100vw-2rem))] overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-slate-300/30">
                              <div className="p-2">
                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdvertisementCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, -1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Previous month">
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                                    </svg>
                                  </button>
                                  <div className="text-center">
                                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-900">{formatMonthLabel(advertisementCalendarMonth)}</p>
                                    <p className="text-[8px] font-medium text-slate-500">Select date</p>
                                  </div>
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdvertisementCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, 1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Next month">
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                    </svg>
                                  </button>
                                </div>
                                <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-7 gap-0.5">
                                  {CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS.map((day) => <p key={day} className="text-center text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">{day}</p>)}
                                  {buildCalendarDays(advertisementCalendarMonth).map((day) => {
                                    const minDate = getTodayDateKey();
                                    const isPastDate = day.dateKey < minDate;
                                    const isOccupied = advertisementScheduleRanges.some((item) => dateKeyInRange(day.dateKey, item.startDate, item.endDate));
                                    const isDisabled = !day.inMonth || isPastDate || isOccupied;
                                    return (
                                      <button
                                        key={day.dateKey}
                                        type="button"
                                        disabled={isDisabled}
                                        onClick={() => {
                                          if (isDisabled) return;
                                          setAdvertisementCalendarDate("startDate", day.dateKey);
                                          setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField("");
                                        }}
                                        className={`aspect-square rounded-md border text-[10px] font-bold transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none ${isOccupied ? "cursor-not-allowed border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 text-rose-300" : productionCalendarDayClass(day, adForm.startDate || "", "", minDate)}`}
                                      >
                                        {day.day}
                                      </button>
                                    );
                                  })}
                                </div>
                                <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-[8px] font-semibold">
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, startDate: "", endDate: current.endDate })); setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">Clear</button>
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { const today = formatDateOnlyInput(new Date()); setAdvertisementCalendarDate("startDate", today); setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">Today</button>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                        <div
                          ref={advertisementCalendarOpenField === "endDate" ? advertisementCalendarContainerRef : null}
                          className="relative"
                        >
                          <label className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">End Date</label>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => openAdvertisementCalendar("endDate")}
                            className="mt-2 flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.92))] px-4 text-left text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.10)] transition-all hover:border-blue-200"
                          >
                            <span>{adForm.endDate ? formatDate(adForm.endDate) : "End Date"}</span>
                            <i className="fa-regular fa-calendar text-[12px] text-slate-500" />
                          </button>
                          {advertisementCalendarOpenField === "endDate" ? (
                            <div className="absolute bottom-[calc(100%+0.4rem)] left-0 z-[100] w-[min(228px,calc(100vw-2rem))] overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-slate-300/30">
                              <div className="p-2">
                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdvertisementCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, -1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Previous month">
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                                    </svg>
                                  </button>
                                  <div className="text-center">
                                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-900">{formatMonthLabel(advertisementCalendarMonth)}</p>
                                    <p className="text-[8px] font-medium text-slate-500">Select date</p>
                                  </div>
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setAdvertisementCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, 1))} className="inline-flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Next month">
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                    </svg>
                                  </button>
                                </div>
                                <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-7 gap-0.5">
                                  {CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS.map((day) => <p key={day} className="text-center text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">{day}</p>)}
                                  {buildCalendarDays(advertisementCalendarMonth).map((day) => {
                                    const minDate = adForm.startDate && adForm.startDate > getTodayDateKey() ? adForm.startDate : getTodayDateKey();
                                    const isPastDate = day.dateKey < minDate;
                                    const overlapsScheduledRange = adForm.startDate
                                      ? advertisementScheduleRanges.some((item) => dateKeyRangeOverlaps(adForm.startDate, day.dateKey, item.startDate, item.endDate))
                                      : advertisementScheduleRanges.some((item) => dateKeyInRange(day.dateKey, item.startDate, item.endDate));
                                    const isDisabled = !day.inMonth || isPastDate || overlapsScheduledRange;
                                    return (
                                      <button
                                        key={day.dateKey}
                                        type="button"
                                        disabled={isDisabled}
                                        onClick={() => {
                                          if (isDisabled) return;
                                          setAdvertisementCalendarDate("endDate", day.dateKey);
                                          setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField("");
                                        }}
                                        className={`aspect-square rounded-md border text-[10px] font-bold transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none ${overlapsScheduledRange ? "cursor-not-allowed border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 text-rose-300" : productionCalendarDayClass(day, adForm.endDate || "", "", minDate)}`}
                                      >
                                        {day.day}
                                      </button>
                                    );
                                  })}
                                </div>
                                <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-[8px] font-semibold">
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => { setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, endDate: "" })); setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">Clear</button>
                                  <button type="button" disabled={(adForm.startDate && adForm.startDate > formatDateOnlyInput(new Date()))} onClick={() => { const today = formatDateOnlyInput(new Date()); setAdvertisementCalendarDate("endDate", today); setAdvertisementCalendarOpenField(""); }} className="text-blue-600 transition-colors hover:text-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-300">Today</button>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <label className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold text-white/75">
                        <input type="checkbox" checked={adForm.isActive} onChange={(event) => setAdForm((current) => ({ ...current, isActive: event.target.checked }))} className="h-4 w-4 accent-indigo-500" />
                        Campaign active
                      </label>
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-auto flex flex-wrap gap-3 pt-6">
                        <button type="button" onClick={saveAd} className="inline-flex h-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-indigo-300/30 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#7c8cff_0%,#5b72ff_45%,#3b82f6_100%)] px-6 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_14px_30px_rgba(91,114,255,0.35)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.02] hover:border-indigo-200/60 hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(91,114,255,0.42)] active:translate-y-0 active:scale-[0.99]">
                          {isEditingCampaign ? "Update Campaign" : "Save Campaign"}
                        </button>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setCampaignComposerOpen(false);
                            setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM);
                          }}
                          className="inline-flex h-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.14),rgba(255,255,255,0.06))] px-6 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.14)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.02] hover:border-rose-300/60 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#fb7185,#e11d48)] hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(225,29,72,0.28)] active:translate-y-0 active:scale-[0.99]"
                        >
                          Cancel
                        </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="relative hidden w-px self-stretch overflow-hidden lg:block" aria-hidden="true">
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-white/40 to-transparent" />
                </div>

                <aside className="flex h-full flex-col justify-between lg:pl-8">
                  <div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="h-10 w-2 rounded-full bg-indigo-400" />
                      <div>
                        <h3 className="text-xl font-black text-white">Campaign preview</h3>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-6 overflow-hidden rounded-[20px] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(11,18,32,0.55),rgba(17,24,39,0.4))] backdrop-blur-xl">
                      {adForm.imageUrl ? <img src={adForm.imageUrl} alt={adForm.title || "Campaign preview"} className="h-44 w-full object-cover" /> : <div className="flex h-44 items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.04] text-sm font-bold text-white/35">Banner preview</div>}
                      <div className="space-y-3 p-5">
                        <p className="text-lg font-black text-white">{adForm.title || "Campaign preview"}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/65">{adForm.description || "The selected campaign will preview here as you edit its content."}</p>
                        <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 py-3">
                          <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Destination</p>
                          <p className="mt-2 break-all text-sm font-semibold text-white/75">Home page (/)</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                </aside>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          </div>
        </section>
      );
    }

    return (
      <section id="advertisements" className={cx("flex min-h-screen flex-col pb-24 sm:pb-28", activeTab !== "advertisements" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-visible text-white">
          <div className="relative z-20 px-3 py-3 sm:border-b sm:border-white/15 sm:bg-white/[0.04] sm:px-6 sm:py-4 sm:backdrop-blur-xl">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 sm:block">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Advertisement Management</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{filteredAds.length ? `${advertisementPaginationStart}-${advertisementPaginationEnd} of ${filteredAds.length}` : "0"} campaign record{filteredAds.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} available</p>
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setAdvertisementFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter campaigns (${activeAdvertisementFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter campaigns (${activeAdvertisementFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${advertisementFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                  </button>
                  {advertisementFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-56 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                      {[
                        { id: "all", label: "All" },
                        { id: "active", label: "Active" },
                        { id: "inactive", label: "Inactive" }
                      ].map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setAdvertisementStatusFilter(option.id);
                            setAdvertisementFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${advertisementStatusFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {advertisementStatusFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="relative hidden flex-wrap items-center gap-2 self-start sm:flex">
                <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-[22rem]">
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                  <input
                    value={searchQuery}
                    onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                    type="text"
                    placeholder="Search advertisements..."
                    className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="relative shrink-0">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setAdvertisementFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white px-3 text-slate-900 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                    title={`Filter campaigns (${activeAdvertisementFilterLabel})`}
                    aria-label={`Filter campaigns (${activeAdvertisementFilterLabel})`}
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${advertisementFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px] text-slate-500`} />
                  </button>
                  {advertisementFilterMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute left-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:w-48">
                      {advertisementFilterOptions.map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            option.apply();
                            setAdvertisementFilterMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${activeAdvertisementFilterOptionId === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {activeAdvertisementFilterOptionId === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    handleTabClick("live-messages");
                    setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                  }}
                  className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                  title="Live messages"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                  <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                </button>
                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    data-admin-notif-button="true"
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                    title="Notifications"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                </div>
                <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative shrink-0">
                  <button
                    data-admin-avatar-button="true"
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                    title="Admin menu"
                  >
                    <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                      {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar src={me?.avatarUrl || ""} fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""} alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"} className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover" fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />} />
                      ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                    </span>
                    <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                    </span>
                  </button>
                  {avatarMenuOpen ? renderDesktopAvatarDropdown() : null}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col">
            <div className="flex min-h-[calc(100dvh-10.5rem)] min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col">
              <div className="border-b border-white/8 p-4">
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 xl:flex-row xl:items-center xl:justify-between">
                  <div className="flex flex-row items-center gap-2 sm:flex-wrap">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => { setAdForm(EMPTY_AD_FORM); setCampaignComposerOpen(true); }}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-indigo-500 text-white hover:bg-indigo-400 sm:w-auto sm:px-4 sm:gap-2"
                      aria-label="New campaign"
                      title="New campaign"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-plus text-sm" />
                      <span className="hidden text-sm font-black sm:inline">New campaign</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      disabled={!selectedAd}
                      onClick={() => { if (!selectedAd) return; setAdForm(adToForm(selectedAd)); setCampaignComposerOpen(true); }}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.08] text-white hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-40 sm:w-auto sm:px-4 sm:gap-2"
                      aria-label="Edit campaign"
                      title="Edit campaign"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-pen-to-square text-sm" />
                      <span className="hidden text-sm font-black sm:inline">Edit</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      disabled={!selectedAd}
                      onClick={() => duplicateAd(selectedAd)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.08] text-white hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-40 sm:w-auto sm:px-4 sm:gap-2"
                      aria-label="Duplicate campaign"
                      title="Duplicate campaign"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-clone text-sm" />
                      <span className="hidden text-sm font-black sm:inline">Duplicate</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      disabled={!selectedAd}
                      onClick={() => selectedAd && setDeleteAdvertisementModalOpen(true)}
                      className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.08] text-white hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-40 sm:w-auto sm:px-4 sm:gap-2"
                      aria-label="Remove campaign"
                      title="Remove campaign"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-regular fa-trash-can text-sm" />
                      <span className="hidden text-sm font-black sm:inline">Remove</span>
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="hidden sm:flex" />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid content-start gap-3 p-3 sm:hidden">
                {paginatedAds.length ? paginatedAds.map((item, index) => {
                  const itemId = String(item?._id || "");
                  const isSelected = itemId === selectedId;
                  return (
                    <div key={itemId || index} className="rounded-[22px] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.78),rgba(30,41,59,0.42))] p-3 text-white shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)]">
                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setSelectedAdvertisementId(isSelected ? "" : itemId)}
                          className={`mt-1 flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-md border transition-colors ${isSelected ? "border-slate-950 bg-indigo-500 text-white shadow-[0_6px_14px_rgba(99,102,241,0.28)]" : "border-white/30 bg-white/10 text-transparent"}`}
                          aria-label={isSelected ? "Deselect advertisement" : "Select advertisement"}
                        >
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" />
                        </button>
                        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                          <p className="truncate text-base font-black text-white">{item.title || "Untitled Ad"}</p>
                          {item.linkUrl && item.linkUrl !== "/" ? (
                            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/70">{item.linkUrl}</p>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${item.isActive !== false ? "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700" : "border-amber-200 bg-amber-100 text-amber-700"}`}>
                          <span className={`h-2 w-2 rounded-full ${item.isActive !== false ? "bg-emerald-500" : "bg-amber-500"}`} />
                          {item.isActive !== false ? "Eligible" : "Paused"}
                        </span>
                      </div>

                      <div className="mt-3 grid gap-2">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 py-2.5 text-[12px] font-black text-white/90">
                            <i className="fa-regular fa-calendar text-[12px]" />
                            {`${formatDate(item.startDate)} - ${formatDate(item.endDate)}`}
                          </span>
                          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 py-2.5 text-[12px] font-black text-white/90">
                            <i className="fa-regular fa-clock text-[12px]" />
                            {item.startDate || item.endDate ? "Advanced Schedule" : "All Day"}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => toggleAdActive(item, item.isActive === false)}
                            className={`inline-flex h-9 items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${item.isActive !== false ? "border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffaf0,#fef3c7)] text-amber-700" : "border border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700"}`}
                          >
                            {item.isActive !== false ? "Pause" : "Resume"}
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                }) : (
                  <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                    No advertisements yet.
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="hidden flex-1 overflow-x-auto sm:block">
                <table className="w-full min-w-[860px] text-left">
                  <thead className="border-b border-white/8 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">
                    <tr>
                      <th className="px-5 py-4" />
                      <th className="px-5 py-4">Name</th>
                      <th className="px-5 py-4">Status</th>
                      <th className="px-5 py-4">Date</th>
                      <th className="px-5 py-4">Schedule</th>
                      <th className="px-5 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {paginatedAds.length ? paginatedAds.map((item, index) => {
                      const itemId = String(item?._id || "");
                      const isSelected = itemId === selectedId;
                      return (
                        <tr key={itemId || index} onClick={() => setSelectedAdvertisementId(itemId)} className={cx("cursor-pointer border-b border-white/5 transition-colors", isSelected ? "bg-white/[0.06]" : "hover:bg-white/[0.03]")}>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4">
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              onClick={(event) => {
                                event.stopPropagation();
                                setSelectedAdvertisementId(isSelected ? "" : itemId);
                              }}
                              className={`flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-md border transition-colors ${isSelected ? "border-slate-950 bg-indigo-500 text-white shadow-[0_6px_14px_rgba(99,102,241,0.28)]" : "border-slate-950 bg-white text-transparent"}`}
                              aria-label={isSelected ? "Deselect advertisement" : "Select advertisement"}
                            >
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" />
                            </button>
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white">{item.title || "Untitled Ad"}</td>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4">
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.06] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-black text-white">
                              <span className={`h-2 w-2 rounded-full ${item.isActive !== false ? "bg-emerald-500" : "bg-amber-400"}`} />
                              {item.isActive !== false ? "Eligible" : "Paused"}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white/80">{`${formatDate(item.startDate)} - ${formatDate(item.endDate)}`}</td>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4 text-sm font-semibold text-white/80">{item.startDate || item.endDate ? "Advanced Schedule" : "All Day"}</td>
                          <td className="px-5 py-4">
                            <div className="flex justify-end">
                              <button
                                type="button"
                                onClick={(event) => {
                                  event.stopPropagation();
                                  toggleAdActive(item, item.isActive === false);
                                }}
                                className={`inline-flex h-9 items-center justify-center rounded-xl px-4 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] transition-all ${item.isActive !== false ? "border border-amber-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffaf0,#fef3c7)] text-amber-700 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-amber-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fffbeb,#fde68a)]" : "border border-emerald-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f3fff8,#dcfce7)] text-emerald-700 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ecfdf5,#d1fae5)]"}`}
                              >
                                {item.isActive !== false ? "Pause" : "Resume"}
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      );
                    }) : (
                      <tr>
                        <td colSpan="6" className="px-5 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/45">No advertisements yet.</td>
                      </tr>
                    )}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>

              <div
                className={cx(
                  "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-2 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:px-4 sm:py-3",
                  "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
                  desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                    ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                    : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
                )}
              >
                <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">
                    Page {advertisementPage} of {advertisementTotalPages}
                  </p>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAdvertisementPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))}
                      disabled={advertisementPage === 1}
                      className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                    >
                      Prev
                    </button>
                    <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                      {Array.from({ length: advertisementTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                        .slice(Math.max(0, advertisementPage - 3), Math.max(0, advertisementPage - 3) + 5)
                        .map((pageNumber) => (
                          <button
                            key={pageNumber}
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setAdvertisementPage(pageNumber)}
                            className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${advertisementPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}
                          >
                            {pageNumber}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setAdvertisementPage((current) => Math.min(advertisementTotalPages, current + 1))}
                      disabled={advertisementPage === advertisementTotalPages}
                      className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                    >
                      Next
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderAdminHelp() {
    if (activeTab !== "admin-help") return null;

    return (
      <section id="admin-help" className="w-full space-y-6 px-6 py-0 sm:px-10 lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-5xl lg:overflow-y-auto lg:px-6 xl:max-w-6xl lg:mt-6">
        <div className="pb-6 pt-2">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => handleTabClick("analytics")}
            className="mb-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 sm:hidden"
            aria-label="Back"
          >
            <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
            <span>Back</span>
          </button>
          <h2 className="mt-4 text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl">How can we help?</h2>
          <div className="mt-8 grid gap-4">
            <label className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-5 py-4 text-white/70 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.2)]">
              <Icon name="search" className="h-5 w-5" />
              <input
                type="text"
                value={adminHelpSearchValue}
                onChange={(event) => setAdminHelpSearchValue(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Search help articles"
                className="w-full bg-transparent text-base font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none"
              />
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

          <div className="mx-auto max-w-5xl space-y-10 pb-6">
          {adminHelpNeedle ? (
            <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-6 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)]">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Search results</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-white/55">{adminHelpSearchResults.length} match{adminHelpSearchResults.length === 1 ? "" : "es"}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
                {adminHelpSearchResults.length ? adminHelpSearchResults.map((result) => (
                  <button
                    key={result.title}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      navigate(`/admin-help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(result.title)}`, {
                        state: { returnTo: "/admin?tab=admin-help" }
                      });
                    }}
                    className="flex w-full items-start gap-4 rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] p-4 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06]"
                  >
                    <div className="mt-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-sky-400/15 text-sky-200">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[18px]" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/40">Article</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-base font-black text-white">{result.title}</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/60">{result.description}</p>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                )) : (
                  <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No help articles matched your search.</p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-white sm:text-3xl">Frequently asked questions</h3>
            <div className="mt-6 grid gap-x-10 gap-y-5 md:grid-cols-2">
              {visibleAdminHelpFaqLinks.length ? visibleAdminHelpFaqLinks.map((itemTitle) => (
                <button
                  key={itemTitle}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    navigate(`/admin-help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(itemTitle)}`, {
                      state: { returnTo: "/admin?tab=admin-help" }
                    });
                  }}
                  className="flex items-center gap-4 text-left text-base text-white/90 transition-colors hover:text-white"
                >
                  <span className="inline-flex h-3 w-3 flex-none rounded-full border border-rose-400" />
                  <span>{itemTitle}</span>
                </button>
              )) : (
                <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No quick FAQ matches for that search.</p>
              )}
            </div>
            {!adminHelpNeedle && extraAdminHelpFaqLinks.length ? (
              <div className={`grid transition-all duration-500 ease-out ${adminHelpFaqExpanded ? "mt-5 grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100" : "grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0"}`}>
                <div className="overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="grid gap-x-10 gap-y-5 md:grid-cols-2">
                    {extraAdminHelpFaqLinks.map((itemTitle) => (
                      <button
                        key={itemTitle}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => {
                          navigate(`/admin-help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(itemTitle)}`, {
                            state: { returnTo: "/admin?tab=admin-help" }
                          });
                        }}
                        className={`flex items-center gap-4 text-left text-base text-white/90 transition-all duration-300 hover:text-white ${adminHelpFaqExpanded ? "translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}
                      >
                        <span className="inline-flex h-3 w-3 flex-none rounded-full border border-rose-400" />
                        <span>{itemTitle}</span>
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : null}
            {!adminHelpNeedle && adminHelpFaqLinks.length > 6 ? (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setAdminHelpFaqExpanded((current) => !current)}
                className="mt-6 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] md:hidden"
              >
                <span>{adminHelpFaqExpanded ? "View Less" : "View More"}</span>
                <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${adminHelpFaqExpanded ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
              </button>
            ) : null}
          </div>

          <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
            {ADMIN_HELP_CATEGORY_CARDS.map((card) => (
              <button
                key={card.key}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  setAdminHelpCategory(card.key);
                  setAdminHelpSearchValue("");
                }}
                className="group rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-7 text-left shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
              >
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{card.title}</h4>
                    <p className="mt-4 max-w-xs text-lg leading-relaxed text-white/60">{card.description}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-white/25">
                    <i className={`${card.icon} text-[2.1rem]`} />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.86),rgba(15,23,42,0.76))] p-6 shadow-[0_24px_52px_rgba(2,8,23,0.26)] backdrop-blur-2xl">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Quick help topics</h3>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
              {adminHelpQuickItems.length ? adminHelpQuickItems.map((item, index) => {
                const isOpen = openAdminHelpFaq === index;
                const answerParts = [
                  item.description,
                  ...(item.steps || []),
                  item.tip ? `Tip: ${item.tip}` : ""
                ].filter(Boolean);
                const answerText = answerParts.join(" ");
                return (
                  <div key={item.title} className="overflow-hidden rounded-[1.35rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04]">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setOpenAdminHelpFaq((current) => (current === index ? -1 : index))}
                      className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 px-4 py-4 text-left"
                    >
                      <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-white sm:text-base">{item.title}</h4>
                      <span className={`text-base font-black text-white/70 transition-transform duration-300 ${isOpen ? "rotate-45" : ""}`}>+</span>
                    </button>
                    <div className={`grid transition-all duration-300 ease-out ${isOpen ? "grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100" : "grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0"}`}>
                      <div className="overflow-hidden border-t border-white/10">
                        <p className="px-4 py-4 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/65">{answerText}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              }) : (
                <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No help articles matched your search.</p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleTabClick("live-messages")}
              className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-sky-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
            >
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-sky-400/15 text-sky-200">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-[1.4rem]" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Live Messages</p>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Respond to clients and handle support threads directly.</p>
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleTabClick("manage-reservations")}
              className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-violet-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
            >
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-violet-400/15 text-violet-200">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-calendar-check text-[1.4rem]" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Booking Requests</p>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Review new bookings, approve, reject, and follow up.</p>
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleTabClick("payments")}
              className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-emerald-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
            >
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-emerald-400/15 text-emerald-200">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-receipt text-[1.4rem]" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Payments Review</p>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Verify proofs, handle refunds, and confirm payment status.</p>
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleTabClick("users")}
              className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
            >
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-amber-400/15 text-amber-200">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-users text-[1.4rem]" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Client Database</p>
              <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Review client profiles, history, and account details.</p>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderProfileSettings() {
    return (
      <section id="profile-settings" className={cx("w-full space-y-0 px-4 py-0 pb-24 sm:px-14 sm:pb-28 md:px-20 lg:-mt-8 lg:px-28 xl:px-36 2xl:px-44", activeTab !== "profile-settings" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="-mt-8 mb-6 sm:mt-0 sm:hidden">
          <div className="h-52 rounded-[2.15rem] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.55),transparent_32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#1d4ed8_38%,#0f172a_78%)]" />
          <div className="px-4 pb-2">
            <div className="-mt-14">
              <div className="relative h-[104px] w-[104px]">
                <div className="flex h-[104px] w-[104px] items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)]">
                  <SafeAvatar
                    src={profileForm.avatarUrl || ""}
                    fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                    alt={profileForm.fullName || "Admin"}
                    className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                    fallback={<span className="text-4xl font-black uppercase">{getInitial(profileForm.fullName || "A")}</span>}
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  disabled={!editingProfile || profileSaving}
                  onClick={() => profileAvatarInputRef.current?.click()}
                  className="absolute bottom-1 right-1 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-[#2D60FF] shadow-md transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                  title="Change profile picture"
                >
                  <Icon name="camera" className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </button>
                <input
                  ref={profileAvatarInputRef}
                  type="file"
                  accept="image/*"
                  className="hidden"
                  onChange={(event) => {
                    handleProfileAvatarUpload(event.target.files?.[0] || null);
                    event.target.value = "";
                  }}
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-4">
              {editingProfile ? (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={profileForm.fullName}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, fullName: event.target.value };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("fullName")}
                      placeholder=" "
                      className={`${validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.fullName), profileForm.fullName.trim().length >= 2)} peer pb-3 pt-6 placeholder-transparent text-base font-black`}
                    />
                    <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                      Full Name
                    </label>
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("fullName", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && profileForm.fullName ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.fullName))}>{profileErrors.fullName || "Full name looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input
                      type="email"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      value={profileForm.email}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, email: event.target.value };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("email")}
                      placeholder=" "
                      aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("email", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.email)}
                      className={`${validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email), Boolean(trimmedProfileEmail))} peer pb-3 pt-6 placeholder-transparent`}
                    />
                    <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                      Email Address
                    </label>
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("email", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfileEmail ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email))}>{profileErrors.email || "Email address looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      value={profileForm.phone}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, phone: sanitizePhoneInput(event.target.value) };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("phone")}
                      placeholder=" "
                      aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("phone", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.phone)}
                      className={`${validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone), Boolean(trimmedProfilePhone))} peer pb-3 pt-6 placeholder-transparent`}
                    />
                    <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                      Phone Number
                    </label>
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("phone", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfilePhone ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone))}>{profileErrors.phone || "Phone number looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <textarea
                      rows="4"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      value={profileForm.bio}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, bio: event.target.value };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("bio")}
                      placeholder=" "
                      maxLength={320}
                      aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("bio", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.bio)}
                      className={`${validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio), Boolean(trimmedProfileBio))} peer pb-3 pt-7 placeholder-transparent`}
                    />
                    <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-4 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-4 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                      Bio
                    </label>
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("bio", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfileBio ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio))}>{profileErrors.bio || "Bio is ready."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <h2 className="text-[2rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">{profileForm.fullName || "Admin"}</h2>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-base font-semibold leading-7 text-blue-100">{profileForm.email || "admin@snapqueue.com"}</p>
                  <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-7 text-blue-100">{profileForm.phone || "-"}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white/70">Joined {me?.createdAt ? formatDate(me.createdAt) : "Unknown"}</p>
                </>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="mt-8 space-y-3">
              {editingProfile ? (
                <>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      onClick={() => { syncProfileForm(me); setEditingProfile(false); }}
                      className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-white/20 bg-slate-700/80 px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-white transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                    >
                      Cancel
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      onClick={saveProfile}
                      className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                    >
                      {profileSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save"}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={profileSaving}
                    onClick={() => setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl: "" }))}
                    className="inline-flex min-h-[52px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.1rem] border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-red-700 transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                  >
                    Remove Picture
                  </button>
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setEditingProfile(true)}
                    className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-sky-200"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-sm text-sky-700" aria-hidden="true" />
                    Edit Profile
                  </button>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setChangePasswordModalOpen(true)}
                    className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.9))] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-800 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-sky-200"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-lock text-sm text-slate-600" aria-hidden="true" />
                    {adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}
                  </button>
                </>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className={cx("mt-6 border-t border-white/20 pt-6", editingProfile && "hidden")}>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
                <div className="max-w-[12rem]">
                  <p className="text-sm font-black text-white">Email Notifications</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-medium leading-4 text-white/70">Receive account and admin activity notifications by email.</p>
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  role="switch"
                  aria-checked={profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                  disabled={profileSaving}
                  onClick={() => updateAdminProfilePreference({ emailNotificationsEnabled: !profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled }, `Email notifications ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "disabled" : "enabled"}.`)}
                  className={`relative inline-flex h-8 w-14 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                >
                  <span className={`inline-block h-6 w-6 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-7" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="hidden w-full overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] sm:block">
          <div className="h-52 rounded-[2rem] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.55),transparent_32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#0f172a_62%,#020617)] sm:h-60 lg:h-64" />
          <div className="px-6 pb-6 sm:px-8 lg:px-10">
            <div className="-mt-16 mb-0 pb-6 sm:-mt-20 sm:pb-7">
              <div className="flex flex-col items-start gap-4 text-left sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:gap-6">
                <div className="relative flex-shrink-0">
                  <div className="flex h-28 w-28 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)] sm:h-32 sm:w-32">
                    <SafeAvatar
                      src={profileForm.avatarUrl || ""}
                      fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                      alt={profileForm.fullName || "Admin"}
                      className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                      fallback={<span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{getInitial(profileForm.fullName || "A")}</span>}
                    />
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={!editingProfile || profileSaving}
                    onClick={() => profileAvatarInputRef.current?.click()}
                    className="absolute bottom-1 right-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-md transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                    title="Change profile picture"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-camera text-sm leading-none" />
                  </button>
                  <input
                    ref={profileAvatarInputRef}
