                    type="file"
                    accept="image/*"
                    className="hidden"
                    onChange={(event) => {
                      handleProfileAvatarUpload(event.target.files?.[0] || null);
                      event.target.value = "";
                    }}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="w-full flex-1 text-left">
                  {editingProfile ? (
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={profileForm.fullName}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, fullName: event.target.value };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("fullName")}
                      className="w-full border-b-2 border-white/35 bg-transparent text-3xl font-black text-white outline-none focus:border-sky-300"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="w-full border-b-2 border-transparent text-3xl font-black text-white">{profileForm.fullName || "Admin"}</div>
                  )}
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white/80">
                    {profileForm.email || "admin@snapqueue.com"}{profileForm.phone ? ` • ${profileForm.phone}` : ""}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {editingProfile ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-5">
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div>
                    <label className={validationLabelClass(profileValidationAttempted && Boolean(profileEmailError), Boolean(trimmedProfileEmail))}>Email Address</label>
                    <input
                      type="email"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      value={profileForm.email}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, email: event.target.value };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("email")}
                      aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("email", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.email)}
                      className={validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email), Boolean(trimmedProfileEmail))}
                    />
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("email", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfileEmail ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email))}>{profileErrors.email || "Email address looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className={validationLabelClass(profileValidationAttempted && Boolean(profilePhoneError), Boolean(trimmedProfilePhone))}>Phone Number</label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      disabled={profileSaving}
                      value={profileForm.phone}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        const next = { ...profileForm, phone: sanitizePhoneInput(event.target.value) };
                        setProfileForm(next);
                        setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                        if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                      }}
                      onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("phone")}
                      aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("phone", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.phone)}
                      className={validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone), Boolean(trimmedProfilePhone))}
                    />
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("phone", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfilePhone ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone))}>{profileErrors.phone || "Phone number looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className={validationLabelClass(profileValidationAttempted && Boolean(profileBioError), Boolean(trimmedProfileBio))}>Bio</label>
                  <textarea
                    disabled={profileSaving}
                    value={profileForm.bio}
                    onChange={(event) => {
                      const next = { ...profileForm, bio: event.target.value };
                      setProfileForm(next);
                      setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateAdminProfileForm(next) }));
                      if (profileValidationAttempted) setProfileValidationAttempted(false);
                    }}
                    onBlur={() => markProfileFieldTouched("bio")}
                    rows="5"
                    maxLength={320}
                    aria-invalid={shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("bio", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && Boolean(profileErrors.bio)}
                    placeholder="Add a short admin bio, role summary, or contact note."
                    className={validationInputClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio), Boolean(trimmedProfileBio))}
                  />
                  <div className="mt-1 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    {shouldShowAdminProfileValidation("bio", profileTouched, profileValidationAttempted) && trimmedProfileBio ? <p className={validationHelperClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio))}>{profileErrors.bio || "Bio is ready."}</p> : <span />}
                    <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/45">{String(profileForm.bio || "").length}/320</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : null}
            {!editingProfile ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-2">
                <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Role</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-bold text-white">{me?.role === "admin" ? "Administrator" : "Team Member"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Joined</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-bold text-white">{me?.createdAt ? formatDate(me.createdAt) : "Unknown"}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : null}
            <div className="mt-5 flex w-full flex-col gap-2.5 sm:flex-row">
              {editingProfile ? (
                <>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={profileSaving}
                    onClick={() => { syncProfileForm(me); setEditingProfile(false); }}
                    className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(51,65,85,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.98))] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.22)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                  >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />
                    Cancel
                  </button>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={profileSaving}
                    onClick={saveProfile}
                    className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/40 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa_0%,#2563eb_52%,#1d4ed8_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(59,130,246,0.36)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                  >
                    <i className={`fa-solid ${profileSaving ? "fa-spinner animate-spin" : "fa-floppy-disk"} text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110`} aria-hidden="true" />
                    {profileSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save Changes"}
                  </button>
                </>
              ) : (
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setEditingProfile(true)} className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(96,165,250,0.26)] sm:w-auto"><i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-xs text-sky-700 transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />Edit Profile</button>
              )}
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setChangePasswordModalOpen(true)} className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.9))] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff,#dbeafe)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(148,163,184,0.24)] sm:w-auto"><i className="fa-solid fa-lock text-xs text-slate-600 transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:text-sky-600" aria-hidden="true" />{adminRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}</button>
              {editingProfile ? (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  disabled={profileSaving}
                  onClick={() => setProfileForm((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl: "" }))}
                  className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-red-200/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#ffe4e6)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-red-700 shadow-[0_16px_30px_rgba(127,29,29,0.12)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_20px_36px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-trash-can text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Remove Picture
                </button>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden w-full px-6 py-6 sm:block sm:px-8 lg:px-10">
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-black text-white">Email Notifications</p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/65">Receive account and admin activity notifications by email.</p>
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                role="switch"
                aria-checked={profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                disabled={profileSaving}
                onClick={() => updateAdminProfilePreference({ emailNotificationsEnabled: !profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled }, `Email notifications ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "disabled" : "enabled"}.`)}
                className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
              >
                <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileForm.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
              </button>
            </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  function renderSystemSettings() {
    const activeNewsletterSubscribers = newsletterSubscribers.filter((subscriber) => subscriber.subscribed !== false);
    const newsletterPageSize = 5;
    const newsletterTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(activeNewsletterSubscribers.length / newsletterPageSize));
    const safeNewsletterPage = Math.min(newsletterPage, newsletterTotalPages);
    const paginatedNewsletterSubscribers = activeNewsletterSubscribers.slice((safeNewsletterPage - 1) * newsletterPageSize, safeNewsletterPage * newsletterPageSize);
    return (
      <section id="system-settings" className={cx("w-full -mt-8 space-y-0 px-0 py-0 sm:mt-0 lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-5xl lg:overflow-y-auto lg:px-6 lg:mt-6", activeTab !== "system-settings" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="w-full px-0 pt-0 pb-5 sm:py-5">
          <div className="w-full text-slate-900">
            <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-5 pt-0 pb-5 sm:px-6 sm:py-5 lg:px-8">
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                <div>
                  <h1 className="text-[2rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">Settings</h1>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage visitor access and newsletter communication here.</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm font-semibold">
                {[
                  { id: "access", label: "Access" },
                  { id: "newsletter", label: "Newsletter" },
                  { id: "security", label: "Security" },
                ].map((item) => (
                  <button
                    key={item.id}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      setSystemSettingsView(item.id);
                      window.setTimeout(() => scrollSystemSettingsToTop(), 0);
                    }}
                    className={cx(
                      "rounded-lg px-3 py-2 transition-colors",
                      systemSettingsView === item.id ? "bg-white text-slate-900" : "bg-white/8 text-white/70 hover:bg-white/12 hover:text-white"
                    )}
                  >
                    {item.label}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>

            </div>

            <div className="divide-y divide-white/10">
              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "access") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Website access</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Shows the current public website status.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">
                    {systemForm.vacationMode ? "Vacation Mode" : systemForm.maintenanceMode ? "Maintenance Mode" : "Open to Visitors"}
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">
                    {systemForm.vacationMode || systemForm.maintenanceMode ? "Public access is restricted while admins stay active." : "The public website is currently accessible to visitors."}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Newsletter audience</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Active subscribers available for updates.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">{newsletterTotals.active} Active Recipients</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Send announcements directly from the newsletter section below.</p>
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Subscriber list</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage footer signups collected from the public site.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                      <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Total</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-white">{newsletterTotals.all}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                      <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Active</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-emerald-300">{newsletterTotals.active}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center">
                      <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/55">Removed</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black text-rose-300">{newsletterTotals.inactive}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="max-h-[30.5rem] space-y-3 overflow-y-auto pr-1">
                    {newsletterLoading ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">Loading subscribers...</p> : null}
                    {!newsletterLoading && !activeNewsletterSubscribers.length ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No active newsletter subscribers.</p> : null}
                    {!newsletterLoading ? paginatedNewsletterSubscribers.map((subscriber) => (
                      <div key={subscriber._id} className="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] p-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-sm font-black text-white">{subscriber.email}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/55">
                            {subscriber.subscribed !== false ? "Active subscriber" : "Removed"} | Source: {subscriber.source || "footer"} | {subscriber.subscribedAt ? formatDateTime(subscriber.subscribedAt) : "Pending"}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          disabled={newsletterActionId === subscriber._id}
                          onClick={() => removeNewsletterSubscriber(subscriber._id)}
                          className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-rose-300/25 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-rose-200 transition-colors hover:bg-rose-400/10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
                        >
                          {newsletterActionId === subscriber._id ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    )) : null}
                  </div>
                  {!newsletterLoading && activeNewsletterSubscribers.length ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                      <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/70">
                        Page {safeNewsletterPage} of {newsletterTotalPages}
                      </p>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setNewsletterPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))}
                          disabled={safeNewsletterPage === 1}
                          className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                        >
                          Prev
                        </button>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setNewsletterPage((current) => Math.min(newsletterTotalPages, current + 1))}
                          disabled={safeNewsletterPage === newsletterTotalPages}
                          className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30"
                        >
                          Next
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "access") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Vacation mode</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Display a vacation notice and block visitor access.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <label className="flex items-start gap-3 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                    <input type="checkbox" checked={systemForm.vacationMode} onChange={(event) => setSystemForm((current) => ({ ...current, vacationMode: event.target.checked, maintenanceMode: event.target.checked ? false : current.maintenanceMode }))} className="mt-1 accent-blue-600" />
                    <span>
                      <span className="block text-sm font-bold text-white">Enable vacation mode</span>
                      <span className="mt-1 block text-sm text-white/65">Non-admin users will see the vacation message until you disable this mode.</span>
                    </span>
                  </label>
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                    <label className={validationLabelClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(vacationMessageError), Boolean(String(systemForm.vacationMessage || "").trim()))}>Vacation Message</label>
                    <textarea value={systemForm.vacationMessage} onChange={(event) => { setSystemForm((current) => ({ ...current, vacationMessage: event.target.value })); if (systemValidationAttempted) setSystemValidationAttempted(false); }} rows="4" placeholder="Vacation mode message" aria-invalid={systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(vacationMessageError)} className={validationInputClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(vacationMessageError), Boolean(String(systemForm.vacationMessage || "").trim()))} />
                    {systemForm.vacationMode && (String(systemForm.vacationMessage || "").trim() || systemValidationAttempted) ? <p className={validationHelperClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(vacationMessageError))}>{systemValidationAttempted && vacationMessageError ? vacationMessageError : "Vacation message is ready."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "access") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Maintenance mode</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Display a maintenance notice and block visitor access.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <label className="flex items-start gap-3 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                    <input type="checkbox" checked={systemForm.maintenanceMode} onChange={(event) => setSystemForm((current) => ({ ...current, maintenanceMode: event.target.checked, vacationMode: event.target.checked ? false : current.vacationMode }))} className="mt-1 accent-blue-600" />
                    <span>
                      <span className="block text-sm font-bold text-white">Enable maintenance mode</span>
                      <span className="mt-1 block text-sm text-white/65">Non-admin users will see the maintenance message until you disable this mode.</span>
                    </span>
                  </label>
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                    <label className={validationLabelClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(maintenanceMessageError), Boolean(String(systemForm.maintenanceMessage || "").trim()))}>Maintenance Message</label>
                    <textarea value={systemForm.maintenanceMessage} onChange={(event) => { setSystemForm((current) => ({ ...current, maintenanceMessage: event.target.value })); if (systemValidationAttempted) setSystemValidationAttempted(false); }} rows="4" placeholder="Maintenance mode message" aria-invalid={systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(maintenanceMessageError)} className={validationInputClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(maintenanceMessageError), Boolean(String(systemForm.maintenanceMessage || "").trim()))} />
                    {systemForm.maintenanceMode && (String(systemForm.maintenanceMessage || "").trim() || systemValidationAttempted) ? <p className={validationHelperClass(systemValidationAttempted && Boolean(maintenanceMessageError))}>{systemValidationAttempted && maintenanceMessageError ? maintenanceMessageError : "Maintenance message is ready."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Newsletter subject</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Set the email title for the update.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                  <label className="block">
                    <span className={validationLabelClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterSubjectError), Boolean(trimmedNewsletterSubject))}>Subject</span>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      name="subject"
                      value={newsletterCampaign.subject}
                      onChange={handleNewsletterCampaignChange}
                      maxLength={140}
                      placeholder="SnapQueue service update"
                      aria-invalid={newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterSubjectError)}
                      className={validationInputClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterSubjectError), Boolean(trimmedNewsletterSubject))}
                    />
                    {trimmedNewsletterSubject || newsletterValidationAttempted ? <p className={validationHelperClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterSubjectError))}>{newsletterValidationAttempted && newsletterSubjectError ? newsletterSubjectError : "Subject looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </label>
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Newsletter message</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Write the update that will be sent to active subscribers.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                    <label className="block">
                      <span className={validationLabelClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterMessageError), Boolean(trimmedNewsletterMessage))}>Message</span>
                      <textarea
                        name="message"
                        value={newsletterCampaign.message}
                        onChange={handleNewsletterCampaignChange}
                        rows={5}
                        maxLength={4000}
                        placeholder="Write the update you want to email to subscribers."
                        aria-invalid={newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterMessageError)}
                        className={validationInputClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterMessageError), Boolean(trimmedNewsletterMessage))}
                      />
                      {trimmedNewsletterMessage || newsletterValidationAttempted ? <p className={validationHelperClass(newsletterValidationAttempted && Boolean(newsletterMessageError))}>{newsletterValidationAttempted && newsletterMessageError ? newsletterMessageError : "Message looks valid."}</p> : null}
                    </label>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                    <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Delivery notes</h4>
                    <div className="mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm text-white/65">
                      <p>Only active subscribers receive this email.</p>
                      <p>Removed subscribers are skipped automatically.</p>
                      <p>SMTP must be configured on the backend for delivery to work.</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {newsletterSendError ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-rose-500">{newsletterSendError}</p> : null}
                  {newsletterSendSuccess ? <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-600">{newsletterSendSuccess}</p> : null}
                </div>
              </div> : null}

              {systemSettingsView === "security" ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 pb-5 pt-3 sm:px-6 sm:pb-5 sm:pt-4 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Security</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Admin access remains available while public access is restricted.</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                    <div className="relative">
                      <div>
                        <p className="pr-14 text-[13px] font-bold text-white">Two-factor Authentication</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 pr-14 text-[11px] text-white/65">Require an email verification code after entering your password.</p>
                      </div>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        role="switch"
                        aria-checked={profileForm.twoFactorEnabled}
                        disabled={profileSaving}
                        onClick={toggleAdminTwoFactor}
                        className={`absolute right-0 top-1/2 inline-flex h-7 w-12 -translate-y-1/2 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 ${profileForm.twoFactorEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                      >
                        <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileForm.twoFactorEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div> : null}
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 border-t border-white/10 px-5 py-4 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <button
                type="button"
                onClick={loadNewsletterSubscribers}
                disabled={newsletterLoading}
                className="group inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.08] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
              >
                <i className={`fa-solid ${newsletterLoading ? "fa-spinner animate-spin" : "fa-rotate-right"} text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110`} aria-hidden="true" />
                {newsletterLoading ? "Refreshing..." : "Refresh Subscribers"}
              </button> : null}
              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "newsletter") ? <button
                type="button"
                onClick={sendNewsletterCampaign}
                disabled={newsletterSending || newsletterTotals.active <= 0}
                className="group inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-violet-200 bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-violet-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
              >
                <i className={`fa-solid ${newsletterSending ? "fa-spinner animate-spin" : "fa-paper-plane"} text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110`} aria-hidden="true" />
                {newsletterSending ? "Sending..." : "Send Update"}
              </button> : null}
              {(systemSettingsView === "system" || systemSettingsView === "general" || systemSettingsView === "access") ? <button
                type="button"
                disabled={systemSaving}
                onClick={saveSystemSettings}
                className="group inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.08] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
              >
                <i className={`fa-solid ${systemSaving ? "fa-spinner animate-spin" : "fa-sliders"} text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110`} aria-hidden="true" />
                {systemSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save System Settings"}
              </button> : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="admin-home-shell min-h-screen text-slate-100">
      {dbDown ? (
        <div className="sticky top-0 z-[160] w-full border-b border-rose-300/40 bg-rose-600 px-3 py-2 text-center text-[11px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[12px]">
          Database is temporarily unavailable. Admin data may be incomplete.
        </div>
      ) : null}
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        .message-mobile-inbox-enter{animation:messageMobileInboxEnter 220ms ease-out;}
        .message-mobile-panel-enter{animation:messageMobilePanelEnter 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
        @keyframes messageMobileInboxEnter{
          from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-18px);}
          to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
        }
        @keyframes messageMobilePanelEnter{
          from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(26px) scale(0.985);}
          to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0) scale(1);}
        }
      `}</style>
      <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 -z-10 overflow-hidden">
        <div className="absolute -top-24 -right-20 h-96 w-96 rounded-full bg-sky-400/18 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute top-1/3 -left-20 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-blue-500/14 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute -bottom-24 right-1/4 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-cyan-300/12 blur-3xl" />
      </div>
      {renderModals()}
      <div
        id="sidebar-overlay"
        className={cx(
          "fixed inset-0 z-[135] bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md transition-opacity lg:hidden",
          mobileSidebarOpen ? "pointer-events-auto opacity-100" : "pointer-events-none opacity-0"
        )}
        onClick={() => setMobileSidebarOpen(false)}
      />
      <div className="flex min-h-screen">
        <aside
          id="sidebar-mobile"
          onMouseEnter={() => {
            if (!desktopSidebarCollapseLock) {
              setDesktopSidebarExpanded(true);
            }
          }}
          onMouseLeave={() => {
            setDesktopSidebarExpanded(false);
            setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock(false);
            setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
            setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
          }}
          className={cx(
            "group/sidebar admin-home-sidebar fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-[140] flex w-72 flex-col p-4 transition-transform duration-300 lg:z-[120] lg:w-[5.5rem] lg:transition-[width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:p-4",
            desktopSidebarHoverClasses.aside,
            mobileSidebarOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full",
            "lg:translate-x-0"
          )}
        >
          <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate("/")} className="mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)] lg:hidden">
            <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-10 w-10 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
            <div className="leading-none text-left overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap transition-all duration-300">
              <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
              <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => navigate("/")}
            className="mb-4 hidden items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)] lg:flex lg:min-h-[56px] lg:w-14 lg:overflow-hidden lg:px-0 lg:transition-all lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-3"
          >
            <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-10 w-10 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
            <div className={cx("leading-none text-left overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.brandText)}>
              <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
              <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </button>
          <nav className={cx("flex flex-1 flex-col justify-start space-y-1", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.nav)}>
            <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col justify-start space-y-1 pt-2 lg:hidden">
              {SIDEBAR_ADMIN_TABS.map((tab) => (
                <button key={tab.id} type="button" onClick={() => handleTabClick(tab.id)} className={cx("group/nav tab-btn relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl py-3 text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]", activeTab === tab.id ? "text-white bg-white/12" : "text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10")}>
                  <AdminNavIcon icon={tab.icon} active={activeTab === tab.id} />
                  <span>{tab.label}</span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div className="hidden flex-1 flex-col justify-center space-y-1 lg:flex">
              {DESKTOP_PRIMARY_TABS.map((tab) => (
                <div key={tab.id}>
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => handleTabClick(tab.id)} className={cx("group/nav tab-btn relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl py-3 text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:h-14 lg:w-14 lg:self-center lg:justify-center lg:px-0", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navButton, activeTab === tab.id ? cx("text-white", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navActive) : cx("text-slate-300 hover:text-white", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navHover))}>
                    <AdminNavIcon icon={tab.icon} active={activeTab === tab.id} />
                    <span className={cx("overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navLabel)}>
                      {tab.label}
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </nav>
        </aside>
          <main className={cx(
            "relative flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 p-3 transition-[margin] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:p-4 md:p-6 lg:ml-[5.5rem] lg:px-0 lg:py-8",
            (desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock) && "lg:ml-72",
            !["analytics", "profile-settings", "system-settings"].includes(activeTab) && "p-0 sm:p-0 md:p-0 lg:p-0",
            activeTab !== "analytics" && "lg:pt-0",
            !["analytics", "admin-help", "profile-settings"].includes(activeTab) && "lg:h-[100dvh] lg:overflow-hidden",
            activeTab === "admin-help" && "lg:h-[100dvh] lg:overflow-y-auto",
            activeTab === "system-settings" && "lg:overflow-y-auto",
            activeTab === "live-messages" && "h-screen overflow-hidden lg:h-[100dvh]"
          )}>
            <div className={cx("z-40 mb-0 flex w-full flex-col lg:mt-4", ["live-messages", "admin-help"].includes(activeTab) && "hidden", ["live-messages", "users", "manage-reservations", "order-status", "payments", "booking-history", "advertisements", "admin-help"].includes(activeTab) && "sm:hidden", ["analytics", "system-settings", "profile-settings"].includes(activeTab) ? "relative left-1/2 right-1/2 -ml-[50vw] -mr-[50vw] mt-0.5 mb-6 h-[104px] w-screen max-w-none sm:static sm:m-0 sm:mb-8 sm:h-[104px] sm:w-full sm:block" : "sticky top-0 sm:top-4 sm:mb-8 md:top-6 lg:top-8 justify-end")}>
            <div
              id="admin-header-bar"
              className={cx(
                ["analytics", "system-settings", "profile-settings"].includes(activeTab)
                  ? (desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock)
                    ? "fixed inset-x-0 top-3 z-[130] mx-auto w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] min-h-[72px] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-slate-950/92 px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,width] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:mt-0 sm:mx-0 sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:fixed md:top-0 md:left-72 md:right-auto md:w-[calc(100%-18rem)] md:min-h-[84px] lg:px-8"
                    : "fixed inset-x-0 top-3 z-[130] mx-auto w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] min-h-[72px] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-slate-950/92 px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,width] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:mt-0 sm:mx-0 sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:fixed md:top-0 md:left-[5.5rem] md:right-auto md:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)] md:min-h-[84px] lg:px-8"
                  : "sticky top-1 z-[130] mt-1 min-h-[72px] w-full rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:mt-0 sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:px-5 lg:px-8",
                ["users", "manage-reservations", "order-status", "payments", "booking-history", "advertisements"].includes(activeTab) && "mt-0",
                activeTab === "analytics" && mobileSidebarOpen && "bg-slate-950/28 backdrop-blur-2xl"
              )}
            >
              {["analytics", "system-settings", "profile-settings"].includes(activeTab) ? (
                <>
                  <div className="hidden">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setMobileSidebarOpen(true)}
                      className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                      aria-label="Open menu"
                      title="Open menu"
                    >
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-bars text-sm" />
                    </button>
                    <div />
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative flex flex-col gap-2.5 sm:min-h-[52px] sm:justify-center sm:pr-[17.5rem] md:pr-[19rem] lg:pr-[21rem] xl:pr-[23rem]">
                      <div className="hidden min-w-0 flex-1 sm:absolute sm:left-0 sm:top-1/2 sm:block sm:-translate-y-1/2">
                        <h2 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">
                          <span className="admin-wave-hand text-base leading-none" aria-hidden="true">{"\u{1F44B}"}</span>
                          <span className="truncate">{getTimeGreeting()}, {me?.fullName || "Admin Pete"}</span>
                        </h2>
                      </div>
                      <div className="relative flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full flex-wrap items-center gap-2 gap-y-2 sm:hidden">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setMobileSidebarOpen(true)}
                          className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                          aria-label="Open menu"
                          title="Open menu"
                        >
                          <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                        </button>
                        <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                          <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                          <input
                            value={activeSearchValue}
                            onChange={(event) => {
                              if (activeTab === "users") setClientSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                              else setSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                            }}
                            type="text"
                            id="dashboard-search"
                            placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                            className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                          />
                        </div>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            handleTabClick("live-messages");
                            setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                            setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                          title="Live messages"
                        >
                          <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                          <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                        </button>
                        <button
                          id="user-notif-bell"
                          data-admin-notif-button="true"
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)}
                          className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95 lg:hidden sm:h-10 sm:w-10"
                          title="Notifications"
                        >
                          <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                          <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                        </button>
                        <div ref={mobileAvatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                          <button data-admin-avatar-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Admin menu">
                            <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                              {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                                <SafeAvatar
                                  src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                                  fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                                  alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                                  className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                                  fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                                />
                              ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                            </span>
                            <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                              <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                            </span>
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    <div className="hidden">
                      <div className="relative w-[11rem] md:w-[12rem] lg:w-[13.5rem] xl:w-[15rem]">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                        <input
                          value={searchQuery}
                          onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                          type="text"
                          placeholder="Search clients..."
                          className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => handleTabClick("profile-settings")} className="admin-avatar-neo inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400 bg-slate-800 text-slate-100 transition-all hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700 sm:h-10 sm:w-10" title="Profile settings">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                            fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                          />
                        ) : <i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
              <div className="relative flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full flex-wrap items-center gap-2 gap-y-2 sm:hidden">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setMobileSidebarOpen(true)}
                  className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                  aria-label="Open menu"
                  title="Open menu"
                >
                  <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                </button>
                <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                  <input
                    value={activeSearchValue}
                    onChange={(event) => {
                      if (activeTab === "users") setClientSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                      else setSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                    }}
                    type="text"
                    placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                    className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    handleTabClick("live-messages");
                    setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                    setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                  }}
                  className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                  title="Live messages"
                >
                  <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                  <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                </button>
                <button
                  id="user-notif-bell"
                  data-admin-notif-button="true"
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)}
                  className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95 lg:hidden sm:h-10 sm:w-10"
                  title="Notifications"
                >
                  <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                  <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                </button>
                <div ref={mobileAvatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                  <button data-admin-avatar-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Admin menu">
                    <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                      {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                          fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                          alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                          className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                          fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                        />
                      ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                    </span>
                    <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="hidden items-center gap-2.5 sm:flex sm:gap-3.5">
                <div className="relative hidden lg:block">
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-500" />
                  <input value={activeSearchValue} onChange={(event) => { if (activeTab === "users") setClientSearchQuery(event.target.value); else setSearchQuery(event.target.value); }} placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder} className="w-56 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/40 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-500 hover:border-slate-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/40 xl:w-64" />
                </div>
                <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="relative hidden sm:block">
                  <button
                    data-admin-avatar-button="true"
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                    title="Admin menu"
                  >
                    <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                      {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                          fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                          alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                          className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                          fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                        />
                      ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                    </span>
                    <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                    </span>
                  </button>
                  {avatarMenuOpen ? (
                    <div data-admin-avatar-menu="true" className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[170] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl">
                      <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("profile-settings")}
                        className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all duration-200 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
                      >
                        <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                          {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                              fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                              alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                              className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                              fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                            />
                          ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                          <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{me?.fullName || "Admin"}</p>
                          <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Admin Access</p>
                        </div>
                      </button>
                      <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("system-settings")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-sliders text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>System Settings</span>
                        </button>
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("admin-help")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Help</span>
                        </button>
                        <div className="my-1 border-t border-white/10" />
                        <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("sign-out")}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Sign Out</span>
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
                <div ref={notificationDropdownRef} className="relative">
                  <button data-admin-notif-button="true" type="button" onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95 sm:h-10 sm:w-10" title="Notifications">
                    <BellIcon />
                    <span className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                  </button>
                  {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
                </div>
              </div>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          {["analytics", "system-settings", "profile-settings"].includes(activeTab) ? (
            <div className="pointer-events-none hidden md:fixed md:right-6 md:top-6 md:z-[145] md:flex md:items-center md:gap-2.5 lg:right-8 xl:right-10">
              <div className="pointer-events-auto relative w-[12rem] lg:w-[13.5rem] xl:w-[15rem]">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm text-slate-400" />
                <input
                  value={activeSearchValue}
                  onChange={(event) => {
                    if (activeTab === "users") setClientSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                    else setSearchQuery(event.target.value);
                  }}
                  type="text"
                  id="dashboard-search-fixed-admin"
                  placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                  className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                />
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  handleTabClick("live-messages");
                  setAdminNotificationsOpen(false);
                }}
                className="pointer-events-auto relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                title="Live messages"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-comments text-sm" />
                <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadLiveChatCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
              </button>
              <div ref={notificationDropdownRef} className="pointer-events-auto relative">
                <button
                  data-admin-notif-button="true"
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setAdminNotificationsOpen((current) => !current);
                  }}
                  className="pointer-events-auto relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                  title="Notifications"
                >
                  <i className="fa-regular fa-bell text-sm" />
                  <span className={cx("absolute right-1.5 top-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                </button>
                {adminNotificationsOpen ? renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() : null}
              </div>
              <div ref={avatarMenuRef} className="pointer-events-auto relative">
                <button
                  data-admin-avatar-button="true"
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                  className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                  title="Admin menu"
                >
                  <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                    {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                      <SafeAvatar
                        src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                        fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                        alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                        className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                        fallback={<i className="fa-solid fa-user-gear" />}
                      />
                    ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                  </span>
                  <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                  </span>
                </button>
                {avatarMenuOpen ? (
                  <div data-admin-avatar-menu="true" className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[170] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl">
                    <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("profile-settings")}
                      className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all duration-200 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
                    >
                      <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                        {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                            fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                            alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                          />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                      </div>
                      <div className="min-w-0">
                        <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{me?.fullName || "Admin"}</p>
                        <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Admin Access</p>
                      </div>
                    </button>
                    <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("system-settings")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-sliders text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>System Settings</span>
                      </button>
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("admin-help")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Help</span>
                      </button>
                      <div className="my-1 border-t border-white/10" />
                      <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("sign-out")}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Sign Out</span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}
          {adminNotificationsOpen ? (
            <div ref={notificationDropdownRef} data-admin-notif-panel="true" className="fixed right-4 top-24 z-[320] w-[92vw] max-w-sm rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.94),rgba(30,41,59,0.9))] shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-2xl lg:hidden sm:right-6 md:right-10">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 p-3">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">Notifications</h3>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setAdminNotificationsOpen(false)}
                  className="flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white/80 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 hover:text-white"
                  aria-label="Close notifications"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-sm" />
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/10 px-3 py-3">
                <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">{sortedNotificationItems.length} item{sortedNotificationItems.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</p>
                <button type="button" onClick={markAllAdminNotificationsRead} className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:text-white">Mark all read</button>
              </div>
              <div className="max-h-[360px] space-y-5 overflow-y-auto p-3">
                {notificationSections.length ? notificationSections.map((section) => (
                  <section key={section.id}>
                    <h4 className="mb-3 text-base font-black tracking-tight text-white">{section.label}</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {section.items.map((item) => (
                        <div key={item.id} className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.03] px-2.5 py-2.5 transition-all hover:border-white/14 hover:bg-white/[0.06]">
                          <button type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-start gap-2.5 text-left">
                            <span className={cx(
                              "mt-0.5 flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border text-sm",
                              item.tone === "amber" && "border-amber-400/40 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-200",
                              item.tone === "green" && "border-emerald-400/40 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-200",
