                              item.tone === "blue" && "border-sky-400/40 bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-200"
                            )}>
                              <i className={item.icon} />
                            </span>
                            <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                              <span className="block text-sm font-bold leading-snug text-white">{item.title}</span>
                              <span className="mt-0.5 block text-xs leading-snug text-white/75">{item.detail}</span>
                            </span>
                          </button>
                          <span className="mt-0.5 flex shrink-0 items-start gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-white/45">{formatNotificationAge(item.createdAt)}</span>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => dismissAdminNotification(item.id)}
                              className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white/45 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                              aria-label={`Delete ${item.title} notification`}
                              title="Delete notification"
                            >
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[10px]" />
                            </button>
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </section>
                )) : <p className="py-8 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300">No new notifications.</p>}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}
          {avatarMenuOpen ? (
            <div ref={mobileAvatarDropdownRef} data-admin-avatar-mobile-dropdown="true" className="fixed right-4 top-24 z-[325] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:hidden">
              <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("profile-settings")}
                className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all duration-200 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
              >
                <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                  {me?.avatarUrl || me?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                    <SafeAvatar
                      src={me?.avatarUrl || ""}
                      fallbackSrc={me?.googleAvatarUrl || ""}
                      alt={me?.fullName || "Admin"}
                      className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                      fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                    />
                  ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(me?.fullName || "A").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "A"}</div>}
                </div>
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{me?.fullName || "SnapQueue Admin"}</p>
                  <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Admin Access</p>
                </div>
              </button>
              <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("system-settings")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                  <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-sliders text-[13px]" />
                  </span>
                  <span>System Settings</span>
                </button>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("admin-help")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
                  <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px]" />
                  </span>
                  <span>Help</span>
                </button>
                <div className="my-1 border-t border-white/10" />
                <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("sign-out")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100">
                  <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                  </span>
                  <span>Sign Out</span>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}
          <div className={cx(
            "mx-auto w-full max-w-6xl",
            !["analytics", "profile-settings", "system-settings", "users"].includes(activeTab) && "max-w-none",
            activeTab === "users" && "mx-0 max-w-none",
            "lg:mx-0 lg:max-w-none lg:w-full lg:px-0",
            activeTab === "analytics" && "lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-6xl lg:px-6",
            activeTab === "profile-settings" && "lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-6xl lg:px-6"
          )}>
            {renderAnalytics()}
            {renderUsers()}
            {renderManageReservations()}
            {renderOrderStatus()}
            {renderPayments()}
            {renderBookingHistory()}
            {renderLiveMessages()}
            {renderAdvertisements()}
            {renderAdminHelp()}
            {renderProfileSettings()}
            {renderSystemSettings()}
          </div>
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/admin/pages/AdminHelpCenterPage.jsx

Source file 72 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate, useSearchParams } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import { Loader } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { buildAdminHelpArticles } from "../adminHelpContent";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";

const CATEGORY_NAV = [
  { key: "Bookings", label: "Bookings", icon: "calendar" },
  { key: "Payments", label: "Payments", icon: "wallet" },
  { key: "Operations", label: "Operations", icon: "play" },
  { key: "Support", label: "Support", icon: "comments" },
  { key: "Accounts", label: "Accounts", icon: "user" }
];

function Icon({ name, className = "h-5 w-5" }) {
  const props = { className, fill: "none", stroke: "currentColor", strokeWidth: "2", viewBox: "0 0 24 24" };
  switch (name) {
    case "search":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35" /></svg>;
    case "comments":
      return <i className={`fa-solid fa-comments ${className}`} aria-hidden="true" />;
    case "chevron-left":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6" /></svg>;
    case "user":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 12a4 4 0 100-8 4 4 0 000 8z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 21a8 8 0 0116 0" /></svg>;
    case "play":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 9l5 3-5 3V9z" /></svg>;
    case "calendar":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M3 10h18M5 5h14a2 2 0 012 2v12a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V7a2 2 0 012-2z" /></svg>;
    case "wallet":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 7a2 2 0 012-2h13a1 1 0 010 2H5a2 2 0 000 4h14a2 2 0 012 2v3a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V7z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M17 13h.01" /></svg>;
    case "menu":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16M4 12h16M4 17h16" /></svg>;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

export default function AdminHelpCenterPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [admin, setAdmin] = useState(null);
  const [searchValue, setSearchValue] = useState(searchParams.get("article") || "");
  const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState("Bookings");
  const [mobileCategoryMenuOpen, setMobileCategoryMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileCategoryMenuMounted, setMobileCategoryMenuMounted] = useState(false);
  const rawReturnTo = typeof location.state?.returnTo === "string" ? location.state.returnTo : "";
  const returnTo = rawReturnTo && !rawReturnTo.includes("help-center") ? rawReturnTo : "/admin?tab=admin-help";
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(mobileCategoryMenuOpen));

  const allArticles = useMemo(() => buildAdminHelpArticles(), []);
  const articleQuery = searchParams.get("article") || "";
  const searchNeedle = searchValue.trim().toLowerCase();

  const filteredArticles = useMemo(
    () => (searchNeedle
      ? allArticles.filter((item) => `${item.title} ${item.description} ${(item.steps || []).join(" ")}`.toLowerCase().includes(searchNeedle))
      : allArticles),
    [allArticles, searchNeedle]
  );
  const overviewArticles = useMemo(
    () => filteredArticles.filter((item) => String(item.topLevel || "Other") === activeCategory),
    [activeCategory, filteredArticles]
  );
  const overviewSections = useMemo(
    () => overviewArticles.reduce((groups, item) => {
      const key = item.section || "Other";
      if (!groups[key]) groups[key] = [];
      groups[key].push(item);
      return groups;
    }, {}),
    [overviewArticles]
  );

  const selectedArticle = useMemo(() => {
    if (!articleQuery) return null;
    return allArticles.find((item) => item.title.toLowerCase() === articleQuery.trim().toLowerCase()) || null;
  }, [allArticles, articleQuery]);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadSession = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        navigate("/login?redirect=admin-help-center", { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/auth/me");
        const nextAdmin = response?.data?.user || null;
        if (!hasAdminAccess(nextAdmin?.role)) {
          navigate("/help-center", { replace: true });
          return;
        }
        setAdmin(nextAdmin);
      } catch (_error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        navigate("/login?redirect=admin-help-center", { replace: true });
        return;
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadSession();
  }, [navigate]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSearchValue(articleQuery);
  }, [articleQuery]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mobileCategoryMenuOpen) {
      setMobileCategoryMenuMounted(true);
      return undefined;
    }
    const timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => setMobileCategoryMenuMounted(false), 320);
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
  }, [mobileCategoryMenuOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
  }, [activeCategory, articleQuery]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedArticle?.topLevel) {
      setActiveCategory(selectedArticle.topLevel);
    }
  }, [selectedArticle]);

  function openArticle(title) {
    setSearchParams({ article: title });
  }

  function submitSearch(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (!filteredArticles.length) return;
    openArticle(filteredArticles[0].title);
  }

  function handleBackToOverview() {
    setSearchParams({});
  }

  function handleHeaderBack() {
    if (articleQuery) {
      handleBackToOverview();
      return;
    }
    handleBackToDashboard();
  }

  function handleBackToDashboard() {
    navigate(returnTo);
  }

  function handleSelectCategory(key) {
    setActiveCategory(key);
    if (articleQuery) {
      setSearchParams({});
    }
    setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-[#040b1a] px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/80 px-10 py-8 shadow-xl backdrop-blur-sm">
          <Loader />
          <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-300">Loading</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#040b1a] text-white">
      <header className="border-b border-white/10 bg-[#081224]/95 backdrop-blur-xl">
        <div className="mx-auto flex max-w-[1700px] flex-col gap-3 px-4 py-4 sm:px-6 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between lg:gap-4 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-start gap-3 lg:w-auto lg:justify-start lg:gap-4">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleHeaderBack}
              className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] text-white/75 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
              aria-label={articleQuery ? "Back to help articles" : "Back to dashboard"}
            >
              <Icon name="chevron-left" className="h-5 w-5" />
            </button>
            <Link to="/admin?tab=admin-help" className="inline-flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white transition-colors hover:text-sky-200 sm:text-2xl">
              <span>SnapQueue</span>
              <span className="truncate text-white/45">Support</span>
            </Link>
          </div>
          <div className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 pr-1 sm:gap-3 sm:pr-0 lg:w-auto">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setMobileCategoryMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
              className="inline-flex shrink-0 rounded-xl p-2 text-slate-100 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-800 lg:hidden"
              aria-label="Open help categories"
            >
              <Icon name="menu" className="h-6 w-6" />
            </button>
            <form onSubmit={submitSearch} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1">
              <label className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 py-3 text-white/65 sm:px-5">
                <Icon name="search" className="h-5 w-5" />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={searchValue}
                  onChange={(event) => setSearchValue(event.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Search help articles"
                  className="w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-sm text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none sm:text-base"
                />
              </label>
            </form>
            <Link to="/admin?tab=live-messages" aria-label="Open live messages" className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] text-white/75 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white">
              <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Link>
            <Link to="/admin?tab=profile-settings" aria-label="Open settings" className="mr-1 inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] sm:mr-0">
              <SafeAvatar
                src={admin?.avatarUrl}
                fallbackSrc={admin?.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(admin?.fullName || admin?.email || "Admin")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                alt="Profile avatar"
                className="h-full w-full object-cover"
              />
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="grid min-h-[calc(100vh-76px)] lg:h-[calc(100vh-76px)] lg:min-h-0 lg:grid-cols-[360px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
        <aside className="hidden border-b border-white/10 bg-[#081224]/70 p-4 sm:p-6 lg:block lg:min-h-0 lg:overflow-y-auto lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r lg:border-white/10">
          <div className="mt-1 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:mt-2 sm:space-y-0">
            {CATEGORY_NAV.map((item) => {
              const isActive = item.key === activeCategory;
              return (
                <button
                  key={item.key}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => handleSelectCategory(item.key)}
                  className={`flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-semibold transition-colors sm:gap-4 sm:py-4 sm:text-lg ${
                    isActive ? "text-rose-300" : "text-white/85 hover:bg-white/[0.05] hover:text-white"
                  }`}
                >
                  <span className={`inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full ${isActive ? "bg-rose-400/15" : "bg-white/[0.04]"}`}>
                    <Icon name={item.icon} className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </span>
                  <span>{item.label}</span>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </aside>

        {mobileCategoryMenuMounted ? (
          <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[140] backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300 lg:hidden ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "bg-slate-950/55 opacity-100" : "bg-slate-950/0 opacity-0"}`}>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false)}
              className="absolute inset-0 h-full w-full"
              aria-label="Close help categories"
            />
            <div className={`absolute left-0 top-0 flex h-dvh w-[84%] max-w-[320px] flex-col overflow-y-auto border-r border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(15,23,42,0.95)_45%,rgba(2,6,23,0.98))] px-4 pb-6 pt-4 shadow-[24px_0_60px_rgba(2,8,23,0.45)] transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:px-6 sm:pt-6 ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-x-0 opacity-100" : "-translate-x-full opacity-85"}`}>
              <div className={`mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)] transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-y-0 scale-100 opacity-100" : "translate-y-4 scale-[0.98] opacity-0"}`}>
                <div className="leading-none text-left">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">SnapQueue</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-sky-300">Studio</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                {CATEGORY_NAV.map((item, index) => {
                  const isActive = item.key === activeCategory;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={item.key}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleSelectCategory(item.key)}
                      className={`flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-left text-[1.05rem] font-bold transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] ${
                        isActive ? "bg-rose-400/10 text-rose-300" : "text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                      } ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-x-0 scale-100 opacity-100" : "translate-x-8 scale-[0.98] opacity-0"}`}
                      style={{ transitionDelay: mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? `${110 + (index * 55)}ms` : "0ms" }}
                    >
                      <span className={`inline-flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center ${isActive ? "text-rose-300" : "text-white"}`}>
                        <Icon name={item.icon} className="h-5 w-5" />
                      </span>
                      <span>{item.label}</span>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </nav>
              <div className="mt-6 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 sm:mt-8 sm:pt-8" />
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        <main className="bg-[#040b1a] px-4 py-6 sm:px-8 sm:py-8 lg:min-h-0 lg:overflow-y-auto lg:px-14 lg:py-12">
          {articleQuery && selectedArticle ? (
            <div className="mx-auto max-w-4xl">
              <div className="mb-6 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleBackToOverview}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
                >
                  <Icon name="chevron-left" className="h-4 w-4" />
                  Back to articles
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleBackToDashboard}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-sky-300/20 bg-sky-400/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:bg-sky-400/15"
                >
                  <Icon name="user" className="h-4 w-4" />
                  Back to dashboard help
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <span className="rounded-full border border-sky-300/20 bg-sky-400/10 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200">
                  {selectedArticle.category || "Admin Help"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/45">{selectedArticle.readTime || "Quick read"}</span>
              </div>
              <h1 className="mt-5 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-5xl">{selectedArticle.title}</h1>
              <p className="mt-6 text-base leading-relaxed text-white/72 sm:mt-8 sm:text-lg">{selectedArticle.description}</p>

              <div className="mt-8 space-y-5 sm:mt-10 sm:space-y-6">
                {(selectedArticle.steps || []).map((step, index) => (
                  <div key={`${selectedArticle.title}-${index}`} className="flex gap-4">
                    <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 flex-none items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/[0.08] text-sm font-black text-white">
                      {index + 1}
                    </span>
                    <p className="text-base leading-relaxed text-white/82 sm:text-lg">{step}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {selectedArticle.tip ? (
                <div className="mt-10 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-400/10 p-5">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200">Helpful tip</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/80">{selectedArticle.tip}</p>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="mx-auto max-w-6xl">
              <div className="grid gap-x-10 gap-y-10 lg:grid-cols-2 lg:gap-y-12 lg:gap-x-16">
                {Object.entries(overviewSections).map(([sectionName, items]) => (
                  <section key={sectionName} className="space-y-6">
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white sm:text-3xl">{sectionName}</h2>
                    <div className="space-y-4 sm:space-y-5">
                      {items.map((item) => (
                        <button
                          key={item.title}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => openArticle(item.title)}
                          className="block text-left text-lg text-white/90 transition-colors hover:text-sky-200 sm:text-xl"
                        >
                          {item.title}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </section>
                ))}
              </div>
              {!Object.keys(overviewSections).length ? (
                <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-8 text-center">
                  <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-white">No articles found</h1>
                  <p className="mt-3 text-white/65">Try another search term or choose a different help category.</p>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          )}
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/payment/components/PaymentCard.jsx

Source file 73 of 111

export default function PaymentCard({ className = "", children }) {
  return (
    <div className={`overflow-hidden rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/20 bg-white/90 shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-xl ${className}`.trim()}>
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}
74 Frontend Source

frontend/src/features/payment/components/StatusBadge.jsx

Source file 74 of 111

const STATUS_STYLES = {
  paid: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  pending: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  needs_review: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700",
  verified: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700",
  rejected: "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700",
  cancelled: "bg-slate-200 text-slate-700",
  expired: "bg-slate-200 text-slate-700",
  refunded: "bg-fuchsia-100 text-fuchsia-700",
  none: "bg-slate-100 text-slate-600",
  requested: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  approved: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  processed: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700"
};

export default function StatusBadge({ status, className = "" }) {
  const key = String(status || "").toLowerCase();
  const label = key ? key.toUpperCase() : "N/A";
  const tone = STATUS_STYLES[key] || "bg-slate-100 text-slate-700";
  return <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider ${tone} ${className}`.trim()}>{label}</span>;
}

frontend/src/features/public/pages/ContactFaqPage.jsx

Source file 75 of 111

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import ChatbotWidget from "../../../shared/components/ChatbotWidget";
import FooterNewsletterSignup from "../../../shared/components/FooterNewsletterSignup";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay, Loader } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";

const EMAIL_PATTERN = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
const EMPTY_CONTACT = { firstName: "", lastName: "", email: "", subject: "", message: "" };
const CONTACT_TOPICS = [
  "Booking Inquiry",
  "Package Pricing",
  "Payment Concern",
  "Project Status"
];
const SOCIAL_LINKS = {
  facebook: String(import.meta.env.VITE_SOCIAL_FACEBOOK_URL || "https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100079708334779").trim(),
  instagram: String(import.meta.env.VITE_SOCIAL_INSTAGRAM_URL || "https://www.instagram.com/petesoriaga/").trim(),
  gmail: "mailto:otpaauthetication@gmail.com"
};
const NAV_ITEMS = [
  ["#home", "Home"],
  ["#samples", "Samples"],
  ["#pricing", "Pricing"],
  ["/contact", "Contact"]
];
const FAQ_ITEMS = [
  {
    question: "How do I get started with SnapQueue?",
    answer: "Start by creating an account and logging in. From there, submit a reservation with your event details, preferred package, and schedule. Once approved by admin, your booking appears in your dashboard where you can monitor status updates, payment progress, and delivery milestones."
  },
  {
    question: "What payment methods do you accept?",
    answer: "Available payment options are shown on your approved reservation payment page. You can upload proof of payment and wait for admin verification. If a payment is rejected or needs correction, the dashboard will show the reason so you can quickly resubmit."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I cancel my reservation anytime?",
    answer: "Cancellation is possible depending on your reservation status. If your booking is still pending, cancellation is usually straightforward. For approved or in-progress bookings, cancellation may require admin review and may be subject to policy terms. Use your dashboard or contact support for help."
  },
  {
    question: "Do you offer refunds?",
    answer: "Refund requests are handled case-by-case based on booking stage, payment verification, and policy eligibility. If your reservation qualifies, submit a refund request from your dashboard with complete details. Admin will review and update the result, including any payout information, in your account."
  }
];

function validateField(name, value) {
  const trimmed = String(value || "").trim();
  if (name === "firstName" && trimmed.length < 2) return trimmed ? "First name is too short." : "First name is required.";
  if (name === "lastName" && trimmed.length < 2) return trimmed ? "Last name is too short." : "Last name is required.";
  if (name === "email" && !EMAIL_PATTERN.test(trimmed)) return trimmed ? "Email format is invalid." : "Email is required.";
  if (name === "subject" && trimmed.length < 3) return trimmed ? "Please select a valid subject." : "Subject is required.";
  if (name === "message" && trimmed.length < 10) return trimmed ? "Message is too short." : "Message is required.";
  return "";
}

function inputClass(name, contact, errors) {
  const base = "w-full rounded-md border bg-[#1b2739] px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2";
  if (!String(contact[name] || "").trim()) return `${base} border-slate-600 focus:ring-blue-500`;
  return errors[name]
    ? `${base} field-shake border-red-500 focus:ring-red-400`
    : `${base} border-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-400`;
}

function labelClass(name, contact, errors, touched) {
  if (errors[name] && touched[name]) return "mb-1 block text-[11px] font-bold text-red-300";
  if (String(contact[name] || "").trim() && touched[name]) return "mb-1 block text-[11px] font-bold text-emerald-300";
  return "mb-1 block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-300";
}

function helperTextClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold ${hasError ? "text-red-300" : "text-emerald-300"}`;
}

export default function ContactFaqPage() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const mobileProfileMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [contact, setContact] = useState(EMPTY_CONTACT);
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const [touched, setTouched] = useState({});
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileProfileOpen, setMobileProfileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutModalOpen, setLogoutModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutPending, setLogoutPending] = useState(false);
  const [openFaq, setOpenFaq] = useState(-1);
  const dashboardPath = hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin" : "/dashboard";
  const profilePath = hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin?tab=profile-settings" : "/dashboard?tab=profile";
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(mobileOpen || logoutModalOpen || logoutPending));

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "font-poppins bg-[#040b1a] text-slate-100";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.body.style.overflow = mobileOpen ? "hidden" : "";
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = "";
    };
  }, [mobileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onKeyDown = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") {
        setMobileOpen(false);
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
        setLogoutModalOpen(false);
      }
    };
    const onResize = () => {
      if (window.innerWidth >= 768) {
        setMobileOpen(false);
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    window.addEventListener("resize", onResize);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
      window.removeEventListener("resize", onResize);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mobileProfileOpen) return undefined;
    const onPointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!mobileProfileMenuRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
    document.addEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
      document.removeEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    };
  }, [mobileProfileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadSession = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        navigate("/login?redirect=contact", { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/auth/me");
        setUser(response?.data?.user || null);
      } catch (_error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        navigate("/login?redirect=contact", { replace: true });
      }
    };
    loadSession();
  }, [navigate]);

  function scrollOrNavigate(target) {
    if (target.startsWith("#")) {
      if (target === "#home" && location.pathname === "/") {
        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
        return;
      }
      navigate(`/${target}`);
      return;
    }
    navigate(target);
  }

  function closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(target) {
    setMobileOpen(false);
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      scrollOrNavigate(target);
    }, 120);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    const hash = String(location.hash || "").trim();
    if (!hash) return undefined;

    if (location.pathname !== "/") return undefined;

    let timeoutId = 0;
    const scrollToSection = () => {
      if (hash === "#home") {
        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
        return;
      }
      const target = document.querySelector(hash);
      if (!target) return;
      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
    };

    timeoutId = window.setTimeout(scrollToSection, 80);
    return () => {
      if (timeoutId) window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    };
  }, [location.hash, location.pathname]);

  function handleSignOut() {
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(true);
  }

  async function confirmLogout() {
    setLogoutPending(true);
    window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
    window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
    setUser(null);
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setMobileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(false);
    setLogoutPending(false);
    navigate("/login");
  }

  async function submitContact(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    const nextErrors = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(contact).map(([name, value]) => [name, validateField(name, value)]));
    setErrors(nextErrors);
    if (Object.values(nextErrors).some(Boolean)) {
      return;
    }

    setSending(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/contact", {
        name: `${contact.firstName} ${contact.lastName}`.trim(),
        email: contact.email,
        subject: contact.subject,
        message: contact.message
      });
      setContact(EMPTY_CONTACT);
      setErrors({});
      setTouched({});
      const warnings = Array.isArray(response?.data?.warnings) ? response.data.warnings.filter(Boolean) : [];
    } catch (error) {
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#040b1a] text-slate-100">
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
      `}</style>
      {logoutPending ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing out" /> : null}
      <div className={`${logoutModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[110] items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/72 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm`} onClick={() => !logoutPending && setLogoutModalOpen(false)}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[17.25rem] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-3.5 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-sm sm:rounded-3xl sm:p-6 sm:shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(2,8,23,0.55)]" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
          <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-red-400/20 bg-red-500/12 text-red-300 shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(239,68,68,0.18)] sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-2xl" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Sign Out?</h3>
          <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">Are you sure you want to end your session?</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setLogoutModalOpen(false)} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={confirmLogout} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] transition-colors hover:bg-red-600 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3">{logoutPending ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing out</span></> : "Sign Out"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[70] bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300 ${mobileOpen ? "opacity-100" : "hidden opacity-0"}`} onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
        <div className={`absolute left-0 top-0 flex h-dvh w-[84%] max-w-[320px] flex-col overflow-y-auto border-r border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(15,23,42,0.95)_45%,rgba(2,6,23,0.98))] px-4 pb-6 pt-4 shadow-[24px_0_60px_rgba(2,8,23,0.45)] transition-transform duration-300 sm:px-6 sm:pt-6 ${mobileOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full"}`} onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
          <Link to="/" className="mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)]" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
            <div className="leading-none text-left">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">SnapQueue</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-sky-300">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </Link>
          <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
            {NAV_ITEMS.map(([href, label]) => href.startsWith("#") ? (
              <button key={label} type="button" className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-left text-[1.05rem] font-bold text-slate-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(href)}>
                <span className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                  <i className={
                    label === "Home" ? "fa-solid fa-house text-[16px]" :
                    label === "Pricing" ? "fa-solid fa-tags text-[16px]" :
                    label === "Samples" ? "fa-solid fa-images text-[16px]" :
                    "fa-solid fa-envelope text-[16px]"
                  } />
                </span>
                <span>{label}</span>
              </button>
            ) : (
              <button key={label} type="button" className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-[1.05rem] font-bold text-slate-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(href)}>
                <span className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-envelope text-[16px]" />
                </span>
                <span>{label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>
          <div className="mt-6 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 sm:mt-8 sm:pt-8">
            <div className="grid gap-3" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <nav className="sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl px-2 pt-2 sm:px-4 sm:pt-2.5 md:px-6 md:pt-3 lg:px-8">
        <div className="rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.82),rgba(30,41,59,0.68))] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(2,8,23,0.34)] backdrop-blur-2xl ring-1 ring-white/10 sm:rounded-[1.65rem] sm:px-4 sm:py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 sm:gap-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-3.5">
              <button type="button" className="rounded-xl p-2 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-800 md:hidden" onClick={() => { setMobileProfileOpen(false); setMobileOpen(true); }}>
                <svg className="h-6 w-6 text-slate-100 sm:h-6 sm:w-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" /></svg>
              </button>
              <Link to="/" className="group flex items-center justify-center px-1 py-1 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 md:mr-0">
                <div className="leading-none text-left"><h1 className="text-[17px] font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1><p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p></div>
              </Link>
            </div>
            <div className="hidden items-center gap-2 md:flex lg:gap-3">
              {NAV_ITEMS.map(([href, label]) => href.startsWith("#") ? <button key={label} type="button" className="rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-300 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white lg:text-sm" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate(href)}>{label}</button> : <Link key={label} to={href} className="rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-300 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white lg:text-sm">{label}</Link>)}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-3.5">
              <div ref={mobileProfileMenuRef} className="relative">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  aria-label={user ? "Open profile menu" : "Open account menu"}
                  aria-expanded={mobileProfileOpen}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setMobileOpen(false);
                    setMobileProfileOpen((current) => !current);
                  }}
                  className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                >
                  <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                    {user ? (
                      <SafeAvatar
                        src={user.avatarUrl}
                        fallbackSrc={user.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user.fullName || user.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                        alt="Profile avatar"
                        className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-user text-sm" />
                    )}
                  </span>
                  <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${mobileProfileOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                  </span>
                </button>
                <div className={`absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[125] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 ${mobileProfileOpen ? "pointer-events-auto translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "pointer-events-none -translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}>
                  <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
                  {user ? (
                    <>
                      <Link to={profilePath} className="relative flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.08]" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={user.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={user.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user.fullName || user.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                            alt="Profile avatar"
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                          <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{user.fullName || "SnapQueue User"}</p>
                          <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">{hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "Admin Access" : "Client Access"}</p>
                        </div>
                      </Link>
                      <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                        <Link to={dashboardPath} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-table-columns text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Dashboard</span>
                        </Link>
                        <Link to="/help-center" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-question text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Help Center</span>
                        </Link>
                        <div className="mx-3 my-1 h-px bg-white/10" />
                        <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={handleSignOut}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Sign Out</span>
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="grid gap-1">
                      <Link to="/login" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-right-to-bracket text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Sign In</span>
                      </Link>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
              {!user ? <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-900/70 p-[3px] shadow-inner shadow-black/30 sm:flex"><Link to="/login" className="group relative inline-flex h-8 min-w-[108px] items-center justify-center gap-1.5 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-500 to-blue-600 px-3 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-wide text-white shadow-md shadow-blue-500/25 ring-1 ring-sky-300/35 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/35 active:translate-y-0"><span className="absolute inset-0 -translate-x-full bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/25 to-transparent transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:translate-x-full" /><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="relative h-2.5 w-2.5 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:translate-x-0.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M15.75 9V5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0013.5 3h-7.5a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25v13.5A2.25 2.25 0 006 21h7.5a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25V15" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M18 12H9m0 0l3-3m-3 3l3 3" /></svg><span className="relative">Sign In</span></Link></div> : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        </div>
      </nav>

      <main>
        <section className="mx-auto max-w-6xl px-4 pt-10 sm:px-6 md:pt-14">
          <div className="text-center">
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl">Get in Touch</h1>
            <p className="mx-auto mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm text-slate-300">Have questions? We would love to hear from you. Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.</p>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-12 grid grid-cols-1 items-start gap-8 lg:grid-cols-2 lg:items-start lg:gap-10">
            <section className="self-start rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-[#081224] p-6 sm:p-7">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Contact Information</h2>
              <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-slate-400">Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.</p>

              <div className="mt-7 space-y-5 text-sm">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                  <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M3 8l9 6 9-6M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" /></svg>
                  </span>
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-bold text-slate-200">Email</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-400">otpaauthetication@gmail.com</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                  <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M3 5a2 2 0 012-2h3.28a1 1 0 01.95.68l1.5 4.5a1 1 0 01-.45 1.2l-2.1 1.05a11 11 0 005.25 5.25l1.05-2.1a1 1 0 011.2-.45l4.5 1.5a1 1 0 01.68.95V19a2 2 0 01-2 2h-1C9.39 21 3 14.61 3 6V5z" /></svg>
                  </span>
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-bold text-slate-200">Phone</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-400">09095339528</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-400">Monday to Sunday, 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                  <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a2 2 0 01-2.828 0L6.343 16.657a8 8 0 1111.314 0z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z" /></svg>
                  </span>
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-bold text-slate-200">Address</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-400">Nueva Ecija, Philippines</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="mt-8">
                <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-300">Follow Us</p>
                <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-3">
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.facebook} aria-label="Facebook" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-blue-400 hover:text-white">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M13.5 9H16V6h-2.5C10.9 6 9 7.9 9 10.5V12H7v3h2v5h3v-5h2.5l.5-3H12v-1.5c0-.8.7-1.5 1.5-1.5z" /></svg>
                  </a>
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.instagram} aria-label="Instagram" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-pink-400 hover:text-white">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="17" height="17" rx="4.5" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.5" /><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /></svg>
                  </a>
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.gmail} aria-label="Gmail" className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-red-400 hover:text-white">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z" />
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m22 9-8.97 5.98a2 2 0 0 1-2.22 0L2 9" />
                    </svg>
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>
            </section>

            <section className="self-start rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-[#0f1b2f] p-5 shadow-xl shadow-black/25 sm:p-6">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Send us a Message</h2>
              <form className="mt-5 space-y-4" noValidate onSubmit={submitContact}>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
                  <div>
                    <label className={labelClass("firstName", contact, errors, touched)}>First Name</label>
                    <input type="text" value={contact.firstName} onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setContact((current) => ({ ...current, firstName: value })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, firstName: value.trim() ? validateField("firstName", value) : "" })); }} onBlur={(event) => { setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, firstName: true })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, firstName: validateField("firstName", event.target.value) })); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.firstName && touched.firstName)} className={inputClass("firstName", contact, errors)} />
                    {touched.firstName && contact.firstName.trim() ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.firstName))}>{errors.firstName || "First name looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className={labelClass("lastName", contact, errors, touched)}>Last Name</label>
                    <input type="text" value={contact.lastName} onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setContact((current) => ({ ...current, lastName: value })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, lastName: value.trim() ? validateField("lastName", value) : "" })); }} onBlur={(event) => { setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, lastName: true })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, lastName: validateField("lastName", event.target.value) })); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.lastName && touched.lastName)} className={inputClass("lastName", contact, errors)} />
                    {touched.lastName && contact.lastName.trim() ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.lastName))}>{errors.lastName || "Last name looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className={labelClass("email", contact, errors, touched)}>Email</label>
                  <input type="email" value={contact.email} onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setContact((current) => ({ ...current, email: value })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, email: value.trim() ? validateField("email", value) : "" })); }} onBlur={(event) => { setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, email: true })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, email: validateField("email", event.target.value) })); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.email && touched.email)} className={inputClass("email", contact, errors)} />
                  {touched.email && contact.email.trim() ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.email))}>{errors.email || "Email address looks valid."}</p> : null}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className={labelClass("subject", contact, errors, touched)}>Subject</label>
                  <select value={contact.subject} onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setContact((current) => ({ ...current, subject: value })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, subject: value.trim() ? validateField("subject", value) : "" })); }} onBlur={(event) => { setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, subject: true })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, subject: validateField("subject", event.target.value) })); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.subject && touched.subject)} className={inputClass("subject", contact, errors)}>
                    <option value="">Select a topic</option>
                    {CONTACT_TOPICS.map((topic) => <option key={topic} value={topic}>{topic}</option>)}
                  </select>
                  {touched.subject && contact.subject.trim() ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.subject))}>{errors.subject || "Subject looks valid."}</p> : null}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className={labelClass("message", contact, errors, touched)}>Message</label>
                  <textarea rows="4" value={contact.message} onChange={(event) => { const value = event.target.value; setContact((current) => ({ ...current, message: value })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, message: value.trim() ? validateField("message", value) : "" })); }} onBlur={(event) => { setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, message: true })); setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, message: validateField("message", event.target.value) })); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.message && touched.message)} className={inputClass("message", contact, errors)} />
                  {touched.message && contact.message.trim() ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.message))}>{errors.message || "Message looks valid."}</p> : null}
                </div>
                <button
                  type="submit"
                  disabled={sending}
                  className="group relative inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-violet-300/20 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 via-fuchsia-500 to-purple-600 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black tracking-[0.03em] text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-950/35 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-fuchsia-950/45 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-70"
                >
                  <span className="absolute inset-y-0 left-[-30%] w-20 -skew-x-12 bg-white/18 opacity-0 blur-md transition-all duration-500 group-hover:left-[115%] group-hover:opacity-100" />
                  <span className="relative inline-flex items-center gap-2">
                    {sending ? <Loader /> : (
                      <>
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:translate-x-0.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M22 2 11 13" />
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m22 2-7 20-4-9-9-4 20-7Z" />
                        </svg>
                        Send Message
                      </>
                    )}
                  </span>
                </button>
              </form>
            </section>
          </div>
        </section>

        <section className="mt-12 border-t border-slate-800 bg-[#101a2e] py-14">
          <div className="mx-auto max-w-4xl px-4 sm:px-6">
            <div className="text-center">
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-white sm:text-4xl">Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
              <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-400">Can&apos;t find what you&apos;re looking for? Reach out to our support team and we&apos;ll assist you as soon as possible.</p>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-9 space-y-4">
              {FAQ_ITEMS.map((item, index) => {
                const isOpen = openFaq === index;
                return (
                  <div key={item.question} className="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/85">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setOpenFaq((current) => (current === index ? -1 : index))}
                      className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left"
                    >
                      <h3 className="text-base font-black text-white sm:text-lg">{item.question}</h3>
                      <span className={`text-base font-black text-slate-300 transition-transform duration-300 ${isOpen ? "rotate-45" : ""}`}>+</span>
                    </button>
                    <div className={`grid transition-all duration-300 ease-out ${isOpen ? "grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100" : "grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0"}`}>
                      <div className="overflow-hidden border-t border-slate-700">
                        <p className="px-4 py-4 text-sm leading-relaxed text-slate-300 sm:text-base">{item.answer}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        <section id="footer" className="border-t border-slate-700 bg-[#0b1324] py-8 text-slate-200 sm:py-12">
          <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-10 lg:grid-cols-6 lg:gap-10">
              <div className="border-b border-white/10 pb-5 text-center lg:col-span-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:pb-0 sm:text-left">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-center sm:justify-start">
                  <div className="leading-none text-center sm:text-left">
                    <h3 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h3>
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <p className="mx-auto mt-3 max-w-sm text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400 sm:mx-0 sm:mt-4 sm:text-lg">
                  Your Budget Friendly Photographer
                </p>
                <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 sm:mt-5 sm:justify-start">
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.facebook} aria-label="Facebook" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-blue-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M13.5 9H16V6h-2.5C10.9 6 9 7.9 9 10.5V12H7v3h2v5h3v-5h2.5l.5-3H12v-1.5c0-.8.7-1.5 1.5-1.5z" /></svg>
                  </a>
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.instagram} aria-label="Instagram" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-pink-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="17" height="17" rx="4.5" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.5" /><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /></svg>
                  </a>
                  <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.gmail} aria-label="Gmail" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-red-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z" />
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m22 9-8.97 5.98a2 2 0 0 1-2.22 0L2 9" />
                    </svg>
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-5 md:contents md:border-b-0 md:pb-0">
                <div className="border-r border-white/10 pr-3 text-center md:border-r-0 md:pr-0 md:text-left">
                  <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">Quick Links</h4>
                  <ul className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:space-y-2.5 sm:text-base">
                    <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#home")}>Home</button></li>
                    <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#pricing")}>Pricing</button></li>
                    <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#samples")}>Samples</button></li>
                    <li><Link to="/reservation?from=home" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Reservation</Link></li>
                  </ul>
                </div>

                <div className="pl-3 text-center md:pl-0 md:text-left">
                  <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">Legal</h4>
                  <ul className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:space-y-2.5 sm:text-base">
                    <li><Link to="/help-center?from=footer" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Help Center</Link></li>
                    <li><Link to="/privacy-policy" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Privacy Policy</Link></li>
                    <li><Link to="/terms" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Terms of Service</Link></li>
                    <li><Link to="/data-deletion" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Data Deletion</Link></li>
                  </ul>
                </div>
              </div>

              <FooterNewsletterSignup />
            </div>

            <div className="mt-6 border-t border-slate-800 pt-5 text-center text-slate-500 md:text-left sm:mt-10 sm:pt-6">
              <p className="text-sm sm:text-base">&copy; 2026 SnapQueue. All rights reserved.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>
      </main>

      <ChatbotWidget />
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/public/pages/DataDeletionPage.jsx

Source file 76 of 111

import { useEffect } from "react";
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";

function handleClose(navigate, returnTo) {
  if (returnTo) {
    navigate(returnTo, { replace: true });
    return;
  }
  if (window.history.length > 1) {
    navigate(-1);
    return;
  }
  navigate("/", { replace: true });
}

export default function DataDeletionPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const returnTo = typeof location.state?.returnTo === "string" ? location.state.returnTo : "";

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white text-slate-800">
      <main className="mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 sm:py-10">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-200 pb-6">
          <p className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-600">Policy</p>
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="inline-flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border-2 border-black bg-slate-50 text-blue-600">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 11v6" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M14 11v6" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 7l1 13a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h6a2 2 0 0 0 2-2l1-13" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 7V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v3" />
              </svg>
            </div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-3xl">User Data Deletion</h1>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-600 sm:text-base">Last updated: March 10, 2026</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="py-6 sm:py-7">
          <section className="space-y-5 text-sm leading-relaxed sm:text-base">
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">1. How To Request Deletion</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">If you want your SnapQueue account and associated personal data removed, submit a deletion request by email. Send your request to <a href="mailto:otpaauthetication@gmail.com" className="font-semibold text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700">otpaauthetication@gmail.com</a> with the subject line <strong>Data Deletion Request</strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">2. Information Needed For Verification</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">To protect account security, include the email address used for your SnapQueue account and any identifying information needed to confirm ownership, such as your full name, reservation reference, or the sign-in method used. We may ask for additional verification before processing the request.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">3. What May Be Deleted</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Once verified, we may remove or deactivate your account profile, login access, personal profile details, reservation history visibility, uploaded media connected to your account, newsletter subscription status, and other personal data that is no longer required for active service operations.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">4. Records That May Be Retained</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Some records may need to be retained for operational, legal, accounting, fraud prevention, dispute resolution, refund handling, or security reasons. This may include payment logs, refund history, admin audit records, or booking records needed to document completed or cancelled transactions.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">5. Processing Time</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">After successful verification, SnapQueue will review and process deletion requests within a reasonable period. If additional review is required because of active bookings, pending refunds, or unresolved support issues, processing may take longer. We will send a follow-up confirmation once the request has been completed or if any records must be retained.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">6. Before You Request Deletion</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Before requesting deletion, make sure you no longer need access to your reservations, receipts, payment history, refund details, media archive, or support messages. Deleting or deactivating your account may prevent future access to those records from the dashboard.</p>
            </div>
          </section>

          <div className="mt-8 flex justify-end">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleClose(navigate, returnTo)}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border-2 border-black bg-slate-900 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-blue-600"
            >
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
              </svg>
              Close
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
