frontend/src/features/public/pages/GalleryPage.jsx

Source file 77 of 111

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import ChatbotWidget from "../../../shared/components/ChatbotWidget";
import { SectionLoadingPanel } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import { normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl } from "../../../shared/services/runtime";
const CATEGORY_ITEMS = [
  ["all", "All"],
  ["weddings", "Weddings"],
  ["birthdays", "Birthdays"],
  ["events", "Events"],
  ["portraits", "Portraits"]
];

const FALLBACK_ITEMS = [
  { title: "Wedding Vows", category: "weddings", imageUrl: "/images/WEEDING.jpg" },
  { title: "Birthday Bliss", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday.jpg" },
  { title: "Spotlight Entrance", category: "events", imageUrl: "/images/Event1.jpg" },
  { title: "City Session", category: "portraits", imageUrl: "/images/Photoshoot.jpg" },
  { title: "Promise Frame", category: "weddings", imageUrl: "/images/Weeding1.jpg" },
  { title: "Evening Program", category: "events", imageUrl: "/images/Event2.jpg" }
];

export default function GalleryPage() {
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState("all");
  const [items, setItems] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [gridVisible, setGridVisible] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "m-0 flex min-h-screen flex-col bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 [font-family:Poppins,Segoe_UI,Tahoma,Geneva,Verdana,sans-serif]";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadGallery = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      setGridVisible(false);
      try {
        const response = await api.get(`/gallery${activeCategory !== "all" ? `?category=${encodeURIComponent(activeCategory)}` : ""}`);
        const nextItems = Array.isArray(response?.data?.items) && response.data.items.length ? response.data.items : FALLBACK_ITEMS.filter((item) => activeCategory === "all" || item.category === activeCategory);
        setItems(nextItems);
      } catch (_error) {
        setItems(FALLBACK_ITEMS.filter((item) => activeCategory === "all" || item.category === activeCategory));
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => setGridVisible(true));
      }
    };
    loadGallery();
  }, [activeCategory]);

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen flex-col bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 [font-family:Poppins,Segoe_UI,Tahoma,Geneva,Verdana,sans-serif]">
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/90 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-xl">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6">
          <div className="flex h-16 items-center justify-between">
            <Link to="/" className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
              <span className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-md shadow-blue-200">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M4 7a2 2 0 012-2h2l1-1h6l1 1h2a2 2 0 012 2v10a2 2 0 01-2 2H6a2 2 0 01-2-2V7z" />
                  <circle cx="12" cy="13" r="3" strokeWidth="2" />
                </svg>
              </span>
              <div className="leading-none">
                <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
                <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-blue-600">Studio</p>
              </div>
            </Link>
            <Link to="/" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition-all hover:border-blue-200 hover:bg-blue-50 hover:text-blue-700">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2.25" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
                <path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" />
              </svg>
              Home
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <section className="py-10 sm:py-12">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-6xl px-4 text-center sm:px-6">
          <p className="mb-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-700">Portfolio</p>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-4xl">Gallery</h2>
          <p className="mx-auto mt-3 max-w-2xl text-slate-600">Explore our latest shoots and featured highlights.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="overflow-x-auto bg-slate-50 py-4 [scrollbar-width:thin] [scrollbar-color:#cbd5e1_transparent] [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:h-1 [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:bg-transparent [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:bg-slate-300 md:py-6" id="gallery">
        <div className="flex flex-nowrap justify-start gap-2 px-4 md:flex-wrap md:justify-center md:gap-3 md:px-8">
          {CATEGORY_ITEMS.map(([value, label]) => {
            const active = value === activeCategory;
            return (
              <button
                key={value}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setActiveCategory(value)}
                className={`[touch-action:manipulation] whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 active:bg-blue-700 md:px-6 md:py-2.5 md:text-base ${active ? "scale-105 border-blue-500 bg-blue-500 text-white shadow-md shadow-blue-100" : "border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-blue-500 hover:text-blue-600 active:bg-blue-50"}`}
              >
                {label}
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </section>

      <main className="flex-grow py-6 md:py-12">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-8">
          {!loading ? <div className={`grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 transition-all duration-500 ease-out md:grid-cols-3 md:gap-6 lg:grid-cols-4 ${gridVisible ? "translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "translate-y-4 opacity-0"}`} id="gallery-grid">
            {items.map((item, index) => (
              <div key={`${item.title}-${index}`} className="group relative aspect-[4/5] overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-200 shadow-xl ring-1 ring-slate-200 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out" style={{ transitionDelay: `${Math.min(index * 45, 220)}ms` }}>
                <img src={normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl(item.imageUrl)} alt={item.title} loading="lazy" decoding="async" className="h-full w-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110" />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-end bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent pb-4 opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300 group-hover:opacity-100 md:pb-8">
                  <p className="px-2 text-center text-base font-bold text-white md:text-xl">{item.title}</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-300 md:text-sm">{item.category}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div> : <SectionLoadingPanel />}
          {!loading && items.length === 0 ? <p className="py-10 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500">No gallery items available for this category.</p> : null}
        </div>
      </main>

      <section className="bg-slate-900 px-4 py-8 md:py-16">
        <div className="container mx-auto text-center">
          <h2 className="mb-3 text-2xl font-bold text-white md:mb-4 md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl">Love what you see?</h2>
          <p className="mx-auto mb-6 max-w-lg text-sm text-slate-400 md:mb-8 md:text-base">Book your photography session today and let us help you create beautiful, lasting memories.</p>
          <Link to="/reservation?from=home" className="inline-block rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all hover:bg-blue-700 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-500/20 active:bg-blue-800 md:px-8 md:py-4 md:text-base">Book Your Session Now</Link>
        </div>
      </section>

      <footer id="footer" className="border-t border-slate-800 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 to-black py-10 text-slate-200 sm:py-12 md:py-14">
        <div className="mx-auto grid w-full max-w-7xl grid-cols-1 gap-6 px-5 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-8 sm:px-6 md:grid-cols-3 lg:px-8">
          <div>
            <h3 className="mb-3 text-lg font-black text-white sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl">SnapQueue</h3>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 sm:text-base">Professional photography services capturing your most precious moments. Weddings, portraits, events, and more.</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h3 className="mb-3 text-lg font-black text-white sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl">Quick Links</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:space-y-2 sm:text-base">
              <li><Link to="/#home" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Home</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/#about" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">About</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/#samples" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Samples</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/#contact" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Contact</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/reservation?from=home" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Reservation</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/help-center?from=footer" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Help Center</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/privacy-policy" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Privacy Policy</Link></li>
              <li><Link to="/terms" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">Terms of Service</Link></li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h3 className="mb-3 text-lg font-black text-white sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl">Contact</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:space-y-2 sm:text-base">
              <li>Email: <a href="mailto:otpaauthetication@gmail.com" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">otpaauthetication@gmail.com</a></li>
              <li>Phone: <a href="tel:+639095339528" className="transition-colors hover:text-blue-300">+639095339528</a></li>
              <li>Nueva Ecija, Philippines</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mx-auto mt-8 w-full max-w-7xl border-t border-slate-800 px-5 pt-6 text-center text-xs text-slate-500 sm:mt-10 sm:px-6 sm:text-sm md:mt-12 lg:px-8">&copy; 2026 SnapQueue. All rights reserved.</div>
      </footer>

      <ChatbotWidget />
    </div>
  );
}

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import ChatbotWidget from "../../../shared/components/ChatbotWidget";
import FooterNewsletterSignup from "../../../shared/components/FooterNewsletterSignup";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay, Loader, SectionLoadingPanel } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { normalizeBackendAssetUrl, normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl } from "../../../shared/services/runtime";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";

const NAV_ITEMS = [
  ["#home", "Home"],
  ["#samples", "Samples"],
  ["#pricing", "Pricing"],
  ["/contact", "Contact"]
];
const PRICING_PLANS = [
  {
    value: "basic",
    title: "Basic",
    price: "PHP 2,700",
    period: "/package",
    description: "Ideal for small photography sessions with clean edited digital output.",
    cta: "Choose Basic",
    features: ["1 photography session", "Softcopy delivery", "Basic retouching", "Secure gallery access"]
  },
  {
    value: "standard",
    title: "Standard",
    price: "PHP 3,500",
    period: "/package",
    description: "Best for events that need both printed photos and digital copies.",
    cta: "Choose Standard",
    features: ["Everything in Basic", "Softcopy + hardcopy", "Enhanced retouching", "Priority turnaround"]
  },
  {
    value: "premium",
    title: "Premium",
    price: "PHP 4,500",
    period: "/package",
    description: "Complete photography package with video coverage for major events.",
    cta: "Choose Premium",
    features: ["Everything in Standard", "Video highlight", "Advanced editing", "Priority support"]
  },
  {
    value: "custom",
    title: "Custom Package",
    price: "Flexible",
    period: "/quote",
    description: "Build your own photography package based on your event needs and budget.",
    cta: "Choose Custom",
    features: ["Personalized coverage", "Custom deliverables", "Flexible duration", "Admin quote approval"]
  }
];
const SAMPLE_ITEMS = [
  ["Concert2.jpg", "Live Show", "Concert"],
  ["Photoshoot.jpg", "Studio Shot", "Portrait"],
  ["Birthday2.jpg", "Party Time", "Birthday"],
  ["WEEDING.jpg", "Couple Frame", "Wedding"],
  ["Debut.jpg", "Evening Look", "Debut"],
  ["Pageant.jpg", "Stage Walk", "Pagent"]
];
const SAMPLE_LOOP_ITEMS = [...SAMPLE_ITEMS, ...SAMPLE_ITEMS];
const CATEGORY_ITEMS = [
  ["all", "All"],
  ["weddings", "Weddings"],
  ["birthdays", "Birthdays"],
  ["events", "Events"],
  ["debut", "Debut"],
  ["concerts", "Concerts"],
  ["photoshoot", "Photoshoot"],
  ["pageant", "Pageant"],
];
const FALLBACK_GALLERY_ITEMS = [
  { title: "Birthday Mood", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday.jpg" },
  { title: "Party Scene", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday1.jpg" },
  { title: "Happy Moment", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday2.jpg" },
  { title: "Random Shot", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday3.jpg" },
  { title: "Family Shot", category: "birthdays", imageUrl: "/images/Birthday4.jpg" },
  { title: "Main Event", category: "events", imageUrl: "/images/Event1.jpg" },
  { title: "Night Scene", category: "events", imageUrl: "/images/Event2.jpg" },
  { title: "Debut Style", category: "debut", imageUrl: "/images/Debut.jpg" },
  { title: "Soft Glam", category: "debut", imageUrl: "/images/Debut2.jpg" },
  { title: "Evening Pose", category: "debut", imageUrl: "/images/Debut3.jpg" },
  { title: "Classic Look", category: "debut", imageUrl: "/images/Debut4.jpg" },
  { title: "Live Stage", category: "concerts", imageUrl: "/images/Concert.jpg" },
  { title: "Music Scene", category: "concerts", imageUrl: "/images/Concert2.jpg" },
  { title: "Crowd View", category: "concerts", imageUrl: "/images/Concert3.jpg" },
  { title: "Final Set", category: "concerts", imageUrl: "/images/Concert4.jpg" },
  { title: "Outdoor Shot", category: "photoshoot", imageUrl: "/images/Photoshoot.jpg" },
  { title: "Stage Look", category: "pageant", imageUrl: "/images/Pageant.jpg" },
  { title: "Winning Walk", category: "pageant", imageUrl: "/images/Pagent 1.jpg" },
  { title: "Wedding Day", category: "weddings", imageUrl: "/images/WEEDING.jpg" },
  { title: "Couple Shot", category: "weddings", imageUrl: "/images/Weeding1.jpg" },
];
const SOCIAL_LINKS = {
  facebook: String(import.meta.env.VITE_SOCIAL_FACEBOOK_URL || "https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100079708334779").trim(),
  instagram: String(import.meta.env.VITE_SOCIAL_INSTAGRAM_URL || "https://www.instagram.com/petesoriaga/").trim(),
  gmail: "mailto:otpaauthetication@gmail.com"
};

function formatCount(value) {
  return (Number.isFinite(Number(value)) ? Number(value) : 0).toLocaleString("en-US");
}

function ScrollToTopButton({ visible, onClick }) {
  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={onClick}
      aria-label="Scroll to top"
      className={`fixed bottom-28 right-6 z-[115] flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 sm:bottom-32 sm:right-6 ${visible ? "translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "pointer-events-none translate-y-6 opacity-0"}`}
    >
      <span className="group/button relative inline-flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.22),transparent_34%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.94),rgba(30,41,59,0.92)_58%,rgba(37,99,235,0.9))] px-4 py-3 text-white shadow-[0_18px_42px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-sky-300/10 backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:w-44 hover:justify-start hover:rounded-full hover:shadow-[0_24px_54px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)] active:scale-95">
        <svg className="h-5 w-5 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover/button:-translate-y-0.5" viewBox="0 0 384 512" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M214.6 41.4c-12.5-12.5-32.8-12.5-45.3 0l-160 160c-12.5 12.5-12.5 32.8 0 45.3s32.8 12.5 45.3 0L160 141.2V448c0 17.7 14.3 32 32 32s32-14.3 32-32V141.2L329.4 246.6c12.5 12.5 32.8 12.5 45.3 0s12.5-32.8 0-45.3l-160-160z" />
        </svg>
        <span className="pointer-events-none absolute right-5 whitespace-nowrap text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/88 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 group-hover/button:right-6 group-hover/button:opacity-100 group-hover/button:text-white">
          Back to Top
        </span>
      </span>
    </button>
  );
}

export default function IndexPage() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const trackRef = useRef(null);
  const mobileProfileMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const pageScrollDirectionRef = useRef(1);
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileProfileOpen, setMobileProfileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutModalOpen, setLogoutModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutPending, setLogoutPending] = useState(false);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ happyClients: 0, sessionsCompleted: 0, picturesDelivered: 0 });
  const [promo, setPromo] = useState(null);
  const [promoPopupOpen, setPromoPopupOpen] = useState(false);
  const [showScrollTop, setShowScrollTop] = useState(false);
  const [fullGalleryExpanded, setFullGalleryExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [fullGalleryCategory, setFullGalleryCategory] = useState("all");
  const [fullGalleryItems, setFullGalleryItems] = useState([]);
  const [fullGalleryLoading, setFullGalleryLoading] = useState(false);
  const [fullGalleryVisible, setFullGalleryVisible] = useState(false);
  const [popularPackage, setPopularPackage] = useState("");
  const dashboardPath = hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin" : "/dashboard";
  const profilePath = hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin?tab=profile-settings" : "/dashboard?tab=profile";
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(mobileOpen || promoPopupOpen || logoutModalOpen || logoutPending));

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "font-poppins bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 text-slate-100";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.body.style.overflow = mobileOpen ? "hidden" : "";
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = "";
    };
  }, [mobileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onKeyDown = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") {
        setMobileOpen(false);
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
        setLogoutModalOpen(false);
      }
    };
    const onResize = () => {
      if (window.innerWidth >= 768) {
        setMobileOpen(false);
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    window.addEventListener("resize", onResize);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
      window.removeEventListener("resize", onResize);
    };
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mobileProfileOpen) return undefined;
    const onPointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!mobileProfileMenuRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
    document.addEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
      document.removeEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    };
  }, [mobileProfileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!promoPopupOpen) return undefined;
    const previousOverflow = document.body.style.overflow;
    document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
    const onKeyDown = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") setPromoPopupOpen(false);
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = previousOverflow;
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    };
  }, [promoPopupOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const load = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      const requests = token
        ? Promise.allSettled([api.get("/auth/me"), api.get("/system/stats")])
        : Promise.allSettled([Promise.resolve(null), api.get("/system/stats")]);
      const [me, statsResponse] = await requests;
      if (token && me.status === "fulfilled") setUser(me.value?.data?.user || null);
      if (statsResponse.status === "fulfilled") setStats(statsResponse.value?.data?.stats || {});
      for (const path of ["/ads", "/advertisements", "/adverts"]) {
        try {
          const response = await api.get(path);
          const ad = Array.isArray(response?.data?.ads) ? response.data.ads[0] : null;
          if (ad) {
            setPromo({
              title: ad.title || "Announcement",
              description: ad.description || "",
              linkUrl: ad.linkUrl || ad.link || "#",
              imageUrl: ad.imageUrl || ""
            });
            setPromoPopupOpen(true);
          }
          break;
        } catch (error) {
          if (!/route not found/i.test(String(error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || ""))) break;
        }
      }
    };
    load().catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    const loadPopularPackage = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/reservations/popular-package");
        if (!active) return;
        const value = String(response?.data?.package || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        setPopularPackage(["basic", "standard", "premium"].includes(value) ? value : "");
      } catch (_error) {
        if (!active) return;
        setPopularPackage("");
      }
    };
    loadPopularPackage();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const track = trackRef.current;
    if (!track) return undefined;
    let raf = 0;
    let last = 0;
    const speed = 0.1;
    const step = (time) => {
      if (!last) last = time;
      const delta = time - last;
      last = time;
      const halfway = track.scrollWidth / 2;
      if (halfway > 0) {
        const next = track.scrollLeft + delta * speed * pageScrollDirectionRef.current;
        track.scrollLeft = ((next % halfway) + halfway) % halfway;
      }
      raf = window.requestAnimationFrame(step);
    };
    raf = window.requestAnimationFrame(step);
    return () => window.cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onScroll = () => setShowScrollTop(window.scrollY > 320);
    onScroll();
    window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", onScroll);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    let lastY = window.scrollY;
    const onPageScroll = () => {
      const currentY = window.scrollY;
      const delta = currentY - lastY;
      if (Math.abs(delta) > 1) {
        pageScrollDirectionRef.current = delta > 0 ? 1 : -1;
      }
      lastY = currentY;
    };
    window.addEventListener("scroll", onPageScroll, { passive: true });
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", onPageScroll);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const hash = String(location.hash || "").trim();
    if (!hash) return undefined;

    let timeoutId = 0;
    const scrollToSection = () => {
      if (hash === "#home") {
        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
        return;
      }
      const target = document.querySelector(hash);
      if (!target) return;
      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
    };

    timeoutId = window.setTimeout(scrollToSection, 80);
    return () => {
      if (timeoutId) window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    };
  }, [location.hash]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const elements = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-reveal]"));
    if (!elements.length) return undefined;
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
          const node = entry.target;
          node.classList.remove("opacity-0", "translate-y-6");
          node.classList.add("opacity-100", "translate-y-0");
          observer.unobserve(node);
        });
      },
      { threshold: 0.15, rootMargin: "0px 0px -10% 0px" }
    );
    elements.forEach((element) => observer.observe(element));
    return () => observer.disconnect();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!fullGalleryExpanded) return;
    const loadGallery = async () => {
      setFullGalleryLoading(true);
      setFullGalleryVisible(false);
      try {
        const response = await api.get(`/gallery${fullGalleryCategory !== "all" ? `?category=${encodeURIComponent(fullGalleryCategory)}` : ""}`);
        const nextItems = Array.isArray(response?.data?.items) && response.data.items.length
          ? response.data.items
          : FALLBACK_GALLERY_ITEMS.filter((item) => fullGalleryCategory === "all" || item.category === fullGalleryCategory);
        setFullGalleryItems(nextItems);
      } catch (_error) {
        setFullGalleryItems(FALLBACK_GALLERY_ITEMS.filter((item) => fullGalleryCategory === "all" || item.category === fullGalleryCategory));
      } finally {
        setFullGalleryLoading(false);
        window.requestAnimationFrame(() => setFullGalleryVisible(true));
      }
    };
    loadGallery();
  }, [fullGalleryExpanded, fullGalleryCategory]);

  function scrollOrNavigate(target) {
    if (target.startsWith("#")) {
      if (location.pathname !== "/") {
        navigate(`/${target}`);
        return;
      }
      if (target === "#home") {
        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
        return;
      }
      document.querySelector(target)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      return;
    }
    navigate(target);
  }

  function scrollToTop() {
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
  }

  function closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(target) {
    setMobileOpen(false);
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      scrollOrNavigate(target);
    }, 120);
  }

  function handleSignOut() {
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(true);
  }

  async function confirmLogout() {
    setLogoutPending(true);
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setMobileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(false);
    try {
      await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 250));
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
      setUser(null);
      navigate("/login");
    } finally {
      setLogoutPending(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="font-poppins bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 text-slate-100">
      {promo && promoPopupOpen ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[120] bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setPromoPopupOpen(false)}>
          <div className="flex min-h-full items-center justify-center p-3 sm:p-6" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="relative w-full max-w-3xl overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(13,18,30,0.98),rgba(5,10,22,0.96))] shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(2,8,23,0.55)]">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setPromoPopupOpen(false)}
                className="absolute right-4 top-4 z-[1] inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-slate-950/60 text-white transition-colors hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-slate-900"
                aria-label="Close advertisement"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-sm" />
              </button>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-[1.1fr_0.9fr]">
                <div className="relative min-h-[280px] overflow-hidden bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#7f1d1d_0%,#b91c1c_40%,#ef4444_100%)]">
                  {promo.imageUrl ? (
                    <img src={promo.imageUrl} alt={promo.title || "Promo"} className="h-full w-full object-cover opacity-80" />
                  ) : null}
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(127,29,29,0.82),rgba(127,29,29,0.18))]" />
                  <div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 p-6 sm:p-8">
                    <p className="text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-amber-200">Limited Time Offer</p>
                    <h2 className="mt-3 max-w-md text-3xl font-black uppercase leading-none text-white sm:text-4xl">{promo.title}</h2>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-col justify-between p-6 sm:p-8">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-cyan-200/80">Homepage Advertisement</p>
                    <p className="mt-4 text-base leading-relaxed text-slate-200">{promo.description || "Check out the latest announcement featured on SnapQueue."}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-8 grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setPromoPopupOpen(false)}
                      className="inline-flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
                    >
                      Maybe later
                    </button>
                    <a
                      href="/reservation?from=home"
                      onClick={() => setPromoPopupOpen(false)}
                      className="inline-flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#2563eb)] px-4 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white shadow-[0_14px_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.35)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.02] hover:shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(37,99,235,0.42)]"
                    >
                      Book now
                    </a>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
      {logoutPending ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing out" /> : null}
      <div className={`${logoutModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[200] items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4`} onClick={() => !logoutPending && setLogoutModalOpen(false)}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[18rem] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-sm sm:p-6" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
          <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500/15 text-red-300 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16"><i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-2xl" /></div>
          <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Sign Out?</h3>
          <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">Are you sure you want to end your session?</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setLogoutModalOpen(false)} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={confirmLogout} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{logoutPending ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing out</span></> : "Sign Out"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[70] bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300 ${mobileOpen ? "opacity-100" : "hidden opacity-0"}`} onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
        <div className={`absolute left-0 top-0 flex h-dvh w-[84%] max-w-[320px] flex-col overflow-y-auto border-r border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(15,23,42,0.95)_45%,rgba(2,6,23,0.98))] px-4 pb-6 pt-4 shadow-[24px_0_60px_rgba(2,8,23,0.45)] transition-transform duration-300 sm:px-6 sm:pt-6 ${mobileOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full"}`} onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
          <Link to="/" className="mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)]" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}>
            <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-10 w-10 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
            <div className="leading-none text-left">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">SnapQueue</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-sky-300">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </Link>
          <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
            {NAV_ITEMS.map(([href, label]) => href.startsWith("#") ? (
              <button key={label} type="button" className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-left text-[1.05rem] font-bold text-slate-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(href)}>
                <span className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                  <i className={
                    label === "Home" ? "fa-solid fa-house text-[16px]" :
                    label === "Pricing" ? "fa-solid fa-tags text-[16px]" :
                    label === "Samples" ? "fa-solid fa-images text-[16px]" :
                    "fa-solid fa-envelope text-[16px]"
                  } />
                </span>
                <span>{label}</span>
              </button>
            ) : (
              <button key={label} type="button" className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-[1.05rem] font-bold text-slate-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => closeMobileMenuAndNavigate(href)}>
                <span className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-envelope text-[16px]" />
                </span>
                <span>{label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>
          <div className="mt-6 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 sm:mt-8 sm:pt-8">
            <div className="grid gap-3" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <nav className="sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl px-2 pt-2 sm:px-4 sm:pt-2.5 md:px-6 md:pt-3 lg:px-8">
        <div className="rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.82),rgba(30,41,59,0.68))] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(2,8,23,0.34)] backdrop-blur-2xl ring-1 ring-white/10 sm:rounded-[1.65rem] sm:px-4 sm:py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 sm:gap-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-3.5">
              <button type="button" className="rounded-xl p-2 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-800 md:hidden" onClick={() => { setMobileProfileOpen(false); setMobileOpen(true); }}>
                <svg className="h-6 w-6 text-slate-100 sm:h-6 sm:w-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" /></svg>
              </button>
              <Link to="/" className="group flex items-center justify-center px-1 py-1 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 md:mr-0">
                <div className="leading-none text-left"><h1 className="text-[17px] font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1><p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p></div>
              </Link>
            </div>
            <div className="hidden items-center gap-2 md:flex lg:gap-3">
              {NAV_ITEMS.map(([href, label]) => href.startsWith("#") ? <button key={label} type="button" className="rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-300 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white lg:text-sm" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate(href)}>{label}</button> : <Link key={label} to={href} className="rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-300 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white lg:text-sm">{label}</Link>)}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-3.5">
              {!user ? null : null}
              <div ref={mobileProfileMenuRef} className="relative">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  aria-label={user ? "Open profile menu" : "Open account menu"}
                  aria-expanded={mobileProfileOpen}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setMobileOpen(false);
                    setMobileProfileOpen((current) => !current);
                  }}
                  className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                >
                  <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                    {user ? (
                      <SafeAvatar
                        src={user.avatarUrl}
                        fallbackSrc={user.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user.fullName || user.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                        alt="Profile avatar"
                        className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-user text-sm" />
                    )}
                  </span>
                  <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${mobileProfileOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                  </span>
                </button>
                <div className={`absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[125] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 ${mobileProfileOpen ? "pointer-events-auto translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "pointer-events-none -translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}>
                  <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
                  {user ? (
                    <>
                      <Link to={profilePath} className="relative flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.08]" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={user.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={user.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user.fullName || user.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                            alt="Profile avatar"
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                          <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{user.fullName || "SnapQueue User"}</p>
                          <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">{hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "Admin Access" : "Client Access"}</p>
                        </div>
                      </Link>
                      <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                        <Link to={dashboardPath} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-table-columns text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Dashboard</span>
                        </Link>
                        <Link to="/help-center" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-question text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Help Center</span>
                        </Link>
                        <div className="mx-3 my-1 h-px bg-white/10" />
                        <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={handleSignOut}>
                          <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                          </span>
                          <span>Sign Out</span>
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="grid gap-1">
                      <Link to="/login" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-right-to-bracket text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Sign In</span>
                      </Link>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        </div>
      </nav>

      <section id="home" className="relative isolate flex min-h-[calc(100svh-3rem)] items-center overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 py-1 sm:min-h-[calc(100svh-3.5rem)] sm:items-center sm:py-8 md:min-h-[calc(100svh-4rem)] md:py-10 lg:py-12">
        <img src={normalizeBackendAssetUrl("/images/bg.jpg")} alt="" className="absolute inset-0 -z-10 size-full object-cover object-center opacity-[0.07]" />
        <div aria-hidden="true" className="hidden sm:absolute sm:-top-10 sm:right-1/2 sm:-z-10 sm:mr-10 sm:block sm:transform-gpu sm:blur-3xl"><div className="gradient-blob" /></div>
        <div aria-hidden="true" className="absolute -top-52 left-1/2 -z-10 -translate-x-1/2 transform-gpu blur-3xl sm:-top-112 sm:ml-16 sm:translate-x-0"><div className="gradient-blob" /></div>
        <div className="mx-auto -mt-10 flex w-full max-w-7xl flex-col justify-center px-3 sm:mt-0 sm:px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div data-reveal className="mt-0 max-w-2xl pt-0 text-left opacity-0 translate-y-6 transition-all duration-700 ease-out sm:mt-0 sm:pt-0">
            <h2 className="max-w-[12ch] text-[2.85rem] font-black leading-[0.92] tracking-tight text-white sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl">Your Budget Friendly Photographer</h2>
            <p className="mt-5 max-w-xl text-[16px] font-medium leading-7 text-slate-300 sm:mt-6 sm:text-base md:mt-8 md:text-lg lg:text-xl">Let us turn your moments into memories that last forever</p>
            <Link to="/reservation?from=home" className="group relative mt-6 inline-flex h-[3.35rem] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2.5 overflow-hidden rounded-[1.3rem] border border-cyan-200/30 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#071226_0%,#15367b_42%,#2563eb_100%)] px-4.5 text-white shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(8,15,35,0.38),0_0_0_5px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12),0_0_28px_rgba(56,189,248,0.14)] ring-1 ring-white/15 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-cyan-200/55 hover:shadow-[0_20px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.24),0_0_0_7px_rgba(37,99,235,0.16),0_0_36px_rgba(34,211,238,0.18)] active:translate-y-0 active:scale-[0.99] sm:h-[3.55rem] sm:w-auto sm:min-w-[180px] sm:px-6">
              <span className="absolute inset-0 -translate-x-full bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/20 to-transparent transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:translate-x-full" />
              <span className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_20%_20%,rgba(255,255,255,0.22),transparent_30%),radial-gradient(circle_at_80%_50%,rgba(56,189,248,0.28),transparent_36%)] opacity-90" />
              <span className="relative inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/25 bg-white/12 text-white shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.22),0_8px_20px_rgba(2,6,23,0.24)] sm:h-9 sm:w-9">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M8 7V4m8 3V4m-9 8h10m-11 8h12a2 2 0 002-2V8a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                </svg>
              </span>
              <span className="relative text-[0.84rem] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white drop-shadow-[0_4px_18px_rgba(15,23,42,0.35)] sm:text-[0.95rem]">
                BOOK NOW
              </span>
            </Link>
          </div>
          <div data-reveal className="relative left-1/2 right-1/2 mt-2 -ml-[50vw] -mr-[50vw] w-screen px-3 opacity-0 translate-y-6 transition-all duration-700 ease-out sm:static sm:m-0 sm:mt-4 sm:w-full sm:max-w-2xl sm:px-0 md:mt-5 lg:max-w-none">
            <dl className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 sm:mt-6 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-6 md:mt-8 md:gap-8 lg:grid-cols-3">
              <div className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-[1.65rem] border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-5 text-left shadow-xl shadow-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-500 md:hover:-translate-y-1.5 md:hover:scale-[1.02] md:hover:border-blue-400/60 md:hover:shadow-2xl md:hover:shadow-blue-500/20 sm:rounded-2xl sm:p-5">
                <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-cyan-400 transition-all duration-500 group-hover:h-1.5" />
                <div className="block">
                  <dd className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white transition-all duration-500 group-hover:text-cyan-200 sm:text-4xl">{formatCount(stats.happyClients)}</dd>
                  <dt className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 sm:mt-2 sm:text-base">Total Clients</dt>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-[1.65rem] border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-5 text-left shadow-xl shadow-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-500 md:hover:-translate-y-1.5 md:hover:scale-[1.02] md:hover:border-cyan-400/60 md:hover:shadow-2xl md:hover:shadow-cyan-500/20 sm:rounded-2xl sm:p-5">
                <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-500 transition-all duration-500 group-hover:h-1.5" />
                <div className="block">
                  <dd className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white transition-all duration-500 group-hover:text-cyan-200 sm:text-4xl">{formatCount(stats.sessionsCompleted)}</dd>
                  <dt className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 sm:mt-2 sm:text-base">Sessions Completed</dt>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-[1.65rem] border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-5 text-left shadow-xl shadow-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-500 md:hover:-translate-y-1.5 md:hover:scale-[1.02] md:hover:border-indigo-400/60 md:hover:shadow-2xl md:hover:shadow-indigo-500/20 sm:rounded-2xl sm:p-5">
                <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-blue-500 transition-all duration-500 group-hover:h-1.5" />
                <div className="block">
                  <dd className="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white transition-all duration-500 group-hover:text-blue-200 sm:text-4xl">{formatCount(stats.picturesDelivered)}</dd>
                  <dt className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 sm:mt-2 sm:text-base">Pictures Delivered</dt>
                </div>
              </div>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="samples" className="flex w-full flex-col justify-start bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 py-8 pb-20 text-white sm:min-h-screen sm:py-20 md:py-24">
        <div data-reveal className="mx-auto mt-14 w-full max-w-7xl px-2.5 text-center opacity-0 translate-y-6 transition-all duration-700 ease-out sm:mt-0 sm:px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <p className="mb-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-200">Portfolio Highlights</p>
          <h3 className="mb-3 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight sm:mb-4 sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl">Featured Work</h3>
          <p className="mx-auto mb-8 max-w-2xl text-sm text-slate-300 sm:mb-10 sm:text-base">A curated set of our best sessions across events, portraits, and products.</p>
          <div className="relative mx-auto max-w-full rounded-[1.55rem] border border-slate-800/80 bg-slate-900/45 p-2.5 shadow-2xl shadow-black/35 sm:rounded-3xl sm:p-5">
            <div className="pointer-events-none absolute bottom-0 left-0 top-0 z-[5] w-8 rounded-l-3xl bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/95 to-transparent sm:w-20" />
            <div className="pointer-events-none absolute bottom-0 right-0 top-0 z-[5] w-8 rounded-r-3xl bg-gradient-to-l from-slate-900/95 to-transparent sm:w-20" />
            <div ref={trackRef} className="no-scrollbar flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto px-0.5 pb-2 [scrollbar-width:none] [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden sm:gap-5 md:px-2">
              {SAMPLE_LOOP_ITEMS.map(([image, title, category], index) => <div key={`${image}-${index}`} className="group relative aspect-[4/5] w-[46vw] min-w-[140px] max-w-[172px] shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-gray-200 shadow-xl shadow-black/35 transition-all duration-500 md:hover:-translate-y-1 md:hover:shadow-2xl md:hover:shadow-cyan-500/20 sm:w-[46%] sm:min-w-0 sm:max-w-none sm:rounded-2xl lg:w-[29%]"><img src={normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl(`/images/${image}`)} alt={title} loading="lazy" decoding="async" className="h-full w-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110" /><div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent" /><div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 p-2 text-left sm:p-5"><p className="line-clamp-2 text-[9px] font-black tracking-wide text-white sm:text-base">{title}</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-[8px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-cyan-300 sm:mt-1 sm:text-[10px]">{category}</p></div></div>)}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-8 text-center sm:mt-10">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setFullGalleryExpanded((current) => !current)} className="group inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-400/80 bg-slate-800/70 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-extrabold text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 active:translate-y-0 sm:px-7 sm:py-3 sm:text-base">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className={`h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 ${fullGalleryExpanded ? "rotate-90" : "group-hover:translate-x-0.5"}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M13.5 4.5l6 7.5-6 7.5M4.5 12h14" /></svg>
              <span>{fullGalleryExpanded ? "Hide Full Gallery" : "View Full Gallery"}</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className={`w-full overflow-hidden transition-all duration-500 ${fullGalleryExpanded ? "mt-8 max-h-[5000px] opacity-100 sm:mt-10" : "mt-0 max-h-0 opacity-0"}`}>
            <div className="rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/70 p-4 text-left shadow-xl sm:p-6">
              <div className="mb-4 flex flex-col items-start justify-between gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:gap-3">
                <h4 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl">Full Gallery</h4>
                <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400">Category Filter</p>
              </div>
              <div className="no-scrollbar flex snap-x snap-mandatory items-center justify-start gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1 sm:justify-center sm:gap-3">
                {CATEGORY_ITEMS.map(([value, label]) => {
                  const active = value === fullGalleryCategory;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={value}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setFullGalleryCategory(value)}
                      className={`shrink-0 snap-start rounded-full border px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all sm:text-sm ${active ? "border-blue-400 bg-blue-500 text-white shadow-md shadow-blue-500/20" : "border-slate-600 bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:border-blue-400 hover:text-white"}`}
                    >
                      {label}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
              <div className="mt-6">
                {fullGalleryLoading ? (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5 sm:gap-3 md:gap-5 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4">
                    {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, index) => (
                      <div key={`gallery-skeleton-${index}`} className="overflow-hidden rounded-[1.15rem] bg-slate-800/80 ring-1 ring-white/10 sm:rounded-2xl">
                        <div className="aspect-[3/4] animate-pulse bg-[linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(51,65,85,0.9),rgba(71,85,105,0.75),rgba(51,65,85,0.9))] bg-[length:200%_100%]" />
                        <div className="space-y-2 px-3 py-3 sm:px-4 sm:py-4">
                          <div className="h-3 w-3/4 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-slate-700/90" />
                          <div className="h-2.5 w-1/3 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-slate-700/70" />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className={`grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5 transition-all duration-500 ease-out sm:gap-3 md:gap-5 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 ${fullGalleryVisible ? "translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}>
                    {fullGalleryItems.map((item, index) => (
                      <div key={`${item.title || "item"}-${index}`} className="group relative aspect-[3/4] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.15rem] bg-slate-200 shadow-xl ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-transform duration-300 md:hover:-translate-y-1 sm:aspect-[4/5] sm:rounded-2xl">
                        <img src={normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl(item.imageUrl)} alt={item.title || "Gallery item"} loading="lazy" decoding="async" className="h-full w-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110" />
                        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-end bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent pb-3 opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 md:pb-6 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100">
                          <p className="px-2 text-center text-xs font-bold text-white sm:text-base">{item.title || "Untitled"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-300">{item.category || "gallery"}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
                {!fullGalleryLoading && fullGalleryItems.length === 0 ? <p className="py-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300">No gallery items available for this category.</p> : null}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="pricing" className="flex min-h-screen items-center bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 py-10 sm:py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-32">
        <div data-reveal className="mx-auto flex min-h-[calc(100svh-3rem)] max-w-7xl flex-col justify-center px-3 opacity-0 translate-y-6 transition-all duration-700 ease-out sm:min-h-0 sm:px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="mx-auto max-w-3xl text-center">
            <p className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/5 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-slate-200">Pricing</p>
            <h2 className="mt-4 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl">Photography Packages</h2>
            <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-300 sm:text-base">Choose your photography package and continue to reservation with your selected plan applied automatically.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-16 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:mt-10 sm:gap-6 lg:grid-cols-4">
            {PRICING_PLANS.map((item) => {
              const isPopular = item.value === popularPackage;
              return (
              <article key={item.value} className={`group relative overflow-visible rounded-2xl border bg-[#0c111d]/95 p-2.5 shadow-2xl shadow-black/30 ring-1 ring-white/5 transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] md:hover:-translate-y-2 md:hover:scale-[1.06] md:hover:bg-[#10192b] sm:p-5 ${isPopular ? "border-orange-400/70 md:hover:shadow-[0_30px_70px_rgba(249,115,22,0.2)]" : "border-slate-700/80 md:hover:border-sky-400/40 md:hover:shadow-[0_30px_70px_rgba(34,211,238,0.14)]"}`}>
                <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-2xl bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top,rgba(255,255,255,0.06),transparent_60%)] transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:scale-[1.07] group-hover:opacity-100" />
                {isPopular ? (
                  <span className="absolute -top-2.5 right-3 z-20 inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-amber-400 px-2.5 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white ring-4 ring-slate-950 shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/35 sm:-top-3 sm:right-4 sm:px-3 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.18em]">
                    Most Popular
                  </span>
                ) : null}
                <div className="relative transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:scale-[1.02]">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <h3 className="text-[15px] font-black leading-tight text-white transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 sm:text-xl">{item.title}</h3>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 flex flex-col items-start gap-0.5 sm:mt-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:gap-1.5">
                    <p className="text-[1.5rem] font-black leading-none tracking-tight text-white transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 group-hover:text-cyan-200 sm:text-4xl">{item.price}</p>
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 sm:pb-1 sm:text-xs">{item.period}</p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-2 min-h-[48px] text-[11px] leading-4 text-slate-300 transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 sm:mt-3 sm:min-h-[44px] sm:text-sm">{item.description}</p>
                  <Link to={`/reservation?from=home&package=${encodeURIComponent(item.value)}`} className={`mt-3 inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-extrabold transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:scale-[1.01] sm:mt-5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2.5 sm:text-sm ${isPopular ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-amber-500 text-white hover:brightness-110" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/5 text-slate-100 hover:bg-white/10"}`}>
                    {item.cta}
                  </Link>
                  <div className="mt-3 border-t border-white/10 pt-3 sm:mt-5 sm:pt-4">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-500 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.2em]">Features</p>
                    <ul className="mt-2 space-y-2 sm:mt-3 sm:space-y-2.5">
                      {item.features.map((feature) => (
                        <li key={feature} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-[11px] leading-4 text-slate-300 transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.2,1)] group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 sm:gap-2.5 sm:text-sm">
                          <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-emerald-300/40 bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-300 sm:h-4 sm:w-4">
                            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-2 w-2 sm:h-2.5 sm:w-2.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="3">
                              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" />
                            </svg>
                          </span>
                          <span>{feature}</span>
                        </li>
                      ))}
                    </ul>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </article>
            );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section id="footer" data-reveal className="border-t border-slate-700 bg-[#0b1324] py-8 text-slate-200 opacity-0 translate-y-6 transition-all duration-700 ease-out sm:py-12">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-10 lg:grid-cols-6 lg:gap-10">
            <div className="border-b border-white/10 pb-5 text-center lg:col-span-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:pb-0 sm:text-left">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center sm:justify-start">
                <div className="leading-none text-center sm:text-left">
                  <h3 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h3>
                  <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <p className="mx-auto mt-3 max-w-sm text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400 sm:mx-0 sm:mt-4 sm:text-lg">
                Your Budget Friendly Photographer
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 sm:mt-5 sm:justify-start">
                <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.facebook} aria-label="Facebook" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-blue-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M13.5 9H16V6h-2.5C10.9 6 9 7.9 9 10.5V12H7v3h2v5h3v-5h2.5l.5-3H12v-1.5c0-.8.7-1.5 1.5-1.5z" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.instagram} aria-label="Instagram" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-pink-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><rect x="3.5" y="3.5" width="17" height="17" rx="4.5" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.5" /><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /></svg>
                </a>
                <a href={SOCIAL_LINKS.gmail} aria-label="Gmail" className="inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/70 text-slate-300 transition-all hover:border-red-400 hover:text-white sm:rounded-lg">
                  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4.5 w-4.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z" />
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m22 9-8.97 5.98a2 2 0 0 1-2.22 0L2 9" />
                  </svg>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 border-b border-white/10 pb-5 md:contents md:border-b-0 md:pb-0">
              <div className="border-r border-white/10 pr-3 text-center md:border-r-0 md:pr-0 md:text-left">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">Quick Links</h4>
                <ul className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:space-y-2.5 sm:text-base">
                  <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#home")}>Home</button></li>
                  <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#pricing")}>Pricing</button></li>
                  <li><button type="button" className="transition-colors hover:text-white" onClick={() => scrollOrNavigate("#samples")}>Samples</button></li>
                  <li><Link to="/reservation?from=home" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Reservation</Link></li>
                </ul>
              </div>

              <div className="pl-3 text-center md:pl-0 md:text-left">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">Legal</h4>
                <ul className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:space-y-2.5 sm:text-base">
                  <li><Link to="/help-center?from=footer" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Help Center</Link></li>
                  <li><Link to="/privacy-policy" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Privacy Policy</Link></li>
                  <li><Link to="/terms" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Terms of Service</Link></li>
                  <li><Link to="/data-deletion" className="transition-colors hover:text-white">Data Deletion</Link></li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>

            <FooterNewsletterSignup />
          </div>

          <div className="mt-6 border-t border-slate-800 pt-5 text-center text-slate-500 md:text-left sm:mt-10 sm:pt-6">
            <p className="text-sm sm:text-base">&copy; 2026 SnapQueue. All rights reserved.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <ChatbotWidget />
      <ScrollToTopButton visible={showScrollTop} onClick={scrollToTop} />
    </div>
  );
}
