import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay, Loader } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import { getBackendOrigin, normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl } from "../../../shared/services/runtime";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";

const GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID = String(import.meta.env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || "").trim();
const GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY = "pending_google_password_setup";
const sampleImageNames = [
  "Weeding1.jpg",
  "WEEDING.jpg",
  "Pageant.jpg",
  "BINYAG.jpg",
  "Birthday4.jpg",
  "Photoshoot.jpg"
];

function validateEmail(value) {
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase());
}

function passwordChecks(value) {
  const password = String(value || "");
  return [
    { label: "At least 8 characters long", valid: password.length >= 8 },
    { label: "At least one uppercase letter", valid: /[A-Z]/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one lowercase letter", valid: /[a-z]/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one number", valid: /\d/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one special character", valid: /[^A-Za-z\d]/.test(password) }
  ];
}

function isStrongPassword(value) {
  return passwordChecks(value).every((item) => item.valid);
}

function fieldClass(error, isValid) {
  const base = "peer w-full rounded-xl border bg-white px-4 pb-2 pt-5 text-[15px] text-slate-800 outline-none transition placeholder-transparent focus:ring-2";
  if (error) return `${base} field-shake border-red-300 bg-red-50/60 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-200`;
  if (isValid) return `${base} border-emerald-300 bg-emerald-50/60 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-200`;
  return `${base} border-blue-200 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-600/20`;
}

function floatingLabelClass(hasValue) {
  return `pointer-events-none absolute left-4 leading-none bg-transparent px-0 text-slate-500 transition-all duration-200 ${
    hasValue
      ? "top-2.5 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.08em]"
      : "top-[40%] -translate-y-1/2 text-[15px] font-medium peer-focus:top-2.5 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[11px] peer-focus:font-bold peer-focus:uppercase peer-focus:tracking-[0.08em]"
  }`;
}

function helperTextClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-1 hidden text-xs font-semibold peer-focus:block ${hasError ? "text-red-600" : "text-emerald-600"}`;
}

function buildProfileCache(user) {
  return {
    _id: user?._id || "",
    role: user?.role || "user",
    fullName: user?.fullName || "",
    email: user?.email || "",
    phone: user?.phone || "",
    bio: user?.bio || "",
    avatarUrl: String(user?.avatarUrl || "").startsWith("data:image/") ? "" : String(user?.avatarUrl || ""),
    googleAvatarUrl: String(user?.googleAvatarUrl || ""),
    emailNotificationsEnabled: user?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false,
    twoFactorEnabled: user?.twoFactorEnabled === true,
    createdAt: user?.createdAt || ""
  };
}

function resolvePostLoginTarget(user, redirectTarget, reservationTarget) {
  if (redirectTarget && redirectTarget.startsWith("/")) return redirectTarget;
  if (redirectTarget === "reservation") return hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin" : reservationTarget;
  if (redirectTarget === "contact") return "/contact";
  if (redirectTarget === "help-center") return hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin?tab=admin-help" : "/help-center";
  if (redirectTarget === "admin-help-center") return hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin-help-center" : "/help-center";
  return hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin" : "/dashboard";
}

function requiresPasswordSetup(user) {
  return user?.hasPasswordSet === false || (user?.hasPasswordSet == null && Boolean(user?.googleAvatarUrl));
}

function formatCountdown(totalSeconds) {
  const seconds = Math.max(0, Number(totalSeconds || 0));
  const minutesPart = String(Math.floor(seconds / 60)).padStart(2, "0");
  const secondsPart = String(seconds % 60).padStart(2, "0");
  return `${minutesPart}:${secondsPart}`;
}

function buildTwoFactorState(payload, fallbackEmail = "") {
  return {
    mode: String(payload?.mode || "signin"),
    challengeId: String(payload?.challengeId || ""),
    code: "",
    email: String(payload?.email || fallbackEmail),
    delivery: String(payload?.delivery || "email"),
    devCode: String(payload?.devCode || ""),
    resendCooldown: 30,
    expiresInSeconds: Number(payload?.expiresInSeconds || 0)
  };
}

function verificationDeliveryMessage(payload, fallbackEmail) {
  const email = String(payload?.email || fallbackEmail || "your email").trim();
  if (payload?.delivery === "dev") {
    return `Development OTP: ${String(payload?.devCode || "")}`;
  }
  if (payload?.emailDelayed) {
    return `Verification code is still being delivered to ${email}. Please wait a bit, then use Resend code if needed.`;
  }
  return `Verification code sent to ${email}.`;
}

export default function LoginPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const googleButtonRef = useRef(null);
  const search = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
  const backendOrigin = getBackendOrigin();
  const redirectTarget = search.get("redirect");
  const fromSource = search.get("from");
  const resetMode = search.get("mode") === "reset";
  const setupPasswordMode = search.get("mode") === "set-password";
  const reservationTarget = `/reservation${fromSource ? `?from=${encodeURIComponent(fromSource)}` : ""}`;

  const [tab, setTab] = useState(resetMode || setupPasswordMode ? "forgot" : "signin");
  const [resetToken, setResetToken] = useState(String(search.get("token") || "").trim());
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState({ signin: false, signup: false, forgot: false });
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState({ signin: false, signup: false, signupConfirm: false, forgotNew: false, forgotConfirm: false });
  const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0);
  const [signIn, setSignIn] = useState({ email: "", password: "" });
  const [signUp, setSignUp] = useState({ fullName: "", email: "", password: "", confirm: "" });
  const [forgot, setForgot] = useState({ email: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const [touched, setTouched] = useState({});
  const [shakeField, setShakeField] = useState("");
  const [signupPasswordFocused, setSignupPasswordFocused] = useState(false);
  const [forgotPasswordFocused, setForgotPasswordFocused] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactor, setTwoFactor] = useState({ mode: "signin", challengeId: "", code: "", email: "", delivery: "", devCode: "", resendCooldown: 0, expiresInSeconds: 0 });
  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState({ message: "", variant: "" });

  const ignoreFeedback = (payload) => {
    const message = typeof payload === "string" ? payload : String(payload?.message || "").trim();
    const variant = typeof payload === "object" ? String(payload?.variant || "info").trim() : "info";
    setFeedback({ message, variant });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "m-0 relative min-h-screen overflow-x-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 font-poppins";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, [bodyClassRef]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const nextMode = search.get("mode");
    setResetToken(nextMode === "reset" ? String(search.get("token") || "").trim() : "");
    if (nextMode === "reset" || nextMode === "set-password") {
      setTab("forgot");
    }
  }, [location.search]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
    if (!token || resetMode) return;
    Promise.all([api.get("/auth/me"), api.get("/system/status").catch(() => ({ data: {} }))])
      .then(([me, system]) => {
        const user = me?.data?.user;
        const activeMode = system?.data?.system?.activeMode || null;
        if (activeMode && !hasAdminAccess(user?.role)) {
          window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
          window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
          ignoreFeedback({
            message: activeMode === "vacation"
              ? "SnapQueue is currently in vacation mode. Client access is temporarily unavailable."
              : "SnapQueue is currently under maintenance. Client access is temporarily unavailable.",
            variant: "error"
          });
          navigate(`/maintenance?mode=${encodeURIComponent(activeMode)}`, { replace: true });
          return;
        }
        const hasPendingPasswordSetup =
          setupPasswordMode ||
          window.localStorage.getItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY) === "true";
        if (hasPendingPasswordSetup && requiresPasswordSetup(user)) {
          window.localStorage.setItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY, "true");
          setForgot((current) => ({ ...current, email: String(user?.email || current.email || "") }));
          setTab("forgot");
          return;
        }
        window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
        navigate(resolvePostLoginTarget(user, redirectTarget, reservationTarget), { replace: true });
      })
      .catch(() => {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
        window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
      });
  }, [navigate, redirectTarget, reservationTarget, resetMode, setupPasswordMode]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = window.setInterval(() => {
      setCurrentSlide((current) => (current + 1) % sampleImageNames.length);
    }, 3200);
    return () => window.clearInterval(timer);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!twoFactor.resendCooldown) return undefined;
    const timer = window.setInterval(() => {
      setTwoFactor((current) => ({
        ...current,
        resendCooldown: Math.max(0, Number(current.resendCooldown || 0) - 1)
      }));
    }, 1000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(timer);
  }, [twoFactor.resendCooldown]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!twoFactor.expiresInSeconds) return undefined;
    const timer = window.setInterval(() => {
      setTwoFactor((current) => ({
        ...current,
        expiresInSeconds: Math.max(0, Number(current.expiresInSeconds || 0) - 1)
      }));
    }, 1000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(timer);
  }, [twoFactor.expiresInSeconds]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!shakeField) return undefined;
    const timer = window.setTimeout(() => setShakeField(""), 420);
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [shakeField]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!feedback.message) return undefined;
    const timer = window.setTimeout(() => {
      setFeedback((current) => (current.message ? { message: "", variant: "" } : current));
    }, 5000);
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [feedback.message]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (tab !== "signin") return undefined;
    if (!GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID) return undefined;
    const existing = document.querySelector('script[data-google-identity="true"]');
    const initializeGoogle = () => {
      if (!window.google?.accounts?.id || !googleButtonRef.current) return;
      window.google.accounts.id.initialize({
        client_id: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
        callback: async (response) => {
          const credential = String(response?.credential || "").trim();
          if (!credential) {
            ignoreFeedback({ message: "Google sign in failed.", variant: "error" });
            return;
          }
          setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: true }));
          try {
            window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
            window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
            window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
            const result = await api.post("/auth/google", { credential });
            if (result?.data?.requiresTwoFactor) {
              setTwoFactor(buildTwoFactorState(result?.data, ""));
              setTab("verify-2fa");
              ignoreFeedback({
                message: verificationDeliveryMessage(result?.data, ""),
                variant: "success"
              });
              return;
            }
            const user = result?.data?.user || {};
              const token = String(result?.data?.token || "").trim();
              if (!token) {
                throw new Error("Google sign in did not return a session token.");
              }
              await finalizeLogin(user, token, "Sign in successful!");
            } catch (error) {
              ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Google sign in failed.", variant: "error" });
            } finally {
            setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: false }));
          }
        }
      });
      googleButtonRef.current.innerHTML = "";
      window.google.accounts.id.renderButton(googleButtonRef.current, {
        type: "standard",
        theme: "outline",
        size: "large",
        text: "continue_with",
        shape: "pill",
        logo_alignment: "left",
        width: googleButtonRef.current.offsetWidth || 320
      });
    };

    if (existing) {
      if (window.google?.accounts?.id) initializeGoogle();
      return undefined;
    }

    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client";
    script.async = true;
    script.defer = true;
    script.dataset.googleIdentity = "true";
    script.onload = initializeGoogle;
    document.head.appendChild(script);
    return undefined;
  }, [navigate, redirectTarget, reservationTarget, tab]);


  function persistLogin(user, token) {
    window.localStorage.setItem("token", token);
    window.localStorage.setItem("userLoggedIn", "true");
    window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify(buildProfileCache(user)));
  }

  async function finalizeLogin(user, token, successMessage) {
    persistLogin(user, token);
    let resolvedUser = user;
    try {
      const meResponse = await api.get("/auth/me");
      if (meResponse?.data?.user) {
        resolvedUser = meResponse.data.user;
        window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify(buildProfileCache(resolvedUser)));
      }
    } catch (_error) {
      resolvedUser = user;
    }
    if (requiresPasswordSetup(resolvedUser)) {
      window.localStorage.setItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY, "true");
      setForgot((current) => ({
        ...current,
        email: String(resolvedUser?.email || current.email || ""),
        newPassword: "",
        confirmPassword: ""
      }));
      ignoreFeedback({ message: "Google sign in successful. Set your password to continue.", variant: "success" });
      navigate("/login?mode=set-password", { replace: true });
      return;
    }
    window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
    ignoreFeedback({ message: successMessage, variant: "success" });
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      window.location.replace(resolvePostLoginTarget(resolvedUser, redirectTarget, reservationTarget));
    }, 700);
  }

  function signUpErrors(values = signUp) {
    return {
      signupName: values.fullName.trim().length > 1 ? "" : "Full name is required.",
      signupEmail: values.email.trim() ? (validateEmail(values.email) ? "" : "Email format is invalid.") : "Email is required.",
      signupPassword: values.password ? (isStrongPassword(values.password) ? "" : "Password does not meet all requirements.") : "Password is required.",
      signupConfirm: values.confirm ? (values.confirm === values.password ? "" : "Passwords do not match.") : "Please confirm your password."
    };
  }

  function forgotErrors(values = forgot) {
    if (setupPasswordMode || resetToken) {
      return {
        forgotEmail: "",
        forgotNewPassword: values.newPassword ? (isStrongPassword(values.newPassword) ? "" : "Password does not meet all requirements.") : "New password is required.",
        forgotConfirmPassword: values.confirmPassword ? (values.confirmPassword === values.newPassword ? "" : "Passwords do not match.") : "Please confirm your new password."
      };
    }
    return {
      forgotEmail: values.email.trim() ? (validateEmail(values.email) ? "" : "Email format is invalid.") : "Email is required.",
      forgotNewPassword: values.newPassword ? (isStrongPassword(values.newPassword) ? "" : "Password does not meet all requirements.") : "New password is required.",
      forgotConfirmPassword: values.confirmPassword ? (values.confirmPassword === values.newPassword ? "" : "Passwords do not match.") : "Please confirm your new password."
    };
  }

  function markTouched(name) {
    setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: true }));
  }

  function updateSignUpField(name, value) {
    const next = { ...signUp, [name]: value };
    setSignUp(next);
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...signUpErrors(next) }));
  }

  function updateForgotField(name, value) {
    const next = { ...forgot, [name]: value };
    setForgot(next);
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...forgotErrors(next) }));
  }

  async function handleSignIn(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    const normalizedEmail = String(signIn.email || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const normalizedPassword = String(signIn.password || "").replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
    const nextErrors = {
      signinEmail: validateEmail(normalizedEmail) ? "" : "Email format is invalid.",
      signinPassword: normalizedPassword ? "" : "Password is required."
    };
    setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, signinEmail: true, signinPassword: true }));
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...nextErrors }));
    if (nextErrors.signinEmail || !normalizedPassword) {
      setShakeField(nextErrors.signinPassword ? "signinPassword" : "signinEmail");
      ignoreFeedback({ message: "Invalid Email or Password!", variant: "error" });
      return;
    }
    setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: true }));
    try {
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
      window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
      const response = await api.post("/auth/signin", {
        email: normalizedEmail,
        password: normalizedPassword
      });
      if (response?.data?.requiresTwoFactor) {
        setTwoFactor({
          ...buildTwoFactorState({ ...response?.data, mode: "signin" }, normalizedEmail)
        });
        setTab("verify-2fa");
        ignoreFeedback({
          message: verificationDeliveryMessage(response?.data, normalizedEmail),
          variant: "success"
        });
        return;
      }
      const user = response?.data?.user || {};
      await finalizeLogin(user, response?.data?.token, "Sign in successful!");
    } catch (error) {
      setErrors((current) => ({
        ...current,
        signinPassword: error?.response?.status === 401 ? "Wrong password. Please try again." : "Unable to sign in with these credentials."
      }));
      setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, signinPassword: true }));
      setShakeField("signinPassword");
      ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Sign in failed!", variant: "error" });
    } finally {
      setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: false }));
    }
  }

  async function handleVerifyTwoFactor(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    const code = String(twoFactor.code || "").trim();
    if (!/^\d{6}$/.test(code)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: "Enter the 6-digit verification code.", variant: "error" });
      return;
    }
    setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: true }));
    try {
      const endpoint = twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "/auth/signup/verify" : "/auth/signin/verify-2fa";
      const response = await api.post(endpoint, {
        challengeId: twoFactor.challengeId,
        code
      });
      const user = response?.data?.user || {};
      await finalizeLogin(
        user,
        response?.data?.token,
        twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "Account created successfully!" : "Two-factor verification successful!"
      );
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Verification failed.", variant: "error" });
    } finally {
      setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: false }));
    }
  }

  async function handleResendTwoFactor() {
    if (!twoFactor.challengeId) return;
    setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: true }));
    try {
      const endpoint = twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "/auth/signup/resend-otp" : "/auth/signin/resend-2fa";
      const response = await api.post(endpoint, { challengeId: twoFactor.challengeId });
      setTwoFactor((current) => ({
        ...current,
        mode: twoFactor.mode,
        challengeId: String(response?.data?.challengeId || current.challengeId),
        delivery: String(response?.data?.delivery || current.delivery),
        email: String(response?.data?.email || current.email),
        devCode: String(response?.data?.devCode || ""),
        resendCooldown: 30,
        expiresInSeconds: Number(response?.data?.expiresInSeconds || current.expiresInSeconds || 0)
      }));
      ignoreFeedback({
        message: response?.data?.emailDelayed
          ? `Verification code is still being delivered to ${String(response?.data?.email || twoFactor.email || "your email")}. Please wait a bit, then try again if needed.`
          : verificationDeliveryMessage(response?.data, twoFactor.email),
        variant: "success"
      });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Could not resend verification code.", variant: "error" });
    } finally {
      setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signin: false }));
    }
  }

  async function handleSignUp(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    const nextErrors = {
      signupName: signUp.fullName.trim().length > 1 ? "" : "Full name is required.",
      signupEmail: validateEmail(signUp.email) ? "" : "Email format is invalid.",
      signupPassword: isStrongPassword(signUp.password) ? "" : "Password does not meet all requirements.",
      signupConfirm: signUp.password === signUp.confirm && signUp.confirm ? "" : "Passwords do not match."
    };
    setTouched((current) => ({
      ...current,
      signupName: true,
      signupEmail: true,
      signupPassword: true,
      signupConfirm: true
    }));
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...nextErrors }));
    if (Object.values(nextErrors).some(Boolean)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: "Please complete the signup requirements.", variant: "error" });
      return;
    }
    setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signup: true }));
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/auth/signup", {
        fullName: signUp.fullName.trim(),
        email: signUp.email.toLowerCase(),
        password: signUp.password
      });
      if (response?.data?.requiresVerification) {
        setTwoFactor(buildTwoFactorState({ ...response?.data, mode: "signup" }, signUp.email.toLowerCase().trim()));
        setTab("verify-2fa");
        ignoreFeedback({
          message: verificationDeliveryMessage(response?.data, signUp.email.toLowerCase().trim()),
          variant: "success"
        });
        return;
      }
      ignoreFeedback({ message: "Signup succeeded but verification was not started.", variant: "error" });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Sign up failed!", variant: "error" });
    } finally {
      setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, signup: false }));
    }
  }

  async function handleForgotSubmit(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    const nextErrors = !(resetToken || setupPasswordMode)
      ? { forgotEmail: validateEmail(forgot.email) ? "" : "Email format is invalid." }
      : {
          forgotNewPassword: isStrongPassword(forgot.newPassword) ? "" : "Password does not meet all requirements.",
          forgotConfirmPassword: forgot.confirmPassword === forgot.newPassword ? "" : "Passwords do not match."
        };
    setTouched((current) => ({
      ...current,
      forgotEmail: true,
      forgotNewPassword: true,
      forgotConfirmPassword: true
    }));
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...nextErrors }));
    if (Object.values(nextErrors).some(Boolean)) return;

    setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, forgot: true }));
    try {
      if (setupPasswordMode) {
        await api.post("/users/me/password", {
          newPassword: forgot.newPassword,
          confirmPassword: forgot.confirmPassword
        });
        window.localStorage.removeItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY);
        let resolvedUser = null;
        try {
          const meResponse = await api.get("/auth/me");
          if (meResponse?.data?.user) {
            resolvedUser = meResponse.data.user;
            window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify(buildProfileCache(resolvedUser)));
          }
        } catch (_error) {
          resolvedUser = null;
        }
        ignoreFeedback({ message: "Password set successfully. Redirecting...", variant: "success" });
        window.setTimeout(() => {
          window.location.replace(resolvePostLoginTarget(resolvedUser, redirectTarget, reservationTarget));
        }, 700);
      } else if (!resetToken) {
        await api.post("/auth/forgot-password", { email: forgot.email.toLowerCase().trim() });
        ignoreFeedback({ message: "If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.", variant: "success" });
      } else {
        await api.post("/auth/reset-password", { token: resetToken, password: forgot.newPassword });
        setResetToken("");
        setTab("signin");
        navigate("/login", { replace: true });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Reset failed.", variant: "error" });
    } finally {
      setLoading((current) => ({ ...current, forgot: false }));
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative min-h-screen overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950 text-slate-900">
      {loading.signin ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing in" /> : null}
      <style>{`
        input::-ms-reveal,input::-ms-clear{display:none;}
        .auth-password-input::-ms-reveal,.auth-password-input::-ms-clear{display:none;}
        .password-checklist{animation:passwordChecklistIn 180ms ease-out;}
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        @keyframes passwordChecklistIn{
          from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px);}
          to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
        }
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
      `}</style>
      <div className="relative z-10 min-h-screen">
        <div className="grid min-h-screen w-full bg-transparent md:grid-cols-2">
          <section className="relative hidden min-h-screen flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden p-8 text-white md:flex lg:p-10">
            <div className="absolute inset-0">
              {sampleImageNames.map((imageName, index) => {
                const image = normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl(`/images/${encodeURIComponent(imageName).replace(/%2F/g, "/")}`);
                const offset = index - currentSlide;
                return (
                  <div
                    key={image}
                    className="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-700 ease-out"
                    style={{
                      backgroundImage: `linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(33,18,12,0.16), rgba(33,18,12,0.72)), url('${image}')`,
                      backgroundSize: "cover",
                      backgroundPosition: "center",
                      opacity: index === currentSlide ? 1 : 0,
                      transform: `translateX(${offset * 8}%) scale(${index === currentSlide ? 1 : 1.03})`
                    }}
                  />
                );
              })}
            </div>
            <div className="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-40 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/45 to-transparent" />
            <Link to="/" className="relative z-10 flex items-center">
              <div className="leading-none text-left">
                <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
                <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
              </div>
            </Link>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <p className="relative z-10 max-w-[16ch] text-3xl font-semibold leading-tight lg:text-4xl">Your Budget Friendly Photographer</p>
              <div className="relative z-10 text-xs text-white/80">
                <p>&copy; 2026 SnapQueue</p>
              </div>
              <div className="relative z-10 flex gap-2 pt-2">
                {sampleImageNames.map((imageName, index) => (
                  <span key={imageName} className={`h-1.5 rounded-full transition-all ${index === currentSlide ? "w-8 bg-white" : "w-1.5 bg-white/50"}`} />
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <section className="flex min-h-screen flex-col bg-transparent px-4 py-8 sm:px-8 sm:py-10 lg:items-center lg:justify-center lg:px-12 xl:px-16">
            <div className="w-full md:hidden">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => navigate("/")}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/80 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:border-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-800"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-[10px]" />
                <span>Back</span>
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center w-full">
              <div className="w-full max-w-[400px] space-y-6">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-center md:hidden">
                  <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-16 w-16 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-center">
                  <p className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-600 bg-slate-800/90 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-200">Secure Access</p>
                  <h1 className="text-[22px] font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-100">{tab === "signin" ? "Welcome Back to SnapQueue" : tab === "signup" ? "Create account" : tab === "verify-2fa" ? (twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "Verify your email" : "Two-factor verification") : setupPasswordMode ? "Set your password" : "Reset password"}</h1>
                  <p className="mx-auto text-[11px] leading-5 text-slate-300">{tab === "signin" ? <>By proceeding, you agree to our <Link to="/terms" className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200">Terms</Link> and <Link to="/privacy-policy" className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200">Privacy Policy</Link>.</> : tab === "verify-2fa" ? `Enter the code sent to ${twoFactor.email || "your email address"} to ${twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "finish creating your account" : "finish signing in"}.` : setupPasswordMode ? "Your Google account is connected. Create a password here before continuing to your dashboard." : "Access and manage your account securely."}</p>
                </div>
                {feedback.message ? (
                  <div className={`rounded-2xl border px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-semibold ${
                    feedback.variant === "error"
                      ? "border-red-400/50 bg-red-500/10 text-red-100"
                      : feedback.variant === "success"
                        ? "border-emerald-400/50 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100"
                        : "border-slate-500/50 bg-slate-800/80 text-slate-100"
                  }`}>
                    {feedback.message}
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {tab === "signin" && (
                  <form className="space-y-4" noValidate onSubmit={handleSignIn}>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input id="signin-email" type="email" placeholder="Email Address" className={`${fieldClass(errors.signinEmail, touched.signinEmail && !errors.signinEmail && Boolean(signIn.email))} ${shakeField === "signinEmail" ? "field-shake" : ""}`} value={signIn.email} onChange={(event) => {
                      const value = event.target.value;
                      setSignIn((current) => ({ ...current, email: value }));
                      if (errors.signinEmail) {
                        setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, signinEmail: "" }));
                      }
                    }} onBlur={() => markTouched("signinEmail")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signinEmail)} />
                    <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signIn.email))}>Email Address</span>
                    {touched.signinEmail && signIn.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.signinEmail))}>{errors.signinEmail || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="group relative">
                      <input id="signin-password" type={showPassword.signin ? "text" : "password"} placeholder="Password" className={`${fieldClass(errors.signinPassword, touched.signinPassword && !errors.signinPassword && Boolean(signIn.password))} ${shakeField === "signinPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""} pr-11`} value={signIn.password} onChange={(event) => {
                        const value = event.target.value;
                        setSignIn((current) => ({ ...current, password: value }));
                        if (errors.signinPassword) {
                          setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, signinPassword: "" }));
                        }
                      }} onBlur={() => markTouched("signinPassword")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signinPassword)} />
                      <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signIn.password))}>Password</span>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setShowPassword((current) => ({ ...current, signin: !current.signin }))}
                        className="pointer-events-none absolute right-3 top-1/2 inline-flex -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center text-slate-400 opacity-0 transition-all duration-200 hover:text-slate-700 group-focus-within:pointer-events-auto group-focus-within:opacity-100"
                        aria-label={showPassword.signin ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}
                      >
                        <i className={`fa-solid ${showPassword.signin ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    {touched.signinPassword && (signIn.password || errors.signinPassword) ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.signinPassword))}>{errors.signinPassword || "Password looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <button type="submit" disabled={loading.signin} className="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-blue-600 py-2.5 text-xs font-bold text-white disabled:opacity-60">{loading.signin ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing in</span></> : "Login"}</button>
                  <div className="flex justify-center">
                    <button type="button" className="text-xs font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200" onClick={() => setTab("forgot")}>Forgot password?</button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-slate-700" />
                    <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400">or</span>
                    <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-slate-700" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <div ref={googleButtonRef} className={`w-full overflow-hidden rounded-full ${loading.signin ? "pointer-events-none opacity-60" : ""}`} />
                    {!GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID ? <p className="text-center text-[10px] font-semibold text-red-600">Google sign in is not configured.</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-center text-sm text-slate-300">
                    Don&apos;t have an account?{" "}
                    <button type="button" className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200" onClick={() => setTab("signup")}>Create one</button>
                  </p>
                  </form>
                )}

                {tab === "forgot" && (
                  <form className="space-y-4" noValidate onSubmit={handleForgotSubmit}>
                  {!setupPasswordMode ? (
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input id="forgot-email" type="email" placeholder="Email Address" className={fieldClass(errors.forgotEmail, touched.forgotEmail && !errors.forgotEmail && Boolean(forgot.email))} value={forgot.email} onChange={(event) => updateForgotField("email", event.target.value)} onBlur={() => markTouched("forgotEmail")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.forgotEmail)} />
                    <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(forgot.email))}>Email Address</span>
                    {touched.forgotEmail && forgot.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.forgotEmail))}>{errors.forgotEmail || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  ) : null}
                  {resetToken || setupPasswordMode ? (
                    <div>
                      <div className="group relative">
                        <input type={showPassword.forgotNew ? "text" : "password"} placeholder="New Password" className={`${fieldClass(errors.forgotNewPassword, touched.forgotNewPassword && !errors.forgotNewPassword && Boolean(forgot.newPassword))} auth-password-input pr-11`} value={forgot.newPassword} onChange={(event) => updateForgotField("newPassword", event.target.value)} onFocus={() => setForgotPasswordFocused(true)} onBlur={() => { markTouched("forgotNewPassword"); setForgotPasswordFocused(false); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.forgotNewPassword)} />
                        <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(forgot.newPassword))}>New Password</span>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setShowPassword((current) => ({ ...current, forgotNew: !current.forgotNew }))}
                          className="pointer-events-none absolute right-3 top-1/2 inline-flex -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center text-slate-400 opacity-0 transition-all duration-200 hover:text-slate-700 group-focus-within:pointer-events-auto group-focus-within:opacity-100"
                          aria-label={showPassword.forgotNew ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}
                        >
                          <i className={`fa-solid ${showPassword.forgotNew ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      <div className={`mt-2 overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-[#f3f4f6] transition-all duration-300 ease-out origin-top ${forgotPasswordFocused && forgot.newPassword ? "password-checklist max-h-40 translate-y-0 px-2.5 py-2 opacity-100" : "max-h-0 -translate-y-2 px-2.5 py-0 opacity-0"}`}>
                        {passwordChecks(forgot.newPassword).map((item) => (
                          <div key={item.label} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] leading-5 transition-all duration-200 ${item.valid ? "translate-x-0 text-emerald-500" : "text-slate-400"}`}>
                            <span className={`inline-flex w-4 justify-center text-[10px] font-bold transition-all duration-200 ${item.valid ? "scale-110" : "scale-100"}`}>{item.valid ? "OK" : "X"}</span>
                            <span>{item.label}</span>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                      {touched.forgotNewPassword && (forgot.newPassword || errors.forgotNewPassword) ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.forgotNewPassword))}>{errors.forgotNewPassword || "Password looks valid."}</p> : null}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  {resetToken || setupPasswordMode ? (
                    <div>
                      <div className="group relative">
                        <input type={showPassword.forgotConfirm ? "text" : "password"} placeholder="Confirm Password" className={`${fieldClass(errors.forgotConfirmPassword, touched.forgotConfirmPassword && !errors.forgotConfirmPassword && Boolean(forgot.confirmPassword))} pr-11`} value={forgot.confirmPassword} onChange={(event) => updateForgotField("confirmPassword", event.target.value)} onBlur={() => markTouched("forgotConfirmPassword")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.forgotConfirmPassword)} />
                        <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(forgot.confirmPassword))}>Confirm Password</span>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setShowPassword((current) => ({ ...current, forgotConfirm: !current.forgotConfirm }))}
                          className="pointer-events-none absolute right-3 top-1/2 inline-flex -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center text-slate-400 opacity-0 transition-all duration-200 hover:text-slate-700 group-focus-within:pointer-events-auto group-focus-within:opacity-100"
                          aria-label={showPassword.forgotConfirm ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}
                        >
                          <i className={`fa-solid ${showPassword.forgotConfirm ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {touched.forgotConfirmPassword && (forgot.confirmPassword || errors.forgotConfirmPassword) ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.forgotConfirmPassword))}>{errors.forgotConfirmPassword || "Passwords match."}</p> : null}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  <button type="submit" disabled={loading.forgot} className="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-600 py-2.5 text-xs font-bold text-white disabled:opacity-60">{loading.forgot ? <Loader /> : (setupPasswordMode ? "Set password" : resetToken ? "Reset password" : "Send reset link")}</button>
                  {!setupPasswordMode ? (
                  <p className="text-center text-[11px] text-slate-300">
                    Remembered your password?{" "}
                    <button type="button" className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200" onClick={() => setTab("signin")}>Back to login</button>
                  </p>
                  ) : null}
                  </form>
                )}

                {tab === "verify-2fa" && (
                  <form className="space-y-4" noValidate onSubmit={handleVerifyTwoFactor}>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      inputMode="numeric"
                      maxLength={6}
                      placeholder="Verification Code"
                      className={fieldClass("", /^\d{6}$/.test(twoFactor.code))}
                      value={twoFactor.code}
                      onChange={(event) => setTwoFactor((current) => ({ ...current, code: event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 6) }))}
                    />
                    <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(twoFactor.code))}>Verification Code</span>
                    {twoFactor.delivery === "dev" && twoFactor.devCode ? <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300">Dev code: {twoFactor.devCode}</p> : null}
                    <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-300">
                      {twoFactor.expiresInSeconds > 0 ? `Code expires in ${formatCountdown(twoFactor.expiresInSeconds)}` : "Code expired. Request a new one."}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="submit" disabled={loading.signin} className="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-600 py-2.5 text-xs font-bold text-white disabled:opacity-60">{loading.signin ? <Loader /> : (twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "Verify and Create Account" : "Verify and Login")}</button>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 text-[11px]">
                    <button type="button" disabled={loading.signin || twoFactor.resendCooldown > 0} className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-slate-500" onClick={handleResendTwoFactor}>
                      {twoFactor.resendCooldown > 0 ? `Resend in ${twoFactor.resendCooldown}s` : "Resend code"}
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" className="font-bold text-slate-300 hover:text-slate-100" onClick={() => { setTab(twoFactor.mode === "signup" ? "signup" : "signin"); setTwoFactor({ mode: "signin", challengeId: "", code: "", email: "", delivery: "", devCode: "", resendCooldown: 0, expiresInSeconds: 0 }); }}>Back</button>
                  </div>
                  </form>
                )}

                {tab === "signup" && (
                  <form className="space-y-4" noValidate onSubmit={handleSignUp}>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input type="text" placeholder="Full Name" className={fieldClass(errors.signupName, touched.signupName && !errors.signupName && Boolean(signUp.fullName))} value={signUp.fullName} onChange={(event) => updateSignUpField("fullName", event.target.value)} onBlur={() => markTouched("signupName")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signupName)} />
                    <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signUp.fullName))}>Full Name</span>
                    {touched.signupName && signUp.fullName ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.signupName))}>{errors.signupName || "Full name looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input type="email" placeholder="Email Address" className={fieldClass(errors.signupEmail, touched.signupEmail && !errors.signupEmail && Boolean(signUp.email))} value={signUp.email} onChange={(event) => updateSignUpField("email", event.target.value)} onBlur={() => markTouched("signupEmail")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signupEmail)} />
                    <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signUp.email))}>Email Address</span>
                    {touched.signupEmail && signUp.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.signupEmail))}>{errors.signupEmail || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="group relative">
                      <input type={showPassword.signup ? "text" : "password"} placeholder="Password" className={`${fieldClass(errors.signupPassword, touched.signupPassword && !errors.signupPassword && Boolean(signUp.password))} auth-password-input pr-11`} value={signUp.password} onChange={(event) => updateSignUpField("password", event.target.value)} onFocus={() => setSignupPasswordFocused(true)} onBlur={() => { markTouched("signupPassword"); setSignupPasswordFocused(false); }} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signupPassword)} />
                      <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signUp.password))}>Password</span>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setShowPassword((current) => ({ ...current, signup: !current.signup }))}
                        className="pointer-events-none absolute right-3 top-1/2 inline-flex -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center text-slate-400 opacity-0 transition-all duration-200 hover:text-slate-700 group-focus-within:pointer-events-auto group-focus-within:opacity-100"
                        aria-label={showPassword.signup ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}
                      >
                        <i className={`fa-solid ${showPassword.signup ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    <div className={`mt-2 overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-[#f3f4f6] transition-all duration-300 ease-out origin-top ${signupPasswordFocused && signUp.password ? "password-checklist max-h-40 translate-y-0 px-2.5 py-2 opacity-100" : "max-h-0 -translate-y-2 px-2.5 py-0 opacity-0"}`}>
                      {passwordChecks(signUp.password).map((item) => (
                        <div key={item.label} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] leading-5 transition-all duration-200 ${item.valid ? "translate-x-0 text-emerald-500" : "text-slate-400"}`}>
                          <span className={`inline-flex w-4 justify-center text-[10px] font-bold transition-all duration-200 ${item.valid ? "scale-110" : "scale-100"}`}>{item.valid ? "OK" : "X"}</span>
                          <span>{item.label}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="group relative">
                      <input type={showPassword.signupConfirm ? "text" : "password"} placeholder="Confirm Password" className={`${fieldClass(errors.signupConfirm, touched.signupConfirm && !errors.signupConfirm && Boolean(signUp.confirm))} pr-11`} value={signUp.confirm} onChange={(event) => updateSignUpField("confirm", event.target.value)} onBlur={() => markTouched("signupConfirm")} aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.signupConfirm)} />
                      <span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(signUp.confirm))}>Confirm Password</span>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setShowPassword((current) => ({ ...current, signupConfirm: !current.signupConfirm }))}
                        className="pointer-events-none absolute right-3 top-1/2 inline-flex -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center text-slate-400 opacity-0 transition-all duration-200 hover:text-slate-700 group-focus-within:pointer-events-auto group-focus-within:opacity-100"
                        aria-label={showPassword.signupConfirm ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}
                      >
                        <i className={`fa-solid ${showPassword.signupConfirm ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    {touched.signupConfirm && signUp.confirm ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.signupConfirm))}>{errors.signupConfirm || "Passwords match."}</p> : null}
                  </div>
                  <button type="submit" disabled={loading.signup} className="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-600 py-2.5 text-xs font-bold text-white disabled:opacity-60">{loading.signup ? <Loader /> : "Create account"}</button>
                  <p className="text-center text-[11px] text-slate-300">
                    Already have an account?{" "}
                    <button type="button" className="font-bold text-sky-300 hover:text-sky-200" onClick={() => setTab("signin")}>Sign in</button>
                  </p>
                  </form>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
            <Link to="/" className="mt-auto flex items-center justify-center pt-8 md:hidden">
              <div className="leading-none text-center">
                <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
                <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
              </div>
            </Link>
          </section>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/public/pages/MaintenancePage.jsx

Source file 80 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";

const MODE_COPY = {
  maintenance: {
    label: "Maintenance Mode",
    title: "We'll Be Back Soon",
    message: "SnapQueue is temporarily unavailable for scheduled maintenance. The website cannot be accessed by users right now. Please try again later."
  },
  vacation: {
    label: "Vacation Mode",
    title: "We Are Currently on Vacation",
    message: "Our services are temporarily paused. The website cannot be accessed by users right now. We will be back soon."
  },
  default: {
    label: "Service Notice",
    title: "Website Temporarily Unavailable",
    message: "This website cannot be accessed by users right now. Please try again later."
  }
};

function Icon({ path, className = "h-5 w-5" }) {
  return (
    <svg className={className} fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      {path}
    </svg>
  );
}

export default function MaintenancePage() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const queryMode = useMemo(() => String(new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("mode") || "").trim().toLowerCase(), [location.search]);
  const [mode, setMode] = useState(queryMode || "default");
  const [message, setMessage] = useState(MODE_COPY[queryMode] || MODE_COPY.default);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "m-0 min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-white";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const initialMode = MODE_COPY[queryMode] ? queryMode : "default";
    setMode(initialMode);
    setMessage(MODE_COPY[initialMode] || MODE_COPY.default);
  }, [queryMode]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadStatus = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/system/status");
        const system = response?.data?.system || {};
        const activeMode = String(system.activeMode || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        if (MODE_COPY[activeMode]) {
          setMode(activeMode);
          setMessage({
            ...MODE_COPY[activeMode],
            message: String(system.activeMessage || "").trim() || MODE_COPY[activeMode].message
          });
        }
      } catch (_error) {
        // Keep fallback query-parameter content visible even if the API call fails.
      }
    };
    loadStatus();
  }, []);

  const activeCopy = MODE_COPY[mode] || MODE_COPY.default;

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-slate-950 px-4 py-8 text-white sm:px-6">
      <main className="w-full max-w-3xl px-6 py-8 sm:px-10">
        <div>
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-blue-300/25 bg-blue-400/10 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-blue-100">
            <Icon className="h-4 w-4" path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 8v4" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 16h.01" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 001.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 001.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 00-3.42 0z" /></>} />
            {activeCopy.label}
          </div>
          <h1 className="mt-4 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl">{activeCopy.title}</h1>
          <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed text-slate-300 sm:text-base">{message.message}</p>
          <p className="mt-3 inline-flex max-w-fit items-center rounded-full border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-400/10 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-100">
            Website access for users is temporarily disabled
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="py-8 sm:py-10">
          <p className="mx-auto max-w-2xl text-center text-sm leading-relaxed text-slate-300 sm:text-base">
            The site is temporarily closed to visitors. Please return after the current {mode === "vacation" ? "vacation period" : "maintenance work"} has ended.
          </p>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/public/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.jsx

Source file 82 of 111

import { useEffect } from "react";
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";

function handleClose(navigate, returnTo) {
  if (returnTo) {
    navigate(returnTo, { replace: true });
    return;
  }
  if (window.history.length > 1) {
    navigate(-1);
    return;
  }
  navigate("/", { replace: true });
}

export default function PrivacyPolicyPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const returnTo = typeof location.state?.returnTo === "string" ? location.state.returnTo : "";

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white text-slate-800">
      <main className="mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 sm:py-10">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-200 pb-6">
          <p className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-600">Policy</p>
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="inline-flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border-2 border-black bg-slate-50 text-blue-600">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 3 4 7v6c0 5 3.4 7.74 8 9 4.6-1.26 8-4 8-9V7l-8-4Z" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.5 12.5 11 14l3.5-4" />
              </svg>
            </div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-3xl">Privacy Policy</h1>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-600 sm:text-base">Last updated: March 10, 2026</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="py-6 sm:py-7">
          <section className="space-y-5 text-sm leading-relaxed sm:text-base">
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">1. Information We Collect</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">SnapQueue collects the information you submit when creating an account, making a reservation, uploading payment proof, requesting a refund, joining the newsletter, or contacting support. This may include your full name, email address, mobile number, profile photo, reservation details, event location, package selections, payment references, payout details for refunds, and messages sent through the platform.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">2. Account And Login Data</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">When you sign up or sign in, we process account credentials, OTP verification data, and basic profile details needed to secure access to your account. If you use connected sign-in providers such as Google, we only use the profile data made available through those services, such as your name, email address, and profile picture.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">3. Reservation And Booking Records</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Reservation information is used to review availability, validate your request, communicate about your booking, manage scheduling, and track the progress of your package through approval, payment, production, and delivery. Admin users may review the full details you submit in order to approve, reject, reschedule, or complete your booking.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">4. Payments, Refunds, And Proof Uploads</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">When you upload proof of payment or submit refund details, SnapQueue processes the files, reference numbers, payment method, and payout information required for verification and refund handling. These records are used only for operational, accounting, fraud prevention, dispute handling, and reservation review purposes. Refund proof and payment proof may be viewed by authorized administrators inside the system.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">5. Messages, Notifications, And Newsletters</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">SnapQueue stores messages sent through live chat or support threads so that the studio and client can continue conversations and resolve booking issues. We also generate in-app notifications related to reservations, payments, refunds, and delivery updates. If you subscribe to newsletters, your email address may be used to send announcements, updates, or service notices until you unsubscribe.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">6. How We Use Your Information</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">We use collected information to operate the reservation system, verify account ownership, process bookings, review payments, manage refunds, upload and deliver media, respond to support concerns, send service notifications, improve platform reliability, and protect the system from abuse, fraud, or unauthorized use.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">7. Sharing And Access</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">We do not sell your personal information. Your data is only accessible to authorized administrators, staff, and technical services that support the operation of SnapQueue when such access is necessary to provide the service, secure the platform, or comply with legal obligations.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">8. Your Choices And Contact</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">You may request updates to inaccurate account information, submit account deletion requests where applicable, and unsubscribe from newsletters through the unsubscribe link in email updates. For privacy concerns, data questions, or account-related requests, contact SnapQueue at <a href="mailto:otpaauthetication@gmail.com" className="font-semibold text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700">otpaauthetication@gmail.com</a>.</p>
            </div>
          </section>

          <div className="mt-8 flex justify-end">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleClose(navigate, returnTo)}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border-2 border-black bg-slate-900 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-blue-600"
            >
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
              </svg>
              Close
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/features/public/pages/TermsPage.jsx

Source file 83 of 111

import { useEffect } from "react";
import { useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";

function handleClose(navigate, returnTo) {
  if (returnTo) {
    navigate(returnTo, { replace: true });
    return;
  }
  if (window.history.length > 1) {
    navigate(-1);
    return;
  }
  navigate("/", { replace: true });
}

export default function TermsPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const returnTo = typeof location.state?.returnTo === "string" ? location.state.returnTo : "";

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white text-slate-800">
      <main className="mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 sm:py-10">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-200 pb-6">
          <p className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-600">Policy</p>
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="inline-flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border-2 border-black bg-slate-50 text-blue-600">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M14 3H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M14 3v5h5" />
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m9 15 2 2 4-4" />
              </svg>
            </div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-3xl">Terms and Conditions</h1>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-600 sm:text-base">Last updated: February 20, 2026</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="py-6 sm:py-7">
          <section className="space-y-5 text-sm leading-relaxed sm:text-base">
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">1. Booking Information</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">When you submit a reservation, you confirm that the name, email address, mobile number, event date, venue details, and package information you provide are accurate and complete. SnapQueue may contact you to verify or clarify booking details before approval.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">2. Reservation Approval</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Submitting a reservation request does not automatically guarantee a booking slot. Reservations remain pending until reviewed and approved by the studio or administrator. Schedule conflicts, incomplete details, unavailable dates, or policy issues may result in a reservation being declined or returned for revision.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">3. Payments And Pricing</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Displayed package prices are subject to confirmation, especially for custom packages, add-ons, overtime coverage, travel requirements, or special requests. Payment instructions shown in the system must be followed exactly. A booking may remain unconfirmed until payment is verified by the administrator.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">4. Cancellations, Rescheduling, And Refunds</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Requests to cancel, reschedule, or refund are reviewed based on booking status, payment status, the amount of notice given, and operational availability. Approval of a refund or schedule change is not automatic. The final decision depends on the studio's review and applicable policy handling for that reservation.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">5. User Responsibilities</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">You agree not to upload false, unlawful, abusive, or misleading information, payment proofs, or files. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all actions performed through your account unless unauthorized access is reported promptly.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">6. Service Delivery</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">Estimated processing times, gallery uploads, proofs, edits, and final outputs may vary depending on workload, approval timelines, client responses, and production requirements. SnapQueue will make reasonable efforts to deliver services within communicated timelines, but exact delivery dates may change when circumstances require adjustments.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">7. Platform Use</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">SnapQueue may suspend, restrict, or remove access to accounts that violate policy, misuse the platform, submit fraudulent activity, or interfere with normal operations. We may also update these terms when business, legal, or system requirements change.</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-black text-slate-900">8. Acceptance</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-slate-700">By continuing to use the reservation system, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and conditions.</p>
            </div>
          </section>

          <div className="mt-8 flex justify-end">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handleClose(navigate, returnTo)}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border-2 border-black bg-slate-900 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-blue-600"
            >
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
              </svg>
              Close
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
84 Frontend User

frontend/src/features/user/helpContent.js

Source file 84 of 111

export const HELP_FAQ_ITEMS = [
  {
    question: "How do I get started with SnapQueue?",
    answer: "Start by creating an account and logging in. From there, submit a reservation with your event details, preferred package, and schedule. Once approved by admin, your booking appears in your dashboard where you can monitor status updates, payment progress, and delivery milestones."
  },
  {
    question: "What payment methods do you accept?",
    answer: "Available payment options are shown on your approved reservation payment page. You can upload proof of payment and wait for admin verification. If a payment is rejected or needs correction, the dashboard will show the reason so you can quickly resubmit."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I cancel my reservation anytime?",
    answer: "Cancellation is possible depending on your reservation status. If your booking is still pending, cancellation is usually straightforward. For approved or in-progress bookings, cancellation may require admin review and may be subject to policy terms. Use your dashboard or contact support for help."
  },
  {
    question: "Do you offer refunds?",
    answer: "Refund requests are handled case-by-case based on booking stage, payment verification, and policy eligibility. If your reservation qualifies, submit a refund request from your dashboard with complete details. Admin will review and update the result, including any payout information, in your account."
  },
  {
    question: "Why is my reservation still pending?",
    answer: "A reservation remains pending until admin reviews your schedule, package, and submitted details. It may take longer if your booking date conflicts with another reservation, if custom pricing needs review, or if important information is missing."
  },
  {
    question: "What happens if my payment proof is rejected?",
    answer: "If your payment proof is rejected, the payment section in your dashboard will show the status and you can submit a corrected proof again. Check your reference number, screenshot clarity, and payment method before resubmitting."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I know when my photos are ready?",
    answer: "Once your booking reaches the delivery stage, your project status and notifications will update in the dashboard. When media is uploaded by admin, you can open the Media Archive tab and download the delivered files."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I update my booking details after submitting?",
    answer: "Changes depend on the current booking stage. If your reservation is still pending or under review, contact admin support right away through live chat so they can confirm what can still be edited."
  }
];

export const HELP_FAQ_LINKS = [
  "How to log in",
  "Reset password",
  "This phone number is already registered",
  "Lost or stolen passwords",
  "How to create an account",
  "Suspended account",
  "Verify signup with OTP",
  "How reservation approval works",
  "Upload proof of payment",
  "What to do when payment proof is rejected",
  "Request a refund",
  "Submit payout details for refund",
  "Track project status",
  "Download delivered files",
  "Print receipts from the dashboard",
  "Manage notifications",
  "Chat with admin support"
];

      "Mark notifications as read to clear their unread state.",
      "Delete notifications you no longer need to keep in the panel."

    readTime: "2 min read",
    steps: [

      "Select the admin support thread or start the support conversation.",
      "Explain the issue clearly and include your reservation or payment reference if available.",
      "Wait for admin to reply and continue the thread until the issue is resolved."
    ],
    tip: "Support replies are faster when you include the affected reservation code and a short description of the problem."
  }
];

export const HELP_CATEGORY_CARDS = [
  {
    title: "Account",
    description: "Manage your profile, login information, and account settings.",
    icon: "user"
  },
  {
    title: "Using SnapQueue",
    description: "Discover how to use reservations, payments, messages, and delivery tracking.",
    icon: "zap"
  },
  {
    title: "Bookings",
    description: "Create, update, and follow your reservations, approvals, and schedules.",
    icon: "calendar"
  }
];

export function buildAllHelpArticles() {
  return [
    ...HELP_GUIDE_ARTICLES.map((item) => ({ ...item, type: "guide" })),
    ...HELP_FAQ_ITEMS.map((item, index) => ({
      type: "faq",
      title: item.question,
      description: item.answer,
      faqIndex: index,
      topLevel: index < 2 ? "Payments" : "Bookings",
      section: index < 2 ? "Payments and billing" : "Reservations and changes",
      category: "FAQ",
      readTime: "1 min read",
      steps: [item.answer],
      tip: "If this answer does not fully solve your issue, use Chat Admin for a more specific review."
    }))
  ];
}

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import JSZip from "jszip";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay, Loader, PageLoadingScreen } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import ChatHeader from "../../admin/components/chat/ChatHeader";
import ChatSidebar from "../../admin/components/chat/ChatSidebar";
import MessageList from "../../admin/components/chat/MessageList";
import ChatComposer from "../../admin/components/chat/ChatComposer";
import { getAvatarFallback, getDisplayName, isThreadOnline } from "../../admin/components/chat/utils";
import {
  isValidPhilippineMobileNumber,
  PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE,
  sanitizePhoneInput
} from "../../../shared/utils/phone";
import {
  HELP_CATEGORY_CARDS,
  HELP_FAQ_ITEMS,
  HELP_FAQ_LINKS,
  buildAllHelpArticles
} from "../helpContent";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";
import { downloadReceiptPdfFromHtml, isMobileReceiptViewport } from "../../../shared/utils/receiptPdf";

const TABS = [
  { id: "reservations", label: "Reservations", icon: "calendar" },
  { id: "payments", label: "Payments", icon: "wallet" },
  { id: "progress", label: "Progress", icon: "trend-up" },
  { id: "messages", label: "Messages", icon: "comments" },
  { id: "photos", label: "Media Archive", icon: "folder-open" },
  { id: "history", label: "Booking History", icon: "history" },
  { id: "settings", label: "Settings", icon: "settings" },
  { id: "profile", label: "Profile", icon: "user" }
];
const USER_TAB_IDS = new Set([...TABS.map((tab) => tab.id), "help"]);
const USER_TAB_STORAGE_KEY = "snapqueue_user_active_tab";
const GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY = "pending_google_password_setup";

function getInitialUserTab(search) {
  const rawSearch = search || (typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.search : "");
  const params = new URLSearchParams(rawSearch || "");
  const requestedTab = String(params.get("tab") || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (requestedTab && USER_TAB_IDS.has(requestedTab)) return requestedTab;
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    const storedTab = window.sessionStorage.getItem(USER_TAB_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (storedTab && USER_TAB_IDS.has(storedTab)) return storedTab;
  }
  return "reservations";
}
const SIDEBAR_TABS = TABS.filter((tab) => !["messages", "settings", "profile"].includes(tab.id));
const DESKTOP_PRIMARY_TABS = SIDEBAR_TABS;

const SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS = {
  reservations: "Search bookings...",
  progress: "Search project status...",
  messages: "Search conversations...",
  history: "Search booking history...",
  photos: "Search media archive...",
  payments: "Search payments...",
  profile: "Search profile...",
  settings: "Search settings...",
  help: "Search help..."
};

const HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS = [
  { id: "all", label: "All" },
  { id: "completed", label: "Completed" },
  { id: "cancelled", label: "Cancelled" },
  { id: "rejected", label: "Rejected" },
  { id: "with-payment", label: "With Payment" },
  { id: "no-payment", label: "No Payment" }
];

const DOWNLOAD_QUALITY_OPTIONS = [
  { id: "original", label: "Original Quality" },
  { id: "high", label: "High Quality" },
  { id: "web", label: "Web Optimized" }
];

const DOWNLOAD_FORMAT_OPTIONS = [
  { id: "zip", label: "ZIP Archive" },
  { id: "folder", label: "Folder Copy" },
  { id: "single", label: "Single Files" }
];

const USER_AI_THREAD_ID = "ai-assistant";
const USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID = "admin-support";
const USER_MESSAGE_SEEN_STORAGE_PREFIX = "sq_user_seen_threads_";

function cx(...parts) {
  return parts.filter(Boolean).join(" ");
}

function normalizeComparablePasswordPart(value) {
  return String(value || "").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");
}

function getPasswordPersonalFragments({ fullName, email } = {}) {
  const fragments = new Set();
  const add = (value) => {
    const normalized = normalizeComparablePasswordPart(value);
    if (normalized.length >= 3) fragments.add(normalized);
  };

  String(fullName || "")
    .trim()
