    .split(/\s+/)
    .map((part) => normalizeComparablePasswordPart(part))
    .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
    .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));

  const [localPart = ""] = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase().split("@");
  localPart
    .split(/[._%+-]+/)
    .map((part) => normalizeComparablePasswordPart(part))
    .filter((part) => part.length >= 3)
    .forEach((part) => fragments.add(part));

  add(fullName);
  add(localPart);
  return Array.from(fragments);
}

function passwordChecks(value, context = {}) {
  const password = String(value || "");
  return [
    { label: "At least 8 characters", valid: password.length >= 8 },
    { label: "At least one lowercase letter", valid: /[a-z]/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one number", valid: /\d/.test(password) },
    { label: "At least one special character", valid: /[^A-Za-z\d]/.test(password) },
    { label: "No spaces", valid: !/\s/.test(password) }
  ];
}

function isStrongPassword(value, context = {}) {
  return passwordChecks(value, context).every((item) => item.valid);
}

function printHtmlDocument(html, onError) {
  if (!html) {
    onError?.();
    return;
  }
  const frame = document.createElement("iframe");
  frame.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  frame.style.position = "fixed";
  frame.style.right = "0";
  frame.style.bottom = "0";
  frame.style.width = "0";
  frame.style.height = "0";
  frame.style.border = "0";
  frame.style.opacity = "0";
  frame.style.pointerEvents = "none";
  document.body.appendChild(frame);
  const cleanup = () => window.setTimeout(() => frame.remove(), 1000);
  try {
    frame.onload = () => {
      try {
        frame.contentWindow?.focus();
        frame.contentWindow?.print();
      } catch (_error) {
        onError?.();
      } finally {
        cleanup();
      }
    };
    frame.srcdoc = html;
  } catch (_error) {
    cleanup();
    onError?.();
  }
}

const EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE = {
  step: "credentials",
  challengeId: "",
  code: "",
  delivery: "",
  email: "",
  expiresInSeconds: 0,
  devCode: "",
  error: "",
  sending: false,
  verifying: false
};

function BellIcon({ className = "w-4 h-4 sm:w-5 sm:h-5" }) {
  return (
    <svg className={className} fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 17h5l-1.4-1.4A2 2 0 0118 14.2V11a6 6 0 10-12 0v3.2a2 2 0 01-.6 1.4L4 17h5" />
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.5 17a2.5 2.5 0 005 0" />
    </svg>
  );
}

function buildPersonaAvatarDataUrl({ label, start, end, accent = "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" }) {
  const svg = `
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="g" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${start}" />
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${end}" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect width="96" height="96" rx="48" fill="url(#g)" />
      <circle cx="74" cy="24" r="15" fill="${accent}" />
      <circle cx="24" cy="78" r="18" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" />
      <text x="48" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="#ffffff">${label}</text>
    </svg>
  `;
  return `data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,${encodeURIComponent(svg)}`;
}

function buildGeminiAvatarDataUrl() {
  const svg = `
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="bg" x1="12%" y1="8%" x2="88%" y2="92%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#081226" />
          <stop offset="48%" stop-color="#1d4ed8" />
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c3aed" />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="gem" x1="18%" y1="18%" x2="82%" y2="82%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7dd3fc" />
          <stop offset="42%" stop-color="#c4b5fd" />
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect width="96" height="96" rx="48" fill="url(#bg)" />
      <circle cx="72" cy="22" r="12" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)" />
      <circle cx="25" cy="74" r="16" fill="rgba(125,211,252,0.12)" />
      <path d="M48 18c3.4 13.9 5.9 16.7 9.1 19.9C60.3 41.1 63 43.6 78 48c-15 4.4-17.7 6.9-20.9 10.1C53.9 61.3 51.4 64.1 48 78c-3.4-13.9-5.9-16.7-9.1-19.9C35.7 54.9 33 52.4 18 48c15-4.4 17.7-6.9 20.9-10.1C42.1 34.7 44.6 31.9 48 18Z" fill="url(#gem)" />
    </svg>
  `;
  return `data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,${encodeURIComponent(svg)}`;
}

const AI_ASSISTANT_PROFILE = {
  fullName: "AI Assistant",
  email: "ai@snapqueue.local",
  avatarUrl: buildGeminiAvatarDataUrl()
};

const ADMIN_SUPPORT_PROFILE = {
  fullName: "Admin Support",
  email: "support@snapqueue.local",
  avatarUrl: buildPersonaAvatarDataUrl({
    label: "\u260E",
    start: "#0f172a",
    end: "#1e40af",
    accent: "rgba(125,211,252,0.2)"
  })
};

function validatedInputClass(error, valid) {
  const base = "peer w-full rounded-lg border bg-slate-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-all focus:outline-none";
  if (error) return `${base} field-shake border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-slate-700 focus:border-red-500`;
  if (valid) return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-50 text-slate-700 focus:border-emerald-500`;
  return `${base} border-slate-200 text-slate-700 focus:border-[#2D60FF]`;
}

function helperTextClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-1 hidden text-xs font-semibold peer-focus:block ${hasError ? "text-red-600" : "text-emerald-600"}`;
}

function readStoredAiMessages(userId) {
  if (!userId) return [];
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(`snapqueue_ai_messages_${userId}`);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw || "[]");
    return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  } catch (_error) {
    return [];
  }
}

function writeStoredAiMessages(userId, messages) {
  if (!userId) return;
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(`snapqueue_ai_messages_${userId}`, JSON.stringify(Array.isArray(messages) ? messages : []));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Ignore localStorage write failures.
  }
}

function getUserMessageSeenStorageKey(user) {
  return `${USER_MESSAGE_SEEN_STORAGE_PREFIX}${String(user?._id || user?.id || user?.sub || user?.email || "guest").trim().toLowerCase()}`;
}

function loadStoredThreadSeenMap(storageKey) {
  if (!storageKey || typeof window === "undefined") return {};
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
    const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
    return parsed && typeof parsed === "object" && !Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : {};
  } catch (_error) {
    return {};
  }
}

function saveStoredThreadSeenMap(storageKey, value) {
  if (!storageKey || typeof window === "undefined") return;
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(value && typeof value === "object" ? value : {}));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Ignore localStorage write failures.
  }
}

function validThreadTimestamp(value) {
  const time = new Date(value || "").getTime();
  return Number.isFinite(time) ? time : 0;
}

function threadUnreadFallback(thread, seenMap) {
  if (!thread || String(thread?.threadType || "").toLowerCase() === "ai") return 0;
  const backendUnread = Number(thread?.unreadCount || 0);
  const threadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
  if (!threadId) return 0;
  const latestActivity = validThreadTimestamp(thread?.lastMessageAt || thread?.updatedAt || thread?.createdAt);
  const seenAt = validThreadTimestamp(seenMap?.[threadId]);
  if (backendUnread > 0) {
    return latestActivity > seenAt ? backendUnread : 0;
  }
  return latestActivity > seenAt ? 1 : 0;
}

function Icon({ name, className = "w-5 h-5" }) {
  const props = { className, fill: "none", stroke: "currentColor", strokeWidth: "2", viewBox: "0 0 24 24" };
  switch (name) {
    case "calendar":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M3 10h18M5 5h14a2 2 0 012 2v12a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V7a2 2 0 012-2z" /></svg>;
    case "tag":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M20.59 13.41L11 3.83A2 2 0 009.59 3H4a1 1 0 00-1 1v5.59a2 2 0 00.59 1.41L13.17 20.59a2 2 0 002.83 0l4.59-4.59a2 2 0 000-2.83z" /><circle cx="7.5" cy="7.5" r="1.25" /></svg>;
    case "activity":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2" /></svg>;
    case "trend-up":
      return <i className={`fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-up text-[16px] leading-none ${className}`} aria-hidden="true" />;
    case "comments":
      return <i className={`fa-solid fa-comments ${className}`} aria-hidden="true" />;
    case "history":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 3v5h5" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.05 13A9 9 0 1012 3v0" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 7v5l3 3" /></svg>;
    case "image":
      return <svg {...props}><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2" /><circle cx="8.5" cy="10.5" r="1.5" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 15l-5-5L5 21" /></svg>;
    case "wallet":
      return (
        <svg {...props}>
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7.5A2.5 2.5 0 016.5 5H18a2 2 0 010 4H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 004 11.5v5A2.5 2.5 0 006.5 19H18a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6.5" />
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M16.5 13.5h.01" />
        </svg>
      );
    case "house":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 10.5L12 3l9 7.5" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 9.75V21h13.5V9.75" /></svg>;
    case "settings":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 15.5A3.5 3.5 0 1012 8.5a3.5 3.5 0 000 7z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 00.33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 01-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 0015 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 00-1 .6 1.65 1.65 0 00-.33 1V21a2 2 0 01-4 0v-.09a1.65 1.65 0 00-.33-1 1.65 1.65 0 00-1-.6 1.65 1.65 0 00-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 01-2.83-2.83l.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 004.6 15a1.65 1.65 0 00-.6-1 1.65 1.65 0 00-1-.33H3a2 2 0 010-4h.09a1.65 1.65 0 001-.33 1.65 1.65 0 00.6-1 1.65 1.65 0 00-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 112.83-2.83l.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 009 4.6a1.65 1.65 0 001-.6 1.65 1.65 0 00.33-1V3a2 2 0 014 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 00.33 1 1.65 1.65 0 001 .6 1.65 1.65 0 001.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 112.83 2.83l-.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0019.4 9c.24.31.36.69.33 1.08V10a2 2 0 010 4h-.09c-.39-.03-.77.09-1.08.33A1.65 1.65 0 0019.4 15z" /></svg>;
    case "life-buoy":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8.5" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.25" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 3.5v5.25M12 15.25v5.25M20.5 12h-5.25M8.75 12H3.5" /></svg>;
    case "menu":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" /></svg>;
    case "x":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 6l12 12M18 6L6 18" /></svg>;
    case "camera":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7a2 2 0 012-2h2l1-1h6l1 1h2a2 2 0 012 2v10a2 2 0 01-2 2H6a2 2 0 01-2-2V7z" /><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="3" /></svg>;
    case "shield-check":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4" /></svg>;
    case "log-out":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h4" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M16 17l5-5-5-5" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 12H9" /></svg>;
    case "bell":
      return <BellIcon className={className} />;
    case "search":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35" /></svg>;
    case "info":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 10v6" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 7h.01" /></svg>;
    case "mail":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m22 9-8.97 5.98a2 2 0 0 1-2.22 0L2 9" /></svg>;
    case "user":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 12a4 4 0 100-8 4 4 0 000 8z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 21a8 8 0 0116 0" /></svg>;
    case "plus":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" /></svg>;
    case "check":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5" /></svg>;
    case "zap":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13 2L3 14h7l-1 8 10-12h-7l1-8z" /></svg>;
    case "download":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 3v12" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M7 10l5 5 5-5" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5 21h14" /></svg>;
    case "folder-open":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 7a2 2 0 012-2h4l2 2h8a2 2 0 012 2v1H3V7z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 10h18l-2 8a2 2 0 01-2 1H6a2 2 0 01-2-1l-1-8z" /></svg>;
    case "chevron-right":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 18l6-6-6-6" /></svg>;
    case "receipt-text":
      return (
        <svg {...props}>
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 3v3M16 3v3M4 8h16" />
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 5h12a2 2 0 012 2v11a1 1 0 01-1.53.85L16 17.5l-2.47 1.35a1 1 0 01-.96 0L10 17.5l-2.57 1.35A1 1 0 016 18V7a2 2 0 012-2z" />
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 12h4M10 15h4" />
        </svg>
      );
    case "trash-2":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 6h18" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 6V4h8v2" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6" /></svg>;
    case "lock":
      return <svg {...props}><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="10" rx="2" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 118 0v3" /></svg>;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

function formatDate(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "Pending";
  return date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric",
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit"
  });
}

function formatDateLabel(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "Pending";
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "long", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" });
}

function formatNotificationAge(value) {
  if (!value) return "";
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
  const diff = Date.now() - date.getTime();
  const minute = 60 * 1000;
  const hour = 60 * minute;
  const day = 24 * hour;
  if (diff < hour) return `${Math.max(1, Math.floor(diff / minute || 1))}m`;
  if (diff < day) return `${Math.max(1, Math.floor(diff / hour))}h`;
  if (diff < 7 * day) return `${Math.max(1, Math.floor(diff / day))}d`;
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function getNotificationSectionLabel(items) {
  if (!items.length) return "This month";
  const latestDate = new Date(items[0]?.createdAt || 0);
  if (Number.isNaN(latestDate.getTime())) return "This month";
  const now = new Date();
  if (latestDate.getMonth() === now.getMonth() && latestDate.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear()) return "This month";
  return latestDate.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "long", year: "numeric" });
}

function readFileAsDataUrl(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ""));
    reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to read uploaded image."));
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

function formatCurrency(amount, currency = "PHP") {
  const value = Number(amount || 0);
  if (!Number.isFinite(value) || value <= 0) return "-";
  return `${currency} ${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
}

function getStatusClasses(status) {
  const normalized = String(status || "pending").toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === "approved") return "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200";
  if (normalized === "rejected") return "bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";
  if (normalized === "completed") return "bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200";
  return "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200";
}

function buildAddress(reservation) {
  return [
    reservation?.street,
    reservation?.barangay,
    reservation?.city,
    reservation?.province
  ].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "-";
}

function getReservationPriceLabel(reservation) {
  return formatCurrency(
    reservation?.finalPrice || reservation?.packagePrice || reservation?.basePrice,
    reservation?.currency || "PHP"
  );
}

function getDisplayReservationId(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "Pending").trim() || "Pending";
}

function getReservationRouteId(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "").trim();
}

function detailValue(value, fallback = "-") {
  const text = String(value ?? "").trim();
  return text || fallback;
}

function getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment = null) {
  const stage = String(reservation?.workflowStage || "").toLowerCase();
  if (stage === "approved" && !reservation?.workflowStageUpdatedAt) {
    const reservationUpdatedAt = new Date(reservation?.updatedAt || 0).getTime();
    const paymentPaidAt = new Date(payment?.paidAt || payment?.updatedAt || payment?.createdAt || 0).getTime();
    const stageWasConfirmedAfterPayment =
      Number.isFinite(reservationUpdatedAt) &&
      Number.isFinite(paymentPaidAt) &&
      reservationUpdatedAt > paymentPaidAt + 1000;
    if (stageWasConfirmedAfterPayment) {
      return "approved";
    }
    return "awaiting_approval";
  }
  return stage;
}

function getWorkflowStageLabel(reservation, payment = null) {
  const stage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
  if ((stage === "awaiting_approval" || !stage) && (["paid", "verified"].includes(paymentStatus) || reservationStatus === "approved")) {
    return "Reservation Approved";
  }
  if (stage === "approved") return "Photographer On The Way";
  if (stage === "shoot_completed") return "Photoshoot Completed";
  if (stage === "editing") return "Editing";
  if (stage === "ready_for_download") return "Ready for Download";
  return "Awaiting Approval";
}

function getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation) {
  const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase();
  const reservationPaymentStatus = String(reservation?.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase();

  if (paymentStatus === "refunded" || reservationPaymentStatus === "refunded") return "refunded";
  if (paymentStatus === "verified") return "verified";
  if (reservationPaymentStatus === "paid" && ["", "paid", "pending", "processing", "needs_review"].includes(paymentStatus)) {
    return "verified";
  }
  if (paymentStatus) return paymentStatus;
  if (reservationPaymentStatus === "paid") return "verified";
  return reservationPaymentStatus;
}

function getPaymentDocumentStatus(payment, reservation) {
  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
  if (paymentStatus === "verified") return "VERIFIED";
  if (paymentStatus === "needs_review") return "NEEDS REVIEW";
  if (paymentStatus === "rejected") return "REJECTED";
  if (paymentStatus === "cancelled") return "CANCELLED";
  if (paymentStatus === "expired") return "EXPIRED";
  if (paymentStatus === "refunded") return "REFUNDED";
  if (String(payment?.refundStatus || "").toLowerCase() === "awaiting_payout_details") return "AWAITING PAYOUT DETAILS";
  if (paymentStatus === "processing") return "PROCESSING";
  if (paymentStatus === "pending") return "PENDING";
  return "PENDING";
}

function getPaymentDocumentNote(payment, reservation) {
  const status = getPaymentDocumentStatus(payment, reservation);
  if (status === "VERIFIED") return "Payment has been verified by admin.";
  if (status === "NEEDS REVIEW") return "Payment passed submission checks and is queued for manual admin review.";
  if (status === "REJECTED") return payment?.failureReason || "Payment was rejected by admin.";
  if (status === "CANCELLED") return payment?.failureReason || "Payment was cancelled.";
  if (status === "EXPIRED") return payment?.failureReason || "Payment has expired.";
  if (status === "REFUNDED") return "Payment was refunded.";
  if (status === "AWAITING PAYOUT DETAILS") return "Submit your GCash or Maya payout details so the admin can process your refund within 3-7 business days.";
  if (status === "PROCESSING") return "Payment is under admin review.";
  return "Payment submitted successfully. Please wait for admin confirmation or verification.";
}

function getRefundUnavailableReason(payment, reservation) {
  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
  const workflowStage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
  if (["rejected", "failed", "expired", "cancelled"].includes(paymentStatus)) {
    return "Refund not available because this payment was rejected or failed, so no accepted payment is on record.";
  }
  if (workflowStage === "ready_for_download" || ["completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus)) {
    return "Refund is no longer available because this booking is already done or ready for download.";
  }
  return "";
}

function canUserEditReservation(reservation, payment = null) {
  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
  return reservationStatus === "pending" && !["paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus);
}

function getRefundDocumentStatus(payment) {
  const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "").toLowerCase();
  if (refundStatus === "processed") return "REFUNDED";
  if (refundStatus && refundStatus !== "none") return refundStatus.toUpperCase();
  return String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded" ? "REFUNDED" : "PENDING";
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
    .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
    .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
    .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
    .replaceAll("'", "&#39;");
}

function getProgressState(reservation, payment = null) {
  const normalized = String(reservation?.status || "pending").toLowerCase();
  const stage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
  let activeSteps = 0;
  let lineScale = 0;
  let label = "Pending Approval";
  const isReservationApproved =
    normalized === "approved" ||
    paymentStatus === "paid" ||
    paymentStatus === "verified";
  if (isReservationApproved) {
    activeSteps = 1;
    lineScale = 0.2;
    label = "Reservation Approved";
  }
  if (stage === "approved") {
    activeSteps = 2;
    lineScale = 0.4;
    label = "Photographer On The Way";
  }
  if (stage === "shoot_completed") {
    activeSteps = 3;
    lineScale = 0.6;
    label = "Photoshoot Completed";
  }
  if (stage === "editing") {
    activeSteps = 4;
    lineScale = 0.8;
    label = "Editing in Progress";
  }
  if (stage === "ready_for_download" || normalized === "completed") {
    activeSteps = 5;
    lineScale = 1;
    label = "Ready for Download";
  }
  if (normalized === "rejected") {
    activeSteps = 0;
    lineScale = 0;
    label = "Rejected";
  }
  return { activeSteps, lineScale, label };
}

function isCustomPackageReservation(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase() === "custom";
}

function getEventLabel(reservation) {
  const eventType = String(reservation?.eventType || "").trim();
  if (eventType.toLowerCase() === "other" && String(reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "").trim()) {
    return `Other - ${reservation.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim()}`;
  }
  return eventType || "Event";
}

function normalizeFolder(folder, index) {
  return {
    key: folder?._id || folder?.name || folder?.folderName || `folder-${index}`,
    name: folder?.name || folder?.folderName || `Folder ${index + 1}`,
    photos: Array.isArray(folder?.photos) ? folder.photos : Array.isArray(folder?.files) ? folder.files : []
  };
}

function normalizePhoto(photo, index) {
  if (typeof photo === "string") {
    return {
      url: photo,
      name: `media-${index + 1}.jpg`,
      resourceType: "image",
      publicId: "",
      assetId: ""
    };
  }
  const fallbackName = `media-${index + 1}.${photo?.resourceType === "video" ? "mp4" : "jpg"}`;
  return {
    url: photo?.url || photo?.secureUrl || "",
    name: photo?.name || photo?.fileName || fallbackName,
    resourceType: String(photo?.resourceType || "").toLowerCase() || "image",
    format: String(photo?.format || "").toLowerCase(),
    publicId: String(photo?.publicId || ""),
    assetId: String(photo?.assetId || "")
  };
}

function buildDownloadUrl(url, quality, photo) {
  const source = String(url || "");
  if (!source) return source;
  const isCloudinary = source.includes("/upload/");
  if (isCloudinary) {
    const qualityTransform = String(quality || "original") === "original"
      ? ""
      : quality === "high"
        ? "q_auto:good,f_auto"
        : "q_auto:eco,f_auto";
    const transform = [qualityTransform].filter(Boolean).join(",");
    if (!transform) return source;
    return source.replace("/upload/", `/upload/${transform}/`);
  }
  if (String(quality || "original") === "original") return source;
  return source;
}

function buildPreferredDownloadName(folderName, photo, format, position) {
  const baseName = String(photo?.name || `media-${position + 1}`).trim() || `media-${position + 1}`;
  return baseName;
}

function buildArchiveZipName(folderName) {
  return `${String(folderName || "SnapQueue").replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|]/g, "-") || "SnapQueue"}_Archive.zip`;
}

function getSafeArchiveFolderName(folderName) {
  return String(folderName || "SnapQueue").replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|]/g, "-") || "SnapQueue";
}

function isVideoMedia(photo) {
  if (String(photo?.resourceType || "").toLowerCase() === "video") return true;
  return /\.(mp4|mov|webm|avi|mkv|m4v|mpeg|mpg|wmv|3gp)$/i.test(String(photo?.name || photo?.url || ""));
}

function getTimeGreeting() {
  const hour = new Date().getHours();
  if (hour < 12) return "Good morning";
  if (hour < 18) return "Good afternoon";
  return "Good evening";
}

function getUserStorageIdentity(user) {
  const candidates = [
    user?._id,
    user?.id,
    user?.sub,
    typeof user?.email === "string" ? user.email.trim().toLowerCase() : ""
  ].map((value) => String(value || "").trim()).filter(Boolean);
  return candidates[0] || "guest";
}

function getUserStorageKeyCandidates(prefix, user) {
  const identities = new Set([
    getUserStorageIdentity(user),
    String(user?._id || "").trim(),
    String(user?.id || "").trim(),
    String(user?.sub || "").trim(),
    typeof user?.email === "string" ? user.email.trim() : "",
    typeof user?.email === "string" ? user.email.trim().toLowerCase() : ""
  ].filter(Boolean));
  return Array.from(identities).map((identity) => `${prefix}${identity}`);
}

function getUserNotifStorageKey(user) {
  return getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_notifications_", user)[0];
}

function getUserReadNotifStorageKey(user) {
  return getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_read_notifications_", user)[0];
}

function getUserDismissedNotifStorageKey(user) {
  return getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_dismissed_notifications_", user)[0];
}

function getUserSettingsStorageKey(user) {
  const id = getUserStorageIdentity(user);
  return `sq_user_settings_${id}`;
}

function pruneLegacyStorageKeys(storageKeys) {
  const keys = Array.isArray(storageKeys) ? storageKeys.filter(Boolean) : [storageKeys].filter(Boolean);
  if (!keys.length) return;
  const [canonicalKey, ...legacyKeys] = keys;
  legacyKeys.forEach((storageKey) => {
    if (storageKey && storageKey !== canonicalKey) {
      window.localStorage.removeItem(storageKey);
    }
  });
}

const DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS = {
  contactMethod: "email",
  downloadQuality: "original",
  downloadFormat: "zip",
  watermarkDownloads: false,
  hidePhoneOnSharedLinks: true,
  hideEmailOnSharedLinks: true,
  twoFactorEnabled: false,
  gallerySharingPermission: "private",
  lastExportRequestedAt: "",
  endedOtherSessionsAt: ""
};

function loadStoredUserSettings(user) {
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(getUserSettingsStorageKey(user));
    const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
    return {
      ...DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS,
      ...(parsed && typeof parsed === "object" ? parsed : {})
    };
  } catch (_error) {
    return { ...DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS };
  }
}

function saveStoredUserSettings(user, settings) {
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(getUserSettingsStorageKey(user), JSON.stringify({
      ...DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS,
      ...(settings && typeof settings === "object" ? settings : {})
    }));
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep settings usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

const CARD_ELEVATED = "bg-white/92 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur-[6px]";
const TAB_CONTENT = "hidden";
const TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE = "block";
const SIDEBAR_ACTIVE = "bg-white/12 text-white shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(2,8,23,0.24)]";

function loadStoredNotifications(user) {
  try {
    const byKey = new Map();
    const storageKeys = getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_notifications_", user);
    storageKeys.forEach((storageKey) => {
      const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
      const items = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      if (!Array.isArray(items)) return;
      items
        .filter((item) => item && typeof item === "object")
      .map((item) => ({
        key: String(item.key || ""),
        message: String(item.message || ""),
        createdAt: item.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
        read: item.read === true,
        dismissed: item.dismissed === true
      }))
        .filter((item) => item.key)
        .forEach((item) => {
          const existing = byKey.get(item.key);
          if (!existing) {
            byKey.set(item.key, item);
            return;
          }
          const existingTime = new Date(existing.createdAt).getTime() || 0;
          const nextTime = new Date(item.createdAt).getTime() || 0;
          byKey.set(item.key, {
            ...existing,
            ...(nextTime >= existingTime ? item : {}),
            key: item.key,
            message: nextTime >= existingTime ? item.message : existing.message,
            createdAt: nextTime >= existingTime ? item.createdAt : existing.createdAt,
            read: existing.read === true || item.read === true,
            dismissed: existing.dismissed === true || item.dismissed === true
          });
        });
    });
    const nextItems = Array.from(byKey.values());
    saveStoredNotifications(user, nextItems);
    return nextItems;
  } catch (_error) {
    return [];
  }
}

function getNotificationFlagIds(notifications, flag) {
  return (Array.isArray(notifications) ? notifications : [])
    .filter((item) => item?.[flag] === true)
    .map((item) => String(item?.key || ""))
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function loadStoredUserNotificationIds(storageKeys) {
  try {
    const keys = Array.isArray(storageKeys) ? storageKeys.filter(Boolean) : [storageKeys].filter(Boolean);
    const values = new Set();
    keys.forEach((storageKey) => {
      const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
      const items = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      if (!Array.isArray(items)) return;
      items.map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean).forEach((item) => values.add(item));
    });
    const nextValues = Array.from(values);
    saveStoredUserNotificationIds(keys, nextValues);
    return nextValues;
  } catch (_error) {
    return [];
  }
}

function loadReadUserNotifications(user) {
  return loadStoredUserNotificationIds(getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_read_notifications_", user));
}

function loadDismissedUserNotifications(user) {
  return loadStoredUserNotificationIds(getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_dismissed_notifications_", user));
}

function saveStoredNotifications(user, notifications) {
  try {
    const payload = JSON.stringify((notifications || []).slice(0, 80));
    const storageKeys = getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_notifications_", user);
    const canonicalKey = storageKeys[0];
    if (canonicalKey) window.localStorage.setItem(canonicalKey, payload);
    pruneLegacyStorageKeys(storageKeys);
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep dashboard usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

function saveStoredUserNotificationIds(storageKeys, ids, limit = 160) {
  try {
    const payload = JSON.stringify((ids || []).slice(0, limit));
    const keys = Array.isArray(storageKeys) ? storageKeys.filter(Boolean) : [storageKeys].filter(Boolean);
    const canonicalKey = keys[0];
    if (canonicalKey) window.localStorage.setItem(canonicalKey, payload);
    pruneLegacyStorageKeys(keys);
  } catch (_error) {
    // Keep dashboard usable even if storage is unavailable.
  }
}

function saveReadUserNotifications(user, ids) {
  saveStoredUserNotificationIds(getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_read_notifications_", user), ids);
}

function saveDismissedUserNotifications(user, ids) {
  saveStoredUserNotificationIds(getUserStorageKeyCandidates("sq_user_dismissed_notifications_", user), ids);
}

function syncNotificationsFromReservations(existingNotifications, reservations, options = {}) {
  const dismissedIds = new Set((options.dismissedIds || []).map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean));
  const readIds = new Set((options.readIds || []).map((item) => String(item || "")).filter(Boolean));
  const nextItems = Array.isArray(existingNotifications)
    ? existingNotifications.filter((item) => {
      const key = String(item?.key || "");
      return key && !item?.dismissed && !dismissedIds.has(key);
    })
    : [];
  const byKey = new Map(nextItems.map((item) => [item.key, item]));
  const pushNotif = (key, message, createdAt) => {
    if (dismissedIds.has(key)) return;
    if (byKey.has(key)) {
      const existing = byKey.get(key);
      const updated = {
        ...existing,
        message,
        createdAt: createdAt || existing?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
        read: existing?.read === true || readIds.has(key),
        dismissed: existing?.dismissed === true || dismissedIds.has(key)
      };
      byKey.set(key, updated);
      const index = nextItems.findIndex((item) => item.key === key);
      if (index >= 0) nextItems[index] = updated;
      return;
    }
    const notif = {
      key,
      message,
      createdAt: createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
      read: readIds.has(key),
      dismissed: dismissedIds.has(key)
    };
    byKey.set(key, notif);
    nextItems.push(notif);
  };

  (Array.isArray(reservations) ? reservations : []).forEach((reservation) => {
    const id = reservation?._id || reservation?.id;
    if (!id) return;
    const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
    const pricingStatus = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
    const paymentStatus = String(reservation?.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase();
    const updatedAt = reservation?.updatedAt || reservation?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString();

    if (status === "approved") pushNotif(`approved-${id}`, `Booking #${id} was approved by admin.`, updatedAt);
    if (status === "rejected") pushNotif(`rejected-${id}`, `Booking #${id} was rejected.`, updatedAt);
    if (isCustomPackageReservation(reservation) && pricingStatus === "quoted") pushNotif(`quoted-${id}`, `New quote is ready for booking #${id}.`, updatedAt);
    if (((status === "approved" && !isCustomPackageReservation(reservation)) || (isCustomPackageReservation(reservation) && pricingStatus === "accepted")) && ["", "unpaid", "failed"].includes(paymentStatus)) {
      pushNotif(`paynow-${id}`, `Booking #${id} is ready. Please pay now to continue.`, updatedAt);
    }
    if (paymentStatus === "paid") pushNotif(`paid-${id}`, `Payment for booking #${id} was submitted and is awaiting admin verification.`, updatedAt);
    if (paymentStatus === "refunded") pushNotif(`refunded-${id}`, `Payment for booking #${id} was refunded.`, updatedAt);
  });

  return nextItems.filter((item) => {
    const key = String(item?.key || "");
    return key && !item?.dismissed && !dismissedIds.has(key);
  });
}

function buildReceiptHtml(reservation, payment) {
  const amount = formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice, reservation?.currency || "PHP");
  const paymentMethodLabel = String(payment?.method || "Manual").trim().toUpperCase();
  const displayStatus = getPaymentDocumentStatus(payment, reservation);
  const verificationNote = getPaymentDocumentNote(payment, reservation);
  const clientName = reservation?.fullName || "SnapQueue Client";
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const packageLabel = reservation ? reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "Pending" : "Pending";
  const eventLabel = reservation ? getEventLabel(reservation) : "Pending";
  const eventDate = formatDate(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
  const submittedAt = formatDate(payment?.createdAt || payment?.updatedAt || new Date());
  const printedAt = formatDateLabel(new Date());
  const paymentRef = payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "Pending";
  const contactValue = reservation?.email || reservation?.phone || "Pending";
  const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toUpperCase();
  const adminNote = String(payment?.refundAdminNote || "-");
  const hasRefundRecord = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase() !== "none" || String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded";

  return `<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>SnapQueue</title>
  <style>
    @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 0; }
    html, body { margin:0; padding:0; background:#fff; color:#111827; font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; }
    body { display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:flex-start; }
    .paper { width:210mm; min-height:297mm; box-sizing:border-box; background:#fff; }
    .receipt { box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:297mm; padding:10mm 10mm 12mm; }
    .top { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.8fr; gap:20mm; font-size:7.2px; line-height:1.2; }
    .meta { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .meta td { padding:1.2px 0; vertical-align:top; }
    .meta .label { width:24mm; font-weight:700; }
    .meta .colon { width:4mm; text-align:center; }
    .title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; margin:0; }
    .subtitle { margin:1px 0 7px; font-size:7px; color:#475569; }
    .grid { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:10mm; table-layout:fixed; font-size:6.8px; line-height:1.15; }
    .grid th, .grid td { border:0.6px solid #000; padding:3px 4px; min-height:8.8mm; height:8.8mm; vertical-align:top; word-break:break-word; overflow-wrap:anywhere; }
    .grid th { text-align:center; font-weight:700; background:#f3f4f6; }
    .grid .nowrap { white-space:nowrap; word-break:normal; overflow-wrap:normal; }
    .center { text-align:center; }
    .summary { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12mm; margin-top:12mm; font-size:6.9px; line-height:1.25; }
    .summary-title { margin:0 0 4mm; font-size:8.4px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .summary table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .summary td { padding:1.2px 0; vertical-align:top; }
    .summary td:last-child { text-align:right; white-space:nowrap; padding-left:8mm; }
    .notes { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.45fr 0.55fr; gap:14mm; margin-top:18mm; font-size:6.2px; line-height:1.28; }
    .notes table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .notes td { padding:1.2px 0; }
    .notes td:last-child { text-align:right; padding-left:8mm; white-space:nowrap; }
    @media print { body { display:block; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="paper">
    <div class="receipt">
      <div class="top">
        <div>
          <div class="title">SnapQueue Payment Receipt</div>
          <p class="subtitle">Admin copy of payment submission record</p>
          <table class="meta">
            <tr><td class="label">Receipt No.</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(paymentRef)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Ref ID</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(reservationId)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Issued</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(submittedAt)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Status</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(displayStatus)}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
        <table class="meta">
          <tr><td class="label">Client Name</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(clientName)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Package</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Event Type</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Contact</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(contactValue)}</td></tr>
        </table>
      </div>

      <table class="grid">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th style="width:6%">Item</th>
            <th style="width:18%">Reference</th>
            <th style="width:24%">Description</th>
            <th style="width:8%">Method</th>
            <th style="width:14%">Status</th>
            <th style="width:18%">Date / Time</th>
            <th style="width:12%">Amount</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td class="center">01</td>
            <td>${escapeHtml(reservationId)}</td>
            <td>
              ${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}<br />
              Event: ${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}<br />
              Customer: ${escapeHtml(clientName)}
            </td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel)}</td>
            <td class="center">${escapeHtml(displayStatus)}</td>
            <td class="nowrap">${escapeHtml(eventDate)}</td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(amount)}</td>
          </tr>
          ${hasRefundRecord ? `
          <tr>
            <td class="center">02</td>
            <td>${escapeHtml(paymentRef)}</td>
            <td>
              Refund status: ${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}<br />
              Payout account: -<br />
              Reference: -
            </td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel)}</td>
            <td class="center">${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td>
            <td class="nowrap">${escapeHtml(submittedAt)}</td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(amount)}</td>
          </tr>` : ""}
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <p class="summary-title">Receipt Summary</p>
          <table class="summary-table">
            <tr><td>Package / Service</td><td>${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Event Type</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Event Schedule</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventDate)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Payment Method</td><td>${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel)}</td></tr>
            ${hasRefundRecord ? `<tr><td>Refund Status</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td></tr>` : ""}
            ${hasRefundRecord ? `<tr><td>Admin Note</td><td>${escapeHtml(adminNote)}</td></tr>` : ""}
          </table>
        </div>
        <div>
          <p class="summary-title">Payment Totals</p>
          <table class="summary-table">
            <tr><td>Base Amount</td><td>${escapeHtml(amount)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Processing Fee</td><td>PHP 0.00</td></tr>
            <tr class="strong"><td>Total Paid</td><td>${escapeHtml(amount)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Receipt Status</td><td>${escapeHtml(displayStatus)}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="notes">
        <div>
          <span style="font-weight:700">IMPORTANT:</span>
          Verify all reservation, payment, and refund details before printing. This admin receipt is generated from the SnapQueue dashboard and serves as the official internal payment document. <strong>This receipt cannot be used for tax claims.</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <table>
            <tr><td>Date Printed</td><td>${escapeHtml(printedAt)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Prepared By</td><td>SnapQueue Admin</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>`;
}

function buildRefundDetailsHtml(reservation, payment) {
  const reservationId = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const clientName = reservation?.fullName || "-";
  const amount = formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice, reservation?.currency || "PHP");
  const refundAmount = formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation?.finalPrice, reservation?.currency || "PHP");
  const refundStatus = getRefundDocumentStatus(payment);
  const refundMethod = String(payment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase();
  const refundNumber = String(payment?.refundPayoutNumber || "-");
  const refundReference = String(payment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-");
  const refundProcessedAt = formatDate(payment?.refundProcessedAt || payment?.refundResolvedAt || payment?.updatedAt || new Date());
  const refundReason = String(payment?.refundReason || "-");
  const adminNote = String(payment?.refundAdminNote || "-");
  const packageLabel = reservation ? reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "Pending" : "Pending";
  const eventLabel = reservation ? getEventLabel(reservation) : "Pending";
  const eventDate = formatDate(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
  const printedAt = formatDateLabel(new Date());
  const paymentRef = payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "Pending";
  const contactValue = reservation?.email || reservation?.phone || "Pending";

  return `<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>SnapQueue</title>
  <style>
    @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 0; }
    html, body { margin:0; padding:0; background:#fff; color:#111827; font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; }
    body { display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:flex-start; }
    .paper { width:210mm; min-height:297mm; box-sizing:border-box; background:#fff; }
    .receipt { box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:297mm; padding:10mm 10mm 12mm; }
    .top { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.8fr; gap:20mm; font-size:7.2px; line-height:1.2; }
    .meta { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .meta td { padding:1.2px 0; vertical-align:top; }
    .meta .label { width:24mm; font-weight:700; }
    .meta .colon { width:4mm; text-align:center; }
    .title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; margin:0; }
    .subtitle { margin:1px 0 7px; font-size:7px; color:#475569; }
    .grid { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:10mm; table-layout:fixed; font-size:6.8px; line-height:1.15; }
    .grid th, .grid td { border:0.6px solid #000; padding:3px 4px; min-height:8.8mm; height:8.8mm; vertical-align:top; word-break:break-word; overflow-wrap:anywhere; }
    .grid th { text-align:center; font-weight:700; background:#f3f4f6; }
    .grid .nowrap { white-space:nowrap; word-break:normal; overflow-wrap:normal; }
    .center { text-align:center; }
    .summary { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12mm; margin-top:12mm; font-size:6.9px; line-height:1.25; }
    .summary-title { margin:0 0 4mm; font-size:8.4px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; }
    .summary table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .summary td { padding:1.2px 0; vertical-align:top; }
    .summary td:last-child { text-align:right; white-space:nowrap; padding-left:8mm; }
    .notes { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.45fr 0.55fr; gap:14mm; margin-top:18mm; font-size:6.2px; line-height:1.28; }
    .notes table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
    .notes td { padding:1.2px 0; }
    .notes td:last-child { text-align:right; padding-left:8mm; white-space:nowrap; }
    @media print { body { display:block; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="paper">
    <div class="receipt">
      <div class="top">
        <div>
          <div class="title">SnapQueue Refund Receipt</div>
          <p class="subtitle">Client copy of refund transaction record</p>
          <table class="meta">
            <tr><td class="label">Receipt No.</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundReference)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Ref ID</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(reservationId)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Refund Date</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundProcessedAt)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td class="label">Refund Status</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
        <table class="meta">
          <tr><td class="label">Client Name</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(clientName)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Package</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Event Type</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}</td></tr>
          <tr><td class="label">Contact</td><td class="colon">:</td><td>${escapeHtml(contactValue)}</td></tr>
        </table>
      </div>

      <table class="grid">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th style="width:6%">Item</th>
            <th style="width:18%">Reference</th>
            <th style="width:24%">Description</th>
            <th style="width:8%">Method</th>
            <th style="width:14%">Status</th>
            <th style="width:18%">Date / Time</th>
            <th style="width:12%">Amount</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td class="center">01</td>
            <td>${escapeHtml(reservationId)}</td>
            <td>
              Original payment for ${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}<br />
              Event: ${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}<br />
              Customer: ${escapeHtml(clientName)}
            </td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(String(payment?.method || "manual").toUpperCase())}</td>
            <td class="center">VERIFIED</td>
            <td class="nowrap">${escapeHtml(eventDate)}</td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(amount)}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="center">02</td>
            <td>${escapeHtml(refundReference)}</td>
            <td>
              Refund transaction for reservation ${escapeHtml(reservationId)}<br />
              Payout account: ${escapeHtml(refundNumber)}<br />
              Original payment ref: ${escapeHtml(paymentRef)}
            </td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(refundMethod)}</td>
            <td class="center">${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td>
            <td class="nowrap">${escapeHtml(refundProcessedAt)}</td>
            <td class="center nowrap">${escapeHtml(refundAmount)}</td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <p class="summary-title">Refund Summary</p>
          <table class="summary-table">
            <tr><td>Package / Service</td><td>${escapeHtml(packageLabel)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Event Type</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventLabel)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Event Schedule</td><td>${escapeHtml(eventDate)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Refund Method</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundMethod)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Refund Reference</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundReference)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Refund Status</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Admin Note</td><td>${escapeHtml(adminNote)}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div>
          <p class="summary-title">Refund Totals</p>
          <table class="summary-table">
            <tr><td>Original Payment</td><td>${escapeHtml(amount)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Refund Amount</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundAmount)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Processing Fee</td><td>PHP 0.00</td></tr>
            <tr class="strong"><td>Refund Status</td><td>${escapeHtml(refundStatus)}</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="notes">
        <div>
          <span style="font-weight:700">IMPORTANT:</span>
          Verify all reservation and refund details before printing. This receipt is generated from SnapQueue and serves as the client's refund transaction record. <strong>This receipt cannot be used for tax claims.</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <table>
            <tr><td>Date Printed</td><td>${escapeHtml(printedAt)}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Prepared By</td><td>SnapQueue Admin</td></tr>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>`;
}

function openPrintWindow(html, onError) {
  const printWindow = window.open("", "_blank", "width=900,height=1200");
  if (!printWindow) {
    onError?.("Please allow pop-ups to print the receipt.");
    return;
  }
  try {
    printWindow.document.open();
    printWindow.document.write(html);
    printWindow.document.close();
  } catch (_error) {
    onError?.("Unable to print receipt.");
    try {
      printWindow.close();
    } catch (_closeError) {
      // Ignore close failures on a broken print window.
    }
  }
}

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const loginRedirectPath = `/login?redirect=${encodeURIComponent(`${location.pathname}${location.search}`)}`;
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(() => getInitialUserTab(location.search));
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [desktopSidebarCollapseLock, setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock] = useState(false);
  const [desktopSidebarExpanded, setDesktopSidebarExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [notifOpen, setNotifOpen] = useState(false);
  const [avatarMenuOpen, setAvatarMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [dbDown, setDbDown] = useState(() => typeof window !== "undefined" && Boolean(window.__SNAPQUEUE_DB_DOWN__));
  const ignoreFeedback = () => {};
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [reservations, setReservations] = useState([]);
  const [archiveFolders, setArchiveFolders] = useState([]);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [mobileHeaderSearchOpen, setMobileHeaderSearchOpen] = useState(false);
  const [historyPage, setHistoryPage] = useState(1);
  const [historyFilter, setHistoryFilter] = useState("all");
  const [historyFilterMenuOpen, setHistoryFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [paymentPage, setPaymentPage] = useState(1);
  const [paymentSearchQuery, setPaymentSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [paymentFilter, setPaymentFilter] = useState("all");
  const [paymentFilterMenuOpen, setPaymentFilterMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [activePaymentReservationId, setActivePaymentReservationId] = useState("");
  const [activePayment, setActivePayment] = useState(null);
  const [paymentsByReservationId, setPaymentsByReservationId] = useState({});
  const [activeArchiveFolderName, setActiveArchiveFolderName] = useState(null);
  const [selectedPhotos, setSelectedPhotos] = useState([]);
  const [previewPhoto, setPreviewPhoto] = useState(null);
  const [proofModal, setProofModal] = useState({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment" });
  const [proofFullscreen, setProofFullscreen] = useState(false);
  const [refundModalOpen, setRefundModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [refundDetailsModalOpen, setRefundDetailsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [refundForm, setRefundForm] = useState({ reason: "", payoutMethod: "", payoutNumber: "" });
  const [refundErrors, setRefundErrors] = useState({});
  const [refundPayoutMenuOpen, setRefundPayoutMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [deleteArchiveModalOpen, setDeleteArchiveModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutModalOpen, setLogoutModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [changePasswordModalOpen, setChangePasswordModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [deleteAccountModalOpen, setDeleteAccountModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [passwordForm, setPasswordForm] = useState({ currentPassword: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
  const [passwordErrors, setPasswordErrors] = useState({});
  const [passwordOtpState, setPasswordOtpState] = useState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE);
  const [passwordVisibility, setPasswordVisibility] = useState({ currentPassword: false, newPassword: false, confirmPassword: false });
  const [passwordShakeField, setPasswordShakeField] = useState("");
  const [profileDraft, setProfileDraft] = useState({ fullName: "", email: "", phone: "", bio: "", avatarUrl: "", emailNotificationsEnabled: true });
  const [settingsPreferences, setSettingsPreferences] = useState(DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS);
  const [userSettingsView, setUserSettingsView] = useState("access");
  const [userSettingsMenuOpen, setUserSettingsMenuOpen] = useState("");
  const [profileErrors, setProfileErrors] = useState({});
  const [profileEditing, setProfileEditing] = useState(false);
  const [profileSaving, setProfileSaving] = useState(false);
  const [endingOtherSessions, setEndingOtherSessions] = useState(false);
  const [logoutPending, setLogoutPending] = useState(false);
  const [deleteAccountPending, setDeleteAccountPending] = useState(false);
  const [deleteArchivePending, setDeleteArchivePending] = useState(false);
  const [detailReservation, setDetailReservation] = useState(null);
  const [detailAvatarFailed, setDetailAvatarFailed] = useState(false);
  const [userAvatarFailed, setUserAvatarFailed] = useState(false);
  const [profileAvatarFailed, setProfileAvatarFailed] = useState(false);
  const [userNotifications, setUserNotifications] = useState([]);
  const [readNotificationIds, setReadNotificationIds] = useState([]);
  const [dismissedNotificationIds, setDismissedNotificationIds] = useState([]);
  const [receiptModal, setReceiptModal] = useState({ open: false, html: "" });
  const [messageThreads, setMessageThreads] = useState([]);
  const [messageSeenMap, setMessageSeenMap] = useState({});
  const [messageSearchQuery, setMessageSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [selectedMessageThreadId, setSelectedMessageThreadId] = useState(USER_AI_THREAD_ID);
  const [adminSupportThreadId, setAdminSupportThreadId] = useState("");
  const [adminSupportMessages, setAdminSupportMessages] = useState([]);
  const [aiMessages, setAiMessages] = useState([]);
  const [messageComposerText, setMessageComposerText] = useState("");
  const [messageThreadsLoading, setMessageThreadsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [messageThreadsError, setMessageThreadsError] = useState("");
  const [messageLoading, setMessageLoading] = useState(false);
  const [messageError, setMessageError] = useState("");
  const [messageSending, setMessageSending] = useState(false);
  const [messagePanelHidden, setMessagePanelHidden] = useState(false);
  const [openHelpFaq, setOpenHelpFaq] = useState(-1);
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(
    mobileOpen ||
    notifOpen ||
    avatarMenuOpen ||
    proofModal.open ||
    refundModalOpen ||
    refundDetailsModalOpen ||
    deleteArchiveModalOpen ||
    logoutModalOpen ||
    changePasswordModalOpen ||
    deleteAccountModalOpen ||
    receiptModal.open ||
    logoutPending ||
    deleteAccountPending ||
    deleteArchivePending
  ));
  const [helpSearchQuery, setHelpSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [mobileHelpFaqExpanded, setMobileHelpFaqExpanded] = useState(false);
  const mobileHeaderSearchInputRef = useRef(null);
  const profileAvatarInputRef = useRef(null);
  const avatarMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const paymentsRequestVersionRef = useRef(0);
  const paymentsByReservationIdRef = useRef({});
  const messageReturnTabRef = useRef("reservations");
  const previousActiveTabRef = useRef("reservations");
  const didInitUserTabRef = useRef(false);
  const lastPhotoTapRef = useRef({ key: "", time: 0 });
  const photoClickTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
  const hasShownSetPasswordPromptRef = useRef(false);
  const userRequiresPasswordSetup = user?.hasPasswordSet === false || (user?.hasPasswordSet == null && Boolean(user?.googleAvatarUrl));

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = "m-0 min-h-screen admin-home-shell text-slate-700";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = "";
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleDbDown = () => setDbDown(true);
    const handleDbUp = () => setDbDown(false);
    window.addEventListener("snapqueue:db-down", handleDbDown);
    window.addEventListener("snapqueue:db-up", handleDbUp);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("snapqueue:db-down", handleDbDown);
      window.removeEventListener("snapqueue:db-up", handleDbUp);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => () => {
    if (photoClickTimeoutRef.current) {
      window.clearTimeout(photoClickTimeoutRef.current);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!avatarMenuOpen) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!event.target?.closest?.("[data-user-avatar-menu]")) {
        setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [avatarMenuOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.body.style.overflow = mobileOpen ? "hidden" : "";
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = "";
    };
  }, [mobileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setUserSettingsMenuOpen("");
  }, [userSettingsView]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleOutsideClick = (event) => {
      if (!notifOpen) return;
      const mobilePanel = document.getElementById("user-notif-panel-mobile");
      const mobileBell = document.getElementById("user-notif-bell");
      if (
        event.target?.closest?.("[data-user-notif-panel-desktop]") ||
        event.target?.closest?.("[data-user-notif-trigger-desktop]") ||
        mobilePanel?.contains(event.target) ||
        mobileBell?.contains(event.target)
      ) return;
      setNotifOpen(false);
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleOutsideClick);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleOutsideClick);
  }, [notifOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const load = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      try {
        const [meResponse, reservationResponse, archiveResponse] = await Promise.all([
          api.get("/auth/me"),
          api.get("/reservations/dashboard").catch(() => api.get("/reservations")),
          api.get("/archive/me").catch(() => ({ data: { items: [], folders: [] } }))
        ]);
        const currentUser = meResponse?.data?.user || null;
        if (hasAdminAccess(currentUser?.role)) {
          navigate("/admin", { replace: true });
          return;
        }
        setUser(currentUser);
        const nextReservations = reservationResponse?.data?.reservations || reservationResponse?.data?.items || [];
        const nextFolders = archiveResponse?.data?.folders || archiveResponse?.data?.items || [];
        setReservations(nextReservations);
        setArchiveFolders(nextFolders);
        setProfileDraft({
          fullName: currentUser?.fullName || "",
          email: currentUser?.email || "",
          phone: currentUser?.phone || "",
          bio: currentUser?.bio || "Photography enthusiast and frequent event organizer.",
          avatarUrl: currentUser?.avatarUrl || currentUser?.googleAvatarUrl || "",
          emailNotificationsEnabled: currentUser?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false
        });
        setSettingsPreferences({
          ...loadStoredUserSettings(currentUser),
          twoFactorEnabled: currentUser?.twoFactorEnabled === true
        });
        const storedNotifications = loadStoredNotifications(currentUser);
        const storedReadIds = loadReadUserNotifications(currentUser);
        const storedDismissedIds = loadDismissedUserNotifications(currentUser);
        const syncedNotifications = syncNotificationsFromReservations(storedNotifications, nextReservations, {
          readIds: storedReadIds,
          dismissedIds: storedDismissedIds
        });
        const nextReadIds = Array.from(new Set([
          ...storedReadIds,
          ...getNotificationFlagIds(syncedNotifications, "read")
        ]));
        const nextDismissedIds = Array.from(new Set([
          ...storedDismissedIds,
          ...getNotificationFlagIds(syncedNotifications, "dismissed")
        ]));
        setUserNotifications(syncedNotifications);
        setReadNotificationIds(nextReadIds);
        setDismissedNotificationIds(nextDismissedIds);
        saveReadUserNotifications(currentUser, nextReadIds);
        saveDismissedUserNotifications(currentUser, nextDismissedIds);
        saveStoredNotifications(currentUser, syncedNotifications);
      } catch (error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Unable to load dashboard." });
        navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
        return;
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    load();
  }, [navigate]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const intervalId = window.setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const reservationResponse = await api.get("/reservations/dashboard").catch(() => api.get("/reservations"));
        const nextReservations = reservationResponse?.data?.reservations || reservationResponse?.data?.items || [];
        setReservations(nextReservations);
      } catch (_error) {
        // Ignore background refresh failures and preserve the last good state.
      }
    }, 15000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(intervalId);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    setDetailAvatarFailed(false);
  }, [detailReservation?.avatarUrl, user?.avatarUrl]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setUserAvatarFailed(false);
  }, [user?.avatarUrl, user?.googleAvatarUrl]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setProfileAvatarFailed(false);
  }, [profileDraft.avatarUrl, user?.googleAvatarUrl]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) return;
    saveStoredUserSettings(user, settingsPreferences);
  }, [settingsPreferences, user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user?._id) return;
    setAiMessages(readStoredAiMessages(user._id));
  }, [user?._id]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user?._id) return;
    writeStoredAiMessages(user._id, aiMessages);
  }, [aiMessages, user?._id]);
  const userMessageSeenStorageKey = useMemo(() => getUserMessageSeenStorageKey(user), [user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMessageSeenMap(loadStoredThreadSeenMap(userMessageSeenStorageKey));
  }, [userMessageSeenStorageKey]);

  useEffect(() => {
    saveStoredThreadSeenMap(userMessageSeenStorageKey, messageSeenMap);
  }, [messageSeenMap, userMessageSeenStorageKey]);

  function markMessageThreadSeen(threadId, seenAt) {
    const id = String(threadId || "").trim();
    if (!id) return;
    const nextSeenAt = String(seenAt || new Date().toISOString());
    setMessageSeenMap((current) => {
      if (current?.[id] === nextSeenAt) return current;
      return {
        ...(current || {}),
        [id]: nextSeenAt
      };
    });
  }

  async function loadMessageThreads(options = {}) {
    const { silent = false } = options;
    if (!silent) setMessageThreadsLoading(true);
    setMessageThreadsError("");
    try {
      const response = await api.get("/chatbot/live/threads/me");
      const threads = Array.isArray(response?.data?.threads) ? response.data.threads : [];
      setMessageThreads(threads);
      const latestThread = threads[0] || null;
      setAdminSupportThreadId(String(latestThread?._id || latestThread?.id || ""));
      return threads;
    } catch (error) {
      const nextError = error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to load conversations.";
      setMessageThreadsError(nextError);
      return [];
    } finally {
      if (!silent) setMessageThreadsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function ensureAdminSupportThread() {
    if (adminSupportThreadId) return adminSupportThreadId;
    const response = await api.get("/chatbot/live/thread");
    const thread = response?.data?.thread || null;
    const nextId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
    if (nextId) {
      setAdminSupportThreadId(nextId);
      setMessageThreads((current) => {
        const exists = current.some((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === nextId);
        if (exists) return current;
        return [thread, ...current];
      });
    }
    return nextId;
  }

  async function loadAdminSupportMessages(threadId, options = {}) {
    const id = String(threadId || "").trim();
    if (!id) {
      setAdminSupportMessages([]);
      setMessageError("");
      return;
    }
    const { silent = false } = options;
    if (!silent) setMessageLoading(true);
    setMessageError("");
    try {
      const response = await api.get(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(id)}/messages`);
      const nextMessages = Array.isArray(response?.data?.messages) ? response.data.messages : [];
      setAdminSupportMessages(nextMessages);
      setMessageThreads((current) => current.map((thread) => {
        const currentId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
        if (currentId !== id) return thread;
        return {
          ...thread,
          unreadCount: Number(response?.data?.thread?.unreadCount || 0)
        };
      }));
      markMessageThreadSeen(
        id,
        response?.data?.thread?.lastMessageAt || nextMessages[nextMessages.length - 1]?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString()
      );
    } catch (error) {
      setMessageError(error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to load messages.");
    } finally {
      if (!silent) setMessageLoading(false);
    }
  }

  function openMessageThread(threadId) {
    const id = String(threadId || USER_AI_THREAD_ID);
    const selectedThread = messageThreads.find((thread) => String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "") === id) || null;
    if (selectedThread) {
      markMessageThreadSeen(id, selectedThread?.lastMessageAt || selectedThread?.updatedAt || selectedThread?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString());
      setMessageThreads((current) => current.map((thread) => {
        const currentId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
        if (currentId !== id) return thread;
        return {
          ...thread,
          unreadCount: 0
        };
      }));
    }
    setSelectedMessageThreadId(id);
    setMessagePanelHidden(false);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user?._id || activeTab !== "messages") return undefined;
    loadMessageThreads().catch(() => {});
    return undefined;
  }, [activeTab, user?._id]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "messages") return undefined;
    if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.innerWidth < 1280) {
      setMessagePanelHidden(true);
    }
    return undefined;
  }, [activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const previousTab = previousActiveTabRef.current;
    if (activeTab === "messages" && previousTab !== "messages") {
      messageReturnTabRef.current = previousTab || "reservations";
    }
    previousActiveTabRef.current = activeTab;
  }, [activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "messages") return undefined;
    if (selectedMessageThreadId !== USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID && selectedMessageThreadId !== adminSupportThreadId) {
      if (selectedMessageThreadId === USER_AI_THREAD_ID) {
        setMessageError("");
      }
      return undefined;
    }

    let cancelled = false;
    const load = async () => {
      try {
        const ensuredThreadId = await ensureAdminSupportThread();
        if (!ensuredThreadId || cancelled) return;
        setSelectedMessageThreadId(ensuredThreadId);
        await loadAdminSupportMessages(ensuredThreadId);
      } catch (error) {
        if (cancelled) return;
        setMessageError(error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to open admin support chat.");
      }
    };
    load();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [activeTab, selectedMessageThreadId, adminSupportThreadId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "messages") return undefined;
    const intervalId = window.setInterval(() => {
      loadMessageThreads({ silent: true }).catch(() => {});
      if (adminSupportThreadId && selectedMessageThreadId === adminSupportThreadId) {
        loadAdminSupportMessages(adminSupportThreadId, { silent: true }).catch(() => {});
      }
    }, 15000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(intervalId);
  }, [activeTab, adminSupportThreadId, selectedMessageThreadId]);

  const activeReservations = useMemo(
    () => reservations.filter((item) => !["rejected", "completed"].includes(String(item.status || "").toLowerCase())),
    [reservations]
  );
  const historyReservations = useMemo(
    () => reservations.filter((item) => ["rejected", "completed"].includes(String(item.status || "").toLowerCase())),
    [reservations]
  );
  const activeReservation = activeReservations[0] || null;
  const activeReservationPayment = activeReservation ? paymentsByReservationId[getReservationRouteId(activeReservation)] || null : null;
  const progressState = useMemo(
    () => getProgressState(activeReservation, activeReservationPayment),
    [activeReservation, activeReservationPayment]
  );
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "progress") return undefined;

    let cancelled = false;
    const latestReservationId = getReservationRouteId(activeReservations[0]);
    const syncProgressState = async () => {
      try {
        await reloadDashboardData();
        if (cancelled) return;
        if (latestReservationId) {
          await refreshPaymentState(latestReservationId);
        }
      } catch (_error) {
        // Keep the current UI state when background progress sync fails.
      }
    };

    syncProgressState();
    const intervalId = window.setInterval(syncProgressState, 5000);

    const handleVisibilityChange = () => {
      if (!document.hidden) {
        syncProgressState();
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener("focus", syncProgressState);
    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", handleVisibilityChange);

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      window.clearInterval(intervalId);
      window.removeEventListener("focus", syncProgressState);
      document.removeEventListener("visibilitychange", handleVisibilityChange);
    };
  }, [activeTab, user, activeReservation?._id]);
  const detailAvatarUrl = detailReservation?.avatarUrl || user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl || "";
  const googleProfileAvatarUrl = String(user?.googleAvatarUrl || "");
  const filteredReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const query = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!query) return activeReservations;
    return activeReservations.filter((reservation) =>
      [
        reservation._id,
        reservation.id,
        reservation.eventType,
        reservation.packageName,
        reservation.service,
        reservation.paymentStatus,
        reservation.status
      ].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(query))
    );
  }, [activeReservations, searchQuery]);
  const filteredHistoryReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const query = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return historyReservations.filter((reservation) => {
      const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
      const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
      const matchesSearch = !query || [reservation?._id, reservation?.eventType, reservation?.packageName, reservation?.status, payment?.status].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(query));
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;
      const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
      const hasPayment = Boolean(payment);
      if (historyFilter === "completed") return status === "completed";
      if (historyFilter === "rejected") return status === "rejected";
      if (historyFilter === "cancelled") return status === "cancelled";
      if (historyFilter === "with-payment") return hasPayment;
      if (historyFilter === "no-payment") return !hasPayment;
      return true;
    });
  }, [historyReservations, historyFilter, paymentsByReservationId, searchQuery]);
  const historyPageSize = 7;
  const historyTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredHistoryReservations.length / historyPageSize));
  const paginatedHistoryReservations = useMemo(() => {
    const start = (historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize;
    return filteredHistoryReservations.slice(start, start + historyPageSize);
  }, [filteredHistoryReservations, historyPage]);

  const normalizedFolders = useMemo(() => archiveFolders.map(normalizeFolder), [archiveFolders]);
  const currentFolder = useMemo(() => normalizedFolders.find((folder) => folder.name === activeArchiveFolderName) || null, [activeArchiveFolderName, normalizedFolders]);
  const currentPhotos = useMemo(() => (currentFolder?.photos || []).map(normalizePhoto).filter((photo) => photo.url), [currentFolder]);
  const currentPhotoEntries = useMemo(() => currentPhotos.map((photo, index) => ({ photo, index })), [currentPhotos]);
  const visibleFolders = useMemo(() => {
    const query = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!query) return normalizedFolders;
    return normalizedFolders.filter((folder) => folder.name.toLowerCase().includes(query));
  }, [normalizedFolders, searchQuery]);
  const visiblePhotoEntries = useMemo(() => {
    const query = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!query) return currentPhotoEntries;
    return currentPhotoEntries.filter(({ photo }) => `${photo.name} ${photo.url}`.toLowerCase().includes(query));
