  }, [currentPhotoEntries, searchQuery]);
  const selectedPhotoSet = useMemo(() => new Set(selectedPhotos), [selectedPhotos]);

  const stats = useMemo(() => ({
    totalReservations: reservations.length,
    activeReservations: activeReservations.length,
    historyReservations: historyReservations.length,
    archiveFolders: archiveFolders.length
  }), [activeReservations.length, archiveFolders.length, historyReservations.length, reservations.length]);

  const paymentCandidates = useMemo(() => reservations.filter((item) => String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase() !== "rejected"), [reservations]);
  const paymentCandidateRefreshKey = useMemo(
    () => paymentCandidates
      .map((item) => {
        const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(item);
        return [
          reservationId,
          String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase(),
          String(item?.paymentStatus || "").toLowerCase(),
          String(item?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase()
        ].join(":");
      })
      .join("|"),
    [paymentCandidates]
  );
  const paymentCandidateIds = useMemo(
    () => paymentCandidates
      .map((item) => getReservationRouteId(item))
      .filter(Boolean),
    [paymentCandidateRefreshKey]
  );
  const filteredPaymentCandidates = useMemo(() => {
    const query = paymentSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    return paymentCandidates.filter((item) => {
      const reservationId = String(item?._id || item?.id || "");
      const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
      const reservationStatus = String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase();
      const pricingStatus = String(item?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
      const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, item);
      const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
      const isCustomPackage = isCustomPackageReservation(item);

      const matchesSearch = !query || [
        item?._id,
        item?.id,
        item?.fullName,
        item?.email,
        item?.eventType,
        item?.packageName,
        item?.package,
        item?.service,
        item?.paymentStatus,
        item?.pricingStatus,
        payment?.referenceNumber,
        payment?.status
      ].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(query));
      if (!matchesSearch) return false;

      if (paymentFilter === "quote_ready") return isCustomPackage && pricingStatus === "quoted";
      if (paymentFilter === "awaiting_payment") {
        return !["rejected", "completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus)
          && !["paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus)
          && (isCustomPackage ? pricingStatus === "accepted" : reservationStatus === "approved");
      }
      if (paymentFilter === "paid") return ["paid", "pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified"].includes(paymentStatus);
      if (paymentFilter === "refunds") return refundStatus !== "none";
      return true;
    });
  }, [paymentCandidates, paymentFilter, paymentSearchQuery, paymentsByReservationId]);
  const paymentPageSize = 5;
  const paymentTotalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredPaymentCandidates.length / paymentPageSize));
  const paginatedPaymentCandidates = useMemo(() => {
    const start = (paymentPage - 1) * paymentPageSize;
    return filteredPaymentCandidates.slice(start, start + paymentPageSize);
  }, [filteredPaymentCandidates, paymentPage]);
  const activePaymentReservation = useMemo(
    () => paymentCandidates.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id) === String(activePaymentReservationId)) || null,
    [activePaymentReservationId, paymentCandidates]
  );
  const adminSupportThread = useMemo(
    () => messageThreads.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(adminSupportThreadId || "")) || null,
    [adminSupportThreadId, messageThreads]
  );
  const messageSidebarThreads = useMemo(() => {
    const aiLastMessage = aiMessages[aiMessages.length - 1] || null;
    const aiThread = {
      _id: USER_AI_THREAD_ID,
      id: USER_AI_THREAD_ID,
      clientName: "AI Assistant",
      clientEmail: "SnapQueue AI",
      lastMessage: aiLastMessage?.text || "Ask about packages, reservations, payments, and delivery.",
      lastMessageAt: aiLastMessage?.createdAt || "",
      updatedAt: aiLastMessage?.createdAt || "",
      createdAt: aiLastMessage?.createdAt || "",
      status: "open",
      unreadCount: 0,
      threadType: "ai"
    };
    const adminThread = adminSupportThread
      ? {
          ...adminSupportThread,
          clientName: "Admin Support",
          clientEmail: "Live support",
          threadType: "admin"
        }
      : {
          _id: USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID,
          id: USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID,
          clientName: "Admin Support",
          clientEmail: "Start a live conversation with the team",
          lastMessage: "Open a thread to chat with admin support.",
          lastMessageAt: "",
          updatedAt: "",
          createdAt: "",
          status: "open",
          unreadCount: 0,
          threadType: "admin"
        };
    return [aiThread, adminThread];
  }, [adminSupportThread, aiMessages]);
  const filteredMessageThreads = useMemo(() => {
    const needle = messageSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!needle) return messageSidebarThreads;
    return messageSidebarThreads.filter((item) =>
      [item?.clientName, item?.clientEmail, item?.lastMessage].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(needle))
    );
  }, [messageSearchQuery, messageSidebarThreads]);
  const unreadMessageCount = useMemo(
    () => messageSidebarThreads.reduce((sum, thread) => {
      const threadId = String(thread?._id || thread?.id || "");
      const isOpenThread =
        activeTab === "messages" &&
        !messagePanelHidden &&
        threadId &&
        threadId === String(selectedMessageThreadId || "");
      if (isOpenThread) return sum;
      return sum + threadUnreadFallback(thread, messageSeenMap);
    }, 0),
    [activeTab, messagePanelHidden, messageSeenMap, messageSidebarThreads, selectedMessageThreadId]
  );
  const selectedMessageThread = useMemo(
    () => messageSidebarThreads.find((item) => String(item?._id || item?.id || "") === String(selectedMessageThreadId || "")) || null,
    [messageSidebarThreads, selectedMessageThreadId]
  );
  const selectedMessageProfile = useMemo(() => {
    if (!selectedMessageThread) return null;
    if (String(selectedMessageThread.threadType || "") === "ai") {
      return AI_ASSISTANT_PROFILE;
    }
    return ADMIN_SUPPORT_PROFILE;
  }, [selectedMessageThread]);
  const selectedMessageItems = useMemo(() => {
    if (String(selectedMessageThread?.threadType || "") === "ai") return aiMessages;
    if (String(selectedMessageThread?._id || selectedMessageThread?.id || "") === String(adminSupportThreadId || "")) return adminSupportMessages;
    return [];
  }, [adminSupportMessages, adminSupportThreadId, aiMessages, selectedMessageThread]);
  const selectedMessageOnline = useMemo(() => {
    if (!selectedMessageThread) return false;
    if (String(selectedMessageThread.threadType || "") === "ai") return true;
    return isThreadOnline(selectedMessageThread);
  }, [selectedMessageThread]);
  const activeSearchPlaceholder = SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS[activeTab] || "Search records...";

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mobileHeaderSearchOpen) return;
    mobileHeaderSearchInputRef.current?.focus();
  }, [mobileHeaderSearchOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMobileHeaderSearchOpen(false);
  }, [activeTab, mobileOpen, notifOpen]);
  const searchVisible = Boolean(SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS[activeTab]);
  const dashboardSearchNeedle = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
  const profileSearchNeedle = activeTab === "profile" ? dashboardSearchNeedle : "";
  const settingsSearchNeedle = activeTab === "settings" ? dashboardSearchNeedle : "";
  const profileOverviewMatches = !profileSearchNeedle || [
    "profile personal info user role joined client access",
    profileDraft.fullName,
    profileDraft.email,
    profileDraft.phone,
    profileDraft.bio,
    user?.createdAt ? formatDateLabel(user.createdAt) : "unknown"
  ].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(profileSearchNeedle));
  const profileActionsMatch = !profileSearchNeedle || [
    "edit profile change password remove picture save changes cancel account security password photo avatar"
  ].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(profileSearchNeedle));
  const profileNotificationsMatch = !profileSearchNeedle || [
    "email notifications receive account and booking activity notifications by email notification toggle preferences access"
  ].some((value) => String(value || "").toLowerCase().includes(profileSearchNeedle));
  const hasProfileSearchResults = profileOverviewMatches || profileActionsMatch || profileNotificationsMatch;
  const settingsSearchSections = useMemo(() => {
    const sections = [
      {
        id: "access",
        label: "Access",
        keywords: "access email notifications booking activity updates account emails notification preferences"
      },
      {
        id: "downloads",
        label: "Downloads",
        keywords: "downloads download preferences file quality format zip archive folder copy single files media delivery"
      },
      {
        id: "security",
        label: "Security",
        keywords: "security two factor authentication session management end other sessions active sessions current session device login protection"
      },
      {
        id: "account",
        label: "Account",
        keywords: "account control delete account permanent remove gallery data"
      }
    ];
    if (!settingsSearchNeedle) return sections;
    return sections.filter((section) => `${section.label} ${section.keywords}`.toLowerCase().includes(settingsSearchNeedle));
  }, [settingsSearchNeedle]);
  const visibleSettingsSectionIds = useMemo(
    () => new Set(settingsSearchSections.map((section) => section.id)),
    [settingsSearchSections]
  );
  const hasSettingsSearchResults = settingsSearchSections.length > 0;
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab !== "settings" || !settingsSearchNeedle || !settingsSearchSections.length) return;
    const firstMatch = settingsSearchSections[0]?.id || "";
    if (firstMatch && firstMatch !== userSettingsView) {
      setUserSettingsView(firstMatch);
    }
  }, [activeTab, settingsSearchNeedle, settingsSearchSections, userSettingsView]);
  const helpSearchNeedle = helpSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
  const filteredHelpFaqItems = useMemo(
    () => (helpSearchNeedle
      ? HELP_FAQ_ITEMS.filter((item) => `${item.question} ${item.answer}`.toLowerCase().includes(helpSearchNeedle))
      : HELP_FAQ_ITEMS),
    [helpSearchNeedle]
  );
  const filteredHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (helpSearchNeedle
      ? HELP_FAQ_LINKS.filter((item) => item.toLowerCase().includes(helpSearchNeedle))
      : HELP_FAQ_LINKS),
    [helpSearchNeedle]
  );
  const visibleHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (mobileHelpFaqExpanded || helpSearchNeedle ? filteredHelpFaqLinks : filteredHelpFaqLinks.slice(0, 6)),
    [filteredHelpFaqLinks, helpSearchNeedle, mobileHelpFaqExpanded]
  );
  const primaryHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (helpSearchNeedle ? visibleHelpFaqLinks : filteredHelpFaqLinks.slice(0, 6)),
    [filteredHelpFaqLinks, helpSearchNeedle, visibleHelpFaqLinks]
  );
  const extraHelpFaqLinks = useMemo(
    () => (helpSearchNeedle ? [] : filteredHelpFaqLinks.slice(6)),
    [filteredHelpFaqLinks, helpSearchNeedle]
  );
  const allHelpArticles = useMemo(() => buildAllHelpArticles(), []);
  const helpSearchResults = useMemo(() => {
    if (!helpSearchNeedle) return [];
    return allHelpArticles
      .filter((item) => `${item.title} ${item.description} ${(item.steps || []).join(" ")}`.toLowerCase().includes(helpSearchNeedle))
      .slice(0, 8);
  }, [allHelpArticles, helpSearchNeedle]);

  function handleHelpSearchResultSelect(result) {
    if (!result) return;
    navigate(`/help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(result.title)}`, {
      state: { returnTo: "/dashboard?tab=help" }
    });
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const requestedTab = String(params.get("tab") || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const requestedThread = String(params.get("thread") || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (requestedTab && USER_TAB_IDS.has(requestedTab)) {
      setActiveTab((current) => (current === requestedTab ? current : requestedTab));
      didInitUserTabRef.current = true;

      if (requestedTab === "messages") {
        if (requestedThread === "admin") {
          openMessageThread(adminSupportThreadId || USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID);
        } else if (requestedThread === "ai") {
          openMessageThread(USER_AI_THREAD_ID);
        }
      }
      return;
    }

    if (!didInitUserTabRef.current && typeof window !== "undefined") {
      const storedTab = window.sessionStorage.getItem(USER_TAB_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (storedTab && USER_TAB_IDS.has(storedTab)) {
        setActiveTab((current) => (current === storedTab ? current : storedTab));
      }
      didInitUserTabRef.current = true;
    }
  }, [adminSupportThreadId, location.search]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(USER_TAB_STORAGE_KEY, activeTab);
  }, [activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const currentTab = params.get("tab");
    if (activeTab === "reservations") {
      if (currentTab) {
        params.delete("tab");
        const nextSearch = params.toString();
        navigate({ pathname: location.pathname, search: nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "" }, { replace: true });
      }
      return;
    }
    if (currentTab === activeTab) return;
    params.set("tab", activeTab);
    navigate({ pathname: location.pathname, search: `?${params.toString()}` }, { replace: true });
  }, [activeTab, location.pathname, location.search, navigate]);

  useEffect(() => {
    paymentsByReservationIdRef.current = paymentsByReservationId;
  }, [paymentsByReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadPayments = async () => {
      if (!paymentCandidateIds.length) {
        setPaymentsByReservationId({});
        return;
      }
      const requestVersion = paymentsRequestVersionRef.current + 1;
      paymentsRequestVersionRef.current = requestVersion;
      const entries = await Promise.all(
        paymentCandidateIds.map(async (reservationId) => {
          try {
            const response = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${reservationId}`);
            return { reservationId, payment: response?.data?.payment || null, ok: true };
          } catch (_error) {
            return { reservationId, payment: null, ok: false };
          }
        })
      );
      if (paymentsRequestVersionRef.current !== requestVersion) return;
      setPaymentsByReservationId((current) => {
        const next = {};
        paymentCandidateIds.forEach((reservationId) => {
          const result = entries.find((entry) => entry?.reservationId === reservationId);
          if (!result) {
            next[reservationId] = current[reservationId] || null;
            return;
          }
          if (result.ok) {
            next[reservationId] = result.payment;
            return;
          }
          next[reservationId] = current[reservationId] || null;
        });
        return next;
      });
    };
    loadPayments();
  }, [paymentCandidateIds]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activePaymentReservationId) {
      setActivePayment(null);
      return;
    }
    setActivePayment(paymentsByReservationId[String(activePaymentReservationId)] || null);
  }, [activePaymentReservationId, paymentsByReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setRefundModalOpen(false);
    setReceiptModal({ open: false, html: "" });
    setProofModal({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment" });
    setProofFullscreen(false);
  }, [activePaymentReservationId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activeArchiveFolderName) return;
    const exists = normalizedFolders.some((folder) => folder.name === activeArchiveFolderName);
    if (!exists) {
      setActiveArchiveFolderName(null);
      setSelectedPhotos([]);
    }
  }, [activeArchiveFolderName, normalizedFolders]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSelectedPhotos((current) =>
      current.filter((key) => String(key).startsWith(`${currentFolder?.name || "__none__"}::`))
    );
  }, [currentFolder?.name]);

  const greetingText = useMemo(() => getTimeGreeting(), []);
  const currentSessionMeta = useMemo(() => {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return "Current browser session";
    const platform = window.navigator?.platform || "Desktop";
    return settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt
      ? `${platform} - Current session only`
      : `${platform} - Active now`;
  }, [settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt]);
  const lastExportRequestedLabel = useMemo(
    () => settingsPreferences.lastExportRequestedAt ? formatDateLabel(settingsPreferences.lastExportRequestedAt) : "",
    [settingsPreferences.lastExportRequestedAt]
  );
  const visibleNotifications = useMemo(
    () => userNotifications.filter((item) => {
      const key = String(item?.key || "");
      return !item?.dismissed && !dismissedNotificationIds.includes(key);
    }),
    [dismissedNotificationIds, userNotifications]
  );
  const unreadNotificationCount = useMemo(
    () => visibleNotifications.filter((item) => {
      const key = String(item?.key || "");
      return !item?.read && !readNotificationIds.includes(key);
    }).length,
    [readNotificationIds, visibleNotifications]
  );
  const sortedNotifications = useMemo(
    () => [...visibleNotifications].sort((a, b) => new Date(b?.createdAt || 0) - new Date(a?.createdAt || 0)),
    [visibleNotifications]
  );
  const notificationItems = useMemo(() => (
    sortedNotifications.map((item) => {
      const key = String(item?.key || "");
      const [, reservationId = ""] = key.split("-");
      const detailReservationItem = reservations.find((reservation) => {
        const candidates = [
          String(reservation?._id || "").trim(),
          String(reservation?.id || "").trim(),
          String(reservation?.reservationCode || "").trim()
        ].filter(Boolean);
        return candidates.includes(String(reservationId || "").trim());
      }) || null;
      let title = "Account update";
      const isRead = item?.read === true || readNotificationIds.includes(key);
      let tone = isRead ? "slate" : "blue";
      let icon = "fa-solid fa-bell";
      let onClick = () => {
        markNotificationRead(item.key);
        setNotifOpen(false);
      };

      if (key.startsWith("approved-")) {
        title = "Booking approved";
        tone = "green";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-calendar-check";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          setActiveTab("progress");
        };
      } else if (key.startsWith("rejected-")) {
        title = "Booking rejected";
        tone = "amber";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-calendar-check";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          setActiveTab("history");
        };
      } else if (key.startsWith("quoted-")) {
        title = "Quote ready";
        tone = "blue";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-wallet";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          if (reservationId) setActivePaymentReservationId(reservationId);
          setActiveTab("payments");
        };
      } else if (key.startsWith("paynow-")) {
        title = "Payment needed";
        tone = "amber";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-wallet";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          if (reservationId) setActivePaymentReservationId(reservationId);
          setActiveTab("payments");
        };
      } else if (key.startsWith("paid-")) {
        title = "Payment verified";
        tone = "green";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-wallet";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          setActiveTab("progress");
        };
      } else if (key.startsWith("refunded-")) {
        title = "Payment refunded";
        tone = "amber";
        icon = "fa-solid fa-rotate-left";
        onClick = () => {
          markNotificationRead(item.key);
          setNotifOpen(false);
          if (reservationId) setActivePaymentReservationId(reservationId);
          setActiveTab("payments");
        };
      }

      return {
        id: item.key,
        title,
        detail: detailReservationItem
          ? `${detailReservationItem.eventType || detailReservationItem.packageName || "Reservation"} - ${String(item.message || "").trim()}`
          : String(item.message || "").trim(),
        tone,
        icon,
        createdAt: item?.createdAt,
        ageLabel: formatNotificationAge(item?.createdAt),
        onClick,
        onDelete: () => deleteNotification(item.key)
      };
    })
  ), [deleteNotification, readNotificationIds, reservations, sortedNotifications]);
  const notificationSectionLabel = useMemo(() => getNotificationSectionLabel(notificationItems), [notificationItems]);
  const visibleNotificationItems = notificationItems;
  const notificationSections = useMemo(
    () => visibleNotificationItems.length ? [{ id: "recent", label: notificationSectionLabel, items: visibleNotificationItems }] : [],
    [notificationSectionLabel, visibleNotificationItems]
  );
  const profileRoleLabel = useMemo(() => {
    const rawRole = String(user?.role || "client").replace(/[-_]+/g, " ").trim();
    if (!rawRole) return "Client";
    return rawRole.replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
  }, [user?.role]);

  const desktopSidebarHoverClasses = desktopSidebarCollapseLock ? {
    aside: "",
    brandCard: "",
    brandText: "",
    navButton: "",
    navActive: "",
    navHover: "",
    navLabel: "",
    footerButton: "",
    footerLabel: ""
  } : {
    aside: "lg:hover:w-72",
    brandCard: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-h-24 lg:group-hover/sidebar:border-white/10 lg:group-hover/sidebar:bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-3 lg:group-hover/sidebar:py-3 lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100 lg:group-hover/sidebar:shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)]",
    brandText: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[160px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100",
    navButton: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:h-auto lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:self-auto lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-4",
    navActive: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:bg-white/12",
    navHover: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:hover:bg-white/10",
    navLabel: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[180px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100",
    footerButton: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:h-auto lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:self-auto lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-4 lg:group-hover/sidebar:hover:bg-white/8",
    footerLabel: "lg:group-hover/sidebar:max-w-[140px] lg:group-hover/sidebar:opacity-100"
  };

  function handleDesktopTabClick(tabId) {
    const nextTab = tabId === "profile" ? "settings" : tabId;
    setActiveTab(nextTab);
    setNotifOpen(false);
    setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
    setDesktopSidebarExpanded(false);
    if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.innerWidth >= 1024) {
      setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock(true);
    }
  }

  function handleAvatarMenuSelect(action) {
    setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
    if (action === "sign-out") {
      setLogoutModalOpen(true);
      return;
    }
    if (action === "profile-settings") {
      setActiveTab("profile");
      return;
    }
    if (action === "help") {
      setActiveTab("help");
      return;
    }
    setActiveTab("settings");
  }

  function renderMobileAvatarMenu() {
    if (!avatarMenuOpen) return null;

    return (
      <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[170] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl">
        <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("profile-settings")}
          className="relative flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all duration-200 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
        >
          <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
            {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
              <SafeAvatar
                src={user?.avatarUrl}
                fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
              />
            ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
          </div>
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || "SnapQueue User"}</p>
            <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Client Access</p>
          </div>
        </button>
        <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
          <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("system-settings")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
            <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
              <i className="fa-solid fa-sliders text-[13px]" />
            </span>
            <span>System Settings</span>
          </button>
          <button type="button" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("help")} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white">
            <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
              <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px]" />
            </span>
            <span>Help</span>
          </button>
          <div className="my-1 border-t border-white/10" />
          <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={() => handleAvatarMenuSelect("sign-out")}>
            <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
              <Icon name="log-out" className="h-4 w-4" />
            </span>
            <span>Sign Out</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  function renderDesktopNotificationDropdown() {
    if (!notifOpen) return null;

    return (
      <div
        id="user-notif-panel-desktop"
        data-user-notif-panel-desktop="true"
        className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.9rem)] z-[180] hidden w-[25rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.6rem] border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.96))] shadow-[0_28px_70px_rgba(2,8,23,0.42)] backdrop-blur-xl lg:block"
      >
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 px-4 py-4">
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">Notifications</h3>
          </div>
          <button type="button" onClick={markAllNotificationsRead} className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:text-white">Mark all read</button>
        </div>
        <div className="max-h-[26rem] space-y-5 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-3">
          {notificationSections.length ? notificationSections.map((section) => (
            <section key={section.id}>
              <h4 className="mb-3 px-1 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white">{section.label}</h4>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {section.items.map((item) => (
                  <div key={item.id} className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-3 transition-all hover:border-white/14 hover:bg-white/[0.06]">
                    <button type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-start gap-2.5 text-left">
                      <span className={cx(
                        "mt-0.5 flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border text-sm",
                        item.tone === "amber" && "border-amber-400/40 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-200",
                        item.tone === "green" && "border-emerald-400/40 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-200",
                        item.tone === "blue" && "border-sky-400/40 bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-200",
                        item.tone === "slate" && "border-slate-400/30 bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-300"
                      )}>
                        <i className={item.icon} />
                      </span>
                      <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                        <span className="block text-sm font-bold leading-snug text-white">{item.title}</span>
                        <span className="mt-0.5 block text-xs leading-snug text-white/75">{item.detail}</span>
                      </span>
                    </button>
                    <span className="mt-0.5 flex shrink-0 items-start gap-2">
                      <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-white/45">{item.ageLabel}</span>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={item.onDelete}
                        className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white/45 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                        aria-label={`Delete ${item.title} notification`}
                        title="Delete notification"
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[10px]" />
                      </button>
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </section>
          )) : <p className="py-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300">No new notifications.</p>}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  function renderUserDesktopToolbar({
    searchValue,
    onSearchChange,
    searchPlaceholder,
    filterSlot = null,
    extraSlot = null,
    searchWidthClass = "sm:w-[18rem]"
  }) {
    return (
      <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
        <div className={cx("relative hidden w-full sm:block", searchWidthClass)}>
          <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
          <input
            value={searchValue}
            onChange={onSearchChange}
            type="text"
            placeholder={searchPlaceholder}
            className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
          />
        </div>
        {filterSlot}
        {extraSlot}
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => {
            setActiveTab("messages");
            setNotifOpen(false);
            setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
          }}
          className="relative flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
          title="Messages"
        >
          <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
          <span className={cx("absolute right-1 top-1 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
        </button>
        <div className="relative">
          <button
            id="user-notif-rail-button"
            data-user-notif-trigger-desktop="true"
            type="button"
            onClick={() => {
              setNotifOpen((current) => !current);
              setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
            }}
            className="relative flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
            title="Notifications"
          >
            <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
            <span className={cx("absolute right-1 top-1 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
          </button>
          {renderDesktopNotificationDropdown()}
        </div>
        <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => {
              setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current);
              setNotifOpen(false);
            }}
            className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
            title="Profile menu"
          >
            <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
              {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                !userAvatarFailed ? (
                  <SafeAvatar
                    src={user?.avatarUrl}
                    fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                    alt="User avatar"
                    className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                    fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                  />
                ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>
              ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
            </span>
            <span className="absolute bottom-[-3px] right-[-3px] z-10 flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-[9px] text-slate-700 shadow-[0_6px_16px_rgba(2,8,23,0.28)]">
              <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
            </span>
          </button>
          {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  function renderDashboardMobileNavbar() {
    return (
      <div className="sticky top-3 z-[130] min-h-[72px] w-full rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:hidden">
          <div className="relative flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
            className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
            aria-label="Open menu"
            title="Open menu"
          >
            <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
          </button>
          <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
            <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
            <input
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
              type="text"
              placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
              className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
            />
          </div>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => {
              setActiveTab("messages");
              setNotifOpen(false);
              setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
            }}
            className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
            title="Messages"
          >
            <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
            <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
          </button>
          <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
            <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
            <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
          </button>
          <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
              <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                  <SafeAvatar
                    src={user?.avatarUrl}
                    fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                    alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                    className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                    fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                  />
                ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
              </span>
              <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
              </span>
            </button>
            {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      );
    }

    function renderProfileMobileNavbar() {
      return (
        <div className="fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] mb-3 rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:hidden">
          <div className="relative mb-2 flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
              className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
              aria-label="Open menu"
              title="Open menu"
            >
              <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
            </button>
            <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
              <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
              <input
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                type="text"
                placeholder={SEARCH_PLACEHOLDERS.history}
                className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
              />
            </div>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => {
                setActiveTab("messages");
                setNotifOpen(false);
                setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
              }}
              className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
              title="Messages"
            >
              <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
              <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
            </button>
            <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
              <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
              <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
            </button>
            <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                  {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                    <SafeAvatar
                      src={user?.avatarUrl}
                      fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                      alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                      className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                      fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                    />
                  ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                </span>
                <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                  <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                </span>
              </button>
              {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }

  async function handleSendUserMessage() {
    const text = String(messageComposerText || "").trim();
    if (!text || messageSending) return;

    if (String(selectedMessageThread?.threadType || "") === "ai") {
      const userMessage = {
        _id: `ai-user-${Date.now()}`,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        senderRole: "user",
        senderName: user?.fullName || "You",
        text
      };
      setMessageComposerText("");
      setMessageSending(true);
      setAiMessages((current) => [...current, userMessage]);
      try {
        const response = await api.post("/chatbot/ai", { question: text });
        const answerText = String(response?.data?.answer || "I couldn't generate a reply right now.").trim();
        const answerProvider = String(response?.data?.provider || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        setAiMessages((current) => [
          ...current,
          {
            _id: `ai-assistant-${Date.now()}`,
            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            senderRole: "assistant",
            senderName: "AI Assistant",
            text: answerText,
            provider: answerProvider
          }
        ]);
      } catch (error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to contact AI assistant." });
      } finally {
        setMessageSending(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    setMessageSending(true);
    try {
      const threadId = await ensureAdminSupportThread();
      if (!threadId) throw new Error("Admin support thread is unavailable.");
      setSelectedMessageThreadId(threadId);
      setMessageComposerText("");
      await api.post(`/chatbot/live/threads/${encodeURIComponent(threadId)}/messages`, { text });
      await Promise.allSettled([
        loadAdminSupportMessages(threadId, { silent: true }),
        loadMessageThreads({ silent: true })
      ]);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to send message." });
    } finally {
      setMessageSending(false);
    }
  }

  function renderMessages() {
    const showSidebar = messagePanelHidden || !selectedMessageThread;
    const showPanel = Boolean(selectedMessageThread) && !messagePanelHidden;

    return (
      <section id="messages" className={cx("m-0 flex h-screen min-h-0 w-full flex-1 overflow-hidden p-0 lg:h-[100dvh]", activeTab !== "messages" && "hidden")}>
        <div className="grid h-full min-h-0 w-full grid-cols-1 gap-0 lg:grid-cols-[320px_minmax(0,1fr)] xl:grid-cols-[340px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
          <div className={cx("min-h-0", showSidebar && "message-mobile-inbox-enter xl:animate-none", !showSidebar && "hidden lg:block")}>
            <ChatSidebar
                threads={filteredMessageThreads}
                clientResults={[]}
                selectedThreadId={selectedMessageThreadId}
                onSelectThread={openMessageThread}
                onStartThread={undefined}
                threadProfile={(thread) => {
                  if (String(thread?.threadType || "") === "ai") {
                    return AI_ASSISTANT_PROFILE;
                  }
                  return ADMIN_SUPPORT_PROFILE;
                }}
                searchValue={messageSearchQuery}
                onSearchChange={setMessageSearchQuery}
                loading={messageThreadsLoading}
                error={messageThreadsError}
                onRetry={() => loadMessageThreads().catch(() => {})}
              panelHidden={messagePanelHidden}
              onShowPanel={() => setMessagePanelHidden(false)}
              onBack={() => setActiveTab(messageReturnTabRef.current || "reservations")}
            />
          </div>
          <div className={cx("min-h-0 overflow-hidden sm:border-y sm:border-slate-200 xl:border-l xl:border-y-0", showPanel && "message-mobile-panel-enter xl:animate-none", !showPanel && "hidden")}>
              <div className="flex h-full min-h-0 w-full min-w-0 flex-col">
                <ChatHeader
                  thread={selectedMessageThread}
                  profile={selectedMessageProfile}
                  online={selectedMessageOnline}
                  deleting={String(selectedMessageThread?.threadType || "") !== "ai"}
                  onDelete={() => {
                      if (String(selectedMessageThread?.threadType || "") === "ai") {
                        setAiMessages([]);
                        return;
                      }
                    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Admin support conversations cannot be deleted by users." });
                  }}
                  onHide={() => setMessagePanelHidden(true)}
                  onBack={() => {
                    if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.innerWidth < 1280) {
                      setMessagePanelHidden(true);
                      return;
                    }
                    setActiveTab(messageReturnTabRef.current || "reservations");
                  }}
                  onProfileClick={() => {}}
                  showBackButton
                />
              <MessageList
                thread={selectedMessageThread}
                messages={selectedMessageItems}
                loading={messageLoading}
                error={messageError}
                profile={selectedMessageProfile}
                onRetry={() => {
                  if (String(selectedMessageThread?.threadType || "") === "ai") return;
                  loadAdminSupportMessages(adminSupportThreadId).catch(() => {});
                }}
                viewerRole="user"
              />
              <ChatComposer
                value={messageComposerText}
                onChange={setMessageComposerText}
                onSend={handleSendUserMessage}
                disabled={!selectedMessageThread}
                sending={messageSending}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
            {!showPanel ? (
              <div className="hidden h-full min-h-0 items-center justify-center border-y border-slate-200 sm:flex xl:border-l xl:border-y-0">
                <div className="max-w-md px-6 text-center">
                  <div className="mx-auto flex h-20 w-20 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)]">
                    <i className="fa-regular fa-comments text-3xl" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="mt-6 text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-white">Open a Conversation</h3>
                <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed text-white/80">
                  Choose AI Assistant for instant answers or Admin Support to chat directly with the team.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </div>
            </section>
    );
  }

  async function refreshPaymentState(reservationId = activePaymentReservationId) {
    if (!reservationId) return;
    try {
      const response = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${reservationId}`);
      const nextPayment = response?.data?.payment || null;
      setActivePayment(nextPayment);
      setPaymentsByReservationId((current) => ({
        ...current,
        [String(reservationId)]: nextPayment
      }));
    } catch (_error) {
      const currentPayment = paymentsByReservationIdRef.current[String(reservationId)] || null;
      if (String(activePaymentReservationId) === String(reservationId)) {
        setActivePayment(currentPayment);
      }
    }
  }

  function setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment = null) {
    const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
    setActivePaymentReservationId(reservationId);
    setActivePayment(payment);
  }

  async function reloadDashboardData() {
    const reservationResponse = await api.get("/reservations/dashboard").catch(() => api.get("/reservations"));
    const archiveResponse = await api.get("/archive/me").catch(() => ({ data: { folders: [] } }));
    const nextReservations = reservationResponse?.data?.reservations || reservationResponse?.data?.items || [];
    const nextFolders = archiveResponse?.data?.folders || archiveResponse?.data?.items || [];
    setReservations(nextReservations);
    setArchiveFolders(nextFolders);
    if (user) {
      const storedNotifications = loadStoredNotifications(user);
      const storedReadIds = loadReadUserNotifications(user);
      const storedDismissedIds = loadDismissedUserNotifications(user);
      const syncedNotifications = syncNotificationsFromReservations(storedNotifications, nextReservations, {
        readIds: storedReadIds,
        dismissedIds: storedDismissedIds
      });
      const nextReadIds = Array.from(new Set([
        ...storedReadIds,
        ...getNotificationFlagIds(syncedNotifications, "read")
      ]));
      const nextDismissedIds = Array.from(new Set([
        ...storedDismissedIds,
        ...getNotificationFlagIds(syncedNotifications, "dismissed")
      ]));
      setUserNotifications(syncedNotifications);
      setReadNotificationIds(nextReadIds);
      setDismissedNotificationIds(nextDismissedIds);
      saveReadUserNotifications(user, nextReadIds);
      saveDismissedUserNotifications(user, nextDismissedIds);
      saveStoredNotifications(user, syncedNotifications);
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) return undefined;

    const refreshDashboard = () => {
      if (document.visibilityState === "visible") {
        reloadDashboardData().catch(() => {});
      }
    };

    const intervalId = window.setInterval(refreshDashboard, 15000);
    window.addEventListener("focus", refreshDashboard);
    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", refreshDashboard);

    return () => {
      window.clearInterval(intervalId);
      window.removeEventListener("focus", refreshDashboard);
      document.removeEventListener("visibilitychange", refreshDashboard);
    };
  }, [user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab === "history") {
      setHistoryPage(1);
    }
  }, [searchQuery, activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab === "payments") {
      setPaymentPage(1);
    }
  }, [paymentSearchQuery, activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setHistoryPage(1);
  }, [historyFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setPaymentPage(1);
  }, [paymentFilter]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (historyPage > historyTotalPages) {
      setHistoryPage(historyTotalPages);
    }
  }, [historyPage, historyTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (paymentPage > paymentTotalPages) {
      setPaymentPage(paymentTotalPages);
    }
  }, [paymentPage, paymentTotalPages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user || activeTab !== "photos") return;
    reloadDashboardData().catch(() => {});
  }, [activeTab, user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user || hasShownSetPasswordPromptRef.current || !userRequiresPasswordSetup) return;
    hasShownSetPasswordPromptRef.current = true;
    window.localStorage.setItem(GOOGLE_PASSWORD_SETUP_STORAGE_KEY, "true");
    navigate("/login?mode=set-password", { replace: true });
  }, [navigate, user, userRequiresPasswordSetup]);

  async function handleQuoteResponse(accept, reservationId = activePaymentReservationId) {
    if (!reservationId) return;
    try {
      if (accept) await api.post(`/reservations/${reservationId}/pricing/accept`);
      else await api.post(`/reservations/${reservationId}/pricing/reject`);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: accept ? "Quote accepted." : "Quote rejected." });
      await reloadDashboardData();
      await refreshPaymentState(reservationId);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to respond to quote." });
    }
  }

  async function handleSaveEmailNotifications(enabled) {
    setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, emailNotificationsEnabled: enabled }));
    try {
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", { emailNotificationsEnabled: enabled });
      const persisted = response?.data?.user?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false;
      setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, emailNotificationsEnabled: persisted }));
      setUser((current) => current ? { ...current, emailNotificationsEnabled: persisted } : current);
      if (user) {
        window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify({
          fullName: user.fullName || "",
          email: user.email || "",
          phone: user.phone || "",
          bio: user.bio || "",
          avatarUrl: user.avatarUrl || "",
          googleAvatarUrl: user.googleAvatarUrl || "",
          createdAt: user.createdAt || "",
          emailNotificationsEnabled: persisted
        }));
      }
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: `Email notifications ${persisted ? "enabled" : "disabled"}.` });
    } catch (error) {
      setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, emailNotificationsEnabled: !enabled }));
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to save email settings." });
    }
  }

  async function handleChangePassword() {
    setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, error: "" }));
    const passwordContext = {
      fullName: user?.fullName || profileDraft.fullName || "",
      email: user?.email || profileDraft.email || ""
    };
    const requiresCurrentPassword = !userRequiresPasswordSetup;
    const nextErrors = {
      currentPassword: requiresCurrentPassword ? (passwordForm.currentPassword ? "" : "Current password is required.") : "",
      ...validatePasswordForm(passwordForm),
      newPassword: passwordForm.newPassword ? (isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, passwordContext) ? "" : "Use at least 8 characters with lowercase, number, special character, and no spaces.") : "New password is required.",
      confirmPassword: passwordForm.confirmPassword === passwordForm.newPassword && passwordForm.confirmPassword ? "" : "New password and confirmation do not match."
    };
    setPasswordErrors(nextErrors);
    const firstErrorField = nextErrors.currentPassword ? "currentPassword" : nextErrors.newPassword ? "newPassword" : nextErrors.confirmPassword ? "confirmPassword" : "";
    if (firstErrorField) {
      setPasswordShakeField(firstErrorField);
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === firstErrorField ? "" : current)), 420);
    }
    if ((requiresCurrentPassword && !passwordForm.currentPassword) || !passwordForm.newPassword || !passwordForm.confirmPassword) {
      ignoreFeedback({
        variant: "error",
        message: requiresCurrentPassword
          ? "All password fields are required."
          : "New password and confirmation are required."
      });
      return;
    }
    if (requiresCurrentPassword) {
      try {
        await api.post("/users/me/password/verify-current", { currentPassword: passwordForm.currentPassword }, { timeout: 30000 });
      } catch (error) {
        const message = error?.response?.data?.message || "Current password is incorrect.";
        setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: message }));
        setPasswordShakeField("currentPassword");
        window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "currentPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message });
        return;
      }
    }
    if (!isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, passwordContext)) {
      setPasswordShakeField("newPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "newPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Use at least 8 characters with lowercase, number, special character, and no spaces." });
      return;
    }
    if (requiresCurrentPassword && String(passwordForm.newPassword) === String(passwordForm.currentPassword)) {
      setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: "New password must be different from current password." }));
      setPasswordShakeField("newPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "newPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "New password must be different from current password." });
      return;
    }
    if (passwordForm.newPassword !== passwordForm.confirmPassword) {
      setPasswordShakeField("confirmPassword");
      window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "confirmPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "New password and confirmation do not match." });
      return;
    }
    try {
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, sending: true, error: "" }));
      const response = await api.post("/users/me/password/request-otp", passwordForm, { timeout: 30000 });
      setPasswordOtpState({
        step: "otp",
        challengeId: String(response?.data?.challengeId || ""),
        code: "",
        delivery: String(response?.data?.delivery || ""),
        email: String(response?.data?.email || ""),
        expiresInSeconds: Number(response?.data?.expiresInSeconds || 0),
        devCode: String(response?.data?.devCode || ""),
        error: "",
        sending: false,
        verifying: false
      });
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: response?.data?.message || "Verification code sent." });
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to update password.";
      if (error?.response?.status === 401) {
        setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: "Current password is incorrect." }));
        setPasswordShakeField("currentPassword");
        window.setTimeout(() => setPasswordShakeField((current) => (current === "currentPassword" ? "" : current)), 420);
      }
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, sending: false, error: message }));
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message });
    }
  }

  async function handleVerifyPasswordOtp() {
    const code = String(passwordOtpState.code || "").trim();
    if (!passwordOtpState.challengeId || !code) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Enter the verification code sent to your email." });
      return;
    }
    try {
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, verifying: true, error: "" }));
      const response = await api.post("/users/me/password/verify-otp", {
        challengeId: passwordOtpState.challengeId,
        code
      }, { timeout: 30000 });
      const nextToken = String(response?.data?.token || "").trim();
      if (nextToken) {
        window.localStorage.setItem("token", nextToken);
      }
      const nextUser = response?.data?.user || null;
      if (nextUser) {
        setUser(nextUser);
      }
      resetPasswordChangeFlow();
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: response?.data?.message || "Password updated successfully!" });
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to verify password change code.";
      setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, verifying: false, error: message }));
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message });
    }
  }

  async function handleDeleteAccount() {
    setDeleteAccountPending(true);
    try {
      await api.delete("/users/me");
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to delete account." });
    } finally {
      setDeleteAccountPending(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSaveProfile() {
    const fullName = profileDraft.fullName.trim();
    const email = profileDraft.email.trim().toLowerCase();
    const phone = sanitizePhoneInput(profileDraft.phone);
    const bio = profileDraft.bio.trim();
    const nextErrors = {
      fullName: fullName.length < 2 ? "Please enter a valid full name." : "",
      email: !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email) ? "Please enter a valid email address." : "",
      phone: isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(phone) ? "" : PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE,
      bio: ""
    };
    setProfileErrors(nextErrors);
    if (fullName.length < 2) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please enter a valid full name." });
      return;
    }
    if (!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please enter a valid email address." });
      return;
    }
    if (!isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(phone)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE });
      return;
    }
    try {
      setProfileSaving(true);
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", {
        fullName,
        email,
        phone,
        bio,
        avatarUrl: profileDraft.avatarUrl,
        emailNotificationsEnabled: profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled
      });
      const nextUser = response?.data?.user || { ...user, fullName, email, phone, bio, avatarUrl: profileDraft.avatarUrl, emailNotificationsEnabled: profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled };
      setUser(nextUser);
      setProfileDraft({
        fullName: nextUser.fullName || "",
        email: nextUser.email || "",
        phone: nextUser.phone || "",
        bio: nextUser.bio || "",
        avatarUrl: nextUser.avatarUrl || "",
        emailNotificationsEnabled: nextUser.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false
      });
      window.localStorage.setItem("bcp_profile", JSON.stringify({
        fullName: nextUser.fullName || "",
        email: nextUser.email || "",
        phone: nextUser.phone || "",
        bio: nextUser.bio || "",
        avatarUrl: nextUser.avatarUrl || "",
        googleAvatarUrl: nextUser.googleAvatarUrl || "",
        createdAt: nextUser.createdAt || "",
        emailNotificationsEnabled: nextUser.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false
      }));
      setProfileEditing(false);
      setProfileErrors({});
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Your profile has been saved successfully." });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to save profile." });
    } finally {
      setProfileSaving(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleProfileAvatarUpload(file) {
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      const avatarUrl = await readFileAsDataUrl(file);
      setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl }));
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.message || "Failed to load image." });
    }
  }

  function resetProfileDraft() {
    setProfileDraft({
      fullName: user?.fullName || "",
      email: user?.email || "",
      phone: user?.phone || "",
      bio: user?.bio || "Photography enthusiast and frequent event organizer.",
      avatarUrl: user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl || "",
      emailNotificationsEnabled: user?.emailNotificationsEnabled !== false
    });
    setProfileErrors({});
  }

  function markNotificationRead(key) {
    const normalizedKey = String(key || "");
    if (!normalizedKey) return;
    const nextIds = Array.from(new Set([...readNotificationIds, normalizedKey]));
    setReadNotificationIds(nextIds);
    const nextNotifications = userNotifications.map((item) => (
      String(item?.key || "") === normalizedKey ? { ...item, read: true } : item
    ));
    setUserNotifications(nextNotifications);
    if (user) {
      saveReadUserNotifications(user, nextIds);
      saveStoredNotifications(user, nextNotifications);
    }
  }

  function deleteNotification(key) {
    const normalizedKey = String(key || "");
    if (!normalizedKey) return;
    const nextDismissedIds = Array.from(new Set([...dismissedNotificationIds, normalizedKey]));
    const nextReadIds = Array.from(new Set([...readNotificationIds, normalizedKey]));
    const nextNotifications = userNotifications
      .map((item) => (
        String(item?.key || "") === normalizedKey ? { ...item, read: true, dismissed: true } : item
      ))
      .filter((item) => String(item?.key || "") !== normalizedKey);
    setUserNotifications(nextNotifications);
    setDismissedNotificationIds(nextDismissedIds);
    setReadNotificationIds(nextReadIds);
    if (user) {
      saveDismissedUserNotifications(user, nextDismissedIds);
      saveReadUserNotifications(user, nextReadIds);
      saveStoredNotifications(user, nextNotifications);
    }
  }

  function markAllNotificationsRead() {
    const nextIds = Array.from(new Set([
      ...readNotificationIds,
      ...visibleNotifications.map((item) => String(item?.key || "")).filter(Boolean)
    ]));
    const visibleKeys = new Set(visibleNotifications.map((item) => String(item?.key || "")).filter(Boolean));
    const nextNotifications = userNotifications.map((item) => (
      visibleKeys.has(String(item?.key || "")) ? { ...item, read: true } : item
    ));
    setReadNotificationIds(nextIds);
    setUserNotifications(nextNotifications);
    if (user) {
      saveReadUserNotifications(user, nextIds);
      saveStoredNotifications(user, nextNotifications);
    }
  }

  function validateRefundForm(values = refundForm) {
    return {
      reason: values.reason ? (values.reason.trim().length >= 8 ? "" : "Please provide a clear refund reason.") : "",
      payoutNumber: values.payoutNumber ? (/^\d{10,13}$/.test(values.payoutNumber.trim()) ? "" : "Refund payout number must be 10-13 digits.") : ""
    };
  }

  function validatePasswordForm(values = passwordForm) {
    const passwordContext = {
      fullName: user?.fullName || profileDraft.fullName || "",
      email: user?.email || profileDraft.email || ""
    };
    const requiresCurrentPassword = !userRequiresPasswordSetup;
    return {
      currentPassword: requiresCurrentPassword && values.currentPassword ? "" : "",
      newPassword: values.newPassword
        ? !isStrongPassword(values.newPassword, passwordContext)
          ? "Use at least 8 characters with lowercase, number, special character, and no spaces."
          : requiresCurrentPassword && values.currentPassword && String(values.newPassword) === String(values.currentPassword)
            ? "New password must be different from current password."
            : ""
        : "",
      confirmPassword: values.confirmPassword ? (values.confirmPassword === values.newPassword ? "" : "New password and confirmation do not match.") : ""
    };
  }

  function validateProfileForm(values = profileDraft) {
    return {
      fullName: values.fullName ? (values.fullName.trim().length >= 2 ? "" : "Please enter a valid full name.") : "",
      email: values.email ? (/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(values.email.trim().toLowerCase()) ? "" : "Please enter a valid email address.") : "",
      phone: values.phone ? (isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(values.phone.trim()) ? "" : PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE) : "Phone number is required.",
      bio: ""
    };
  }

  function updateRefundField(name, value) {
    const next = { ...refundForm, [name]: value };
    setRefundForm(next);
    setRefundErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateRefundForm(next) }));
  }

  function updatePasswordField(name, value) {
    const next = { ...passwordForm, [name]: value };
    setPasswordForm(next);
    setPasswordErrors((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: "", ...validatePasswordForm(next) }));
  }

  function resetPasswordChangeFlow({ keepOpen = false } = {}) {
    if (!keepOpen) setChangePasswordModalOpen(false);
    setPasswordForm({ currentPassword: "", newPassword: "", confirmPassword: "" });
    setPasswordErrors({});
    setPasswordOtpState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE);
    setPasswordVisibility({ currentPassword: false, newPassword: false, confirmPassword: false });
    setPasswordShakeField("");
  }

  function updateProfileField(name, value) {
    const next = { ...profileDraft, [name]: name === "phone" ? sanitizePhoneInput(value) : value };
    setProfileDraft(next);
    setProfileErrors((current) => ({ ...current, ...validateProfileForm(next) }));
  }

  function updateSettingsPreference(name, value, successMessage = "Settings updated.") {
    setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: value }));
    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: successMessage });
  }

  function handleRequestDataExport() {
    const requestedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, lastExportRequestedAt: requestedAt }));
    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Data export request recorded." });
  }

  async function handleEndOtherSessions() {
    if (endingOtherSessions || settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt) return;
    setEndingOtherSessions(true);
    try {
      await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 650));
      setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, endedOtherSessionsAt: new Date().toISOString() }));
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "All other sessions were signed out." });
    } finally {
      setEndingOtherSessions(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleToggleTwoFactor() {
    const nextValue = !settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled;
    setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: nextValue }));
    try {
      const response = await api.patch("/users/me", { twoFactorEnabled: nextValue });
      const persisted = response?.data?.user?.twoFactorEnabled === true;
      setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: persisted }));
      setUser((current) => current ? { ...current, twoFactorEnabled: persisted } : current);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: `Two-factor authentication ${persisted ? "enabled" : "disabled"}.` });
    } catch (error) {
      setSettingsPreferences((current) => ({ ...current, twoFactorEnabled: !nextValue }));
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Could not update two-factor authentication." });
    }
  }

  function openReservationDetails(reservation) {
    setDetailReservation(reservation);
  }

  async function handleRefundRequest() {
    if (!activePayment?._id) return;
    setRefundErrors({
      reason: refundForm.reason.trim().length < 8 ? "Please provide a clear refund reason." : "",
      payoutNumber: !/^\d{10,13}$/.test(refundForm.payoutNumber.trim()) ? "Refund payout number must be 10-13 digits." : ""
    });
    if (refundForm.reason.trim().length < 8) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please provide a clear refund reason." });
      return;
    }
    if (!["gcash", "maya"].includes(refundForm.payoutMethod)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Select GCash or Maya for refund payout." });
      return;
    }
    if (!/^\d{10,13}$/.test(refundForm.payoutNumber.trim())) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Refund payout number must be 10-13 digits." });
      return;
    }
    try {
      await api.post(`/payments/${activePayment._id}/refund/request`, {
        reason: refundForm.reason.trim(),
        payoutMethod: refundForm.payoutMethod,
        payoutNumber: refundForm.payoutNumber.trim()
      });
      setRefundModalOpen(false);
      setRefundForm({ reason: "", payoutMethod: "", payoutNumber: "" });
      setRefundErrors({});
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: activePayment?.refundStatus === "awaiting_payout_details" ? "Payout details submitted. Refund processing starts once admin reviews it." : "Refund request submitted." });
      await refreshPaymentState();
      await reloadDashboardData();
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to request refund." });
    }
  }

  function confirmLogout() {
    setLogoutPending(true);
    setLogoutModalOpen(false);
    setMobileOpen(false);
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
      navigate(loginRedirectPath, { replace: true });
    }, 250);
  }

  function openProofModal(src, title) {
    if (!src) return;
    setProofModal({ open: true, src, title });
    setProofFullscreen(false);
  }

  function viewProof(payment = activePayment) {
    if (payment?.proofUrl) {
      openProofModal(payment.proofUrl, "Proof of Payment");
      return;
    }
    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Proof of payment is not available yet." });
  }

  async function printReceipt(reservation = activePaymentReservation, payment = activePayment) {
    if (!reservation) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Receipt is not available yet." });
      return;
    }
    let resolvedPayment = payment;
    if (!resolvedPayment) {
      const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
      if (!reservationId) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Receipt is not available yet." });
        return;
      }
      try {
        const response = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${reservationId}`);
        resolvedPayment = response?.data?.payment || null;
        setPaymentsByReservationId((current) => ({
          ...current,
          [reservationId]: resolvedPayment
        }));
        if (String(activePaymentReservationId) === reservationId) {
          setActivePayment(resolvedPayment);
        }
      } catch (_error) {
        resolvedPayment = null;
      }
    }
    if (!resolvedPayment) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Receipt is not available yet." });
      return;
    }
    const paymentStatus = String(resolvedPayment.status || "").toLowerCase();
    const refundStatus = String(resolvedPayment.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
    if (!["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) && !["approved", "processed"].includes(refundStatus)) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Receipt is available after payment verification." });
      return;
    }
    const isRefundReceipt = ["approved", "processed"].includes(refundStatus) || paymentStatus === "refunded";
    const receiptHtml = isRefundReceipt
      ? buildRefundDetailsHtml(reservation, resolvedPayment)
      : buildReceiptHtml(reservation, resolvedPayment);
    const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation) || "record";
    try {
      if (isMobileReceiptViewport()) {
        await downloadReceiptPdfFromHtml(
