          receiptHtml,
          `snapqueue-${isRefundReceipt ? "refund-receipt" : "receipt"}-${reservationId}.pdf`
        );
        return;
      }
      printHtmlDocument(
        receiptHtml,
        () => ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Unable to print receipt." })
      );
    } catch (_error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: isMobileReceiptViewport() ? "Unable to download receipt." : "Unable to print receipt." });
    }
  }

  function printRefundDetails() {
    if (!activePaymentReservation || !activePayment) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Refund details are not available yet." });
      return;
    }
    if (!activePayment?.refundStatus || String(activePayment.refundStatus).toLowerCase() === "none") {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Refund details are not available yet." });
      return;
    }
    printHtmlDocument(
      buildRefundDetailsHtml(activePaymentReservation, activePayment),
      () => ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Unable to print refund details." })
    );
  }

  function handleReceiptPrint() {
    const frame = document.getElementById("receipt-preview-frame");
    const targetWindow = frame?.contentWindow;
    if (!targetWindow) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Unable to prepare receipt print." });
      return;
    }
    try {
      targetWindow.focus();
      targetWindow.print();
    } catch (_error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Unable to print receipt." });
    }
  }

  function togglePhoto(key) {
    setSelectedPhotos((current) => current.includes(key) ? current.filter((item) => item !== key) : [...current, key]);
  }

  function handlePhotoClick(event, key, photo) {
    if (event.detail === 2) {
      if (photoClickTimeoutRef.current) {
        window.clearTimeout(photoClickTimeoutRef.current);
        photoClickTimeoutRef.current = null;
      }
      setPreviewPhoto(photo);
      return;
    }

    if (photoClickTimeoutRef.current) {
      window.clearTimeout(photoClickTimeoutRef.current);
    }
    photoClickTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
      togglePhoto(key);
      photoClickTimeoutRef.current = null;
    }, 220);
  }

  function handlePhotoTouchEnd(key, photo) {
    const now = Date.now();
    const lastTap = lastPhotoTapRef.current;
    if (lastTap.key === key && now - lastTap.time < 320) {
      setPreviewPhoto(photo);
      lastPhotoTapRef.current = { key: "", time: 0 };
      return;
    }
    lastPhotoTapRef.current = { key, time: now };
  }

  function toggleAllPhotos() {
    const visibleKeys = visiblePhotoEntries.map(({ index }) => `${currentFolder?.name}::${index}`);
    if (!visibleKeys.length) return;
    const allSelected = visibleKeys.every((key) => selectedPhotoSet.has(key));
    setSelectedPhotos((current) => {
      if (allSelected) {
        return current.filter((key) => !visibleKeys.includes(key));
      }
      const merged = new Set([...current, ...visibleKeys]);
      return Array.from(merged);
    });
  }

  async function downloadSelected() {
    if (!selectedPhotos.length || !currentFolder) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please select the media you wish to download." });
      return;
    }
    const preferSingle = settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "single";
    const preferFolder = settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "folder";
    try {
      const selectedMedia = [];
      for (const [order, key] of selectedPhotos.entries()) {
        const index = Number(String(key).split("::")[1]);
        const photo = currentPhotos[index];
        if (!photo?.url) continue;
        const preferredName = buildPreferredDownloadName(currentFolder?.name, photo, settingsPreferences.downloadFormat, order);
        const response = await fetch(buildDownloadUrl(photo.url, settingsPreferences.downloadQuality, photo));
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Failed to download ${preferredName}.`);
        }
        const blob = await response.blob();
        selectedMedia.push({ blob, preferredName, photo });
      }

      if (settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "zip" || settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "folder") {
        const zip = new JSZip();
        const safeFolderName = getSafeArchiveFolderName(currentFolder?.name);
        const zipFolder = settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "folder" ? zip.folder(safeFolderName) : null;
        selectedMedia.forEach(({ blob, preferredName }) => {
          if (zipFolder) {
            zipFolder.file(preferredName, blob);
            return;
          }
          zip.file(preferredName, blob);
        });
        const zipBlob = await zip.generateAsync({ type: "blob" });
        const zipUrl = window.URL.createObjectURL(zipBlob);
        const anchor = document.createElement("a");
        anchor.href = zipUrl;
        anchor.download = settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === "folder"
          ? `${safeFolderName}.zip`
          : buildArchiveZipName(currentFolder?.name);
        document.body.appendChild(anchor);
        anchor.click();
        anchor.remove();
        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(zipUrl);
      } else {
        selectedMedia.forEach(({ blob, preferredName }) => {
          const objectUrl = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
          const anchor = document.createElement("a");
          anchor.href = objectUrl;
          anchor.download = preferredName;
          document.body.appendChild(anchor);
          anchor.click();
          anchor.remove();
          window.URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.message || "Failed to download selected media." });
      return;
    }
    const qualityLabel = settingsPreferences.downloadQuality === "web"
      ? "web quality"
      : settingsPreferences.downloadQuality === "high"
        ? "high quality"
        : "original quality";
    const formatLabel = preferFolder ? "folder-style filenames" : preferSingle ? "single files" : "ZIP-style download set";
    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: `Downloaded ${selectedPhotos.length} media file(s) in ${qualityLabel} using ${formatLabel}.` });
  }

  async function deleteSelected() {
    if (!selectedPhotos.length || !currentFolder) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please select the media you wish to delete." });
      return;
    }
    setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(true);
  }

  async function confirmDeleteSelected() {
    if (!selectedPhotos.length || !currentFolder) {
      setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please select the media you wish to delete." });
      return;
    }
    const files = selectedPhotos
      .map((key) => {
        const index = Number(String(key).split("::")[1]);
        const photo = currentPhotos[index];
        if (!photo?.url) return null;
        return {
          publicId: photo.publicId || "",
          url: photo.url
        };
      })
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (!files.length) {
      setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Selected media could not be resolved." });
      return;
    }

    try {
      setDeleteArchivePending(true);
      try {
        await api.post("/archive/me/files/delete", {
          folderName: currentFolder.name,
          files
        });
      } catch (error) {
        if (error?.response?.status !== 404) throw error;
        try {
          await api.post("/archive/me/files", {
            folderName: currentFolder.name,
            files
          });
        } catch (nestedError) {
          if (nestedError?.response?.status !== 404) throw nestedError;
          try {
            await api.post("/archive/me", {
              folderName: currentFolder.name,
              files
            });
          } catch (finalPostError) {
            if (finalPostError?.response?.status !== 404) throw finalPostError;
            await api.delete("/archive/me/files", {
              data: {
                folderName: currentFolder.name,
                files
              }
            });
          }
        }
      }
      setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(false);
      const removedUrls = new Set(files.map((item) => String(item?.url || "").trim()).filter(Boolean));
      const removedPublicIds = new Set(files.map((item) => String(item?.publicId || "").trim()).filter(Boolean));
      setArchiveFolders((current) => current.map((folder) => {
        if (String(folder?.name || "") !== String(currentFolder.name || "")) {
          return folder;
        }
        const nextPhotos = Array.isArray(folder?.photos)
          ? folder.photos.filter((photo) => {
            const photoUrl = String(photo?.url || "").trim();
            const photoPublicId = String(photo?.publicId || "").trim();
            if (photoPublicId && removedPublicIds.has(photoPublicId)) return false;
            if (photoUrl && removedUrls.has(photoUrl)) return false;
            return true;
          })
          : [];
        return { ...folder, photos: nextPhotos };
      }));
      setSelectedPhotos([]);
      setPreviewPhoto(null);
      reloadDashboardData().catch(() => {});
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: `Deleted ${files.length} media file(s).` });
    } catch (error) {
      setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(false);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to delete selected media." });
    } finally {
      setDeleteArchivePending(false);
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <PageLoadingScreen />;
  }

  return (
    <div className="admin-home-shell min-h-screen text-slate-700">
      {dbDown ? (
        <div className="sticky top-0 z-[120] w-full border-b border-rose-400/40 bg-rose-600 px-3 py-2 text-center text-[11px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[12px]">
          Database is temporarily unavailable. Some dashboard sections may not load yet.
        </div>
      ) : null}
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        .message-mobile-inbox-enter{animation:messageMobileInboxEnter 220ms ease-out;}
        .message-mobile-panel-enter{animation:messageMobilePanelEnter 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
        @keyframes messageMobileInboxEnter{
          from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-18px);}
          to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
        }
        @keyframes messageMobilePanelEnter{
          from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(26px) scale(0.985);}
          to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0) scale(1);}
        }
      `}</style>
      <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 overflow-hidden -z-10">
        <div className="absolute -top-24 -right-20 w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-blue-300/25 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute top-1/3 -left-20 w-80 h-80 rounded-full bg-cyan-200/25 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute -bottom-24 right-1/4 w-80 h-80 rounded-full bg-indigo-200/25 blur-3xl" />
      </div>

      <div className={`${refundModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[110] items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/65 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[22rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[460px] sm:rounded-[20px]">
          <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-3 py-2.5 text-white sm:px-3.5 sm:py-3">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
              <div>
                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-300 sm:text-[10px]">Refund Action</p>
                <h3 className="mt-1 text-[14px] font-black sm:text-[15px]">Request Refund</h3>
                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-300 sm:text-[11px]">
                  {activePaymentReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName || "Client"} {activePaymentReservation ? `• #${getDisplayReservationId(activePaymentReservation)}` : ""}
                </p>
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => { setRefundPayoutMenuOpen(false); setRefundModalOpen(false); }}
                className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="max-h-[50vh] space-y-2.5 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-2.5 sm:max-h-[70vh] sm:space-y-3 sm:px-3.5 sm:py-3">
            <div className="rounded-[0.9rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-500/10 px-2.5 py-2 sm:rounded-[0.95rem] sm:px-3 sm:py-2.5">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200 sm:text-[11px]">Current Status</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] font-semibold text-amber-50 sm:text-[13px]">
                Refund {String(activePayment?.refundStatus || "none").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}
              </p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-medium leading-relaxed text-amber-100/90 sm:text-[11px]">
                {String(activePayment?.refundStatus || "").toLowerCase() === "awaiting_payout_details"
                  ? "Submit your GCash or Maya payout details so the refund can be processed within 3-7 business days."
                  : "Submit your refund request and wait for admin review."}
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="rounded-[0.9rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-2.5 py-2.5 sm:rounded-[0.95rem] sm:px-3 sm:py-3">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200 sm:text-[11px]">Refund Details</p>
              <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-1 gap-x-3 gap-y-2 sm:mt-2.5 sm:grid-cols-2">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Reservation Amount</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[13px]">
                    {formatCurrency(activePayment?.amount || activePaymentReservation?.finalPrice, activePaymentReservation?.currency || "PHP")}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Payment Method</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[13px]">{String(activePayment?.method || "-").toUpperCase()}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Current Payout Method</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[13px]">{String(activePayment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase()}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Current Payout Number</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[12px] font-semibold text-white sm:text-[13px]">{activePayment?.refundPayoutNumber || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                {activePayment?.refundReason ? (
                  <div className="sm:col-span-2">
                    <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Current Refund Reason</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[12px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-white/90 sm:text-[13px]">{activePayment.refundReason}</p>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="mb-1.5 block text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:mb-2 sm:text-[10px]">Refund Reason</label>
              <textarea
                value={refundForm.reason}
                onChange={(event) => updateRefundField("reason", event.target.value)}
                rows="2"
                maxLength="500"
                placeholder="Please explain your refund request (min 8 characters)."
                className={cx(
                  "w-full resize-none rounded-[0.9rem] border px-3 py-2 text-[12px] font-semibold focus:outline-none sm:rounded-[0.95rem] sm:py-2.5 sm:text-[13px]",
                  refundErrors.reason
                    ? "field-shake border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-slate-700 placeholder:text-red-300"
                    : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300"
                )}
              />
              {refundForm.reason ? <p className={`mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold ${refundErrors.reason ? "text-rose-300" : "text-emerald-300"}`}>{refundErrors.reason || "Refund reason looks valid."}</p> : null}
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-3">
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1.5 block text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:mb-2 sm:text-[10px]">Refund Destination</label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setRefundPayoutMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                    className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-[0.9rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-3 py-2 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:rounded-[0.95rem] sm:py-2.5 sm:text-[13px]"
                  >
                    <span className={refundForm.payoutMethod ? "text-white" : "text-slate-400"}>
                      {refundForm.payoutMethod === "gcash" ? "GCash" : refundForm.payoutMethod === "maya" ? "Maya" : "Select method"}
                    </span>
                    <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${refundPayoutMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[11px] text-slate-300`} />
                  </button>
                  {refundPayoutMenuOpen ? (
                    <div className="absolute bottom-[calc(100%+0.4rem)] left-0 right-0 z-[140] overflow-hidden rounded-[0.9rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.35)]">
                      {[
                        { id: "gcash", label: "GCash" },
                        { id: "maya", label: "Maya" }
                      ].map((option) => (
                        <button
                          key={option.id}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            setRefundForm((current) => ({ ...current, payoutMethod: option.id }));
                            setRefundPayoutMenuOpen(false);
                          }}
                          className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[12px] font-semibold transition-colors sm:text-[13px] ${refundForm.payoutMethod === option.id ? "bg-white text-slate-900" : "text-white hover:bg-white/10"}`}
                        >
                          <span>{option.label}</span>
                          {refundForm.payoutMethod === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[11px]" /> : null}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1.5 block text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:mb-2 sm:text-[10px]">GCash / Maya Number</label>
                <input
                  value={refundForm.payoutNumber}
                  onChange={(event) => updateRefundField("payoutNumber", event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 13))}
                  type="text"
                  inputMode="numeric"
                  maxLength="13"
                  placeholder="e.g. 09XXXXXXXXX"
                  className={cx(
                    "w-full rounded-[0.9rem] border px-3 py-2 text-[12px] font-semibold focus:outline-none sm:rounded-[0.95rem] sm:py-2.5 sm:text-[13px]",
                    refundErrors.payoutNumber
                      ? "field-shake border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-slate-700 placeholder:text-red-300"
                      : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300"
                  )}
                />
                {refundForm.payoutNumber ? <p className={`mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold ${refundErrors.payoutNumber ? "text-rose-300" : "text-emerald-300"}`}>{refundErrors.payoutNumber || "Payout number looks valid."}</p> : null}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 border-t border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-2.5 sm:flex sm:flex-row sm:justify-end sm:px-3.5 sm:py-3">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => { setRefundPayoutMenuOpen(false); setRefundModalOpen(false); }}
              className="rounded-xl border border-red-200 bg-white px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase text-red-600 transition-colors hover:bg-red-50"
            >
              Cancel
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleRefundRequest}
              className="rounded-xl bg-amber-500 px-3.5 py-2.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase text-slate-950 transition-colors hover:bg-amber-400"
            >
              Submit
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${refundDetailsModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[112] items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/65 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[520px] overflow-hidden rounded-[20px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] shadow-2xl">
          <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-white">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
              <div>
                <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-300">Refund Details</p>
                <h3 className="mt-1 text-[15px] font-black">View Refund Details</h3>
                <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-300">
                  {activePaymentReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName || "Client"} {activePaymentReservation ? `• #${getDisplayReservationId(activePaymentReservation)}` : ""}
                </p>
                {["approved", "requested"].includes(String(activePayment?.refundStatus || "").toLowerCase()) ? (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-200">Refund processing SLA: 3-7 business days.</p>
                ) : null}
              </div>
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setRefundDetailsModalOpen(false)} className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20">
                <Icon name="x" className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="max-h-[70vh] space-y-3 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-3">
            <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-500/10 px-3 py-2.5">
              <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200">Current Status</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-amber-50">
                Refund {String(activePayment?.refundStatus || "none").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="rounded-[0.95rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-3">
              <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200">Refund Details</p>
              <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-x-3 gap-y-2 sm:grid-cols-2">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Requested By Client</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{activePaymentReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Requested At</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{activePayment?.refundRequestedAt ? formatDate(activePayment.refundRequestedAt) : "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Payout Method</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{String(activePayment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase()}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Payout Number</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{activePayment?.refundPayoutNumber || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="sm:col-span-2">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Client Refund Reason</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[13px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-white/90">{activePayment?.refundReason || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Refund Reference</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">{activePayment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Admin Note</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 break-words text-[13px] font-semibold text-white/90">{activePayment?.refundAdminNote || "-"}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              {activePayment?.refundProofUrl ? (
                <div className="mt-2.5">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400">Refund Proof</p>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => openProofModal(activePayment.refundProofUrl, "Proof of Refund")}
                    className="mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-white/12 bg-white/10 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 hover:text-white"
                  >
                    <Icon name="receipt" className="h-4 w-4" />
                    View Refund Proof
                  </button>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 border-t border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end">
            <button type="button" onClick={printRefundDetails} className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15">Print Refund Details</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setRefundDetailsModalOpen(false)} className="rounded-xl bg-amber-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-950 transition-colors hover:bg-amber-400">Close</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${changePasswordModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[260] items-center justify-center p-4`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-4 shadow-2xl sm:p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-base font-black text-white sm:text-lg">{userRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}</h3>
              <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">
                {passwordOtpState.step === "otp"
                  ? "Enter the OTP to confirm your password change."
                  : userRequiresPasswordSetup
                    ? "Create a secure password for your Google account."
                    : "Update your account security credentials."}
              </p>
            </div>
            {userRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => resetPasswordChangeFlow()}
                className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15"
                title="Close change password modal"
              >
                <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark" />
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          {passwordOtpState.step === "otp" ? (
            <div className="mt-5 space-y-4">
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-blue-400/20 bg-blue-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-200">
                <p className="font-semibold">We sent a verification code to {passwordOtpState.email || "your email"}.</p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-300">This code expires in about {Math.max(1, Math.round((passwordOtpState.expiresInSeconds || 0) / 60))} minutes.</p>
                {passwordOtpState.devCode ? <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-300">Dev code: {passwordOtpState.devCode}</p> : null}
              </div>
              {passwordOtpState.error ? (
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-rose-300/25 bg-rose-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-200">
                  {passwordOtpState.error}
                </div>
              ) : null}
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">OTP Code</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  inputMode="numeric"
                  maxLength={6}
                  value={passwordOtpState.code}
                  onChange={(event) => setPasswordOtpState((current) => ({ ...current, code: event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 6) }))}
                  className="w-full rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.25em] text-white focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none"
                  placeholder="000000"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                {userRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordOtpState(EMPTY_PASSWORD_OTP_STATE)} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Back</button>}
                <button type="button" onClick={handleChangePassword} disabled={passwordOtpState.sending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{passwordOtpState.sending ? "Resending..." : "Resend Code"}</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={handleVerifyPasswordOtp} disabled={passwordOtpState.verifying || !String(passwordOtpState.code || "").trim()} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-blue-300 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{passwordOtpState.verifying ? "Verifying..." : "Verify & Update"}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
              {passwordOtpState.error ? (
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-rose-300/25 bg-rose-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-200">
                  {passwordOtpState.error}
                </div>
              ) : null}
              {!userRequiresPasswordSetup ? (
                <div>
                  <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Current Password</label>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input type={passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "text" : "password"} value={passwordForm.currentPassword} onChange={(event) => updatePasswordField("currentPassword", event.target.value)} className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.currentPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 placeholder:text-rose-400 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "currentPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`} />
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, currentPassword: !current.currentPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                      <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.currentPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  {passwordErrors.currentPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.currentPassword}</p> : null}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-emerald-300/20 bg-emerald-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-200">
                  This account was created with Google. We&apos;ll verify your email with OTP so you can set a password for the first time.
                </div>
              )}
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">New Password</label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <input type={passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "text" : "password"} value={passwordForm.newPassword} onChange={(event) => updatePasswordField("newPassword", event.target.value)} className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.newPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 placeholder:text-rose-400 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "newPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`} />
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, newPassword: !current.newPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                    <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.newPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                  </button>
                </div>
                {passwordErrors.newPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.newPassword}</p> : null}
                <div className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-out ${
                  passwordForm.newPassword && !isStrongPassword(passwordForm.newPassword, {
                    fullName: user?.fullName || profileDraft.fullName || "",
                    email: user?.email || profileDraft.email || ""
                  })
                    ? "mt-2 max-h-56 opacity-100 translate-y-0"
                    : "mt-0 max-h-0 opacity-0 -translate-y-1"
                }`}>
                  <div className="grid gap-1">
                    {passwordChecks(passwordForm.newPassword, {
                      fullName: user?.fullName || profileDraft.fullName || "",
                      email: user?.email || profileDraft.email || ""
                    }).map((item) => (
                      <p key={item.label} className={`text-[11px] font-medium ${item.valid ? "text-emerald-300" : "text-slate-400"}`}>
                        <i className={`fa-solid ${item.valid ? "fa-circle-check" : "fa-circle"} mr-2 text-[10px]`} />
                        {item.label}
                      </p>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Confirm New Password</label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <input type={passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "text" : "password"} value={passwordForm.confirmPassword} onChange={(event) => updatePasswordField("confirmPassword", event.target.value)} className={`sq-password-input w-full rounded-xl border px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm font-semibold focus:outline-none ${passwordErrors.confirmPassword ? "border-rose-500 bg-rose-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-rose-300/80 placeholder:text-rose-400 focus:border-rose-500" : "border-white/10 bg-white/10 text-white focus:border-blue-300"} ${passwordShakeField === "confirmPassword" ? "field-shake" : ""}`} />
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setPasswordVisibility((current) => ({ ...current, confirmPassword: !current.confirmPassword }))} className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 flex h-8 w-8 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-slate-300 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" title={passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "Hide password" : "Show password"}>
                    <i className={`fa-solid ${passwordVisibility.confirmPassword ? "fa-eye-slash" : "fa-eye"} text-sm`} />
                  </button>
                </div>
                {passwordErrors.confirmPassword ? <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{passwordErrors.confirmPassword}</p> : null}
              </div>
              <div className="mt-5 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
                {userRequiresPasswordSetup ? null : <button type="button" onClick={() => resetPasswordChangeFlow()} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>}
                <button type="button" onClick={handleChangePassword} disabled={passwordOtpState.sending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-blue-300 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{passwordOtpState.sending ? "Sending OTP..." : "Send OTP"}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${deleteAccountModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[110] items-center justify-center p-4`}>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl max-w-sm w-full p-6 shadow-2xl text-center">
          <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-red-50 text-red-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <Icon name="trash-2" className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 mb-2">Delete Account?</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mb-6 font-medium">This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be lost.</p>
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setDeleteAccountModalOpen(false)} disabled={deleteAccountPending} className="flex-1 px-4 py-3 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 text-sm font-black uppercase rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={handleDeleteAccount} disabled={deleteAccountPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center px-4 py-3 bg-red-500 text-white text-sm font-black uppercase rounded-xl hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-red-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60">{deleteAccountPending ? <Loader /> : "Delete"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {logoutPending ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing out" /> : null}
      {logoutModalOpen ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4">
          <div className="w-full max-w-[17.25rem] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-3.5 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-sm sm:rounded-3xl sm:p-6">
            <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500/15 text-red-300 sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16">
              <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-2xl" />
            </div>
            <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Sign Out?</h3>
            <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">Are you sure you want to end your session?</p>
            <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setLogoutModalOpen(false)} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl bg-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">Cancel</button>
              <button type="button" onClick={confirmLogout} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-red-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3 sm:text-sm">{logoutPending ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing out</span></> : "Sign Out"}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}

      <div className={`${deleteArchiveModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[110] items-center justify-center p-4`}>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl max-w-sm w-full p-6 shadow-2xl text-center">
          <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-red-50 text-red-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <Icon name="trash-2" className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 mb-2">Delete Selected Media?</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mb-2 font-medium">This action will permanently remove the selected files from your archive.</p>
          <p className="text-xs font-black text-slate-500 uppercase mb-6">
            {selectedPhotos.length} item{selectedPhotos.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} selected
          </p>
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setDeleteArchiveModalOpen(false)} disabled={deleteArchivePending} className="flex-1 px-4 py-3 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 text-sm font-black uppercase rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={confirmDeleteSelected} disabled={deleteArchivePending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center px-4 py-3 bg-red-500 text-white text-sm font-black uppercase rounded-xl hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-red-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60">{deleteArchivePending ? <Loader /> : "Delete"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={cx(mobileOpen ? "block" : "hidden", "fixed inset-0 z-[230] bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm md:hidden")} onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)} />

      <div className="flex min-h-screen">
        <aside
          onMouseEnter={() => {
            if (!desktopSidebarCollapseLock) {
              setDesktopSidebarExpanded(true);
            }
          }}
          onMouseLeave={() => {
            setDesktopSidebarExpanded(false);
            setDesktopSidebarCollapseLock(false);
            setNotifOpen(false);
          }}
          className={cx(
            "peer/sidebar group/sidebar admin-home-sidebar hidden h-screen shrink-0 flex-col p-4 transition-[width] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] md:fixed md:inset-y-0 md:left-0 md:z-50 md:flex md:w-72 lg:w-[5.5rem]",
            desktopSidebarHoverClasses.aside
          )}
        >
          <Link to="/" className="mb-8 hidden items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)] md:flex lg:min-h-[56px] lg:w-14 lg:overflow-hidden lg:px-0 lg:transition-all lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:group-hover/sidebar:w-full lg:group-hover/sidebar:justify-start lg:group-hover/sidebar:px-3">
            <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-10 w-10 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
            <div className={cx("min-w-0 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap leading-none transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.brandText)}>
              <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
              <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </Link>

          <nav className="flex flex-1 flex-col justify-center space-y-1.5">
            {DESKTOP_PRIMARY_TABS.map((tab) => (
              <div key={tab.id}>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  data-tab={tab.id}
                  onClick={() => handleDesktopTabClick(tab.id)}
                  className={cx(
                    "tab-btn group/nav flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl py-3 text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] md:px-4 lg:h-14 lg:w-14 lg:self-center lg:justify-center lg:px-0",
                    desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navButton,
                    activeTab === tab.id ? cx(SIDEBAR_ACTIVE, desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navActive) : cx("text-slate-300 hover:text-white", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navHover)
                  )}
                >
                  <span className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                    <Icon name={tab.icon} className={cx(tab.id === "history" || tab.id === "payments" ? "h-[1.7rem] w-[1.7rem]" : "h-7 w-7")} />
                  </span>
                  <span className={cx("overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap leading-none transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] lg:max-w-0 lg:opacity-0", desktopSidebarHoverClasses.navLabel)}>
                    {tab.label}
                  </span>
                </button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </nav>

        </aside>

        <aside className={cx("admin-home-sidebar fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-[240] flex w-72 shrink-0 flex-col p-4 transition-transform duration-300", mobileOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full", "md:hidden")}>
          <Link to="/" className="mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)]">
            <img src="/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" alt="SnapQueue" className="h-10 w-10 shrink-0 object-contain drop-shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)]" />
            <div className="leading-none text-left">
              <h1 className="text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-100 sm:text-lg">SnapQueue</h1>
              <p className="text-[9px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-300 sm:text-[10px]">Studio</p>
            </div>
          </Link>

          <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
              {SIDEBAR_TABS.map((tab) => (
                <button
                key={tab.id}
                type="button"
                data-tab={tab.id}
                onClick={() => {
                  setActiveTab(tab.id === "profile" ? "settings" : tab.id);
                  setMobileOpen(false);
                }}
                className={cx(
                  "tab-btn flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300",
                  activeTab === tab.id ? SIDEBAR_ACTIVE : "text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                )}
              >
                <span className="flex h-7 w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-white">
                  <Icon name={tab.icon} className="h-5 w-5" />
                </span>
                <span>{tab.label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>

        </aside>

        <main className={cx(
          "relative flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 p-3 transition-[margin] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:p-4 md:ml-72 md:p-6 lg:ml-[5.5rem] lg:p-8",
          (desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock) && "lg:ml-72",
          activeTab === "reservations" && "!p-0 sm:!p-4 md:!p-6 lg:!p-8",
          ["history", "payments", "photos"].includes(activeTab) && "p-0 sm:p-0 md:p-0 lg:px-0 lg:pt-0.5 lg:pb-0",
          activeTab === "messages" && "!p-0 sm:!p-0 md:!p-0 lg:!p-0",
          activeTab === "messages" && "h-screen overflow-hidden lg:h-[100dvh]"
        )}>
          <div
            id="user-header-bar"
            className={cx(
              "z-[190]",
              ["reservations", "progress", "settings", "profile"].includes(activeTab)
                ? activeTab === "reservations"
                  ? "relative left-1/2 right-1/2 -ml-[50vw] -mr-[50vw] mt-0.5 mb-1 h-[58px] w-screen max-w-none sm:static sm:m-0 sm:mb-2 sm:h-[68px] sm:w-full sm:block"
                  : activeTab === "progress"
                    ? "mb-0 flex w-full sm:mb-0 sm:h-[48px] sm:w-full"
                    : "mb-3 flex w-full sm:mb-6 sm:h-[104px] sm:w-full"
                : ["history", "payments", "photos", "messages", "help", "settings", "profile"].includes(activeTab)
                  ? "hidden"
                  : "mb-6 sticky top-0 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/75 px-2 py-3 backdrop-blur-xl sm:top-4 sm:py-4 md:top-6 lg:top-8"
            )}
          >
            {activeTab === "reservations" ? (
                <div
                  className={cx(
                  (desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock)
                    ? "fixed inset-x-0 top-3 z-[130] mx-auto w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] min-h-[72px] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-slate-950/92 px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,right] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] [will-change:left,right] sm:mt-0 sm:mx-0 sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:fixed md:top-0 md:left-72 md:right-0 md:w-auto md:min-h-[84px] lg:px-8"
                    : "fixed inset-x-0 top-3 z-[130] mx-auto w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] min-h-[72px] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-slate-950/92 px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,right] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] [will-change:left,right] sm:mt-0 sm:mx-0 sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:fixed md:top-0 md:left-[5.5rem] md:right-0 md:w-auto md:min-h-[84px] lg:px-8",
                  mobileOpen && "bg-slate-950/28 backdrop-blur-2xl"
                )}
              >
                <div className="hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
                    className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                    aria-label="Open menu"
                    title="Open menu"
                  >
                    <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </button>
                  <div />
                </div>
                <div className="relative flex flex-col gap-2.5 sm:min-h-[52px] sm:justify-center">
                  <div className="hidden min-w-0 flex-1 sm:hidden sm:absolute sm:left-0 sm:top-1/2 sm:-translate-y-1/2">
                    <h2 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">
                      <span className="admin-wave-hand text-base leading-none" aria-hidden="true">👋</span>
                      <span className="truncate">{greetingText}, {user?.fullName || "User"}</span>
                    </h2>
                  </div>
                  <div className={cx("relative flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2 sm:hidden", activeTab !== "reservations" && "hidden")}>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
                      className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                      aria-label="Open menu"
                      title="Open menu"
                    >
                      <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    </button>
                    <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                      <input
                        ref={mobileHeaderSearchInputRef}
                        value={searchQuery}
                        onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                        type="text"
                        id="dashboard-search"
                        placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                        className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setActiveTab("messages");
                        setNotifOpen(false);
                        setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                      }}
                      className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                      title="Messages"
                    >
                      <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95 lg:hidden sm:h-10 sm:w-10" title="Notifications">
                      <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                      <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                    </button>
                    <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                        <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                          {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={user?.avatarUrl}
                              fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                              alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                              className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                              fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                            />
                          ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                        </span>
                        <span className="absolute bottom-[-2px] right-[-2px] flex h-[18px] w-[18px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                          <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                        </span>
                      </button>
                      {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:w-full sm:flex-col sm:gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
                    <div className="hidden min-w-0">
                      <h2 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">
                        <span className="admin-wave-hand text-base leading-none" aria-hidden="true">ðŸ‘‹</span>
                        <span className="truncate">{greetingText}, {user?.fullName || "User"}</span>
                      </h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0">
                      <h2 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">
                        <span className="admin-wave-hand text-base leading-none" aria-hidden="true">{"\u{1F44B}"}</span>
                        <span className="truncate">{greetingText}, {user?.fullName || "User"}</span>
                      </h2>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-end sm:gap-3">
                      {renderUserDesktopToolbar({
                        searchValue: searchQuery,
                        onSearchChange: (event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value),
                        searchPlaceholder: activeSearchPlaceholder,
                        searchWidthClass: "sm:w-[11rem] md:w-[12rem] lg:w-[13.5rem] xl:w-[15rem]"
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : ["progress", "settings", "profile"].includes(activeTab) ? (
              <div
                className={cx(
                  (desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock)
                    ? "fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,right] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:left-auto sm:right-auto sm:top-0 sm:inset-x-0 sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:left-72 md:right-0 lg:px-8"
                    : "fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-[left,right] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:left-auto sm:right-auto sm:top-0 sm:inset-x-0 sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 md:left-[5.5rem] md:right-0 lg:px-8"
                )}
              >
                <div className="relative mb-2 flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2 sm:hidden">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
                    className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                    aria-label="Open menu"
                    title="Open menu"
                  >
                    <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </button>
                  <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      value={searchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      type="text"
                      placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                      className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                    />
                  </div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      setActiveTab("messages");
                      setNotifOpen(false);
                      setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                    title="Messages"
                  >
                    <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                    <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                  </button>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={user?.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                            alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                          />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                      </span>
                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                      </span>
                    </button>
                    {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:w-full sm:flex-col sm:gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
                  <div>
                    {activeTab === "progress" ? (
                      <>
                        <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Order Tracking</h2>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                          {activeReservation
                            ? `Order ID: #${getDisplayReservationId(activeReservation)}`
                            : "Track your current booking progress"}
                        </p>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <h2 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">
                        <span className="admin-wave-hand text-base leading-none" aria-hidden="true">👋</span>
                        <span className="truncate">{greetingText}, {user?.fullName || "User"}</span>
                      </h2>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={cx("flex w-full flex-col gap-2 sm:w-auto sm:flex-row sm:items-center", ["progress", "settings", "profile"].includes(activeTab) && "sm:ml-auto sm:justify-end sm:gap-3")}>
                    {["progress", "settings", "profile"].includes(activeTab)
                      ? renderUserDesktopToolbar({
                          searchValue: searchQuery,
                          onSearchChange: (event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value),
                          searchPlaceholder: activeSearchPlaceholder,
                          searchWidthClass: "sm:w-[11rem] md:w-[12rem] lg:w-[13.5rem] xl:w-[15rem]"
                        })
                      : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : activeTab === "profile" ? null : (
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
                <div className="hidden items-center justify-between gap-3 sm:flex lg:flex-1">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)} className="md:hidden rounded-xl p-2 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100">
                      <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5 text-slate-900" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 sm:gap-4">
                    <div id="search-container-desktop" className={`relative ${searchVisible ? "hidden lg:block" : "hidden"}`}>
                      <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                      <input value={searchQuery} onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)} type="text" id="dashboard-search" placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder} className="w-56 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm outline-none transition-all focus:border-[#2D60FF] focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 xl:w-64" />
                    </div>
                    <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white bg-white text-slate-700 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 lg:hidden sm:h-10 sm:w-10" title="Notifications">
                      <Icon name="bell" className="h-4 w-4 sm:h-5 sm:w-5" />
                      <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute top-1 right-1 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                    </button>
                    <div className="hidden text-right sm:block">
                      <p className="text-[8px] font-bold uppercase text-slate-500 sm:text-[10px]">{greetingText}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-bold leading-none text-slate-900 sm:text-sm">{user?.fullName || "User"}</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-[8px] font-bold uppercase text-blue-600 sm:text-[10px]">Client</p>
                    </div>
                    <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                        className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
                        title="Profile menu"
                      >
                        <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                          {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                            !userAvatarFailed ? (
                              <SafeAvatar
                                src={user?.avatarUrl}
                                fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                                alt="User avatar"
                                className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                                fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                              />
                            ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>
                          ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                        </span>
                        <span className="absolute bottom-[-3px] right-[-3px] z-10 flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-[9px] text-slate-700 shadow-[0_6px_16px_rgba(2,8,23,0.28)]">
                          <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                        </span>
                      </button>
                      {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div id="search-container-mobile" className={`relative ${searchVisible ? "hidden sm:block lg:hidden" : "hidden"}`}>
                  <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                  <input value={searchQuery} onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)} type="text" placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm outline-none transition-all focus:border-[#2D60FF] focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100" />
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          {notifOpen ? (
            <div id="user-notif-panel-mobile" className="fixed right-4 top-24 z-[120] w-[92vw] max-w-sm rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.94),rgba(30,41,59,0.9))] shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-2xl lg:hidden sm:right-6 md:right-10">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-white/10 p-3">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">Notifications</h3>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setNotifOpen(false)}
                  className="flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white/80 transition-colors hover:bg-white/15 hover:text-white"
                  aria-label="Close notifications"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-sm" />
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-end border-b border-white/10 px-3 py-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={markAllNotificationsRead} className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:text-white">Mark all read</button>
              </div>
              <div className="max-h-[360px] space-y-5 overflow-y-auto p-3">
                {notificationSections.length ? notificationSections.map((section) => (
                  <section key={section.id}>
                    <h4 className="mb-3 text-base font-black tracking-tight text-white">{section.label}</h4>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {section.items.map((item) => (
                        <div key={item.id} className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.03] px-2.5 py-2.5 transition-all hover:border-white/14 hover:bg-white/[0.06]">
                          <button type="button" onClick={item.onClick} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-start gap-2.5 text-left">
                            <span className={cx(
                              "mt-0.5 flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border text-sm",
                              item.tone === "amber" && "border-amber-400/40 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-200",
                              item.tone === "green" && "border-emerald-400/40 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-200",
                              item.tone === "blue" && "border-sky-400/40 bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-200",
                              item.tone === "slate" && "border-slate-400/30 bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-300"
                            )}>
                              <i className={item.icon} />
                            </span>
                            <span className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                              <span className="block text-sm font-bold leading-snug text-white">{item.title}</span>
                              <span className="mt-0.5 block text-xs leading-snug text-white/75">{item.detail}</span>
                            </span>
                          </button>
                          <span className="mt-0.5 flex shrink-0 items-start gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-white/45">{item.ageLabel}</span>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              onClick={item.onDelete}
                              className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white/45 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                              aria-label={`Delete ${item.title} notification`}
                              title="Delete notification"
                            >
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[10px]" />
                            </button>
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </section>
                )) : <p className="py-8 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300">No new notifications.</p>}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : null}

          <div className={cx("px-1 sm:px-2 md:px-0 max-w-7xl w-full mx-auto", ["reservations", "progress", "history", "payments", "photos"].includes(activeTab) && "max-w-none w-full mx-0 px-0 sm:px-0 md:px-0", activeTab === "messages" && "!max-w-none !w-full !mx-0 !px-0 sm:!px-0 md:!px-0")}>
            <div id="profile" className={`${activeTab === "profile" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} mx-auto max-w-4xl border-0 bg-transparent px-4 pb-4 pt-24 shadow-none sm:max-w-none sm:px-6 sm:pb-0 sm:pt-0 md:px-8 lg:-mt-12 lg:px-20 xl:px-24`}>
              <div className="mb-6 sm:hidden">
                <div className="h-52 rounded-[2.15rem] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.55),transparent_32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#1d4ed8_38%,#0f172a_78%)]" />
                <div className="px-4 pb-2">
                  <div className="-mt-14">
                    <div className="relative h-[104px] w-[104px]">
                      <div className="flex h-[104px] w-[104px] items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)]">
                        {profileDraft.avatarUrl || googleProfileAvatarUrl ? (
                          !profileAvatarFailed ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={profileDraft.avatarUrl}
                              fallbackSrc={googleProfileAvatarUrl}
                              alt={profileDraft.fullName || "User"}
                              className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                              fallback={<span className="text-4xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>}
