                            />
                          ) : <span className="text-4xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>
                        ) : <span className="text-4xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>}
                      </div>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        disabled={!profileEditing || profileSaving}
                        onClick={() => profileAvatarInputRef.current?.click()}
                        className="absolute bottom-1 right-1 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-[#2D60FF] shadow-md transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                        title="Change profile picture"
                      >
                        <Icon name="camera" className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-4">
                    {profileEditing ? (
                      <div className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="relative">
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={profileDraft.fullName}
                            onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("fullName", event.target.value)}
                            placeholder=" "
                            className="peer w-full rounded-2xl border border-white/15 bg-white px-4 pb-3 pt-6 text-base font-black text-slate-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                          />
                          <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                            Full Name
                          </label>
                          {profileDraft.fullName ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.fullName))}>{profileErrors.fullName || "Full name looks valid."}</p> : null}
                        </div>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <input
                            type="email"
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            value={profileDraft.email}
                            onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("email", event.target.value)}
                            placeholder=" "
                            className={`${validatedInputClass(profileErrors.email, /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(profileDraft.email.trim().toLowerCase()))} peer pb-3 pt-6 placeholder-transparent`}
                          />
                          <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                            Email Address
                          </label>
                          {profileDraft.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email))}>{profileErrors.email || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}
                        </div>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            inputMode="numeric"
                            maxLength={11}
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            value={profileDraft.phone}
                            onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("phone", event.target.value)}
                            placeholder=" "
                            className={`${validatedInputClass(profileErrors.phone, isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(profileDraft.phone.trim()))} peer pb-3 pt-6 placeholder-transparent`}
                          />
                          <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-1/2 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:translate-y-0 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:translate-y-0 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                            Phone Number
                          </label>
                          {profileDraft.phone ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone))}>{profileErrors.phone || "Phone number looks valid."}</p> : null}
                        </div>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <textarea
                            rows="4"
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            value={profileDraft.bio}
                            onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("bio", event.target.value)}
                            placeholder=" "
                            className={`${validatedInputClass(profileErrors.bio, Boolean(profileDraft.bio.trim()))} peer pb-3 pt-7 placeholder-transparent`}
                          />
                          <label className="pointer-events-none absolute left-4 top-4 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 peer-placeholder-shown:top-4 peer-placeholder-shown:text-sm peer-focus:top-3 peer-focus:text-[10px] peer-focus:tracking-[0.16em] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:top-3 peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:text-[10px] peer-[&:not(:placeholder-shown)]:tracking-[0.16em]">
                            Bio
                          </label>
                          {profileDraft.bio ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio))}>{profileErrors.bio || "Bio looks valid."}</p> : null}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <h2 className="text-[2rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">{profileDraft.fullName || "User"}</h2>
                        <p className="mt-2 text-base font-semibold leading-7 text-blue-100">{profileDraft.email || "-"}</p>
                        <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-7 text-blue-100">{profileDraft.phone || "-"}</p>
                        <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white/70">Joined {user?.createdAt ? formatDateLabel(user.createdAt) : "Unknown"}</p>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-8 space-y-3">
                    {profileEditing ? (
                      <>
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            onClick={() => {
                              resetProfileDraft();
                              setProfileEditing(false);
                            }}
                            className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-white/20 bg-slate-700/80 px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-white transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                          >
                            Cancel
                          </button>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            onClick={handleSaveProfile}
                            className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                          >
                            {profileSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save"}
                          </button>
                        </div>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          disabled={profileSaving}
                          onClick={() => setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl: "" }))}
                          className="inline-flex min-h-[52px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.1rem] border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-red-700 transition-all duration-200 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                        >
                          Remove Picture
                        </button>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setProfileEditing(true)}
                          className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-sky-200"
                        >
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-sm text-sky-700" aria-hidden="true" />
                          Edit Profile
                        </button>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setChangePasswordModalOpen(true)}
                          className="inline-flex min-h-[56px] w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-[1.2rem] border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.9))] px-5 py-3 text-base font-black text-slate-800 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-sky-200"
                        >
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-lock text-sm text-slate-600" aria-hidden="true" />
                          {userRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}
                        </button>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div className={cx("mt-6 border-t border-white/20 pt-6", profileEditing && "hidden")}>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
                      <div className="max-w-[14rem]">
                        <p className="text-[1.05rem] font-black text-white">Email Notifications</p>
                        <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium leading-5 text-white/70">Receive account and booking activity notifications by email.</p>
                      </div>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        role="switch"
                        aria-checked={profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                        onClick={() => handleSaveEmailNotifications(!profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled)}
                        className={`relative inline-flex h-8 w-14 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                      >
                        <span className={`inline-block h-6 w-6 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-7" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="hidden sm:block">
                <div className="w-full space-y-0 px-0 py-0">
                  {!hasProfileSearchResults ? (
                    <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-6 py-10 text-center shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)]">
                      <p className="text-lg font-black text-white">No profile matches</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/60">Try searching for profile, email, password, notifications, or account details.</p>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  <div className={cx("w-full overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem]", !hasProfileSearchResults && "hidden")}>
                    <div className="h-52 rounded-[2rem] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.55),transparent_32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#0f172a_62%,#020617)] sm:h-60 lg:h-64" />
                    <div className="px-6 pb-6 sm:px-8 lg:px-10">
                      <div className="-mt-16 mb-0 pb-6 sm:-mt-20 sm:pb-7">
                        <div className="flex flex-col items-start gap-4 text-left sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:gap-6">
                          <div className="relative flex-shrink-0">
                            <div className="flex h-28 w-28 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)] sm:h-32 sm:w-32">
                              {profileDraft.avatarUrl || googleProfileAvatarUrl ? (
                                !profileAvatarFailed ? (
                                  <SafeAvatar
                                    src={profileDraft.avatarUrl}
                                    fallbackSrc={googleProfileAvatarUrl}
                                    alt={profileDraft.fullName || "User"}
                                    className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                                    fallback={<span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>}
                                  />
                                ) : <span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>
                              ) : <span className="text-5xl font-black uppercase">{String(profileDraft.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>}
                            </div>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              disabled={!profileEditing || profileSaving}
                              onClick={() => profileAvatarInputRef.current?.click()}
                              className="absolute bottom-1 right-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-md transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                              title="Change profile picture"
                            >
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-camera text-sm leading-none" />
                            </button>
                            <input
                              ref={profileAvatarInputRef}
                              type="file"
                              accept="image/*"
                              className="hidden"
                              onChange={(event) => {
                                handleProfileAvatarUpload(event.target.files?.[0] || null);
                                event.target.value = "";
                              }}
                            />
                          </div>
                          <div className="w-full flex-1 text-left">
                            {profileEditing ? (
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                value={profileDraft.fullName}
                                onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("fullName", event.target.value)}
                                className={`w-full border-b-2 bg-transparent text-3xl font-black text-white outline-none ${profileErrors.fullName ? "border-red-400" : profileDraft.fullName.trim().length >= 2 ? "border-emerald-400" : "border-white/35"} focus:border-sky-300`}
                              />
                            ) : (
                              <div className="w-full border-b-2 border-transparent text-3xl font-black text-white">{profileDraft.fullName || "User"}</div>
                            )}
                            <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white/80">
                              {profileDraft.email || "-"}{profileDraft.phone ? ` • ${profileDraft.phone}` : ""}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      {profileEditing ? (
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-5">
                          <div className="space-y-3">
                            <div>
                              <label className="mb-2 block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400">Email Address</label>
                              <input
                                type="email"
                                disabled={profileSaving}
                                value={profileDraft.email}
                                onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("email", event.target.value)}
                                className={validatedInputClass(profileErrors.email, /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(profileDraft.email.trim().toLowerCase()))}
                              />
                              {profileDraft.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.email))}>{profileErrors.email || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <label className="mb-2 block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400">Phone Number</label>
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                inputMode="numeric"
                                maxLength={11}
                                disabled={profileSaving}
                                value={profileDraft.phone}
                                onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("phone", event.target.value)}
                                className={validatedInputClass(profileErrors.phone, isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(profileDraft.phone.trim()))}
                              />
                              {profileDraft.phone ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.phone))}>{profileErrors.phone || "Phone number looks valid."}</p> : null}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <label className="mb-2 block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400">Bio</label>
                            <textarea
                              rows="5"
                              disabled={profileSaving}
                              value={profileDraft.bio}
                              onChange={(event) => updateProfileField("bio", event.target.value)}
                              className={validatedInputClass(profileErrors.bio, Boolean(profileDraft.bio.trim()))}
                            />
                            {profileDraft.bio ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(profileErrors.bio))}>{profileErrors.bio || "Bio looks valid."}</p> : null}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                      {!profileEditing && profileOverviewMatches ? (
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-2">
                          <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                            <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Role</p>
                            <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-bold text-white">{profileRoleLabel}</p>
                          </div>
                          <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                            <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/45">Joined</p>
                            <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-bold text-white">{user?.createdAt ? formatDateLabel(user.createdAt) : "Unknown"}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                      <div className={cx("mt-5 flex w-full flex-col gap-2.5 sm:flex-row", !profileActionsMatch && "hidden")}>
                        {profileEditing ? (
                          <>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              disabled={profileSaving}
                              onClick={() => {
                                resetProfileDraft();
                                setProfileEditing(false);
                              }}
                              className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(51,65,85,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.98))] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.22)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                            >
                              <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />
                              Cancel
                            </button>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              disabled={profileSaving}
                              onClick={handleSaveProfile}
                              className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/40 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa_0%,#2563eb_52%,#1d4ed8_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(59,130,246,0.36)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                            >
                              <i className={`fa-solid ${profileSaving ? "fa-spinner animate-spin" : "fa-floppy-disk"} text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110`} aria-hidden="true" />
                              {profileSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save Changes"}
                            </button>
                          </>
                        ) : (
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setProfileEditing(true)} className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/35 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fbff_0%,#dbeafe_48%,#bfdbfe_100%)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-900 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(96,165,250,0.26)] sm:w-auto"><i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-xs text-sky-700 transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />Edit Profile</button>
                        )}
                        {!profileEditing ? <button type="button" onClick={() => setChangePasswordModalOpen(true)} className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.9))] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-sky-200 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff,#dbeafe)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(148,163,184,0.24)] sm:w-auto"><i className="fa-solid fa-lock text-xs text-slate-600 transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:text-sky-600" aria-hidden="true" />{userRequiresPasswordSetup ? "Set Password" : "Change Password"}</button> : null}
                        {profileEditing ? (
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            disabled={profileSaving}
                            onClick={() => setProfileDraft((current) => ({ ...current, avatarUrl: "" }))}
                            className="group inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-red-200/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#ffe4e6)] px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-red-700 shadow-[0_16px_30px_rgba(127,29,29,0.12)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)] hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_20px_36px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:w-auto"
                          >
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-trash-can text-xs transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" aria-hidden="true" />
                            Remove Picture
                          </button>
                        ) : null}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className={cx("w-full px-6 py-6 sm:px-8 lg:px-10", !profileNotificationsMatch && "hidden")}>
                    <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm font-black text-white">Email Notifications</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/65">Receive account and booking activity notifications by email.</p>
                      </div>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        role="switch"
                        aria-checked={profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                        onClick={() => handleSaveEmailNotifications(!profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled)}
                        className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                      >
                        <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <section id="reservations" className={`${activeTab === "reservations" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} min-h-0 w-full flex-1 space-y-6 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden px-3 pb-8 pt-12 sm:px-0 sm:space-y-8 sm:pt-32 md:pt-0 md:pb-0 lg:pt-[0.5rem]`}>
              <div className="relative bg-transparent px-0 py-0 sm:overflow-hidden sm:rounded-none sm:border-0 sm:bg-transparent sm:px-5 sm:py-4 sm:shadow-none sm:backdrop-blur-0">
              <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 -z-10 overflow-hidden sm:hidden">
                <div className="absolute -left-10 top-4 h-40 w-40 rounded-full bg-sky-500/10 blur-3xl" />
                <div className="absolute right-8 top-0 h-48 w-48 rounded-full bg-blue-500/10 blur-3xl" />
                <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-1/3 h-32 w-32 rounded-full bg-indigo-500/10 blur-3xl" />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl sm:text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white">My Reservations</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs sm:text-sm text-slate-300">Manage and track your booking sessions</p>
                </div>
                <Link to="/reservation?from=dashboard" className="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/30 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa_0%,#2563eb_55%,#1d4ed8_100%)] px-6 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-white shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] transition-all [touch-action:manipulation] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.36)] active:opacity-80 sm:w-auto sm:justify-start">
                  <Icon name="plus" className="w-4 h-4" /> <span className="hidden sm:inline">New Reservation</span><span className="sm:hidden">New</span>
                </Link>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 sm:gap-6">
                <div className="bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb_0%,#3b82f6_42%,#4338ca_100%)] p-4 sm:p-6 rounded-[1.75rem] text-white shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.22)] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between h-40" id="active-booking-card">
                  <div className="relative z-10">
                    <p className="text-white/70 text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold">Active Booking</p>
                    <h3 className="text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold mt-1">{activeReservation?.eventType || "No Active Booking"}</h3>
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative z-10 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-bold">
                    <Icon name="calendar" className="w-4 h-4" /> <span>{activeReservation ? formatDate(activeReservation.eventDateTime || activeReservation.eventDate) : "Pending"}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="absolute -right-6 -bottom-6 w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-white/10" />
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.18),transparent_28%)]" />
                </div>

                <div className="reservation-card-enter flex h-40 flex-col justify-between rounded-[1.75rem] bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(30,41,59,0.72),rgba(15,23,42,0.58))] p-4 shadow-[0_24px_52px_rgba(2,8,23,0.28)] backdrop-blur-2xl sm:p-6">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-300 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Total Events</p>
                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-black text-white">{stats.totalReservations}</h3>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex gap-1 h-8 items-end">
                    <div className="h-1/2 w-full rounded-t-sm bg-[#2D60FF]/20" />
                    <div className="h-3/4 w-full rounded-t-sm bg-[#2D60FF]/40" />
                    <div className="h-full w-full rounded-t-sm bg-[#2D60FF]" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="pt-3 sm:pt-5 md:pt-6">
                {filteredReservations.length ? (
                  <div className="overflow-visible rounded-none bg-transparent shadow-none backdrop-blur-0 sm:overflow-hidden sm:rounded-[2rem] sm:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.84),rgba(15,23,42,0.72))] sm:shadow-[0_30px_70px_rgba(2,8,23,0.32)] sm:backdrop-blur-2xl">
                    <div className="hidden grid-cols-[minmax(0,2.1fr)_minmax(140px,1fr)_minmax(220px,1.35fr)_minmax(160px,1fr)_minmax(230px,1.2fr)] gap-6 border-b border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.94),rgba(226,232,240,0.88))] px-8 py-5 lg:grid">
                      <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500">Event</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500">Package</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500">Date And Time</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500">Payment</p>
                      <p className="text-right text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500">Actions</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-3 sm:space-y-0 sm:divide-y sm:divide-white/8">
                      {filteredReservations.map((reservation, index) => (
                        <div key={reservation._id || reservation.id} className="reservation-card-enter search-target relative z-0 rounded-[1.6rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.72),rgba(15,23,42,0.58))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)] transition-colors duration-300 hover:z-[230] hover:bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.78),rgba(15,23,42,0.64))] sm:rounded-none sm:border-0 sm:bg-transparent sm:p-0 sm:shadow-none" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 90}ms` }}>
                          {(() => {
                            const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                            const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                            const allowEditReservation = canUserEditReservation(reservation, payment);
                            return (
                              <>
                          <div className="p-4 lg:hidden">
                            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                                <p className="truncate text-base font-black text-white">{reservation.eventType || "Photography Session"}</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">#{reservation._id || reservation.id || "-"}</p>
                              </div>
                              <span className={`rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase border ${getStatusClasses(reservation.status)}`}>{reservation.status || "Pending"}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="mt-3 grid grid-cols-[minmax(0,0.9fr)_minmax(0,0.9fr)_minmax(0,1.25fr)] gap-1.5">
                              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-2.5">
                                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Package</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 truncate text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{reservation.packageName || reservation.service || "-"}</p>
                              </div>
                              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-2.5">
                                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Status</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 truncate text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{reservation.status || "Pending"}</p>
                              </div>
                              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-2.5">
                                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Date And Time</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 truncate whitespace-nowrap text-[10px] font-bold text-white">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`mt-3 grid gap-1.5 ${allowEditReservation ? "grid-cols-3" : "grid-cols-2"}`}>
                              {allowEditReservation ? (
                                <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/reservation?from=dashboard&edit=${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`)} className="group inline-flex min-w-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-amber-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b_0%,#f97316_100%)] px-2 py-2.5 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.06em] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(249,115,22,0.24)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)]">
                                  <i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-[10px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                                  <span className="truncate">Edit</span>
                                </button>
                              ) : null}
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex min-w-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.92))] px-2 py-2.5 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.06em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-white">
                                <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[10px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                                <span className="truncate">Details</span>
                              </button>
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => setActiveTab("progress")} className="group inline-flex min-w-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa_0%,#2563eb_55%,#1d4ed8_100%)] px-2 py-2.5 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.06em] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(37,99,235,0.34)]">
                                <i className="fa-solid fa-wave-square text-[10px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                                <span className="truncate">Status</span>
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="hidden items-center gap-6 px-8 py-5 lg:relative lg:z-[230] lg:grid lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,2.1fr)_minmax(140px,1fr)_minmax(220px,1.35fr)_minmax(160px,1fr)_minmax(230px,1.2fr)]">
                            <div className="min-w-0">
                              <div className="min-w-0">
                                <p className="truncate text-base font-black text-white">{reservation.eventType || "Photography Session"}</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 truncate text-sm font-medium text-white/70">#{reservation._id || reservation.id || "-"}</p>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-base font-bold text-white/90">{reservation.packageName || reservation.service || "-"}</p>
                            <p className="text-base font-bold text-white/90">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                              <span className={`rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase border ${getStatusClasses(reservation.status)}`}>{reservation.status || "Pending"}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="relative z-[231] flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                              {allowEditReservation ? (
                                <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/reservation?from=dashboard&edit=${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-amber-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b_0%,#f97316_100%)] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(249,115,22,0.24)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)]" title="Edit Reservation" aria-label="Edit Reservation">
                                  <i className="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-[13px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                                </button>
                              ) : null}
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/14 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(226,232,240,0.92))] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-white" title="Full Details" aria-label="Full Details">
                                <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[13px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                              </button>
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => setActiveTab("progress")} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-sky-300/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#60a5fa_0%,#2563eb_55%,#1d4ed8_100%)] text-white shadow-[0_16px_32px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(37,99,235,0.34)]" title="View Status" aria-label="View Status">
                                <i className="fa-solid fa-wave-square text-[13px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                              </>
                            );
                          })()}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : <div className="reservation-card-enter rounded-[1.9rem] bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(30,41,59,0.7),rgba(15,23,42,0.62))] p-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 shadow-[0_26px_56px_rgba(2,8,23,0.28)] backdrop-blur-2xl">No reservations found.</div>}
              </div>
              </div>
            </section>
          </div>

            <div id="progress" className={`${activeTab === "progress" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} w-full space-y-6 pt-24 sm:pt-0 lg:min-h-[calc(100dvh-8rem)]`}>
            <div className="px-4 sm:hidden">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Order Tracking</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                {activeReservation
                  ? `Order ID: #${getDisplayReservationId(activeReservation)}`
                  : "Track your current booking progress"}
              </p>
            </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col rounded-none border-0 bg-transparent p-0 shadow-none sm:min-h-full">
                <div className="mb-4 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 border-b border-white/10 pt-0 pb-5 sm:grid-cols-3 sm:gap-3">
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-4 backdrop-blur-xl">
                  <p className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-300">
                    <Icon name="tag" className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    <span>Package</span>
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-black leading-4 text-white sm:text-base">{activeReservation?.packageName || activeReservation?.package || activeReservation?.service || "-"}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-4 backdrop-blur-xl">
                  <p className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-300">
                    <Icon name="activity" className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    <span>Current Status</span>
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-black leading-4 text-sky-300 sm:text-base">{progressState.label}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-4 backdrop-blur-xl">
                  <p className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-300">
                    <Icon name="calendar" className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    <span>Expected Delivery</span>
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] font-black leading-4 text-white sm:text-base">{formatDateLabel(activeReservation?.estimatedDelivery)}</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="relative space-y-0 pt-2 sm:flex-1 sm:pt-4 lg:pt-5">
                <div className="user-progress-line absolute left-4 top-10 bottom-4 w-0.5 sm:left-6 sm:top-16 sm:bottom-12" />
                <div className="user-progress-line-active absolute left-4 top-10 bottom-4 w-0.5 origin-top sm:left-6 sm:top-16 sm:bottom-12" style={{ transform: `scaleY(${progressState.lineScale})` }} />
                {[
                  ["Reservation Approved", "Booking confirmed by lead photographer.", "check"],
                  ["Photographer On The Way", "Our photographer is on the way to your location.", "activity"],
                  ["Photoshoot Completed", "Session successfully held.", "camera"],
                  ["Editing in Progress", "Processing and enhancing your photos.", "zap"],
                  ["Ready for Download", "Your photos will be available soon.", "download"]
                ].map(([title, desc, icon], index) => {
                  const active = progressState.activeSteps >= index + 1;
                  const highlighted = progressState.label === title;
                  return (
                    <div key={title} className={`user-progress-icon-enter relative ${index < 4 ? "pb-12 sm:pb-8 lg:pb-9" : ""}`} style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 90}ms` }}>
                      <div className={`absolute left-0 top-1.5 z-10 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border sm:left-1 sm:h-9 sm:w-9 ${active ? "user-progress-icon-active" : "user-progress-icon-idle"}`}>
                        <Icon name={icon} className="w-3.5 h-3.5 sm:w-4.5 sm:h-4.5" />
                      </div>
                      <div className="ml-16 sm:ml-20">
                        <h4 className={`text-[13px] font-bold sm:text-[15px] ${highlighted ? "text-sky-300" : active ? "text-white" : "text-slate-300"}`}>{title}</h4>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-400 sm:text-[13px]">{desc}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="mt-8 hidden flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 sm:flex">
                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">
                  Order ID: #{activeReservation ? getDisplayReservationId(activeReservation) : "RES-001"}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="pt-8 sm:hidden">
              <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4">
                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">
                  Order ID: #{activeReservation ? getDisplayReservationId(activeReservation) : "RES-001"}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {renderMessages()}

          <section id="history" className={`${activeTab === "history" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} flex min-h-0 flex-1 w-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-none border-0 bg-transparent p-0 pb-24 shadow-none sm:pb-28`}>
            {(() => {
              const activeHistoryFilterLabel = HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS.find((option) => option.id === historyFilter)?.label || "All";
              const historyStart = filteredHistoryReservations.length ? ((historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize) + 1 : 0;
              const historyEnd = Math.min(historyPage * historyPageSize, filteredHistoryReservations.length);

              return (
                <div className="fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] w-auto rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:sticky sm:top-0 sm:z-[40] sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 lg:px-8">
                  <div className="relative mb-2 flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2 sm:hidden">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
                      className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100"
                      aria-label="Open menu"
                      title="Open menu"
                    >
                      <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    </button>
                    <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                      <input
                        value={searchQuery}
                        onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                        type="text"
                        placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                        className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        setActiveTab("messages");
                        setNotifOpen(false);
                        setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                      }}
                      className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                      title="Messages"
                    >
                      <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                      <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                    </button>
                    <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                      <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                      <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                    </button>
                    <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                        <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                          {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                            <SafeAvatar
                              src={user?.avatarUrl}
                              fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                              alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                              className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                              fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                            />
                          ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                        </span>
                        <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                          <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                        </span>
                      </button>
                      {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="hidden flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between sm:flex">
                    <div>
                      <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Booking History</h2>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                        {historyStart}-{historyEnd || 0} of {filteredHistoryReservations.length} archived booking record{filteredHistoryReservations.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    {renderUserDesktopToolbar({
                      searchValue: searchQuery,
                      onSearchChange: (event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value),
                      searchPlaceholder: activeSearchPlaceholder,
                      filterSlot: (
                        <div className="relative hidden w-full sm:block sm:w-auto">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setHistoryFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                            className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                            aria-label={`History filter (${activeHistoryFilterLabel})`}
                            title={`History filter (${activeHistoryFilterLabel})`}
                          >
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[11px]" />
                            <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${historyFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                          </button>
                          {historyFilterMenuOpen ? (
                            <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-56">
                              {HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
                                <button
                                  key={option.id}
                                  type="button"
                                  onClick={() => {
                                    setHistoryFilter(option.id);
                                    setHistoryFilterMenuOpen(false);
                                  }}
                                  className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${historyFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                                >
                                  <span>{option.label}</span>
                                  {historyFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                                </button>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })()}
            <div className="px-4 pb-3 pt-24 sm:hidden">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Booking History</h2>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                        {(() => {
                          const historyStart = filteredHistoryReservations.length ? ((historyPage - 1) * historyPageSize) + 1 : 0;
                          const historyEnd = Math.min(historyPage * historyPageSize, filteredHistoryReservations.length);
                          return `${historyStart}-${historyEnd || 0} of ${filteredHistoryReservations.length} archived booking record${filteredHistoryReservations.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
                        })()}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="relative shrink-0">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setHistoryFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                        className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                        aria-label={`History filter (${HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS.find((option) => option.id === historyFilter)?.label || "All"})`}
                        title={`History filter (${HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS.find((option) => option.id === historyFilter)?.label || "All"})`}
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${historyFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                      </button>
                      {historyFilterMenuOpen ? (
                        <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-48 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                          {HISTORY_FILTER_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
                            <button
                              key={option.id}
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => {
                                setHistoryFilter(option.id);
                                setHistoryFilterMenuOpen(false);
                              }}
                              className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${historyFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                            >
                              <span>{option.label}</span>
                              {historyFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                            </button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-2 sm:hidden">
              {paginatedHistoryReservations.length ? (
                <div className="space-y-2.5">
                  {paginatedHistoryReservations.map((reservation) => {
                const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                const statusLabel = status === "completed" ? "Completed" : status === "cancelled" ? "Cancelled" : "Rejected";
                const canViewProof = Boolean(payment?.proofUrl);
                const statusClasses = status === "completed"
                  ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200"
                  : status === "cancelled"
                    ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200"
                    : "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";

                return (
                  <div key={reservationId} className="relative self-start rounded-[18px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur-xl">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={user?.avatarUrl}
                          fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                          alt={user?.fullName || "Client"}
                          className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                          fallback={<div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">
                          {String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}
                        </div>
                      )}
                      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                          <p className="truncate pr-2 text-sm font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase ${statusClasses}`}>
                            {statusLabel}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/80">{user?.email || reservation.email || user?.phone || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                        <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-[0.85fr_0.85fr_1.3fr] gap-1.5 border-b border-white/10 pb-2">
                          <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                            <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Package</p>
                            <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "-"}</p>
                          </div>
                          <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                            <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Payment</p>
                            <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{payment ? String(payment.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ") : "No Payment"}</p>
                          </div>
                          <div className="min-w-0 rounded-[1rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-2 py-1.5">
                            <p className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-white/40">Booking Date</p>
                            <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-[9px] font-bold text-white">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)}
                        className="group inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] px-2.5 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-blue-800 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white"
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px] transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:scale-110" />
                        Full Details
                      </button>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        disabled={!canViewProof}
                        onClick={() => {
                          setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment);
                          viewProof(payment);
                        }}
                        className={`inline-flex h-9 min-w-0 flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border px-3 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.08em] transition-all duration-200 ${
                          canViewProof
                            ? "border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] text-blue-800 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white"
                            : "cursor-not-allowed border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] text-white/35"
                        }`}
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar text-[11px]" />
                        Proof
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
                  })}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">
                  No booking history yet.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="relative z-0 hidden min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-auto sm:block">
              <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
                <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                    <th className="px-6 py-4">Booking Info</th>
                    <th className="px-6 py-4">Date And Time</th>
                    <th className="px-6 py-4">Payment</th>
                    <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                  {paginatedHistoryReservations.length ? paginatedHistoryReservations.map((reservation) => {
                    const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                    const status = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                    const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                    const statusLabel = status === "completed" ? "Completed" : status === "cancelled" ? "Cancelled" : "Rejected";
                    const statusClasses = status === "completed"
                      ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200"
                      : status === "cancelled"
                        ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200"
                        : "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200";

                    return (
                      <tr key={reservationId} className="group bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)] opacity-90">
                        <td className="px-6 py-4">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                            {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                              <SafeAvatar
                                src={user?.avatarUrl}
                                fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                                alt={user?.fullName || "Client"}
                                className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover"
                                fallback={<div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>}
                              />
                            ) : (
                              <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">
                                {String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}
                              </div>
                            )}
                            <div className="min-w-0">
                              <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                              <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{user?.email || reservation.email || user?.phone || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">
                          <p className="font-black text-white">{reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "-"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/70">{getEventLabel(reservation)}</p>
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                        <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{payment ? String(payment.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase() : "NO PAYMENT"}</td>
                        <td className="px-6 py-4">
                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${statusClasses}`}>
                            {statusLabel}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    );
                  }) : (
                    <tr>
                      <td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No archived bookings matched your search.</td>
                    </tr>
                  )}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>

            {filteredHistoryReservations.length ? (
              <div
                className={cx(
                  "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-4 backdrop-blur-xl sm:px-4 sm:py-5",
                  "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
                  desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                    ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                    : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
                )}
              >
                <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2 sm:pl-1">
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">Page {historyPage} of {historyTotalPages}</p>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))} disabled={historyPage === 1} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                      Prev
                    </button>
                    <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                      {Array.from({ length: historyTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                        .slice(Math.max(0, historyPage - 3), Math.max(0, historyPage - 3) + 5)
                        .map((pageNumber) => (
                          <button key={pageNumber} type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage(pageNumber)} className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${historyPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}>
                            {pageNumber}
                          </button>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setHistoryPage((current) => Math.min(historyTotalPages, current + 1))} disabled={historyPage === historyTotalPages} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                      Next
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </section>

          <section id="photos" className={`${activeTab === "photos" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} flex min-h-0 flex-1 w-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-none border-0 bg-transparent p-0 shadow-none`}>
            <div className="fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] w-auto rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-2.5 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:sticky sm:top-0 sm:z-[40] sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 lg:px-8">
              <div className={cx("relative mb-2 flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full flex-nowrap items-center gap-2 sm:hidden", currentFolder && "hidden")}>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)} className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Open menu" title="Open menu">
                  <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                </button>
                <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1 basis-0">
                  <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                  <input
                    value={searchQuery}
                    onChange={(event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                    type="text"
                    placeholder={activeSearchPlaceholder}
                    className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30"
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      setActiveTab("messages");
                      setNotifOpen(false);
                      setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                    title="Messages"
                  >
                    <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                  </button>
                  <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                    <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                  </button>
                  <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                      <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                        {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                          <SafeAvatar
                            src={user?.avatarUrl}
                            fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                            alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                            className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                            fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                          />
                        ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                      </span>
