                      <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                      </span>
                    </button>
                    {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-col sm:gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
                <div className="hidden sm:block">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Media Archive</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{selectedPhotos.length} item{selectedPhotos.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} selected</p>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300/90">Archive media is automatically deleted 7 days after upload.</p>
                </div>
                {currentFolder ? (
                  <div className="hidden sm:flex sm:flex-wrap sm:items-center sm:gap-3">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => { setActiveArchiveFolderName(null); setSelectedPhotos([]); }}
                      className="group flex min-h-[52px] flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[1rem] border border-white/65 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.9))] px-2 py-2 text-slate-700 shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] ring-1 ring-white/80 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:min-h-0 sm:flex-none sm:flex-row sm:gap-2.5 sm:rounded-[1.1rem] sm:px-4 sm:py-2.5"
                    >
                      <Icon name="folder-open" className="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:-translate-x-0.5 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      <span className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-black leading-none sm:mt-0 sm:text-sm">Back</span>
                      <span className="hidden sm:inline text-sm font-bold">to Folders</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={toggleAllPhotos}
                      className="group flex min-h-[52px] flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[1rem] border border-white/65 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.96),rgba(241,245,249,0.9))] px-2 py-2 text-slate-700 shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] ring-1 ring-white/80 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:min-h-0 sm:flex-none sm:flex-row sm:gap-2.5 sm:rounded-[1.1rem] sm:px-4 sm:py-2.5"
                    >
                      <Icon name="check" className="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:rotate-[-6deg]" />
                      <span className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-black leading-none sm:mt-0 sm:text-sm">
                        {visiblePhotoEntries.length > 0 && visiblePhotoEntries.every(({ index }) => selectedPhotoSet.has(`${currentFolder?.name}::${index}`)) ? "Deselect" : "Select"}
                      </span>
                      <span className="hidden sm:inline text-sm font-bold">All</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={downloadSelected}
                      className="group flex min-h-[52px] flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[1rem] border border-blue-200/25 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#4f8dff,#2453eb)] px-2 py-2 text-white shadow-[0_16px_34px_rgba(37,99,235,0.34)] ring-1 ring-blue-200/25 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:shadow-[0_22px_44px_rgba(37,99,235,0.42)] sm:min-h-0 sm:flex-none sm:flex-row sm:gap-2.5 sm:rounded-[1.1rem] sm:px-6 sm:py-2.5"
                    >
                      <Icon name="download" className="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 group-hover:scale-110" />
                      <span className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-black leading-none sm:mt-0 sm:text-sm">Download</span>
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={deleteSelected}
                      className="group flex min-h-[52px] flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[1rem] border border-rose-200/75 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(255,241,242,0.95))] px-2 py-2 text-rose-700 shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(244,63,94,0.12)] ring-1 ring-white/80 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_20px_38px_rgba(244,63,94,0.18)] sm:min-h-0 sm:flex-none sm:flex-row sm:gap-2.5 sm:rounded-[1.1rem] sm:px-6 sm:py-2.5"
                    >
                      <Icon name="trash-2" className="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:rotate-[6deg]" />
                      <span className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-black leading-none sm:mt-0 sm:text-sm">Delete</span>
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ) : renderUserDesktopToolbar({
                  searchValue: searchQuery,
                  onSearchChange: (event) => setSearchQuery(event.target.value),
                  searchPlaceholder: activeSearchPlaceholder,
                  searchWidthClass: "sm:w-[16rem] lg:w-[18rem] xl:w-[20rem]"
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-24 mb-3 px-3 sm:hidden">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Media Archive</h2>
              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{selectedPhotos.length} item{selectedPhotos.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} selected</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300/90">Archive media is automatically deleted 7 days after upload.</p>
            </div>
            <div id="photo-grid" className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 p-3 sm:grid-cols-3 sm:gap-4 sm:p-6 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:p-8">
              {!currentFolder ? visibleFolders.map((folder, index) => (
                <button
                  key={folder.key}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setActiveArchiveFolderName(folder.name); setSelectedPhotos([]); }}
                  className="archive-folder-premium group relative flex aspect-square cursor-pointer flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden rounded-[1.6rem] border border-white/14 p-4 text-left text-white transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1.5 hover:border-sky-300/45 hover:shadow-[0_28px_60px_rgba(2,8,23,0.34)] sm:p-5"
                  style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 70}ms` }}
                >
                  <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(96,165,250,0.18),transparent_36%),linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.06),rgba(255,255,255,0.02))]" />
                  <div className="relative flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="archive-folder-premium__icon flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-[1.2rem] border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.08] text-sky-200 shadow-[0_16px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105 group-hover:rotate-[-4deg] sm:h-14 sm:w-14">
                      <Icon name="folder-open" className="h-6 w-6 sm:h-7 sm:w-7" />
                    </div>
                    <span className="rounded-full border border-white/14 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/72 backdrop-blur-xl">
                      Folder
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="relative mt-auto">
                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white sm:text-base">{folder.name}</p>
                    <div className="mt-2 inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-white/14 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold text-white/78 backdrop-blur-xl">
                      {folder.photos.length} item{folder.photos.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              )) : visiblePhotoEntries.map(({ photo, index }) => {
                const key = `${currentFolder.name}::${index}`;
                const isVideo = isVideoMedia(photo);
                return (
                  <div
                    key={key}
                    onClick={(event) => handlePhotoClick(event, key, photo)}
                    onTouchEnd={() => handlePhotoTouchEnd(key, photo)}
                    className={`group photo-item relative aspect-square cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-200 transition-all ${selectedPhotoSet.has(key) ? "outline outline-4 outline-[#2D60FF] outline-offset-[-4px]" : ""}`}
                  >
                    {isVideo ? (
                      <>
                        <video src={photo.url} className="w-full h-full object-cover" muted playsInline preload="metadata" />
                        <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 flex items-center justify-between bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-950/75 via-slate-900/20 to-transparent px-3 py-2">
                          <span className="rounded-full bg-white/90 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-slate-900">Video</span>
                        </div>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <img src={photo.url} alt={photo.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                    )}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
              {!visibleFolders.length && !currentFolder ? <div className="col-span-full flex min-h-[12rem] items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] p-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">No media folders available yet.</div> : null}
              {!visiblePhotoEntries.length && currentFolder ? <div className="col-span-full flex min-h-[12rem] items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] p-8 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">No media found in this folder.</div> : null}
            </div>
          </section>

          <div id="payments-legacy" className="hidden">
            <div className="flex flex-col justify-between gap-2 mb-4">
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold text-slate-800">Payments</h2>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Quote acceptance, payment status, and receipt actions.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            {!filteredPaymentCandidates.length ? (
              <div className="p-4 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-slate-300 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500">No reservation available for payment management.</div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {paginatedPaymentCandidates.map((reservation) => {
                  const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                  const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                  const pricingStatus = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
                  const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                  const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
                  const displayPaymentStatus = paymentStatus;
                  const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
                  const isCustomPackage = isCustomPackageReservation(reservation);
                  const allowAcceptQuote = isCustomPackage && pricingStatus === "quoted";
                  const allowPayNow = !["rejected", "completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus)
                    && !["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus)
                    && (isCustomPackage ? pricingStatus === "accepted" : reservationStatus === "approved");
                  const workflowStage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
                  const allowRequestRefund = !["completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus) && workflowStage !== "ready_for_download" && ["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "paid"].includes(paymentStatus) && ["none", "awaiting_payout_details"].includes(refundStatus);
                  const showCardReceipt = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) || ["approved", "processed"].includes(refundStatus);
                  const showCardRefundInfo = refundStatus !== "none";
                  const showCardViewProof = Boolean(payment?.proofUrl);
                  const showCardRefundDetails = showCardRefundInfo && ["approved", "processed", "completed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus);
                  const cardReceiptLabel = ["approved", "processed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus) || paymentStatus === "refunded"
                    ? "Print Refund Receipt"
                    : "Print Receipt";
                  const refundUnavailableReason = getRefundUnavailableReason(payment, reservation);

                  return (
                    <div key={reservationId} className={`${["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) ? "opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                      <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 bg-white shadow-sm sm:rounded-3xl">
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 divide-y divide-slate-100 lg:grid-cols-3 lg:divide-x lg:divide-y-0">
                          <div className="relative p-4 sm:p-5">
                            <p className="mb-3 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Reservation</p>
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                              <div>
                                <h4 className="text-xs font-black text-slate-800 sm:text-sm">{`${reservation.eventType || "Event"} - ${reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "Package"}`}</h4>
                                <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="text-[9px] font-bold italic text-[#2D60FF] hover:underline sm:text-[11px]">View Full Details</button>
                              </div>
                              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-1">
                                <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-[8px]">Reservation</p>
                                  <p className="text-[9px] font-bold sm:text-[10px]">#{reservationId || "-"}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-[8px]">Payment Status</p>
                                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black capitalize sm:text-[10px]">{displayPaymentStatus || "-"}</p>
                                  {showCardRefundInfo ? <p className="mt-1 text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-500 whitespace-pre-wrap sm:text-[10px]">Refund: {payment?.refundStatus || "-"}</p> : null}
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="p-4 sm:p-5">
                            <p className="mb-3 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px]">Payment Summary</p>
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-1">
                                <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-700 p-3 text-white">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-200 sm:text-[8px]">Quoted Total</p>
                                  <p className="text-lg font-black leading-none sm:text-2xl">{formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation.finalPrice || reservation.quotedTotal, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-700 p-3 text-white">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-200 sm:text-[8px]">Pricing Status</p>
                                  <p className="text-lg font-black leading-none sm:text-2xl">{reservation.pricingStatus || "-"}</p>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              {showCardRefundInfo ? (
                                <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 p-3">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase text-slate-400 sm:text-[8px]">Refund Information</p>
                                  <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-700 sm:text-[10px]">Status: {payment?.refundStatus || "-"}</p>
                                    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-700 sm:text-[10px]">Amount: {formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation.finalPrice, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                                    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-700 sm:text-[10px]">Date: {formatDateLabel(payment?.refundProcessedAt || payment?.refundResolvedAt || payment?.updatedAt)}</p>
                                    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold text-slate-700 break-words sm:text-[10px]">Reason: {payment?.refundReason || "-"}</p>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              ) : null}
                              {refundUnavailableReason ? (
                                <div className="rounded-lg border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 p-3">
                                  <p className="mb-1 text-[7px] font-black uppercase text-rose-500 sm:text-[8px]">Refund Unavailable</p>
                                  <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-rose-700 sm:text-[10px]">{refundUnavailableReason}</p>
                                </div>
                              ) : null}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="bg-slate-50/30 p-4 sm:flex sm:items-center sm:justify-center sm:p-5">
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:w-full sm:max-w-[26rem] sm:flex sm:flex-col sm:justify-center sm:gap-2.5">
                              {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(true, reservationId); }} className="w-full rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 sm:text-[11px]">Accept Quote</button> : null}
                              {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(false, reservationId); }} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-red-200 bg-white py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 sm:text-[11px]">Reject Quote</button> : null}
                            {allowPayNow ? <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/payment?reservationId=${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}&from=dashboard`)} className="inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#2D60FF] py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700 sm:text-[11px]"><i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[11px]" />Pay Now</button> : null}
                              {allowRequestRefund ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundModalOpen(true); }} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-50 sm:text-[11px]">{refundStatus === "awaiting_payout_details" ? "Submit Payout Details" : "Request Refund"}</button> : null}
                              {showCardViewProof ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); viewProof(payment); }} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-blue-200 bg-white py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50 sm:col-auto sm:text-[11px]">View Proof of Payment</button> : null}
                              {showCardRefundDetails ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundDetailsModalOpen(true); }} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-50 sm:col-auto sm:text-[11px]">View Full Refund Details</button> : null}
                              {showCardReceipt ? <button type="button" onClick={() => printReceipt(reservation, payment)} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 sm:col-auto sm:text-[11px]">{cardReceiptLabel}</button> : null}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          <section id="payments" className={`${activeTab === "payments" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} flex min-h-0 flex-1 w-full flex-col overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden rounded-none border-0 bg-transparent p-0 pt-20 shadow-none sm:overflow-hidden sm:pt-0`}>
            {(() => {
              const paymentFilterOptions = [
                { id: "all", label: "All" },
                { id: "quote_ready", label: "Quote Ready" },
                { id: "awaiting_payment", label: "Awaiting Payment" },
                { id: "paid", label: "Paid" },
                { id: "refunds", label: "Refunds" }
              ];
              const activePaymentFilterLabel = paymentFilterOptions.find((option) => option.id === paymentFilter)?.label || "All";
              const paymentStart = filteredPaymentCandidates.length ? ((paymentPage - 1) * paymentPageSize) + 1 : 0;
              const paymentEnd = Math.min(paymentPage * paymentPageSize, filteredPaymentCandidates.length);

              return (
                <>
                  <div className="fixed left-3 right-3 top-3 z-[130] w-auto rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-2.5 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl sm:sticky sm:top-0 sm:z-[40] sm:w-full sm:rounded-none sm:border-x-0 sm:border-t-0 sm:border-b sm:px-6 sm:py-4 lg:px-8">
                    <div className="relative mb-2 flex min-h-[2.5rem] w-full items-center gap-2 sm:hidden">
                      <button type="button" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)} className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Open menu" title="Open menu">
                        <Icon name="menu" className="h-5 w-5" />
                      </button>
                      <div className="relative min-w-0 flex-1">
                        <Icon name="search" className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400" />
                        <input value={paymentSearchQuery} onChange={(event) => setPaymentSearchQuery(event.target.value)} type="text" placeholder="Search payments..." className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white py-2.5 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100/30" />
                      </div>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => {
                          setActiveTab("messages");
                          setNotifOpen(false);
                          setAvatarMenuOpen(false);
                        }}
                        className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95"
                        title="Messages"
                      >
                        <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
                        <span className={cx("absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white", unreadMessageCount ? "" : "hidden")} />
                      </button>
                      <button id="user-notif-bell" type="button" onClick={() => setNotifOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/80 bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-md transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-95" title="Notifications">
                        <Icon name="bell" className="h-5 w-5" />
                        <span id="user-notif-dot" className={`absolute right-0.5 top-0.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 ring-2 ring-white ${unreadNotificationCount ? "" : "hidden"}`} />
                      </button>
                      <div ref={avatarMenuRef} data-user-avatar-menu="true" className="relative z-[250] flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center self-center">
                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setAvatarMenuOpen((current) => !current)} className="relative inline-flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700" title="Profile menu">
                          <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                            {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? (
                              <SafeAvatar
                                src={user?.avatarUrl}
                                fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl}
                                alt={user?.fullName || "User avatar"}
                                className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                                fallback={<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                              />
                            ) : <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-700 text-xs font-black text-slate-100">{String(user?.fullName || "U").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "U"}</div>}
                          </span>
                          <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                            <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${avatarMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                          </span>
                        </button>
                        {renderMobileAvatarMenu()}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="hidden flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between sm:flex">
                      <div>
                        <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white sm:text-xl">Payment Management</h2>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{paymentStart}-{paymentEnd || 0} of {filteredPaymentCandidates.length} payment record{filteredPaymentCandidates.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} ready for review</p>
                      </div>
                    {renderUserDesktopToolbar({
                      searchValue: paymentSearchQuery,
                      onSearchChange: (event) => setPaymentSearchQuery(event.target.value),
                      searchPlaceholder: "Search payments...",
                      filterSlot: (
                        <div className="relative w-full sm:w-auto">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setPaymentFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                            className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-700 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                            aria-label={`Payment filter (${activePaymentFilterLabel})`}
                            title={`Payment filter (${activePaymentFilterLabel})`}
                          >
                            <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[11px]" />
                            <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${paymentFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                          </button>
                          {paymentFilterMenuOpen ? (
                            <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)] sm:left-auto sm:right-0 sm:w-56">
                              {paymentFilterOptions.map((option) => (
                                <button key={option.id} type="button" onClick={() => { setPaymentFilter(option.id); setPaymentFilterMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${paymentFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}>
                                  <span>{option.label}</span>
                                  {paymentFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                                </button>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                  <div className="mt-3 mb-3 flex items-start justify-between gap-3 px-3 sm:hidden">
                    <div>
                      <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Payment Management</h2>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/80">{paymentStart}-{paymentEnd || 0} of {filteredPaymentCandidates.length} payment record{filteredPaymentCandidates.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} ready for review</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="relative shrink-0">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setPaymentFilterMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                        className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50"
                        aria-label={`Payment filter (${activePaymentFilterLabel})`}
                        title={`Payment filter (${activePaymentFilterLabel})`}
                      >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-filter text-[13px]" />
                        <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${paymentFilterMenuOpen ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                      </button>
                      {paymentFilterMenuOpen ? (
                        <div className="absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.5rem)] z-[120] w-48 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                          {paymentFilterOptions.map((option) => (
                            <button key={option.id} type="button" onClick={() => { setPaymentFilter(option.id); setPaymentFilterMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-colors ${paymentFilter === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}>
                              <span>{option.label}</span>
                              {paymentFilter === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[10px]" /> : null}
                            </button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid auto-rows-min content-start grid-cols-1 gap-2 p-2 pb-28 sm:hidden">
                    {paginatedPaymentCandidates.length ? paginatedPaymentCandidates.map((reservation) => {
                      const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                      const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                      const pricingStatus = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
                      const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                      const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
                      const displayPaymentStatus = paymentStatus;
                      const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
                      const isCustomPackage = isCustomPackageReservation(reservation);
                      const allowAcceptQuote = isCustomPackage && pricingStatus === "quoted";
                      const allowPayNow = !["rejected", "completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus) && !["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) && (isCustomPackage ? pricingStatus === "accepted" : reservationStatus === "approved");
                      const workflowStage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
                      const allowRequestRefund = !["completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus) && workflowStage !== "ready_for_download" && ["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "paid"].includes(paymentStatus) && ["none", "awaiting_payout_details"].includes(refundStatus);
                      const showReceipt = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) || ["approved", "processed"].includes(refundStatus);
                      const showProof = Boolean(payment?.proofUrl);
                      const showRefundDetails = refundStatus !== "none" && ["approved", "processed", "completed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus);
                      const receiptLabel = ["approved", "processed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus) || paymentStatus === "refunded" ? "Refund Receipt" : "Receipt";
                      const statusTone = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200" : refundStatus !== "none" ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200" : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200";
                      const refundUnavailableReason = getRefundUnavailableReason(payment, reservation);

                      return (
                        <div key={reservationId} className={`self-start rounded-[20px] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.08] p-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl ${["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) ? "opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                            {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? <SafeAvatar src={user?.avatarUrl} fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl} alt={user?.fullName || "Client"} className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" fallback={<div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>} /> : <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-sm font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>}
                            <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                                <p className="truncate pr-2 text-sm font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                                <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase ${statusTone}`}>{(displayPaymentStatus || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ")}</span>
                              </div>
                              <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/80">{reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "-"} · {getEventLabel(reservation)}</p>
                              <div className="mt-2 -ml-14 grid w-[calc(100%+3.5rem)] grid-cols-2 gap-1.5">
                                <div className="min-w-0 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] p-2.5">
                                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Amount</p>
                                  <p className="mt-1 truncate whitespace-nowrap text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation.finalPrice || reservation.quotedTotal, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div className="min-w-0 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.06] p-2.5">
                                  <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Date And Time</p>
                                  <p className="mt-1 truncate whitespace-nowrap text-[10px] font-bold text-white">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</p>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          {refundUnavailableReason ? (
                            <div className="mt-2 w-full rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-3 py-2">
                              <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-rose-500">Refund Unavailable</p>
                              <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-semibold leading-relaxed text-rose-700">{refundUnavailableReason}</p>
                            </div>
                          ) : null}
                          <div className="mt-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 [-ms-overflow-style:none] [scrollbar-width:none] [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden">
                            <div className="ml-auto flex min-w-max flex-nowrap justify-end gap-2">
                              <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-[#2447B8]"><i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[11px]" />Details</button>
                              {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(true, reservationId); }} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white"><i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[11px]" />Accept</button> : null}
                              {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(false, reservationId); }} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-red-200 bg-white px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-red-600"><i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-[11px]" />Reject</button> : null}
                              {allowPayNow ? <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/payment?reservationId=${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}&from=dashboard`)} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl bg-[#2D60FF] px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[11px]" />Pay Now</button> : null}
                              {showProof ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); viewProof(payment); }} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-blue-200 bg-white px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-blue-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-image text-[11px]" />Proof</button> : null}
                              {allowRequestRefund ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundModalOpen(true); }} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-rotate-left text-[11px]" />{refundStatus === "awaiting_payout_details" ? "Payout" : "Refund"}</button> : null}
                              {showRefundDetails ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundDetailsModalOpen(true); }} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-file-lines text-[11px]" />Refund Details</button> : null}
                              {showReceipt ? <button type="button" onClick={() => printReceipt(reservation, payment)} className="inline-flex h-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-slate-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-receipt text-[11px]" />{receiptLabel}</button> : null}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    }) : <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-12 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/65 backdrop-blur-xl">No payment records matched your search.</div>}
                  </div>

                  <div className="relative z-0 hidden min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-auto sm:block">
                    <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
                      <thead className="bg-white/[0.08] text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl">
                        <tr>
                          <th className="px-6 py-4">Client</th>
                          <th className="px-6 py-4">Payment Info</th>
                          <th className="px-6 py-4">Date And Time</th>
                          <th className="px-6 py-4">Status</th>
                          <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                        {paginatedPaymentCandidates.length ? paginatedPaymentCandidates.map((reservation) => {
                          const reservationId = getReservationRouteId(reservation);
                          const payment = paymentsByReservationId[reservationId] || null;
                          const pricingStatus = String(reservation?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
                          const reservationStatus = String(reservation?.status || "").toLowerCase();
                          const paymentStatus = getEffectivePaymentStatus(payment, reservation);
                          const displayPaymentStatus = paymentStatus;
                          const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
                          const isCustomPackage = isCustomPackageReservation(reservation);
                          const allowAcceptQuote = isCustomPackage && pricingStatus === "quoted";
                          const allowPayNow = !["rejected", "completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus) && !["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "paid", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) && (isCustomPackage ? pricingStatus === "accepted" : reservationStatus === "approved");
                          const workflowStage = getEffectiveWorkflowStage(reservation, payment);
                          const allowRequestRefund = !["completed", "cancelled"].includes(reservationStatus) && workflowStage !== "ready_for_download" && ["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "paid"].includes(paymentStatus) && ["none", "awaiting_payout_details"].includes(refundStatus);
                          const showReceipt = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) || ["approved", "processed"].includes(refundStatus);
                          const showProof = Boolean(payment?.proofUrl);
                          const showRefundDetails = refundStatus !== "none" && ["approved", "processed", "completed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus);
                          const receiptLabel = ["approved", "processed", "refunded"].includes(refundStatus) || paymentStatus === "refunded" ? "Refund Receipt" : "Receipt";
                          const statusTone = ["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200" : refundStatus !== "none" ? "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200" : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200";
                          const refundUnavailableReason = getRefundUnavailableReason(payment, reservation);

                          return (
                            <tr key={reservationId} className={`group bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12)] ${["verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus) ? "opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                              <td className="px-6 py-4">
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                  {user?.avatarUrl || user?.googleAvatarUrl ? <SafeAvatar src={user?.avatarUrl} fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl} alt={user?.fullName || "Client"} className="h-11 w-11 rounded-2xl border border-white/20 object-cover" fallback={<div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>} /> : <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-[11px] font-black text-white">{String(user?.fullName || "C").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "C"}</div>}
                                  <div className="min-w-0">
                                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || reservation.fullName || "Client"}</p>
                                    <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs font-medium text-white/75">{user?.email || reservation.email || user?.phone || reservation.phone || "-"}</p>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">
                                <p className="font-black text-white">{formatCurrency(payment?.amount || reservation.finalPrice || reservation.quotedTotal, reservation.currency || "PHP")}</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/70">{reservation.packageName || reservation.package || reservation.service || "-"}</p>
                                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-white/60">Ref: {payment?.referenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                                {refundUnavailableReason ? <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-300">{refundUnavailableReason}</p> : null}
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-white/85">{formatDate(reservation.eventDateTime || reservation.eventDate)}</td>
                              <td className="px-6 py-4">
                                <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${statusTone}`}>{(displayPaymentStatus || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ")}</span>
                              </td>
                              <td className="relative z-[230] px-6 py-4">
                                <div className="relative z-[231] ml-auto flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
                                  <button type="button" onClick={() => openReservationDetails(reservation)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] text-[#2447B8] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Full Details" aria-label="Full Details"><i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-[15px]" /></button>
                                  {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(true, reservationId); }} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white">Accept</button> : null}
                                  {allowAcceptQuote ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); handleQuoteResponse(false, reservationId); }} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-red-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-red-600">Reject</button> : null}
                                  {allowPayNow ? <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/payment?reservationId=${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}&from=dashboard`)} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#2D60FF] px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700"><i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[11px]" />Pay Now</button> : null}
                                  {showProof ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); viewProof(payment); }} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.9] text-[#2447B8] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title="Proof" aria-label="Proof"><i className="fa-solid fa-file-invoice-dollar text-[15px]" /></button> : null}
                                  {allowRequestRefund ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundModalOpen(true); }} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700">{refundStatus === "awaiting_payout_details" ? "Payout" : "Refund"}</button> : null}
                                  {showRefundDetails ? <button type="button" onClick={() => { setActivePaymentContext(reservation, payment); setRefundDetailsModalOpen(true); }} className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-amber-700">Details</button> : null}
                                  {showReceipt ? <button type="button" onClick={() => printReceipt(reservation, payment)} className="group inline-flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/18 bg-white/[0.82] text-slate-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-white/35 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md" title={receiptLabel} aria-label={receiptLabel}><i className="fa-solid fa-print text-[15px]" /></button> : null}
                                </div>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                          );
                        }) : <tr><td colSpan="5" className="px-6 py-16 text-center text-sm font-semibold text-white/60">No payment records matched your search.</td></tr>}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>

                  {filteredPaymentCandidates.length ? (
                    <div
                      className={cx(
                        "fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/90 px-4 py-4 pb-6 backdrop-blur-xl sm:px-4 sm:py-5",
                        "lg:transition-[left,width] lg:duration-500 lg:ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]",
                        desktopSidebarExpanded && !desktopSidebarCollapseLock
                          ? "lg:left-72 lg:w-[calc(100%-18rem)]"
                          : "lg:left-[5.5rem] lg:w-[calc(100%-5.5rem)]"
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2 sm:pl-1">
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white/70">Page {paymentPage} of {paymentTotalPages}</p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage((current) => Math.max(1, current - 1))} disabled={paymentPage === 1} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                            Prev
                          </button>
                          <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 md:flex">
                            {Array.from({ length: paymentTotalPages }, (_, index) => index + 1)
                              .slice(Math.max(0, paymentPage - 3), Math.max(0, paymentPage - 3) + 5)
                              .map((pageNumber) => (
                                <button key={pageNumber} type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage(pageNumber)} className={`flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black transition-colors ${paymentPage === pageNumber ? "bg-white text-slate-950" : "border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80 hover:bg-white/[0.12]"}`}>
                                  {pageNumber}
                                </button>
                              ))}
                          </div>
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setPaymentPage((current) => Math.min(paymentTotalPages, current + 1))} disabled={paymentPage === paymentTotalPages} className="rounded-lg border border-white/15 bg-white/[0.08] px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:text-white/30">
                            Next
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                </>
              );
            })()}
          </section>

          <section id="help" className={`${activeTab === "help" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} w-full space-y-6 px-6 py-0 sm:px-10 lg:px-0 xl:px-0`}>
            <div className="border-b border-white/10 pb-6 pt-2">
              <div className="mx-auto max-w-5xl lg:max-w-none lg:px-10 xl:px-14">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab(previousActiveTabRef.current === "help" ? "reservations" : previousActiveTabRef.current || "reservations")}
                  className="mb-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 sm:hidden"
                  aria-label="Back"
                >
                  <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
                  <span>Back</span>
                </button>
                <h2 className="mt-4 text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl">How can we help?</h2>
                <div className="mt-8 grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_280px] lg:items-center">
                  <label className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-5 py-4 text-white/70 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.2)]">
                    <Icon name="search" className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={helpSearchQuery}
                      onChange={(event) => setHelpSearchQuery(event.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Search help articles"
                      className="w-full bg-transparent text-base font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none"
                    />
                  </label>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setActiveTab("messages");
                    openMessageThread(adminSupportThreadId || USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID);
                  }}
                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-transparent px-6 py-4 text-lg font-black text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06]"
                  >
                    <Icon name="comments" className="h-6 w-6" />
                    <span>Chat Admin</span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mx-auto max-w-5xl space-y-10 pb-6 lg:max-w-none lg:px-10 xl:px-14">
              {helpSearchNeedle ? (
                <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-6 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)]">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Search results</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-white/55">{helpSearchResults.length} match{helpSearchResults.length === 1 ? "" : "es"}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
                    {helpSearchResults.length ? helpSearchResults.map((result) => (
                      <button
                        key={`${result.type}-${result.title}`}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => handleHelpSearchResultSelect(result)}
                        className="flex w-full items-start gap-4 rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] p-4 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06]"
                      >
                        <div className="mt-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-sky-400/15 text-sky-200">
                          <Icon name={result.type === "faq" ? "life-buoy" : "search"} className="h-5 w-5" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/40">{result.type === "faq" ? "FAQ" : "Article"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-base font-black text-white">{result.title}</p>
                          <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/60">{result.description}</p>
                        </div>
                      </button>
                    )) : (
                      <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No help articles matched your search.</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : null}

                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-white sm:text-3xl">Frequently asked questions</h3>
                  <div className="mt-6 grid gap-x-10 gap-y-5 md:grid-cols-2">
                    {primaryHelpFaqLinks.length ? primaryHelpFaqLinks.map((item) => (
                      <button
                        key={item}
                        type="button"
                      onClick={() => {
                        const matchedIndex = HELP_FAQ_ITEMS.findIndex((faq) => item.toLowerCase().includes(faq.question.toLowerCase()) || faq.question.toLowerCase().includes(item.toLowerCase()));
                        if (matchedIndex >= 0) setOpenHelpFaq(matchedIndex);
                        navigate(`/help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(item)}`, {
                          state: { returnTo: "/dashboard?tab=help" }
                        });
                      }}
                      className="flex items-center gap-4 text-left text-base text-white/90 transition-colors hover:text-white"
                    >
                      <span className="inline-flex h-3 w-3 flex-none rounded-full border border-rose-400" />
                      <span>{item}</span>
                    </button>
                    )) : (
                      <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No quick FAQ matches for that search.</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {!helpSearchNeedle && extraHelpFaqLinks.length ? (
                    <div className={`grid transition-all duration-500 ease-out ${mobileHelpFaqExpanded ? "mt-5 grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100" : "grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0"}`}>
                      <div className="overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="grid gap-x-10 gap-y-5 md:grid-cols-2">
                          {extraHelpFaqLinks.map((item) => (
                            <button
                              key={item}
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => {
                                const matchedIndex = HELP_FAQ_ITEMS.findIndex((faq) => item.toLowerCase().includes(faq.question.toLowerCase()) || faq.question.toLowerCase().includes(item.toLowerCase()));
                                if (matchedIndex >= 0) setOpenHelpFaq(matchedIndex);
                                navigate(`/help-center?article=${encodeURIComponent(item)}`, {
                                  state: { returnTo: "/dashboard?tab=help" }
                                });
                              }}
                              className={`flex items-center gap-4 text-left text-base text-white/90 transition-all duration-300 hover:text-white ${mobileHelpFaqExpanded ? "translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}
                            >
                              <span className="inline-flex h-3 w-3 flex-none rounded-full border border-rose-400" />
                              <span>{item}</span>
                            </button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}
                  {!helpSearchNeedle && filteredHelpFaqLinks.length > 6 ? (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setMobileHelpFaqExpanded((current) => !current)}
                      className="mt-6 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] md:hidden"
                    >
                      <span>{mobileHelpFaqExpanded ? "View Less" : "View More"}</span>
                      <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${mobileHelpFaqExpanded ? "up" : "down"} text-[10px]`} />
                    </button>
                  ) : null}
                </div>

              <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
                {HELP_CATEGORY_CARDS.map((card) => (
                  <button
                    key={card.title}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => {
                      if (card.title === "Account") {
                        setActiveTab("settings");
                        return;
                      }
                      if (card.title === "Using SnapQueue") {
                        navigate("/help-center?article=Using%20SnapQueue", {
                          state: { returnTo: "/dashboard?tab=help" }
                        });
                        return;
                      }
                      window.location.assign("/reservation?from=dashboard-help");
                    }}
                    className="group rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] p-7 text-left shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <h4 className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{card.title}</h4>
                        <p className="mt-4 max-w-xs text-lg leading-relaxed text-white/60">{card.description}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-white/25">
                        <Icon name={card.icon} className="h-10 w-10" />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>

              <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.86),rgba(15,23,42,0.76))] p-6 shadow-[0_24px_52px_rgba(2,8,23,0.26)] backdrop-blur-2xl">
                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-white">Quick help topics</h3>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
                  {filteredHelpFaqItems.length ? filteredHelpFaqItems.map((item, index) => {
                    const actualIndex = HELP_FAQ_ITEMS.findIndex((faq) => faq.question === item.question);
                    const isOpen = openHelpFaq === actualIndex;
                    return (
                      <div key={item.question} className="overflow-hidden rounded-[1.35rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04]">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setOpenHelpFaq((current) => (current === actualIndex ? -1 : actualIndex))}
                          className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-3 px-4 py-4 text-left"
                        >
                          <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-white sm:text-base">{item.question}</h4>
                          <span className={`text-base font-black text-white/70 transition-transform duration-300 ${isOpen ? "rotate-45" : ""}`}>+</span>
                        </button>
                        <div className={`grid transition-all duration-300 ease-out ${isOpen ? "grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100" : "grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0"}`}>
                          <div className="overflow-hidden border-t border-white/10">
                            <p className="px-4 py-4 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/65">{item.answer}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    );
                  }) : (
                    <p className="text-sm text-white/55">No help articles matched your search.</p>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setActiveTab("messages");
                    openMessageThread(adminSupportThreadId || USER_ADMIN_THREAD_PLACEHOLDER_ID);
                  }}
                  className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-sky-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
                >
                  <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-sky-400/15 text-sky-200">
                    <Icon name="comments" className="h-6 w-6" />
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Chat With Admin</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Open live support for booking changes, approvals, and account help.</p>
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setActiveTab("messages");
                    openMessageThread(USER_AI_THREAD_ID);
                  }}
                  className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-violet-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
                >
                  <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-violet-400/15 text-violet-200">
                    <Icon name="zap" className="h-6 w-6" />
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Ask AI Assistant</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Get instant guidance about packages, payments, timelines, and dashboard actions.</p>
                </button>
                <Link
                  to="/contact"
                  className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-emerald-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
                >
                  <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-emerald-400/15 text-emerald-200">
                    <Icon name="mail" className="h-6 w-6" />
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Contact Support</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Open the contact page for email, phone, office details, and direct support access.</p>
                </Link>
                <Link
                  to="/reservation?from=dashboard-help"
                  className="group rounded-[1.6rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-white/[0.07] p-5 text-left shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(2,8,23,0.16)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-white/[0.1]"
                >
                  <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-amber-400/15 text-amber-200">
                    <Icon name="calendar" className="h-6 w-6" />
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-4 text-base font-black text-white">Booking Help</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/65">Start a fresh reservation flow when you need to re-enter or correct booking details.</p>
                </Link>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <section id="settings" className={`${activeTab === "settings" ? TAB_CONTENT_ACTIVE : TAB_CONTENT} w-full space-y-0 px-0 py-0 pt-24 sm:px-10 sm:pt-0 lg:-mt-16 lg:px-0 xl:-mt-20 xl:px-0`}>
            <div className="sm:hidden">
              <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-5 py-5">
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                  <div>
                    <h1 className="text-[2rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">Settings</h1>
                    <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage your account access, downloads, security, and account controls here.</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="-mx-5 mt-5 grid grid-cols-4 gap-2 px-5 text-sm font-semibold">
                  {[
                    { id: "access", label: "Access" },
                    { id: "downloads", label: "Downloads" },
                    { id: "security", label: "Security" },
                    { id: "account", label: "Account" },
                  ].map((item) => (
                    <button
                      key={item.id}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => setUserSettingsView(item.id)}
                      className={cx(
                        "rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-center transition-colors",
                        userSettingsView === item.id ? "bg-white text-slate-900" : "bg-white/8 text-white/70 hover:bg-white/12 hover:text-white"
                      )}
                    >
                      {item.label}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="divide-y divide-white/10">
                {userSettingsView === "access" ? (
                  <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Email notifications</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Receive account and booking activity updates by email.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-2">
                          <p className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white">{profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "Notifications Enabled" : "Notifications Paused"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-xs leading-5 text-white/65">You can turn booking and account emails on or off anytime.</p>
                        </div>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          role="switch"
                          aria-checked={profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                          onClick={() => handleSaveEmailNotifications(!profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled)}
                          className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                        >
                          <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {userSettingsView === "downloads" ? (
                  <>
                    <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">File quality</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Choose the preferred quality for downloaded media.</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="relative rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setUserSettingsMenuOpen((current) => current === "quality" ? "" : "quality")}
                          className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none"
                        >
                          <span>{DOWNLOAD_QUALITY_OPTIONS.find((option) => option.id === settingsPreferences.downloadQuality)?.label || "Original Quality"}</span>
                          <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${userSettingsMenuOpen === "quality" ? "up" : "down"} text-[11px] text-slate-500`} />
                        </button>
                        {userSettingsMenuOpen === "quality" ? (
                          <div className="absolute left-4 right-4 top-[calc(100%-0.35rem)] z-[90] rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                            {DOWNLOAD_QUALITY_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
                              <button
                                key={option.id}
                                type="button"
                                onClick={() => {
                                  updateSettingsPreference("downloadQuality", option.id, "Download quality updated.");
                                  setUserSettingsMenuOpen("");
                                }}
                                className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-sm font-semibold transition-colors ${settingsPreferences.downloadQuality === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                              >
                                <span>{option.label}</span>
                                {settingsPreferences.downloadQuality === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[11px]" /> : null}
                              </button>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        ) : null}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Download format</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Set how your files should be packaged when downloaded.</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="relative rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => setUserSettingsMenuOpen((current) => current === "format" ? "" : "format")}
                          className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none"
                        >
                          <span>{DOWNLOAD_FORMAT_OPTIONS.find((option) => option.id === settingsPreferences.downloadFormat)?.label || "ZIP Archive"}</span>
                          <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${userSettingsMenuOpen === "format" ? "up" : "down"} text-[11px] text-slate-500`} />
                        </button>
