                        {userSettingsMenuOpen === "format" ? (
                          <div className="absolute left-4 right-4 top-[calc(100%-0.35rem)] z-[90] rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-2 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.18)]">
                            {DOWNLOAD_FORMAT_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
                              <button
                                key={option.id}
                                type="button"
                                onClick={() => {
                                  updateSettingsPreference("downloadFormat", option.id, "Download format updated.");
                                  setUserSettingsMenuOpen("");
                                }}
                                className={`flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-sm font-semibold transition-colors ${settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === option.id ? "bg-slate-900 text-white" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100"}`}
                              >
                                <span>{option.label}</span>
                                {settingsPreferences.downloadFormat === option.id ? <i className="fa-solid fa-check text-[11px]" /> : null}
                              </button>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        ) : null}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                ) : null}

                {userSettingsView === "security" ? (
                  <>
                    <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Two-factor authentication</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Require a second verification step when signing in.</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-2">
                            <p className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white">{settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "Security Enabled" : "Security Disabled"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 text-xs leading-5 text-white/65">Protect your account with an additional verification step.</p>
                          </div>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            role="switch"
                            aria-checked={settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled}
                            onClick={handleToggleTwoFactor}
                            className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                          >
                            <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Session management</p>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Review your current session and clear other signed-in devices.</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="space-y-3 rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <p className="text-sm text-white/65">{currentSessionMeta}</p>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={handleEndOtherSessions}
                          disabled={endingOtherSessions || Boolean(settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt)}
                          className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-white/14 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                        >
                          {endingOtherSessions ? "Clearing..." : settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt ? "Sessions Cleared" : "End Other Sessions"}
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                ) : null}

                {userSettingsView === "account" ? (
                  <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Account control</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage permanent account actions carefully.</p>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setDeleteAccountModalOpen(true)} className="flex min-h-[72px] w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-red-400/20 bg-red-500/5 p-4 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-red-500/10 group">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className="rounded-2xl bg-red-500/10 p-2 text-red-300 transition-colors group-hover:bg-red-500 group-hover:text-white">
                          <Icon name="trash-2" className="w-5 h-5" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-bold text-white text-sm">Delete Account</p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-white/55">This will permanently delete your gallery and account data.</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <Icon name="chevron-right" className="w-5 h-5 text-white/35" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="hidden sm:block lg:-mt-[4.5rem] xl:-mt-24">
              <div className="w-full px-0 text-slate-900 lg:px-32 xl:px-40">
                <div className="border-b border-white/10 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                    <div>
                      <h1 className="text-[2rem] font-black tracking-tight text-white">Settings</h1>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage your account access, downloads, security, and account controls here.</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm font-semibold">
                    {[
                      { id: "access", label: "Access" },
                      { id: "downloads", label: "Downloads" },
                      { id: "security", label: "Security" },
                      { id: "account", label: "Account" },
                    ].filter((item) => visibleSettingsSectionIds.has(item.id)).map((item) => (
                      <button
                        key={item.id}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setUserSettingsView(item.id)}
                        className={cx(
                          "rounded-lg px-3 py-2 transition-colors",
                          userSettingsView === item.id ? "bg-white text-slate-900" : "bg-white/8 text-white/70 hover:bg-white/12 hover:text-white"
                        )}
                      >
                        {item.label}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="divide-y divide-white/10">
                  {!hasSettingsSearchResults ? (
                    <div className="px-5 py-10 text-center sm:px-6">
                      <p className="text-lg font-black text-white">No settings matches</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-white/60">Try searching for access, downloads, security, notifications, or account.</p>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  {(userSettingsView === "access" && visibleSettingsSectionIds.has("access")) ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Email notifications</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Receive account and booking activity updates by email.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-2">
                          <p className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white">{profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "Notifications Enabled" : "Notifications Paused"}</p>
                          <p className="mt-1 text-xs leading-5 text-white/65">You can turn booking and account emails on or off anytime.</p>
                        </div>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          role="switch"
                          aria-checked={profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled}
                          onClick={() => handleSaveEmailNotifications(!profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled)}
                          className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                        >
                          <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${profileDraft.emailNotificationsEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div> : null}

                  {userSettingsView === "downloads" && visibleSettingsSectionIds.has("downloads") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Download preferences</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Set your preferred media delivery format and quality.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-5 xl:grid-cols-2">
                      <label className="space-y-2 rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <span className="block text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">File Quality</span>
                        <select
                          value={settingsPreferences.downloadQuality}
                          onChange={(event) => updateSettingsPreference("downloadQuality", event.target.value, "Download quality updated.")}
                          className="w-full rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none"
                        >
                          <option value="original">Original Quality</option>
                          <option value="high">High Quality</option>
                          <option value="web">Web Optimized</option>
                        </select>
                      </label>
                      <label className="space-y-2 rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <span className="block text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/55">Download Format</span>
                        <select
                          value={settingsPreferences.downloadFormat}
                          onChange={(event) => updateSettingsPreference("downloadFormat", event.target.value, "Download format updated.")}
                          className="w-full rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 outline-none"
                        >
                          <option value="zip">ZIP Archive</option>
                          <option value="folder">Folder Copy</option>
                          <option value="single">Single Files</option>
                        </select>
                      </label>
                    </div>
                  </div> : null}

                  {userSettingsView === "security" && visibleSettingsSectionIds.has("security") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Security</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage stronger account protection and active sessions.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-2">
                            <p className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white">{settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "Security Enabled" : "Security Disabled"}</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 text-xs leading-5 text-white/65">Protect your account with an additional verification step.</p>
                          </div>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            role="switch"
                            aria-checked={settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled}
                            onClick={handleToggleTwoFactor}
                            className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 ${settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "bg-blue-600" : "bg-slate-300"}`}
                          >
                            <span className={`inline-block h-5 w-5 transform rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm transition-transform ${settingsPreferences.twoFactorEnabled ? "translate-x-6" : "translate-x-1"}`} />
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/12 bg-white/[0.04] p-4">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                          <div>
                            <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Session management</p>
                            <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">{currentSessionMeta}</p>
                          </div>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={handleEndOtherSessions}
                            disabled={endingOtherSessions || Boolean(settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt)}
                            className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-white/14 bg-white/[0.08] px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.12] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
                          >
                            {endingOtherSessions ? "Clearing..." : settingsPreferences.endedOtherSessionsAt ? "Sessions Cleared" : "End Other Sessions"}
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div> : null}

                  {userSettingsView === "account" && visibleSettingsSectionIds.has("account") ? <div className="grid gap-4 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-[220px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">Account control</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-white/65">Manage permanent account actions carefully.</p>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setDeleteAccountModalOpen(true)} className="flex min-h-[72px] w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-red-400/20 bg-red-500/5 p-4 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-red-500/10 group">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className="rounded-2xl bg-red-500/10 p-2 text-red-300 transition-colors group-hover:bg-red-500 group-hover:text-white">
                          <Icon name="trash-2" className="w-5 h-5" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-bold text-white text-sm">Delete Account</p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-white/55">This will permanently delete your gallery and account data.</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <Icon name="chevron-right" className="w-5 h-5 text-white/35" />
                    </button>
                  </div> : null}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>
        </main>
      </div>

      <div className={`${detailReservation ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[205] items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-3 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-4`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[22rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-white/30 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(255,255,255,0.92),rgba(239,246,255,0.98)_42%,rgba(226,232,240,0.96)_100%)] shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] ring-1 ring-white/60 sm:max-w-4xl sm:rounded-[30px]">
          <div className="relative border-b border-white/20 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a_48%,#38bdf8)] px-3 py-2.5 text-white sm:px-5 sm:py-5">
            <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.18),transparent_30%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.16),transparent_32%)]" />
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
              <div className="min-w-0">
                <h3 className="truncate text-xl font-black tracking-tight sm:text-3xl">Reservation Details</h3>
                <p className="mt-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold leading-5 text-blue-100 sm:mt-2 sm:text-sm">Review your complete reservation submission and current booking status.</p>
              </div>
              <button type="button" onClick={() => setDetailReservation(null)} className="flex h-10 w-10 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.2)] transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-white/20 sm:h-11 sm:w-11">
                <Icon name="x" className="h-4 w-4 text-white sm:h-5 sm:w-5" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="max-h-[56vh] overflow-y-auto px-3 py-2.5 sm:max-h-[68vh] sm:px-5 sm:py-5">
            <div className="mb-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:mb-4 sm:gap-3">
              <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-3 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.16)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Reservation ID</p>
                <p className="mt-1.5 break-all text-sm font-black text-slate-900">#{getDisplayReservationId(detailReservation)}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="mb-2.5 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 sm:mb-4 sm:gap-3">
              <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(16,185,129,0.14)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Booking Status</p>
                <div className="mt-2">
                  <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${getStatusClasses(detailReservation?.status)} sm:px-3 sm:text-[11px]`}>
                    {detailReservation?.status || "Pending"}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(37,99,235,0.16)] sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Payment Status</p>
                <div className="mt-2">
                  <span className="inline-flex rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-emerald-700 shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.12)] sm:px-3 sm:text-[11px] sm:tracking-[0.08em]">
                    {detailValue(detailReservation?.paymentStatus, "Unpaid")}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="col-span-2 rounded-[18px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.98),rgba(248,250,252,0.95))] px-2.5 py-2 shadow-[0_14px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.1)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_22px_42px_rgba(56,189,248,0.16)] xl:col-span-1 sm:rounded-[20px] sm:px-4 sm:py-3">
                <p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.13em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Workflow Stage</p>
                <div className="mt-2">
                  <span className="inline-flex whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border border-sky-200 bg-sky-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-sky-700 shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(56,189,248,0.12)] sm:px-2.5 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.06em]">
                    {getWorkflowStageLabel(
                      detailReservation,
                      detailReservation ? paymentsByReservationId[getReservationRouteId(detailReservation)] || null : null
                    )}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 xl:grid-cols-[1.15fr_0.85fr] sm:gap-4">
              <div className="space-y-2.5 sm:space-y-4">
                <div className="rounded-[20px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)] sm:rounded-[24px] sm:p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-user text-[11px]" />
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Client Information</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-[56px_minmax(0,1fr)] items-start gap-3 sm:mt-4 sm:flex sm:flex-wrap sm:items-center sm:gap-4">
                    <div className="flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[18px] border border-slate-200 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafc,#e2e8f0)] text-lg font-black text-blue-700 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] sm:h-16 sm:w-16 sm:rounded-[20px] sm:text-xl">
                      {detailAvatarUrl && !detailAvatarFailed ? (
                        <img
                          src={detailAvatarUrl}
                          alt={detailReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName || "User"}
                          onError={() => setDetailAvatarFailed(true)}
                          className="h-full w-full object-cover"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        String(detailReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName || "?").trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() || "?"
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid min-w-0 grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:flex-1 sm:grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-4">
                      <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Full Name</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-black leading-5 text-slate-900">{detailValue(detailReservation?.fullName || user?.fullName)}</p></div>
                      <div className="min-w-0"><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Email Address</p><p className="mt-0.5 break-words text-[13px] font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700" title={detailValue(detailReservation?.email || user?.email)}>{detailValue(detailReservation?.email || user?.email)}</p></div>
                      <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Phone Number</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailReservation?.phone || user?.phone)}</p></div>
                      <div><p className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 sm:text-[10px] sm:tracking-[0.16em]">Submitted</p><p className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-bold leading-5 text-slate-700">{formatDateLabel(detailReservation?.createdAt)}</p></div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-[20px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)] sm:hidden sm:rounded-[24px] sm:p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-location-dot text-[11px]" />
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Location Details</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:mt-4 sm:gap-4">
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Full Address</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{buildAddress(detailReservation)}</p></div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-[20px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)] sm:rounded-[24px] sm:p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-file-lines text-[11px]" />
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Reservation Submission</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 md:grid-cols-2 sm:mt-4 sm:gap-4">
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Package / Service</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{detailValue(detailReservation?.packageName || detailReservation?.package || detailReservation?.service)}</p></div>
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Event Type</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{getEventLabel(detailReservation)}</p></div>
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Event Date and Time</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{formatDate(detailReservation?.eventDateTime || detailReservation?.eventDate)}</p></div>
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Estimated Delivery</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{formatDateLabel(detailReservation?.estimatedDelivery)}</p></div>
                    <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Package Inclusions</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailReservation?.packageInclusions)}</p></div>
                    <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Other Service Details</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailReservation?.serviceOtherDetails)}</p></div>
                    <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Custom Package Description</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailReservation?.packageCustomDescription)}</p></div>
                    <div className="md:col-span-2"><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Other Event Details</p><p className="mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{detailValue(detailReservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails)}</p></div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2.5 sm:space-y-4">
                <div className="hidden rounded-[20px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)] sm:block sm:rounded-[24px] sm:p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-location-dot text-[11px]" />
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Location Details</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-2.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 sm:mt-4 sm:gap-4">
                    <div><p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-400">Full Address</p><p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700">{buildAddress(detailReservation)}</p></div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-[20px] border border-white/70 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.99),rgba(248,250,252,0.96))] p-3 shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.09)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_24px_48px_rgba(37,99,235,0.12)] sm:rounded-[24px] sm:p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[#1e3a8a]">
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-note-sticky text-[11px]" />
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">Notes</p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-2.5 min-h-[88px] whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-slate-700 sm:mt-4 sm:min-h-[120px] sm:px-4 sm:py-4">{detailValue(detailReservation?.notes || detailReservation?.additionalNotes, "No additional notes.")}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${receiptModal.open ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[208] items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-5xl overflow-hidden rounded-[30px] border border-white/30 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(255,255,255,0.92),rgba(239,246,255,0.98)_42%,rgba(226,232,240,0.96)_100%)] shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] ring-1 ring-white/60">
          <div className="relative border-b border-white/20 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a_48%,#38bdf8)] px-5 py-4 text-white">
            <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.18),transparent_30%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.16),transparent_32%)]" />
            <div className="relative flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
              <div>
                <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-sky-200">Receipt Preview</p>
                <h3 className="mt-2 text-2xl font-black tracking-tight">View / Print Receipt</h3>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <button type="button" onClick={handleReceiptPrint} className="rounded-2xl bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[#1e3a8a] shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(255,255,255,0.18)] transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5">Print</button>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setReceiptModal({ open: false, html: "" })} className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/15 bg-white/10 transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-white/20">
                  <Icon name="x" className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/55 p-3 sm:p-4">
            <iframe id="receipt-preview-frame" title="Receipt preview" srcDoc={receiptModal.html} className="h-[70vh] w-full rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-white shadow-[0_18px_36px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${previewPhoto ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-50 items-center justify-center bg-[rgba(15,23,42,0.9)] p-3 sm:p-8`} onClick={() => setPreviewPhoto(null)}>
        {previewPhoto && isVideoMedia(previewPhoto) ? (
          <video
            src={previewPhoto.url}
            controls
            autoPlay
            playsInline
            preload="metadata"
            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
            className="w-full max-w-[92vw] max-h-[82vh] rounded-lg border-4 border-white/10 bg-black shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[90%] sm:max-h-[90%]"
          />
        ) : (
          <img
            src={previewPhoto?.url || ""}
            alt="Preview"
            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
            className="max-w-[92vw] max-h-[82vh] rounded-lg border-4 border-white/10 shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[90%] sm:max-h-[90%]"
          />
        )}
      </div>

      <div className={`${proofModal.open ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[210] items-center justify-center bg-slate-900/60 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm`}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[20rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/15 bg-white p-3 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.26)] sm:max-w-2xl sm:rounded-[1.75rem] sm:p-4">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-200 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#f1f5f9)] px-1 pb-3 sm:px-2 sm:pb-4">
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400">Proof Preview</p>
              <h3 className="mt-2 truncate text-base font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-2xl">{proofModal.title}</h3>
              <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-500 sm:mt-2 sm:text-sm">Double-click the preview to open a larger fullscreen view.</p>
            </div>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setProofModal({ open: false, src: "", title: "Proof of Payment" })}
              className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100 sm:h-11 sm:w-11"
            >
              <Icon name="x" className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-4 flex max-h-[56vh] items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] bg-slate-100 p-2 sm:max-h-[62vh] sm:rounded-[1.25rem] sm:p-3">
            <div className="w-full">
              <p className="mb-3 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400">Payment Upload</p>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white">
                {/\.(pdf|docx?|xlsx?)($|\?)/i.test(proofModal.src || "") ? (
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 px-6 py-10 text-center">
                    <Icon name="file-text" className="h-10 w-10 text-slate-500" />
                    <p className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">This proof file opens in a separate tab.</p>
                    <a
                      href={proofModal.src}
                      target="_blank"
                      rel="noreferrer"
                      className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-[#2D60FF] px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-white transition-opacity hover:opacity-90"
                    >
                      View Attachment
                    </a>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <img
                    src={proofModal.src}
                    alt={proofModal.title}
                    onDoubleClick={() => setProofFullscreen(true)}
                    className="max-h-[46vh] w-full rounded-[1rem] object-contain cursor-zoom-in sm:max-h-[54vh]"
                  />
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className={`${proofFullscreen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[220] items-center justify-center bg-black/90 p-3 sm:p-4`} onClick={() => setProofFullscreen(false)}>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => setProofFullscreen(false)}
          className="absolute right-4 top-4 flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/20"
          title="Close fullscreen"
        >
          <Icon name="x" className="h-5 w-5" />
        </button>
        <img
          src={proofModal.src}
          alt={proofModal.title}
          onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
          className="max-h-full max-w-full object-contain"
        />
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}
86 Frontend User

frontend/src/features/user/pages/HelpCenterPage.jsx

Source file 86 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate, useSearchParams } from "react-router-dom";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import SafeAvatar from "../../../shared/components/SafeAvatar";
import { FullScreenAuthOverlay, Loader } from "../../../shared/components/LoadingState";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { buildAllHelpArticles } from "../helpContent";
import { hasAdminAccess } from "../../../shared/utils/roles";

const CATEGORY_NAV = [
  { key: "Account", label: "Account", icon: "user" },
  { key: "Using SnapQueue", label: "Using SnapQueue", icon: "play" },
  { key: "Bookings", label: "Bookings", icon: "calendar" },
  { key: "Payments", label: "Payments", icon: "wallet" },
  { key: "Support", label: "Support", icon: "comments" }
];

function Icon({ name, className = "h-5 w-5" }) {
  const props = { className, fill: "none", stroke: "currentColor", strokeWidth: "2", viewBox: "0 0 24 24" };
  switch (name) {
    case "search":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35" /></svg>;
    case "comments":
      return <i className={`fa-solid fa-comments ${className}`} aria-hidden="true" />;
    case "chevron-left":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6" /></svg>;
    case "user":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 12a4 4 0 100-8 4 4 0 000 8z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 21a8 8 0 0116 0" /></svg>;
    case "play":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 9l5 3-5 3V9z" /></svg>;
    case "calendar":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M3 10h18M5 5h14a2 2 0 012 2v12a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V7a2 2 0 012-2z" /></svg>;
    case "wallet":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 7a2 2 0 012-2h13a1 1 0 010 2H5a2 2 0 000 4h14a2 2 0 012 2v3a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V7z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M17 13h.01" /></svg>;
    case "shield":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z" /></svg>;
    case "dots":
      return <svg {...props}><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.2" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.2" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.2" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /></svg>;
    case "menu":
      return <svg {...props}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 7h16M4 12h16M4 17h16" /></svg>;
    default:
      return null;
  }
}

export default function HelpCenterPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const mobileProfileMenuRef = useRef(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [searchValue, setSearchValue] = useState(searchParams.get("article") || "");
  const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState("Account");
  const [mobileCategoryMenuOpen, setMobileCategoryMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [mobileCategoryMenuMounted, setMobileCategoryMenuMounted] = useState(false);
  const [mobileProfileOpen, setMobileProfileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutModalOpen, setLogoutModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [logoutPending, setLogoutPending] = useState(false);
  const rawReturnTo = typeof location.state?.returnTo === "string" ? location.state.returnTo : "";
  const returnTo = rawReturnTo && !rawReturnTo.includes("help-center") ? rawReturnTo : (user ? "/dashboard" : "/");
  useBodyScrollLock(Boolean(mobileCategoryMenuOpen || mobileProfileOpen || logoutModalOpen || logoutPending));

  const allArticles = useMemo(() => buildAllHelpArticles(), []);
  const articleQuery = searchParams.get("article") || "";
  const searchNeedle = searchValue.trim().toLowerCase();

  const filteredArticles = useMemo(
    () => (searchNeedle
      ? allArticles.filter((item) => `${item.title} ${item.description} ${(item.steps || []).join(" ")}`.toLowerCase().includes(searchNeedle))
      : allArticles),
    [allArticles, searchNeedle]
  );
  const overviewArticles = useMemo(
    () => filteredArticles.filter((item) => String(item.topLevel || "Other") === activeCategory),
    [activeCategory, filteredArticles]
  );
  const overviewSections = useMemo(
    () => overviewArticles.reduce((groups, item) => {
      const key = item.section || "Other";
      if (!groups[key]) groups[key] = [];
      groups[key].push(item);
      return groups;
    }, {}),
    [overviewArticles]
  );

  const selectedArticle = useMemo(() => {
    const byQuery = allArticles.find((item) => item.title.toLowerCase() === articleQuery.trim().toLowerCase());
    return byQuery || filteredArticles[0] || allArticles[0] || null;
  }, [allArticles, articleQuery, filteredArticles]);

  const articleSections = useMemo(
    () => filteredArticles.reduce((groups, item) => {
      const key = item.category || "Help";
      if (!groups[key]) groups[key] = [];
      groups[key].push(item);
      return groups;
    }, {}),
    [filteredArticles]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadSession = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        setUser(null);
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/auth/me");
        const nextUser = response?.data?.user || null;
        if (hasAdminAccess(nextUser?.role)) {
          navigate("/admin?tab=admin-help", { replace: true });
          return;
        }
        setUser(nextUser);
      } catch (_error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        setUser(null);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadSession();
  }, [navigate]);

  const dashboardTarget = user ? "/dashboard?tab=help" : "/help-center";
  const chatTarget = user ? "/dashboard?tab=messages&thread=admin" : "/login?redirect=help-center";
  const profileTarget = user ? "/dashboard?tab=profile" : "/login?redirect=help-center";
  const loginTarget = `/login?redirect=${encodeURIComponent(`${location.pathname}${location.search}` || "/help-center")}`;
  const headerBackLabel = articleQuery ? "Back to help articles" : user ? "Back to dashboard" : "Back to home";

  function openArticle(title) {
    setSearchParams({ article: title });
  }

  function submitSearch(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (!filteredArticles.length) return;
    openArticle(filteredArticles[0].title);
  }

  function handleBackToOverview() {
    setSearchParams({});
  }

  function handleHeaderBack() {
    if (articleQuery) {
      handleBackToOverview();
      return;
    }
    handleBackToDashboard();
  }

  function handleBackToDashboard() {
    navigate(returnTo);
  }

  function handleSignOut() {
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(true);
  }

  async function confirmLogout() {
    setLogoutPending(true);
    window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
    window.localStorage.removeItem("userLoggedIn");
    setUser(null);
    setMobileProfileOpen(false);
    setLogoutModalOpen(false);
    setLogoutPending(false);
    navigate("/login");
  }

  function handleSelectCategory(key) {
    setActiveCategory(key);
    if (articleQuery) {
      setSearchParams({});
    }
    setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    setSearchValue(articleQuery);
  }, [articleQuery]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mobileCategoryMenuOpen) {
      setMobileCategoryMenuMounted(true);
      return undefined;
    }
    const timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => setMobileCategoryMenuMounted(false), 320);
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
  }, [mobileCategoryMenuOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
  }, [activeCategory, articleQuery]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const onKeyDown = (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape") {
        setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
        setLogoutModalOpen(false);
      }
    };
    const onResize = () => {
      if (window.innerWidth >= 1024) {
        setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
      }
      if (window.innerWidth >= 768) {
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    window.addEventListener("resize", onResize);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
      window.removeEventListener("resize", onResize);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mobileProfileOpen) return undefined;
    const onPointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!mobileProfileMenuRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setMobileProfileOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
    document.addEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", onPointerDown);
      document.removeEventListener("touchstart", onPointerDown);
    };
  }, [mobileProfileOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedArticle?.topLevel) {
      setActiveCategory(selectedArticle.topLevel);
    }
  }, [selectedArticle]);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-[#040b1a] px-6">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 rounded-3xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/80 px-10 py-8 shadow-xl backdrop-blur-sm">
          <Loader />
          <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-300">Loading</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#040b1a] text-white">
      {logoutPending ? <FullScreenAuthOverlay label="Signing out" /> : null}
      <div className={`${logoutModalOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[145] items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/72 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm`} onClick={() => !logoutPending && setLogoutModalOpen(false)}>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[17.25rem] rounded-[1.65rem] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] p-3.5 text-center shadow-2xl sm:max-w-sm sm:rounded-3xl sm:p-6 sm:shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(2,8,23,0.55)]" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
          <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-red-400/20 bg-red-500/12 text-red-300 shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(239,68,68,0.18)] sm:mb-4 sm:h-16 sm:w-16">
            <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-2xl" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="mb-1 text-base font-black text-white sm:mb-2 sm:text-lg">Sign Out?</h3>
          <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300 sm:mb-6 sm:text-sm">Are you sure you want to end your session?</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:gap-3">
            <button type="button" onClick={() => setLogoutModalOpen(false)} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-slate-200 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" onClick={confirmLogout} disabled={logoutPending} className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(239,68,68,0.24)] transition-colors hover:bg-red-600 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:py-3">{logoutPending ? <><Loader /> <span>Signing out</span></> : "Sign Out"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <header className="border-b border-white/10 bg-[#081224]/95 backdrop-blur-xl">
          <div className="mx-auto flex max-w-[1700px] flex-col gap-3 px-4 py-4 sm:px-6 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between lg:gap-4 lg:px-8">
            <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-start gap-3 lg:w-auto lg:justify-start lg:gap-4">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleHeaderBack}
              className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] text-white/75 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
              aria-label={headerBackLabel}
            >
              <Icon name="chevron-left" className="h-5 w-5" />
            </button>
              <Link to={dashboardTarget} className="inline-flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2 text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white transition-colors hover:text-sky-200 sm:text-2xl">
                <span>SnapQueue</span>
                <span className="truncate text-white/45">Support</span>
              </Link>
            </div>
            <div className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 pr-1 sm:gap-3 sm:pr-0 lg:w-auto">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setMobileCategoryMenuOpen((current) => !current)}
                className="inline-flex shrink-0 rounded-xl p-2 text-slate-100 transition-colors hover:bg-slate-800 lg:hidden"
                aria-label="Open help categories"
              >
                <Icon name="menu" className="h-6 w-6" />
              </button>
              <form onSubmit={submitSearch} className="flex min-w-0 flex-1">
                <label className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.06] px-4 py-3 text-white/65 sm:px-5">
                <Icon name="search" className="h-5 w-5" />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={searchValue}
                  onChange={(event) => setSearchValue(event.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Search help articles"
                  className="w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-sm text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none sm:text-base"
                />
              </label>
            </form>
            <Link to={chatTarget} aria-label="Open admin chat" className="inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] text-white/75 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white">
              <Icon name="comments" className="h-5 w-5" />
            </Link>
            <div ref={mobileProfileMenuRef} className="relative mr-1 sm:mr-0">
              <button
                type="button"
                aria-label={user ? "Open profile menu" : "Open account menu"}
                aria-expanded={mobileProfileOpen}
                onClick={() => {
                  setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false);
                  setMobileProfileOpen((current) => !current);
                }}
                className="relative inline-flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-sky-400/70 bg-slate-800/95 text-slate-100 shadow-[0_12px_26px_rgba(15,23,42,0.34)] ring-1 ring-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
              >
                <span className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-700">
                  {user ? (
                    <SafeAvatar
                      src={user?.avatarUrl}
                      fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user?.fullName || user?.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                      alt="Profile avatar"
                      className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-user text-sm" />
                  )}
                </span>
                <span className="absolute bottom-[-1px] right-[-1px] flex h-4.5 w-4.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-slate-700 text-[8px] text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(2,8,23,0.4)]">
                  <i className={`fa-solid fa-chevron-${mobileProfileOpen ? "up" : "down"}`} />
                </span>
              </button>
              <div className={`absolute right-0 top-[calc(100%+0.65rem)] z-[150] w-[13.75rem] rounded-[1.4rem] border border-white/15 bg-[linear-gradient(165deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(17,24,39,0.96))] p-2 shadow-[0_26px_55px_rgba(2,8,23,0.52)] backdrop-blur-xl transition-all duration-200 ${mobileProfileOpen ? "pointer-events-auto translate-y-0 opacity-100" : "pointer-events-none -translate-y-2 opacity-0"}`}>
                <div className="absolute -top-2 right-5 h-4 w-4 rotate-45 border-l border-t border-white/15 bg-slate-900/95" />
                {user ? (
                  <>
                    <Link to={profileTarget} className="relative flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.15rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-3 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[0.08]" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                      <div className="h-10 w-10 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-sky-400/60 bg-slate-800">
                        <SafeAvatar
                          src={user?.avatarUrl}
                          fallbackSrc={user?.googleAvatarUrl || `https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(user?.fullName || user?.email || "User")}&background=1e3a8a&color=fff`}
                          alt="Profile avatar"
                          className="h-full w-full rounded-full object-cover"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div className="min-w-0">
                        <p className="truncate text-[13px] font-black text-white">{user?.fullName || "SnapQueue User"}</p>
                        <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200/75">Client Access</p>
                      </div>
                    </Link>
                    <div className="mt-2 grid gap-1">
                      <Link to="/dashboard" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-table-columns text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Dashboard</span>
                      </Link>
                      <Link to="/help-center" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-question text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Help Center</span>
                      </Link>
                      <div className="mx-3 my-1 h-px bg-white/10" />
                      <button type="button" className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[13px] font-bold text-rose-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-rose-500/10 hover:text-rose-100" onClick={handleSignOut}>
                        <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-rose-500/15 text-rose-200">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket text-[13px]" />
                        </span>
                        <span>Sign Out</span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <div className="grid gap-1">
                    <Link to={loginTarget} className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[1.05rem] px-3 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold text-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white" onClick={() => setMobileProfileOpen(false)}>
                      <span className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500/15 text-sky-200">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-right-to-bracket text-[13px]" />
                      </span>
                      <span>Sign In</span>
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="grid min-h-[calc(100vh-76px)] lg:grid-cols-[360px_minmax(0,1fr)]">
        <aside className="hidden border-b border-white/10 bg-[#081224]/70 p-4 sm:p-6 lg:block lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r lg:border-white/10">
          <div className="mt-1 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:mt-2 sm:space-y-0">
            {CATEGORY_NAV.map((item) => {
              const isActive = item.key === activeCategory;
              return (
                <button
                  key={item.key}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => handleSelectCategory(item.key)}
                  className={`flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-semibold transition-colors sm:gap-4 sm:py-4 sm:text-lg ${
                    isActive ? "text-rose-300" : "text-white/85 hover:bg-white/[0.05] hover:text-white"
                  }`}
                >
                  <span className={`inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full ${isActive ? "bg-rose-400/15" : "bg-white/[0.04]"}`}>
                    <Icon name={item.icon} className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </span>
                  <span>{item.label}</span>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </aside>

        {mobileCategoryMenuMounted ? (
          <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[140] backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300 lg:hidden ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "bg-slate-950/55 opacity-100" : "bg-slate-950/0 opacity-0"}`}>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setMobileCategoryMenuOpen(false)}
              className="absolute inset-0 h-full w-full"
              aria-label="Close help categories"
            />
            <div className={`absolute left-0 top-0 flex h-dvh w-[84%] max-w-[320px] flex-col overflow-y-auto border-r border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(15,23,42,0.95)_45%,rgba(2,6,23,0.98))] px-4 pb-6 pt-4 shadow-[24px_0_60px_rgba(2,8,23,0.45)] transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] sm:px-6 sm:pt-6 ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-x-0 opacity-100" : "-translate-x-full opacity-85"}`}>
              <div className={`mb-8 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.92),rgba(30,41,59,0.8))] px-3 py-3 text-left shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(2,8,23,0.35)] transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-y-0 scale-100 opacity-100" : "translate-y-4 scale-[0.98] opacity-0"}`}>
                <div className="leading-none text-left">
                  <h2 className="text-lg font-black tracking-tight text-white">SnapQueue</h2>
                  <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-sky-300">Studio</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <nav className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                {CATEGORY_NAV.map((item, index) => {
                  const isActive = item.key === activeCategory;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={item.key}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleSelectCategory(item.key)}
                      className={`flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-left text-[1.05rem] font-bold transition-all duration-300 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] ${
                        isActive ? "bg-rose-400/10 text-rose-300" : "text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white"
                      } ${mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? "translate-x-0 scale-100 opacity-100" : "translate-x-8 scale-[0.98] opacity-0"}`}
                      style={{ transitionDelay: mobileCategoryMenuOpen ? `${110 + (index * 55)}ms` : "0ms" }}
                    >
                      <span className={`inline-flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center ${isActive ? "text-rose-300" : "text-white"}`}>
                        <Icon name={item.icon} className="h-5 w-5" />
                      </span>
                      <span>{item.label}</span>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </nav>
              <div className="mt-6 border-t border-white/10 pt-6 sm:mt-8 sm:pt-8" />
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}

          <main className="bg-[#040b1a] px-4 py-6 sm:px-8 sm:py-8 lg:px-14 lg:py-12">
            {articleQuery && selectedArticle ? (
            <div className="mx-auto max-w-4xl">
              <div className="mb-6 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleBackToOverview}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.05] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08]"
                >
                  <Icon name="chevron-left" className="h-4 w-4" />
                  Back to articles
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleBackToDashboard}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-sky-300/20 bg-sky-400/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-sky-200 transition-colors hover:bg-sky-400/15"
                >
                  <Icon name="user" className="h-4 w-4" />
                  {user ? "Back to dashboard help" : "Back to home"}
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <span className="rounded-full border border-sky-300/20 bg-sky-400/10 px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-sky-200">
                  {selectedArticle.category || "Help"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/45">{selectedArticle.readTime || "Quick read"}</span>
              </div>
              <h1 className="mt-5 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-white sm:text-5xl">{selectedArticle.title}</h1>
              <p className="mt-6 text-base leading-relaxed text-white/72 sm:mt-8 sm:text-lg">{selectedArticle.description}</p>

              <div className="mt-8 space-y-5 sm:mt-10 sm:space-y-6">
                {(selectedArticle.steps || []).map((step, index) => (
                  <div key={`${selectedArticle.title}-${index}`} className="flex gap-4">
                    <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 flex-none items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/[0.08] text-sm font-black text-white">
                      {index + 1}
                    </span>
                        <p className="text-base leading-relaxed text-white/82 sm:text-lg">{step}</p>
                      </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {selectedArticle.tip ? (
                <div className="mt-10 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-amber-300/20 bg-amber-400/10 p-5">
                  <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-amber-200">Helpful tip</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/80">{selectedArticle.tip}</p>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="mx-auto max-w-6xl">
                  <div className="grid gap-x-10 gap-y-10 lg:grid-cols-2 lg:gap-y-12 lg:gap-x-16">
                    {Object.entries(overviewSections).map(([sectionName, items]) => (
                      <section key={sectionName} className="space-y-6">
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white sm:text-3xl">{sectionName}</h2>
                        <div className="space-y-4 sm:space-y-5">
                          {items.map((item) => (
                            <button
                              key={item.title}
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => openArticle(item.title)}
                              className="block text-left text-lg text-white/90 transition-colors hover:text-sky-200 sm:text-xl"
                            >
                              {item.title}
                            </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </section>
                ))}
              </div>
              {!Object.keys(overviewSections).length ? (
                <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.04] p-8 text-center">
                  <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-white">No articles found</h1>
                  <p className="mt-3 text-white/65">Try another search term or choose a different help category.</p>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          )}
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
87 Frontend User

frontend/src/features/user/pages/Payment.jsx

Source file 87 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import StatusBadge from "../../payment/components/StatusBadge";
import api from "../../../shared/services/api";
import useBodyScrollLock from "../../../shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock";
import { downloadReceiptPdfFromRoute, isMobileReceiptViewport } from "../../../shared/utils/receiptPdf";

const PACKAGE_CATALOG = {
  basic: { name: "Basic", price: 2700 },
  standard: { name: "Standard", price: 3500 },
  premium: { name: "Premium", price: 4500 }
};

const WALLETS = {
  gcash: { label: "GCash", accountName: "SnapQueue", accountNumber: "+639095339528" },
  maya: { label: "Maya", accountName: "SnapQueue", accountNumber: "+639095339528" }
};

const REFERENCE_PATTERN = /^\d{12}$/;
const STANDARD_RESERVATION_DRAFT_KEY = "snapqueue_standard_reservation_draft";
const PAYMENT_SUBMIT_TIMEOUT_MS = 120000;

function readStandardReservationDraft() {
  const raw = window.sessionStorage.getItem(STANDARD_RESERVATION_DRAFT_KEY);
  if (!raw) return null;
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return parsed && typeof parsed === "object" ? parsed : null;
  } catch {
    window.sessionStorage.removeItem(STANDARD_RESERVATION_DRAFT_KEY);
    return null;
  }
}

function clearStandardReservationDraft() {
  window.sessionStorage.removeItem(STANDARD_RESERVATION_DRAFT_KEY);
}

function normalizeReservationId(value) {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim();
  const lowered = normalized.toLowerCase();
  if (!normalized || lowered === "undefined" || lowered === "null") {
    return "";
  }
  return normalized;
}

function getReservationRouteId(reservation) {
  return normalizeReservationId(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id);
}

function formatCurrency(amount, currency = "PHP") {
  const value = Number(amount || 0);
  return `${currency} ${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
}

function formatDateTime(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  return Number.isNaN(date.getTime())
    ? "Pending"
    : date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
        month: "short",
        day: "numeric",
        year: "numeric",
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit"
      });
}

function getPackageMeta(reservation) {
  const rawName = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "").trim();
  const normalized = rawName.toLowerCase();
  const mapped = PACKAGE_CATALOG[normalized] || null;
  const packagePrice = Number(reservation?.packagePrice);
  const finalPrice = Number(reservation?.finalPrice);
  return {
    name: normalized === "custom" ? "Custom" : mapped?.name || rawName || "Package",
    price:
      Number.isFinite(finalPrice) && finalPrice > 0
        ? finalPrice
        : Number.isFinite(packagePrice) && packagePrice > 0
          ? packagePrice
          : Number(mapped?.price || 0)
  };
}

function isCustomReservation(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase() === "custom";
}

function getEventLabel(reservation) {
  const eventType = String(reservation?.eventType || "").trim();
  if (eventType.toLowerCase() === "other" && String(reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "").trim()) {
    return `Other - ${reservation.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim()}`;
  }
  return eventType || "Event";
}

function formatReservationAddress(reservation) {
  return [
    reservation?.street,
    reservation?.barangay,
    reservation?.city,
    reservation?.province
  ].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "Location pending";
}

function getDisplayReservationId(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "Pending").trim() || "Pending";
}

function buildQrUrl(method) {
  const wallet = WALLETS[method] || WALLETS.gcash;
  const payload = `${wallet.label}|${wallet.accountName}|${wallet.accountNumber}`;
  return `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=240x240&data=${encodeURIComponent(payload)}`;
}

function readFileAsDataUrl(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ""));
    reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to read uploaded image."));
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

function inputClass() {
  return "w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/80 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] text-slate-900 outline-none transition placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-sky-400 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-400/20";
}

function validatedInputClass(hasValue, hasError) {
  const base = "w-full rounded-xl border bg-white/80 px-3 py-2 text-[11px] text-slate-900 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400";
  if (!hasValue) return `${base} border-slate-200 focus:border-sky-400 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-400/20`;
  if (hasError) return `${base} field-shake border-red-400 bg-red-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-200`;
  return `${base} border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200`;
}

function validationLabelClass(hasError, hasValue) {
  if (hasError) return "mb-1 block text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-red-600";
  if (hasValue) return "mb-1 block text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-emerald-700";
  return "mb-1 block text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-900";
}

function validationHelperClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-1 text-[10px] font-semibold ${hasError ? "text-red-600" : "text-emerald-600"}`;
}

function Shell({ children, plain = false }) {
  return (
    <div className={`relative min-h-screen overflow-x-hidden text-slate-900 ${plain ? "bg-white" : "bg-white"}`}>
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
      `}</style>
      {!plain ? (
        <>
          <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top,rgba(59,130,246,0.08),transparent_28%),radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_right,rgba(14,165,233,0.08),transparent_24%)]" />
          <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0">
            <div className="absolute -right-20 top-0 h-96 w-96 rounded-full bg-blue-200/50 blur-3xl" />
            <div className="absolute -left-16 top-1/3 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-cyan-100/70 blur-3xl" />
          </div>
        </>
      ) : null}
      <div className="relative z-10 min-h-screen">{children}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

function SectionLabel({ children }) {
  return <h3 className="text-[13px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-800 sm:text-[15px] sm:tracking-[0.18em]">{children}</h3>;
}

function WalletLogo({ type }) {
  const isGcash = type === "gcash";
  const bgClass = isGcash
    ? "bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#38bdf8)] text-white shadow-[0_10px_18px_rgba(37,99,235,0.28)]"
    : "bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#10b981)] text-white shadow-[0_10px_18px_rgba(16,185,129,0.22)]";
  const badgeClass = isGcash ? "bg-white/20 text-white" : "bg-white/15 text-emerald-50";
  return (
    <div className={`relative flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-lg ${bgClass}`}>
      <i className="fa-solid fa-wallet text-[15px]" aria-hidden="true" />
    </div>
  );
}

function WalletOption({ walletKey, item, selected, onSelect }) {
  const active = selected === walletKey;
  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={() => onSelect(walletKey)}
      className={`flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded-[1rem] border px-2.5 py-2 text-left transition-all duration-300 ${active ? "border-sky-300 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.92),rgba(219,234,254,0.88))] shadow-[0_10px_20px_rgba(148,163,184,0.14)]" : "border-slate-200/80 bg-white/70 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-white/85"}`}
    >
      <span className={`inline-flex h-4 w-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full border ${active ? "border-sky-500" : "border-slate-400"}`}>
        {active ? <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-sky-300" /> : null}
      </span>
      <WalletLogo type={walletKey} />
      <div className="min-w-0">
        <p className="text-[11px] font-bold leading-tight text-slate-900">{item.label}</p>
        <p className="truncate text-[11px] text-slate-500">{item.accountNumber}</p>
      </div>
    </button>
  );
}

function SummaryRow({ label, value, strong = false }) {
  return (
    <div className={`flex items-center justify-between gap-4 text-xs ${strong ? "font-black text-slate-900" : "font-medium text-slate-600"}`}>
      <span>{label}</span>
      <span>{value}</span>
    </div>
  );
}

const PAYMENT_CARD_CLASS = "group relative overflow-visible rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-400 bg-slate-100/85 px-2.5 py-2.5 shadow-sm shadow-slate-300/35 ring-1 ring-white";

function ReceiptDocument({ reservation, payment, amountText, paymentStatus }) {
  const packageLabel = reservation ? getPackageMeta(reservation).name : "Package";
  const clientName = reservation?.fullName || "SnapQueue Client";
  const reservationRef = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const eventLabel = reservation ? getEventLabel(reservation) : "Event";
  const eventDate = formatDateTime(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
  const paymentMethod = String(payment?.method || "Manual").trim().toUpperCase();
  const paymentRef = payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "Pending";
  const printedAt = formatDateTime(payment?.paidAt || payment?.updatedAt || payment?.createdAt || new Date());
  const statusLabel = String(paymentStatus || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase();
  const contactValue = reservation?.email || reservation?.phone || "Pending";
  const addressValue = formatReservationAddress(reservation);
  const durationValue = reservation?.durationHours || reservation?.duration || reservation?.packageDuration || "-";
  const packageDescription = reservation?.packageCustomDescription || reservation?.serviceOtherDetails || reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "Standard reservation package";
