        : target.querySelector?.("input, button, textarea, select");
      if (focusTarget && typeof focusTarget.focus === "function") {
        focusTarget.focus({ preventScroll: true });
      }
    }, 260);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = RESERVATION_PAGE_BG_CLASS;
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, []);

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    const raw = window.sessionStorage.getItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY);
    if (!raw) return;
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      const expectedPath = `${location.pathname}${location.search}`;
      if (parsed?.returnTo !== expectedPath || typeof parsed?.returnScrollY !== "number") return;
      pendingRestoreScrollRef.current = parsed.returnScrollY;
      window.sessionStorage.removeItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY);
    } catch {
      window.sessionStorage.removeItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY);
    }
  }, [location.pathname, location.search]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (loadingSession) return;
    if (typeof pendingRestoreScrollRef.current !== "number") return;
    const restoreY = pendingRestoreScrollRef.current;
    const timer = window.setTimeout(() => {
      window.scrollTo({ top: restoreY, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
      window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        window.scrollTo({ top: restoreY, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
      });
      pendingRestoreScrollRef.current = null;
    }, 0);
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [loadingSession, provinces.length, cities.length, barangays.length]);

  function handleTermsOpen() {
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(TERMS_RETURN_KEY, JSON.stringify({
      returnTo: `${location.pathname}${location.search}`,
      returnScrollY: window.scrollY
    }));
  }

  async function handleEventDateTimePartChange(nextDate, nextTime) {
    const nextValue = combineDateTimeValue(nextDate, nextTime);
    updateField("eventDateTime", nextValue);
    setDateConflictModal({ open: false, type: "none", message: "", submitOnContinue: false });
    if (!nextValue || !isReservationDateValid(nextValue)) {
      setWarning("");
      return;
    }
    await checkAvailability(nextValue);
  }

  function getCalendarDayStatus(dateKey) {
    if (dateKey < minEventDate) return "blocked";
    if (calendarStatuses[dateKey] === "approved") return "approved";
    if (calendarStatuses[dateKey] === "pending") return "pending";
    return "available";
  }

  function calendarDayClass(day) {
    const status = getCalendarDayStatus(day.dateKey);
    const isSelected = eventDateParts.date === day.dateKey;
    if (!day.inMonth) return "border-slate-100 bg-slate-50 text-slate-300";
    if (status === "approved") return isSelected ? "border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-red-700 ring-2 ring-red-400" : "border-red-200 bg-red-50 text-red-700";
    if (status === "pending") return isSelected ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 ring-2 ring-blue-400" : "border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700";
    if (status === "blocked") return "border-slate-200 bg-slate-100 text-slate-400";
    return isSelected ? "border-slate-900 bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 ring-2 ring-slate-500" : "border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-900 hover:border-slate-400";
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadSession = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        navigate(`/login?redirect=reservation&from=${encodeURIComponent(reservationFrom)}`, { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/auth/me");
        const currentUser = response?.data?.user || null;
        setUser(currentUser);
        setForm((current) => ({
          ...current,
          fullName: current.fullName || currentUser?.fullName || "",
          email: current.email || currentUser?.email || "",
          phone: current.phone || currentUser?.phone || ""
        }));
      } catch (_error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        navigate(`/login?redirect=reservation&from=${encodeURIComponent(reservationFrom)}`, { replace: true });
        return;
      } finally {
        setLoadingSession(false);
      }
    };
    loadSession();
  }, [navigate, reservationFrom]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (loadingSession || !isEditMode) return;
    let active = true;
    const loadReservationForEdit = async () => {
      setLoadingEditReservation(true);
      setEditAccessError("");
      try {
        const reservationResponse = await api.get(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(editReservationId)}`);
        const reservation = reservationResponse?.data?.reservation || null;
        const paymentResponse = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(editReservationId)}`).catch(() => ({ data: { payment: null } }));
        const payment = paymentResponse?.data?.payment || null;
        if (!active) return;
        if (!reservation || !canUserEditReservation(reservation, payment)) {
          setEditAccessError(RESERVATION_EDIT_LOCK_MESSAGE);
          return;
        }
        setEditReservationSeed(reservation);
        setForm((current) => ({
          ...current,
          fullName: reservation?.fullName || current.fullName || "",
          email: reservation?.email || current.email || "",
          phone: reservation?.phone || current.phone || "",
          province: "",
          city: "",
          barangay: "",
          street: reservation?.street || "",
          eventType: String(reservation?.eventType || "").trim().toLowerCase(),
          eventTypeOtherDetails: reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "",
          eventDateTime: reservation?.eventDateTime ? toLocalDateTimeInputValue(reservation.eventDateTime) : "",
          packageName: String(reservation?.package || reservation?.service || reservation?.packageName || "").trim().toLowerCase(),
          packageCustomDescription: reservation?.packageCustomDescription || "",
          additionalNotes: reservation?.notes || ""
        }));
      } catch (error) {
        if (!active) return;
        setEditAccessError(error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Unable to load this reservation for editing.");
      } finally {
        if (active) setLoadingEditReservation(false);
      }
    };
    loadReservationForEdit();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, [editReservationId, isEditMode, loadingSession]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!initialPackage) return;
    setForm((current) => (
      current.packageName === initialPackage
        ? current
        : { ...current, packageName: initialPackage, packageCustomDescription: initialPackage === "custom" ? current.packageCustomDescription : "" }
    ));
    setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, packageName: true }));
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, packageName: "" }));
  }, [initialPackage]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!eventDateParts.date) return;
    setCalendarMonth(getMonthKey(eventDateParts.date));
  }, [eventDateParts.date]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const loadProvinces = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await fetch("https://psgc.gitlab.io/api/provinces/");
        const items = await response.json();
        items.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        setProvinces(items);
      } catch (_error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Error loading provinces." });
      } finally {
        setLoadingOptions((current) => ({ ...current, provinces: false }));
      }
    };
    loadProvinces();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    const loadCalendarStatuses = async () => {
      setCalendarLoading(true);
      try {
        const response = await api.get(`/reservations/availability/month?month=${encodeURIComponent(calendarMonth)}`);
        if (!active) return;
        setCalendarStatuses(response?.data?.days && typeof response.data.days === "object" ? response.data.days : {});
      } catch (_error) {
        if (!active) return;
        setCalendarStatuses({});
      } finally {
        if (active) setCalendarLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadCalendarStatuses();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, [calendarMonth]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    const loadPopularPackage = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/reservations/popular-package");
        if (!active) return;
        const value = String(response?.data?.package || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        setPopularPackage(["basic", "standard", "premium"].includes(value) ? value : "");
      } catch (_error) {
        if (!active) return;
        setPopularPackage("");
      }
    };
    loadPopularPackage();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, []);


  useEffect(() => {
    if (!calendarOpen && !timeOpen) return undefined;
    const handlePointerDown = (event) => {
      if (!calendarPopupRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setCalendarOpen(false);
      }
      if (!timePopupRef.current?.contains(event.target)) {
        setTimeOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handlePointerDown);
  }, [calendarOpen, timeOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!timeOpen) return;
    const defaultTime = eventDateParts.time || minEventTime;
    setTimeDraft(createTimeDraft(defaultTime));
  }, [timeOpen, eventDateParts.time, eventDateParts.date, minEventDate, minEventTime]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!form.province) {
      setCities([]);
      setBarangays([]);
      return;
    }
    const loadCities = async () => {
      setLoadingOptions((current) => ({ ...current, cities: true }));
      try {
        const response = await fetch(`https://psgc.gitlab.io/api/provinces/${form.province}/cities-municipalities/`);
        const items = await response.json();
        items.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        setCities(items);
      } catch (_error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Error loading cities." });
      } finally {
        setLoadingOptions((current) => ({ ...current, cities: false }));
      }
    };
    loadCities();
  }, [form.province]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editReservationSeed || !provinces.length || form.province) return;
    const matchedProvince = provinces.find((item) => item.name === editReservationSeed.province);
    if (matchedProvince) {
      setForm((current) => ({ ...current, province: matchedProvince.code }));
    }
  }, [editReservationSeed, form.province, provinces]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!form.city) {
      setBarangays([]);
      return;
    }
    const loadBarangays = async () => {
      setLoadingOptions((current) => ({ ...current, barangays: true }));
      try {
        const response = await fetch(`https://psgc.gitlab.io/api/cities-municipalities/${form.city}/barangays/`);
        const items = await response.json();
        items.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        setBarangays(items);
      } catch (_error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Error loading barangays." });
      } finally {
        setLoadingOptions((current) => ({ ...current, barangays: false }));
      }
    };
    loadBarangays();
  }, [form.city]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editReservationSeed || !cities.length || form.city) return;
    const matchedCity = cities.find((item) => item.name === editReservationSeed.city);
    if (matchedCity) {
      setForm((current) => ({ ...current, city: matchedCity.code }));
    }
  }, [cities, editReservationSeed, form.city]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editReservationSeed || !barangays.length || form.barangay) return;
    const matchedBarangay = barangays.find((item) => item.name === editReservationSeed.barangay);
    if (matchedBarangay) {
      setForm((current) => ({ ...current, barangay: matchedBarangay.code }));
    }
  }, [barangays, editReservationSeed, form.barangay]);

  async function checkAvailability(dateValue, options = {}) {
    const { showModal = true, submitOnContinue = false } = options;
    if (!dateValue) {
      setWarning("");
      setDateConflictModal({ open: false, type: "none", message: "", submitOnContinue: false });
      setCheckingAvailability(false);
      return { available: true, canProceed: true, conflictType: "none", message: "" };
    }
    setCheckingAvailability(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.get(`/reservations/availability?date=${encodeURIComponent(dateValue)}`);
      const available = Boolean(response?.data?.available);
      const canProceed = response?.data?.canProceed !== false;
      const conflictType = String(response?.data?.conflictType || "none");
      const message = String(response?.data?.message || "");
      setWarning("");
      if (!available && showModal && ["pending", "approved"].includes(conflictType)) {
        closeEventDatePicker();
        window.setTimeout(() => {
          setDateConflictModal({
            open: true,
            type: conflictType,
            message: message || (conflictType === "approved" ? DATE_APPROVED_MESSAGE : DATE_PENDING_APPROVAL_MESSAGE),
            submitOnContinue: conflictType === "pending" ? submitOnContinue : false
          });
        }, 0);
      } else if (available) {
        setDateConflictModal({ open: false, type: "none", message: "", submitOnContinue: false });
      }
      return { available, canProceed, conflictType, message };
    } catch (_error) {
      const message = "Unable to check date availability right now.";
      setWarning(message);
      return { available: false, canProceed: false, conflictType: "error", message };
    } finally {
      setCheckingAvailability(false);
    }
  }

  function validateField(name, value, nextForm = form) {
    const trimmed = String(value || "").trim();
    if (name === "fullName") return trimmed.length > 1 ? "" : "Please enter your full name";
    if (name === "email") return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(trimmed) ? "" : "Please enter a valid email address";
    if (name === "phone") return isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(trimmed) ? "" : PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE;
    if (name === "street") return trimmed ? "" : "Please complete the street field";
    if (name === "eventTypeOtherDetails") return nextForm.eventType !== "other" || trimmed ? "" : "Please specify the other event type";
    if (name === "eventDateTime") return isReservationDateValid(value) ? "" : EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE;
    if (name === "packageCustomDescription") return nextForm.packageName !== "custom" || trimmed ? "" : "Please describe your custom package";
    return "";
  }

  function updateField(name, value) {
    const normalizedValue = name === "phone" ? sanitizePhoneInput(value) : value;
    const nextForm = { ...form, [name]: normalizedValue };
    setForm(nextForm);
    setTouched((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: true }));
    setErrors((current) => ({ ...current, [name]: validateField(name, normalizedValue, nextForm) }));
  }

  function validate() {
    const nextErrors = {};
    if (form.fullName.trim().length <= 1) nextErrors.fullName = "Please enter your full name";
    if (!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(form.email.trim())) nextErrors.email = "Please enter a valid email address";
    if (!isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(form.phone.trim())) nextErrors.phone = PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE;
    if (!form.province) nextErrors.province = "Please select a province";
    if (!form.city) nextErrors.city = "Please select a city";
    if (!form.barangay) nextErrors.barangay = "Please select a barangay";
    if (!form.street.trim()) nextErrors.street = "Please complete the street field";
    if (!form.eventType) nextErrors.eventType = "Please select an event type";
    if (form.eventType === "other" && !form.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim()) nextErrors.eventTypeOtherDetails = "Please specify the other event type";
    if (!isReservationDateValid(form.eventDateTime)) nextErrors.eventDateTime = EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE;
    if (!form.packageName) nextErrors.packageName = "Please select a package";
    if (form.packageName === "custom" && !form.packageCustomDescription.trim()) nextErrors.packageCustomDescription = "Please describe your custom package";
    if (!form.terms) nextErrors.terms = "You must agree to the terms";
    setErrors(nextErrors);
    return nextErrors;
  }

  function buildPayload() {
    return {
      fullName: form.fullName.trim(),
      email: form.email.toLowerCase().trim(),
      phone: sanitizePhoneInput(form.phone),
      province: provinces.find((item) => item.code === form.province)?.name || "",
      city: cities.find((item) => item.code === form.city)?.name || "",
      barangay: barangays.find((item) => item.code === form.barangay)?.name || "",
      street: form.street.trim(),
      eventType: form.eventType,
      eventTypeOtherDetails: form.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim(),
      eventDateTime: form.eventDateTime,
      service: form.packageName,
      serviceOtherDetails: "",
      packageName: form.packageName,
      packageCustomDescription: form.packageCustomDescription.trim(),
      additionalNotes: form.additionalNotes,
      latitude: form.lat,
      longitude: form.lng
    };
  }

  function completeReservationSuccess(created, payload) {
    if (created) {
      window.localStorage.setItem("latestReservation", JSON.stringify(created));
      const userReservations = JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("userReservations") || "[]");
      userReservations.unshift(created);
      window.localStorage.setItem("userReservations", JSON.stringify(userReservations));
      const allReservations = JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("allReservations") || "[]");
      allReservations.unshift(created);
      window.localStorage.setItem("allReservations", JSON.stringify(allReservations));
    }
    window.localStorage.setItem("tempReservation", JSON.stringify(payload));
    if (form.packageName === "custom") {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Custom package submitted. Please wait for admin approval before payment." });
      window.setTimeout(() => navigate("/dashboard?notice=custom_pending_approval"), 900);
      return;
    }
    window.sessionStorage.setItem(STANDARD_RESERVATION_DRAFT_KEY, JSON.stringify(payload));
    ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Reservation details saved. Continue to payment to complete your booking." });
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      navigate("/payment?draft=1&from=reservation");
    }, 900);
  }

  function handleClockPointer(event) {
    const rect = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
    setTimeDraft((current) => (
      (() => {
        const total = current.selecting === "hour" ? CLOCK_HOURS.length : CLOCK_MINUTES.length;
        const index = getClockIndexFromPointer(event.clientX, event.clientY, rect, total);
        return current.selecting === "hour"
          ? { ...current, hour12: CLOCK_HOURS[index] || 12 }
          : { ...current, minute: CLOCK_MINUTES[index] || "00" };
      })()
    ));
  }

  async function submitReservation() {
    const payload = buildPayload();
    if (isEditMode) {
      setSubmitting(true);
      try {
        await api.patch(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(editReservationId)}`, payload);
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Reservation updated successfully." });
        window.setTimeout(() => navigate("/dashboard?notice=reservation_updated"), 700);
      } catch (error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to update reservation" });
      } finally {
        setSubmitting(false);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (form.packageName !== "custom") {
      completeReservationSuccess(null, payload);
      return;
    }
    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/reservations", payload);
      completeReservationSuccess(response?.data?.reservation || null, payload);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to submit reservation" });
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSubmit() {
    setTouched((current) => ({
      ...current,
      fullName: true,
      email: true,
      phone: true,
      street: true,
      eventTypeOtherDetails: form.eventType === "other",
      eventDateTime: true,
      packageCustomDescription: form.packageName === "custom"
    }));
    const nextErrors = validate();
    if (Object.values(nextErrors).length) {
      const firstInvalidField = RESERVATION_FIELD_ORDER.find((field) => nextErrors[field]);
      if (firstInvalidField) scrollToField(firstInvalidField);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: Object.values(nextErrors)[0] });
      return;
    }
    if (!isReservationDateValid(form.eventDateTime)) {
      scrollToField("eventDateTime");
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: EVENT_DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE });
      return;
    }
    const availability = await checkAvailability(form.eventDateTime, { showModal: true, submitOnContinue: true });
    if (!availability.available) {
      if (availability.conflictType === "pending" || availability.conflictType === "approved") {
        return;
      }
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: availability.message || "Unable to check date availability right now." });
      return;
    }
    submitReservation();
  }

  async function handlePendingDateProceed() {
    const shouldSubmit = Boolean(dateConflictModal.submitOnContinue);
    setDateConflictModal({ open: false, type: "none", message: "", submitOnContinue: false });
    if (shouldSubmit) {
      submitReservation();
    }
  }

  function backTarget() {
    if (reservationFrom !== "dashboard") return "/";
    return hasAdminAccess(user?.role) ? "/admin" : "/dashboard";
  }

  if (loadingSession || loadingEditReservation) {
    return <PageLoadingScreen />;
  }

  if (editAccessError) {
    return (
      <div className={RESERVATION_PAGE_BG_CLASS}>
        <section className="px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 sm:py-10">
          <div className="mx-auto max-w-2xl">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => navigate("/dashboard")}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
              <span>Back to Dashboard</span>
            </button>
            <div className="mt-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white/90 p-8 text-center shadow-xl shadow-slate-300/30 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-10">
              <div className="mx-auto flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-amber-100 text-amber-600">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-lock text-2xl" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-5 inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-700">
                Editing Locked
              </p>
              <h1 className="mt-4 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-4xl">This reservation cannot be edited.</h1>
              <p className="mt-4 text-sm font-medium leading-6 text-slate-600 sm:text-base">{editAccessError}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (hasAdminAccess(user?.role)) {
    return (
      <div className={RESERVATION_PAGE_BG_CLASS}>
        <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 -z-10 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="absolute -right-24 -top-28 h-96 w-96 rounded-full bg-white/50 blur-3xl" />
          <div className="absolute -left-24 top-1/3 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-slate-100/80 blur-3xl" />
          <div className="absolute -bottom-28 right-1/4 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-white/40 blur-3xl" />
        </div>
        <section className="px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 sm:py-10">
          <div className="mx-auto max-w-2xl">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => navigate("/admin")}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
              <span>Back to Admin</span>
            </button>
            <div className="mt-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white/90 p-8 text-center shadow-xl shadow-slate-300/30 backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-10">
              <div className="mx-auto flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-amber-100 text-amber-600">
                <i className="fa-solid fa-ban text-2xl" />
              </div>
              <p className="mt-5 inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-amber-700">
                Admin Restriction
              </p>
              <h1 className="mt-4 text-3xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-4xl">Admins cannot create reservations.</h1>
              <p className="mt-4 text-sm font-medium leading-6 text-slate-600 sm:text-base">
                Reservation booking is only available for client accounts. Use the admin dashboard to review and manage incoming bookings instead.
              </p>
              <div className="mt-8 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:justify-center">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => navigate("/admin")}
                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-slate-900 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition-all hover:bg-slate-800"
                >
                  Go to Admin Dashboard
                </button>
                <Link
                  to="/admin?tab=admin-help"
                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-slate-300 bg-white px-6 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-700 transition-all hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50"
                >
                  Open Help Center
                </Link>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className={RESERVATION_PAGE_BG_CLASS}>
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
      `}</style>
      {dateConflictModal.open ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[130] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/50 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl bg-white p-6 shadow-2xl shadow-slate-900/20">
            <div className={`mx-auto flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl ${dateConflictModal.type === "approved" ? "bg-red-100 text-red-600" : "bg-amber-100 text-amber-600"}`}>
              <Icon className="h-7 w-7" path={dateConflictModal.type === "approved" ? <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 9v3.75m0 3.75h.007v.008H12v-.008zm8.25-.75A8.25 8.25 0 113.75 12a8.25 8.25 0 0116.5 0z" /> : <><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 9v3.75m0 3.75h.007v.008H12v-.008z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.34 3.94L1.82 18a1.5 1.5 0 001.28 2.25h17.8A1.5 1.5 0 0022.18 18L13.66 3.94a1.5 1.5 0 00-2.56 0z" /></>} />
            </div>
            <h3 className="mt-4 text-center text-xl font-black text-slate-900">Date Availability</h3>
            <p className="mt-3 text-center text-sm font-medium leading-6 text-slate-600">{dateConflictModal.message}</p>
            <div className="mt-6 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setDateConflictModal({ open: false, type: "none", message: "", submitOnContinue: false })}
                className="flex-1 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
              >
                {dateConflictModal.type === "approved" ? "Close" : "Choose Another Date"}
              </button>
              {dateConflictModal.type === "pending" ? (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handlePendingDateProceed}
                  className="flex-1 rounded-2xl bg-blue-600 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white hover:bg-blue-700"
                >
                  Continue
                </button>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
      {calendarOpen ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[210] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/45 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setCalendarOpen(false)}>
          <div ref={calendarPopupRef} className="w-full max-w-[24rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.5rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-slate-300/35" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="p-3 sm:p-4">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-900">Select date</p>
                <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-500">{calendarLoading ? "Loading..." : "Choose your event date"}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="mt-3 rounded-[1.35rem] bg-slate-100/85 p-3 sm:p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, -1))} className="inline-flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Previous month">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                    </svg>
                  </button>
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-900">{formatMonthLabel(calendarMonth)}</p>
                    <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-500">{eventDateParts.date ? formatDateLabel(eventDateParts.date) : "No date selected"}</p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setCalendarMonth((current) => addMonths(current, 1))} className="inline-flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 transition hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100" aria-label="Next month">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                    </svg>
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-7 gap-1 sm:gap-1.5">
                  {CALENDAR_WEEK_DAYS.map((day) => <p key={day} className="text-center text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">{day}</p>)}
                  {calendarDays.map((day) => {
                    const status = getCalendarDayStatus(day.dateKey);
                    const disabled = !day.inMonth || status === "approved" || status === "blocked";
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={day.dateKey}
                        type="button"
                        disabled={disabled}
                        onClick={async () => {
                          const nextTime = eventDateParts.time || minEventTime;
                          await handleEventDateTimePartChange(day.dateKey, nextTime);
                          setCalendarOpen(false);
                        }}
                        className={`aspect-square rounded-lg border text-[11px] font-bold transition-all disabled:cursor-not-allowed sm:text-xs ${calendarDayClass(day)}`}
                      >
                        {day.day}
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-700">
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-2 py-1"><span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-white ring-1 ring-slate-400" />Available</span>
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-1 text-blue-700"><span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-blue-500" />Pending</span>
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-2 py-1 text-red-700"><span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500" />Unavailable</span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setCalendarOpen(false)}
                    className="rounded-full bg-slate-900 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800"
                  >
                    Close
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
      {timeOpen ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[220] flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/45 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setTimeOpen(false)}>
          <div ref={timePopupRef} className="w-full max-w-[24rem] overflow-hidden rounded-[1.5rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-slate-300/35" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="p-3 sm:p-4">
              <div className="px-1">
                <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-900">Select time</p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-500">
                  {eventDateParts.date ? formatDateLabel(eventDateParts.date) : "Choose a date first"}
                </p>
              </div>
              <div className="mt-3 rounded-[1.35rem] bg-slate-100/85 p-3 sm:p-4">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setTimeDraft((current) => ({ ...current, selecting: "hour" }))}
                    className={`min-w-[84px] rounded-[1rem] px-3 py-2 text-left transition ${timeDraft.selecting === "hour" ? "bg-violet-300 text-violet-950" : "bg-white/70 text-slate-900"}`}
                  >
                    <span className="block text-[2rem] font-black leading-none">{String(timeDraft.hour12).padStart(2, "0")}</span>
                    <span className="mt-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em]">Hour</span>
                  </button>
                  <div className="pt-5 text-3xl font-black leading-none text-slate-900">:</div>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setTimeDraft((current) => ({ ...current, selecting: "minute" }))}
                    className={`min-w-[84px] rounded-[1rem] px-3 py-2 text-left transition ${timeDraft.selecting === "minute" ? "bg-violet-300 text-violet-950" : "bg-white/70 text-slate-900"}`}
                  >
                    <span className="block text-[2rem] font-black leading-none">{timeDraft.minute}</span>
                    <span className="mt-1 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em]">Minute</span>
                  </button>
                  <div className="ml-auto overflow-hidden rounded-[1rem] border border-slate-300 bg-white">
                    {["AM", "PM"].map((meridiem) => (
                      <button
                        key={meridiem}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setTimeDraft((current) => ({ ...current, meridiem }))}
                        className={`block w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm font-black transition ${timeDraft.meridiem === meridiem ? "bg-fuchsia-300 text-fuchsia-950" : "text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"}`}
                      >
                        {meridiem}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 flex justify-center">
                  <div
                    className="relative h-[240px] w-[240px] touch-none rounded-full bg-white/45 sm:h-[260px] sm:w-[260px]"
                    onPointerDown={(event) => {
                      event.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
                      handleClockPointer(event);
                    }}
                    onPointerMove={(event) => {
                      if ((event.buttons & 1) !== 1) return;
                      handleClockPointer(event);
                    }}
                  >
                    <div
                      className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 w-1 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-full origin-bottom rounded-full bg-violet-500 transition-transform duration-300"
                      style={getClockHandStyle(timeDraft, timeDraft.selecting)}
                    >
                      <div className="absolute left-1/2 top-[-6px] h-0 w-0 -translate-x-1/2 border-b-[9px] border-l-[5px] border-r-[5px] border-b-violet-500 border-l-transparent border-r-transparent" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 h-3 w-3 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-full bg-violet-500" />
                    {timeDraft.selecting === "hour"
                      ? CLOCK_HOURS.map((hour, index) => {
                          const selected = timeDraft.hour12 === hour;
                          const position = clockItemPosition(index, CLOCK_HOURS.length, 98);
                          return (
                            <button
                              key={hour}
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => setTimeDraft((current) => ({ ...current, hour12: hour, selecting: "minute" }))}
                              className={`absolute h-11 w-11 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-full text-lg font-black transition-all ${selected ? "bg-violet-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-300/60" : "text-slate-900 hover:bg-white/80"}`}
                              style={position}
                            >
                              {hour}
                            </button>
                          );
                        })
                      : CLOCK_MINUTE_MARKERS.map((minute) => {
                          const selected = timeDraft.minute === minute;
                          const position = clockItemPosition(Number(minute), CLOCK_MINUTES.length, 98);
                          return (
                            <button
                              key={minute}
                              type="button"
                              onClick={() => setTimeDraft((current) => ({ ...current, minute }))}
                              className={`absolute h-11 w-11 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-full text-sm font-black transition-all ${selected ? "bg-violet-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-300/60" : "text-slate-900 hover:bg-white/80"}`}
                              style={position}
                            >
                              {minute}
                            </button>
                          );
                        })}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setTimeOpen(false)}
                    className="rounded-full px-3 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-500 transition hover:bg-white/70 hover:text-slate-800"
                  >
                    Cancel
                  </button>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    disabled={!eventDateParts.date || (eventDateParts.date === minEventDate && buildTimeValueFromDraft(timeDraft) < minEventTime)}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const nextTime = buildTimeValueFromDraft(timeDraft);
                      await handleEventDateTimePartChange(eventDateParts.date, nextTime);
                      setTimeOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="rounded-full bg-violet-500 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-violet-600 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-slate-300"
                  >
                    OK
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
      <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 -z-10 overflow-hidden">
        <div className="absolute -right-24 -top-28 h-96 w-96 rounded-full bg-white/50 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute -left-24 top-1/3 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-slate-100/80 blur-3xl" />
        <div className="absolute -bottom-28 right-1/4 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-white/40 blur-3xl" />
      </div>

      <section className="relative overflow-visible px-3 pb-6 pt-6 sm:px-4 sm:pb-8 sm:pt-7 md:px-6 md:pb-10">
        <div className="mx-auto w-full max-w-[980px]">
          <div className="mb-4 flex w-full justify-start sm:mx-auto sm:mb-5 sm:max-w-3xl">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => navigate(backTarget())}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50"
            >
              <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xs" />
              <span>Back</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="mb-8 mt-2 w-full pb-3 sm:mx-auto sm:mb-20 sm:mt-3 sm:max-w-[760px] sm:pb-4">
            <BookingFlowStepper currentStep={1} />
          </div>
          <div className="text-center sm:mx-auto sm:max-w-3xl">
            <p className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-800 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/70">
              Reservation Form
            </p>
            <h2 className="mt-4 text-2xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl">Book Your Session</h2>
          </div>
          <form className="mt-6 space-y-4 sm:mx-auto sm:mt-8 sm:max-w-3xl sm:space-y-5 md:space-y-6" onSubmit={(event) => { event.preventDefault(); handleSubmit(); }} noValidate>
            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-30 overflow-visible`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <h3 className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}><Icon path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 6.75a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0114.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0112 21.75a17.933 17.933 0 01-7.499-1.632z" /></>} className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" /><span>Personal Information</span></h3>
              <div className="space-y-3 sm:space-y-4">
                <div ref={registerFieldRef("fullName")} className="relative"><input type="text" value={form.fullName} onChange={(event) => updateField("fullName", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.fullName, touched.fullName && !errors.fullName)} placeholder="Full Name" aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.fullName)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.fullName))}>Full Name</span>{touched.fullName ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.fullName))}>{errors.fullName || "Full name looks valid."}</p> : null}</div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-4">
                  <div ref={registerFieldRef("email")} className="relative"><input type="email" value={form.email} onChange={(event) => updateField("email", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.email, touched.email && !errors.email)} placeholder="Email" aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.email)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.email))}>Email</span>{touched.email ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.email))}>{errors.email || "Email looks valid."}</p> : null}</div>
                  <div ref={registerFieldRef("phone")} className="relative"><input type="tel" inputMode="numeric" maxLength={11} value={form.phone} onChange={(event) => updateField("phone", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.phone, touched.phone && !errors.phone)} placeholder="Phone" aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.phone)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.phone))}>Phone</span>{touched.phone ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.phone))}>{errors.phone || "Phone number looks valid."}</p> : null}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-40 overflow-visible`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <h3 className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}><Icon path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 21a9 9 0 100-18 9 9 0 000 18z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 12a3 3 0 100-6 3 3 0 000 6z" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 12v9" /></>} className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" /><span>Venue Location</span></h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:gap-4">
                <div><CustomSelect containerRef={registerFieldRef("province")} floatingLabel="Province" value={form.province} placeholder="Type or select province" options={[{ value: "", label: "Select Province" }, ...provinces.map((item) => ({ value: item.code, label: item.name }))]} onChange={(value) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, province: value, city: "", barangay: "" }))} error={Boolean(errors.province)} showIcon={false} searchable /></div>
                <div><CustomSelect containerRef={registerFieldRef("city")} floatingLabel="City / Municipality" value={form.city} placeholder={loadingOptions.cities ? "Loading cities..." : "Type or select city / municipality"} options={[{ value: "", label: "Select City / Municipality" }, ...cities.map((item) => ({ value: item.code, label: item.name }))]} onChange={(value) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, city: value, barangay: "" }))} disabled={!form.province || loadingOptions.cities} error={Boolean(errors.city)} showIcon={false} searchable /></div>
                <div><CustomSelect containerRef={registerFieldRef("barangay")} floatingLabel="Barangay" value={form.barangay} placeholder={loadingOptions.barangays ? "Loading barangays..." : "Type or select barangay"} options={[{ value: "", label: "Select Barangay" }, ...barangays.map((item) => ({ value: item.code, label: item.name }))]} onChange={(value) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, barangay: value }))} disabled={!form.city || loadingOptions.barangays} error={Boolean(errors.barangay)} showIcon={false} searchable /></div>
                <div ref={registerFieldRef("street")} className="relative"><input type="text" value={form.street} onChange={(event) => updateField("street", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.street, touched.street && !errors.street)} placeholder="Street / Building No." aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.street)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.street))}>Street / Building No.</span>{touched.street ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.street))}>{errors.street || "Street address looks valid."}</p> : null}</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-20 overflow-visible`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <h3 className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}><Icon path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.75 3v2.25M17.25 3v2.25M3 8.25h18" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4.5 5.25h15A1.5 1.5 0 0121 6.75v11.25a1.5 1.5 0 01-1.5 1.5h-15A1.5 1.5 0 013 18V6.75a1.5 1.5 0 011.5-1.5z" /></>} className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" /><span>Event Details</span></h3>
              <div className="space-y-3 sm:space-y-4">
                <div><CustomSelect containerRef={registerFieldRef("eventType")} floatingLabel="Event Type" value={form.eventType} placeholder="Select an event type" options={[{ value: "", label: "Select an event type" }, { value: "wedding", label: "Wedding" }, { value: "birthday", label: "Birthday" }, { value: "event", label: "Event" }, { value: "portrait", label: "Portrait" }, { value: "corporate", label: "Corporate" }, { value: "other", label: "Other" }]} onChange={(value) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, eventType: value, eventTypeOtherDetails: value === "other" ? current.eventTypeOtherDetails : "" }))} iconPath={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.75 3v2.25M17.25 3v2.25M3 8.25h18" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4.5 5.25h15A1.5 1.5 0 0121 6.75v11.25a1.5 1.5 0 01-1.5 1.5h-15A1.5 1.5 0 013 18V6.75a1.5 1.5 0 011.5-1.5z" /></>} error={Boolean(errors.eventType)} /></div>
                {form.eventType === "other" ? <div ref={registerFieldRef("eventTypeOtherDetails")} className="relative"><input type="text" value={form.eventTypeOtherDetails} onChange={(event) => updateField("eventTypeOtherDetails", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.eventTypeOtherDetails, touched.eventTypeOtherDetails && !errors.eventTypeOtherDetails)} placeholder="Specify Other Event" aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.eventTypeOtherDetails)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.eventTypeOtherDetails))}>Specify Other Event</span>{touched.eventTypeOtherDetails ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.eventTypeOtherDetails))}>{errors.eventTypeOtherDetails || "Event detail looks valid."}</p> : null}</div> : null}
                <div ref={registerFieldRef("eventDateTime")}>
                  <div className="mb-3 flex items-start gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-3 text-amber-900 shadow-sm shadow-amber-100/60">
                    <span className="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-amber-100 text-amber-600">
                      <i className="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-sm" />
                    </span>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      <p className="text-sm font-semibold leading-6">Book at least 3 days ahead. Pending dates may still proceed, but approved dates are unavailable.</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-amber-700">
                        Earliest available date: {formatDateLabel(minEventDate)}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 md:items-end">
                    <div className="relative">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setCalendarOpen((current) => !current)}
                        className="relative flex h-[52px] w-full items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 text-left shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/40 transition hover:border-slate-400"
                        aria-label="Open date picker"
                        aria-expanded={calendarOpen}
                      >
                        {eventDateParts.date ? <span className={staticFloatingLabelClass(true)}>Date</span> : null}
                        <span className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-600">
                          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 7V4m8 3V4m-9 8h10m-11 8h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v10a2 2 0 0 0 2 2z" />
                          </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span className={`min-w-0 flex-1 text-sm font-semibold ${eventDateParts.date ? "pt-4 text-slate-900" : "text-slate-500"}`}>
                          {formatDateLabel(eventDateParts.date)}
                        </span>
                        <span className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 transition-colors group-hover:text-slate-700">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-up-right-and-down-left-from-center text-[12px]" />
                        </span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    <div ref={timePopupRef} className="relative">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setTimeOpen((current) => !current)}
                        className="relative flex h-[52px] w-full items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 text-left shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/40 transition hover:border-slate-400"
                        aria-label="Open time picker"
                        aria-expanded={timeOpen}
                      >
                        {eventDateParts.time ? <span className={staticFloatingLabelClass(true)}>Time</span> : null}
                        <span className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-600">
                          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6v6l4 2" />
                            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
                          </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span className={`min-w-0 flex-1 text-sm font-semibold ${eventDateParts.time ? "pt-4 text-slate-900" : "text-slate-500"}`}>
                          {eventDateParts.time ? formatTimeLabel(eventDateParts.time) : "Select time"}
                        </span>
                        <span className="inline-flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 transition-colors group-hover:text-slate-700">
                          <i className="fa-solid fa-up-right-and-down-left-from-center text-[12px]" />
                        </span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {touched.eventDateTime ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.eventDateTime || warning))}>{warning || errors.eventDateTime || "Date and time are available."}</p> : null}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-0`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <h3 className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}><Icon path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 7h.01M6 3h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l8.414 8.414a1 1 0 010 1.414l-7.586 7.586a1 1 0 01-1.414 0L3.293 12.293A1 1 0 013 11.586V6a3 3 0 013-3z" /></>} className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" /><span>Package</span></h3>
              <div className="space-y-3 sm:space-y-4">
                <div ref={registerFieldRef("packageName")}>
                  <label className="mb-3 block text-sm font-semibold text-black">Select Package</label>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:gap-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
                    {PACKAGES.map((item) => (
                      <button
                        key={item.value}
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, packageName: item.value, packageCustomDescription: item.value === "custom" ? current.packageCustomDescription : "" }))}
                        className={`group relative overflow-visible rounded-[1.1rem] border px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition-all duration-300 ${
                          form.packageName === item.value
                            ? "border-slate-900 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.96),rgba(30,41,59,0.92))] text-white shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.24)]"
                            : "border-slate-200 bg-white/90 text-slate-900 shadow-[0_14px_30px_rgba(148,163,184,0.14)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-sky-300 hover:shadow-[0_18px_38px_rgba(56,189,248,0.18)]"
                        } min-h-[118px]`}
                      >
                        {popularPackage === item.value ? (
                          <span className={`absolute -top-2.5 right-3 z-20 inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-orange-200/60 px-2.5 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white shadow-lg ${
                            form.packageName === item.value
                              ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-amber-400 ring-4 ring-slate-900 shadow-orange-500/35"
                              : "bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-amber-400 ring-4 ring-white shadow-orange-500/35"
                          }`}>
                            Most Popular
                          </span>
                        ) : null}
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                          <div>
                            <p className={`text-sm font-black tracking-tight ${form.packageName === item.value ? "text-white" : "text-slate-900"}`}>{item.title}</p>
                            <p className={`mt-1 text-[11px] font-medium leading-4.5 ${form.packageName === item.value ? "text-slate-200" : "text-slate-500"}`}>{item.subtitle}</p>
                          </div>
                          <span className={`inline-flex h-6.5 w-6.5 items-center justify-center rounded-full border transition-all ${
                            form.packageName === item.value
                              ? "border-white/20 bg-white/10 text-white"
                              : "border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 group-hover:border-sky-200 group-hover:bg-sky-50 group-hover:text-sky-600"
                          }`}>
                            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-3 w-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 7h.01" />
                              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 3h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l8.414 8.414a1 1 0 010 1.414l-7.586 7.586a1 1 0 01-1.414 0L3.293 12.293A1 1 0 013 11.586V6a3 3 0 013-3z" />
                            </svg>
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        {item.price ? (
                          <p className={`mt-2 text-[15px] font-black tracking-tight ${form.packageName === item.value ? "text-sky-300" : "text-sky-700"}`}>
                            {item.price}
                          </p>
                        ) : null}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
                {form.packageName === "custom" ? <div ref={registerFieldRef("packageCustomDescription")} className="relative"><input type="text" value={form.packageCustomDescription} onChange={(event) => updateField("packageCustomDescription", event.target.value)} className={fieldClass(errors.packageCustomDescription, touched.packageCustomDescription && !errors.packageCustomDescription)} placeholder="Custom Package Description" aria-invalid={Boolean(errors.packageCustomDescription)} /><span className={floatingLabelClass(Boolean(form.packageCustomDescription))}>Custom Package Description</span>{touched.packageCustomDescription ? <p className={helperTextClass(Boolean(errors.packageCustomDescription))}>{errors.packageCustomDescription || "Custom package description looks valid."}</p> : null}</div> : null}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div ref={registerFieldRef("terms")} className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-0`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <h3 className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}><Icon path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M7.5 8.25h9M7.5 12h9m-9 3.75h5.25" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.75 3.75h10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0119.5 6v12A2.25 2.25 0 0117.25 20.25H6.75A2.25 2.25 0 014.5 18V6a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25z" /></>} className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" /><span>Additional Notes</span></h3>
              <textarea rows="4" value={form.additionalNotes} onChange={(event) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, additionalNotes: event.target.value }))} className="w-full resize-none rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-base text-slate-900 shadow-sm shadow-slate-200/40 outline-none transition-all hover:border-slate-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/40 sm:px-5 sm:py-3.5 sm:text-sm" placeholder="Tell us about your vision..." />
            </div>

            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-0`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <label className="flex cursor-pointer items-start gap-3">
                <input type="checkbox" checked={form.terms} onChange={(event) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, terms: event.target.checked }))} className="mt-0.5 h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white accent-blue-500 transition-all focus:border-blue-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/40" />
                <span className="text-sm leading-relaxed text-slate-800">I agree to the <Link to="/terms" state={{ returnTo: `${location.pathname}${location.search}` }} onClick={handleTermsOpen} className="font-bold text-sky-700 underline decoration-2 underline-offset-2 transition-colors hover:text-sky-900">Terms & Conditions</Link></span>
              </label>
            </div>

            <div className={`${FORM_SECTION_CARD_CLASS} relative z-0`}>
              <div className={FORM_SECTION_BAR_CLASS} />
              <p className={FORM_SECTION_TITLE_CLASS}>
                <Icon
                  path={<><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75" /><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" /></>}
                  className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500"
                />
                <span>Ready To Submit</span>
              </p>
              <p className="mt-3 text-base font-medium text-black">
                {isEditMode
                  ? "Review your updated reservation details, confirm the terms, then save your changes."
                  : "Review your reservation details, confirm the terms, then send your booking request."}
              </p>
              <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5">
                <Link to={backTarget()} className="inline-flex min-h-[52px] items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-red-300 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-rose-500 px-6 py-3.5 text-center text-base font-bold text-white shadow-xl shadow-red-500/25 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:from-red-600 hover:to-rose-600 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-red-500/35 sm:text-sm sm:border-slate-300 sm:bg-white sm:text-slate-700 sm:shadow-sm sm:shadow-slate-200/40 sm:hover:border-red-300 sm:hover:bg-gradient-to-r sm:hover:from-red-500 sm:hover:to-rose-500 sm:hover:text-white sm:hover:shadow-xl sm:hover:shadow-red-500/25">Cancel</Link>
                <button type="submit" disabled={submitting || checkingAvailability} className="group/submit flex min-h-[52px] items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-500 px-6 py-3.5 text-base font-bold text-white shadow-xl shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:scale-[1.01] hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-cyan-500/35 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-70 sm:text-sm">
                  {submitting || checkingAvailability ? <Loader /> : (
                    <span className="relative inline-flex h-6 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                      <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 group-hover/submit:-translate-y-8 group-hover/submit:opacity-0 sm:hidden">{isEditMode ? "Save" : "Submit"}</span>
                      <span className="hidden items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 group-hover/submit:-translate-y-8 group-hover/submit:opacity-0 sm:inline-flex">{isEditMode ? "Save Changes" : "Submit Reservation"}</span>
                      <span className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap translate-y-8 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 group-hover/submit:translate-y-0 group-hover/submit:opacity-100">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m5 13 4 4L19 7" />
                        </svg>
                        <span>{isEditMode ? "Save" : "Submit"}</span>
                      </span>
                    </span>
                  )}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}

Source file 90 of 111

import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import ReactDOM from "react-dom/client";
import { BrowserRouter } from "react-router-dom";
import App from "./App";
import { wakeBackend } from "./shared/services/api";
import { PageLoadingScreen } from "./shared/components/LoadingState";
import "./tailwind.css";

function readBootstrapDelay(value, fallback) {
  const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(value || "").trim(), 10);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed >= 0 ? parsed : fallback;
}

const MIN_BOOTSTRAP_MS = readBootstrapDelay(import.meta.env.VITE_BOOTSTRAP_MIN_MS, 800);
const MAX_BOOTSTRAP_MS = readBootstrapDelay(import.meta.env.VITE_BOOTSTRAP_MAX_MS, 8000);

function delay(ms) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    window.setTimeout(resolve, ms);
  });
}

function BootstrapApp() {
  const [ready, setReady] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;

    Promise.all([
      Promise.race([wakeBackend(), delay(MAX_BOOTSTRAP_MS)]),
      delay(MIN_BOOTSTRAP_MS)
    ]).finally(() => {
      if (active) setReady(true);
    });

    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, []);

  if (!ready) return <PageLoadingScreen />;

  return <App />;
}

function GlobalBackgroundSync() {
  useEffect(() => {
    const rootElement = document.getElementById("root");
    const htmlElement = document.documentElement;

    const syncBackground = () => {
      const computed = window.getComputedStyle(document.body);
      const backgroundColor = computed.backgroundColor || "#020617";
      const backgroundImage = computed.backgroundImage || "none";

      htmlElement.style.backgroundColor = backgroundColor;
      htmlElement.style.backgroundImage = backgroundImage;
      document.body.style.backgroundColor = backgroundColor;

      if (rootElement) {
        rootElement.style.backgroundColor = backgroundColor;
        rootElement.style.backgroundImage = backgroundImage;
        rootElement.style.minHeight = "100%";
      }
    };

    syncBackground();

    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
      syncBackground();
    });

    observer.observe(document.body, {
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: ["class", "style"]
    });

    window.addEventListener("resize", syncBackground);
    window.addEventListener("pageshow", syncBackground);

    return () => {
      observer.disconnect();
      window.removeEventListener("resize", syncBackground);
      window.removeEventListener("pageshow", syncBackground);
    };
  }, []);

  return null;
}

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <GlobalBackgroundSync />
      <BootstrapApp />
    </BrowserRouter>
  </React.StrictMode>
);
