Source file 91 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import StatusBadge from "../components/payment/StatusBadge";
import api from "../services/api";

const PACKAGE_CATALOG = {
  basic: { name: "Basic", price: 2700 },
  standard: { name: "Standard", price: 3500 },
  premium: { name: "Premium", price: 4500 }
};

const WALLETS = {
  gcash: { label: "GCash", accountName: "SnapQueue", accountNumber: "+639095339528" },
  maya: { label: "Maya", accountName: "SnapQueue", accountNumber: "+639095339528" }
};

const REFERENCE_PATTERN = /^\d{12}$/;

function formatCurrency(amount, currency = "PHP") {
  const value = Number(amount || 0);
  return `${currency} ${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
}

function formatDateTime(value) {
  if (!value) return "Pending";
  const date = new Date(value);
  return Number.isNaN(date.getTime())
    ? "Pending"
    : date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
        month: "short",
        day: "numeric",
        year: "numeric",
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit"
      });
}

function getPackageMeta(reservation) {
  const rawName = String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "").trim();
  const normalized = rawName.toLowerCase();
  const mapped = PACKAGE_CATALOG[normalized] || null;
  const packagePrice = Number(reservation?.packagePrice);
  const finalPrice = Number(reservation?.finalPrice);
  return {
    name: normalized === "custom" ? "Custom" : mapped?.name || rawName || "Package",
    price:
      Number.isFinite(finalPrice) && finalPrice > 0
        ? finalPrice
        : Number.isFinite(packagePrice) && packagePrice > 0
          ? packagePrice
          : Number(mapped?.price || 0)
  };
}

function isCustomReservation(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.packageName || reservation?.package || reservation?.service || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase() === "custom";
}

function getEventLabel(reservation) {
  const eventType = String(reservation?.eventType || "").trim();
  if (eventType.toLowerCase() === "other" && String(reservation?.eventTypeOtherDetails || "").trim()) {
    return `Other - ${reservation.eventTypeOtherDetails.trim()}`;
  }
  return eventType || "Event";
}

function getDisplayReservationId(reservation) {
  return String(reservation?.reservationCode || reservation?._id || reservation?.id || "Pending").trim() || "Pending";
}

function buildQrUrl(method) {
  const wallet = WALLETS[method] || WALLETS.gcash;
  const payload = `${wallet.label}|${wallet.accountName}|${wallet.accountNumber}`;
  return `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=240x240&data=${encodeURIComponent(payload)}`;
}

function readFileAsDataUrl(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => resolve(String(reader.result || ""));
    reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to read uploaded image."));
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

function inputClass() {
  return "w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-800 outline-none transition focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100";
}

function validatedInputClass(hasValue, hasError) {
  const base = "w-full rounded-lg border-2 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-800 outline-none transition-all";
  if (!hasValue) return `${base} border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100`;
  if (hasError) return `${base} field-shake border-red-500 bg-red-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-200`;
  return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200`;
}

function validationLabelClass(hasError, hasValue) {
  if (hasError) return "mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-red-600";
  if (hasValue) return "mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-emerald-600";
  return "mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500";
}

function validationHelperClass(hasError) {
  return `mt-1 text-xs font-semibold ${hasError ? "text-red-600" : "text-emerald-600"}`;
}

function Shell({ children, plain = false }) {
  return (
    <div className={`${plain ? "block bg-white px-0 py-0" : "flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50 to-slate-100 px-3 py-3 sm:px-4 md:px-6 md:py-4"} min-h-screen text-slate-900`}>
      <style>{`
        .field-shake{animation:fieldShake 360ms ease-in-out;}
        @keyframes fieldShake{
          0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
          20%{transform:translateX(-6px);}
          40%{transform:translateX(5px);}
          60%{transform:translateX(-4px);}
          80%{transform:translateX(3px);}
        }
      `}</style>
      {!plain ? (
        <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 -z-10 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="absolute -right-20 -top-24 h-96 w-96 rounded-full bg-blue-300/20 blur-3xl" />
          <div className="absolute -left-16 top-1/3 h-80 w-80 rounded-full bg-cyan-200/20 blur-3xl" />
        </div>
      ) : null}
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function SectionLabel({ children }) {
  return <h3 className="text-[15px] font-black text-slate-800 sm:text-base">{children}</h3>;
}

function WalletLogo({ type }) {
  const src = type === "gcash" ? "/images/Gcash.png" : "/images/Maya.png";
  const bgClass = type === "gcash" ? "bg-blue-500" : "bg-black";
  return (
    <div className={`flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-lg ${bgClass}`}>
      <img src={src} alt={type === "gcash" ? "GCash" : "Maya"} className="h-full w-full object-cover" />
    </div>
  );
}

function WalletOption({ walletKey, item, selected, onSelect }) {
  const active = selected === walletKey;
  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={() => onSelect(walletKey)}
      className={`flex w-full items-center gap-2.5 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-left transition ${active ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50 shadow-sm" : "border-slate-200 bg-white hover:border-slate-300"}`}
    >
      <span className={`inline-flex h-4 w-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full border ${active ? "border-blue-500" : "border-slate-400"}`}>
        {active ? <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-blue-500" /> : null}
      </span>
      <WalletLogo type={walletKey} />
      <div className="min-w-0">
        <p className="text-sm font-bold leading-tight text-slate-900">{item.label}</p>
        <p className="truncate text-[11px] text-slate-500">{item.accountNumber}</p>
      </div>
    </button>
  );
}

function SummaryRow({ label, value, strong = false }) {
  return (
    <div className={`flex items-center justify-between gap-4 text-sm ${strong ? "font-black text-slate-900" : "font-medium text-slate-600"}`}>
      <span>{label}</span>
      <span>{value}</span>
    </div>
  );
}

function ReceiptDocument({ reservation, payment, amountText, paymentStatus }) {
  const clientName = reservation?.fullName || "SnapQueue Client";
  const reservationRef = getDisplayReservationId(reservation);
  const packageLabel = reservation ? getPackageMeta(reservation).name : "Package";
  const eventLabel = reservation ? getEventLabel(reservation) : "Event";
  const eventDate = formatDateTime(reservation?.eventDateTime || reservation?.eventDate);
  const paymentMethod = String(payment?.method || "Manual").trim().toUpperCase();
  const paymentRef = payment?.referenceNumber || payment?._id || "Pending";
  const printedAt = formatDateTime(new Date());
  const statusLabel = String(paymentStatus || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase();
  const contactValue = reservation?.email || reservation?.phone || "Pending";
  const addressValue = [
    reservation?.street,
    reservation?.barangay,
    reservation?.city,
    reservation?.province
  ].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "Pending";
  const durationValue = reservation?.durationHours || reservation?.duration || reservation?.packageDuration || "-";
  const hasRefundRecord = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase() !== "none" || String(payment?.status || "").toLowerCase() === "refunded";

  return (
    <div className="mx-auto w-full max-w-[210mm] bg-white text-[#111827] print:max-w-none">
      <div className="min-h-[297mm] p-[7mm_8mm_8mm] print:min-h-[297mm]">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-[1.45fr_1fr] gap-[8mm] items-start">
          <table className="w-full border-collapse text-[8px] leading-[1.25]">
            <tbody>
              <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Client Name</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{clientName}</td></tr>
              <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Package</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{packageLabel}</td></tr>
              <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Event Type</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{eventLabel}</td></tr>
              <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Address</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{addressValue}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
          <div>
            <div className="m-0 mb-[2px] text-[10px] font-bold">SnapQueue Payment Receipt</div>
            <p className="m-0 text-[7.5px] text-slate-700">Official payment submission record</p>
            <table className="mt-[3mm] w-full border-collapse text-[8px] leading-[1.25]">
              <tbody>
                <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Receipt No.</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{paymentRef}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Ref ID</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{reservationRef}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Printed</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{printedAt}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="w-[22mm] py-[1px] font-bold">Status</td><td className="w-[4mm] py-[1px] text-center">:</td><td className="py-[1px]">{statusLabel}</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <table className="mt-[5mm] w-full table-fixed border-collapse text-[7px] leading-[1.2]">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-slate-100">
              <th className="w-[9%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Item</th>
              <th className="w-[17%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Reference</th>
              <th className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Description</th>
              <th className="w-[8%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Method</th>
              <th className="w-[10%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Status</th>
              <th className="w-[19%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Date / Time</th>
              <th className="w-[12%] border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center font-bold">Amount</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">01</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">{reservationRef}</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">{packageLabel}<br />Event: {eventLabel}<br />Customer: {clientName}</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{paymentMethod}</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{statusLabel}</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">{eventDate}</td>
              <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{amountText}</td>
            </tr>
            {hasRefundRecord ? (
              <tr>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">02</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">{paymentRef}</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">Refund status: {String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toUpperCase()}<br />Payout account: {String(payment?.refundPayoutMethod || "-").toUpperCase()} {payment?.refundPayoutNumber || "-"}<br />Reference: {payment?.refundReferenceNumber || "-"}</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{String(payment?.refundPayoutMethod || paymentMethod).toUpperCase()}</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{String(payment?.refundStatus || payment?.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px]">{formatDateTime(payment?.refundProcessedAt || payment?.refundResolvedAt || payment?.updatedAt || new Date())}</td>
                <td className="border border-slate-700 px-[3px] py-[2px] text-center">{amountText}</td>
              </tr>
            ) : null}
          </tbody>
        </table>

        <div className="mt-[6mm] grid grid-cols-2 gap-[10mm] items-start">
          <div>
            <p className="m-0 mb-[2mm] text-[8px] font-bold uppercase">Receipt Summary</p>
            <table className="w-full border-collapse text-[7px] leading-[1.25]">
              <tbody>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Package / Service</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{packageLabel}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Event Type</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{eventLabel}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Event Schedule</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{eventDate}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Payment Method</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{paymentMethod}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Reference Number</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{paymentRef}</td></tr>
                {hasRefundRecord ? <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Refund Status</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{String(payment?.refundStatus || payment?.status || "pending").replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}</td></tr> : null}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="m-0 mb-[2mm] text-[8px] font-bold uppercase">Payment Totals</p>
            <table className="w-full border-collapse text-[7px] leading-[1.25]">
              <tbody>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Base Amount</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{amountText}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Processing Fee</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">PHP 0.00</td></tr>
                <tr className="font-bold"><td className="py-[1px]">Total Paid</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{amountText}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Receipt Status</td><td className="whitespace-nowrap py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{statusLabel}</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-[9mm] grid grid-cols-[1.4fr_1fr] gap-[10mm] text-[6.8px] leading-[1.35]">
          <div>
            <span className="font-bold">IMPORTANT:</span> Verify all reservation and payment information before printing. This receipt serves as the official payment submission record for the reservation shown above. <strong>This receipt cannot be used for tax claims.</strong>
          </div>
          <div className="justify-self-end w-full max-w-[50mm]">
            <table className="w-full border-collapse">
              <tbody>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Date Printed</td><td className="py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">{printedAt}</td></tr>
                <tr><td className="py-[1px]">Prepared By</td><td className="py-[1px] pl-[4mm] text-right">SnapQueue System</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function Payment() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const bodyClassRef = useRef(document.body.className);
  const params = useMemo(() => new URLSearchParams(location.search), [location.search]);
  const reservationId = String(params.get("reservationId") || "").trim();
  const receiptMode = String(params.get("payment") || "").trim().toLowerCase() === "success";
  const receiptPreviewMode = String(params.get("preview") || "").trim() === "1";
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const ignoreFeedback = () => {};
  const [reservation, setReservation] = useState(null);
  const [payment, setPayment] = useState(null);
  const [method, setMethod] = useState("");
  const [referenceNumber, setReferenceNumber] = useState("");
  const [proofUrl, setProofUrl] = useState("");
  const [proofName, setProofName] = useState("");
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [promoCode, setPromoCode] = useState("");
  const [termsAccepted, setTermsAccepted] = useState(false);
  const [qrFullscreenOpen, setQrFullscreenOpen] = useState(false);
  const [submittedSuccess, setSubmittedSuccess] = useState(false);
  const [submitAttempted, setSubmitAttempted] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.title = "SnapQueue";
    document.body.className = receiptMode
      ? "min-h-screen bg-white font-sans relative overflow-x-hidden"
      : "min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50 to-slate-100 font-sans relative overflow-x-hidden";
    return () => {
      document.body.className = bodyClassRef.current;
    };
  }, [receiptMode]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const load = async () => {
      const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
      if (!token) {
        navigate("/login", { replace: true });
        return;
      }
      try {
        await api.get("/auth/me");
      } catch (_error) {
        window.localStorage.removeItem("token");
        navigate("/login", { replace: true });
        return;
      }

      try {
        if (receiptMode && reservationId) {
          const response = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`);
          setReservation(response?.data?.reservation || null);
          setPayment(response?.data?.payment || null);
        } else if (reservationId) {
          const reservationResponse = await api.get(`/reservations/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`);
          setReservation(reservationResponse?.data?.reservation || null);
          try {
            const paymentResponse = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(reservationId)}`);
            const existingPayment = paymentResponse?.data?.payment || null;
            setPayment(existingPayment);
            if (existingPayment?.referenceNumber) setReferenceNumber(String(existingPayment.referenceNumber));
          } catch (_error) {
            setPayment(null);
          }
        } else {
          const response = await api.get("/reservations");
          const reservations = Array.isArray(response?.data?.reservations) ? response.data.reservations : [];
          const payable =
            reservations.find((item) => {
              const status = String(item?.status || "").toLowerCase();
              const pricingStatus = String(item?.pricingStatus || "").toLowerCase();
              return !["rejected", "completed"].includes(status) && (isCustomReservation(item) ? pricingStatus === "accepted" : true);
            }) || null;
          setReservation(payable);
          if (payable?._id || payable?.id) {
            try {
              const paymentResponse = await api.get(`/payments/reservation/${encodeURIComponent(payable._id || payable.id)}`);
              const existingPayment = paymentResponse?.data?.payment || null;
              setPayment(existingPayment);
              if (existingPayment?.referenceNumber) setReferenceNumber(String(existingPayment.referenceNumber));
            } catch (_error) {
              setPayment(null);
            }
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {
        ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Unable to load payment details." });
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    load();
  }, [navigate, receiptMode, reservationId]);

  const packageMeta = useMemo(() => getPackageMeta(reservation), [reservation]);
  const wallet = WALLETS[method] || null;
  const paymentStatus = String(payment?.status || "none").toLowerCase();
  const refundStatus = String(payment?.refundStatus || "none").toLowerCase();
  const canSubmitProof = Boolean(reservation?._id) && !["pending", "processing", "needs_review", "verified", "refunded"].includes(paymentStatus);
  const amountText = reservation ? formatCurrency(payment?.amount || packageMeta.price, reservation.currency || "PHP") : "PHP 0.00";
  const referenceHasValue = referenceNumber.length > 0;
  const referenceHasError = (referenceHasValue || submitAttempted) && !REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(referenceNumber);
  const proofHasError = submitAttempted && !proofUrl;

  async function handleProofChange(event) {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    if (!file.type.startsWith("image/")) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please upload an image file only." });
      return;
    }
    if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Image is too large. Max 5MB." });
      return;
    }
    try {
      setProofUrl(await readFileAsDataUrl(file));
      setProofName(file.name);
      setSubmitAttempted(false);
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.message || "Failed to read image." });
    }
  }

  async function handleSubmit(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    setSubmitAttempted(true);
    if (!reservation?._id || !canSubmitProof) return;
    if (!method) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please choose a payment method first." });
      return;
    }
    if (!REFERENCE_PATTERN.test(referenceNumber.trim())) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Reference number must be exactly 12 digits." });
      return;
    }
    if (!proofUrl) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "Please upload payment proof." });
      return;
    }
    if (!termsAccepted) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: "You must agree to the terms and conditions." });
      return;
    }
    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/payments", {
        reservationId: reservation._id,
        method,
        amount: Number(packageMeta.price || 0),
        referenceNumber: referenceNumber.trim(),
        proofUrl
      });
      const nextPayment = response?.data?.payment || null;
      setPayment(nextPayment);
      setSubmittedSuccess(true);
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "success", message: "Payment proof submitted. Waiting for admin verification." });
    } catch (error) {
      ignoreFeedback({ variant: "error", message: error?.response?.data?.message || error?.message || "Failed to submit payment." });
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return null;
  }

  if (submittedSuccess) {
    return (
      <Shell>
        <div className="w-full max-w-[600px] rounded-[1.5rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-xl lg:max-w-[600px]">
          <div className="p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-6">
            <div>
              <div className="mx-auto flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600 lg:h-14 lg:w-14">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-8 w-8 lg:h-7 lg:w-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2.5" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div className="mt-5 text-center lg:mt-4">
                <p className="text-2xl font-black text-slate-900 lg:text-xl">Payment Successful</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-600 lg:mx-auto lg:max-w-xl">
                  Your payment proof has been submitted successfully. Please wait for admin verification before your reservation moves to the next step.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4 lg:mx-auto lg:mt-5 lg:max-w-[460px]">
              <div className="space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-700">
                <p><span className="font-bold text-slate-900">Service:</span> {reservation ? packageMeta.name : "-"}</p>
                <p><span className="font-bold text-slate-900">Amount:</span> {amountText}</p>
                <p><span className="font-bold text-slate-900">Reference Number:</span> {referenceNumber || payment?.referenceNumber || "-"}</p>
                  <p><span className="font-bold text-slate-900">Status:</span> <span className="font-black uppercase text-amber-600">{String(payment?.status || "needs_review").replaceAll("_", " ")}</span></p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-6 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:mx-auto lg:mt-5 lg:max-w-[380px]">
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  setSubmittedSuccess(false);
                  navigate("/dashboard");
                }}
                className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-blue-700"
              >
                Back to Dashboard
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  setSubmittedSuccess(false);
                  if (reservation?._id) {
                    navigate(`/payment?reservationId=${encodeURIComponent(reservation._id)}&from=dashboard`);
                  }
                }}
                className="rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-100"
              >
                Back to Payment Page
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Shell>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Shell plain={receiptMode}>
      {!receiptMode ? (
        <Link to="/dashboard" className="hidden md:absolute md:left-6 md:top-6 md:inline-flex md:items-center md:gap-1.5 md:rounded-full md:border md:border-slate-200 md:bg-white md:px-3 md:py-2 md:text-xs md:font-semibold md:text-slate-700 md:shadow-sm md:transition-all md:hover:border-blue-200 md:hover:bg-blue-50 md:hover:text-blue-600">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2.25" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" /></svg>
          <span>Dashboard</span>
        </Link>
      ) : null}

      {receiptMode ? (
        <div className="w-full px-3 py-3 sm:px-4 md:px-6 md:py-4">
          {!receiptPreviewMode ? (
          <div className="mx-auto mb-3 flex w-full max-w-[210mm] items-center justify-between gap-3 print:hidden">
            <Link to="/dashboard" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-100">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2.25" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
              </svg>
              <span>Back</span>
            </Link>
            <button type="button" onClick={() => window.print()} className="rounded-lg bg-orange-500 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-orange-600">
              Print Receipt
            </button>
          </div>
          ) : null}
          <ReceiptDocument reservation={reservation} payment={payment} amountText={amountText} paymentStatus={paymentStatus} />
        </div>
      ) : (
      <div className="w-full max-w-[980px] rounded-[1.5rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-xl">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-3 sm:px-5">
          <div className="text-left">
            <p className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 sm:text-xl">{receiptMode ? "Official Receipt" : "Finalize Reservation"}</p>
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500 sm:text-sm">
              {receiptMode ? "Review your verified payment details and proof below." : "Submit your payment proof for admin verification."}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid gap-0 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_340px]">
          <form id="payment-checkout-form" onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="border-b border-slate-200 p-4 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r lg:p-5">
            <div>
              <SectionLabel>Payment Details</SectionLabel>
              <div className="mt-3 grid gap-2.5 sm:grid-cols-2">
                {Object.entries(WALLETS).map(([key, item]) => (
                  <WalletOption key={key} walletKey={key} item={item} selected={method} onSelect={setMethod} />
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
              {wallet ? (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-3">
                  <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-[124px_minmax(0,1fr)] md:items-start">
                    <div className="mx-auto">
                      <img
                        src={buildQrUrl(method)}
                        alt={`${wallet.label} QR code`}
                        onDoubleClick={() => setQrFullscreenOpen(true)}
                        className="h-24 w-24 cursor-zoom-in rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-1.5 object-contain md:h-28 md:w-28"
                      />
                      <p className="mt-2 text-center text-[11px] font-semibold text-slate-500">Double-click QR to enlarge</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500">Wallet details</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{wallet.label}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{wallet.accountName}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{wallet.accountNumber}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : null}

              <div>
                <label className={validationLabelClass(referenceHasError, referenceHasValue)}>Reference Number</label>
                <input
                  value={referenceNumber}
                  onChange={(event) => setReferenceNumber(event.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 12))}
                  inputMode="numeric"
                  pattern="[0-9]*"
                  maxLength={12}
                  placeholder="Enter 12-digit reference"
                  className={validatedInputClass(referenceHasValue, referenceHasError)}
                  aria-invalid={referenceHasError}
                  disabled={!canSubmitProof || submitting}
                />
                {referenceHasValue || submitAttempted ? (
                  <p className={validationHelperClass(referenceHasError)}>
                    {referenceHasError
                      ? (referenceHasValue ? "Reference number must be exactly 12 digits." : "Reference number is required.")
                      : "Reference number looks valid."}
                  </p>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              <div>
                <label className={validationLabelClass(proofHasError, Boolean(proofUrl))}>Upload Proof</label>
                <label className={`flex min-h-[82px] cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-dashed px-4 py-2.5 text-center transition hover:bg-slate-50 ${proofHasError ? "field-shake border-red-500 bg-red-50" : proofUrl ? "border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-50" : "border-slate-300 bg-white"} ${!canSubmitProof || submitting ? "cursor-not-allowed opacity-60" : ""}`}>
                  <input type="file" accept="image/*" className="hidden" onChange={handleProofChange} disabled={!canSubmitProof || submitting} />
                  <span className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">{proofName || "Click to upload screenshot"}</span>
                  <span className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">PNG / JPG up to 5MB</span>
                </label>
                {proofUrl || submitAttempted ? (
                  <p className={validationHelperClass(proofHasError)}>
                    {proofHasError ? "Payment proof is required." : "Payment proof is ready."}
                  </p>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              {payment ? (
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-blue-700">
                  Existing payment status: <span className="font-black uppercase">{paymentStatus}</span>
                  {payment?.referenceNumber ? ` - Ref ${payment.referenceNumber}` : ""}
                </div>
              ) : null}

              {refundStatus !== "none" ? (
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-fuchsia-100 bg-fuchsia-50 px-4 py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-fuchsia-700">
                  Refund status: <span className="font-black uppercase">{refundStatus}</span>
                  {payment?.refundAdminNote ? ` - ${payment.refundAdminNote}` : ""}
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </form>

          <aside className="bg-slate-50/80 p-4 lg:p-5">
            <SectionLabel>Order Summary</SectionLabel>

            <div className="mt-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-slate-100 text-xs font-black text-slate-700">SQ</div>
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{reservation ? packageMeta.name : "SnapQueue Package"}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{reservation ? `${getEventLabel(reservation)} (${method || "manual"})` : "Reservation payment"}</p>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-sm font-black text-slate-900">{amountText}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm">
              <label className="mb-2 block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500">Promo Code</label>
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <input value={promoCode} onChange={(event) => setPromoCode(event.target.value)} placeholder="Promo Code" className={`${inputClass()} min-w-0`} />
                <button type="button" className="rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 text-sm font-bold text-amber-800 hover:bg-amber-100">Apply</button>
              </div>

              <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
                <SummaryRow label="Subtotal" value={amountText} />
                <SummaryRow label="Taxes (if applicable)" value="PHP 0.00" />
                <SummaryRow label="Date" value={reservation ? formatDateTime(reservation.eventDateTime) : "Pending"} />
                <SummaryRow label="Status" value={<StatusBadge status={receiptMode ? paymentStatus : paymentStatus === "none" ? "none" : paymentStatus} />} />
                <div className="border-t border-slate-200 pt-3">
                  <SummaryRow label="Total" value={amountText} strong />
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {receiptMode && payment?.proofUrl ? (
              <div className="mt-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm">
                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">Receipt / Proof</p>
                <img src={payment.proofUrl} alt="Payment proof" className="mt-3 max-h-72 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 object-contain p-2" />
              </div>
            ) : null}

            <label className="mt-3.5 flex cursor-pointer items-start gap-3 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                checked={termsAccepted}
                onChange={(event) => setTermsAccepted(event.target.checked)}
                className="mt-0.5 h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 accent-blue-600 transition-all focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
              <span className="text-xs leading-relaxed text-gray-600 sm:text-sm">
                I agree to the{" "}
                <Link to="/terms" target="_blank" className="font-semibold text-blue-600 underline transition-colors hover:text-blue-700">
                  Terms & Conditions
                </Link>
              </span>
            </label>

            <div className="mt-3.5 grid gap-2">
              {!receiptMode ? (
                <button type="submit" form="payment-checkout-form" disabled={!canSubmitProof || submitting || !termsAccepted} className="flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-orange-500 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-orange-600 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60">Submit Payment Proof</button>
              ) : (
                <button type="button" onClick={() => window.print()} className="rounded-lg bg-orange-500 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-black text-white transition hover:bg-orange-600">
                  Print Receipt
                </button>
              )}

              {paymentStatus === "verified" && !receiptMode ? (
                <button type="button" onClick={() => navigate(`/payment?payment=success&reservationId=${encodeURIComponent(reservation?._id || "")}`)} className="rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-100">
                  View Receipt
                </button>
              ) : null}

              {!receiptMode ? (
                <Link to="/dashboard" className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-100">
                  Cancel
                </Link>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </aside>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 border-t border-slate-200 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs text-slate-500 sm:px-5">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <span>Terms of Service</span>
            <span>Privacy</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      )}

      <div className={`${qrFullscreenOpen ? "flex" : "hidden"} fixed inset-0 z-[140] bg-slate-950/85 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm`}>
        <div className="flex w-full flex-1 flex-col">
          <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
            <div>
              <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-blue-100/70">QR Preview</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-bold text-white">{wallet?.label || "Payment"} QR Code</p>
            </div>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setQrFullscreenOpen(false)}
              className="rounded-lg bg-white px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-slate-800 transition hover:bg-slate-100"
            >
              Close
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-black/20">
            {wallet ? (
              <img
                src={buildQrUrl(method)}
                alt={`${wallet.label} QR code fullscreen`}
                className="max-h-full max-w-full rounded-2xl bg-white p-3 object-contain"
              />
            ) : null}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </Shell>
  );
}
92 Frontend Shared

frontend/src/shared/components/AiAssistantReplyContent.jsx

Source file 92 of 111

const KNOWN_LINKS = {
  "/help-center": "Help Center",
  "/dashboard?tab=photos": "Media Archive",
  "/dashboard?tab=progress": "Project Status",
  "/dashboard?tab=history": "Booking History",
  "/dashboard?tab=messages": "Chat Admin",
  "/dashboard?tab=payments": "Payments",
  "/dashboard": "Dashboard",
  "/dashboard?tab=settings": "Settings",
  "/contact": "Contact",
  "/login": "Login",
  "/reservation": "Reservation"
};

const INLINE_PAGE_LINKS = [
  { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
  { label: "Media Archive", href: "/dashboard?tab=photos" },
  { label: "Booking History", href: "/dashboard?tab=history" },
  { label: "Chat Admin", href: "/dashboard?tab=messages" },
  { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" },
  { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
  { label: "Settings", href: "/dashboard?tab=settings" },
  { label: "Profile", href: "/dashboard?tab=profile" },
  { label: "Dashboard", href: "/dashboard" },
  { label: "Reservation", href: "/reservation" }
];

function cleanLinkLabel(label, href) {
  let nextLabel = String(label || "").trim();
  const hrefText = String(href || "").trim();

  nextLabel = nextLabel
    .replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\/dashboard\?tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\bdashboard\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
    .replace(/\badmin-help-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/\bhelp-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
    .replace(/[?]+/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s*folders?\b/gi, "")
    .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s*:\s*$/g, "")
    .trim();

  if (!nextLabel && KNOWN_LINKS[hrefText]) return KNOWN_LINKS[hrefText];
  if (/media archive/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Media Archive";
  if (/booking history/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Booking History";
  if (/project status/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Project Status";
  if (/help center/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Help Center";
  if (/payments?/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Payments";
  if (/dashboard/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Dashboard";
  if (/reservation/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Reservation";
  return nextLabel || KNOWN_LINKS[hrefText] || "Open link";
}

function cleanInlineArtifacts(text) {
  return String(text || "")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=payments"[^>]*>\s*Payments\s*<\/a>/gi, "Payments")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=photos"[^>]*>\s*Media Archive\s*<\/a>/gi, "Media Archive")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=history"[^>]*>\s*Booking History\s*<\/a>/gi, "Booking History")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=progress"[^>]*>\s*Project Status\s*<\/a>/gi, "Project Status")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=messages"[^>]*>\s*Chat Admin\s*<\/a>/gi, "Chat Admin")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=settings"[^>]*>\s*Settings\s*<\/a>/gi, "Settings")
    .replace(/<a[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>\s*([^<]+?)\s*<\/a>/gi, (_match, _href, label) => String(label || "").trim())
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=payments\b/gi, "Payments")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=photos\b/gi, "Media Archive")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=history\b/gi, "Booking History")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=progress\b/gi, "Project Status")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=messages\b/gi, "Chat Admin")
    .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=settings\b/gi, "Settings")
    .replace(/&quot;|&gt;|">/gi, "")
    .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ")
    .trim();
}

function renderLinkNode(href, key, label) {
  return (
    <a
      key={key}
      href={href}
      className="font-semibold text-sky-600 underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors hover:text-sky-700"
    >
      {label || KNOWN_LINKS[href] || href}
    </a>
  );
}

function renderPageLabelLinks(text, keyPrefix) {
  const parts = [];
  let cursor = 0;
  const source = String(text || "");

  while (cursor < source.length) {
    let nextMatch = null;

    for (const item of INLINE_PAGE_LINKS) {
      const pattern = new RegExp(`\\b${item.label.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")}\\b`, "i");
      const slice = source.slice(cursor);
      const match = pattern.exec(slice);
      if (!match) continue;
      const start = cursor + match.index;
      if (!nextMatch || start < nextMatch.start || (start === nextMatch.start && item.label.length > nextMatch.item.label.length)) {
        nextMatch = { item, start, end: start + match[0].length, text: source.slice(start, start + match[0].length) };
      }
    }

    if (!nextMatch) {
      parts.push(source.slice(cursor));
      break;
    }

    if (nextMatch.start > cursor) {
      parts.push(source.slice(cursor, nextMatch.start));
    }

    parts.push(renderLinkNode(nextMatch.item.href, `${keyPrefix}-${nextMatch.item.href}-${nextMatch.start}`, nextMatch.text));
    cursor = nextMatch.end;
  }

  return parts;
}

function renderInlineText(text) {
  const value = cleanInlineArtifacts(text);
  const pattern = /\b(https?:\/\/[^\s<]+|\/[A-Za-z0-9\-._~:/?#[\]@!$&'()*+,;=%]+)\b/g;
  const parts = [];
  let lastIndex = 0;
  let match;

  while ((match = pattern.exec(value)) !== null) {
    if (match.index > lastIndex) {
      parts.push(...renderPageLabelLinks(value.slice(lastIndex, match.index), `text-${lastIndex}`));
    }
    const href = String(match[0] || "").trim();
    parts.push(renderLinkNode(href, `${href}-${match.index}`, KNOWN_LINKS[href] || href));
    lastIndex = match.index + href.length;
  }

  if (lastIndex < value.length) {
    parts.push(...renderPageLabelLinks(value.slice(lastIndex), `text-${lastIndex}`));
  }

  return parts.length ? parts : value;
}

function parseReplyLines(value) {
  const lines = String(value || "").split("\n");
  const blocks = [];
  let index = 0;

  while (index < lines.length) {
    const current = String(lines[index] || "");
    const trimmed = current.trim();

    if (!trimmed) {
      index += 1;
      continue;
    }

    if (/^Helpful links:\s*$/i.test(trimmed)) {
      const links = [];
      index += 1;
      while (index < lines.length) {
        const nextLine = String(lines[index] || "").trim();
        if (!nextLine) break;
        const match = nextLine.match(/^-\s*(.+?):\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)$/i);
        if (!match) break;
        links.push({
          label: cleanLinkLabel(match[1], match[2]),
          href: match[2]
        });
        index += 1;
      }
      if (links.length) {
        blocks.push({ type: "links", title: "Helpful links:", items: links });
        continue;
      }
      blocks.push({ type: "paragraph", text: trimmed });
      continue;
    }

    blocks.push({ type: "paragraph", text: current });
    index += 1;
  }

  return blocks;
}

function formatProviderLabel(provider) {
  const value = String(provider || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (value === "gemini") return "Source: Gemini API";
  if (value === "fallback") return "Source: SnapQueue fallback";
  return value ? `Source: ${provider}` : "";
}

export default function AiAssistantReplyContent({ text, provider }) {
  const blocks = parseReplyLines(text);
  const providerLabel = formatProviderLabel(provider);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-2.5 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-slate-900">
      {blocks.map((block, index) => {
        if (block.type === "links") {
          return (
            <div key={`links-${index}`} className="space-y-2">
              <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-slate-500">{block.title}</p>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {block.items.map((item) => (
                  <a
                    key={`${item.href}-${item.label}`}
                    href={item.href}
                    className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-sky-200 bg-sky-50 px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-bold text-sky-700 transition-colors hover:border-sky-300 hover:bg-sky-100 hover:text-sky-800"
                  >
                    {item.label}
                  </a>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        }

        return (
          <p key={`paragraph-${index}`} className="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
            {renderInlineText(block.text)}
          </p>
        );
      })}
      {providerLabel ? (
        <p className="border-t border-slate-300/80 pt-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500">
          {providerLabel}
        </p>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/shared/components/ChatbotWidget.jsx

Source file 93 of 111

import { useEffect, useMemo } from "react";
import { getBackendOrigin } from "../services/runtime";
import api from "../services/api";

function removeChatNodes() {
  document.getElementById("chat-toggle")?.remove();
  document.getElementById("chat-window")?.remove();
}

export default function ChatbotWidget() {
  const backendOrigin = useMemo(() => getBackendOrigin(), []);
  const widgetVersion = "chatbot-fix-2026-03-22-1";

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;
    const scripts = [];

    const loadScript = (src) => new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const script = document.createElement("script");
      script.src = src;
      script.async = false;
      script.dataset.reactChatWidget = "true";
      script.onload = () => resolve(script);
      script.onerror = reject;
      scripts.push(script);
      document.body.appendChild(script);
    });

    const loadWidget = async () => {
      removeChatNodes();
      try {
        await api.get("/health");
        const response = await api.get("/system/status");
        const activeMode = String(response?.data?.system?.activeMode || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        if (activeMode) return;
        await loadScript(`${backendOrigin}/js/api.js?v=${widgetVersion}`);
        if (!cancelled) {
          await loadScript(`${backendOrigin}/js/chat-widget.js?v=${widgetVersion}`);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        if (error?.response?.status === 503) return;
        console.error("Failed to load chat widget", error);
      }
    };

    loadWidget();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      scripts.forEach((script) => script.remove());
      removeChatNodes();
    };
  }, [backendOrigin, widgetVersion]);

  return null;
}

frontend/src/shared/components/FooterNewsletterSignup.jsx

Source file 94 of 111

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import api from "../services/api";

const DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER = {
  newsletterEnabled: true,
  newsletterHeading: "Stay Updated",
  newsletterDescription: "Get the latest updates in your inbox.",
  newsletterPlaceholder: "Enter your email",
  newsletterButtonLabel: "Subscribe"
};

export default function FooterNewsletterSignup() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState(DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER);
  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState("");
  const [messageVariant, setMessageVariant] = useState("success");

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    const loadConfig = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await api.get("/system/status");
        if (!active) return;
        const system = response?.data?.system || {};
        setConfig({
          newsletterEnabled: system.newsletterEnabled !== false,
          newsletterHeading: String(system.newsletterHeading || DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterHeading),
          newsletterDescription: String(system.newsletterDescription || DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterDescription),
          newsletterPlaceholder: String(system.newsletterPlaceholder || DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterPlaceholder),
          newsletterButtonLabel: String(system.newsletterButtonLabel || DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterButtonLabel)
        });
      } catch (_error) {
        if (!active) return;
        setConfig(DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER);
      } finally {
        if (active) setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    loadConfig();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, []);

  async function handleSubmit(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (!config.newsletterEnabled || submitting) return;
    setSubmitting(true);
    setMessage("");
    try {
      const response = await api.post("/system/newsletter/subscribe", { email, source: "footer" });
      setMessageVariant("success");
      setMessage(response?.data?.message || "Subscribed successfully.");
      setEmail("");
    } catch (error) {
      setMessageVariant("error");
      setMessage(error?.response?.data?.message || "Failed to subscribe. Please try again.");
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="rounded-[1.35rem] border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-2 sm:rounded-none sm:border-0 sm:bg-transparent sm:p-0 sm:text-left">
        <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">{DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterHeading}</h4>
        <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:text-base">{DEFAULT_NEWSLETTER.newsletterDescription}</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!config.newsletterEnabled) return null;

  return (
    <div className="rounded-[1.35rem] border border-white/8 bg-white/[0.04] p-4 text-center md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-2 sm:rounded-none sm:border-0 sm:bg-transparent sm:p-0 sm:text-left">
      <h4 className="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-100">{config.newsletterHeading}</h4>
      <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400 sm:mt-4 sm:text-base">{config.newsletterDescription}</p>
      <form className="mt-4 flex flex-col gap-2.5 sm:flex-row" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
        <input
          type="email"
          value={email}
          onChange={(event) => setEmail(event.target.value)}
          placeholder={config.newsletterPlaceholder}
          className="w-full min-w-0 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/80 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 sm:rounded-lg sm:py-3.5 sm:text-base"
        />
        <button
          type="submit"
          disabled={submitting}
          className="shrink-0 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-500 px-6 py-3 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-all hover:brightness-110 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60 sm:rounded-lg sm:py-3.5 sm:text-sm sm:tracking-normal"
        >
          {submitting ? "Sending..." : config.newsletterButtonLabel}
        </button>
      </form>
      {message ? (
        <p className={`mt-3 text-sm font-semibold ${messageVariant === "error" ? "text-rose-400" : "text-emerald-400"}`}>
          {message}
        </p>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
}

function spinnerSize(size) {
  if (size === "lg") return "h-10 w-10 border-[3px]";
  if (size === "md") return "h-6 w-6 border-2";
  return "h-4 w-4 border-2";
}

function spinnerTone(tone) {
  if (tone === "light") return "border-white/25 border-t-white";
  if (tone === "slate") return "border-slate-300 border-t-slate-700";
  return "border-blue-200 border-t-blue-700";
}

export function Loader({ size = "sm", tone = "light", className = "" }) {
  return (
    <span
      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center ${className}`}
      role="status"
      aria-live="polite"
      aria-label="Loading"
    >
      <span className={`inline-block animate-spin rounded-full border-solid ${spinnerSize(size)} ${spinnerTone(tone)}`} />
    </span>
  );
}

export function SkeletonBlock() {
  return <div className="animate-pulse rounded-2xl bg-slate-200/80" />;
}

export function SectionLoadingPanel() {
  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-[240px] items-center justify-center rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/80 p-8 shadow-sm">
      <Loader size="md" tone="slate" />
    </div>
  );
}

export function PageLoadingScreen() {
  return (
    <div className="relative flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top,#163b74_0%,#07152f_38%,#020817_100%)] px-6">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,rgba(96,165,250,0.16),transparent_34%)]" />
      <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-48 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(96,165,250,0.14),transparent)]" />
      <div className="relative flex flex-col items-center text-center">
        <span
          className="h-16 w-16 animate-spin rounded-full border-[3px] border-white/15 border-t-sky-300 border-r-blue-400"
          role="status"
          aria-live="polite"
          aria-label="Loading"
        />
        <p className="mt-6 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.32em] text-sky-200/85">SnapQueue</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function FullScreenAuthOverlay({ label = "Loading", zIndexClass = "z-[260]" }) {
  return (
    <div className={`fixed inset-0 ${zIndexClass} flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/68 p-4 backdrop-blur-md`}>
      <div className="relative flex w-full max-w-[19rem] flex-col items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,0.98),rgba(30,41,59,0.95))] px-6 py-7 text-center shadow-[0_28px_70px_rgba(2,8,23,0.48)] sm:max-w-xs">
        <div className="absolute inset-x-6 top-0 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-sky-300/60 to-transparent" />
        <Loader size="lg" className="drop-shadow-[0_0_18px_rgba(125,211,252,0.28)]" />
        <p className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.26em] text-slate-100">{label}</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

frontend/src/shared/components/SafeAvatar.jsx

Source file 96 of 111

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { normalizeBackendAssetUrl } from "../services/runtime";

function normalizeAvatarSrc(value) {
  const raw = String(value || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return "";
  if (raw.startsWith("data:")) return raw;
  return normalizeBackendAssetUrl(raw, "");
}

export default function SafeAvatar({
  src = "",
  fallbackSrc = "",
  alt = "",
  className = "",
  fallback = null
}) {
  const [currentSrc, setCurrentSrc] = useState(normalizeAvatarSrc(src));

  useEffect(() => {
    setCurrentSrc(normalizeAvatarSrc(src));
  }, [src, fallbackSrc]);

  if (currentSrc) {
    return (
      <img
        src={currentSrc}
        alt={alt}
        className={className}
        onError={() => {
          const normalizedFallback = normalizeAvatarSrc(fallbackSrc);
          if (normalizedFallback && normalizedFallback !== currentSrc) {
            setCurrentSrc(normalizedFallback);
            return;
          }
          setCurrentSrc("");
        }}
      />
    );
  }

  return fallback;
}

frontend/src/shared/hooks/useBodyScrollLock.js

Source file 97 of 111

import { useEffect } from "react";

let activeLocks = 0;
let savedScrollY = 0;
let previousBodyStyles = null;
let previousDocumentStyles = null;

function lockBodyScroll() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined" || typeof document === "undefined") return;
  if (activeLocks === 0) {
    savedScrollY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || 0;
    previousBodyStyles = {
      overflow: document.body.style.overflow,
      position: document.body.style.position,
      top: document.body.style.top,
      left: document.body.style.left,
      right: document.body.style.right,
      width: document.body.style.width,
      touchAction: document.body.style.touchAction
    };
    previousDocumentStyles = {
      overflow: document.documentElement.style.overflow,
      overscrollBehavior: document.documentElement.style.overscrollBehavior
    };

    document.documentElement.style.overflow = "hidden";
    document.documentElement.style.overscrollBehavior = "none";
    document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
    document.body.style.position = "fixed";
    document.body.style.top = `-${savedScrollY}px`;
    document.body.style.left = "0";
    document.body.style.right = "0";
    document.body.style.width = "100%";
    document.body.style.touchAction = "none";
  }
  activeLocks += 1;
}

function unlockBodyScroll() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined" || typeof document === "undefined" || activeLocks === 0) return;
  activeLocks -= 1;
  if (activeLocks === 0) {
    document.documentElement.style.overflow = previousDocumentStyles?.overflow || "";
    document.documentElement.style.overscrollBehavior = previousDocumentStyles?.overscrollBehavior || "";
    document.body.style.overflow = previousBodyStyles?.overflow || "";
    document.body.style.position = previousBodyStyles?.position || "";
    document.body.style.top = previousBodyStyles?.top || "";
    document.body.style.left = previousBodyStyles?.left || "";
    document.body.style.right = previousBodyStyles?.right || "";
    document.body.style.width = previousBodyStyles?.width || "";
    document.body.style.touchAction = previousBodyStyles?.touchAction || "";
    window.scrollTo({ top: savedScrollY, left: 0, behavior: "auto" });
  }
}

export default function useBodyScrollLock(locked) {
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!locked) return undefined;
    lockBodyScroll();
    return () => unlockBodyScroll();
  }, [locked]);
}

frontend/src/shared/services/api.js

Source file 98 of 111

import axios from "axios";
import { getApiBaseUrl } from "./runtime";
import { isPrototypeMode, prototypeAdapter } from "./prototypeApi";

const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: getApiBaseUrl(),
  timeout: 15000,
  withCredentials: true,
  adapter: isPrototypeMode() ? prototypeAdapter : undefined
});

const DB_DOWN_EVENT = "snapqueue:db-down";
const DB_UP_EVENT = "snapqueue:db-up";

let wakeBackendPromise;
let preferCookieSession = false;

api.interceptors.request.use((config) => {
  const token = window.localStorage.getItem("token");
  if (token && !preferCookieSession && !config.skipBearerAuth) {
    config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
  }
  if ((preferCookieSession || config.skipBearerAuth) && config?.headers?.Authorization) {
    delete config.headers.Authorization;
  }
  if (config?.method?.toLowerCase() === "get") {
    const path = String(config.url || "");
    if (path.startsWith("/users") || path.startsWith("/reservations") || path.startsWith("/payments")) {
      config.params = { ...(config.params || {}), _ts: Date.now() };
    }
  }
  return config;
});

const setDbDownFlag = (value) => {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
  const nextValue = Boolean(value);
  if (window.__SNAPQUEUE_DB_DOWN__ === nextValue) return;
  window.__SNAPQUEUE_DB_DOWN__ = nextValue;
  const eventName = nextValue ? DB_DOWN_EVENT : DB_UP_EVENT;
  window.dispatchEvent(new Event(eventName));
};

api.interceptors.response.use(
  (response) => {
    setDbDownFlag(false);
    return response;
  },
  async (error) => {
    if (error?.response?.status === 503) {
      setDbDownFlag(true);
    }
    const status = Number(error?.response?.status || 0);
    const originalConfig = error?.config || null;
    const canRetryWithCookie =
      status === 401 &&
      originalConfig &&
      !originalConfig.__retriedWithoutBearer &&
      Boolean(originalConfig?.headers?.Authorization);
    if (canRetryWithCookie) {
      const retryConfig = {
        ...originalConfig,
        __retriedWithoutBearer: true,
        skipBearerAuth: true,
        headers: { ...(originalConfig.headers || {}) }
      };
      delete retryConfig.headers.Authorization;
      try {
        const response = await api.request(retryConfig);
        preferCookieSession = true;
        return response;
      } catch (retryError) {
        return Promise.reject(retryError);
      }
    }
    return Promise.reject(error);
  }
);

export function wakeBackend() {
  if (!wakeBackendPromise) {
    wakeBackendPromise = api.get("/system/status", { timeout: 30000 }).catch(() => null);
  }
  return wakeBackendPromise;
}

export default api;

frontend/src/shared/services/prototypeApi.js

Source file 99 of 111

function nowIso(offsetMs = 0) {
  return new Date(Date.now() + offsetMs).toISOString();
}

function clone(value) {
  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
}

function normalizePath(url = "") {
  const full = String(url || "");
  const withoutOrigin = full.replace(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/i, "");
  return withoutOrigin.startsWith("/") ? withoutOrigin : `/${withoutOrigin}`;
}

export function isPrototypeMode() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return false;
  const search = window.location.search || "";
  const hash = window.location.hash || "";
  return /(?:\?|&)prototype=1(?:&|$)/.test(search) || hash.includes("figmacapture=");
}

export function getPrototypeRole() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "user";
  const path = window.location.pathname || "/";
  return path.startsWith("/admin") ? "admin" : "user";
}

const userProfile = {
  _id: "user_proto_001",
  role: "user",
  fullName: "Patricia Soriaga",
  email: "patricia@example.com",
  phone: "09171234567",
  bio: "Event organizer and frequent SnapQueue client.",
  avatarUrl: "",
  googleAvatarUrl: "",
  emailNotificationsEnabled: true,
  twoFactorEnabled: true,
  createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 180)
};

const adminProfile = {
  _id: "admin_proto_001",
  role: "admin",
  fullName: "Peter Soriaga",
  email: "admin@snapqueue.local",
  phone: "09179876543",
  bio: "SnapQueue studio administrator.",
  avatarUrl: "",
  googleAvatarUrl: "",
  emailNotificationsEnabled: true,
  twoFactorEnabled: true,
  createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365)
};

const reservations = [
  {
    _id: "res_proto_001",
    reservationCode: "SQ-2026-001",
    fullName: userProfile.fullName,
    email: userProfile.email,
    phone: userProfile.phone,
    packageName: "Premium",
    package: "premium",
    service: "Wedding Coverage",
    eventType: "Wedding",
    eventDateTime: nowIso(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 14),
    estimatedDelivery: nowIso(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 28),
    status: "Approved",
    paymentStatus: "Partially Paid",
    notes: "Outdoor ceremony followed by reception coverage.",
    street: "123 Rizal Avenue",
    barangay: "San Isidro",
    city: "Quezon City",
    province: "Metro Manila",
    packageInclusions: "Full-day coverage, highlights reel, edited gallery",
    serviceOtherDetails: "Include family portraits before ceremony.",
    packageCustomDescription: "Premium package with same-day teaser.",
    eventTypeOtherDetails: "",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 4),
    updatedAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 6),
    workflowStage: "editing",
    amountDue: 18500,
    totalAmount: 35000
  },
  {
    _id: "res_proto_002",
    reservationCode: "SQ-2026-002",
    fullName: userProfile.fullName,
    email: userProfile.email,
    phone: userProfile.phone,
    packageName: "Standard",
    package: "standard",
    service: "Birthday Coverage",
    eventType: "Birthday",
    eventDateTime: nowIso(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 32),
    estimatedDelivery: nowIso(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 46),
    status: "Pending",
    paymentStatus: "Unpaid",
    notes: "Indoor family event with stage program.",
    street: "45 Mabini Street",
    barangay: "Santa Cruz",
    city: "Pasig",
    province: "Metro Manila",
    packageInclusions: "4 hours coverage, edited album",
    serviceOtherDetails: "Need candid table shots.",
    packageCustomDescription: "",
    eventTypeOtherDetails: "",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 1),
    updatedAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 2),
    workflowStage: "approved",
    amountDue: 12000,
    totalAmount: 12000
  }
];

const payments = [
  {
    _id: "pay_proto_001",
    reservationId: "res_proto_001",
    status: "verified",
    amount: 16500,
    totalAmount: 35000,
    balance: 18500,
    method: "GCash",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 2),
    proofUrl: "/images/snapqueuelogoo.png",
    refundStatus: "none"
  },
  {
    _id: "pay_proto_002",
    reservationId: "res_proto_002",
    status: "pending",
    amount: 4000,
    totalAmount: 12000,
    balance: 8000,
    method: "Bank Transfer",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 16),
    proofUrl: "/images/snapqueuelogoo.png",
    refundStatus: "none"
  }
];

const users = [
  userProfile,
  {
    _id: "user_proto_002",
    role: "user",
    fullName: "Alicia Santos",
    email: "alicia@example.com",
    phone: "09170001111",
    bio: "Debut client.",
    avatarUrl: "",
    googleAvatarUrl: "",
    emailNotificationsEnabled: true,
    twoFactorEnabled: false,
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 90)
  }
];

const ads = [
  {
    _id: "ad_proto_001",
    title: "Summer Portrait Promo",
    description: "Seasonal discounted portrait sessions.",
    imageUrl: "/images/snapqueuelogoo.png",
    linkUrl: "/reservation",
    isActive: true,
    startDate: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 3),
    endDate: nowIso(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 15)
  }
];

const newsletterSubscribers = [
  { _id: "sub_proto_001", email: "subscriber@example.com", createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 11) },
  { _id: "sub_proto_002", email: "marketing@example.com", createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 5) }
];

const chatThreads = [
  {
    _id: "thread_proto_001",
    userId: userProfile._id,
    userName: userProfile.fullName,
    participantName: userProfile.fullName,
    lastMessageAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 18),
    updatedAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 18),
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 6),
    status: "open",
    threadType: "live",
    unreadCount: 2
  }
];

const chatMessages = [
  {
    _id: "msg_proto_001",
    senderRole: "user",
    text: "Hi, can I update the event schedule?",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 24)
  },
  {
    _id: "msg_proto_002",
    senderRole: "admin",
    text: "Yes, we can help adjust the schedule. Please confirm the new time.",
    createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 18)
  }
];

const archiveFolders = [
  {
    _id: "folder_proto_001",
    folderName: "Wedding Highlights",
    reservationId: "res_proto_001",
    files: [
      {
        _id: "file_proto_001",
        name: "teaser-cover.jpg",
        url: "/images/Birthday.jpg",
        mimeType: "image/jpeg",
        createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 20)
      },
      {
        _id: "file_proto_002",
        name: "ceremony-preview.jpg",
        url: "/images/Event1.jpg",
        mimeType: "image/jpeg",
        createdAt: nowIso(-1000 * 60 * 60 * 19)
      }
    ]
  }
];

const systemSettings = {
  maintenanceMode: false,
  maintenanceMessage: "SnapQueue is under maintenance.",
  vacationMode: false,
  vacationMessage: "SnapQueue is currently in vacation mode.",
  activeMode: null
};

function reservationById(id) {
  return reservations.find((item) => item._id === id || item.reservationCode === id) || reservations[0];
}

function paymentByReservationId(reservationId) {
  return payments.find((item) => item.reservationId === reservationId) || payments[0];
}

function success(data, config) {
  return Promise.resolve({
    data: clone(data),
    status: 200,
    statusText: "OK",
    headers: {},
    config,
    request: {}
  });
}

function created(data, config) {
  return Promise.resolve({
    data: clone(data),
    status: 201,
    statusText: "Created",
    headers: {},
    config,
    request: {}
  });
}

export function prototypeAdapter(config) {
  const method = String(config?.method || "get").toLowerCase();
  const path = normalizePath(config?.url);
  const role = getPrototypeRole();
  const me = role === "admin" ? adminProfile : userProfile;

  if (method === "get" && path === "/system/status") {
    return success({ success: true, system: systemSettings }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/auth/me") {
    return success({ success: true, user: me }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && (path === "/reservations/dashboard" || path === "/reservations")) {
    return success({ success: true, reservations, items: reservations }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path.startsWith("/reservations/availability/month")) {
    return success({
      success: true,
      availability: [
        { date: "2026-04-08", slotsLeft: 1, status: "limited" },
        { date: "2026-04-12", slotsLeft: 0, status: "full" },
        { date: "2026-04-15", slotsLeft: 2, status: "available" }
      ]
    }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path.startsWith("/reservations/availability?")) {
    return success({
      success: true,
      availability: {
        date: "2026-04-15",
        status: "available",
        slotsLeft: 2
      }
    }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/reservations/popular-package") {
    return success({ success: true, packageName: "Premium" }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && /^\/reservations\/[^/]+$/.test(path)) {
    const id = decodeURIComponent(path.split("/").pop() || "");
    return success({ success: true, reservation: reservationById(id) }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/payments") {
    return success({ success: true, payments }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path.startsWith("/payments/reservation/")) {
    const reservationId = decodeURIComponent(path.split("/").pop() || "");
    return success({ success: true, payment: paymentByReservationId(reservationId), payments }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path.startsWith("/payments/") && path.endsWith("/proof")) {
    return success({ success: true, proofUrl: "/images/snapqueuelogoo.png" }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/users") {
    return success({ success: true, users, items: users }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/archive/me") {
    return success({ success: true, folders: archiveFolders, items: archiveFolders }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path.startsWith("/archive/admin/reservation/")) {
    return success({ success: true, folders: archiveFolders, items: archiveFolders }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/ads/admin") {
    return success({ success: true, ads, items: ads }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/chatbot/live/threads") {
    return success({ success: true, threads: chatThreads }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/chatbot/live/threads/me") {
    return success({ success: true, threads: chatThreads }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/chatbot/live/thread") {
    return success({ success: true, thread: chatThreads[0] }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && /\/chatbot\/live\/threads\/[^/]+\/messages$/.test(path)) {
    return success({ success: true, messages: chatMessages }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/system/admin") {
    return success({ success: true, system: systemSettings }, config);
  }

  if (method === "get" && path === "/system/newsletter/admin") {
    return success({ success: true, subscribers: newsletterSubscribers, items: newsletterSubscribers }, config);
  }

  if (method === "post" && path === "/chatbot/ai") {
    return success({
      success: true,
      answer: "This is a prototype response for the SnapQueue AI assistant."
    }, config);
  }

  if (method === "post" && path === "/payments") {
    return created({ success: true, payment: payments[0], message: "Prototype payment submitted." }, config);
  }

  if (["post", "patch", "put", "delete"].includes(method)) {
    return success({
      success: true,
      message: "Prototype action completed successfully."
    }, config);
  }

  return success({ success: true }, config);
}

frontend/src/shared/services/runtime.js

Source file 100 of 111

const FALLBACK_DEV_BACKEND_ORIGIN = "http://localhost:5000";

function isLocalBrowser() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return false;
  const host = String(window.location?.hostname || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  return host === "localhost" || host === "127.0.0.1";
}

const getRuntimeEnv = () => {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return {};
  const direct = window.__SNAPQUEUE_ENV__ || window.__SNAPQUEUE_RUNTIME__ || {};
  return {
    apiUrl: window.__SNAPQUEUE_API_URL__ || direct.VITE_API_URL || direct.API_URL || ""
  };
};

function trimTrailingSlash(value) {
  return String(value || "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
}

function normalizeConfiguredApiBaseUrl(value) {
  const configured = trimTrailingSlash(value);
  if (!configured) return "";
  return /\/api$/i.test(configured) ? configured : `${configured}/api`;
}

export function getApiBaseUrl() {
  const runtimeConfigured = normalizeConfiguredApiBaseUrl(getRuntimeEnv().apiUrl);
  if (runtimeConfigured) return runtimeConfigured;
  if (isLocalBrowser()) return "/api";
  const configured = normalizeConfiguredApiBaseUrl(import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL);
  if (configured) return configured;
  return "/api";
}

export function getBackendOrigin() {
  const runtimeConfigured = trimTrailingSlash(getRuntimeEnv().apiUrl);
  if (runtimeConfigured) {
    try {
      return new URL(runtimeConfigured).origin;
    } catch (_error) {
      return runtimeConfigured.replace(/\/api\/?$/, "");
    }
  }
  if (isLocalBrowser()) {
    return FALLBACK_DEV_BACKEND_ORIGIN;
  }
  const configured = trimTrailingSlash(import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL);
  if (configured) {
    try {
      return new URL(configured).origin;
    } catch (_error) {
      return configured.replace(/\/api\/?$/, "");
    }
  }
  if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.location?.origin) {
    return window.location.origin;
  }
  return FALLBACK_DEV_BACKEND_ORIGIN;
}

export function normalizeBackendAssetUrl(assetPath, fallbackPath = "/images/Pageant.jpg") {
  const value = String(assetPath || "").trim();
  const backendOrigin = getBackendOrigin();
  if (!value) return `${backendOrigin}${fallbackPath}`;
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(value)) return value;
  if (value.startsWith("/")) return `${backendOrigin}${value}`;
  if (value.startsWith("../")) return `${backendOrigin}/${value.replace(/^\.\.\//, "")}`;
  return `${backendOrigin}/${value.replace(/^\/+/, "")}`;
}

export function getOptimizedPublicImagePath(assetPath, fallbackPath = "/images/Pageant.jpg") {
  const value = String(assetPath || "").trim() || fallbackPath;
  if (!/^\/?images\//i.test(value)) return value || fallbackPath;
  const normalized = value.startsWith("/") ? value : `/${value.replace(/^\/+/, "")}`;
  if (!/\.jpe?g$/i.test(normalized) || /^\/images\/optimized\//i.test(normalized)) return normalized;
  return normalized.replace(/^\/images\//i, "/images/optimized/");
}

export function normalizeOptimizedPublicImageUrl(assetPath, fallbackPath = "/images/Pageant.jpg") {
  return normalizeBackendAssetUrl(
    getOptimizedPublicImagePath(assetPath, fallbackPath),
    getOptimizedPublicImagePath(fallbackPath, fallbackPath)
  );
}
