export const PHILIPPINE_MOBILE_REGEX = /^09\d{9}$/;

export function sanitizePhoneInput(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 11);
}

export function isValidPhilippineMobileNumber(value) {
  return PHILIPPINE_MOBILE_REGEX.test(String(value || "").trim());
}

export const PHONE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE = "Enter a valid Philippine mobile number (09XXXXXXXXX).";

frontend/src/shared/utils/receiptPdf.js

Source file 102 of 111

import { jsPDF } from "jspdf";
import html2canvas from "html2canvas";

function ensurePdfFilename(filename) {
  const base = String(filename || "snapqueue-receipt").trim() || "snapqueue-receipt";
  return base.toLowerCase().endsWith(".pdf") ? base : `${base}.pdf`;
}

function waitForNextFrame() {
  return new Promise((resolve) => window.requestAnimationFrame(() => resolve()));
}

function waitForImages(container) {
  const images = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll("img"));
  const pending = images.filter((image) => !image.complete);
  if (!pending.length) return Promise.resolve();
  return Promise.all(
    pending.map(
      (image) =>
        new Promise((resolve) => {
          image.addEventListener("load", resolve, { once: true });
          image.addEventListener("error", resolve, { once: true });
        })
    )
  );
}

async function waitForElement(documentRef, selector, timeoutMs = 8000) {
  const startedAt = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - startedAt < timeoutMs) {
    const element = documentRef.querySelector(selector);
    if (element) return element;
    await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 100));
  }
  return null;
}

function createHiddenFrame() {
  const frame = document.createElement("iframe");
  frame.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  frame.style.position = "fixed";
  frame.style.left = "-10000px";
  frame.style.top = "0";
  frame.style.width = "794px";
  frame.style.height = "1123px";
  frame.style.border = "0";
  frame.style.background = "#ffffff";
  frame.style.pointerEvents = "none";
  frame.style.opacity = "0";
  return frame;
}

async function saveElementAsPdf(element, filename) {
  const targetWindow = element?.ownerDocument?.defaultView || window;
  await waitForImages(element);
  const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    scale: Math.max(targetWindow.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2),
    useCORS: true,
    allowTaint: true,
    width: Math.ceil(element.scrollWidth || element.clientWidth || 794),
    height: Math.ceil(element.scrollHeight || element.clientHeight || 1123),
    windowWidth: Math.ceil(element.scrollWidth || element.clientWidth || 794),
    windowHeight: Math.ceil(element.scrollHeight || element.clientHeight || 1123),
    scrollX: 0,
    scrollY: 0
  });

  const pdf = new jsPDF({
    orientation: "portrait",
    unit: "mm",
    format: "a4",
    compress: true
  });

  const pageWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
  const pageHeight = pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const imageData = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
  pdf.addImage(imageData, "PNG", 0, 0, pageWidth, pageHeight, undefined, "FAST");
  pdf.save(ensurePdfFilename(filename));
}

export function isMobileReceiptViewport() {
  return typeof window !== "undefined" && window.matchMedia("(max-width: 639px)").matches;
}

export async function downloadReceiptPdfFromHtml(html, filename) {
  if (!html) throw new Error("Receipt markup is not available.");

  const frame = createHiddenFrame();
  document.body.appendChild(frame);

  try {
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      frame.onload = () => resolve();
      frame.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Unable to load the receipt page."));
      frame.srcdoc = html;
    });

    const frameDocument = frame.contentDocument;
    if (!frameDocument) {
      throw new Error("Unable to access the receipt page.");
    }

    const target = await waitForElement(frameDocument, ".paper, .receipt, body");
    if (!target) {
      throw new Error("Unable to prepare receipt content.");
    }

    await waitForNextFrame();
    await waitForNextFrame();
    await saveElementAsPdf(target, filename);
  } finally {
    frame.remove();
  }
}

export async function downloadReceiptPdfFromRoute(url, filename, selector = "[data-receipt-document]") {
  if (!url) throw new Error("Receipt page is not available.");

  const frame = createHiddenFrame();
  frame.src = url;
  document.body.appendChild(frame);

  try {
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      frame.onload = () => resolve();
      frame.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Unable to load the receipt page."));
    });

    const frameDocument = frame.contentDocument;
    if (!frameDocument) {
      throw new Error("Unable to access the receipt page.");
    }

    const target = await waitForElement(frameDocument, selector);
    if (!target) {
      throw new Error("Unable to prepare receipt content.");
    }

    await waitForNextFrame();
    await waitForNextFrame();
    await saveElementAsPdf(target, filename);
  } finally {
    frame.remove();
  }
}

export function hasAdminAccess(role) {
  const normalized = String(role || "")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[\s-]+/g, "_");
  return normalized === "admin" || normalized === "super_admin" || normalized === "superadmin";
}

frontend/src/tailwind.css

Source file 104 of 111

:root {
  --sq-bg: #f4f6f8;
  --sq-surface: #ffffff;
  --sq-surface-soft: #f8fafc;
  --sq-border: #dbe3ea;
  --sq-text: #1f2937;
  --sq-text-muted: #607084;
  --sq-primary: #2f5d8a;
  --sq-primary-hover: #274f77;
  --sq-primary-soft: #eaf1f7;
  --sq-focus: rgba(47, 93, 138, 0.25);
}

html {
  background-color: #020617 !important;
  color: var(--sq-text);
  min-height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  background-color: #020617 !important;
  color: var(--sq-text);
  margin: 0;
  min-height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  overflow-y: hidden;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

body,
#root {
  min-height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  background-color: inherit;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

#root {
  isolation: isolate;
  overflow-y: visible;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

body::-webkit-scrollbar,
#root::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  display: none;
}

.sq-password-input::-ms-reveal,
.sq-password-input::-ms-clear {
  display: none;
}

.sq-password-input::-webkit-credentials-auto-fill-button,
.sq-password-input::-webkit-textfield-decoration-container {
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}

* {
  scrollbar-color: #64748b transparent;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
}

html::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
}

html::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}

html::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #475569 0%, #94a3b8 100%);
  border-radius: 9999px;
  border: 0;
}

html::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #64748b 0%, #cbd5e1 100%);
}


.bg-slate-50 {
  background-color: var(--sq-bg) !important;
}

.bg-white {
  background-color: var(--sq-surface) !important;
}

.bg-blue-50 {
  background-color: var(--sq-primary-soft) !important;
}

.text-slate-900 {
  color: var(--sq-text) !important;
}

.text-slate-600,
.text-slate-500,
.text-slate-400 {
  color: var(--sq-text-muted) !important;
}

.border-slate-200,
.border-slate-100,
.border-slate-300 {
  border-color: var(--sq-border) !important;
}

.bg-blue-600 {
  background-color: var(--sq-primary) !important;
}

.bg-blue-700 {
  background-color: var(--sq-primary-hover) !important;
}

.text-blue-600,
.text-blue-700,
.text-blue-500 {
  color: var(--sq-primary) !important;
}

.border-blue-600,
.border-blue-500,
.border-blue-300,
.border-blue-200 {
  border-color: #b9cada !important;
}

.hover\:bg-blue-700:hover {
  background-color: var(--sq-primary-hover) !important;
}

.hover\:bg-blue-600:hover {
  background-color: var(--sq-primary) !important;
}

.hover\:text-blue-700:hover,
.hover\:text-blue-600:hover,
.hover\:text-blue-500:hover {
  color: var(--sq-primary-hover) !important;
}

.focus\:ring-blue-500:focus,
.focus\:ring-blue-600:focus,
.focus\:ring-blue-100:focus,
.focus\:ring-blue-200:focus {
  --tw-ring-color: var(--sq-focus) !important;
}

.focus\:border-blue-600:focus,
.focus\:border-blue-500:focus {

}

.card-elevated,
.glass-sidebar {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 24px 60px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.24),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
}

.admin-home-shell {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.16), transparent 24rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at left 30%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.14), transparent 22rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #020617 0%, #0f172a 48%, #020617 100%);
}

.admin-home-shell .text-slate-400,
.admin-home-shell .text-slate-500 {

}

.admin-home-shell .text-slate-600 {
  color: #334155 !important;
}

.admin-home-shell .text-slate-700,
.admin-home-shell .text-slate-800,
.admin-home-shell .text-slate-900 {
  color: #0f172a !important;
}

.admin-home-sidebar {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.985), rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.965)) !important;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.52) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(28px);
}

.admin-home-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22), rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.12)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 20px 50px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.2),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(22px);
}

.admin-shell-title {

  text-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.3);
}

.admin-solid-panel {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92), rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.84)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 24px 60px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.22),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(26px);
}

.admin-solid-panel-soft {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.96), rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.9)) !important;
}

.admin-liquid-card {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88), rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.78)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 18px 40px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.18),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.48) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(22px);
}

.admin-liquid-subpanel {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96), rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.9)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(203, 213, 225, 0.9) !important;
}

.admin-liquid-empty {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78), rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.68)) !important;
  border: 2px dashed rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.5) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
}

@keyframes admin-avatar-neo-pulse {
  0%, 100% {
    box-shadow:
      0 0 14px rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.22),
      0 0 28px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.16);
  }
  50% {
    box-shadow:
      0 0 22px rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.34),
      0 0 42px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.22);
  }
}

@keyframes admin-header-profile-enter {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate3d(-18px, 0, 0) scale(0.98);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
  }
}

@keyframes admin-wave-hand {
  0%, 60%, 100% {
    transform: rotate(0deg);
  }
  10% {
    transform: rotate(16deg);
  }
  20% {
    transform: rotate(-10deg);
  }
  30% {
    transform: rotate(14deg);
  }
  40% {
    transform: rotate(-6deg);
  }
  50% {
    transform: rotate(10deg);
  }
}

.admin-avatar-neo {
  animation: admin-avatar-neo-pulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.admin-header-profile {
  animation: admin-header-profile-enter 420ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
}

.admin-header-profile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.admin-wave-hand {
  display: inline-block;
  transform-origin: 70% 70%;
  animation: admin-wave-hand 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes admin-analytics-rise {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate3d(0, 14px, 0) scale(0.985);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
  }
}

.admin-analytics-kpi,
.admin-analytics-panel {
  animation: admin-analytics-rise 420ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
}

.admin-analytics-kpi {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.42), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.16) !important;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05),
    0 16px 40px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.18) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
}

.admin-analytics-panel {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.34), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15) !important;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
    0 20px 50px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.16) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
}

.admin-analytics-kpi:hover,
.admin-analytics-panel:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.3) !important;
}

.admin-analytics-separator {
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.32), transparent);
}

@keyframes admin-chart-line-draw {
  from {
    stroke-dashoffset: 100;
  }
  to {
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

.admin-chart-line {
  stroke-dasharray: 100;
  stroke-dashoffset: 100;
  animation: admin-chart-line-draw 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) forwards;
}

@keyframes admin-package-donut-enter {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.92) rotate(-18deg);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg);
  }
}

.admin-package-donut {
  animation: admin-package-donut-enter 620ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
}

@keyframes user-progress-icon-enter {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate3d(0, 14px, 0) scale(0.94);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
  }
}

@keyframes user-progress-icon-glow {
  0%, 100% {
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 rgba(56, 189, 248, 0),
      0 14px 28px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.16);
  }
  50% {
    box-shadow:
      0 0 18px rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.2),
      0 16px 34px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28);
  }
}

.user-progress-line {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08), rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.24), rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08));
}

.user-progress-line-active {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.18), rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.92), rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.3));
}

.user-progress-icon-enter {
  animation: user-progress-icon-enter 420ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
}

@keyframes reservation-hero-float {
  0%, 100% {
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translate3d(0, -6px, 0);
  }
}

@keyframes reservation-card-enter {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate3d(0, 24px, 0) scale(0.985);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
  }
}

.reservation-hero-float {
  animation: reservation-hero-float 5.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reservation-card-enter {
  animation: reservation-card-enter 520ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
}

.user-progress-icon-idle {
  border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.18) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), transparent 48%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.32), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12)) !important;
  color: #64748b !important;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05),
    0 14px 28px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.14);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
}

.user-progress-icon-active {
  border-color: rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.34) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18), transparent 42%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #3b82f6, #2563eb) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  animation: user-progress-icon-glow 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
}

table thead {
  background-color: var(--sq-surface-soft) !important;
}

table th {
  color: #6a7b90 !important;
}

table td {
  color: #2c3b4d;
}

@keyframes archive-folder-premium-enter {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate3d(0, 18px, 0) scale(0.96);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
  }
}

@keyframes archive-folder-premium-sheen {
  0% {
    transform: translateX(-140%) skewX(-18deg);
    opacity: 0;
  }
  25% {
    opacity: 0.35;
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateX(180%) skewX(-18deg);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}

.archive-folder-premium {
  position: relative;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.16), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(12, 20, 43, 0.96), rgba(11, 30, 68, 0.9));
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08),
    0 22px 48px rgba(2, 8, 23, 0.26);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  animation: archive-folder-premium-enter 520ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
}

.archive-folder-premium::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(110deg, transparent 22%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 48%, transparent 74%);
  transform: translateX(-140%) skewX(-18deg);
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.archive-folder-premium:hover::after {
  animation: archive-folder-premium-sheen 900ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
}

.archive-folder-premium:hover .archive-folder-premium__icon {
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.12),
    0 20px 38px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18);
}

import { defineConfig } from "vite";
import react from "@vitejs/plugin-react";

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
  server: {
    port: 5173,
    proxy: {
      "/api": {
        target: "http://localhost:5000",
        changeOrigin: true
      },
      "/images": {
        target: "http://localhost:5000",
        changeOrigin: true
      },
      "/js": {
        target: "http://localhost:5000",
        changeOrigin: true
      },
      "/uploads": {
        target: "http://localhost:5000",
        changeOrigin: true
      },
      "/css": {
        target: "http://localhost:5000",
        changeOrigin: true
      }
    }
  }
});

  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "railway:build": "npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend ci --omit=dev && node scripts/copyFrontendDist.mjs",
    "railway:start": "npm --prefix backend start"
