107 Public Asset Script

public/js/api.js

Source file 107 of 111

(() => {
  const DEFAULT_BASE = `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.hostname}:5000/api`;
  const sameOriginBase = `${window.location.origin}/api`;
  const isLocalHost = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"].includes(window.location.hostname);
  const currentPort = String(window.location.port || "");
  const baseURL = isLocalHost && currentPort && currentPort !== "5000" ? DEFAULT_BASE : sameOriginBase;
  const TOKEN_KEY = "token";
  const REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 15000;
  const nativeFetch = window.fetch.bind(window);
  let backendReadyState = "unknown";
  let backendReadyPromise = null;
  let pendingRequests = 0;
  let globalLoadingEl = null;
  let globalLoadingTextEl = null;
  let loadingShowTimer = null;

  function isLoginPage() {
    return /\/login$/i.test(window.location.pathname);
  }

  function ensureGlobalLoadingUI() {
    if (globalLoadingEl) return;
    globalLoadingEl = document.getElementById("global-api-loading");
    if (globalLoadingEl) {
      globalLoadingTextEl = document.getElementById("global-api-loading-text");
      return;
    }

    const container = document.createElement("div");
    container.id = "global-api-loading";
    container.style.position = "fixed";
    container.style.top = "10px";
    container.style.left = "50%";
    container.style.transform = "translateX(-50%)";
    container.style.zIndex = "9999";
    container.style.padding = "8px 12px";
    container.style.borderRadius = "9999px";
    container.style.background = "rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.92)";
    container.style.color = "#fff";
    container.style.fontSize = "11px";
    container.style.fontWeight = "700";
    container.style.letterSpacing = "0.04em";
    container.style.textTransform = "uppercase";
    container.style.boxShadow = "0 8px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.25)";
    container.style.pointerEvents = "none";
    container.style.opacity = "0";
    container.style.transition = "opacity 160ms ease";

    const text = document.createElement("span");
    text.id = "global-api-loading-text";
    text.textContent = "Loading...";
    container.appendChild(text);

    document.body.appendChild(container);
    globalLoadingEl = container;
    globalLoadingTextEl = text;
  }

  function setGlobalLoading(loading, message = "Loading...") {
    if (document.readyState === "loading") return;
    ensureGlobalLoadingUI();
    if (!globalLoadingEl || !globalLoadingTextEl) return;
    globalLoadingTextEl.textContent = message;
    globalLoadingEl.style.opacity = loading ? "1" : "0";
  }

  function getLoadingMessage(path) {
    const requestPath = String(path || "").toLowerCase();
    const pagePath = String(window.location.pathname || "").toLowerCase();

    if (requestPath.includes("/auth/me")) return "Checking your account...";
    if (requestPath.includes("/payments")) return pagePath === "/payment" ? "Loading payment details..." : "Updating payment data...";
    if (requestPath.includes("/reservations")) return pagePath === "/reservation" ? "Checking reservation details..." : "Loading reservations...";
    if (requestPath.includes("/gallery")) return "Loading gallery...";
    if (requestPath.includes("/system/")) return "Loading system details...";
    if (pagePath === "/dashboard") return "Preparing dashboard...";
    if (pagePath === "/admin") return "Loading admin tools...";
    if (pagePath === "/reservation") return "Preparing reservation form...";
    if (pagePath === "/payment") return "Preparing payment page...";
    return "Loading...";
  }

  function beginRequest(path) {
    pendingRequests += 1;
    const requestPath = String(path || "").toLowerCase();
    const shouldShowGlobalLoading = !requestPath.includes("/chatbot/");
    if (!isLoginPage() && shouldShowGlobalLoading && !loadingShowTimer) {
      loadingShowTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
        loadingShowTimer = null;
        if (pendingRequests > 0) {
          setGlobalLoading(true, getLoadingMessage(path));
        }
      }, 350);
    }
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("api:loading", { detail: { path, loading: true, pending: pendingRequests } }));
  }

  function endRequest(path) {
    pendingRequests = Math.max(0, pendingRequests - 1);
    if (pendingRequests === 0) {
      if (loadingShowTimer) {
        window.clearTimeout(loadingShowTimer);
        loadingShowTimer = null;
      }
      setGlobalLoading(false);
    }
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("api:loading", { detail: { path, loading: false, pending: pendingRequests } }));
  }

  function getToken() {
    return localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);
  }

  function setToken(token) {
    if (token) {
      localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY, token);
      document.cookie = `auth_token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; Path=/; SameSite=Lax`;
    }
  }

  function clearToken() {
    localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);
    document.cookie = "auth_token=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=Lax";
  }

  function syncTokenCookie() {
    const token = getToken();
    if (!token) return;
    document.cookie = `auth_token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; Path=/; SameSite=Lax`;
  }

  function navigateTo(target) {
    if (typeof window.SnapQueueNavigate === "function") {
      window.SnapQueueNavigate(target);
      return;
    }
    window.location.href = target;
  }

  function hasAdminAccess(role) {
    const normalized = String(role || "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[\s-]+/g, "_");
    return normalized === "admin" || normalized === "super_admin" || normalized === "superadmin";
  }

  async function checkBackendReady(force = false) {
    if (!force && backendReadyState === "ready") {
      return true;
    }
    if (!force && backendReadyState === "down") {
      return false;
    }
    if (!force && backendReadyPromise) {
      return backendReadyPromise;
    }

    backendReadyPromise = (async () => {
      try {
        const response = await nativeFetch(`${baseURL}/ready`, { method: "GET" });
        backendReadyState = response.ok ? "ready" : "down";
      } catch (_error) {
        backendReadyState = "down";
      } finally {
        backendReadyPromise = null;
      }
      return backendReadyState === "ready";
    })();

    return backendReadyPromise;
  }

  async function ensureSession({ redirectTo = "/login", requireAdmin = false } = {}) {
    const maybeRedirect = () => {
      if (redirectTo) {
        navigateTo(redirectTo);
      }
    };
    const token = getToken();
    if (!token) {
      maybeRedirect();
      return { ok: false };
    }
    try {
      const response = await request("/auth/me");
      if (!response?.success || !response?.user) {
        clearToken();
        maybeRedirect();
        return { ok: false };
      }
      if (requireAdmin && !hasAdminAccess(response?.user?.role)) {
        navigateTo("/dashboard");
        return { ok: false, user: response.user };
      }
      return { ok: true, user: response.user };
    } catch (_error) {
      clearToken();
      maybeRedirect();
      return { ok: false };
    }
  }

  async function request(path, options = {}) {
    beginRequest(path);
    try {
      const token = getToken();
      const headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        ...(options.headers || {})
      };

      if (token) {
        headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
      }

      const controller = new AbortController();
      const timeout = window.setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);
      let response;
      try {
        response = await nativeFetch(`${baseURL}${path}`, {
          ...options,
          headers,
          signal: controller.signal
        });
      } catch (error) {
        if (error?.name === "AbortError") {
          throw new Error("Request timed out. Please try again.");
        }
        throw new Error("Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection.");
      } finally {
        window.clearTimeout(timeout);
      }

      let data = null;
      try {
        data = await response.json();
      } catch (_err) {
        data = null;
      }

      if (!response.ok) {
        if (response.status === 401) {
          clearToken();
          if (!["/auth/signin", "/auth/signup"].includes(path) && !window.location.pathname.endsWith("/login")) {
            navigateTo("/login");
          }
        }
        const message = data?.message || `Request failed (${response.status})`;
        const requestError = new Error(message);
        requestError.status = response.status;
        requestError.data = data;
        throw requestError;
      }

      return data;
    } finally {
      endRequest(path);
    }
  }

  async function fetchWithTimeout(url, options = {}, timeoutMs = REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS) {
    beginRequest(String(url || ""));
    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeout = window.setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
    const mergedOptions = { ...options, signal: controller.signal };
    if (options?.signal) {
      if (options.signal.aborted) {
        controller.abort();
      } else {
        options.signal.addEventListener("abort", () => controller.abort(), { once: true });
      }
    }
    try {
      const response = await nativeFetch(url, mergedOptions);
      return response;
    } catch (error) {
      if (error?.name === "AbortError") {
        throw new Error("Request timed out. Please try again.");
      }
      throw error;
    } finally {
      window.clearTimeout(timeout);
      endRequest(String(url || ""));
    }
  }

  // Guard all raw fetch() usages in legacy pages so they do not hang indefinitely.
  window.fetch = (url, options = {}) => fetchWithTimeout(url, options);
  syncTokenCookie();
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    syncTokenCookie();
    if (pendingRequests > 0) {
      setGlobalLoading(true, getLoadingMessage(window.location.pathname));
    }
  });

  window.API = {
    baseURL,
    REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,
    getToken,
    setToken,
    clearToken,
    syncTokenCookie,
    fetchWithTimeout,
    checkBackendReady,
    ensureSession,
    auth: {
      signup: (payload) => request("/auth/signup", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      signin: (payload) => request("/auth/signin", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      forgotPassword: (payload) => request("/auth/forgot-password", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      resetPassword: (payload) => request("/auth/reset-password", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      me: () => request("/auth/me")
    },
    reservations: {
      create: (payload) => request("/reservations", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      checkAvailability: (dateISO) => request(`/reservations/availability?date=${encodeURIComponent(dateISO)}`),
      dashboardList: () => request("/reservations/dashboard"),
      list: () => request("/reservations"),
      getById: (id) => request(`/reservations/${id}`),
      updatePricing: (id, payload) => request(`/reservations/${id}/pricing`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      acceptPricing: (id) => request(`/reservations/${id}/pricing/accept`, { method: "POST" }),
      rejectPricing: (id) => request(`/reservations/${id}/pricing/reject`, { method: "POST" }),
      cancel: (id, cancellationReason) => request(`/reservations/${id}/cancel`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify({ cancellationReason }) }),
      updateStatus: (id, statusOrPayload, workflowStage) => {
        const payload = typeof statusOrPayload === "object"
          ? statusOrPayload
          : { status: statusOrPayload, ...(workflowStage ? { workflowStage } : {}) };
        return request(`/reservations/${id}/status`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      }
    },
    payments: {
      create: (payload) => request("/payments", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      byReservation: (reservationId) => request(`/payments/reservation/${reservationId}`),
      list: () => request("/payments"),
      deleteById: async (id) => {
        try {
          return await request(`/payments/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            return request(`/payments/${id}/delete`, { method: "POST" });
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      updateStatus: (id, status) => request(`/payments/${id}/status`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify({ status }) }),
      requestRefund: (id, reasonOrPayload) => {
        const payload = typeof reasonOrPayload === "object"
          ? reasonOrPayload
          : { reason: reasonOrPayload };
        return request(`/payments/${id}/refund/request`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      },
      resolveRefund: (id, actionOrPayload) => {
        const payload = typeof actionOrPayload === "object"
          ? actionOrPayload
          : { action: actionOrPayload };
        return request(`/payments/${id}/refund/resolve`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      }
    },
    users: {
      me: () => request("/users/me"),
      updateMe: (payload) => request("/users/me", { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      deleteMe: () => request("/users/me", { method: "DELETE" }),
      changePassword: (payload) => request("/users/me/password", { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      list: () => request("/users"),
      setBlocked: async (id, blocked) => {
        try {
          return await request(`/users/${id}/block`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify({ blocked }) });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request(`/users/block/${id}`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify({ blocked }) });
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request(`/users/${id}/ban`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify({ blocked }) });
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      deleteById: async (id) => {
        try {
          return await request(`/users/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            return request(`/users/delete/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
          }
          throw error;
        }
      }
    },
    archive: {
      me: () => request("/archive/me"),
      adminReservationFolders: (reservationId) => request(`/archive/admin/reservation/${reservationId}`),
      adminCreateFolder: (payload) => request("/archive/admin/folders", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) }),
      adminUpload: (payload) => request("/archive/admin/upload", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
    },
    gallery: {
      list: (category) => request(`/gallery${category ? `?category=${encodeURIComponent(category)}` : ""}`)
    },
    chatbot: {
      listQA: () => request("/chatbot/qa"),
      askAI: (question) => request("/chatbot/ai", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify({ question }) }),
      getMyLiveThread: () => request("/chatbot/live/thread"),
      listMyLiveThreads: () => request("/chatbot/live/threads/me"),
      listLiveThreads: (status) => request(`/chatbot/live/threads${status ? `?status=${encodeURIComponent(status)}` : ""}`),
      listLiveMessages: (threadId, after) =>
        request(`/chatbot/live/threads/${threadId}/messages${after ? `?after=${encodeURIComponent(after)}` : ""}`),
      sendLiveMessage: (threadId, text) =>
        request(`/chatbot/live/threads/${threadId}/messages`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify({ text }) }),
      updateLiveThreadStatus: (threadId, status) =>
        request(`/chatbot/live/threads/${threadId}/status`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify({ status }) })
    },
    contact: {
      create: (payload) => request("/contact", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
    },
    system: {
      status: () => request("/system/status"),
      stats: () => request("/system/stats"),
      adminStatus: () => request("/system/admin"),
      updateAdmin: (payload) => request("/system/admin", { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
    },
    ads: {
      listActive: async () => {
        try {
          return await request("/ads");
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request("/advertisements");
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request("/adverts");
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      listAdmin: async () => {
        try {
          return await request("/ads/admin");
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request("/advertisements/admin");
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request("/adverts/admin");
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      create: async (payload) => {
        try {
          return await request("/ads", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request("/advertisements", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request("/adverts", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      update: async (id, payload) => {
        try {
          return await request(`/ads/${id}`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request(`/advertisements/${id}`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request(`/adverts/${id}`, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      },
      remove: async (id) => {
        try {
          return await request(`/ads/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
        } catch (error) {
          if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || ""))) {
            try {
              return await request(`/advertisements/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
            } catch (fallbackError) {
              if (/route not found/i.test(String(fallbackError?.message || ""))) {
                return request(`/adverts/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
              }
              throw fallbackError;
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      }
    }
  };
})();
108 Public Asset Script

public/js/chat-widget.js

Source file 108 of 111

(() => {
  const path = String(window.location.pathname || "").toLowerCase();
  const isAdminDashboardPage = path.endsWith("/admin") || path === "/admin";
  if (isAdminDashboardPage) return;
  const dashToggle = document.getElementById("dash-chat-toggle");
  const dashWindow = document.getElementById("dash-chat-window");
  if (dashToggle) dashToggle.remove();
  if (dashWindow) dashWindow.remove();

  const isHomePage = path === "/";
  const legacyToggle = document.getElementById("chat-toggle");
  const legacyWindow = document.getElementById("chat-window");
  if (legacyToggle && isHomePage) return;
  if (legacyToggle && !isHomePage) legacyToggle.remove();
  if (legacyWindow && !isHomePage) legacyWindow.remove();

  const CHAT_OPEN_KEY = "sq_chat_open";
  const CHAT_VIEW_KEY = "sq_chat_view";

  const template = `
  <style id="chat-widget-fab-style">
	    #chat-toggle.chat-fab {
	      position: fixed;
      right: 1.5rem;
      bottom: 1.5rem;
      z-index: 130;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 4.15rem;
      height: 4.15rem;
	      overflow: visible;
      border: none;
      border-radius: 9999px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 28% 24%, rgba(255,255,255,0.32), transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(145deg, #38bdf8 0%, #2563eb 42%, #1d4ed8 100%);
      color: #ffffff;
      box-shadow:
        0 22px 44px -18px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.72),
        0 10px 24px -12px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.52),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.45),
        0 0 0 5px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      transition: width 0.32s ease, border-radius 0.32s ease, transform 0.22s ease, box-shadow 0.22s ease, background 0.22s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    #chat-toggle.chat-fab::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -0.2rem;
      border-radius: inherit;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(125,211,252,0.18), rgba(59,130,246,0.02));
      z-index: -1;
      filter: blur(8px);
      opacity: 0.9;
      transition: opacity 0.22s ease, transform 0.22s ease;
    }
    #chat-toggle.chat-fab:hover {
      width: 9.5rem;
      border-radius: 9999px;
      transform: translateY(-3px);
      box-shadow:
        0 28px 54px -18px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.78),
        0 14px 28px -14px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.58),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.48),
        0 0 0 6px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.14);
    }
    #chat-toggle.chat-fab:active {
      transform: scale(0.96);
    }
    #chat-toggle.chat-fab:hover::after {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1.04);
    }
	    #chat-toggle .chat-fab-icon {
	      width: 1.68rem;
	      height: 1.68rem;
	      filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.16));
	      transition: transform 0.22s ease 0.05s, opacity 0.16s ease;
	    }
	    #chat-toggle:hover .chat-fab-icon {
	      transform: translateY(-3rem);
	      opacity: 0;
	    }
    #chat-toggle .chat-fab-label {
      position: absolute;
      color: #ffffff;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      white-space: nowrap;
      transform: scale(0);
      text-shadow: 0 1px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.32);
      transition: transform 0.22s ease;
    }
	    #chat-toggle:hover .chat-fab-label {
	      transform: scale(1);
	    }
    #chat-window .chat-inline-link {
      color: #2563eb;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-decoration: underline;
      text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px;
      text-underline-offset: 3px;
      transition: color 0.2s ease;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-inline-link:hover {
      color: #1d4ed8;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-helpful-label {
      margin-top: 0.1rem;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #64748b;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-link-list {
      margin-top: 0.5rem;
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-link-item {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-link-chip {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      border-radius: 9999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(186, 230, 253, 1);
      background: rgba(240, 249, 255, 1);
      padding: 0.38rem 0.78rem;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #0369a1;
      transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
    }
    #chat-window .chat-link-chip:hover {
      border-color: rgba(125, 211, 252, 1);
      background: rgba(224, 242, 254, 1);
      color: #075985;
    }
  </style>
  <button id="chat-toggle" class="chat-fab" aria-label="Open chat">
	    <span class="chat-fab-label">Help</span>
	    <svg id="chat-open-icon" class="chat-fab-icon" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.1" d="M21 11.5a8.5 8.5 0 01-8.5 8.5H8l-5 3V11.5A8.5 8.5 0 0111.5 3h1A8.5 8.5 0 0121 11.5z"/></svg>
    <svg id="chat-close-icon" class="chat-fab-icon hidden" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
  </button>

  <div id="chat-window" class="hidden fixed bottom-24 right-3 sm:right-6 z-[140] flex h-[592px] max-h-[calc(100vh-112px)] w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] max-w-[368px] flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-[28px] border border-slate-200/70 bg-white shadow-[0_28px_90px_rgba(15,23,42,0.28)] transition-all duration-300 origin-bottom-right scale-95 opacity-0">
    <div id="chat-header" class="bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(125,211,252,0.22),transparent_34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e293b_58%,#1d4ed8)] text-white px-5 pt-4 pb-4 transition-all duration-200">
      <div class="flex items-center">
        <div>
          <p class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-sky-200/85">Live Support</p>
          <div class="mt-1 font-black text-[1.8rem] leading-tight tracking-tight">SnapQueue Support</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="chat-header-greeting" class="mt-3 transition-all duration-200">
        <p class="max-w-[15rem] text-[13px] leading-6 text-slate-200/85">Ask AI for quick answers or switch to admin chat for direct help with bookings, payments, and delivery.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,#eff6ff_0%,#f8fafc_20%,#ffffff_100%)]">
      <div id="chat-messages-view" class="hidden h-full flex flex-col">
        <div class="px-4 pt-3 pb-3 border-b border-slate-200/80 bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center gap-2">
          <button id="chat-mode-ai" class="px-3.5 py-2 rounded-full bg-slate-900 text-white text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5">AI Assistant</button>
          <button id="chat-mode-admin" class="px-3.5 py-2 rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-700 text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:bg-slate-50">Chat Admin</button>
        </div>
        <div id="client-chat-messages" class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3.5 bg-transparent"></div>
        <div id="client-chat-login-hint" class="hidden p-4 border-t border-slate-200 bg-amber-50">
          <p class="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2 font-semibold">Admin chat needs sign-in. You can still use AI Assistant here.</p>
          <a href="/login" class="inline-block px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase">Login for Admin Chat</a>
        </div>
        <div id="client-chat-input-wrap" class="p-2.5 border-t border-slate-200/90 bg-white/88 backdrop-blur-xl">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-[1.35rem] border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-2 py-2 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.8)] transition-all duration-200 focus-within:border-sky-300 focus-within:bg-white focus-within:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(14,165,233,0.12)]">
            <input id="client-chat-input" type="text" placeholder="Write your message..." class="flex-1 bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none">
            <button id="client-chat-send" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-[1rem] bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1d4ed8)] px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(29,78,216,0.28)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_16px_34px_rgba(29,78,216,0.34)]">Send</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  document.body.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", template);

  const chatToggle = document.getElementById("chat-toggle");
  const chatWindow = document.getElementById("chat-window");
  if (!chatToggle || !chatWindow) return;

	  const chatOpenIcon = document.getElementById("chat-open-icon");
	  const chatCloseIcon = document.getElementById("chat-close-icon");
	  const chatFabLabel = chatToggle.querySelector(".chat-fab-label");
	  const chatBadge = document.getElementById("chat-badge");
	  const chatMinimize = document.getElementById("chat-minimize");
  const chatMessagesView = document.getElementById("chat-messages-view");
  const chatHeader = document.getElementById("chat-header");
  const chatHeaderGreeting = document.getElementById("chat-header-greeting");
  const clientChatMessages = document.getElementById("client-chat-messages");
  const clientChatInput = document.getElementById("client-chat-input");
  const clientChatSend = document.getElementById("client-chat-send");
  const clientChatLoginHint = document.getElementById("client-chat-login-hint");
  const clientChatInputWrap = document.getElementById("client-chat-input-wrap");
  const defaultChatLoginHintHTML = clientChatLoginHint?.innerHTML || "";
  const chatModeAiBtn = document.getElementById("chat-mode-ai");
  const chatModeAdminBtn = document.getElementById("chat-mode-admin");
  const escapeText = (value) => String(value || "").replaceAll("&", "&amp;").replaceAll("<", "&lt;").replaceAll(">", "&gt;").replaceAll("\"", "&quot;").replaceAll("'", "&#39;");
  const buildLocalAiReply = (question) => {
    const input = String(question || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const isHowTo = /\b(how|steps|guide|process|what do i do|where do i)\b/.test(input);

    if (/book|reservation|reserve|schedule/.test(input)) {
      return isHowTo
        ? [
            "You can book a reservation directly in SnapQueue through the Reservation page.",
            "",
            "Steps:",
            "1. Open the Reservation page and choose your package or service.",
            "2. Fill in your event details, contact information, and preferred date.",
            "3. Submit the form and wait for admin review and approval.",
            "4. Once approved, continue to payment and upload your proof of payment.",
            "",
            "Helpful links:",
            "- Reservation: /reservation",
            "- Help Center: /help-center"
          ].join("\n")
        : "You can submit a reservation through the Reservation page, then wait for admin review before continuing to payment.\n\nHelpful links:\n- Reservation: /reservation\n- Help Center: /help-center";
    }

    if (/payment|gcash|maya|pay|reference/.test(input)) {
      return isHowTo
        ? [
            "Payments are completed after your reservation is approved.",
            "",
            "Steps:",
            "1. Open your dashboard or payment page after approval.",
            "2. Enter the required reference number.",
            "3. Upload your payment proof.",
            "4. Wait for the admin team to verify and update your status.",
            "",
            "Helpful links:",
            "- Payments: /dashboard?tab=payments",
            "- Help Center: /help-center"
          ].join("\n")
        : "After approval, open the payment flow, enter your reference number, and upload your proof of payment.\n\nHelpful links:\n- Payments: /dashboard?tab=payments\n- Help Center: /help-center";
    }

    if (/refund/.test(input)) {
      return [
        "Refund requests are handled from your payment records after a payment already exists.",
        "",
        "Steps:",
        "1. Open the Payments section in your dashboard.",
        "2. Select the payment record that needs a refund request.",
        "3. Submit the reason for the refund.",
        "4. Wait for admin review and status updates.",
        "",
        "Helpful links:",
        "- Payments: /dashboard?tab=payments",
        "- Help Center: /help-center"
      ].join("\n");
    }

    if (/delivery|archive|download|photos|video|media/.test(input)) {
      return [
        "Delivered files and project updates are usually available from your dashboard and media archive.",
        "",
        "Helpful links:",
        "- Media Archive: /dashboard?tab=photos",
        "- Project Status: /dashboard?tab=progress",
        "- Help Center: /help-center"
      ].join("\n");
    }

    return [
      "I can help with reservations, payments, refunds, delivery updates, and navigation inside SnapQueue.",
      "",
      "If you ask a how-to question, I can answer with steps and helpful links.",
      "",
      "Helpful links:",
      "- Help Center: /help-center",
      "- Reservation: /reservation"
    ].join("\n");
  };
  const linkifyAssistantReply = (value) => {
    const knownLinks = {
      "/help-center": "Help Center",
      "/dashboard?tab=photos": "Media Archive",
      "/dashboard?tab=progress": "Project Status",
      "/dashboard?tab=history": "Booking History",
      "/dashboard?tab=messages": "Chat Admin",
      "/dashboard?tab=payments": "Payments",
      "/dashboard": "Dashboard",
      "/dashboard?tab=settings": "Settings",
      "/contact": "Contact",
      "/login": "Login",
      "/reservation": "Reservation"
    };
    const inlinePageLinks = [
      { label: "Project Status", href: "/dashboard?tab=progress" },
      { label: "Media Archive", href: "/dashboard?tab=photos" },
      { label: "Booking History", href: "/dashboard?tab=history" },
      { label: "Chat Admin", href: "/dashboard?tab=messages" },
      { label: "Help Center", href: "/help-center" },
      { label: "Payments", href: "/dashboard?tab=payments" },
      { label: "Settings", href: "/dashboard?tab=settings" },
      { label: "Profile", href: "/dashboard?tab=profile" },
      { label: "Dashboard", href: "/dashboard" },
      { label: "Reservation", href: "/reservation" }
    ];

    const cleanLinkLabel = (label, href) => {
      let nextLabel = String(label || "").trim();
      const hrefText = String(href || "").trim();

      nextLabel = nextLabel
        .replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/gi, "")
        .replace(/\/dashboard\?tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
        .replace(/\bdashboard\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
        .replace(/tab=[^\s"']+/gi, "")
        .replace(/\badmin-help-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
        .replace(/\bhelp-center\?[^\s"']*/gi, "")
        .replace(/">/g, "")
        .replace(/[?]+/g, " ")
        .replace(/\s*folders?\b/gi, "")
        .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ")
        .replace(/\s*:\s*$/g, "")
        .trim();

      if (!nextLabel && knownLinks[hrefText]) {
        return knownLinks[hrefText];
      }

      if (/media archive/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Media Archive";
      if (/booking history/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Booking History";
      if (/project status/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Project Status";
      if (/receipt preview/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Receipt Preview";
      if (/help center/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Help Center";
      if (/payments?/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Payments";
      if (/dashboard/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Dashboard";
      if (/reservation/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Reservation";
      if (/phone number is already registered/i.test(nextLabel)) return "Phone Number Already Registered";

      return nextLabel || knownLinks[hrefText] || "Open link";
    };

    const cleanInlineArtifacts = (text) => {
      let nextText = String(text || "");
      nextText = nextText
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=payments"[^>]*>\s*Payments\s*<\/a>/gi, "Payments")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=photos"[^>]*>\s*Media Archive\s*<\/a>/gi, "Media Archive")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=history"[^>]*>\s*Booking History\s*<\/a>/gi, "Booking History")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=progress"[^>]*>\s*Project Status\s*<\/a>/gi, "Project Status")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=messages"[^>]*>\s*Chat Admin\s*<\/a>/gi, "Chat Admin")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="\/dashboard\?tab=settings"[^>]*>\s*Settings\s*<\/a>/gi, "Settings")
        .replace(/<a[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>\s*([^<]+?)\s*<\/a>/gi, (_match, _href, label) => String(label || "").trim())
        .replace(
          /(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=([A-Za-z-]+)(?:&quot;|")&gt;([A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s-]+)/gi,
          (_match, _tabName, label) => String(label || "").trim() || "Dashboard"
        )
        .replace(
          /(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=([A-Za-z-]+)(?:"|&quot;)>([A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s-]+)/gi,
          (_match, _tabName, label) => String(label || "").trim() || "Dashboard"
        )
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=payments\b/gi, "Payments")
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=photos\b/gi, "Media Archive")
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=history\b/gi, "Booking History")
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=progress\b/gi, "Project Status")
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=messages\b/gi, "Chat Admin")
        .replace(/(?:\/)?Dashboard\?tab=settings\b/gi, "Settings")
        .replace(/&quot;|&gt;|">/gi, "")
        .replace(/\s{2,}/g, " ");
      return nextText.trim();
    };

    const renderLink = (href, label) => `<a class="chat-inline-link" href="${escapeText(href)}">${escapeText(label || href)}</a>`;
    const formatInlineMarkdown = (input) => String(input || "")
      .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, "<strong>$1</strong>")
      .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "<code>$1</code>");
    const renderPageLabelLinks = (input) => {
      const source = String(input || "");
      const parts = [];
      let cursor = 0;

      while (cursor < source.length) {
        let nextMatch = null;

        inlinePageLinks.forEach((item) => {
          const pattern = new RegExp(`\\b${item.label.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")}\\b`, "i");
          const slice = source.slice(cursor);
          const match = pattern.exec(slice);
          if (!match) return;
          const start = cursor + match.index;
          if (!nextMatch || start < nextMatch.start || (start === nextMatch.start && item.label.length > nextMatch.item.label.length)) {
            nextMatch = {
              item,
              start,
              end: start + match[0].length,
              text: source.slice(start, start + match[0].length)
            };
          }
        });

        if (!nextMatch) {
          parts.push(escapeText(source.slice(cursor)));
          break;
        }

        if (nextMatch.start > cursor) {
          parts.push(escapeText(source.slice(cursor, nextMatch.start)));
        }

        parts.push(renderLink(nextMatch.item.href, nextMatch.text));
        cursor = nextMatch.end;
      }

      return parts.join("");
    };
    const filterNonLinkHelpfulLines = (input) => {
      const sourceLines = String(input || "").split("\n");
      const nextLines = [];

      for (let index = 0; index < sourceLines.length; index += 1) {
        const current = String(sourceLines[index] || "");
        if (!/^Helpful links:\s*$/i.test(current.trim())) {
          nextLines.push(current);
          continue;
        }

        const collected = [];
        let offset = index + 1;
        while (offset < sourceLines.length) {
          const candidate = String(sourceLines[offset] || "");
          if (!candidate.trim()) break;
          if (!/^\s*[-*]\s+/.test(candidate)) break;
          collected.push(candidate);
          offset += 1;
        }

        const validItems = collected.filter((line) => /:\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)\s*$/i.test(line.trim()));
        if (validItems.length) {
          nextLines.push("Helpful links:");
          nextLines.push(...validItems);
        }

        index = offset - 1;
      }

      return nextLines.join("\n");
    };

    const lines = filterNonLinkHelpfulLines(value).split("\n");
    const htmlParts = [];
    let collectingLinks = false;
    let pendingLinkItems = [];
    let pendingHelpfulLabel = "";

    const flushLinkItems = () => {
      if (!pendingLinkItems.length) return;
      htmlParts.push(`<div class="chat-link-list">${pendingLinkItems.join("")}</div>`);
      pendingLinkItems = [];
    };

    lines.forEach((line) => {
      const trimmed = line.trim();
      if (!trimmed) {
        flushLinkItems();
        htmlParts.push("");
        collectingLinks = false;
        pendingHelpfulLabel = "";
        return;
      }

      if (/^Helpful links:\s*$/i.test(trimmed)) {
        flushLinkItems();
        htmlParts.push(`<p class="chat-helpful-label">${escapeText(trimmed)}</p>`);
        collectingLinks = true;
        pendingHelpfulLabel = "";
        return;
      }

      const labeledLinkMatch = trimmed.match(/^(-\s*)?(.+?):\s*(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)$/i);
      if (labeledLinkMatch) {
        const bullet = labeledLinkMatch[1] || "";
        const label = cleanLinkLabel(labeledLinkMatch[2].trim(), labeledLinkMatch[3].trim());
        const href = labeledLinkMatch[3].trim();
        if (collectingLinks || bullet) {
          pendingLinkItems.push(`<span class="chat-link-item"><a class="chat-link-chip" href="${escapeText(href)}">${escapeText(label)}</a></span>`);
          return;
        }
        flushLinkItems();
        htmlParts.push(`${escapeText(bullet)}${renderLink(href, label)}`);
        return;
      }

      const standaloneLinkMatch = trimmed.match(/^(https?:\/\/\S+|\/\S+)$/i);
      if (standaloneLinkMatch) {
        const href = standaloneLinkMatch[1].trim();
        if (collectingLinks) {
          const label = pendingHelpfulLabel ? cleanLinkLabel(pendingHelpfulLabel, href) : (knownLinks[href] || href);
          pendingLinkItems.push(`<span class="chat-link-item"><a class="chat-link-chip" href="${escapeText(href)}">${escapeText(label)}</a></span>`);
          pendingHelpfulLabel = "";
          return;
        }
        flushLinkItems();
        htmlParts.push(renderLink(href, knownLinks[href] || href));
        return;
      }

      if (collectingLinks) {
        const helpfulLabelOnlyMatch = trimmed.match(/^-\s*(.+?):\s*$/);
        if (helpfulLabelOnlyMatch) {
          pendingHelpfulLabel = helpfulLabelOnlyMatch[1].trim();
          return;
        }
      }

      flushLinkItems();
      collectingLinks = false;
      pendingHelpfulLabel = "";
      let escapedLine = renderPageLabelLinks(cleanInlineArtifacts(line));
      escapedLine = escapedLine.replace(
        /\b(https?:\/\/[^\s<]+|\/[A-Za-z0-9\-._~:/?#[\]@!$&'()*+,;=%]+)\b/g,
        (match) => renderLink(match, knownLinks[match] || match)
      );
      escapedLine = formatInlineMarkdown(escapedLine);
      htmlParts.push(`<p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">${escapedLine}</p>`);
    });
    flushLinkItems();
    return htmlParts.join("");
  };

  const chatApi = (() => {
    const hasApi = Boolean(window.API?.chatbot);
    const hasNewMethods = Boolean(window.API?.chatbot?.getMyLiveThread && window.API?.chatbot?.sendLiveMessage && window.API?.chatbot?.listLiveMessages);
    if (hasApi && hasNewMethods) return window.API.chatbot;
    const base = window.API?.baseURL || `${window.location.origin}/api`;
    const getToken = () => window.API?.getToken?.() || localStorage.getItem("token") || "";
    const req = async (p, options = {}) => {
      const response = await fetch(`${base}${p}`, { ...options, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...(getToken() ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${getToken()}` } : {}), ...(options.headers || {}) } });
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.message || `Request failed (${response.status})`);
      return data;
    };
    const reqWithFallback = async (primaryPath, fallbackPath, options = {}) => {
      try { return await req(primaryPath, options); } catch (error) {
        if (/route not found/i.test(String(error?.message || "")) && fallbackPath) return req(fallbackPath, options);
        throw error;
      }
    };
	    return {
	      listQA: () => (window.API?.chatbot?.listQA ? window.API.chatbot.listQA() : req("/chatbot/qa")),
	      askAI: (question) => (window.API?.chatbot?.askAI ? window.API.chatbot.askAI(question) : req("/chatbot/ai", { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify({ question }) })),
	      getMyLiveThread: () => reqWithFallback("/chatbot/live/thread", "/chatbot/thread"),
	      listMyLiveThreads: () => reqWithFallback("/chatbot/live/threads/me", "/chatbot/threads/me"),
	      listLiveMessages: (threadId) => reqWithFallback(`/chatbot/live/threads/${threadId}/messages`, `/chatbot/threads/${threadId}/messages`),
	      sendLiveMessage: (threadId, text) => reqWithFallback(`/chatbot/live/threads/${threadId}/messages`, `/chatbot/threads/${threadId}/messages`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify({ text }) })
	    };
	  })();

  const isBackendReady = async () => {
    if (window.API?.checkBackendReady) {
      return window.API.checkBackendReady();
    }
    return true;
  };

  let currentView = "messages";
  let currentChatMode = "ai";
	  let liveThreadId = null;
	  let livePollTimer = null;
	  let chatCloseTimer = null;
	  let guestAdminFallbackNotified = false;
	  let unreadPollTimer = null;
	  let currentAuthToken = "";
	  let currentAuthUser = undefined;
	  let liveThreadsAccessBlocked = false;

	  const getSeenKey = (threadId) => `sq_chat_seen_admin_${String(threadId || "")}`;

	  const setUnreadBadge = (count) => {
	    if (!chatBadge) return;
	    const safeCount = Math.max(0, Number(count || 0));
	    chatBadge.classList.toggle("hidden", safeCount <= 0);
	  };

	  const getLastSeenAdminAt = (threadId) => {
	    try {
	      return localStorage.getItem(getSeenKey(threadId)) || "";
	    } catch (_error) {
	      return "";
	    }
	  };

	  const setLastSeenAdminAt = (threadId, value) => {
	    if (!threadId || !value) return;
	    try {
	      localStorage.setItem(getSeenKey(threadId), String(value));
	    } catch (_error) {
	      // Ignore storage failures for the notification badge.
	    }
	  };

	  const markAdminMessagesSeen = (threadId, messages = []) => {
	    const latestAdminMessage = [...messages]
	      .reverse()
	      .find((item) => String(item?.senderRole || "").toLowerCase() === "admin" && item?.createdAt);
	    if (!latestAdminMessage?.createdAt) return;
	    setLastSeenAdminAt(threadId, latestAdminMessage.createdAt);
	    setUnreadBadge(0);
	  };

  const setAiProviderBadge = (provider) => {
    void provider;
  };

  const fetchCurrentUser = async () => {
    const ready = await isBackendReady();
    if (!ready) {
      currentAuthToken = "";
      currentAuthUser = null;
      return null;
    }
    const token = window.API?.getToken?.() || localStorage.getItem("token") || "";
    if (!token) {
      currentAuthToken = "";
      currentAuthUser = null;
      return null;
    }
    if (currentAuthUser !== undefined && currentAuthToken === token) {
      return currentAuthUser;
    }
    currentAuthToken = token;
    if (window.API?.auth?.me) {
      try {
        const res = await window.API.auth.me();
        currentAuthUser = res?.user || null;
        return currentAuthUser;
      } catch (_e) {
        currentAuthUser = null;
        return null;
      }
    }
    currentAuthUser = null;
    return null;
  };

	  const openChat = () => {
	    if (chatCloseTimer) clearTimeout(chatCloseTimer);
	    chatWindow.classList.remove("hidden");
	    requestAnimationFrame(() => { chatWindow.classList.remove("scale-95", "opacity-0"); chatWindow.classList.add("scale-100", "opacity-100"); });
	    chatOpenIcon?.classList.add("hidden");
	    chatCloseIcon?.classList.remove("hidden");
	    if (chatFabLabel) chatFabLabel.textContent = "Exit";
	    chatToggle.setAttribute("aria-label", "Close chat");
	    localStorage.setItem(CHAT_OPEN_KEY, "1");
	    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("sq-chat-visibility", { detail: { open: true } }));
	    if (currentView === "messages") ensureLiveReady();
	  };

	  const closeChat = () => {
	    if (chatCloseTimer) clearTimeout(chatCloseTimer);
	    chatWindow.classList.add("scale-95", "opacity-0");
	    chatWindow.classList.remove("scale-100", "opacity-100");
	    chatCloseTimer = setTimeout(() => { chatWindow.classList.add("hidden"); chatCloseTimer = null; }, 300);
	    chatOpenIcon?.classList.remove("hidden");
	    chatCloseIcon?.classList.add("hidden");
	    if (chatFabLabel) chatFabLabel.textContent = "Help";
	    chatToggle.setAttribute("aria-label", "Open chat");
	    localStorage.setItem(CHAT_OPEN_KEY, "0");
	    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("sq-chat-visibility", { detail: { open: false } }));
	    stopLivePolling();
	  };

  const setChatMode = (mode) => {
    currentChatMode = mode === "admin" ? "admin" : "ai";
    guestAdminFallbackNotified = false;
    const aiActive = currentChatMode === "ai";
    if (chatModeAiBtn) {
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("bg-slate-900", aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("text-white", aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("shadow-sm", aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("border", !aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("border-slate-200", !aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("bg-white", !aiActive);
      chatModeAiBtn.classList.toggle("text-slate-700", !aiActive);
    }
    if (chatModeAdminBtn) {
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("bg-slate-900", !aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("text-white", !aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("shadow-sm", !aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("border", aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("border-slate-200", aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("bg-white", aiActive);
      chatModeAdminBtn.classList.toggle("text-slate-700", aiActive);
    }
    ensureLiveReady();
  };

  const switchView = (view) => {
    currentView = "messages";
    localStorage.setItem(CHAT_VIEW_KEY, "messages");
    chatMessagesView?.classList.remove("hidden");
    chatHeader?.classList.remove("py-3");
    chatHeader?.classList.add("pt-5", "pb-4");
    chatHeaderGreeting?.classList.remove("hidden");
    ensureLiveReady();
  };

  const stopLivePolling = () => {
    if (livePollTimer) { clearInterval(livePollTimer); livePollTimer = null; }
  };

  const renderMessages = (messages = []) => {
    if (!clientChatMessages) return;
    if (!messages.length) {
      clientChatMessages.innerHTML = `<div class="flex h-full items-center justify-center"><div class="rounded-[1.6rem] border border-slate-200 bg-white/88 px-6 py-5 text-center shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur-sm"><p class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400">SnapQueue Support</p><p class="mt-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600">Start a conversation with AI Assistant or switch to Chat Admin.</p></div></div>`;
      return;
    }
    clientChatMessages.innerHTML = messages.map((message) => {
      const mine = message.senderRole !== "admin";
      const time = new Date(message.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
      return `<div class="mb-3 flex ${mine ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"}"><div class="${mine ? "bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1d4ed8)] text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(29,78,216,0.28)]" : "bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-800 shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)]"} max-w-[82%] rounded-[1.35rem] ${mine ? "rounded-br-md" : "rounded-bl-md"} px-3.5 py-3"><p class="text-sm leading-relaxed">${escapeText(message.text)}</p><p class="mt-1 text-[10px] ${mine ? "text-sky-100/85" : "text-slate-400"}">${escapeText(time)}</p></div></div>`;
    }).join("");
    clientChatMessages.scrollTop = clientChatMessages.scrollHeight;
  };

	  const loadLiveMessages = async () => {
	    if (!liveThreadId || currentChatMode !== "admin") return;
	    const response = await chatApi.listLiveMessages(liveThreadId);
	    const nextMessages = response?.messages || [];
	    renderMessages(nextMessages);
	    if (currentView === "messages" && !chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden")) {
	      markAdminMessagesSeen(liveThreadId, nextMessages);
	    }
	    const closed = response?.thread?.status === "closed";
	    if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.disabled = closed;
	    if (clientChatSend) clientChatSend.disabled = closed;
	    if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.placeholder = closed ? "This chat has been closed by admin." : "Write your message...";
	  };

	  const refreshUnreadBadge = async () => {
	    const ready = await isBackendReady();
	    if (!ready) {
	      liveThreadsAccessBlocked = true;
	      setUnreadBadge(0);
	      return;
	    }
	    const token = window.API?.getToken?.() || localStorage.getItem("token");
	    if (!token) {
	      liveThreadsAccessBlocked = false;
	      setUnreadBadge(0);
	      return;
	    }
	    if (liveThreadsAccessBlocked) {
	      setUnreadBadge(0);
	      return;
	    }
	    const user = await fetchCurrentUser();
	    if (String(user?.role || "").toLowerCase() === "admin") {
	      liveThreadsAccessBlocked = true;
	      setUnreadBadge(0);
	      return;
	    }
	    try {
	      const response = await chatApi.listMyLiveThreads();
	      const latestThread = Array.isArray(response?.threads) ? response.threads[0] : null;
	      const latestThreadId = String(latestThread?._id || "");
	      if (!latestThreadId) {
	        setUnreadBadge(0);
	        return;
	      }
	      const messageResponse = await chatApi.listLiveMessages(latestThreadId);
	      const items = Array.isArray(messageResponse?.messages) ? messageResponse.messages : [];
	      const effectiveThreadId = String(liveThreadId || latestThreadId);
	      const shouldMarkSeen = currentView === "messages" && currentChatMode === "admin" && !chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden") && effectiveThreadId === latestThreadId;
	      if (shouldMarkSeen) {
	        markAdminMessagesSeen(latestThreadId, items);
	        return;
	      }
	      const lastSeenAdminAt = new Date(getLastSeenAdminAt(latestThreadId) || 0).getTime();
	      const unreadCount = items.filter((item) => {
	        if (String(item?.senderRole || "").toLowerCase() !== "admin") return false;
	        const createdAt = new Date(item?.createdAt || 0).getTime();
	        return createdAt && createdAt > lastSeenAdminAt;
	      }).length;
	      setUnreadBadge(unreadCount);
	    } catch (error) {
	      const message = String(error?.message || "").toLowerCase();
	      if (message.includes("403") || message.includes("401") || message.includes("forbidden") || message.includes("unauthorized")) {
	        liveThreadsAccessBlocked = true;
	        setUnreadBadge(0);
	        return;
	      }
	      // Preserve current badge state on background failures.
	    }
	  };

	  const startLivePolling = () => {
	    stopLivePolling();
	    livePollTimer = setInterval(async () => {
	      if (currentView !== "messages" || currentChatMode !== "admin" || chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden")) return;
	      await loadLiveMessages();
	    }, 3000);
	  };

	  const startUnreadPolling = () => {
	    if (unreadPollTimer) {
	      clearInterval(unreadPollTimer);
	    }
	    unreadPollTimer = setInterval(() => {
	      refreshUnreadBadge().catch(() => {});
	    }, 12000);
	  };

  const ensureLiveReady = async () => {
    if (clientChatLoginHint) clientChatLoginHint.innerHTML = defaultChatLoginHintHTML;
    const ready = await isBackendReady();
    if (!ready) {
      liveThreadsAccessBlocked = true;
      stopLivePolling();
      clientChatLoginHint?.classList.add("hidden");
      clientChatInputWrap?.classList.remove("hidden");
      if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.disabled = false;
      if (clientChatSend) clientChatSend.disabled = false;
      if (currentChatMode === "admin") {
        setChatMode("ai");
      }
      if (clientChatMessages) {
        clientChatMessages.innerHTML = `<div class="flex h-full items-center justify-center"><div class="rounded-[1.6rem] border border-sky-200 bg-white/90 px-6 py-5 text-center shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(14,165,233,0.12)]"><p class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-500">AI Assistant Available</p><p class="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-600">Live admin chat is temporarily unavailable while the server reconnects. You can still ask the AI assistant for help center guidance.</p></div></div>`;
      }
      return;
    }
	    if (currentChatMode === "ai") {
      clientChatLoginHint?.classList.add("hidden");
      clientChatInputWrap?.classList.remove("hidden");
      if (clientChatMessages && !clientChatMessages.children.length) {
        clientChatMessages.innerHTML = `<div class="flex h-full items-center justify-center"><div class="rounded-[1.6rem] border border-sky-200 bg-white/90 px-6 py-5 text-center shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(14,165,233,0.12)]"><p class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-sky-500">AI Assistant Ready</p><p class="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-600">Ask about reservations, payments, refunds, or delivery timelines.</p></div></div>`;
      }
	      if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.disabled = false;
	      if (clientChatSend) clientChatSend.disabled = false;
	      stopLivePolling();
	      refreshUnreadBadge().catch(() => {});
	      return;
	    }

    const user = await fetchCurrentUser();
    if (!user) {
      setChatMode("ai");
      clientChatLoginHint?.classList.remove("hidden");
      if (!guestAdminFallbackNotified) {
        clientChatMessages?.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", `<p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Guest mode: AI Assistant is available. Login for admin chat.</p>`);
        guestAdminFallbackNotified = true;
      }
      return;
    }
    if (String(user?.role || "").toLowerCase() === "admin") {
      liveThreadsAccessBlocked = true;
      setUnreadBadge(0);
      setChatMode("ai");
      if (clientChatLoginHint) {
        clientChatLoginHint.innerHTML = `<p class="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2 font-semibold">Admin live chat is handled in the admin dashboard. AI Assistant is still available here.</p><a href="/admin" class="inline-block px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase">Open Admin Dashboard</a>`;
        clientChatLoginHint.classList.remove("hidden");
      }
      return;
    }
    liveThreadsAccessBlocked = false;
    if (!liveThreadId) {
      const threadRes = await chatApi.getMyLiveThread();
      liveThreadId = threadRes?.thread?._id || null;
    }
    if (liveThreadId) {
      await loadLiveMessages();
      startLivePolling();
    }
  };

  const sendMessage = async () => {
    const text = String(clientChatInput?.value || "").trim();
    if (!text) return;
    const originalText = text;
    if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.value = "";

    if (currentChatMode === "ai") {
      const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
      clientChatMessages?.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", `<div class="mb-3 flex justify-end"><div class="max-w-[82%] rounded-[1.35rem] rounded-br-md bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1d4ed8)] px-3.5 py-3 text-white shadow-[0_12px_28px_rgba(29,78,216,0.28)]"><p class="text-sm leading-relaxed">${escapeText(originalText)}</p><p class="mt-1 text-[10px] text-sky-100/85">${escapeText(time)}</p></div></div>`);
      clientChatMessages?.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", `<div id="ai-loading" class="mb-3 flex justify-start"><div class="max-w-[82%] rounded-[1.35rem] rounded-bl-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3.5 py-3 text-sm text-slate-700 shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)]"><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="h-2 w-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-sky-500"></span><span class="h-2 w-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-sky-500 [animation-delay:120ms]"></span><span class="h-2 w-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-sky-500 [animation-delay:240ms]"></span></span></div></div>`);
      clientChatMessages.scrollTop = clientChatMessages.scrollHeight;
      let reply = "I can help with packages, reservations, payments, and delivery timelines.";
      let provider = "fallback";
      try {
        const response = await chatApi.askAI(originalText);
        reply = String(response?.answer || "").trim() || reply;
        provider = String(response?.provider || "fallback").trim().toLowerCase() || "fallback";
        setAiProviderBadge(provider);
      } catch (_error) {
        reply = buildLocalAiReply(originalText);
        provider = "fallback";
        setAiProviderBadge("fallback");
      }
      document.getElementById("ai-loading")?.remove();
      const t2 = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
      const providerLabel = provider === "gemini" ? "Source: Gemini API" : "Source: SnapQueue fallback";
      clientChatMessages?.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", `<div class="mb-3 flex justify-start"><div class="max-w-[82%] rounded-[1.35rem] rounded-bl-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3.5 py-3 text-slate-800 shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)]"><div class="text-sm leading-relaxed" style="white-space: normal;">${linkifyAssistantReply(reply)}</div><div class="mt-2 border-t border-slate-200 pt-2 text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500">${escapeText(providerLabel)}</div><p class="mt-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400">${escapeText(t2)}</p></div></div>`);
      clientChatMessages.scrollTop = clientChatMessages.scrollHeight;
      return;
    }

    try {
      if (!liveThreadId) await ensureLiveReady();
      if (!liveThreadId) throw new Error("Please login first to start live chat.");
      await chatApi.sendLiveMessage(liveThreadId, originalText);
      await loadLiveMessages();
    } catch (error) {
      if (clientChatInput) clientChatInput.value = originalText;
      clientChatMessages?.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", `<p class="text-xs text-red-600">${escapeText(error?.message || "Failed to send message.")}</p>`);
    }
  };

  chatToggle.addEventListener("click", () => chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden") ? openChat() : closeChat());
  chatMinimize?.addEventListener("click", closeChat);
  chatModeAiBtn?.addEventListener("click", () => setChatMode("ai"));
  chatModeAdminBtn?.addEventListener("click", () => setChatMode("admin"));
  clientChatSend?.addEventListener("click", sendMessage);
  clientChatInput?.addEventListener("keypress", (event) => { if (event.key === "Enter") { event.preventDefault(); sendMessage(); } });

  document.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
    if (chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden")) return;
    if (chatWindow.contains(event.target) || chatToggle.contains(event.target)) return;
    closeChat();
  });
  document.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => { if (event.key === "Escape" && !chatWindow.classList.contains("hidden")) closeChat(); });

	  (async () => {
    try {
      const ready = await isBackendReady();
      if (ready) {
        await chatApi.listQA();
      }
    } catch (_error) {
      // Keep live support available even if FAQ loading fails.
    }
	    setAiProviderBadge("checking");
	    switchView("messages");
	    startUnreadPolling();
	    await refreshUnreadBadge().catch(() => {});
	    if (localStorage.getItem(CHAT_OPEN_KEY) === "1") openChat();
	  })();
})();

    "buildCommand": "npm run railway:build"
  },

110 Project File

RAILWAY.md

Source file 110 of 111

# Railway Deployment

This project is set up for a single-host Railway deployment.

## Service setup

- Use the repository root as the service root.
- Railway config is in [railway.json](/c:/Users/peter/Projects/VSCODE/SnapQueue/SnapQueue/railway.json).
- The root [package.json](/c:/Users/peter/Projects/VSCODE/SnapQueue/SnapQueue/package.json) exists only to make Railway detect this repository as a Node app and run the deployment scripts from the repo root.
- The frontend is built first, then copied into `backend/client-dist`, and the backend serves both the website and the API from one service.

## Required environment variables

Add these in Railway:

```env
NODE_ENV=production
MONGO_URI=your-mongodb-connection-string
JWT_SECRET=your-random-secret

BREVO_API_KEY=your-brevo-key
MAIL_FROM=your-sender-email
CONTACT_RECEIVER_EMAIL=where-contact-form-messages-go

CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=your-cloud-name
CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=your-api-key
CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=your-api-secret

GEMINI_API_KEY=your-gemini-key
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-oauth-client-id
```

Use [backend/.env.example](/c:/Users/peter/Projects/VSCODE/SnapQueue/SnapQueue/backend/.env.example) as the reference list, then copy the values you need into Railway Variables or your local `backend/.env`.

## Recommended public URL variables

Set these to the same Railway app URL:

```env
CLIENT_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
FRONTEND_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
BACKEND_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
PUBLIC_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
APP_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
PASSWORD_RESET_BASE_URL=https://your-app.up.railway.app
```

## Frontend variables

For single-host Railway:

- Leave `VITE_API_URL` unset.
- `VITE_BOOTSTRAP_MIN_MS` and `VITE_BOOTSTRAP_MAX_MS` are optional.
- `VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` is only needed if you want the frontend build to read it directly. The backend already reads `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`.

## Notes

- `PORT` is provided by Railway automatically.
- Do not deploy only the `frontend` folder.
- If Google login is enabled, make sure the Railway domain is added to your Google OAuth allowed origins and redirect settings.
111 Project Script

scripts/copyFrontendDist.mjs

Source file 111 of 111

import fs from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

const rootDir = process.cwd();
const sourceDir = path.join(rootDir, "frontend", "dist");
const targetDir = path.join(rootDir, "backend", "client-dist");

if (!fs.existsSync(sourceDir)) {
  throw new Error(`Frontend build output not found at ${sourceDir}`);
}

fs.rmSync(targetDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(targetDir), { recursive: true });
fs.cpSync(sourceDir, targetDir, { recursive: true });

console.log(`Copied frontend build from ${sourceDir} to ${targetDir}`);
